toeic.example_en: Journalists can download our media kit from the corporate communications page.
toeic.example_zh: 記者可從企業傳播頁面下載我們的媒體資料包。

toeic.example_en: Consistent branding across markets strengthens global brand recognition.
toeic.example_zh: 跨市場一致的品牌塑造能強化全球品牌辨識度。

toeic.example_en: Our crisis communication plan was activated within thirty minutes of the incident.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的危機溝通計畫在事件發生後三十分鐘內啟動。

toeic.example_en: Reputation management requires monitoring traditional and social media continuously.
toeic.example_zh: 聲譽管理需要持續監控傳統與社群媒體。

toeic.example_en: Targeted media outreach generated coverage in five major trade publications.
toeic.example_zh: 針對性的媒體聯繫在五家主要業界刊物獲得報導。

toeic.example_en: All interview requests should be forwarded to the communications team.
toeic.example_zh: 所有採訪邀約都應轉交給傳播團隊。

toeic.example_en: A one page fact sheet accompanies every official press release we issue.
toeic.example_zh: 我們發布的每份官方新聞稿都附有一頁情況說明書。

toeic.example_en: Our brand voice should remain professional yet approachable in every channel.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的品牌語調在每個管道都應保持專業且易親近。

toeic.example_en: Brand guidelines specify approved logos, colors, and typography for all materials.
toeic.example_zh: 品牌指南規範所有素材使用的核可商標、色彩與字體。

toeic.example_en: The public relations team coordinates messaging across regional offices.
toeic.example_zh: 公共關係團隊協調各區域辦事處的訊息傳遞。

toeic.example_en: Media monitoring tools alert us to brand mentions in real time.
toeic.example_zh: 媒體監測工具會即時提醒我們品牌被提及的情況。

toeic.example_en: Publishing research positions our executives as thought leadership voices.
toeic.example_zh: 發表研究將我們的高階主管定位為思想領導者。

toeic.example_en: The chief technology officer contributed a byline article to a leading magazine.
toeic.example_zh: 技術長為一家領導性雜誌撰寫了一篇署名文章。

toeic.example_en: Reinforce the three key messages whenever you respond to media questions.
toeic.example_zh: 每次回答媒體提問時請強化三項關鍵訊息。

toeic.example_en: A media advisory was sent to invite reporters to the product unveiling.
toeic.example_zh: 已發出媒體通知邀請記者參與產品發表。

toeic.example_en: The interview will broadcast on the national business channel tomorrow evening.
toeic.example_zh: 該採訪將於明晚在全國商業頻道播出。

toeic.example_en: The executive shared the background information off the record.
toeic.example_zh: 該主管以不可公開引述的方式分享了背景資訊。

toeic.example_en: She agreed to speak on the record about the upcoming strategic shift.
toeic.example_zh: 她同意就即將到來的策略轉變進行可公開引述的發言。

toeic.example_en: A brief icebreaker helps participants feel comfortable before the workshop begins.
toeic.example_zh: 簡短的破冰活動有助於參與者在工作坊開始前感到自在。

toeic.example_en: The networking event after the panel attracted nearly two hundred attendees.
toeic.example_zh: 座談會後的人脈交流活動吸引了近兩百名與會者。

toeic.example_en: Exchange a business card with each new contact at the trade show booth.
toeic.example_zh: 在貿易展攤位與每位新認識的人交換名片。

toeic.example_en: We have an introductory call scheduled with the prospective client on Thursday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們已安排週四與潛在客戶進行初次通話。

toeic.example_en: Send a follow up email within 24 hours to keep the conversation moving forward.
toeic.example_zh: 在二十四小時內寄送後續郵件以推進對話。

toeic.example_en: A handwritten thank you note leaves a lasting impression after an interview.
toeic.example_zh: 手寫感謝信能在面試後留下持久印象。

toeic.example_en: Hotel staff helped arrange ground transportation to the manufacturing site.
toeic.example_zh: 飯店人員協助安排前往製造廠的地面交通。

toeic.example_en: Please proceed to boarding gate twenty three for the connecting flight to Osaka.
toeic.example_zh: 請前往二十三號登機門搭乘前往大阪的轉機航班。

toeic.example_en: Reaching the platinum loyalty tier unlocks priority booking and free upgrades.
toeic.example_zh: 達到白金會員等級可解鎖優先訂位與免費升等。

toeic.example_en: Status members can relax in the executive lounge between connecting flights.
toeic.example_zh: 會員可在轉機之間於貴賓室放鬆休息。

toeic.example_en: Reserve a meeting room with video conferencing capability for the client review.
toeic.example_zh: 請為客戶審查預約具備視訊會議功能的會議室。

toeic.example_en: Use the whiteboard to sketch the workflow during the brainstorming session.
toeic.example_zh: 腦力激盪時請使用白板繪製工作流程。

toeic.example_en: I will screen share the latest dashboard so we can review the metrics together.
toeic.example_zh: 我會分享螢幕呈現最新的儀表板，讓我們一起檢視指標。

toeic.example_en: We added one final agenda item to discuss next quarter's hiring plan.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新增了最後一項議程項目以討論下季的招聘計畫。

toeic.example_en: We are awaiting final sign off from the legal team before signing the agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 我們正等待法務團隊的最終核准後才簽署協議。

toeic.example_en: We received a request for proposal from a Fortune 500 prospective client.
toeic.example_zh: 我們收到一家財星五百大潛在客戶的建議書徵求。

toeic.example_en: Vendor selection criteria include price, quality, and post sale support.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商遴選標準包括價格、品質與售後支援。

toeic.example_en: The scope of work should be agreed in writing before any billable hours begin.
toeic.example_zh: 在任何計費工時開始前，工作範圍應以書面協議確認。

toeic.example_en: Deliverable acceptance triggers the next payment installment in the contract.
toeic.example_zh: 交付物驗收會觸發合約中的下一期付款。

toeic.example_en: Each business unit tracks five key performance indicators on a monthly basis.
toeic.example_zh: 每個業務單位每月追蹤五項關鍵績效指標。

toeic.example_en: Objective and key results help teams align around measurable quarterly goals.
toeic.example_zh: 目標與關鍵成果有助於團隊圍繞可衡量的季度目標達成一致。

toeic.example_en: A healthy talent pipeline supports our aggressive expansion plans.
toeic.example_zh: 健全的人才庫支持我們積極的擴展計畫。

toeic.example_en: Our remote work policy gives employees flexibility while maintaining productivity standards.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的遠距工作政策在維持生產力標準的同時給予員工彈性。

toeic.example_en: Hybrid work arrangements allow staff to balance office and home days each week.
toeic.example_zh: 混合辦公安排讓員工每週能平衡辦公室與居家工作日。

toeic.example_en: Our collaboration tool integrates messaging, video calls, and file sharing.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的協作工具整合訊息、視訊通話與檔案分享。

toeic.example_en: Continuous process improvement reduces waste and accelerates delivery times.
toeic.example_zh: 持續的流程改善能減少浪費並加速交付時間。

toeic.example_en: Each task has a documented standard operating procedure for new hires to follow.
toeic.example_zh: 每項任務都有書面記錄的標準作業程序供新進員工依循。

toeic.example_en: Your service ticket has been escalated to the second level support team.
toeic.example_zh: 您的服務工單已升級至第二線支援團隊。

toeic.example_en: The supervisor completed a hazard assessment of the loading dock last Friday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 主管上週五下午完成了裝卸區的危害評估。

toeic.example_en: Workplace injury rates dropped after the company introduced mandatory safety training sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 公司推行強制安全訓練後，工作場所傷害率下降。

toeic.meaning_zh: 上鎖掛牌（機械斷電程序）
toeic.example_en: Technicians must follow lockout-tagout procedures before servicing any electrical equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 技術人員維修任何電氣設備前必須遵守上鎖掛牌程序。

toeic.meaning_zh: 符合職業安全衛生署規範
toeic.example_en: Our plant passed the annual OSHA compliance audit without any major violations recorded.
toeic.example_zh: 我們工廠通過年度 OSHA 合規稽核，沒有任何重大違規記錄。

toeic.example_en: Workers handling solvents are required to wear a fitted respirator at all times.
toeic.example_zh: 處理溶劑的員工必須隨時配戴合適的呼吸防護器。

toeic.example_en: The ventilation system was upgraded to reduce airborne contaminants in the paint shop.
toeic.example_zh: 通風系統升級以減少烤漆區空氣中的污染物。

toeic.example_en: Every department must have a fully stocked first aid kit within easy reach.
toeic.example_zh: 每個部門必須備有觸手可及且補給充足的急救箱。

toeic.example_en: Daily noise exposure on the factory floor must not exceed regulated decibel limits.
toeic.example_zh: 工廠日常噪音暴露不得超過法規分貝限值。

toeic.example_en: The safety data sheet for every chemical must be accessible to workers on site.
toeic.example_zh: 每種化學品的安全資料表必須讓現場工人可取得。

toeic.example_en: Each new hire receives an ergonomic assessment of their workstation within the first week.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新進員工首週內會接受工作站人因工學評估。

toeic.example_en: Roofers must always use fall protection harnesses when working above six feet.
toeic.example_zh: 屋頂工人在六英尺以上作業時必須使用墜落防護吊帶。

toeic.example_en: Entry into any confined space requires a permit and a trained standby attendant.
toeic.example_zh: 進入任何侷限空間需要許可證及一名受訓的待命人員。

toeic.example_en: Please familiarize yourself with the evacuation route posted near the main exit.
toeic.example_zh: 請熟悉張貼在主要出口附近的疏散路線。

toeic.example_en: Exposure to lead is a serious occupational hazard for battery plant employees.
toeic.example_zh: 鉛暴露對電池廠員工而言是嚴重的職業危害。

toeic.example_en: Inspect your safety harness before each shift to ensure it remains in good condition.
toeic.example_zh: 每班輪值前檢查安全吊帶，確保狀況良好。

toeic.example_en: The company provided ergonomic keyboards to reduce wrist strain among office staff.
toeic.example_zh: 公司提供符合人因工程的鍵盤以減少辦公員工的腕部壓力。

toeic.example_en: Industrial hygiene specialists measured airborne dust levels in the grinding department weekly.
toeic.example_zh: 工業衛生專家每週測量研磨部門的空氣粉塵濃度。

toeic.example_en: Laboratory waste must be disposed of in the labeled biohazard containers at all times.
toeic.example_zh: 實驗室廢棄物必須隨時丟入標示為生物危害的容器。

toeic.example_en: Voice-directed picking has improved order accuracy in our largest distribution center.
toeic.example_zh: 語音導引揀貨提高了我們最大配送中心的訂單準確率。

toeic.example_en: Outsourcing to a third-party logistics provider reduced our fixed warehousing costs.
toeic.example_zh: 外包給第三方物流業者降低了我們的固定倉儲成本。

toeic.example_en: Each stock keeping unit is tagged with a unique barcode for inventory tracking.
toeic.example_zh: 每個庫存單位皆貼上獨特條碼以追蹤庫存。

toeic.example_en: The new warehouse management system reduced picking errors by nearly 40 percent.
toeic.example_zh: 新倉庫管理系統將揀貨錯誤減少近 40%。

toeic.example_en: Vaccines require an unbroken cold chain from manufacturer all the way to clinic.
toeic.example_zh: 疫苗需要從製造商到診所完整不斷的冷鏈。

toeic.example_en: The shipment is being sent on consignment until the retailer confirms final acceptance.
toeic.example_zh: 貨品以寄售方式出貨，直到零售商確認最終驗收。

toeic.example_en: Last mile delivery is often the most expensive segment of the supply chain.
toeic.example_zh: 最後一哩配送通常是供應鏈中最昂貴的一段。

toeic.example_en: The container ship is expected to arrive at the Port of Long Beach Thursday.
toeic.example_zh: 貨櫃船預計週四抵達長堤港。

toeic.example_en: The new vessel can transport up to 24,000 TEU on a single voyage.
toeic.example_zh: 新船一趟可載運多達 24,000 TEU。

toeic.example_en: We received a cease-and-desist letter alleging trademark infringement on our new logo.
toeic.example_zh: 我們收到一封警告函，指控新標誌構成商標侵權。

toeic.example_en: The author receives quarterly royalties based on net sales of the licensed textbook.
toeic.example_zh: 作者依授權教科書淨銷售獲得每季權利金。

toeic.example_en: Our patent portfolio includes 230 issued patents across five core technology areas.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的專利組合涵蓋五大核心技術領域共 230 項已核准專利。

toeic.example_en: Both parties signed a confidential settlement agreement ending the two-year legal dispute.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方簽署保密和解協議，結束長達兩年的法律糾紛。

toeic.example_en: Several shareholders filed a class action lawsuit alleging misleading financial disclosures.
toeic.example_zh: 數位股東提起集體訴訟，指控誤導性財務揭露。

toeic.example_en: Please sign the non-disclosure agreement before viewing the confidential prototype designs.
toeic.example_zh: 查看機密原型設計前請先簽署保密協議。

toeic.example_en: The jury awarded one million dollars in punitive damages to the plaintiff.
toeic.example_zh: 陪審團判給原告一百萬美元的懲罰性賠償。

toeic.example_en: The defendant filed a motion for summary judgment to dismiss the case early.
toeic.example_zh: 被告聲請簡易判決以提早駁回該案。

toeic.example_en: An expert witness in semiconductor design will testify at next months patent trial.
toeic.example_zh: 一位半導體設計專家證人將在下月專利審判中作證。

toeic.example_en: The competitor faces a tortious interference claim for poaching contracted clients.
toeic.example_zh: 該競爭者因挖走簽約客戶而面臨侵權干擾索賠。

toeic.example_en: Small startups are frequently targeted by patent trolls demanding licensing fees.
toeic.example_zh: 小型新創公司常成為要求授權費的專利蟑螂的目標。

toeic.example_en: The indemnification clause requires the supplier to cover any third-party infringement claims.
toeic.example_zh: 賠償條款要求供應商承擔任何第三方侵權索賠。

toeic.example_en: The Black-Scholes model remains a standard framework for options pricing in equity markets.
toeic.example_zh: Black-Scholes 模型仍是股票市場選擇權定價的標準框架。

toeic.example_en: The neobank offers fee-free international transfers through its mobile-only platform.
toeic.example_zh: 該純網銀透過行動裝置專屬平台提供免費國際匯款。

toeic.example_en: Smart contracts automatically execute payment once predefined contractual conditions have been met.
toeic.example_zh: 智能合約在預設合約條件達成時自動執行付款。

toeic.example_en: Stablecoins are pegged to fiat currencies to minimize daily price volatility for users.
toeic.example_zh: 穩定幣與法定貨幣掛鉤以將每日價格波動最小化。

toeic.example_en: Open banking APIs enable third-party developers to build innovative personal finance apps.
toeic.example_zh: 開放銀行 API 讓第三方開發者打造創新的個人理財應用程式。

toeic.example_en: Peer-to-peer lending platforms connect retail investors directly with individual borrowers online.
toeic.example_zh: 點對點借貸平台讓散戶投資人直接與個別借款人線上連結。

toeic.example_en: Asset tokenization enables fractional ownership of real estate through blockchain registries.
toeic.example_zh: 資產代幣化透過區塊鏈登記實現不動產的部分所有權。

toeic.example_en: A rising volatility index typically reflects increased investor fear in the equity market.
toeic.example_zh: 上升的波動率指數通常反映股票市場投資人恐慌加劇。

toeic.example_en: The spot price of gold rose sharply following the central banks rate decision.
toeic.example_zh: 央行利率決議後黃金現貨價格急升。

toeic.example_en: Traders monitor implied volatility to gauge market expectations of future price swings.
toeic.example_zh: 交易員監控隱含波動率以判斷市場對未來價格波動的預期。

toeic.example_en: Decentralized finance protocols allow lending and borrowing without traditional intermediaries.
toeic.example_zh: 去中心化金融協議讓借貸無需傳統中介。

toeic.example_en: Banks invest heavily in regtech solutions to automate complex compliance reporting requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行大量投資監理科技解決方案以自動化複雜的合規申報。

toeic.example_en: Insurtech startups use telematics data to price auto insurance policies more accurately.
toeic.example_zh: 保險科技新創公司利用車聯網資料更精準訂定汽車保險費率。

toeic.example_en: The phase three clinical trial will enroll 1,200 patients across twelve countries.
toeic.example_zh: 三期臨床試驗將於十二個國家招募 1,200 名病患。

toeic.meaning_zh: 美國食品藥物管理局核准
toeic.example_en: FDA approval is expected by the second quarter following the priority review submission.
toeic.example_zh: 依優先審查申請，預計第二季可獲得 FDA 核准。

toeic.example_en: The biosimilar offers comparable efficacy at roughly 30 percent lower treatment cost.
toeic.example_zh: 該生物相似性藥品提供相當療效，治療成本約低 30%。

toeic.example_en: Prior authorization from the insurer is required before scheduling the specialty infusion.
toeic.example_zh: 安排該項特殊靜脈注射前須取得保險公司的事前授權。

toeic.example_en: Our facility manufactures the active pharmaceutical ingredient used in the cardiovascular drug.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的廠房製造該心血管藥物所用的原料藥。

toeic.example_en: All production sites must comply with good manufacturing practice standards for pharmaceuticals.
toeic.example_zh: 所有生產廠房須符合藥品優良製造規範。

toeic.example_en: The sponsor filed an investigational new drug application with the regulatory authority yesterday.
toeic.example_zh: 申辦者昨日向主管機關遞交新藥研究中藥品申請。

toeic.example_en: Pharmacovigilance teams monitor adverse drug reactions reported by physicians and patients globally.
toeic.example_zh: 藥物安全監視團隊監控全球醫師與病患通報的藥物不良反應。

toeic.example_en: Once the patent expires, generic drug manufacturers can enter the market freely.
toeic.example_zh: 專利到期後，學名藥廠商可自由進入市場。

toeic.example_en: The insurer updated its drug formulary to include several new biologic therapies.
toeic.example_zh: 保險公司更新藥物處方集以納入數種新的生物製劑療法。

toeic.example_en: Patient enrollment for the oncology study was completed two months ahead of schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 腫瘤研究的病患招募提前兩個月完成。

toeic.example_en: Investigators must report any serious adverse event to the sponsor within 24 hours.
toeic.example_zh: 研究人員須於 24 小時內向申辦者通報任何嚴重不良事件。

toeic.example_en: A protocol amendment was issued to expand the inclusion criteria for elderly participants.
toeic.example_zh: 已發布試驗計畫書修正以擴大年長受試者的納入標準。

toeic.example_en: Each site received an updated investigator brochure detailing recent preclinical safety findings.
toeic.example_zh: 各試驗中心收到更新版主持人手冊，詳載近期臨床前安全發現。

toeic.example_en: Participants must sign an informed consent form before any study procedures begin.
toeic.example_zh: 受試者進行任何研究程序前必須簽署知情同意書。

toeic.example_en: Orphan drug designation provides tax credits and extended market exclusivity to manufacturers.
toeic.example_zh: 孤兒藥資格提供製造商稅務減免與延長的市場專屬期。

toeic.example_en: The sponsor outsourced data management to a contract research organization in Boston.
toeic.example_zh: 申辦者將資料管理委外給波士頓的一家委託研究機構。

toeic.example_en: Pharmacy benefit managers negotiate drug prices on behalf of health insurance plans.
toeic.example_zh: 藥品福利管理公司代表健康保險方案協商藥價。

toeic.example_en: The trial demonstrated significantly improved drug efficacy compared with the standard treatment.
toeic.example_zh: 試驗顯示該藥物療效顯著優於標準治療。

toeic.example_en: Real-world evidence from patient registries supports the long-term safety profile claims.
toeic.example_zh: 來自病患登錄的真實世界證據支持長期安全性主張。

toeic.example_en: Every cold chain shipment includes data loggers monitoring temperature throughout transit.
toeic.example_zh: 每批冷鏈出貨皆配有資料記錄器全程監測溫度。

toeic.example_en: The REIT pays quarterly dividends derived from rental income on commercial office buildings.
toeic.example_zh: 該不動產投資信託發放源自商辦租金收入的季配息。

toeic.example_en: Investors compare cap rates to evaluate the relative return on commercial property purchases.
toeic.example_zh: 投資人比較資本化率以評估商用不動產購置的相對報酬。

toeic.example_en: The lender requires a professional appraisal before finalizing the commercial mortgage loan.
toeic.example_zh: 貸款機構在敲定商業房貸前要求專業估價。

toeic.example_en: Local zoning regulations prohibit industrial use of the parcel adjacent to schools.
toeic.example_zh: 地方土地分區管制禁止學校旁地塊作工業用途。

toeic.example_en: Net operating income is calculated by subtracting operating expenses from gross rental revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 淨營運收入由總租金收入減去營運費用計算而得。

toeic.example_en: The landlord agreed to fund tenant improvement allowances of fifty dollars per square foot.
toeic.example_zh: 房東同意支付每平方英尺五十美元的承租人裝修補助。

toeic.example_en: Under a triple net lease, the tenant pays property taxes, insurance, and maintenance.
toeic.example_zh: 三淨租約下，承租人負擔房地產稅、保險與維護費用。

toeic.example_en: The developer signed a 99-year ground lease for the downtown corner parcel.
toeic.example_zh: 開發商簽署市中心轉角地塊的 99 年土地租賃契約。

toeic.example_en: Real estate syndication pools capital from multiple investors to acquire larger commercial assets.
toeic.example_zh: 不動產聯合投資彙集多位投資人資金以購置較大型商用資產。

toeic.example_en: Closing costs typically include title insurance, attorney fees, and recording charges combined.
toeic.example_zh: 成交費用通常包括產權保險、律師費以及登記費用。

toeic.example_en: Title insurance protects the buyer against undiscovered defects in the property records.
toeic.example_zh: 產權保險保障買方避免未發現的房產登記瑕疵。

toeic.example_en: Mortgage-backed securities derive cash flows from pooled residential home loan payments.
toeic.example_zh: 不動產抵押貸款證券的現金流來自集合的住宅房貸付款。

toeic.example_en: A licensed real estate broker will represent the seller throughout the transaction process.
toeic.example_zh: 持牌不動產仲介將於整個交易過程中代表賣方。

toeic.example_en: The mixed-use development combines residential apartments with ground-floor retail and offices.
toeic.example_zh: 該複合式開發結合住宅公寓與一樓零售及辦公室。

toeic.meaning_zh: 1031 條款換屋（美國延稅交易）
toeic.example_en: A 1031 exchange allows investors to defer capital gains tax when reinvesting proceeds.
toeic.example_zh: 1031 條款換屋讓投資人在再投資款項時遞延資本利得稅。

toeic.example_en: The utility company holds an easement to access the underground cables on this property.
toeic.example_zh: 公用事業公司持有進入此地產地下纜線的地役權。

toeic.example_en: The commission opened an investigation into alleged dumping of imported steel pipes.
toeic.example_zh: 委員會就涉嫌傾銷的進口鋼管展開調查。

toeic.example_en: Importers must present a certificate of origin to qualify for preferential tariff treatment.
toeic.example_zh: 進口商須提示原產地證明書方可享有優惠關稅待遇。

toeic.example_en: Consult the harmonized tariff schedule to determine duty rates for imported textiles.
toeic.example_zh: 查閱調和關稅表以確定進口紡織品的關稅稅率。

toeic.example_en: Countervailing duties offset subsidies that foreign governments grant to their exporters.
toeic.example_zh: 平衡稅抵銷外國政府對其出口商所提供的補貼。

toeic.example_en: The import quota on sugar limits foreign suppliers to a fixed annual tonnage.
toeic.example_zh: 糖的進口配額將外國供應商限定在固定年度噸數。

toeic.example_en: Beef imports above the tariff rate quota incur substantially higher duty charges.
toeic.example_zh: 超過關稅配額的牛肉進口將承擔大幅較高的關稅。

toeic.example_en: The preferential trade agreement reduces duties on 90 percent of bilateral product categories.
toeic.example_zh: 優惠貿易協定降低雙邊 90% 產品類別的關稅。

toeic.example_en: Our trade compliance team screens every shipment against current export control regulations.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的貿易合規團隊依現行出口管制法規篩查每批貨物。

toeic.example_en: Incorrect tariff classification can result in customs fines and unexpected shipment delays.
toeic.example_zh: 錯誤的關稅分類可能導致海關罰款及意外的出貨延誤。

toeic.example_en: Importers must submit an accurate valuation declaration along with the customs entry documents.
toeic.example_zh: 進口商須隨報關文件提交準確的完稅價格申報。

toeic.example_en: A continuous customs bond is required for importers shipping multiple containers each month.
toeic.example_zh: 每月運送多櫃的進口商需要連續性海關保證金。

toeic.example_en: The commission imposed a 25 percent anti-dumping duty on imported solar panels.
toeic.example_zh: 委員會對進口太陽能板課徵 25% 反傾銷稅。

toeic.example_en: Footfall at the flagship store doubled during the back-to-school promotional campaign.
toeic.example_zh: 返校促銷活動期間旗艦店的來客流量加倍。

toeic.example_zh: 乳製品與蔬果等易腐商品在運輸過程中需嚴格溫控。

toeic.example_en: Store managers must follow the corporate planogram when arranging products on shelves.
toeic.example_zh: 店長排列貨架商品時必須遵守公司貨架陳列圖。

toeic.example_en: Upselling techniques helped increase the average ticket size by twelve percent monthly.
toeic.example_zh: 向上銷售技巧每月幫助平均客單價提升 12%。

toeic.example_en: Front of house staff coordinate seating, service, and guest experience throughout each shift.

toeic.example_zh: 該小餐館於假期週末用餐人次創下歷史新高。

toeic.example_zh: 自有品牌商品通常較同類全國品牌商品提供更高利潤。

toeic.example_en: Shelf replenishment takes place every morning before the store opens to customers.

toeic.example_zh: 更快的服務流程使午餐時段翻桌率從 1.8 提升至 2.4。

toeic.example_zh: 每段五分鐘的微學習模組可輕鬆融入忙碌的工作日行程。

toeic.example_zh: 廠商確認符合 SCORM 標準，因此我們可以跨平台部署該課程。

toeic.example_zh: 我們的教學設計師為成人企業學習者量身打造引人入勝的課程內容。

toeic.example_zh: 同期班制課程在共同進展的學員之間培養社群感。

toeic.example_zh: 該教育科技新創公司於上季完成 2,000 萬美元的 B 輪融資。

toeic.example_zh: 每片 300 公釐晶圓可產出數百顆成品微處理器晶片。

toeic.example_zh: 統計製程控制圖在大量機械加工生產中監控關鍵尺寸。

toeic.example_zh: 極紫外微影製程使最尖端晶片得以在更小製程節點生產。

toeic.example_zh: 再生能源現供應該地區超過 30% 的總電力。

toeic.example_zh: 離岸風力發電場將於 2027 年前向沿海電網輸送潔淨能源。

toeic.example_zh: 智慧電網技術在整個區域網絡中平衡電力供需。

toeic.example_zh: 老舊燃煤電廠將於未來三年分階段除役。

toeic.example_zh: 大規模儲能在太陽能與風力輸出波動時穩定電網。

toeic.example_zh: 再生能源躉購電價保證太陽能生產者每度電固定費率。

toeic.example_zh: 水力發電壩仍是全球最成熟的再生能源來源之一。

toeic.example_zh: 地熱能提供不受天氣或日照影響的穩定基載電力。

toeic.example_zh: 生質能廠將農業廢棄物轉化為電力與有用的區域供熱能源。

toeic.example_zh: 智慧電表讓公用事業能即時監控家戶用電並偵測停電。

toeic.example_zh: 該公司與新太陽能開發商簽署十年期購電合約。

toeic.example_zh: 許多跨國企業承諾於 2050 年達成淨零排放。

toeic.example_zh: 電解槽利用再生電力將水分解為氫氣與氧氣。

toeic.example_zh: 由再生能源製造的綠氫有望於數十年內讓重工業脫碳。

toeic.example_zh: 新輸電線路將把風電送至內陸都市中心。

toeic.example_zh: 電池儲能專案協助公用事業將太陽能輸出移至傍晚尖峰時段。

toeic.example_zh: 公用事業必須遵守州的再生能源配比標準，否則將面臨重罰。

toeic.example_zh: 能源稽核找出數個可大幅降低每月電費的機會。

toeic.example_en: The campus microgrid can disconnect from the main grid during widespread regional outages.
toeic.example_zh: 校園微電網可於大範圍區域停電時與主電網脫離運作。

toeic.example_en: The custodian bank safeguards client assets and processes routine settlement instructions efficiently.
toeic.example_zh: 保管銀行保管客戶資產並有效率地處理日常結算指示。

toeic.meaning_zh: 認識你的客戶（身分查核）
toeic.example_en: Banks must complete thorough KYC procedures before opening any new corporate account.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行於開立任何新企業帳戶前必須完成詳實的 KYC 程序。

toeic.example_zh: 通匯銀行業務讓本地銀行能在全球提供外幣服務。

toeic.meaning_zh: 本行於對方銀行的帳戶
toeic.example_en: The nostro account holds our funds at the foreign correspondent bank in Frankfurt.
toeic.example_zh: 該本行帳戶存放於我們在法蘭克福的外國通匯銀行。

toeic.example_en: Please provide the recipient SWIFT code to ensure the international payment routes correctly.
toeic.example_zh: 請提供收款人 SWIFT 碼以確保國際付款正確路由。

toeic.example_en: Migrant workers frequently send remittances back to their families across Southeast Asia.
toeic.example_zh: 外籍勞工經常將匯款寄回東南亞各地的家人。

toeic.example_en: Trade finance products help exporters bridge the cash flow gap until buyer payment.
toeic.example_zh: 貿易融資產品協助出口商在買方付款前彌補現金流缺口。

toeic.example_en: Open a deposit account at our branch to start earning competitive monthly interest rates.
toeic.example_zh: 於本分行開立存款帳戶即可開始享有具競爭力的月息。

toeic.example_en: The bank extended a 50 million dollar credit line to the manufacturing firm.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行為該製造商延展五千萬美元的信用額度。

toeic.example_en: The interbank rate fluctuates daily based on liquidity conditions across major financial markets.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行同業拆款利率依各主要金融市場的流動性狀況每日波動。

toeic.example_zh: 薪資每隔一週五早上透過自動清算所轉帳發放。

toeic.example_zh: 即時總額清算系統逐筆處理高金額付款，不在銀行間做淨額結算。

toeic.example_en: The vostro account holds funds that foreign banks maintain at our institution domestically.
toeic.example_zh: 該帳戶存放外國銀行於本機構國內所維持的資金。

toeic.example_en: Exporters use forward contracts to manage FX risk arising from delayed customer payments.
toeic.example_zh: 出口商利用遠期合約管理因客戶延遲付款而生的匯率風險。

toeic.example_zh: 收單機構代表數千家小型零售商處理刷卡交易。

toeic.example_en: The site safety officer inspects scaffolding daily before construction crews begin their tasks.
toeic.example_zh: 工地安全主管在施工人員開工前每日檢查鷹架。

toeic.example_en: Proper machine guarding prevents accidental contact with moving parts during routine production.
toeic.example_zh: 適當的機械防護避免在例行生產時意外接觸移動零件。

toeic.example_en: Maintain clear warehouse aisle widths to allow safe passage of forklifts and pedestrians.
toeic.example_zh: 保持倉庫走道寬度暢通，讓堆高機與行人安全通行。

toeic.example_en: Ocean freight rates have stabilized after a turbulent period of pandemic-related volatility.
toeic.example_zh: 經歷一段疫情相關的劇烈波動後，海運費率已趨穩定。

toeic.example_en: The lawsuit alleges patent infringement on three core algorithms used in the device.
toeic.example_zh: 訴訟指控該裝置使用的三項核心演算法構成專利侵權。

toeic.example_en: The treasury bought a six-month currency forward to lock in the euro purchase rate.
toeic.example_zh: 財務部買入六個月遠期外匯以鎖定購買歐元的匯率。

toeic.example_en: Patent expiration of the blockbuster drug opens the market to generic competitors immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 暢銷藥的專利到期立即為學名藥競爭者開啟市場。

toeic.example_zh: 生物製劑藥物由活細胞製造，需要複雜的生產設施。

toeic.example_en: The property management firm handles tenant communications, repairs, and routine building maintenance services.
toeic.example_zh: 物業管理公司負責承租戶溝通、維修及例行建物維護服務。

toeic.example_en: The commercial mortgage carries a fixed interest rate over a twenty-year amortization period.
toeic.example_zh: 該商業房貸以固定利率搭配二十年攤還期間。

toeic.example_en: Transshipment through a regional hub significantly reduces direct shipping costs for smaller orders.
toeic.example_zh: 透過區域樞紐轉運可顯著降低小批量訂單的直接運費。

toeic.example_zh: 商品須符合原產地規則才能享有自由貿易協定優惠。

toeic.example_en: Cashiers use a barcode scanner to ring up items quickly at the checkout counter.
toeic.example_zh: 收銀員使用條碼掃描機在結帳櫃台快速結帳。

toeic.example_en: Drive-thru orders now account for nearly 70 percent of total restaurant revenue daily.
toeic.example_zh: 得來速訂單目前佔餐廳每日總營收近 70%。

toeic.example_en: Learners receive a course completion certificate they can share on professional networking platforms.
toeic.example_zh: 學員獲得可在專業社群平台分享的課程完成證書。

toeic.example_en: Each robotic arm on the assembly line performs over 2,000 precise welds per hour.
toeic.example_zh: 組裝線上每支機械手臂每小時執行 2,000 次以上精確焊接。

toeic.example_en: Each wind turbine produces enough electricity to power roughly 1,500 homes annually.
toeic.example_zh: 每座風力發電機每年產生的電力足以供應約 1,500 戶家庭。

toeic.example_en: Swift payments enable secure cross-border transfers between participating financial institutions globally.
toeic.example_zh: SWIFT 國際付款讓全球參與金融機構間進行安全跨境匯款。

toeic.example_en: Workers must rotate stations to stay below the daily chemical exposure limit.
toeic.example_zh: 員工須輪換工作站以維持低於每日化學品暴露限值。

toeic.example_en: A thorough incident investigation identifies root causes and prevents similar future occurrences effectively.
toeic.example_zh: 徹底的事故調查找出根本原因並有效預防類似事件再次發生。

toeic.example_en: Wave picking groups similar orders together to maximize warehouse efficiency during peak periods.
toeic.example_zh: 波次揀貨將相似訂單合併以在尖峰時段最大化倉庫效率。

toeic.example_en: Alternative dispute resolution methods like mediation can save both parties significant legal expense.
toeic.example_zh: 如調解等替代爭議解決方式可為雙方節省可觀的法律費用。

toeic.example_en: Our patent application for the new battery design was filed with the office Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新電池設計的專利申請週一已向專利局提交。

toeic.example_en: Commodity futures contracts help producers stabilize revenue from volatile global market prices.
toeic.example_zh: 商品期貨合約幫助生產者穩定來自波動全球市場價格的營收。

toeic.example_en: The pharmaceutical companys drug pipeline includes seven late-stage oncology development candidates.
toeic.example_zh: 該藥廠的藥物開發管線包括七個後期腫瘤候選藥物。

toeic.example_en: The real estate fund invests primarily in core office assets across major metropolitan areas.
toeic.example_zh: 該不動產基金主要投資於各大都會區的核心辦公資產。

toeic.example_en: Qualifying products benefit from preferential tariff treatment under the bilateral trade agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 符合條件的產品在雙邊貿易協定下享有優惠關稅待遇。

toeic.example_en: The cashier-less store uses computer vision to automatically charge shoppers at exit.
toeic.example_zh: 無收銀員商店運用電腦視覺於離店時自動結帳。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 簡化、使流程更有效率
toeic.example_en: The new software will streamline our invoice approval process and reduce processing time by half.
toeic.example_zh: 新的軟體將簡化我們的發票核准流程，並將處理時間縮短一半。

toeic.example_en: Management decided to consolidate the three regional offices into a single headquarters next year.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層決定明年將三個區域辦公室整併為單一總部。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 多元化、分散（風險或業務）
toeic.example_en: The company aims to diversify its revenue streams by entering the Southeast Asian market this fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 公司計畫在本財年進入東南亞市場，以多元化其營收來源。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 仔細審查、詳細檢視
toeic.example_en: Auditors will scrutinize every expense claim above five thousand dollars during the quarterly review.
toeic.example_zh: 稽核人員將在季度審查中仔細審查每一筆超過五千美元的費用申請。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 權宜的、便利但未必正當的
toeic.example_en: Although outsourcing seemed expedient, the long-term costs outweighed the short-term savings.
toeic.example_zh: 雖然外包看似便利之計，但長期成本超過了短期節省。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 易腐壞的（多用於食品或貨品）
toeic.example_en: All perishable items must be stored in the climate-controlled section of the warehouse.
toeic.example_zh: 所有易腐壞物品必須儲存在倉庫的溫控區域。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 有利可圖的、獲利豐厚的
toeic.example_en: Signing the government contract proved to be the most lucrative deal in the firm's history.
toeic.example_zh: 簽下這份政府合約成為公司有史以來最有利可圖的交易。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可行的、有實行可能的
toeic.example_en: The committee will only fund proposals that present a financially viable business model.
toeic.example_zh: 委員會只會資助呈現財務上可行商業模式的提案。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 兌換、贖回（票券或股份）
toeic.example_en: Customers can redeem loyalty points for travel discounts on our partner airlines.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客可以將會員點數兌換為合作航空公司的旅遊折扣。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 擔保、保證（某人或某事）
toeic.example_en: I can personally vouch for her professionalism after working with her for six years.
toeic.example_zh: 在與她共事六年後，我可以親自為她的專業素養做擔保。

toeic.example_en: The audit committee meets quarterly to review internal controls and financial reporting.
toeic.example_zh: 審計委員會每季開會檢視內部控制與財務報告。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 營運餘裕、可維持營運的時間
toeic.example_en: After the latest funding round, the company has about eighteen months of runway before needing more capital.
toeic.example_zh: 在最近一輪融資後，公司大約還有十八個月的營運餘裕才需要再籌資。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 兼職、做副業（多指夜間）
toeic.example_en: Some employees moonlight as consultants in the evenings, which is permitted under our HR policy.
toeic.example_zh: 部分員工晚上會兼職擔任顧問，這在我們的人資政策下是被允許的。

toeic.example_en: There is always a tradeoff between speed and quality when launching a new product.
toeic.example_zh: 推出新產品時，速度與品質之間永遠存在著取捨。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 標竿比較、對標分析
toeic.example_en: Our benchmarking study showed that our delivery times are slower than the industry average.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的標竿比較研究顯示，我們的交貨時間慢於業界平均。

toeic.example_en: Mapping the value chain helped us identify three areas where we could cut operating costs significantly.
toeic.example_zh: 繪製價值鏈幫助我們找出三個可以大幅降低營運成本的領域。

toeic.example_en: The CEO announced plans to downsize the marketing team by fifteen percent before year-end.
toeic.example_zh: 執行長宣布計畫在年底前將行銷團隊縮編百分之十五。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 調整至最適規模（常為委婉裁員）
toeic.example_en: The board hopes to rightsize the organization without forcing involuntary layoffs.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會希望在不強制裁員的情況下將組織調整至最適規模。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 離職流程、員工離職交接
toeic.example_en: Our offboarding process includes an exit interview and the return of all company equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的離職流程包含一次離職面談以及歸還所有公司設備。

toeic.example_en: Remote employees receive a monthly stipend to cover home office expenses such as internet and electricity.
toeic.example_zh: 遠端員工每月會收到一筆津貼，用以支付網路和電費等居家辦公支出。

toeic.example_en: Free meals and gym memberships are popular perks offered by many tech companies.
toeic.example_zh: 免費餐點和健身房會員是許多科技公司提供的熱門福利。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 附加福利、額外待遇
toeic.example_en: Health insurance and stock options are common fringe benefits in our compensation package.
toeic.example_zh: 健康保險與股票選擇權是我們薪酬方案中常見的附加福利。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 資遣方案、離職補償
toeic.example_en: Affected employees will receive a severance package equal to three months of base salary.
toeic.example_zh: 受影響的員工將獲得相當於三個月基本薪資的資遣方案。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 逐步淘汰、分階段停止
toeic.example_en: We plan to phase out the legacy accounting system over the next eighteen months.
toeic.example_zh: 我們計畫在未來十八個月內逐步淘汰舊有的會計系統。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 增加、擴大（產量或規模）
toeic.example_en: The factory will ramp up production ahead of the holiday shopping season.
toeic.example_zh: 工廠將在假期購物季之前提高產量。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 縮減、削減（規模或計畫）
toeic.example_en: Due to budget constraints, we had to scale back the marketing campaign considerably.
toeic.example_zh: 由於預算限制，我們不得不大幅縮減行銷活動。

toeic.example_en: Ms. Chen will spearhead the digital transformation initiative starting next month.
toeic.example_zh: 陳女士將從下個月起帶頭推動數位轉型計畫。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 承銷、擔保（風險或證券發行）
toeic.example_en: Three major banks agreed to underwrite the upcoming bond issue worth two billion dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 三家主要銀行同意承銷即將發行、價值二十億美元的債券。

toeic.example_en: The athlete signed a multi-year endorsement deal with the sportswear company last week.
toeic.example_zh: 這位運動員上週與這家運動服飾公司簽下了一份多年期的代言合約。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 獵人頭顧問、高階人才仲介
toeic.example_en: A headhunter contacted her about a senior position at one of our competitors.
toeic.example_zh: 一位獵人頭顧問就我們競爭對手的一個高階職位聯絡了她。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 自由接案的、做自由業
toeic.example_en: He left the firm to freelance as a translator for multinational corporations.
toeic.example_zh: 他離開公司，開始為跨國企業擔任自由接案譯者。

toeic.example_en: The rise of the gig economy has changed how companies think about workforce planning.
toeic.example_zh: 零工經濟的興起改變了公司對於人力規劃的思維。

toeic.example_en: The board imposed a moratorium on new hires until the cost review is complete.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會在成本審查完成前，暫停了所有新進人員的招募。

toeic.example_en: Deregulation of the telecommunications industry has led to increased competition and lower consumer prices.
toeic.example_zh: 電信業的解除管制帶動了競爭的加劇與消費者價格的下降。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 監管機構、監督單位
toeic.example_en: The financial watchdog has launched an investigation into the firm's accounting practices.
toeic.example_zh: 金融監管機構已對該公司的會計操作展開調查。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 申訴專員、調查專員
toeic.example_en: Employees may contact the ombudsman to report concerns about workplace misconduct confidentially.
toeic.example_zh: 員工可以聯繫申訴專員，以保密方式檢舉職場不當行為。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 適當時候、按部就班
toeic.example_en: Your application will be processed in due course; please allow up to ten business days for a response.
toeic.example_zh: 您的申請將會在適當時候處理，請預留最多十個工作天等待回覆。

toeic.example_en: The consultant discussed the merger risks at length with the executive team.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問與高階主管團隊就合併風險進行了詳細的討論。

toeic.example_en: We will launch the campaign in conjunction with our marketing partner in Singapore.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將與新加坡的行銷夥伴合作推出這次活動。

toeic.example_en: Employees may take additional vacation days in lieu of overtime pay.
toeic.example_zh: 員工可以選擇額外的休假天數來代替加班費。

toeic.example_en: As per your request, I have attached the revised proposal for your review.
toeic.example_zh: 依照您的要求，我已附上修訂後的提案供您審閱。

toeic.example_en: The tenant is two months in arrears on rent and has been issued a formal notice.
toeic.example_zh: 該租戶積欠兩個月租金，已經被發出正式通知。

toeic.example_en: The economic downturn has forced many retailers to reconsider their expansion plans.
toeic.example_zh: 經濟下滑迫使許多零售商重新考慮他們的擴張計畫。

toeic.example_en: Analysts predict an upturn in consumer spending in the second half of the year.
toeic.example_zh: 分析師預測下半年消費者支出將有所好轉。

toeic.example_en: Please include a rider in the insurance policy to cover overseas business travel.
toeic.example_zh: 請在保單中加入附加條款，以涵蓋海外商務旅行。

toeic.example_en: The financial projections look promising with one important caveat regarding currency fluctuations.
toeic.example_zh: 財務預測看起來樂觀，但有一項關於匯率波動的重要附帶條件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 撤銷、廢除（合約或決議）
toeic.example_en: The committee voted to rescind the previous policy on overtime compensation.
toeic.example_zh: 委員會表決撤銷先前關於加班費的政策。

toeic.example_en: The contract stipulates that payment must be made within thirty days of invoice receipt.
toeic.example_zh: 合約明確規定付款必須在收到發票後三十天內完成。

toeic.example_en: All participants must sign a waiver before joining the corporate climbing event.
toeic.example_zh: 所有參加者在加入公司攀岩活動前都必須簽署棄權書。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 賠償、補償（損失或損害）
toeic.example_en: The supplier agreed to indemnify our company against any third-party claims arising from product defects.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商同意就產品瑕疵引起的任何第三方索賠對我方公司進行賠償。

toeic.example_en: Final approval is contingent upon the successful completion of the background check.
toeic.example_zh: 最終的核准以背景調查成功完成為條件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 在未履行…的情況下
toeic.example_en: In default of payment within sixty days, the lender may begin foreclosure proceedings.
toeic.example_zh: 若在六十天內未履行付款，貸款方可開始進行法拍程序。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 滯期費、貨櫃滯留費
toeic.example_en: Delayed pickup at the port resulted in a substantial demurrage charge on last month's shipment.
toeic.example_zh: 在港口延遲提櫃導致上個月的貨物產生了高額的滯期費。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 託運單、貨運單
toeic.example_en: Please attach the consignment note to each pallet before the truck arrives at the dock.
toeic.example_zh: 請在卡車抵達裝卸區之前，將託運單貼到每個棧板上。

toeic.example_en: Duty-free shops at the airport offer travelers a variety of luxury goods at reduced prices.
toeic.example_zh: 機場的免稅店以折扣價提供旅客各式各樣的奢侈品。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 寄送點、放置地點
toeic.example_en: Customers can return rented equipment at any authorized drop-off point in the city.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客可以在市內任何一個授權寄送點歸還租賃設備。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 加急配送、快速送達
toeic.example_en: For an additional fee, we offer expedited delivery within twenty-four hours.
toeic.example_zh: 額外付費後，我們提供二十四小時內的加急配送服務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 白皮書、專業研究報告
toeic.example_en: Our latest white paper outlines best practices for cybersecurity in remote work environments.
toeic.example_zh: 我們最新的白皮書概述了遠端辦公環境中網路安全的最佳實務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 績優股的、業績優良的
toeic.example_en: Many pension funds prefer to invest in blue chip companies with stable dividend histories.
toeic.example_zh: 許多退休基金偏好投資於股利歷史穩定的績優企業。

toeic.example_en: Rising interest rates remain a significant headwind for the housing market this year.
toeic.example_zh: 升息仍是今年房市的一大不利因素。

toeic.example_en: Favorable exchange rates provided a tailwind for exporters in the third quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 有利的匯率為第三季的出口商提供了順風條件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 軟著陸、平穩減速
toeic.example_en: The central bank is attempting to engineer a soft landing for the overheated economy.
toeic.example_zh: 央行正試圖為過熱的經濟設計一次軟著陸。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 硬著陸、劇烈衰退
toeic.example_en: Economists warn that aggressive rate hikes may lead to a hard landing instead.
toeic.example_zh: 經濟學家警告，激進的升息反而可能導致硬著陸。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 寬限期、暫停期間
toeic.example_en: Borrowers may request a moratorium period of up to six months on principal repayments.
toeic.example_zh: 借款人可申請最多六個月的本金償還寬限期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 交付項目清單
toeic.example_en: Please review the deliverables list and confirm that everything is included in the final invoice.
toeic.example_zh: 請審閱交付項目清單，並確認最終發票中已包含所有項目。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 以服務為導向的
toeic.example_en: Our service-oriented culture is what differentiates us from larger, more impersonal competitors.
toeic.example_zh: 以服務為導向的文化是讓我們與更大、更冷漠的競爭者有所區別之處。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 重視成果的、以結果為導向的
toeic.example_en: We are looking for a results-driven sales manager who can exceed quarterly targets.
toeic.example_zh: 我們正在尋找一位以結果為導向、能超越季度目標的銷售經理。

toeic.example_en: The position requires a detail-oriented person who can manage multiple complex contracts simultaneously.
toeic.example_zh: 這個職位需要一位注重細節、能同時處理多份複雜合約的人選。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自我驅動者、有主動精神的人
toeic.example_en: We need a self-starter who can work independently without constant supervision.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要一位有主動精神的人，能在沒有不斷督促下獨立工作。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 積極進取的人、衝勁十足者
toeic.example_en: Our new sales rep is a real go-getter and has already exceeded her first-month target.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新來的業務代表是個十足的衝勁型人物，第一個月就已超越目標。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 有團隊合作精神的人
toeic.example_en: Hiring managers consistently rank being a team player as one of the most desired qualities.
toeic.example_zh: 招募主管始終將團隊合作精神列為最受期待的特質之一。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 軟實力、人際溝通技能
toeic.example_en: Effective communication and conflict resolution are critical soft skills in management roles.
toeic.example_zh: 有效溝通與衝突處理是管理職位中關鍵的軟實力。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 硬實力、專業技術能力
toeic.example_en: Although hard skills can be taught, soft skills often determine long-term career success.
toeic.example_zh: 雖然硬實力可以被教導，但軟實力往往決定了長期的職涯成功。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 可轉移技能、跨領域能力
toeic.example_en: Project management is one of the most valuable transferable skills across industries.
toeic.example_zh: 專案管理是跨產業最有價值的可轉移技能之一。

toeic.example_en: HR conducts an exit interview with every departing employee to gather feedback.
toeic.example_zh: 人資會與每一位離職員工進行離職面談，以收集回饋意見。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 跨層級會議（與主管的主管會面）
toeic.example_en: She scheduled a skip-level meeting with the VP to discuss concerns about her team.
toeic.example_zh: 她安排了一場與副總的跨層級會議，討論團隊上的疑慮。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 一對一（會議或對話）
toeic.example_en: Managers are expected to hold weekly one-on-one meetings with each direct report.
toeic.example_zh: 主管應每週與每位直屬下屬進行一次一對一會議。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 短暫聚集討論、簡短會議
toeic.example_en: Let's huddle after lunch to align on the client's revised requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 我們午餐後簡短碰個面，對齊客戶修改後的需求。

toeic.example_en: Let's wrap up the meeting in five minutes so everyone can prepare for the next call.
toeic.example_zh: 我們五分鐘內結束會議，讓大家可以準備下一場通話。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 讓某人加入溝通、納入訊息圈
toeic.example_en: Please loop in the legal team before we send the proposal to the client.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們把提案寄給客戶之前，請把法務團隊納入溝通圈。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 快速訊息聯繫、傳訊提醒
toeic.example_en: I'll ping you on the messenger when the file is ready for review.
toeic.example_zh: 檔案準備好可以審閱時，我會在通訊軟體上傳訊給你。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 深入探討、詳細分析
toeic.example_en: Tomorrow's workshop will be a deep dive into our customer retention strategies.
toeic.example_zh: 明天的工作坊將深入探討我們的客戶留存策略。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 容易達成的目標、唾手可得之事
toeic.example_en: Let's start with the low-hanging fruit before tackling the more complex efficiency issues.
toeic.example_zh: 我們先處理容易達成的目標，再來處理更複雜的效率問題。

toeic.example_en: Moving forward, all expense reports must be submitted within five business days.
toeic.example_zh: 今後，所有費用報告都必須在五個工作天內提交。

toeic.example_en: Going forward, we will use a single platform for all client communications.
toeic.example_zh: 往後，我們將使用單一平台處理所有客戶溝通。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 全面性的、所有領域的
toeic.example_en: The company announced a five-percent salary increase across the board for all full-time staff.
toeic.example_zh: 公司宣布為所有全職員工全面性地調薪百分之五。

toeic.example_en: Several new product launches are in the pipeline for the upcoming fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 在即將到來的財年中，有數個新產品上市計畫正在進行中。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 在考慮中、正在討論
toeic.example_en: A potential merger with our European competitor is currently on the table.
toeic.example_zh: 與我們歐洲競爭對手的潛在合併案目前正在討論中。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 已被排除、不再考慮
toeic.example_en: Following the latest negotiations, layoffs are now completely off the table.
toeic.example_zh: 在最近的協商之後，裁員方案目前已完全被排除。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 重新規劃、從頭再來
toeic.example_en: After the client rejected our proposal, we had to go back to the drawing board.
toeic.example_zh: 在客戶拒絕我們的提案後，我們不得不重新規劃。

toeic.example_en: The subsidiary has been in the red for three consecutive quarters and is under review.
toeic.example_zh: 這家子公司已連續三季虧損，目前正被檢討中。

toeic.example_en: After restructuring, the division finally returned to being in the black this year.
toeic.example_zh: 經過重組後，該部門今年終於重返獲利狀態。

toeic.example_en: We noticed a modest uptick in online sales after the website redesign went live.
toeic.example_zh: 在網站改版上線後，我們注意到線上銷售有小幅上升。

toeic.example_en: A slight downtick in customer satisfaction scores prompted a review of our support team.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶滿意度分數的些微下降促使我們檢討客服團隊。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 停滯、達到平穩階段
toeic.example_en: Sales began to plateau in the second quarter despite increased marketing spending.
toeic.example_zh: 儘管行銷支出增加，銷售在第二季開始進入停滯。

toeic.example_en: The smartphone market in major cities has become almost completely saturated.
toeic.example_zh: 主要城市的智慧型手機市場已經幾乎完全飽和。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 尚未開發的、未利用的
toeic.example_en: The rural senior market remains an untapped opportunity for our financial products.
toeic.example_zh: 鄉村銀髮族市場對我們的金融商品而言，仍是一個尚未開發的機會。

toeic.example_en: The acquisition will expand our retail footprint to fifteen additional countries.
toeic.example_zh: 這次併購將把我們的零售版圖擴展到另外十五個國家。

toeic.example_en: We aim to strengthen our presence in Southeast Asia by opening three new offices.
toeic.example_zh: 我們計畫透過開設三個新辦公室，加強在東南亞的存在感。

toeic.example_en: Building a developer ecosystem around our API has become a strategic priority.
toeic.example_zh: 圍繞我們的 API 建立開發者生態系，已成為一項策略性的優先要務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 具有綜效的、互補加乘的
toeic.example_en: The two product lines have a synergistic relationship that benefits cross-selling efforts.
toeic.example_zh: 這兩條產品線具有綜效關係，有利於交叉銷售。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 核心能力、核心競爭力
toeic.example_en: Software design has always been our core competency and main competitive advantage.
toeic.example_zh: 軟體設計一直是我們的核心能力，也是主要競爭優勢。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 重點、關鍵結論
toeic.example_en: The key takeaway from the workshop was the importance of customer-driven product design.
toeic.example_zh: 這場工作坊的重點是以客戶為導向的產品設計的重要性。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 主談人、發言人（多用於影像）
toeic.example_en: Our CEO will appear as the talking head in the company's recruitment video.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的執行長將擔任公司招募影片中的主談人。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 案例研究、實例分析
toeic.example_en: Our marketing team published a case study on how the new strategy doubled customer engagement.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的行銷團隊發布了一份案例研究，說明新策略如何讓客戶互動量翻倍。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 根深柢固的、長久存在的
toeic.example_en: Addressing deep-rooted cultural issues will require sustained leadership commitment.
toeic.example_zh: 處理根深柢固的文化問題將需要領導層持續的承諾。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 長期存在的、由來已久的
toeic.example_en: We have a long-standing partnership with the local supplier dating back twenty years.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與當地供應商有著長達二十年的長期合作關係。

toeic.example_en: During her tenure as CFO, the company tripled its annual revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 在她擔任財務長的任期內，公司年營收增加為三倍。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 資深的、有保障任期的
toeic.example_en: Tenured employees often serve as informal mentors to new hires.
toeic.example_zh: 資深員工通常會以非正式方式輔導新進人員。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 既得利益、切身利益
toeic.example_en: Senior managers have a vested interest in seeing the merger succeed.
toeic.example_zh: 高階主管對於這場合併成功有著既得利益。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 利益衝突揭露聲明
toeic.example_en: All board members must submit a conflict of interest disclosure form annually.
toeic.example_zh: 所有董事會成員都必須每年提交一份利益衝突揭露表。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 切分出（業務或時間）
toeic.example_en: Please carve out thirty minutes this week so we can review the quarterly numbers.
toeic.example_zh: 請在本週撥出三十分鐘，讓我們檢視季度數據。

toeic.example_en: The carve-up of the bankrupt company's assets took nearly two years to complete.
toeic.example_zh: 這家破產公司資產的瓜分歷時將近兩年才完成。

toeic.example_en: Securing buy-in from the engineering team will be critical for the project's success.
toeic.example_zh: 取得工程團隊的認同對專案的成功至關重要。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 推行計畫、上線計畫
toeic.example_en: The rollout plan includes a pilot phase in two regions before nationwide deployment.
toeic.example_zh: 推行計畫包括在兩個區域進行試行，然後再全國推行。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 試營運、低調上市
toeic.example_en: We are planning a soft launch in three cities before the official global release.
toeic.example_zh: 我們計畫在正式全球發行前，於三個城市進行試營運。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 正式發行、大規模上市
toeic.example_en: After the successful soft launch, we are preparing for a hard launch next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 在試營運成功後，我們正準備下一季的正式發行。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 早期機會、最初投入的機會
toeic.example_en: Joining the start-up offered a rare ground floor opportunity that could become very profitable.
toeic.example_zh: 加入這家新創公司提供了一個罕見且未來可能非常有利可圖的早期機會。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 逐漸向下傳遞、向下滲透
toeic.example_en: Changes to corporate strategy often take months to trickle down to frontline employees.
toeic.example_zh: 公司策略的改變通常需要數個月才會逐漸傳遞到第一線員工。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 由上而下的做法
toeic.example_en: Our company has shifted away from a strict top-down approach to encourage employee input.
toeic.example_zh: 公司已從嚴格的由上而下做法轉變，以鼓勵員工提供意見。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 由下而上的做法
toeic.example_en: A bottom-up approach to innovation has helped us identify ideas directly from frontline staff.
toeic.example_zh: 由下而上的創新做法幫助我們直接從第一線員工身上找到構想。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 突破性的、開創性的
toeic.example_en: The groundbreaking research could transform the way the industry approaches battery design.
toeic.example_zh: 這項突破性研究可能改變整個產業在電池設計上的做法。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 最前沿的、尖端的
toeic.example_en: Our laboratory is equipped with cutting-edge instruments for genetic analysis.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的實驗室配備了用於基因分析的尖端儀器。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 最先進的、最新技術的
toeic.example_en: The state-of-the-art manufacturing facility will reduce production time by forty percent.
toeic.example_zh: 這座最先進的製造廠將使生產時間縮短百分之四十。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 整體交鑰匙解決方案
toeic.example_en: We provide a turnkey solution that includes installation, training, and ongoing support.
toeic.example_zh: 我們提供一個包含安裝、訓練和持續支援的整體交鑰匙解決方案。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 現成的、標準商品的
toeic.example_en: An off-the-shelf software package might suit our needs better than a custom-built one.
toeic.example_zh: 現成的套裝軟體可能比客製化開發的更符合我們的需求。

toeic.example_en: The custom-built CRM system was tailored specifically to our complex sales workflow.
toeic.example_zh: 這套客製化打造的 CRM 系統是專門針對我們複雜的銷售流程量身設計。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 量身訂做的、特別量身打造的
toeic.example_en: We offer tailor-made financial advice based on each client's risk tolerance and goals.
toeic.example_zh: 我們依據每位客戶的風險承受度與目標，提供量身訂做的財務建議。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 分級定價、階梯式定價
toeic.example_en: Our tier pricing structure gives volume discounts to customers who commit to longer contracts.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的分級定價結構為簽署較長合約的客戶提供量大折扣。

toeic.example_en: Software bundling allows us to sell complementary products at an attractive combined price.
toeic.example_zh: 軟體搭售讓我們能以具吸引力的組合價格出售互補的產品。

toeic.example_en: Regulators may force the telecom giant to unbundle its services to encourage competition.
toeic.example_zh: 監管機構可能會迫使這家電信巨頭拆售其服務，以促進競爭。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 展廳現象（在實體店看商品後線上購買）
toeic.example_en: Showrooming has forced traditional retailers to rethink their in-store customer experience.
toeic.example_zh: 展廳現象迫使傳統零售商重新思考店內的顧客體驗。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 反展廳現象（先上網研究再到實體店購買）
toeic.example_en: Webrooming remains common for high-value purchases such as appliances and furniture.
toeic.example_zh: 在家電和家具等高價購買上，反展廳現象仍十分常見。

toeic.example_en: Despite the rise of e-commerce, brick-and-mortar locations still drive most of our revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 儘管電子商務崛起，實體店面仍貢獻我們大部分的營收。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 兼具線上線下的、虛實整合的
toeic.example_en: A successful click-and-mortar strategy depends on seamless inventory integration.
toeic.example_zh: 成功的虛實整合策略仰賴庫存系統的無縫整合。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 代發貨、直接由供應商出貨
toeic.example_en: We drop-ship most of our online orders directly from the manufacturer's warehouse.
toeic.example_zh: 我們大部分的線上訂單都是直接由製造商的倉庫代發貨。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 存貨周轉、庫存周轉
toeic.example_en: Improving stock turnover should reduce warehouse costs and free up working capital.
toeic.example_zh: 改善庫存周轉應能降低倉儲成本並釋出營運資金。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 貨架空間、上架位置
toeic.example_en: Negotiating prime shelf space at major retailers is critical for new consumer products.
toeic.example_zh: 在主要零售商談下黃金貨架空間，對新的消費性產品至關重要。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 銷售點終端、POS 收銀機
toeic.example_en: All store locations will be upgraded with the new contactless POS terminals by year-end.
toeic.example_zh: 所有店面將在年底前升級為新的非接觸式 POS 終端。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 非接觸式付款、感應支付
toeic.example_en: Contactless payment has become the preferred option for most customers under forty.
toeic.example_zh: 對於大多數四十歲以下的顧客而言，非接觸式付款已成為首選方式。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 退款手續費、爭議款項手續費
toeic.example_en: Merchants who exceed the chargeback threshold are subject to additional chargeback fees.
toeic.example_zh: 超過爭議款項門檻的商家會被收取額外的退款手續費。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 高淨值的、高資產的
toeic.example_en: The private banking division focuses exclusively on high-net-worth individuals.
toeic.example_zh: 私人銀行部門只專注於服務高淨值客戶。

toeic.example_en: Wealth managers compete fiercely to win ultra-high-net-worth clients.
toeic.example_zh: 財富管理業者為了爭取超高淨值客戶而競爭激烈。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 家族辦公室、家族財富管理機構
toeic.example_en: A family office typically manages investments, taxes, and philanthropy for a single wealthy family.
toeic.example_zh: 家族辦公室通常為單一富裕家族管理投資、稅務與慈善事務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 財富保全、資產保值
toeic.example_en: Many retirees prioritize wealth preservation over aggressive growth in their investment portfolios.
toeic.example_zh: 許多退休人士在投資組合中將財富保全置於積極成長之上。

toeic.example_en: The foundation directs its philanthropic efforts toward education and clean water initiatives.
toeic.example_zh: 該基金會將其慈善行動聚焦於教育與乾淨水資源計畫。

toeic.example_en: The university's endowment grew by twelve percent thanks to strong investment returns.
toeic.example_zh: 由於投資報酬亮眼，這所大學的捐贈基金成長了百分之十二。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/副詞) 無償的、義務性的（多用於律師）
toeic.example_en: Our firm encourages associates to take on pro bono cases for nonprofit organizations.
toeic.example_zh: 我們事務所鼓勵律師接手非營利組織的無償案件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 實物捐贈、非現金捐助
toeic.example_en: Several companies made in-kind donations of food and supplies after the natural disaster.
toeic.example_zh: 在天災發生後，數家公司提供了食物與物資的實物捐贈。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 對等捐款、配比捐贈
toeic.example_en: Our employer offers a matching gift program for charitable donations up to five thousand dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的雇主對員工慈善捐款提供最高五千美元的對等捐款方案。

toeic.example_en: Employees can set up automatic payroll deductions for retirement contributions.
toeic.example_zh: 員工可以設定自動薪資扣款，作為退休金提撥。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 薪資直接匯款入帳
toeic.example_en: Setting up direct deposit ensures your paycheck arrives on the same day every month.
toeic.example_zh: 設定薪資直接匯款入帳可確保您的薪水每個月在同一天到帳。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 薪資單、薪資明細
toeic.example_en: You can download your pay stub from the employee self-service portal anytime.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以隨時從員工自助服務入口下載您的薪資單。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 福利選擇開放期
toeic.example_en: Open enrollment for health benefits begins next Monday and runs for two weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 健康福利的選擇開放期從下週一開始，為期兩週。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 彈性消費帳戶（稅前醫療儲蓄帳戶）
toeic.example_en: Contributing to a flexible spending account lets you pay for medical expenses with pre-tax dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 提撥彈性消費帳戶可讓您以稅前資金支付醫療費用。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 健康儲蓄帳戶
toeic.example_en: Funds in a health savings account roll over from year to year, unlike most other accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 與大多數其他帳戶不同，健康儲蓄帳戶中的資金可逐年滾存。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 自付額、可扣抵金額
toeic.example_en: Most plans require members to pay the deductible amount before insurance kicks in.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數方案要求會員先支付自付額後，保險才會開始給付。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自付額、共同負擔費用
toeic.example_en: A co-payment of twenty dollars applies to each visit to an in-network specialist.
toeic.example_zh: 每次到網路內專科醫師看診須自付二十美元。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 網路內醫療提供者
toeic.example_en: Members pay less when they choose an in-network provider for their medical care.
toeic.example_zh: 會員選擇網路內醫療提供者就醫時，自付費用較低。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 事前授權、預先核准
toeic.example_en: Certain procedures require preauthorization from the insurance company before treatment.
toeic.example_zh: 某些醫療程序在治療前需要保險公司的事前授權。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 理賠調查員、理賠專員
toeic.example_en: A claim adjuster will contact you within forty-eight hours to assess the damage.
toeic.example_zh: 理賠專員將在四十八小時內聯繫您以評估損失。

toeic.example_en: The underwriter assessment determines the premium based on your medical history.
toeic.example_zh: 核保評估會依據您的病史決定保費。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 費率調漲、加價
toeic.example_en: Policyholders received notice of a rate increase effective at the next renewal date.
toeic.example_zh: 保戶收到了下次續保日生效的費率調漲通知。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 無理賠優惠、無事故獎勵
toeic.example_en: Drivers can earn a no-claim bonus for each accident-free year of coverage.
toeic.example_zh: 駕駛人每一年無事故承保，皆可獲得無理賠優惠。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 理賠處理人員
toeic.example_en: The claims handler requested additional documentation before processing the refund.
toeic.example_zh: 理賠處理人員在處理退款前要求補充更多文件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 保單續約、保險續保
toeic.example_en: Please review your coverage before policy renewal to ensure it still meets your needs.
toeic.example_zh: 請在保單續約前檢視您的保障範圍，確保它仍符合您的需求。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 既存疾病、投保前已有的疾病
toeic.example_en: The new policy provides coverage for pre-existing conditions after a six-month waiting period.
toeic.example_zh: 新保單在六個月的等待期後，會為既存疾病提供保障。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 門診的、門診病人
toeic.example_en: Most minor procedures can be completed on an outpatient basis without overnight hospital stays.
toeic.example_zh: 大部分小手術都可以在門診進行，不需要住院過夜。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 住院的、住院病人
toeic.example_en: Inpatient care includes overnight hospitalization and continuous medical monitoring.
toeic.example_zh: 住院治療包括隔夜住院以及持續的醫療監測。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 醫療帳務、醫療收費作業
toeic.example_en: Our healthcare client outsources medical billing to a specialized service provider.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的醫療客戶將醫療帳務外包給專業的服務供應商。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 醫療編碼專員
toeic.example_en: The coding specialist ensures each diagnosis is recorded with the correct ICD code for reimbursement.
toeic.example_zh: 醫療編碼專員會確保每項診斷以正確的 ICD 編碼登錄，以利申請給付。

toeic.example_en: Automated appointment reminders have significantly reduced no-show rates at our clinics.
toeic.example_zh: 自動化的預約提醒大幅降低了我們診所的爽約率。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 失約費、爽約費
toeic.example_en: A no-show fee of fifty dollars applies to appointments cancelled with less than two hours' notice.
toeic.example_zh: 若預約取消通知不足兩小時，將收取五十美元的爽約費。

toeic.example_en: Patients can be added to the wait list for cancellations during peak season.
toeic.example_zh: 在旺季時，患者可加入候補名單以等候有人取消的時段。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 入院表、新客資料表
toeic.example_en: Please complete the intake form at least ten minutes before your scheduled appointment.
toeic.example_zh: 請在預約時間至少十分鐘前完成入院表。

toeic.example_en: Nurse practitioners must work within the scope of practice defined by state law.
toeic.example_zh: 執業護理師必須在州法律所定義的執業範圍內工作。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 資格審核、執照認證程序
toeic.example_en: Hospital credentialing requires verification of education, training, and professional history.
toeic.example_zh: 醫院的資格審核需要驗證學歷、訓練與專業履歷。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) HIPAA 法規遵循（美國健康資訊隱私法）
toeic.example_en: Strict HIPAA compliance is required when handling any patient health information.
toeic.example_zh: 處理任何病患健康資訊時都必須嚴格遵循 HIPAA 法規。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 電子病歷系統
toeic.example_en: The new EHR system allows doctors to access patient records securely from any device.
toeic.example_zh: 新的電子病歷系統讓醫師可以從任何裝置安全地存取病患記錄。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 病患入口網站、病人線上服務平台
toeic.example_en: Through the patient portal, members can view lab results and schedule follow-up appointments.
toeic.example_zh: 透過病患入口網站，會員可以查看檢驗結果並預約回診。

toeic.example_en: The company holds a long-term leasehold on the downtown office building.
toeic.example_zh: 公司持有市中心辦公大樓的長期租賃權。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 永久產權、自由保有地產
toeic.example_en: Investors prefer freehold properties because they offer full ownership of both land and buildings.
toeic.example_zh: 投資人偏好永久產權的房產，因為它們提供土地與建築物的完整所有權。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 主力承租戶、招牌商戶
toeic.example_en: Securing an anchor tenant is crucial for the success of any new shopping mall.
toeic.example_zh: 找到主力承租戶對任何新購物中心的成功都至關重要。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 公共區域維護費
toeic.example_en: Common area maintenance fees are typically charged on top of the base rent.
toeic.example_zh: 公共區域維護費通常會在基本租金之外另行收取。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 租金明細表、租賃清冊
toeic.example_en: The rent roll lists every tenant's lease term, monthly payment, and renewal date.
toeic.example_zh: 租金明細表列出每位租戶的租期、月付金額與續租日。

toeic.example_en: The vacancy rate for downtown office space has climbed sharply since the pandemic.
toeic.example_zh: 市中心辦公空間的空置率自疫情以來急遽攀升。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 吸納率、銷售消化率
toeic.example_en: A high absorption rate indicates strong demand for housing in the area.
toeic.example_zh: 高吸納率代表該區域對住宅有強勁的需求。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 盡職調查期、審查期
toeic.example_en: Buyers typically have a thirty-day due diligence period to inspect the property before closing.
toeic.example_zh: 買方通常有三十天的盡職調查期，可在交屋前檢查房產。

toeic.example_en: An earnest money deposit demonstrates the buyer's serious intent to purchase the property.
toeic.example_zh: 訂金顯示買方有認真購買該房產的意願。

toeic.example_en: A title search is required to verify there are no liens or claims against the property.
toeic.example_zh: 需要進行產權調查以確認該房產沒有任何抵押或請求權。

toeic.example_en: If the appraisal value falls below the offer price, the buyer may need to renegotiate.
toeic.example_zh: 若鑑價估值低於出價，買方可能需要重新議價。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 使用執照、入住許可
toeic.example_en: The building cannot be opened to the public until the occupancy permit is issued.
toeic.example_zh: 在使用執照核發之前，這棟建築不能對公眾開放。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 土地分區法規、分區條例
toeic.example_en: Local zoning ordinances determine which types of businesses can operate in each district.
toeic.example_zh: 地方土地分區法規規定每個區域可以營業的事業類型。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 法規變更申請、分區例外申請
toeic.example_en: The developer submitted a variance request to build slightly above the height limit.
toeic.example_zh: 建商提出了法規變更申請，希望可以略高於限高建造。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 資料駐留、資料存放地
toeic.example_en: European customers often ask about data residency to confirm that their information stays within the EU.
toeic.example_zh: 歐洲客戶常會詢問資料駐留問題，以確認他們的資訊存放於歐盟境內。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 資料主權、數據主權
toeic.example_en: Data sovereignty laws restrict cross-border transfers of certain types of personal information.
toeic.example_zh: 資料主權法規限制某些類型個人資訊的跨境傳輸。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 資料最小化（只收集必要資料）
toeic.example_en: Data minimization is a core principle of privacy regulations like the GDPR.
toeic.example_zh: 資料最小化是 GDPR 等隱私法規的核心原則之一。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 目的限制（資料僅可用於蒐集目的）
toeic.example_en: Purpose limitation prevents companies from reusing personal data for unrelated activities.
toeic.example_zh: 目的限制原則阻止公司將個人資料挪用於不相關的活動。

toeic.example_en: As the data controller, we are responsible for ensuring lawful processing of customer data.
toeic.example_zh: 身為資料控管者，我們有責任確保客戶資料的處理合法。

toeic.example_en: Our cloud vendor acts as a data processor and follows our written instructions strictly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的雲端供應商擔任資料處理者的角色，並嚴格遵循我方的書面指示。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 流程精簡；效率優化
toeic.example_en: The streamlining of approval workflows reduced average processing time from two weeks to three business days.
toeic.example_zh: 審批流程的精簡將平均處理時間從兩週縮短為三個工作日。

toeic.example_en: Please confirm the deliverable date for the user interface mockups before the client meeting on Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 請在週五客戶會議前確認使用者介面樣稿的交付日期。

toeic.example_en: Our recruiting team maintains a talent pool of qualified candidates for future engineering openings.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的招聘團隊維護一個合格候選人才庫，以備未來工程職缺之需。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 人力縮減；裁員
toeic.example_en: The board approved a modest workforce reduction to align operating costs with projected revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會批准了小規模的人力縮減，以使營運成本與預估營收一致。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 利害關係人一致性
toeic.example_en: Achieving stakeholder alignment early in the project prevented costly rework during implementation.
toeic.example_zh: 在專案早期取得利害關係人一致性可避免實施階段的高成本返工。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 可付諸行動的洞見
toeic.example_en: The consultant delivered an actionable insight that helped the marketing team double conversion rates.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問提供了一項可付諸行動的洞見，協助行銷團隊將轉換率翻倍。

toeic.example_en: We used a decision matrix to evaluate the three competing vendor proposals objectively.
toeic.example_zh: 我們使用決策矩陣客觀評估三份相互競爭的供應商提案。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高階人才挖角；獵頭
toeic.example_en: The firm specializes in headhunting senior executives for technology companies across Asia.
toeic.example_zh: 該公司專門為亞洲科技公司挖角高階主管。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 重新調配；重新部署
toeic.example_en: Management decided to redeploy several engineers from the legacy system to the new platform team.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層決定將數名工程師從舊系統重新調配至新平台團隊。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 交叉訓練；多技能培訓
toeic.example_en: We cross-train customer service representatives so they can handle both technical and billing inquiries.
toeic.example_zh: 我們對客戶服務代表進行交叉訓練，使他們能同時處理技術與帳單諮詢。

toeic.example_en: Please raise any blocker during the daily stand-up so the team can resolve it immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 請在每日站立會議中提出任何阻礙，讓團隊能立即解決。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞-現在分詞) 漸進提升；加速
toeic.example_en: The factory is ramping production to meet unexpectedly strong demand from European retailers.
toeic.example_zh: 工廠正在加速生產，以滿足歐洲零售商出乎意料的強勁需求。

toeic.example_en: We had to deprioritize the mobile redesign in order to focus engineering resources on the API migration.
toeic.example_zh: 我們不得不將行動版重新設計的優先順序降低，以將工程資源集中於 API 遷移。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 規模適中的；調整至適當規模的
toeic.example_en: The right-sized team of five engineers delivered the product faster than the previous group of twelve.
toeic.example_zh: 由五名工程師組成的規模適中團隊比先前的十二人小組更快交付產品。

toeic.example_en: Investing in automation tools has significantly improved operational efficiency across our warehouses.
toeic.example_zh: 投資自動化工具已大幅提升我們倉儲業務的營運效率。

toeic.example_en: Competitive compensation alone is no longer sufficient to ensure long-term talent retention.
toeic.example_zh: 僅靠具競爭力的薪酬已不足以確保長期的人才留任。

toeic.example_en: Effective agenda setting before the quarterly meeting ensures discussions remain focused and productive.
toeic.example_zh: 在季度會議前進行有效的議程設定可確保討論保持聚焦並具生產力。

toeic.example_en: The talent shortage in cybersecurity has driven salaries up by nearly thirty percent in two years.
toeic.example_zh: 網路安全領域的人才短缺已使薪資在兩年內上漲近三成。

toeic.example_en: Each agenda owner should send pre-read materials at least 24 hours before the meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 每位議程負責人應於會議前至少 24 小時寄出預讀資料。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 關鍵障礙；致命問題
toeic.example_en: The data migration error turned out to be a showstopper that delayed the system launch by a week.
toeic.example_zh: 資料遷移錯誤事實上成為致命問題，使系統上線延遲了一週。

toeic.example_en: Unused vacation days are subject to a maximum rollover of five days into the next calendar year.
toeic.example_zh: 未使用的休假日轉入下一日曆年度最多以五天為限。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 營運檢討會議
toeic.example_en: The monthly operational review highlighted three areas where productivity could be substantially improved.
toeic.example_zh: 月度營運檢討會議指出三個生產力可大幅改善的領域。

toeic.example_en: Many employees block out two hours of deep work each morning to focus on strategic tasks.
toeic.example_zh: 許多員工每天早晨保留兩小時的深度工作時間，以專注於策略性任務。

toeic.example_en: We established a weekly meeting cadence with the offshore development team to maintain alignment.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與離岸開發團隊建立每週會議節奏以維持步調一致。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 人才招募策略
toeic.example_en: Our talent acquisition strategy emphasizes diverse hiring and partnerships with regional universities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的人才招募策略著重於多元化招聘以及與區域大學的合作。

toeic.example_en: Strong people managers are critical to maintaining team morale during periods of rapid change.
toeic.example_zh: 在快速變革時期，優秀的人員主管對維持團隊士氣至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Some employees prefer the individual contributor track over taking on management responsibilities.
toeic.example_zh: 部分員工偏好獨立貢獻者路線，而不願承擔管理職責。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly talent mapping helps leadership identify employees ready for the next career step.
toeic.example_zh: 季度人才盤點協助領導層辨識準備好邁向職涯下一步的員工。

toeic.example_en: Our director holds skip level meetings with junior staff to gather unfiltered feedback.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的總監與基層員工舉行跨層級會議，以收集未經過濾的回饋。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 人才評估會議
toeic.example_en: The annual talent review identified six high-potential employees for accelerated development.
toeic.example_zh: 年度人才評估會議辨識出六位適合加速培養的高潛力員工。

toeic.example_en: Hiring managers look for candidates who demonstrate a growth mindset and willingness to learn.
toeic.example_zh: 招聘主管尋找展現成長型思維且願意學習的候選人。

toeic.example_en: We adopted a standard agenda template to ensure all project meetings cover risks and next steps.
toeic.example_zh: 我們採用標準議程範本，以確保所有專案會議都涵蓋風險與後續步驟。

toeic.example_en: HR conducted a fact-finding interview with each team member before recommending disciplinary action.
toeic.example_zh: 人資在建議懲處措施前對每位團隊成員進行了事實調查訪談。

toeic.example_en: The CEO offered her a stretch assignment leading the company's first international expansion.
toeic.example_zh: 執行長提供她一項挑戰性任務，負責領導公司首次的國際擴張。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 專案受理流程
toeic.example_en: The new project intake process requires a business case and resource estimate before approval.
toeic.example_zh: 新的專案受理流程在核准前要求提交商業論證與資源估算。

toeic.example_en: Resource leveling adjusts the schedule to address conflicts between competing project demands.
toeic.example_zh: 資源平衡調整時程以解決相互競爭的專案需求之間的衝突。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 專案小組；特遣團隊
toeic.example_en: Management assembled a cross-functional task force to address the recurring quality issues.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層組成一個跨職能專案小組以處理一再發生的品質問題。

toeic.example_en: The milestone review at the end of each phase confirms that deliverables meet acceptance criteria.
toeic.example_zh: 每個階段結束時的里程碑檢視確認交付成果符合驗收標準。

toeic.example_en: Projects must pass each stage gate review before receiving additional funding from the steering committee.
toeic.example_zh: 專案必須通過每個階段審核點，才能從指導委員會獲得額外資金。

toeic.example_en: Any deviation from the scope baseline must be approved through a formal change control process.
toeic.example_zh: 任何偏離範圍基準的情況必須經由正式的變更控管流程核准。

toeic.example_en: The team measures progress weekly against the approved schedule baseline.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊每週依據已核准的時程基準衡量進度。

toeic.example_en: We compare actual expenditures against the cost baseline to identify potential overruns early.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將實際支出與成本基準比較，以儘早辨識潛在超支。

toeic.example_en: The project manager updates the issue log daily and reviews open items with stakeholders weekly.
toeic.example_zh: 專案經理每日更新問題紀錄表，並每週與利害關係人檢視未解決項目。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 啟動會議簡報
toeic.example_en: Please review the kickoff deck before tomorrow's session and prepare any clarifying questions.
toeic.example_zh: 請於明日會議前審閱啟動會議簡報，並準備任何需要釐清的問題。

toeic.example_en: Each user story must satisfy the definition of done before it can be marked complete in the sprint.
toeic.example_zh: 每個使用者故事必須滿足完成定義，才能在衝刺中標記為完成。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 衝刺規劃會議
toeic.example_en: Sprint planning takes place every other Monday and typically runs for two hours.
toeic.example_zh: 衝刺規劃會議每隔週一舉行，通常持續兩小時。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 衝刺審查會議
toeic.example_en: Stakeholders attend the sprint review to see demonstrations of newly completed features.
toeic.example_zh: 利害關係人出席衝刺審查會議，觀看新完成功能的演示。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 版本發布管理
toeic.example_en: Effective release management ensures new software versions reach customers without disruption.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的版本發布管理確保新軟體版本能不中斷地交付給客戶。

toeic.example_en: We must guard against feature creep that pushes the launch date beyond our committed deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 我們必須防範功能蔓延導致上線日期超出我們承諾的期限。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 進行或中止的決策
toeic.example_en: The steering committee will make a go/no-go decision on Phase Two next Thursday.
toeic.example_zh: 指導委員會將於下週四對第二階段做出進行或中止的決策。

toeic.example_en: Each tollgate requires sign-off from finance, legal, and the project sponsor.
toeic.example_zh: 每個階段審核關卡都需要財務、法務與專案發起人的簽核。

toeic.example_en: Creating a RACI chart clarified who was responsible, accountable, consulted, and informed for each task.
toeic.example_zh: 建立責任分工圖釐清了每項任務的執行、當責、諮詢與告知對象。

toeic.example_en: The team chose a lift and shift approach to migrate the application to the cloud quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊選擇直接遷移的方式以快速將應用程式遷移至雲端。

toeic.example_en: Decommissioning of the legacy mainframe is scheduled for the third quarter of next year.
toeic.example_zh: 舊主機的退役預定於明年第三季進行。

toeic.example_en: We always prepare a rollback plan in case the deployment causes unexpected production issues.
toeic.example_zh: 我們總是準備回復方案，以防部署造成意外的生產環境問題。

toeic.example_en: Limiting the blast radius of a failed deployment is a key principle of resilient system design.
toeic.example_zh: 限制失敗部署的影響範圍是韌性系統設計的關鍵原則。

toeic.example_en: Each swimlane on the process diagram represents the responsibilities of a different department.
toeic.example_zh: 流程圖上每條泳道代表不同部門的職責。

toeic.example_en: Process mapping workshops helped identify three major bottlenecks in our order fulfillment system.
toeic.example_zh: 流程繪製工作坊協助辨識出我們訂單履行系統中的三個主要瓶頸。

toeic.example_en: During the discovery phase we interviewed twenty users to understand their core needs.
toeic.example_zh: 在探索階段我們訪談了二十位使用者以了解他們的核心需求。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 範圍界定會議
toeic.example_en: The scoping meeting concluded with a clear list of deliverables and exclusions for the engagement.
toeic.example_zh: 範圍界定會議以本次合作的明確交付項目與排除事項清單作結。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 加速處理；快速通道
toeic.example_en: Senior management decided to fast track the new feature to capture market opportunity.
toeic.example_zh: 高層管理決定加速推進新功能以掌握市場機會。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 非例行週期的；計畫外的
toeic.example_en: An off-cycle performance review may be conducted when an employee transfers to a new role.
toeic.example_zh: 當員工調任新職位時，可能進行計畫外的績效檢討。

toeic.example_en: An interim leader will manage the team until a permanent vice president is appointed.
toeic.example_zh: 在常任副總裁任命之前，將由臨時負責人管理該團隊。

toeic.example_en: The acting manager has authority to approve expenses up to ten thousand dollars during the transition.
toeic.example_zh: 代理主管在過渡期間有權核准最高一萬美元的費用支出。

toeic.example_en: Please prepare a detailed transition plan that documents all active projects and key contacts.
toeic.example_zh: 請準備一份詳盡的過渡計畫，記錄所有進行中的專案與重要聯絡人。

toeic.example_en: Three senior directors have been identified as succession candidates for the CFO role.
toeic.example_zh: 三位資深總監已被列為財務長職位的接班候選人。

toeic.example_en: The quarterly townhall meeting gives employees an opportunity to ask leadership candid questions.
toeic.example_zh: 季度全員大會讓員工有機會向領導層提出坦率的問題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 全員的；全員大會
toeic.example_en: Our all-hands every Friday afternoon shares wins, challenges, and product updates with the entire company.
toeic.example_zh: 每週五下午的全員大會與全公司分享成果、挑戰與產品更新。

toeic.example_en: The CEO hosted a fireside chat with the founder of our newest acquisition to introduce the team.
toeic.example_zh: 執行長與我們最新併購標的的創辦人舉行爐邊談話以介紹其團隊。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 自由提問環節
toeic.example_en: The ask me anything session with the CTO gave engineers a chance to discuss the technical roadmap.
toeic.example_zh: 與技術長的自由提問環節讓工程師有機會討論技術藍圖。

toeic.example_en: We host a monthly lunch and learn featuring guest speakers from various industries.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每月舉辦一次午餐學習會，邀請來自不同產業的客座講者。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 自帶午餐分享會
toeic.example_en: Tomorrow's brown bag session will cover best practices for writing technical documentation.
toeic.example_zh: 明天的自帶午餐分享會將探討撰寫技術文件的最佳實務。

toeic.example_en: Please send me the latest version of the deck so I can review it before the board meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 請寄給我最新版的簡報投影片，我才能在董事會議前審閱。

toeic.example_en: The pre-read for tomorrow's strategy session is attached and should take about thirty minutes to review.
toeic.example_zh: 明日策略會議的會前資料已附上，閱讀約需三十分鐘。

toeic.example_en: A detailed post-read summarizing decisions and action items will be distributed within 24 hours.
toeic.example_zh: 整理決議與行動項目的詳細會後資料將於 24 小時內發送。

toeic.example_en: Please accept the calendar invite to confirm your attendance at the planning workshop.
toeic.example_zh: 請接受行事曆邀請以確認您將出席規劃工作坊。

toeic.example_en: Avoid double-booking conference rooms by checking the availability calendar before sending invites.
toeic.example_zh: 在發送邀請前先檢查可用性日曆，以避免重複預約會議室。

toeic.example_en: A scheduling conflict forced us to move the project review from Wednesday to Friday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 時程衝突迫使我們將專案檢討會議從週三改至週五上午。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞片語) 預先封存時段
toeic.example_en: I will block off two hours on Friday afternoon for focused work on the budget proposal.
toeic.example_zh: 我會在週五下午預先封存兩小時，專心處理預算提案。

toeic.example_en: The security team ran a tabletop exercise to test our response to a simulated data breach scenario.
toeic.example_zh: 資安團隊進行了桌上型演練，以測試我們對模擬資料外洩情境的應變。

toeic.example_en: We always do a dry run of major client presentations the day before to catch any issues.
toeic.example_zh: 我們總是在重要客戶簡報前一天進行預演，以發現任何問題。

toeic.example_en: The departing manager arranged a warm handoff that introduced her successor to every key client personally.
toeic.example_zh: 即將離職的經理安排了妥善交接，親自向每位重要客戶介紹她的繼任者。

toeic.example_en: Each new sales hire follows a 90-day ramp plan with weekly checkpoints to track progress.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新進業務都遵循 90 天上手計畫，每週設置檢核點追蹤進度。

toeic.example_en: Each new engineering manager is paired with an experienced co-pilot for the first six months.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新任工程主管在前六個月會搭配一位資深協同夥伴。

toeic.example_en: Working effectively in a matrix organization requires strong communication across reporting lines.
toeic.example_zh: 在矩陣式組織中有效運作需要跨匯報線的良好溝通。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 虛線匯報關係
toeic.example_en: She has a dotted line reporting relationship to the regional vice president of marketing.
toeic.example_zh: 她與區域行銷副總裁之間有虛線匯報關係。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 實線直屬關係
toeic.example_en: His solid line manager handles performance reviews and approves time off requests.
toeic.example_zh: 他的實線直屬主管負責績效評核並核准請假申請。

toeic.example_en: The reorganization increased each director's span of control from five to eight direct reports.
toeic.example_zh: 組織重整將每位總監的管理幅度從五位直接部屬增加為八位。

toeic.example_en: As a senior manager, she now has twelve direct reports across three different time zones.
toeic.example_zh: 作為資深經理，她現在管理跨三個不同時區的十二位直接部屬。

toeic.example_en: Conducting a skip-level review helps senior leaders identify gaps in middle management performance.
toeic.example_zh: 進行跨層級檢視有助於高階主管辨識中階管理層的績效缺口。

toeic.example_en: People analytics revealed that teams with weekly one-on-ones had significantly higher engagement scores.
toeic.example_zh: 人員分析顯示，每週進行一對一會談的團隊具有明顯較高的敬業度分數。

toeic.example_en: The annual engagement survey provides valuable insight into workplace culture and management effectiveness.
toeic.example_zh: 年度敬業度調查為職場文化與管理效能提供寶貴洞見。

toeic.example_en: We launched a short pulse survey to gauge employee sentiment after the recent reorganization.
toeic.example_zh: 我們推出簡短的脈動調查，以評估近期組織重整後的員工情緒。
