toeic.example_zh: 你回家的路上請買一包水餃。

toeic.example_en: Please put the empty milk carton in the recycling bin.
toeic.example_zh: 請把空牛奶紙盒放進回收桶。

toeic.example_en: Steamed pork buns make a quick and yummy breakfast.
toeic.example_zh: 蒸豬肉包子是快速又美味的早餐。

toeic.example_en: He likes his steak well done with mashed potatoes on the side.
toeic.example_zh: 他喜歡他的牛排全熟，旁邊配馬鈴薯泥。

toeic.example_en: Baked salmon with lemon is one of her favorite dishes.
toeic.example_zh: 檸檬烤鮭魚是她最愛的料理之一。

toeic.example_en: A tuna sandwich with mayonnaise is a classic lunch choice.
toeic.example_zh: 鮪魚美乃滋三明治是經典的午餐選擇。

toeic.example_en: Roast lamb is a traditional dish during the holiday season.
toeic.example_zh: 烤羊肉是節日期間的傳統料理。

toeic.example_en: Roast duck with thin pancakes is famous in Beijing.
toeic.example_zh: 烤鴨配薄餅在北京非常有名。

toeic.example_en: Americans eat roast turkey on Thanksgiving with their families.
toeic.example_zh: 美國人感恩節會和家人吃烤火雞。

toeic.example_en: Mixed nuts are a healthy snack between meals.
toeic.example_zh: 綜合堅果是兩餐之間健康的點心。

toeic.example_en: I love spreading peanut butter on warm toast.
toeic.example_zh: 我喜歡在溫熱的吐司上塗花生醬。

toeic.example_en: I added some sliced almonds to my morning oatmeal today.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天在早上的燕麥粥裡加了一些杏仁片。

toeic.example_en: Chips and crackers are common salty snacks at parties.
toeic.example_zh: 洋芋片和餅乾是派對上常見的鹹點心。

toeic.example_en: I made a banana and berry smoothie for breakfast today.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天早餐做了香蕉莓果冰沙。

toeic.example_en: He ordered a chocolate milkshake with his cheeseburger meal.
toeic.example_zh: 他點了一杯巧克力奶昔搭配他的起司堡套餐。

toeic.example_en: The kids set up a lemonade stand on a hot day.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們在大熱天擺了一個檸檬水攤位。

toeic.example_en: A glass of iced tea is so refreshing in summer.
toeic.example_zh: 夏天喝一杯冰紅茶非常消暑。

toeic.example_en: She ordered a hot vanilla latte at the corner coffee shop.
toeic.example_zh: 她在街角咖啡店點了一杯熱香草拿鐵。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 軟性飲料；汽水
toeic.example_en: I try to avoid sweet soft drinks during the week.
toeic.example_zh: 平日我盡量不喝含糖的汽水。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 小吃店；點心吧
toeic.example_en: Let us grab a quick bite at the snack bar.
toeic.example_zh: 我們去小吃店快速吃點東西吧。

toeic.example_en: The mall food court has many cheap and tasty options.
toeic.example_zh: 百貨美食街有許多便宜又好吃的選擇。

toeic.example_en: We used the drive-through to save time on our trip.
toeic.example_zh: 為了旅途省時，我們使用了得來速。

toeic.example_en: Eating too much fast food is not good for your health.
toeic.example_zh: 吃太多速食對健康不好。

toeic.example_en: I had the leftover pizza for breakfast this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天早上吃了昨天剩下的披薩當早餐。

toeic.example_en: Mom spread a clean white tablecloth before the guests arrived.
toeic.example_zh: 客人來之前，媽媽鋪上了乾淨的白桌布。

toeic.example_en: Could we please get a highchair for our little baby?
toeic.example_zh: 可以麻煩給我們的小寶寶一張高腳椅嗎？

toeic.example_en: Please lower your tray table before the meal is served.
toeic.example_zh: 餐點上來之前請放下您的餐盤桌。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 廚房紙巾；擦碗布
toeic.example_en: Use a clean kitchen towel to dry the wet dishes.
toeic.example_zh: 用乾淨的擦碗布把濕碗盤擦乾。

toeic.example_en: She used a rolling pin to flatten the dough on the table.
toeic.example_zh: 她用擀麵棍在桌上把麵團擀平。

toeic.example_en: Use a measuring cup to put in the exact amount of milk.
toeic.example_zh: 用量杯倒入準確份量的牛奶。

toeic.example_en: I use a measuring spoon for one teaspoon of sugar.
toeic.example_zh: 我用量匙取一茶匙的糖。

toeic.example_en: A wok is the best tool for making stir-fried vegetables.
toeic.example_zh: 炒鍋是做炒青菜最棒的工具。

toeic.example_en: She used the ladle to serve soup into each bowl.
toeic.example_zh: 她用湯杓把湯舀到每個碗裡。

toeic.example_en: Beat the eggs with a whisk for two whole minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 用打蛋器把蛋打整整兩分鐘。

toeic.example_en: Use the grater to shred some cheese for the pasta.
toeic.example_zh: 用起司刨磨一些起司放在義大利麵上。

toeic.example_en: Pick up the hot sausages with the metal tongs.
toeic.example_zh: 用金屬夾子夾起燙的香腸。

toeic.example_en: Thread the chicken and peppers onto wooden skewers.
toeic.example_zh: 把雞肉和甜椒串到木製串籤上。

toeic.example_en: Cover the pot with a lid and let it simmer slowly.
toeic.example_zh: 把鍋子蓋上蓋子，讓它慢慢燉。

toeic.example_en: Stir-fry the vegetables over high heat for two minutes only.
toeic.example_zh: 用大火快炒蔬菜兩分鐘就好。

toeic.example_en: The store on the corner sells fresh bread every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 街角那家商店每天早上賣新鮮麵包。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 店鋪；(動詞) 購物
toeic.example_en: I like to shop for vegetables at the small shop near my home.
toeic.example_zh: 我喜歡在家附近的小店買蔬菜。

toeic.example_en: We can meet at the mall after work and have dinner there.
toeic.example_zh: 我們下班後可以在購物中心碰面並一起吃晚餐。

toeic.example_en: Please go to the pharmacy and pick up my medicine after lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 請在午餐後去藥房幫我拿藥。

toeic.example_en: There is a small bookstore between the cafe and the bank.
toeic.example_zh: 在咖啡店和銀行之間有一家小書店。

toeic.example_en: For your convenience, the store is open twenty-four hours every day.
toeic.example_zh: 為了方便您，這家商店每天二十四小時營業。

toeic.example_en: The cashier smiled and gave me my change with a receipt.
toeic.example_zh: 收銀員微笑著把零錢和收據給了我。

toeic.example_en: The line at the checkout is very long on Saturday afternoons.
toeic.example_zh: 週六下午結帳隊伍非常長。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 收銀機；(動詞) 登記
toeic.example_en: Please pay at the second register near the front door.
toeic.example_zh: 請到靠近前門的第二台收銀機結帳。

toeic.example_en: Please put your items on the counter so I can scan them.
toeic.example_zh: 請把您的商品放在櫃台上，我才能掃描。

toeic.example_en: You can find the milk in aisle five on the left side.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以在左邊的第五走道找到牛奶。

toeic.example_en: The price of fresh vegetables has gone up a little this week.
toeic.example_zh: 本週新鮮蔬菜的價格漲了一點。

toeic.example_en: Please look at the price tag before bringing the item to checkout.
toeic.example_zh: 在把商品拿去結帳前，請先看價格標籤。

toeic.example_en: Read the label carefully to see how much sugar is inside.
toeic.example_zh: 仔細閱讀標籤以查看裡面有多少糖。

toeic.example_en: The shoes are on sale this weekend at half the normal price.
toeic.example_zh: 這個週末鞋子半價特賣。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 便宜貨；划算的交易
toeic.example_en: This jacket is a real bargain for only twenty dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 這件外套只賣二十美元，真是划算。

toeic.example_en: The fruit at this market is fresh and very cheap.
toeic.example_zh: 這個市場的水果新鮮又便宜。

toeic.example_en: This bag is too expensive, so I want to look around more.
toeic.example_zh: 這個包包太貴了，所以我想再看看別的。

toeic.example_en: How much does this small umbrella cost in your store?
toeic.example_zh: 您店裡這把小傘賣多少錢？

toeic.example_en: I will pay by credit card if that is okay with you.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您可以的話，我想用信用卡付款。

toeic.example_en: Sorry, this small shop only accepts cash, not credit cards.
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，這家小店只收現金，不收信用卡。

toeic.example_en: I need a coin to use the locker at the train station.
toeic.example_zh: 我需要一枚硬幣來使用火車站的置物櫃。

toeic.example_en: Here is your change and your receipt. Have a nice day.
toeic.example_zh: 這是您的零錢和收據，祝您有美好的一天。

toeic.example_en: I forgot my wallet at home, so I cannot pay today.
toeic.example_zh: 我把錢包忘在家裡，所以今天無法付款。

toeic.example_en: She put the small bottle of water inside her brown purse.
toeic.example_zh: 她把那瓶小水放進她的棕色手提包裡。

toeic.example_en: I do not have enough money to buy both books today.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天的錢不夠買這兩本書。

toeic.example_en: I usually spend about fifty dollars on groceries every week.
toeic.example_zh: 我通常每週花大約五十美元買日用品。

toeic.example_en: If you use this coupon, you can save five dollars today.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您使用這張優惠券，今天可以省五美元。

toeic.example_en: I cannot afford a new phone this month, maybe next month.
toeic.example_zh: 這個月我買不起新手機，也許下個月吧。

toeic.example_en: I want to buy a small gift for my sister's birthday.
toeic.example_zh: 我想為我妹妹的生日買一個小禮物。

toeic.example_en: They sell fresh fish and seafood at the market on weekends.
toeic.example_zh: 他們週末在市場上賣新鮮的魚和海鮮。

toeic.example_en: The shop owner always greets every customer with a big smile.
toeic.example_zh: 店主總是用大大的微笑迎接每位顧客。

toeic.example_en: The clerk helped me find the right size of running shoes.
toeic.example_zh: 店員幫我找到合適尺寸的跑鞋。

toeic.example_en: Do you have this shirt in a smaller size, please?
toeic.example_zh: 請問這件襯衫有更小的尺寸嗎？

toeic.example_en: I really like this color, but the size is too big for me.
toeic.example_zh: 我很喜歡這個顏色，但尺寸對我來說太大了。

toeic.example_en: May I try this pair of shoes before I decide to buy them?
toeic.example_zh: 我可以在決定買之前試穿這雙鞋嗎？

toeic.example_en: These jeans fit me perfectly. I will take them today.
toeic.example_zh: 這條牛仔褲非常合身，我今天就要買。

toeic.example_en: The fitting room is at the back of the store on the right.
toeic.example_zh: 試衣間在店面後方的右邊。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可獲得的；有供應的
toeic.example_en: This bag is also available in black and gray colors.
toeic.example_zh: 這個包包也有黑色和灰色可選。

toeic.example_en: Please put each item on the counter one by one.
toeic.example_zh: 請把每件商品一個一個放在櫃台上。

toeic.example_en: This product is made in Japan and very popular here.
toeic.example_zh: 這個產品在日本製造，在這裡非常受歡迎。

toeic.example_en: All the goods in this section are on sale this week.
toeic.example_zh: 這個區域的所有商品本週都在特價。

toeic.example_en: I prefer this brand of milk because it tastes very fresh.
toeic.example_zh: 我比較喜歡這個牌子的牛奶，因為它嚐起來很新鮮。

toeic.example_en: The quality of these towels is very good for the price.
toeic.example_zh: 這些毛巾以這個價格來說品質非常好。

toeic.example_en: Could you wrap this package as a gift, please?
toeic.example_zh: 可以麻煩您把這個包裝成禮物嗎？

toeic.example_en: Please wrap it carefully because it is a gift for my mother.
toeic.example_zh: 請小心包裝，因為這是要送給我媽媽的禮物。

toeic.example_en: I am looking for a small gift for my friend's birthday party.
toeic.example_zh: 我在為朋友的生日派對找一個小禮物。

toeic.example_en: Buy two boxes and get the third one for free.
toeic.example_zh: 買兩盒，第三盒免費。

toeic.example_en: Can I return this shirt? The color does not suit me.
toeic.example_zh: 我可以退這件襯衫嗎？這個顏色不適合我。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞/形容詞) 開門；營業中
toeic.example_en: What time does this store open in the morning?
toeic.example_zh: 這家店早上幾點開門？

toeic.example_en: The supermarket will close at ten tonight, so please hurry.
toeic.example_zh: 超市今晚十點關門，所以請快點。

toeic.example_en: The store hours are from nine in the morning to nine at night.
toeic.example_zh: 這家店的營業時間是早上九點到晚上九點。

toeic.example_en: The bank is closed on Sundays and national holidays.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行週日和國定假日不營業。

toeic.example_en: Please meet me at the main entrance of the shopping mall.
toeic.example_zh: 請在購物中心的正門入口和我碰面。

toeic.example_en: The nearest exit is on your left near the elevators.
toeic.example_zh: 最近的出口在你左邊靠近電梯的地方。

toeic.example_en: Let us take the elevator up to the fifth floor for lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 我們搭電梯上五樓去吃午餐吧。

toeic.example_en: The escalator is broken today, so please use the stairs.
toeic.example_zh: 今天手扶梯壞了，請走樓梯。

toeic.example_en: Walking up the stairs is good exercise for your legs.
toeic.example_zh: 走樓梯對你的腿是很好的運動。

toeic.example_en: The children's clothes are on the third floor near the toys.
toeic.example_zh: 兒童服飾在三樓靠近玩具區。

toeic.example_en: The shoe department is right next to the women's clothing.
toeic.example_zh: 鞋類專櫃就在女裝旁邊。

toeic.example_en: Frozen food is in the section at the back of the store.
toeic.example_zh: 冷凍食品在店內後方的區域。

toeic.example_en: The produce section has lots of fresh fruit and vegetables.
toeic.example_zh: 蔬果區有許多新鮮的水果和蔬菜。

toeic.example_en: Milk, cheese, and yogurt are in the dairy section.
toeic.example_zh: 牛奶、起司和優格都在乳製品區。

toeic.example_en: Do not forget the shopping list on the kitchen table.
toeic.example_zh: 不要忘了廚房桌上的購物清單。

toeic.example_en: They will deliver the new sofa to my house this Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 他們這週五會把新沙發送到我家。

toeic.example_en: I bought this jacket online last week for a great price.
toeic.example_zh: 我上週在網路上以很好的價格買到這件外套。

toeic.example_en: You can check the store website for today's special prices.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以查看店家網站看今天的特價。

toeic.example_en: Shipping is free if you spend over thirty dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 消費超過三十美元就免運費。

toeic.example_en: There is a small fee for delivery on Sunday mornings.
toeic.example_zh: 週日上午送貨需要一筆小額費用。

toeic.example_en: Your total today comes to thirty-two dollars and fifty cents.
toeic.example_zh: 您今天的總金額是三十二元五十分。

toeic.example_en: Please check the amount on the receipt before you leave.
toeic.example_zh: 離開前請確認收據上的金額。

toeic.example_en: The tax is not included in the price on the tag.
toeic.example_zh: 標籤上的價格不含稅。

toeic.example_en: Sorry, we no longer accept cheque payments at this store.
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，本店已不再接受支票付款。

toeic.example_en: There is an ATM near the entrance if you need cash.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您需要現金，入口附近有一台自動提款機。

toeic.example_en: I will pay with my card instead of cash today.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天用卡付款，不付現金。

toeic.example_en: Please enter your PIN to confirm the payment.
toeic.example_zh: 請輸入您的密碼以確認付款。

toeic.example_en: Please swipe your card here to enter the train station.
toeic.example_zh: 請在這裡刷卡進入火車站。

toeic.example_en: The clerk will scan each item before you pay.
toeic.example_zh: 店員會在您付款前掃描每一件商品。

toeic.example_en: The barcode on this box will not scan. Please try again.
toeic.example_zh: 這個盒子上的條碼掃不出來，請再試一次。

toeic.example_en: The line at the bakery is very long this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 今天早上麵包店的隊伍很長。

toeic.example_en: We need to wait about ten minutes for our table.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要等大約十分鐘才能入座。

toeic.example_en: I take the bus to school every morning at seven thirty.
toeic.example_zh: 我每天早上七點半搭公車去學校。

toeic.example_en: The subway is the fastest way to get to downtown.
toeic.example_zh: 搭地鐵是到市中心最快的方式。

toeic.example_en: The train to the airport leaves every twenty minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 往機場的火車每二十分鐘一班。

toeic.example_en: Let us take a taxi to the restaurant since it is raining.
toeic.example_zh: 既然下雨，我們就搭計程車去餐廳吧。

toeic.example_en: Can you call a cab for me, please? I need to leave now.
toeic.example_zh: 可以幫我叫一輛計程車嗎？我現在要走了。

toeic.example_en: I will ride my bike to the park if the weather is nice.
toeic.example_zh: 如果天氣好，我會騎單車去公園。

toeic.example_en: My father will drive me to the airport early in the morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我爸爸明天一早會開車送我去機場。

toeic.example_en: The bus driver was very friendly and helped me with my bag.
toeic.example_zh: 公車司機很友善，還幫我提包包。

toeic.example_en: Every passenger must show a ticket before getting on the train.
toeic.example_zh: 每位乘客上火車前都必須出示車票。

toeic.example_en: The taxi fare from the airport to the hotel is twenty dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 從機場到飯店的計程車費是二十美元。

toeic.example_en: Get off at the next stop, and the museum is right there.
toeic.example_zh: 在下一站下車，博物館就在那裡。

toeic.example_en: I will meet you at the train station near the south gate.
toeic.example_zh: 我會在南門附近的火車站和你碰面。

toeic.example_en: The train to the city is leaving from platform three soon.
toeic.example_zh: 往市中心的火車很快將從三號月台出發。

toeic.example_en: Please go to gate twelve for the next flight to Tokyo.
toeic.example_zh: 請到十二號登機門搭乘下一班到東京的飛機。

toeic.example_en: Please stand behind the yellow line near the track.
toeic.example_zh: 請站在軌道旁的黃線後面。

toeic.example_en: Check the schedule to see when the next bus arrives.
toeic.example_zh: 查看時刻表，看下一班公車什麼時候到。

toeic.example_en: The train timetable is posted on the wall near the entrance.
toeic.example_zh: 火車時刻表貼在入口附近的牆上。

toeic.example_en: This bus route goes through the city center and the park.
toeic.example_zh: 這條公車路線會經過市中心和公園。

toeic.example_en: You must transfer to the green line at the next station.
toeic.example_zh: 您必須在下一站轉乘綠線。

toeic.example_en: Please board the bus at the front door, not the back.
toeic.example_zh: 請從前門上公車，不要從後門。

toeic.example_en: What time does the next train arrive at the main station?
toeic.example_zh: 下一班火車什麼時候到主車站？

toeic.example_en: The next bus will leave in about five minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 下一班公車大約五分鐘後出發。

toeic.example_en: I always arrive at the station ten minutes early.
toeic.example_zh: 我總是提早十分鐘到車站。

toeic.example_en: I was late for school because the bus was delayed.
toeic.example_zh: 我上學遲到了，因為公車誤點了。

toeic.example_en: There is a short delay due to heavy traffic in the city.
toeic.example_zh: 由於市區嚴重塞車，有一些短暫的延誤。

toeic.example_en: Traffic is very heavy near the school in the morning.
toeic.example_zh: 早上學校附近的交通非常繁忙。

toeic.example_en: Avoid driving during the morning rush hour if possible.
toeic.example_zh: 如果可以的話，請避開早上的尖峰時段開車。

toeic.example_en: This road is closed today because of construction work.
toeic.example_zh: 這條路今天因為施工而封閉。

toeic.example_en: The coffee shop is on the next street, on your left.
toeic.example_zh: 咖啡店在下一條街，在您的左邊。

toeic.example_en: My office is on Fifth Avenue, near the post office.
toeic.example_zh: 我的辦公室在第五大道，靠近郵局。

toeic.example_en: We took the highway to save time on our long trip.
toeic.example_zh: 我們走高速公路以節省長途旅程的時間。

toeic.example_en: Cross the bridge and turn right at the second corner.
toeic.example_zh: 過橋後在第二個轉角右轉。

toeic.example_en: The road goes through a long tunnel under the river.
toeic.example_zh: 這條路會穿過河底下的一條長隧道。

toeic.example_en: The bookstore is just around the corner from here.
toeic.example_zh: 書店就在這裡轉個彎而已。

toeic.example_en: Walk two blocks and the bank will be on your right.
toeic.example_zh: 走兩個街區，銀行就會在您的右邊。

toeic.example_en: Please use the crosswalk to cross this busy road safely.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用行人穿越道安全地過這條繁忙的馬路。

toeic.example_en: Walk on the sidewalk and not in the middle of the road.
toeic.example_zh: 請走在人行道上，不要走在馬路中間。

toeic.example_en: Drivers must stop for every pedestrian at this crossing.
toeic.example_zh: 司機在這個路口必須為每位行人停車。

toeic.example_en: Wait for the green signal before you cross the street.
toeic.example_zh: 在過馬路之前請等綠燈號誌。

toeic.example_en: Turn left at the next light, and you will see the hotel.
toeic.example_zh: 在下一個紅綠燈左轉，您就會看到飯店。

toeic.example_en: Turn right at the next intersection to find our office.
toeic.example_zh: 在下一個十字路口右轉就可以找到我們的辦公室。

toeic.example_en: Follow the green sign to find the train station.
toeic.example_zh: 跟著綠色的標誌走就能找到火車站。

toeic.example_en: You must come to a full stop at the stop sign.
toeic.example_zh: 您必須在停車標誌前完全停下車。

toeic.example_en: Please slow down. You are driving over the speed limit.
toeic.example_zh: 請減速，您開超過速限了。

toeic.example_en: Do not drive too fast on this small street.
toeic.example_zh: 在這條小街道上不要開太快。

toeic.example_en: The bus is very slow today because of heavy traffic.
toeic.example_zh: 因為交通很塞，公車今天開得很慢。

toeic.example_en: My house is near the train station, only five minutes away.
toeic.example_zh: 我家在火車站附近，只有五分鐘的路程。

toeic.example_en: The new mall is not too far from our hotel.
toeic.example_zh: 新的購物中心離我們的飯店不太遠。

toeic.example_en: Turn left at the post office, and the cafe is right there.
toeic.example_zh: 在郵局左轉，咖啡店就在那裡。

toeic.example_en: The pharmacy is on the right side of the street.
toeic.example_zh: 藥房在街道的右側。

toeic.example_en: Go straight ahead for two blocks and you will see it.
toeic.example_zh: 直走兩個街區您就會看到它。

toeic.example_en: Drive north on this road for about ten minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 沿著這條路向北開大約十分鐘。

toeic.example_en: The bus station is to the south of the city park.
toeic.example_zh: 公車站在市立公園的南邊。

toeic.example_en: Walk east along this street to reach the main square.
toeic.example_zh: 沿著這條街向東走，就能到主廣場。

toeic.example_en: The mall is west of the train station, about ten minutes away.
toeic.example_zh: 購物中心在火車站的西邊，大約十分鐘的路程。

toeic.example_en: Can you give me a direction to the nearest hospital?
toeic.example_zh: 可以告訴我去最近的醫院怎麼走嗎？

toeic.example_en: We are going downtown to do some shopping this afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今天下午要去市中心購物。

toeic.example_en: She lives uptown near a quiet park and a school.
toeic.example_zh: 她住在市區外圍，靠近一個安靜的公園和學校。

toeic.example_en: This city has good buses, trains, and many small shops.
toeic.example_zh: 這座城市有很好的公車、火車和許多小商店。

toeic.example_en: My grandparents live in a small town near the mountains.
toeic.example_zh: 我的祖父母住在山邊的一個小鎮。

toeic.example_en: The village near the lake has a small bakery and a shop.
toeic.example_zh: 湖邊那個村莊有一間小麵包店和一家商店。

toeic.example_en: I need to send this small package by post tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 我明天需要把這個小包裹寄出去。

toeic.example_en: The mail usually comes around eleven in the morning.
toeic.example_zh: 郵件通常在早上十一點左右送達。

toeic.example_en: Please put the letter in this brown envelope and seal it.
toeic.example_zh: 請把信放進這個棕色信封並封好。

toeic.example_en: I need one more stamp for this letter to send overseas.
toeic.example_zh: 這封信要寄到國外，我還需要一張郵票。

toeic.example_en: She wrote a letter to her aunt who lives in another city.
toeic.example_zh: 她寫了一封信給住在另一個城市的姑姑。

toeic.example_en: A small parcel arrived for you this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 今天早上有一個小包裹送來給你。

toeic.example_en: Please weigh this box before you pay for the shipping.
toeic.example_zh: 在您付運費之前，請先秤一下這個箱子。

toeic.example_en: The shipping fee depends on the weight of the package.
toeic.example_zh: 運費取決於包裹的重量。

toeic.example_en: This bag is too heavy for me to carry home alone.
toeic.example_zh: 這個包對我來說太重了，沒辦法自己拿回家。

toeic.example_en: Please help me carry these bags into the car.
toeic.example_zh: 請幫我把這些袋子搬進車裡。

toeic.example_en: Let us load the groceries into the car and drive home.
toeic.example_zh: 我們把雜貨裝上車然後開回家吧。

toeic.example_en: Please help me unload the shopping bags from the trunk.
toeic.example_zh: 請幫我把後車廂的購物袋拿出來。

toeic.example_en: Put the heavy box in the trunk of my car.
toeic.example_zh: 把那個重箱子放在我車子的後車廂裡。

toeic.example_en: Please fasten your seat belt before the bus starts.
toeic.example_zh: 請在公車啟動前繫好安全帶。

toeic.example_en: I prefer a window seat so I can look outside.
toeic.example_zh: 我比較喜歡靠窗的座位，這樣可以看外面。

toeic.example_en: Please stand back from the door while the bus is moving.
toeic.example_zh: 公車行進時請遠離車門。

toeic.example_en: You can park your car behind the small shopping mall.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以把車停在小型購物中心的後面。

toeic.example_en: The parking is free for the first two hours.
toeic.example_zh: 前兩個小時停車免費。

toeic.example_en: The parking lot is full, so we need to find another one.
toeic.example_zh: 停車場滿了，所以我們得找另一個。

toeic.example_en: Do not forget to put some coins in the parking meter.
toeic.example_zh: 別忘了在停車計費表裡投幾枚硬幣。

toeic.example_en: We need to buy some petrol before our long drive.
toeic.example_zh: 在長途開車前我們需要加點油。

toeic.example_en: Stop at the next gas station to fill up the tank.
toeic.example_zh: 在下一個加油站停車把油箱加滿。

toeic.example_en: Check the fuel level before we leave for the airport.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們出發去機場前，先檢查一下油量。

toeic.example_en: I think the front tire of the car needs more air.
toeic.example_zh: 我想車子的前輪胎需要多打點氣。

toeic.example_en: Keep both hands on the wheel while you are driving.
toeic.example_zh: 開車時雙手要握在方向盤上。

toeic.example_en: Please turn off the engine while we pump the gas.
toeic.example_zh: 我們加油時請熄火。

toeic.example_en: Do not use the horn unless it is really necessary.
toeic.example_zh: 除非真的有必要，否則不要按喇叭。

toeic.example_en: Stay in the right lane until you reach the exit sign.
toeic.example_zh: 請保持在右車道直到看到出口標誌。

toeic.example_en: The two lanes merge into one ahead, so please slow down.
toeic.example_zh: 前方兩線道會併成一線，請減速。

toeic.example_en: Turn left at the next traffic light, please.
toeic.example_zh: 麻煩在下一個紅綠燈左轉。

toeic.example_en: You can make a u-turn at the next big intersection.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以在下一個大十字路口迴轉。

toeic.example_en: There is a small toll to use this part of the highway.
toeic.example_zh: 走這段公路要付一筆小額過路費。

toeic.example_en: I ride my bike to the office on warm spring days.
toeic.example_zh: 天氣溫暖的春天我會騎單車去上班。

toeic.example_en: She rides her bicycle to the grocery store every Saturday.
toeic.example_zh: 她每週六騎自行車去雜貨店。

toeic.example_en: Many people in the city ride a scooter to work.
toeic.example_zh: 這城市裡很多人騎機車上班。

toeic.example_en: He rides a motorcycle to the office every day.
toeic.example_zh: 他每天騎摩托車去辦公室。

toeic.example_en: Always wear a helmet when you ride your bike.
toeic.example_zh: 騎單車時一定要戴安全帽。

toeic.example_en: We can take my car to the supermarket after lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 午餐後我們可以開我的車去超市。

toeic.example_en: A small truck is bringing fresh fruit to the store now.
toeic.example_zh: 一輛小卡車正在把新鮮水果送到店裡。

toeic.example_en: The delivery van comes to our street every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 送貨廂型車每天早上會來我們這條街。

toeic.example_en: We can take a boat across the river to the small village.
toeic.example_zh: 我們可以搭船過河到那個小村莊。

toeic.example_en: The ferry to the island leaves at nine every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 前往島嶼的渡輪每天早上九點開船。

toeic.example_en: Our plane will land in about thirty minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的飛機大約三十分鐘後降落。

toeic.example_en: The bus to the airport leaves from this stop every hour.
toeic.example_zh: 往機場的公車每小時從這站出發。

toeic.example_en: My flight to Osaka is at seven in the evening.
toeic.example_zh: 我去大阪的班機是晚上七點。

toeic.example_en: Let us walk to the park because the weather is nice today.
toeic.example_zh: 我們走路去公園吧，今天天氣很好。

toeic.example_en: I had to run to catch the last train home.
toeic.example_zh: 我得用跑的才趕上最後一班回家的火車。

toeic.example_en: Rush hour starts around eight in the morning here.
toeic.example_zh: 這裡的尖峰時間大約從早上八點開始。

toeic.example_en: The subway is very crowded after five every weekday.
toeic.example_zh: 平日每天五點過後地鐵都很擁擠。

toeic.example_en: The bus was almost empty at ten on Sunday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 星期天早上十點公車幾乎是空的。

toeic.example_en: Always wear your seat belt when you are in a car.
toeic.example_zh: 搭車時一定要繫安全帶。

toeic.example_en: I use a map app on my phone to find new shops.
toeic.example_zh: 我用手機上的地圖程式來找新店家。

toeic.example_en: I bought some fresh vegetable from the market this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天早上從市場買了一些新鮮蔬菜。

toeic.example_en: Apples and oranges are my favorite fruit in winter.
toeic.example_zh: 蘋果和橘子是我冬天最愛的水果。

toeic.example_en: Could you bring me a bottle of water with my meal?
toeic.example_zh: 您可以隨餐幫我送一瓶水嗎？

toeic.example_en: I love going shopping with my best friend on weekends.
toeic.example_zh: 我喜歡週末和最好的朋友一起去購物。

toeic.example_en: I just want to browse the shop. I am not buying anything today.
toeic.example_zh: 我只是想隨便逛逛，今天不會買東西。

toeic.example_en: Please pick a flavor of ice cream from the freezer.
toeic.example_zh: 請從冰櫃選一個冰淇淋口味。

toeic.example_en: It is hard to choose between these two pairs of shoes.
toeic.example_zh: 在這兩雙鞋之間做選擇真難。

toeic.example_en: Let us compare the prices in two stores before buying.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在買之前比較一下兩家店的價格吧。

toeic.example_en: I cannot decide which color I like the most.
toeic.example_zh: 我無法決定我最喜歡哪個顏色。

toeic.example_en: This is the most popular brand of cereal in our shop.
toeic.example_zh: 這是我們店裡最受歡迎的麥片品牌。

toeic.example_en: It is common to pay with a mobile phone in this city.
toeic.example_zh: 在這個城市用手機付款很常見。

toeic.example_en: I am ready to pay. Could you ring up these items?
toeic.example_zh: 我準備好付款了，您可以結這些商品嗎？

toeic.example_en: Can you help me find a small bag for my laptop?
toeic.example_zh: 您可以幫我找一個放筆電的小包嗎？

toeic.example_en: Let us ask the clerk where the bread aisle is.
toeic.example_zh: 我們去問店員麵包走道在哪裡。

toeic.example_en: Could you tell me how to get to the bus station?
toeic.example_zh: 您可以告訴我怎麼去公車站嗎？

toeic.example_en: I cannot find the soap. Could you show me where it is?
toeic.example_zh: 我找不到肥皂，您可以告訴我在哪嗎？

toeic.example_en: Can you show me a few more options in another color?
toeic.example_zh: 您可以給我看幾款其他顏色的選擇嗎？

toeic.example_en: Please look at this label to see the size.
toeic.example_zh: 請看一下這個標籤上的尺寸。

toeic.example_en: Could you give me a smaller plastic bag, please?
toeic.example_zh: 可以給我一個小一點的塑膠袋嗎？

toeic.example_en: I will take this jacket and pay with cash now.
toeic.example_zh: 我要買這件外套，現在用現金付款。

toeic.example_en: Do not leave behind your umbrella on the bus.
toeic.example_zh: 不要把你的雨傘忘在公車上。

toeic.example_en: Heavy rain fell all night, so the streets were wet in the morning.
toeic.example_zh: 整晚下大雨，所以早上街道是濕的。

toeic.example_en: The sun is very bright today, so please wear a hat outside.
toeic.example_zh: 今天太陽很亮，請戴帽子出門。

toeic.example_en: It started to snow last night and the garden is now white.
toeic.example_zh: 昨晚開始下雪，現在花園一片白色。

toeic.example_en: The wind is strong today, so be careful when you walk home.
toeic.example_zh: 今天風很大，走路回家要小心。

toeic.example_en: Look at that big cloud in the sky; it might rain later.
toeic.example_zh: 看天上那朵大雲，等一下可能會下雨。

toeic.example_en: A big storm is coming, so please close all the windows now.
toeic.example_zh: 大暴風雨要來了，請現在把所有窗戶關好。

toeic.example_en: The thunder woke up my little sister, and she started to cry.
toeic.example_zh: 雷聲吵醒了我妹妹，她開始哭了起來。

toeic.example_en: Bright lightning flashed across the sky just before the heavy rain.
toeic.example_zh: 在大雨之前，明亮的閃電劃過天空。

toeic.example_en: The fog this morning was so thick that I could not see the bus.
toeic.example_zh: 今天早上的霧很濃，我看不到公車。

toeic.example_en: After the rain stopped, a colorful rainbow appeared over our house.
toeic.example_zh: 雨停後，一道彩色的彩虹出現在我們家上方。

toeic.example_en: A cool breeze blew through the window and made the room pleasant.
toeic.example_zh: 涼爽的微風吹進窗戶，讓房間感覺很舒服。

toeic.example_en: Small pieces of hail hit our car during the short summer storm.
toeic.example_zh: 短暫的夏季暴風雨中，小冰雹打在我們的車上。

toeic.example_en: Put on your rubber boots before you go out into the muddy garden.
toeic.example_zh: 去泥濘的花園之前，請穿上你的橡膠靴。

toeic.example_en: She wrapped a warm wool scarf around her neck before leaving the house.
toeic.example_zh: 她在離家前，把一條保暖的羊毛圍巾圍在脖子上。

toeic.example_en: I always wear thick gloves to keep my hands warm in winter.
toeic.example_zh: 冬天我總是戴厚手套來保暖雙手。

toeic.example_en: A wide hat will protect your face from the strong summer sun.
toeic.example_zh: 寬邊帽可以保護你的臉不被夏天的強烈陽光曬到。

toeic.example_en: Sunglasses help protect your eyes from bright light on a sunny day.
toeic.example_zh: 太陽眼鏡能在晴天保護你的眼睛不受強光傷害。

toeic.example_en: Please put on sunscreen before you go swimming at the beach today.
toeic.example_zh: 請在今天去海邊游泳前擦防曬乳。

toeic.example_en: I got a bad sunburn after a long day at the pool.
toeic.example_zh: 在泳池待了一整天之後，我嚴重曬傷了。

toeic.example_en: It is a sunny day, so let us have a picnic in the park.
toeic.example_zh: 今天是晴朗的好天氣，我們去公園野餐吧。

toeic.example_en: The sky is cloudy this morning, but I do not think it will rain.
toeic.example_zh: 今天早上多雲，但我覺得不會下雨。

toeic.example_en: On rainy days I prefer to stay home and read a good book.
toeic.example_zh: 下雨天我比較喜歡待在家裡讀一本好書。

toeic.example_en: We love to ski during the snowy winter months in the mountains.
toeic.example_zh: 我們喜歡在多雪的冬天到山上滑雪。

toeic.example_en: It is too windy to fly a kite safely at the park today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天風太大，不適合在公園安全地放風箏。

toeic.example_en: Please drive slowly because the road is very foggy this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 請慢慢開，因為今天早上路上霧很大。

toeic.example_en: The flight was delayed because of stormy weather along the coast.
toeic.example_zh: 因為沿海的暴風雨天氣，班機延誤了。

toeic.example_en: Please walk carefully on the icy sidewalk so you do not fall.
toeic.example_zh: 請小心走在結冰的人行道上，以免跌倒。

toeic.example_en: The mornings are chilly in autumn, so I always wear a sweater.
toeic.example_zh: 秋天的早晨有點涼，我總是穿一件毛衣。

toeic.example_en: It is freezing outside, so please close the door behind you quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 外面冷得要結冰了，請快點把門關上。

toeic.example_en: Summer in this country is hot and humid, so people sweat a lot.
toeic.example_zh: 這個國家的夏天又熱又潮濕，所以人們常常流汗。

toeic.example_en: The desert air is very dry, so drink water every hour you walk.
toeic.example_zh: 沙漠的空氣很乾燥，走路時每小時都要喝水。

toeic.example_en: My clothes are wet from the rain, so I will change at home.
toeic.example_zh: 我的衣服被雨淋濕了，我要回家換衣服。

toeic.example_en: The weather here is mild in spring, with very pleasant temperatures.
toeic.example_zh: 這裡春天的天氣溫和，氣溫非常舒適。

toeic.example_en: The harsh winter winds make it hard to enjoy outdoor activities.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴酷的冬風讓人很難享受戶外活動。

toeic.example_en: The weather changes a lot in spring, so check before you go out.
toeic.example_zh: 春天的天氣變化很大，出門前請先確認。

toeic.example_en: The climate near the sea is usually mild and very comfortable.
toeic.example_zh: 靠海的氣候通常溫和而且非常舒適。

toeic.example_en: The temperature will drop to zero degrees Celsius tonight in the mountains.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚山上的溫度將下降到攝氏零度。

toeic.example_en: The room temperature is around twenty-five degrees, which feels just right.
toeic.example_zh: 室內溫度大約二十五度，感覺剛剛好。

toeic.example_en: Water freezes at zero degrees Celsius and boils at one hundred Celsius.
toeic.example_zh: 水在攝氏零度結冰，在攝氏一百度沸騰。

toeic.example_en: Most Americans use Fahrenheit to describe the temperature outside their houses.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數美國人用華氏來描述屋外的氣溫。

toeic.example_en: The nurse used a thermometer to check the child's body temperature.
toeic.example_zh: 護士用溫度計檢查那個小孩的體溫。

toeic.example_en: Spring is my favorite season because the flowers begin to bloom.
toeic.example_zh: 春天是我最喜歡的季節，因為花朵開始綻放。

toeic.example_en: Many baby animals are born in spring when the weather gets warmer.
toeic.example_zh: 許多動物寶寶在天氣變暖的春天出生。

toeic.example_en: We usually go to the beach during the long summer school break.
toeic.example_zh: 我們通常在長長的暑假期間去海邊。

toeic.example_en: The leaves change to red and yellow during the cool autumn months.
toeic.example_zh: 葉子在涼爽的秋季變成紅色和黃色。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 秋天；(動詞) 落下
toeic.example_en: In fall, the leaves fall from the trees and cover the ground.
toeic.example_zh: 秋天時，葉子從樹上落下並覆蓋著地面。

toeic.example_en: Winter in the north can be very long, dark, and extremely cold.
toeic.example_zh: 北方的冬天可能非常漫長、黑暗且極為寒冷。

toeic.example_en: There is ice on the road, so please drive very slowly tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 路上有冰，所以今晚請慢慢開車。

toeic.example_en: High humidity makes hot weather feel even more uncomfortable than it is.
toeic.example_zh: 高濕度讓炎熱天氣感覺比實際更不舒服。

toeic.example_en: Many people sneeze in spring because pollen is everywhere in the air.
toeic.example_zh: 許多人在春天打噴嚏，因為空氣中到處都是花粉。

toeic.example_en: I have an allergy to cats, so my eyes get red and itchy.
toeic.example_zh: 我對貓過敏，所以眼睛會變紅又癢。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 打噴嚏；(名詞) 噴嚏
toeic.example_en: Please cover your mouth with a tissue when you need to sneeze.
toeic.example_zh: 打噴嚏時請用衛生紙摀住嘴巴。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 咳嗽；(名詞) 咳嗽
toeic.example_en: My little brother had a bad cough all night and could not sleep.
toeic.example_zh: 我弟弟整晚咳得很厲害，無法入睡。

toeic.example_en: I had a terrible headache all day, so I went to bed early.
toeic.example_zh: 我整天頭痛得很厲害，所以很早就上床睡覺。

toeic.example_en: She has a stomachache after eating too much ice cream this afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 她下午吃了太多冰淇淋，所以肚子痛。

toeic.example_en: My grandfather had a bad toothache, so he visited the dentist quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 我爺爺牙痛得很厲害，所以很快就去看牙醫了。

toeic.example_en: The little boy cried because of an earache and could not sleep well.
toeic.example_zh: 小男孩因為耳朵痛而哭，睡得不好。

toeic.example_en: He has a backache from sitting at his desk for too many hours.
toeic.example_zh: 他因為在桌前坐太多小時而背痛。

toeic.example_en: My throat feels sore today, so I will drink warm honey tea.
toeic.example_zh: 今天我喉嚨痛，所以要喝溫熱的蜂蜜茶。

toeic.example_en: The little girl has a fever, so she should stay home and rest.
toeic.example_zh: 小女孩發燒了，她應該待在家好好休息。

toeic.example_en: Many people catch the flu in winter and stay home for several days.
toeic.example_zh: 許多人在冬天得到流感，會在家休息好幾天。

toeic.example_en: Wash your hands often to avoid catching a virus from other people.
toeic.example_zh: 請常常洗手，以免從別人身上感染到病毒。

toeic.example_en: Soap helps remove germs from your hands before you eat lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 在吃午餐前，肥皂可以幫忙去除手上的細菌。

toeic.example_en: The doctor said the small cut had a slight infection and needed cream.
toeic.example_zh: 醫生說那個小傷口有輕微感染，需要擦藥膏。

toeic.example_en: She got a red rash on her arm after touching the new plant.
toeic.example_zh: 她碰過那株新植物後，手臂上長了紅疹。

toeic.example_en: Try not to scratch the itch on your leg or it will worsen.
toeic.example_zh: 盡量不要抓你腿上癢的地方，不然會更嚴重。

toeic.example_en: Her ankle began to swell after she twisted it during the run.
toeic.example_zh: 跑步時扭到後，她的腳踝開始腫起來。

toeic.example_en: He has a small bruise on his knee from playing soccer yesterday.
toeic.example_zh: 他昨天踢足球時，膝蓋上留下了一個小瘀青。

toeic.example_en: Please put a bandage on that small cut so it stays clean.
toeic.example_zh: 請在那個小傷口貼上ＯＫ繃，讓它保持乾淨。

toeic.example_en: The cat gave him a small scratch on his hand last night.
toeic.example_zh: 那隻貓昨晚在他手上抓了一個小傷口。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 燙傷；(動詞) 燃燒
toeic.example_en: Run cold water over the burn for several minutes to ease pain.
toeic.example_zh: 用冷水沖燙傷處幾分鐘以減輕疼痛。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 扭傷；(動詞) 扭傷
toeic.example_en: She got a sprain in her wrist after falling off her bicycle.
toeic.example_zh: 她從腳踏車上跌下來後，手腕扭傷了。

toeic.example_en: I felt dizzy after standing up too fast from the kitchen chair.
toeic.example_zh: 從廚房椅子上太快站起來後，我感到頭暈。

toeic.example_en: She felt very tired after walking around the museum for many hours.
toeic.example_zh: 在博物館逛了好幾個小時後，她感到非常疲倦。

toeic.example_en: I still feel weak today after the flu, so I will rest more.
toeic.example_zh: 感冒過後我今天還是覺得虛弱，所以要多休息。

toeic.example_en: My brother is sick today, so he will not go to school.
toeic.example_zh: 我哥哥今天生病了，所以不會去上學。

toeic.example_en: She has been ill for a week, but she feels a little better.
toeic.example_zh: 她已經病了一個禮拜，但現在感覺好一點了。

toeic.example_en: A long illness made him miss many days of school last winter.
toeic.example_zh: 一場長期的疾病讓他去年冬天缺課很多天。

toeic.example_en: Tell the doctor if you feel any pain in your stomach today.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你今天肚子有任何疼痛，請告訴醫生。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 隱隱作痛；(動詞) 疼痛
toeic.example_en: My muscles ache from helping my parents move the boxes upstairs.
toeic.example_zh: 幫爸媽把箱子搬上樓後，我的肌肉酸痛。

toeic.example_en: Good sleep and exercise are very important for your long-term health.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的睡眠和運動對你的長期健康非常重要。

toeic.example_en: Our school holds a wellness week every spring with free yoga classes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們學校每年春天舉辦健康週，提供免費瑜珈課。

toeic.example_en: Daily exercise helps improve your fitness and gives you more energy.
toeic.example_zh: 每天運動能改善你的體適能，並讓你更有精神。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 運動；(動詞) 運動
toeic.example_en: Daily exercise such as walking can keep your heart and body strong.
toeic.example_zh: 每天的運動，例如走路，可以讓你的心臟和身體強壯。

toeic.example_en: A short workout in the morning makes me feel awake all day.
toeic.example_zh: 早上短暫的運動讓我一整天都感覺有精神。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 慢跑；(名詞) 慢跑
toeic.example_en: We jog around the park every morning before we eat breakfast together.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每天早上一起吃早餐前，都會在公園慢跑。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 健行；(名詞) 健行
toeic.example_en: We will hike up the small mountain on Saturday with our friends.
toeic.example_zh: 我們週六會和朋友一起爬上那座小山。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 游泳；(名詞) 游泳
toeic.example_en: Children love to swim in the cool pool on hot summer days.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在炎熱的夏天到涼爽的泳池游泳。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 騎自行車；(名詞) 循環
toeic.example_en: I cycle to work every day because it is faster than driving.
toeic.example_zh: 我每天騎腳踏車上班，因為比開車快。

toeic.example_en: Many people practice yoga in the park early in the morning here.
toeic.example_zh: 這裡很多人一大早會在公園練瑜珈。

toeic.example_en: She goes to the gym after work three times every week.
toeic.example_zh: 她每週下班後會去健身房三次。

toeic.example_en: My favorite sport is basketball because I enjoy playing with friends.
toeic.example_zh: 我最喜歡的運動是籃球，因為我喜歡和朋友一起玩。

toeic.example_en: Our soccer team won the local match by two goals last weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 上週末我們的足球隊以兩球差贏了本地比賽。

toeic.example_en: Our basketball coach is friendly and teaches us new skills every week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的籃球教練很親切，每週都教我們新的技巧。

toeic.example_en: A balanced diet with many vegetables keeps your body strong and well.
toeic.example_zh: 均衡的飲食配上許多蔬菜，能讓你的身體強壯又健康。

toeic.example_en: Fruits and vegetables give you the nutrition your body really needs daily.
toeic.example_zh: 水果和蔬菜能提供你身體每天真正需要的營養。

toeic.example_en: Oranges contain a lot of vitamin C, which helps prevent colds.
toeic.example_zh: 柳橙含有很多維他命Ｃ，能幫助預防感冒。

toeic.example_en: This snack has many calories, so I will only eat half today.
toeic.example_zh: 這份零食卡路里很高，所以我今天只吃一半。

toeic.example_en: Eggs and beans are simple foods that give you a lot of protein.
toeic.example_zh: 蛋和豆類是簡單的食物，能提供豐富的蛋白質。

toeic.example_en: Rice and bread are common foods with a lot of carb in them.
toeic.example_zh: 米飯和麵包是含有許多碳水化合物的常見食物。

toeic.example_en: Eating foods high in fiber is good for your stomach and digestion.
toeic.example_zh: 吃富含纖維的食物對你的胃和消化很好。

toeic.example_en: Some foods have healthy fat, like nuts, fish, and a little olive oil.
toeic.example_zh: 有些食物含有健康脂肪，例如堅果、魚類和少量橄欖油。

toeic.example_en: Please hydrate often when you exercise outside in the hot summer.
toeic.example_zh: 在炎熱的夏天戶外運動時，請常常補充水分。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 睡眠；(動詞) 睡覺
toeic.example_en: Children need a lot of sleep so they can grow and learn well.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們需要充足的睡眠，才能好好成長和學習。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 休息；(動詞) 休息
toeic.example_en: You should rest at home for a few days until you feel stronger.
toeic.example_zh: 你應該在家休息幾天，直到感覺比較有力氣。

toeic.example_en: Soft music helps me relax after a long and busy day at work.
toeic.example_zh: 輕音樂幫助我在忙碌的工作日後放鬆身心。

toeic.example_en: Slowly breathe in fresh air and you will start to feel calm.
toeic.example_zh: 慢慢吸入新鮮空氣，你會開始感覺平靜。

toeic.example_en: I made a doctor appointment because my fever has not gone away.
toeic.example_zh: 我預約看醫生，因為我的燒一直沒退。

toeic.example_en: The kind nurse gave me a small bandage after she cleaned the cut.
toeic.example_zh: 親切的護理師清理傷口後，給了我一個小ＯＫ繃。

toeic.example_en: The small clinic near my home opens early on weekday mornings.
toeic.example_zh: 我家附近的小診所平日早上很早就開門。

toeic.example_en: My uncle stayed in the hospital for three days after his surgery.
toeic.example_zh: 我叔叔在手術後在醫院住了三天。

toeic.example_en: I had a yearly checkup last week and everything looked perfectly fine.
toeic.example_zh: 我上週做了年度健康檢查，一切都很正常。

toeic.example_en: The pharmacist explained how to take the new pills before each meal.
toeic.example_zh: 藥劑師說明了新藥要在每餐前怎麼吃。

toeic.example_en: Please take this medicine three times a day after your main meals.
toeic.example_zh: 請在每餐後一天服用這個藥三次。

toeic.example_en: Swallow this small pill with a full glass of warm water now.
toeic.example_zh: 請用一整杯溫水把這顆小藥丸吞下。

toeic.example_en: Take one tablet every six hours, but do not exceed four daily.
toeic.example_zh: 每六小時服用一片，但一天不要超過四片。

toeic.example_en: The doctor said to take one capsule with breakfast every single morning.
toeic.example_zh: 醫生說每天早餐時要吃一顆膠囊。

toeic.example_en: This cough syrup tastes sweet and helps children sleep better at night.
toeic.example_zh: 這款止咳糖漿甜甜的，能幫小孩晚上睡得更好。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 滴劑；(動詞) 掉落
toeic.example_en: Put one drop into each ear after washing your hair in the shower.
toeic.example_zh: 洗完頭後，請在每隻耳朵點一滴滴劑。

toeic.example_en: The doctor gave him an ointment for the small burn on his finger.
toeic.example_zh: 醫生開了一支軟膏給他手指上的小燙傷。

toeic.example_en: Wrap a clean bandage around the cut to keep it safe from dirt.
toeic.example_zh: 在傷口上包乾淨的繃帶，避免它沾到髒東西。

toeic.example_en: Mom put a plaster on my knee after I fell off my bike.
toeic.example_zh: 我從腳踏車摔下來後，媽媽在我膝蓋上貼了一片ＯＫ繃。

toeic.example_en: The doctor wrote a prescription that I can take to the pharmacy.
toeic.example_zh: 醫生開了一張處方箋，我可以拿去藥房。

toeic.example_en: Please follow the correct dose written on the small medicine bottle.
toeic.example_zh: 請按照藥瓶上寫的正確劑量服用。

toeic.example_en: Tell the doctor every symptom, even if it seems quite small now.
toeic.example_zh: 請告訴醫生每一個症狀，就算現在看起來很小。

toeic.example_en: The diagnosis was a common cold, so I just need rest and tea.
toeic.example_zh: 診斷結果是普通感冒，所以我只需要休息和喝茶。

toeic.example_en: The treatment for this rash is a simple cream and lots of rest.
toeic.example_zh: 這種皮疹的治療只需要一支藥膏和多多休息。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 療法；(動詞) 治癒
toeic.example_en: There is no quick cure for the common cold, only rest and time.
toeic.example_zh: 普通感冒沒有快速的療法，只有休息和時間。

toeic.example_en: Small cuts usually heal in just a few days if kept clean.
toeic.example_zh: 保持乾淨的話，小傷口通常幾天就能痊癒。

toeic.example_en: She needs to recover at home for a week after her surgery.
toeic.example_zh: 她手術後需要在家休養一週才能康復。

toeic.example_en: The nurse gave me a quick injection in my left arm today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天護理師在我左手臂上快速打了一針。

toeic.example_en: The flu vaccine helps protect older people during the cold winter months.
toeic.example_zh: 流感疫苗能在寒冷的冬天幫助保護年長者。

toeic.example_en: Children get a free vaccination at school before they start grade one.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們在上一年級前會在學校免費接種疫苗。

toeic.example_en: I visit the dentist twice a year to keep my teeth healthy.
toeic.example_zh: 我每年看牙醫兩次，讓牙齒保持健康。

toeic.example_en: Brush every tooth gently for two minutes both morning and night.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早晚都要輕輕刷每一顆牙兩分鐘。

toeic.example_en: Children lose their baby teeth at around six or seven years old.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們大約在六、七歲時會掉乳牙。

toeic.example_en: Floss every day to keep your gum healthy and free of food.
toeic.example_zh: 每天用牙線清潔，讓牙齦保持健康且沒有食物殘渣。

toeic.example_en: The dentist found one small cavity in my back tooth today.
toeic.example_zh: 牙醫今天在我後排牙齒發現一個小蛀牙。

toeic.example_en: The dentist put a white filling in my tooth this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 牙醫今天早上幫我的牙齒補上了白色的填料。

toeic.example_en: My sister got new braces last week to make her teeth straight.
toeic.example_zh: 我姊姊上週裝了新牙套，要讓牙齒變整齊。

toeic.example_en: Use mouthwash after brushing to give your mouth a fresh feeling.
toeic.example_zh: 刷牙後用漱口水，可以讓口腔感覺清新。

toeic.example_en: Apply lotion every night to keep your skin soft and smooth.
toeic.example_zh: 每天晚上擦乳液，能讓皮膚保持柔軟光滑。

toeic.example_en: Dry skin in winter feels much better with a thick moisturizer.
toeic.example_zh: 冬天乾燥的皮膚，擦上濃稠的保濕霜會感覺好多了。

toeic.example_en: Many people use deodorant every morning before they put on a shirt.
toeic.example_zh: 很多人每天早上穿襯衫前會擦體香劑。

toeic.example_en: She wears a light perfume that smells like roses every day.
toeic.example_zh: 她每天擦的淡香水聞起來像玫瑰花。

toeic.example_en: Brush your hair gently from the ends to avoid tangles in it.
toeic.example_zh: 請從髮尾輕輕梳起，避免頭髮打結。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 擦；(名詞) 濕紙巾
toeic.example_en: Please wipe your hands with a wet wipe before you eat lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 吃午餐前請用濕紙巾擦手。

toeic.example_en: A warm bath after a long walk really helps my tired legs.
toeic.example_zh: 長時間散步後泡個熱水澡，對我疲憊的腿很有幫助。

toeic.example_en: My uncle bought a new electric shaver for his birthday last week.
toeic.example_zh: 我叔叔上週生日買了一支新的電動刮鬍刀。

toeic.example_en: The friendly barber gave my son a very neat short haircut today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天親切的理髮師幫我兒子剪了一個整齊的短髮。

toeic.example_en: She booked a hair appointment at the salon for Saturday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 她預約週六下午到美容院做頭髮。

toeic.example_en: Good hygiene like washing hands often helps prevent many common illnesses.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的衛生習慣，例如常洗手，能預防許多常見疾病。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 乾淨的；(動詞) 打掃
toeic.example_en: Keep your kitchen clean to avoid bugs and bad smells in summer.
toeic.example_zh: 保持廚房乾淨，可以避免夏天的蟲子和異味。

toeic.example_en: Rinse the soap off your face and then gently pat it dry.
toeic.example_zh: 把臉上的肥皂沖掉，再輕輕拍乾。

toeic.example_en: Drink lots of water to keep your skin smooth and very healthy.
toeic.example_zh: 多喝水可以讓皮膚保持光滑且非常健康。

toeic.example_en: Her long brown hair shines beautifully in the morning sunlight.
toeic.example_zh: 她長長的棕色頭髮在晨光下閃閃發亮。

toeic.example_en: Cut your nail short to keep your fingers clean and tidy.
toeic.example_zh: 把指甲剪短，可以讓手指保持乾淨整齊。

toeic.example_en: Wash your face with mild soap before you go to bed tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚睡覺前，請用溫和的肥皂洗臉。

toeic.example_en: Resting your eye every twenty minutes will reduce strain from the screen.
toeic.example_zh: 每二十分鐘讓眼睛休息一次，能減少螢幕造成的疲勞。

toeic.example_en: The doctor looked into my ear with a small black light.
toeic.example_zh: 醫生用小黑燈檢查我的耳朵。

toeic.example_en: My nose is stuffy because I have a cold and a fever today.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天感冒又發燒，所以鼻子塞住了。

toeic.example_en: Cover your mouth when you cough to protect the people around you.
toeic.example_zh: 咳嗽時請摀住嘴巴，保護身邊的人。

toeic.example_en: Warm tea with honey is good when your throat feels sore today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天喉嚨痛時，加蜂蜜的溫茶很有幫助。

toeic.example_en: The doctor asked me to stick out my tongue and say ah.
toeic.example_zh: 醫生請我伸出舌頭並說「啊」。

toeic.example_en: Use lip balm in winter to stop your lip from cracking.
toeic.example_zh: 冬天用護唇膏，能避免嘴唇龜裂。

toeic.example_en: I keep a small lip balm in my bag during the cold winter months.
toeic.example_zh: 在寒冷的冬天，我會在包包裡放一小條護唇膏。

toeic.example_en: My stomach hurts because I ate too much pizza for lunch today.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天午餐吃太多披薩，肚子很痛。

toeic.example_en: My back hurts from carrying the heavy shopping bag for too long.
toeic.example_zh: 我提那個重重的購物袋太久，背都痛了。

toeic.example_en: The nurse gave me a vaccine in my upper left arm today.
toeic.example_zh: 護理師今天在我左上臂打了一劑疫苗。

toeic.example_en: My leg feels tired after climbing all those stairs to the rooftop.
toeic.example_zh: 爬上頂樓的所有樓梯後，我的腿很累。

toeic.example_en: He hurt his knee playing basketball, so he must rest at home.
toeic.example_zh: 他打籃球時傷到膝蓋，所以必須在家休息。

toeic.example_en: My right foot is sore after walking around the city all day.
toeic.example_zh: 在城市裡走了一整天後，我的右腳很痛。

toeic.example_en: She twisted her ankle during the basketball game yesterday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 昨天下午打籃球時，她扭傷了腳踝。

toeic.example_en: I wear a watch on my left wrist when I go to school.
toeic.example_zh: 去學校時，我會在左手腕戴手錶。

toeic.example_en: I got a small cut on my finger while slicing the bread.
toeic.example_zh: 我切麵包時，手指上劃了一個小傷口。

toeic.example_en: I hit my toe on the table leg and it really hurts now.
toeic.example_zh: 我的腳趾撞到桌腳，現在真的很痛。

toeic.example_en: Stretch your muscles slowly so they do not get sore tomorrow morning.
toeic.example_zh: 慢慢伸展肌肉，免得明天早上酸痛。

toeic.example_en: Drinking milk every day is good for building a strong bone structure.
toeic.example_zh: 每天喝牛奶有助於建立強壯的骨骼結構。

toeic.example_en: Older people may feel pain in every joint during cold rainy days.
toeic.example_zh: 年長者在又冷又下雨的天氣裡，可能會關節疼痛。

toeic.example_en: Running every morning is very good for your heart and lungs.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上跑步對心臟和肺部都很好。

toeic.example_en: Fresh mountain air feels great for your lung and your whole body.
toeic.example_zh: 新鮮的山間空氣對肺和全身都很好。

toeic.example_en: The nurse took a small sample of blood from my left arm.
toeic.example_zh: 護理師從我左手臂抽了一小管血。

toeic.example_en: The doctor checked my blood pressure before my regular yearly checkup.
toeic.example_zh: 在我例行年度健檢前，醫生先量了血壓。

toeic.example_en: The nurse checked my pulse on my wrist after the long walk.
toeic.example_zh: 在那段長距離散步後，護理師在我手腕上量脈搏。

toeic.example_en: He wears a cap to protect his head from the strong sun.
toeic.example_zh: 他戴著鴨舌帽來保護頭部不被強烈陽光曬到。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 按摩；(動詞) 按摩
toeic.example_en: A gentle back massage helped me relax after the long flight.
toeic.example_zh: 輕柔的背部按摩讓我在長途飛行後放鬆下來。

toeic.example_en: We booked a small spa visit to relax during our weekend trip.
toeic.example_zh: 我們週末旅行時，訂了一個小型水療放鬆行程。

toeic.example_en: After skiing all day, we enjoyed a hot sauna at the hotel.
toeic.example_zh: 滑了一整天雪後，我們在飯店享受了熱蒸氣浴。

toeic.example_en: Always warm up before any sport to avoid hurting your muscles.
toeic.example_zh: 做任何運動前都要先暖身，以避免肌肉受傷。

toeic.example_en: Walk a little to cool down after you finish your daily run.
toeic.example_zh: 每天跑步完後，走一走來做緩和運動。

toeic.example_en: Step on the scale at the same time of day for fair results.
toeic.example_zh: 在每天同一個時間量體重，結果才公平。

toeic.example_en: Good dental habits start when children are very young at home.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的牙齒保健習慣，要從孩子小時候在家養成。

toeic.example_en: It is checkup time again, so please call the family doctor.
toeic.example_zh: 又到了健檢時間，請打電話給家庭醫生。

toeic.example_en: A short physical examination usually takes less than fifteen minutes here.
toeic.example_zh: 這裡的簡短身體檢查通常不到十五分鐘。

toeic.example_en: The doctor took an X-ray of my arm to check for a break.
toeic.example_zh: 醫生為我的手臂拍Ｘ光，檢查有沒有骨折。

toeic.example_en: An ambulance arrived in five minutes after we called the emergency number.
toeic.example_zh: 我們撥打緊急電話後，救護車五分鐘內就到了。

toeic.example_en: Please call this number in case of a medical emergency at night.
toeic.example_zh: 晚上發生醫療緊急情況時，請撥打這個號碼。

toeic.example_en: Knowing simple first aid can help save lives in everyday situations.
toeic.example_zh: 懂得簡單的急救，能在日常生活中救人一命。

toeic.example_en: Take a mild pain reliever if your headache will not go away.
toeic.example_zh: 如果頭痛一直好不了，可以吃溫和的止痛藥。

toeic.example_en: Finish all the antibiotic pills, even if you feel a lot better.
toeic.example_zh: 就算覺得好多了，也要把抗生素的藥吃完。

toeic.example_en: Clean the small wound with antiseptic before you put on a bandage.
toeic.example_zh: 貼上繃帶前，請先用消毒劑清潔小傷口。

toeic.example_en: Please wear a mask in the clinic to protect other patients.
toeic.example_zh: 請在診所裡戴口罩，以保護其他病人。

toeic.example_en: Keep a small bottle of hand sanitizer in your bag every day.
toeic.example_zh: 每天在包包裡放一小瓶乾洗手液。

toeic.example_en: Outdoor activities like walking are great for both body and mind.
toeic.example_zh: 走路等戶外活動對身心都很有益。

toeic.example_en: On rainy days we choose indoor games like cards or board games.
toeic.example_zh: 下雨天我們會選撲克牌或桌遊等室內遊戲。

toeic.example_en: Many young people prefer to snowboard rather than ski in the high mountains.

toeic.example_en: Bowling is a fun indoor sport that the whole family can enjoy together.
toeic.example_zh: 保齡球是一項全家可以一起享受的有趣室內運動。

toeic.example_zh: 我買了一台健身車放在家裡，這樣下雨天也能運動。

toeic.example_en: The walking trail in the forest is very quiet and beautiful in autumn.

toeic.example_zh: 那天早上從山頂看到的景色真是令人嘆為觀止。

toeic.example_en: The mountain scenery during autumn is full of red, orange, and yellow colors.

toeic.example_en: Many people fish along the river in the early morning during the spring.

toeic.example_en: Walking through the quiet forest in autumn is one of my favorite hobbies.
toeic.example_zh: 在秋天的安靜森林中漫步是我最喜歡的嗜好之一。

toeic.example_en: The small village in the valley looked very peaceful from the top of the hill.
toeic.example_zh: 從山頂上看，山谷裡的小村莊顯得非常寧靜。

toeic.example_en: Our neighbors invited us to a garden party last Saturday afternoon.

toeic.example_en: We are having a potluck dinner next Friday and everyone brings one dish.

toeic.example_zh: 我們在陽光普照的假日早晨從人行道上觀看彩色的遊行。

toeic.example_zh: 孩子們享受了學校嘉年華的所有遊樂設施和遊戲。

toeic.example_zh: 上週末我們帶孩子們去遊樂園慶祝我兒子的生日。

toeic.example_zh: 遊樂園的雲霄飛車又快又非常恐怖。

toeic.example_zh: 市裡新的水族館有超過兩百種魚類。

toeic.example_en: We spent the rainy afternoon at the art museum looking at old paintings.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在下雨的下午到美術館看老畫作。

toeic.example_zh: 去電影院是我最喜歡和朋友做的週末活動之一。

toeic.example_zh: 日本動畫電影在全世界的孩童和大人之間都很受歡迎。

toeic.example_zh: 昨晚我們看了一部關於非洲森林動物的有趣紀錄片。

toeic.example_zh: 這部劇的最後一集讓我哭了，但真的很好看。

toeic.example_en: The children made simple paper crafts at the community center on Saturday afternoon.

toeic.example_zh: 她錄了一段她的狗在公園裡開心玩耍的短影片。

toeic.example_zh: 陽光普照的星期六下午，我們和狗在公園玩飛盤。

toeic.example_zh: 年輕人每個週末都在新的公園練習滑板的花式動作。

toeic.example_zh: 她穿上輪鞋在平滑的公園小徑上滑來滑去。

toeic.example_en: Sunday was a lazy day at home reading books and watching movies.
toeic.example_zh: 星期天是在家讀書看電影的慵懶日子。

toeic.example_zh: 我們計畫在長週末到海邊度個短假期。

toeic.example_zh: 我們在涼爽的早晨參加了導覽，遊覽了古堡。

toeic.example_en: In my free time I love to read books and play simple board games.

toeic.example_en: In her spare time she paints small landscape pictures of the mountains and the sea.

toeic.example_zh: 在這個美麗的春天早晨，讓我們打開窗戶呼吸一些新鮮空氣。

toeic.example_zh: 我們享受著溫暖的陽光，在小後院吃午餐。

toeic.example_en: The kids built a tall snowman and gave him an old hat and scarf.
