toeic.example_zh: 去年冬天週末我們在公園裡開心地打了一場雪仗。

toeic.example_en: During summer break we go to the lake almost every single weekend together.
toeic.example_zh: 暑假期間，我們幾乎每個週末都一起去湖邊。

toeic.example_en: Do you have any weekend plans? We are going hiking in the small forest.
toeic.example_zh: 你有什麼週末計畫嗎？我們要去小森林健行。

toeic.example_en: She joined the book club at the library and meets new readers every month.
toeic.example_zh: 她加入了圖書館的讀書會，每個月都會認識新的讀者。

toeic.example_en: Why not join us for a walk in the park this beautiful Saturday afternoon?
toeic.example_zh: 你要不要在這個美麗的星期六下午和我們一起去公園散步？

toeic.example_en: I want to invite some friends over for a small barbecue this Sunday.
toeic.example_zh: 我想邀請一些朋友這個星期天來家裡參加小烤肉。

toeic.example_en: Our guests arrived around six o'clock for the small Saturday dinner party.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的客人大約六點到達，參加星期六的小晚餐派對。

toeic.example_en: We enjoyed afternoon tea with small sandwiches and warm scones at the old hotel.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在古老的飯店享用了下午茶，配上小三明治和溫熱的司康。

toeic.example_en: A small piece of chocolate cake is a nice treat after a long busy week.
toeic.example_zh: 在忙碌的一週後吃一小塊巧克力蛋糕是個不錯的享受。

toeic.example_en: We enjoy long walks in the park on cool autumn afternoons every weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每個週末喜歡在涼爽的秋日下午在公園散長長的步。

toeic.example_en: We laughed for hours while watching old family videos at my grandparents house.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在祖父母家看老家庭錄影帶時笑了好幾個小時。

toeic.example_en: She was very happy when her friends came over for a small surprise party.
toeic.example_zh: 當朋友們來家裡辦小驚喜派對時，她非常開心。

toeic.example_en: We spend every weekend together as a family doing simple outdoor activities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每個週末都全家一起做簡單的戶外活動。

toeic.example_en: Hello, my name is Tom and I am happy to meet you today.
toeic.example_zh: 你好，我叫 Tom，今天很高興認識你。

toeic.example_en: Hi Anna, how are you doing this morning?
toeic.example_zh: 嗨 Anna，你今天早上好嗎？

toeic.example_en: It was nice talking to you, goodbye and have a great day.
toeic.example_zh: 很高興和你聊天，再見，祝你有美好的一天。

toeic.example_en: Bye for now, I will call you again tomorrow morning.
toeic.example_zh: 先說再見，我明天早上會再打給你。

toeic.example_en: Good morning everyone, I hope you all slept well last night.
toeic.example_zh: 大家早安，希望你們昨晚都睡得好。

toeic.example_en: Good afternoon, thank you for joining our short meeting today.
toeic.example_zh: 午安，謝謝大家參加今天的簡短會議。

toeic.example_en: Good evening, welcome to our small dinner party at the hotel.
toeic.example_zh: 晚上好，歡迎參加我們在飯店的小型晚宴。

toeic.example_en: It is late, so good night and sleep well, my friend.
toeic.example_zh: 時間不早了，晚安，好好睡，我的朋友。

toeic.example_en: How are you today, I have not seen you for a long time.
toeic.example_zh: 你今天好嗎？我好久沒見到你了。

toeic.example_en: Thanks for the gift, I really like the color and the size.
toeic.example_zh: 謝謝你的禮物，我真的很喜歡這個顏色和尺寸。

toeic.example_en: Thank you very much for your help with my homework today.
toeic.example_zh: 非常感謝你今天幫我做作業。

toeic.example_en: You are welcome, I was happy to help you find the address.
toeic.example_zh: 不客氣，我很樂意幫你找到地址。

toeic.example_en: Please send me your phone number so I can call you later.
toeic.example_zh: 請把你的電話號碼傳給我，我等一下打給你。

toeic.example_en: Sorry, I cannot answer the phone right now because I am driving.
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，我現在不能接電話，因為我正在開車。

toeic.example_en: Excuse me, can you tell me where the post office is, please?
toeic.example_zh: 不好意思，請問郵局在哪裡？

toeic.example_en: Pardon, I did not hear you, can you say that again, please?
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，我沒聽清楚，可以再說一次嗎？

toeic.example_en: See you tomorrow at the cafe, do not forget your notebook.
toeic.example_zh: 明天咖啡店見，別忘了帶你的筆記本。

toeic.example_en: Take care of yourself, and please call me when you arrive home safely.
toeic.example_zh: 好好照顧自己，到家時請打給我報平安。

toeic.example_en: Welcome to our office, please have a seat and wait for a moment.
toeic.example_zh: 歡迎來到我們的辦公室，請坐一下稍等。

toeic.example_en: Nice to meet you, I have heard a lot about you from my friend.
toeic.example_zh: 很高興認識你，我從我朋友那聽過很多關於你的事。

toeic.example_en: Let me introduce my new coworker to everyone at the meeting today.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我在今天的會議上向大家介紹我的新同事。

toeic.example_en: Please write your full name and phone number on this paper.
toeic.example_zh: 請把你的全名和電話號碼寫在這張紙上。

toeic.example_en: My first name is Mark and my last name is Wilson.
toeic.example_zh: 我的名字是 Mark，姓是 Wilson。

toeic.example_en: Could you please spell your last name slowly for me?
toeic.example_zh: 可以請你慢慢拼一下你的姓嗎？

toeic.example_en: In some countries, the family name comes before the first name.
toeic.example_zh: 在一些國家，姓會放在名字前面。

toeic.example_en: My nickname is Sunny because I always smile and feel happy.
toeic.example_zh: 我的暱稱是 Sunny，因為我總是笑著、感覺很開心。

toeic.example_en: She sent a warm greeting card to her grandmother for her birthday.
toeic.example_zh: 她寄了一張溫暖的問候卡片給奶奶慶祝生日。

toeic.example_en: She likes to wave at her neighbors when she walks to school.
toeic.example_zh: 她走路上學時喜歡跟鄰居揮手。

toeic.example_en: He gave me a strong handshake when we met at the airport.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在機場見面時，他和我用力握了手。

toeic.example_en: In Japan, people often bow when they say hello or goodbye.
toeic.example_zh: 在日本，人們打招呼或道別時常常會鞠躬。

toeic.example_en: She gave her brother a long hug before he got on the train.
toeic.example_zh: 她在哥哥上火車前給了他一個長長的擁抱。

toeic.example_en: The mother gave her child a soft kiss on the forehead.
toeic.example_zh: 媽媽輕輕在孩子的額頭上親了一下。

toeic.example_en: I want to talk to you about our trip next weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 我想跟你聊聊我們下個週末的旅行。

toeic.example_en: She can speak three languages, including English and Spanish.
toeic.example_zh: 她會說三種語言，包含英文和西班牙文。

toeic.example_en: Please say hello to your sister for me when you see her.
toeic.example_zh: 看到你妹妹時，請替我跟她問好。

toeic.example_en: Please answer the phone if you hear it ring in the kitchen.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你聽到廚房的電話響，請接一下。

toeic.example_en: I will reply to your email after I finish lunch this afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天下午吃完午餐後會回你的信。

toeic.example_en: My phone is on the desk near the window in the living room.
toeic.example_zh: 我的電話在客廳窗戶旁邊的桌子上。

toeic.example_en: The old telephone in our office is black and very heavy.
toeic.example_zh: 我們辦公室的舊電話是黑色的，而且很重。

toeic.example_en: I left my mobile phone at home, so I could not call you.
toeic.example_zh: 我把手機留在家裡，所以沒辦法打給你。

toeic.example_en: Please turn off your cell phone during the meeting this afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 今天下午的會議中請把手機關掉。

toeic.example_en: We still have a landline at home for emergency calls.
toeic.example_zh: 我們家裡還有一支市內電話，可以用來打緊急電話。

toeic.example_en: Could you give me your phone number so we can stay in touch?
toeic.example_zh: 可以給我你的電話號碼嗎？這樣我們可以保持聯絡。

toeic.example_en: Please remember to dial the area code before the phone number.
toeic.example_zh: 請記得在電話號碼前先撥區碼。

toeic.example_en: The country code for the United States is one.
toeic.example_zh: 美國的國碼是 1。

toeic.example_en: I will call you tonight after I finish work and have dinner.
toeic.example_zh: 我今晚下班吃完飯後會打給你。

toeic.example_en: I got a phone call from my mother this morning before work.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天早上上班前接到媽媽的電話。

toeic.example_en: I have three missed calls from an unknown number on my phone.
toeic.example_zh: 我的手機上有三通來自不明號碼的未接來電。

toeic.example_en: Sorry, I have an incoming call, can I call you back later?
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，我有來電，我等一下回你好嗎？

toeic.example_en: He made an outgoing call to his client at three in the afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 他下午三點打了一通電話給他的客戶。

toeic.example_en: The phone began to ring just when I started to eat dinner.
toeic.example_zh: 我才剛開始吃晚餐，電話就響了。

toeic.example_en: Her ringtone is a song from a famous old movie.
toeic.example_zh: 她的鈴聲是一首有名老電影裡的歌。

toeic.example_en: Please dial zero first if you want to call an outside line.
toeic.example_zh: 如果想撥外線，請先撥 0。

toeic.example_en: Do not hang up, I still have one more thing to tell you.
toeic.example_zh: 先別掛電話，我還有一件事要告訴你。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 免持聽筒；擴音電話
toeic.example_en: She used the speakerphone so she could cook while talking.
toeic.example_zh: 她使用擴音電話，這樣可以邊煮飯邊講電話。

toeic.example_en: I forgot my earphone, so I cannot listen to music on the bus.
toeic.example_zh: 我忘了帶耳機，所以沒辦法在公車上聽音樂。

toeic.example_en: Please speak into the microphone so everyone can hear you clearly.
toeic.example_zh: 請對著麥克風講話，這樣大家都能聽得清楚。

toeic.example_en: My phone battery is low, I need to charge it soon.
toeic.example_zh: 我的手機電池快沒電了，我需要快點充電。

toeic.example_en: Please charge your phone before we leave for the long trip.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們出發長途旅行前，請先把手機充電。

toeic.example_en: Please clean your screen before the video call with the customer.
toeic.example_zh: 在和客戶視訊前，請先把螢幕擦乾淨。

toeic.example_en: Press the red button to end the call when you finish talking.
toeic.example_zh: 講完電話後，按紅色按鈕結束通話。

toeic.example_en: Please press one for English and two for Chinese on the menu.
toeic.example_zh: 請按 1 選英文，按 2 選中文。

toeic.example_en: If you need help, please press zero to talk to an operator.
toeic.example_zh: 如果需要協助，請按 0 與接線生通話。

toeic.example_en: The hotel receptionist gave me a friendly smile and a room key.
toeic.example_zh: 飯店接待員給了我一個親切的微笑和房間鑰匙。

toeic.example_en: Please hold the line, I will check the answer for you now.
toeic.example_zh: 請稍候不要掛斷，我現在幫你查答案。

toeic.example_en: Hold on, I will go and get my notebook from the next room.
toeic.example_zh: 稍等，我去隔壁房間拿我的筆記本。

toeic.example_en: Please wait a moment, I will go and look for my boss.
toeic.example_zh: 請稍等一下，我去找我的老闆。

toeic.example_en: Please transfer this call to the manager in the sales team.
toeic.example_zh: 請把這通電話轉接給業務部的經理。

toeic.example_en: Please leave a message after the beep and I will call you back.
toeic.example_zh: 請在嗶聲後留言，我會再回電給你。

toeic.example_en: I got a short message from my friend about the meeting time.
toeic.example_zh: 我收到我朋友傳來的一則簡短訊息，提到會議時間。

toeic.example_en: I sent you a text message about the dinner plan for tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 我傳了一則簡訊給你，關於今晚的晚餐計畫。

toeic.example_en: Please text me your home address before I leave the office.
toeic.example_zh: 在我離開辦公室前，請傳簡訊告訴我你家地址。

toeic.example_en: Please send the photo to my email when you have time tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚有時間時，請把照片寄到我的信箱。

toeic.example_en: Did you receive my email about the meeting on Tuesday morning?
toeic.example_zh: 你有收到我關於星期二早上會議的信嗎？

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 電子郵件；寄電子郵件
toeic.example_en: I will email you the details before lunch tomorrow at the office.
toeic.example_zh: 我明天午餐前會寄信告訴你細節。

toeic.example_en: Please check your inbox, I sent you a new message just now.
toeic.example_zh: 請查看你的收件匣，我剛剛傳了新訊息給你。

toeic.example_en: The letter is still in the outbox because the internet is slow.
toeic.example_zh: 因為網路很慢，信還在寄件匣裡。

toeic.example_en: I can find old messages in my sent folder by date.
toeic.example_zh: 我可以按日期在寄件備份夾找舊訊息。

toeic.example_en: Please write a short and clear subject for every email you send.
toeic.example_zh: 你寄的每封信都請寫上簡短清楚的主旨。

toeic.example_en: Keep the body of the email short and friendly for your client.
toeic.example_zh: 信的正文要寫得簡短、語氣友善，給你的客戶看。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 親愛的（信件開頭）
toeic.example_en: Dear Anna, thank you for your letter, I was very happy to read it.
toeic.example_zh: 親愛的 Anna，謝謝你的來信，我讀了很開心。

toeic.example_en: I send my regards to your family and hope to see you soon.
toeic.example_zh: 請代我問候你家人，希望很快能再見到你。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 您忠誠的（信末結語）
toeic.example_en: Yours truly, Sam will sign every letter to his old teacher.
toeic.example_zh: Sam 在每封給他老師的信上都會簽上敬啟。

toeic.example_en: I bought a postcard from the museum to send to my parents.
toeic.example_zh: 我在博物館買了一張明信片寄給爸媽。

toeic.example_en: The post office is just two blocks from my house.
toeic.example_zh: 郵局離我家只有兩條街。

toeic.example_en: I dropped my letter in the red post box on the corner.
toeic.example_zh: 我把信投進街角那個紅色郵筒。

toeic.example_en: The mail carrier brings letters and packages to our office each day.
toeic.example_zh: 郵差每天送信和包裹來我們辦公室。

toeic.example_en: The postman knocked on the door to give me a heavy package.
toeic.example_zh: 郵差敲了我的門，要交給我一個很重的包裹。

toeic.example_en: Please write your home address on the form in clear letters.
toeic.example_zh: 請在表格上用清楚的字體寫下你家的地址。

toeic.example_en: Could you give me your office address so I can mail the document?
toeic.example_zh: 可以給我你的辦公室地址嗎？我要寄文件給你。

toeic.example_en: I will write down your email address on this small card.
toeic.example_zh: 我會把你的電子郵件地址寫在這張小卡上。

toeic.example_en: Please add the zip code so the letter arrives faster.
toeic.example_zh: 請加上郵遞區號，這樣信會更快寄到。

toeic.example_en: I cannot send this card without the correct postal code.
toeic.example_zh: 沒有正確的郵遞區號，我無法寄出這張卡片。

toeic.example_en: The sender of this email is my coworker from the marketing team.
toeic.example_zh: 這封信的寄件人是我行銷部的同事。

toeic.example_en: Please hold the receiver close to your ear when you talk.
toeic.example_zh: 講話時請把聽筒拿近耳朵。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 副本；密件副本以外的同收
toeic.example_en: Please cc your manager when you reply to this customer email.
toeic.example_zh: 請在回這封客戶信時，把你經理也加在副本中。

toeic.example_en: Please forward email from the client to me before five o clock.
toeic.example_zh: 請在五點前把客戶的信轉寄給我。

toeic.example_en: I delete all the spam in my mailbox every Friday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我每個星期五下午都會刪掉信箱裡的所有垃圾信。

toeic.example_en: I sent you a voice message because I could not type clearly.
toeic.example_zh: 我傳了一則語音訊息給你，因為我打字打不清楚。

toeic.example_en: Please listen to your voice mail when you get back to the office.
toeic.example_zh: 回辦公室時請聽一下你的語音信箱。

toeic.example_en: After the beep, please say your name and phone number clearly.
toeic.example_zh: 嗶聲過後，請清楚地說出你的名字和電話號碼。

toeic.example_en: Her voice on the phone is very clear and easy to understand.
toeic.example_zh: 她在電話裡的聲音很清楚，容易聽得懂。

toeic.example_en: Please do not speak too loud, the office is very quiet now.
toeic.example_zh: 請不要講太大聲，現在辦公室很安靜。

toeic.example_en: There is a lot of noise in the street, can you hear me?
toeic.example_zh: 街上很吵，你聽得到我說話嗎？

toeic.example_en: Could you please speak slowly, my English is not very good?
toeic.example_zh: 可以請你慢慢說嗎？我的英文不太好。

toeic.example_en: Could you speak up, I cannot hear you very well.
toeic.example_zh: 你可以講大聲一點嗎？我聽不太清楚。

toeic.example_en: Please speak clearly when you give your name to the receptionist.
toeic.example_zh: 向接待員報名字時，請說清楚一點。

toeic.example_en: Could you spell your name for me, I want to write it down.
toeic.example_zh: 可以幫我拼一下你的名字嗎？我想寫下來。

toeic.example_en: Could you repeat the phone number, I did not catch the last part.
toeic.example_zh: 可以再說一次電話號碼嗎？我沒聽到最後一部分。

toeic.example_en: Sorry, could you say again the time of our meeting tomorrow?
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，可以再說一次我們明天會議的時間嗎？

toeic.example_en: I am sorry, I do not understand your last sentence.
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，我不太懂你最後那句話。

toeic.example_en: Can you hear me clearly on the phone, the signal seems weak.
toeic.example_zh: 你電話裡聽得清楚嗎？訊號好像不太好。

toeic.example_en: We had a short chat at the door before he went to lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 他去吃午餐前，我們在門口聊了一下。

toeic.example_en: I have to go now, talk soon and have a great evening.
toeic.example_zh: 我得走了，改天再聊，祝你有個美好的晚上。

toeic.example_en: Let us catch up over coffee this weekend at our usual cafe.
toeic.example_zh: 這個週末在我們常去的咖啡店一起敘敘舊吧。

toeic.example_en: Please keep in touch with me after you move to another city.
toeic.example_zh: 搬到別的城市後，請和我保持聯絡。

toeic.example_en: We will stay in touch by email every Sunday night.
toeic.example_zh: 我們會每個星期天晚上用電子郵件保持聯絡。

toeic.example_en: Please get in touch with me by email if you have questions.
toeic.example_zh: 如果有問題，請用電子郵件跟我聯絡。

toeic.example_en: Please contact me by phone if you cannot use email today.
toeic.example_zh: 如果今天不能用電子郵件，請打電話聯絡我。

toeic.example_en: Please share your contact info with me before you leave the city.
toeic.example_zh: 離開這個城市前，請把聯絡資訊給我。

toeic.example_en: I will look for the number in the phone book on the shelf.
toeic.example_zh: 我會在書架上的電話簿裡找號碼。

toeic.example_en: You can find my phone number in the company directory.
toeic.example_zh: 你可以在公司通訊錄裡找到我的電話號碼。

toeic.example_en: She added the new number to her address book on the phone.
toeic.example_zh: 她把新號碼加到手機的通訊錄裡。

toeic.example_en: Please save number under my name and add a star next to it.
toeic.example_zh: 請把這個號碼存到我的名字下，並加上星號。

toeic.example_en: Please delete the old emails to make space in your inbox.
toeic.example_zh: 請刪除舊郵件，為你的收件匣空出空間。

toeic.example_en: Do not answer if you see an unknown number on your phone.
toeic.example_zh: 如果手機上看到不明號碼，不要接。

toeic.example_en: Sorry, I think you have the wrong number, no Tom lives here.
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，我想你打錯了，這裡沒有 Tom。

toeic.example_en: Are you sure this is the right number for the city hospital?
toeic.example_zh: 你確定這是市立醫院的正確號碼嗎？

toeic.example_en: I got a busy line, so I will try to call again later.
toeic.example_zh: 我打過去都忙線，所以晚點再打。

toeic.example_en: The line is engaged, I will try to call her again in ten minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 電話佔線中，我十分鐘後再打給她。

toeic.example_en: Sorry, I am very busy right now, can I call you back later?
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，我現在很忙，等一下回你電話可以嗎？

toeic.example_en: I will call back as soon as I finish my lunch meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 我午餐會議結束後就立刻回電給你。

toeic.example_en: I will ring back after I leave the train station this evening.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚我離開火車站後會再回電給你。

toeic.example_en: This is Sara speaking, how can I help you today?
toeic.example_zh: 我是 Sara，請問有什麼可以幫您的嗎？

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 我是（電話中自我介紹）
toeic.example_en: Hello, this is John from the sales team at ABC company.
toeic.example_zh: 您好，我是 ABC 公司業務部的 John。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 我可以和某人說話嗎
toeic.example_en: Hello, may I speak to Mr. Wang in the marketing team?
toeic.example_zh: 您好，請問可以和行銷部的王先生說話嗎？

toeic.example_en: Excuse me, who is calling, please, I will write your name down.
toeic.example_zh: 請問哪位？我會把您的名字記下。

toeic.example_en: I am calling from the bank about your new credit card application.
toeic.example_zh: 我從銀行打來，是為了您的新信用卡申請。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 一通電話的距離（隨時可聯絡）
toeic.example_en: If you need help, I am just a phone call away anytime.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你需要幫忙，我隨時打通電話就到。

toeic.example_en: Please give a call when you arrive at the train station tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚到火車站時，請打通電話給我。

toeic.example_en: I have to make a call to my mother before our dinner tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚晚餐前我得打通電話給我媽。

toeic.example_en: Please answer the phone if you hear it ring while I shower.
toeic.example_zh: 我洗澡時若電話響了，請幫我接。

toeic.example_en: She did not pick up the phone, maybe she is on the bus.
toeic.example_zh: 她沒接電話，可能在公車上。

toeic.example_en: Please put down the phone, dinner is ready on the table now.
toeic.example_zh: 請放下電話，晚餐已經擺在桌上了。

toeic.example_en: Happy birthday, I hope you have a wonderful day with your family.
toeic.example_zh: 生日快樂，希望你和家人一起度過美好的一天。

toeic.example_en: Happy new year to you and your family, may all your wishes come true.
toeic.example_zh: 祝你和家人新年快樂，希望你所有願望都實現。

toeic.example_en: Merry christmas to you and your family, enjoy the long holiday.
toeic.example_zh: 祝你和家人聖誕快樂，好好享受這個長假期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 致上最美好的祝福
toeic.example_en: Best wishes for your new job, I am sure you will do well.
toeic.example_zh: 祝你新工作一切順利，我相信你會表現得很好。

toeic.example_en: Please send my warm wishes to your parents and your sister.
toeic.example_zh: 請把我的溫暖祝福帶給你父母和妹妹。

toeic.example_en: Congratulations on your new house, I hope you will be very happy.
toeic.example_zh: 恭喜你買了新房子，希望你能住得很開心。

toeic.example_en: Good luck with your test on Friday, I know you will pass.
toeic.example_zh: 祝你星期五考試好運，我知道你一定會過。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 祝你有個愉快的一天
toeic.example_en: Have a nice day, see you tomorrow at our weekly meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 祝你有個愉快的一天，明天每週例會見。

toeic.example_en: Have a good day at work, do not forget your lunch box.
toeic.example_zh: 祝你今天工作順利，別忘了帶便當。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 祝你有美好的一天
toeic.example_en: Have a great day, the weather looks really nice outside today.
toeic.example_zh: 祝你有美好的一天，今天外面天氣看起來很好。

toeic.example_en: Have a nice weekend, see you on Monday morning at the office.
toeic.example_zh: 祝你週末愉快，星期一早上辦公室見。

toeic.example_en: See you later, I will be back from the store in an hour.
toeic.example_zh: 待會見，我去商店一個小時後回來。

toeic.example_en: See you tomorrow, please remember to bring my book back.
toeic.example_zh: 明天見，請記得把我的書帶回來。

toeic.example_en: See you soon, I miss our small chats during lunch time.
toeic.example_zh: 很快再見，我想念我們午餐時間的小聊天。

toeic.example_en: Long time no see, you look really well, how is your family?
toeic.example_zh: 好久不見，你看起來很好，家人都好嗎？

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 你好嗎（正式初次見面）
toeic.example_en: How do you do, my name is David, I am your new neighbor.
toeic.example_zh: 您好，我叫 David，我是你的新鄰居。

toeic.example_en: Pleased to meet you, my brother often talks about you at home.
toeic.example_zh: 很高興認識你，我哥常在家裡提到你。

toeic.example_en: Glad to meet you, please call me by my first name only.
toeic.example_zh: 很高興認識你，請直接叫我名字就好。

toeic.example_en: It was very kind of you to send the flowers to my mother.
toeic.example_zh: 你寄花給我媽，真是太貼心了。

toeic.example_en: It is rude to talk on the phone during a small meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 在小型會議中講電話是沒禮貌的。

toeic.example_en: Please speak softly so we do not wake up the baby upstairs.
toeic.example_zh: 請輕聲說話，這樣我們才不會吵醒樓上的寶寶。

toeic.example_en: Excuse me ma am, you forgot your bag on the chair.
toeic.example_zh: 不好意思，女士，您的包包忘在椅子上了。

toeic.example_en: Good morning sir, may I take your coat and hat, please?
toeic.example_zh: 先生早安，我可以幫您拿外套和帽子嗎？

toeic.example_en: Miss Lin, your taxi is waiting for you at the front door.
toeic.example_zh: 林小姐，您的計程車在前門等您。

toeic.example_en: Please send this letter to mister Brown on the second floor.
toeic.example_zh: 請把這封信寄給二樓的布朗先生。

toeic.example_en: Good evening madam, your table is ready by the window now.
toeic.example_zh: 女士晚安，您靠窗的位子已經準備好了。

toeic.example_en: A visitor is waiting for you at the front desk right now.
toeic.example_zh: 現在有一位訪客在前台等您。

toeic.example_en: Our new client will visit our office next Monday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 下星期一下午我們的新客戶會來辦公室拜訪。

toeic.example_en: Please give me your name card so I can email you later.
toeic.example_zh: 請給我你的名片，這樣我晚點可以寄信給你。

toeic.example_en: I keep all my business contact information on my phone.
toeic.example_zh: 我把所有業務聯絡資訊都存在手機上。

toeic.example_en: Please write your title under your name on the email signature.
toeic.example_zh: 請在電子郵件簽名檔的名字下方寫上你的職稱。

toeic.example_en: Please write your company name and address at the top of the letter.
toeic.example_zh: 請在信的最上方寫上公司名稱和地址。

toeic.example_en: Please do not call late at night, the children are sleeping.
toeic.example_zh: 請不要太晚打來，孩子們在睡覺。

toeic.example_en: Today is a busy day at the post office before the holiday.
toeic.example_zh: 假期前郵局今天很忙。

toeic.example_en: I will write you an email tomorrow about the new dinner plan.
toeic.example_zh: 我明天會寄信告訴你新的晚餐計畫。

toeic.example_en: I got your card yesterday, thank you for the kind words.
toeic.example_zh: 我昨天收到你的卡片，謝謝你親切的留言。

toeic.example_en: Please call me tonight after eight, I will be free then.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚八點後請打給我，那時我有空。

toeic.example_en: I will call you back very soon, please wait near the phone.
toeic.example_zh: 我很快會回你電話，請在電話旁等一下。

toeic.example_en: I will reply to your message later, I am driving right now.
toeic.example_zh: 我等一下會回你訊息，我現在正在開車。

toeic.example_en: I cannot talk now, I am in a meeting with my new boss.
toeic.example_zh: 我現在不能講話，我正在和新老闆開會。

toeic.example_en: I am right now in the car, can I call you back later?
toeic.example_zh: 我現在在車上，等一下回你電話可以嗎？

toeic.example_en: Please give me a moment to find my pen and paper.
toeic.example_zh: 請給我一會兒，我去找我的筆和紙。

toeic.example_en: Please wait a minute, my mother is just outside the door.
toeic.example_zh: 請等一分鐘，我媽就在門外。

toeic.example_en: Hold on a second, I have to write down the address.
toeic.example_zh: 等我一下，我要把地址寫下來。

toeic.example_en: This is an important call, please be quiet for a few minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 這是一通重要電話，請安靜幾分鐘。

toeic.example_en: I have a quick question about the meeting time tomorrow morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我對明天早上的會議時間有個簡短的問題。

toeic.example_en: Please do not answer back, just listen to your teacher carefully.
toeic.example_zh: 請不要頂嘴，要仔細聽老師的話。

toeic.example_en: Please say hello to your mother for me when you go home tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚回家時請替我向你母親問好。

toeic.example_en: I want to say goodbye to my old neighbor before she moves away.
toeic.example_zh: 我想在老鄰居搬走前向她道別。

toeic.example_en: Please say sorry to your friend, you did not mean to hurt him.
toeic.example_zh: 請向你朋友道歉，你並不是故意要傷害他的。

toeic.example_en: Please say thank you to the driver when he brings you home.
toeic.example_zh: 司機送你到家時，請跟他說謝謝。

toeic.example_en: Please send the invitation by email to all my close friends.
toeic.example_zh: 請把邀請函用電子郵件寄給我所有的好朋友。

toeic.example_en: I will accept your invitation to dinner this Friday evening.
toeic.example_zh: 我會接受你這個星期五晚上的晚餐邀請。

toeic.example_en: Please confirm by email that you can come to the meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 請用電子郵件確認你能來開會。

toeic.example_en: I will set a reminder on my phone for the dentist appointment.
toeic.example_zh: 我會在手機上設一個提醒，提醒我看牙醫的預約。

toeic.example_en: Our appointment time is two o clock, please do not be late.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的預約時間是兩點，請不要遲到。

toeic.example_en: Please let me know your available time this week for a short call.
toeic.example_zh: 請告訴我你這週有空的時間，我們可以短暫通話。

toeic.example_en: My little sister walks to school with her friends every weekday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我妹妹每個上學日早上都和朋友一起走路去學校。

toeic.example_en: Every student in our class must bring a notebook and a pencil today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天我們班每個學生都必須帶筆記本和鉛筆。

toeic.example_en: Our new teacher is very kind and explains every lesson clearly to us.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的新老師非常親切，每節課都向我們清楚地解釋。

toeic.example_en: Please keep the classroom clean and put your trash in the bin.
toeic.example_zh: 請保持教室乾淨，並把垃圾丟進垃圾桶。

toeic.example_en: Today's English lesson is about asking for directions in a new city.
toeic.example_zh: 今天的英文課是關於在新城市問路。

toeic.example_en: I always finish my homework before dinner so I can play games later.
toeic.example_zh: 我總是在晚餐前完成作業，這樣我之後就能玩遊戲。

toeic.example_en: Open your textbook to page forty and read the first short story.
toeic.example_zh: 請把教科書翻到第四十頁，讀第一篇短篇故事。

toeic.example_en: I write new English words in my notebook every day after school.
toeic.example_zh: 我每天放學後都會把新英文單字寫在筆記本裡。

toeic.example_en: Can I borrow your pencil please? I forgot mine at home today.
toeic.example_zh: 我可以借你的鉛筆嗎？我今天把我的忘在家裡了。

toeic.example_en: Please use a black pen to fill in the form on this paper.
toeic.example_zh: 請用黑色筆在這張紙上填寫表格。

toeic.example_en: I dropped my eraser under the desk and could not find it later.
toeic.example_zh: 我把橡皮擦掉在桌子下面，後來找不到了。

toeic.example_en: Use a ruler to draw a straight line in your math notebook now.
toeic.example_zh: 現在用尺在你的數學筆記本上畫一條直線。

toeic.example_en: There is a small lamp and many books on my study desk.
toeic.example_zh: 我的書桌上有一盞小檯燈和許多書。

toeic.example_en: Please sit on your chair and listen to the teacher carefully right now.
toeic.example_zh: 請坐在椅子上，現在仔細聽老師講話。

toeic.example_en: The teacher wrote three new words on the blackboard for us to copy.
toeic.example_zh: 老師在黑板上寫了三個新單字讓我們抄寫。

toeic.example_en: The teacher picked up a piece of chalk and wrote the date down.
toeic.example_zh: 老師拿起一支粉筆，寫下了日期。

toeic.example_en: Use a red marker to circle the wrong answers on your test paper.
toeic.example_zh: 用紅色麥克筆把考卷上的錯誤答案圈起來。

toeic.example_en: Pack your schoolbag tonight so you do not forget anything tomorrow morning.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚整理好你的書包，這樣明天早上才不會忘東西。

toeic.example_en: Mom packed a sandwich and an apple inside my lunchbox this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 媽媽今天早上在我的便當盒裡裝了一個三明治和一顆蘋果。

toeic.example_en: The librarian helped me find a science book about ocean animals today.
toeic.example_zh: 圖書館員今天幫我找到一本關於海洋動物的科普書。

toeic.example_en: We have math class every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday morning at school.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每週一、三、五早上在學校都有數學課。

toeic.example_en: In science class we learned how plants grow from tiny little seeds.
toeic.example_zh: 在自然課上我們學到植物如何從小小的種子長大。

toeic.example_en: Our history teacher told us many interesting stories about ancient Egypt today.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的歷史老師今天告訴我們許多關於古埃及的有趣故事。

toeic.example_en: I have started studying English so I can talk with foreign visitors.
toeic.example_zh: 我開始學英文，這樣我就能和外國訪客交談。

toeic.example_en: We studied the map of Asia during geography class this afternoon together.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今天下午在地理課上一起研究了亞洲地圖。

toeic.example_en: In biology we learned about the parts of a leaf and a flower.
toeic.example_zh: 在生物課上我們學到了葉子和花朵的各個部分。

toeic.example_en: Chemistry class is fun when we mix safe liquids and watch color changes.
toeic.example_zh: 當我們混合安全的液體並看顏色變化時，化學課非常有趣。

toeic.example_en: We do simple physics experiments with small balls and gentle ramps inside.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在室內用小球和緩坡做簡單的物理實驗。

toeic.example_en: She loves literature class because the stories teach her about different lives.
toeic.example_zh: 她喜歡文學課，因為這些故事讓她認識不同的人生。

toeic.example_en: We have a short spelling test every Friday morning before lunchtime today.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每週五早上午餐前都有一個短的拼字測驗。

toeic.example_en: Good grammar makes your writing much clearer for other people to understand.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的文法讓你的寫作對他人來說更清楚易懂。

toeic.example_en: Reading every day is a great way to build a strong English vocabulary.
toeic.example_zh: 每天閱讀是建立豐富英文字彙的好方法。

toeic.example_en: Listen and copy the speaker if you want to improve your English pronunciation.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你想改善英文發音，就聽並模仿說話者。

toeic.example_en: Please write a short sentence using each new word on this paper.
toeic.example_zh: 請用這張紙上每個新單字各寫一個短句子。

toeic.example_en: A good paragraph has one clear main idea and several supporting sentences.
toeic.example_zh: 一個好的段落有一個清楚的主要想法和幾個支持的句子。

toeic.example_en: I need to write a short essay about my family for tomorrow's class.
toeic.example_zh: 我需要為明天的課寫一篇關於我家人的短文。

toeic.example_en: We have a quick math quiz tomorrow, so please review chapter three tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 我們明天有一個小數學測驗，請今晚複習第三章。

toeic.example_en: The final exam will cover every chapter in our English book this semester.
toeic.example_zh: 期末考將涵蓋這學期英文書中的每一章。

toeic.example_en: Our science test on Friday will include questions about plants and small animals.
toeic.example_zh: 我們週五的自然測驗會包含關於植物和小動物的題目。

toeic.example_en: She got a good grade on her English test because she studied hard.
toeic.example_zh: 她英文考試拿到了好成績，因為她認真讀書。

toeic.example_en: I usually study English for one hour after dinner every weekday evening.
toeic.example_zh: 我通常每個平日晚餐後讀英文一個小時。

toeic.example_en: Children learn new words very quickly when they read interesting picture books.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們在閱讀有趣的圖畫書時學新單字學得非常快。

toeic.example_en: My grandmother used to teach little children how to read and write.
toeic.example_zh: 我祖母以前教小孩子如何讀和寫。

toeic.example_en: Please write your full name and date on the top of the paper.
toeic.example_zh: 請在紙的最上方寫上你的全名和日期。

toeic.example_en: Please copy the new words from the blackboard into your notebook now.
toeic.example_zh: 請現在把黑板上的新單字抄到你的筆記本裡。

toeic.example_en: She used a red crayon to draw a big heart on the white paper.
toeic.example_zh: 她用紅蠟筆在白紙上畫了一個大愛心。

toeic.example_en: Please use the small scissors to cut out the shape on this paper.
toeic.example_zh: 請用小剪刀剪下這張紙上的形狀。

toeic.example_en: Use a little bit of glue to stick the photo onto the page.
toeic.example_zh: 用一點膠水把照片貼在這頁上。

toeic.example_en: I used tape to fix the torn page in my old picture book.
toeic.example_zh: 我用膠帶修補了我舊圖畫書中撕破的那一頁。

toeic.example_en: Can you please pass me the stapler so I can join these pages?
toeic.example_zh: 你可以把釘書機遞給我嗎？這樣我就能把這些紙釘起來。

toeic.example_en: Keep all your homework sheets inside this blue folder so you do not lose them.
toeic.example_zh: 把你所有的作業單放在這個藍色資料夾裡，這樣才不會搞丟。

toeic.example_en: I marked the school trip date on the calendar in our kitchen yesterday.
toeic.example_zh: 我昨天在廚房的日曆上標記了校外教學的日期。

toeic.example_en: The clock on the classroom wall says it is almost lunch time now.
toeic.example_zh: 教室牆上的時鐘顯示現在快到午餐時間了。

toeic.example_en: The teacher showed us many countries on the big globe in the corner.
toeic.example_zh: 老師用角落裡那個大地球儀向我們展示了許多國家。

toeic.example_en: If you do not know a word, look it up in the dictionary first.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你不認識一個單字，先在字典裡查一下。

toeic.example_en: Open your workbook to page twelve and answer all the easy questions.
toeic.example_zh: 請把練習本翻到第十二頁，回答所有簡單的問題。

toeic.example_en: The teacher gave us a worksheet with ten new English questions today.
toeic.example_zh: 老師今天發給我們一張有十題英文新題目的學習單。

toeic.example_en: Turn to page seven and read the small poem at the top.
toeic.example_zh: 翻到第七頁，朗讀最上面的小詩。

toeic.example_en: We will read chapter five together and then talk about the main idea.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將一起讀第五章，然後討論主要的想法。

toeic.example_en: She read a short story about a kind farmer and a small dog.
toeic.example_zh: 她讀了一個關於善良農夫和小狗的短篇故事。

toeic.example_en: Our teacher asked each student to read a short poem out loud today.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的老師今天要求每個學生大聲朗讀一首短詩。

toeic.example_en: Please write each new word three times in your English notebook tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 請今晚把每個新單字在你的英文筆記本裡寫三次。

toeic.example_en: Please write your phone number clearly on the top of this short form.
toeic.example_zh: 請在這張短表格的最上方清楚地寫下你的電話號碼。

toeic.example_en: There are twenty-eight friendly students in our English class this new term.
toeic.example_zh: 這個新學期我們英文班上有二十八位友善的學生。

toeic.example_en: My classmate Anna helped me understand the math homework yesterday after school.
toeic.example_zh: 我的同班同學安娜昨天放學後幫我弄懂了數學作業。

toeic.example_en: I met an old schoolmate from primary school at the park last weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 我上個週末在公園遇到了一位小學時的老校友。

toeic.example_en: All students must wear the school uniform from Monday to Friday every week.
toeic.example_zh: 所有學生每週一到週五都必須穿學校制服。

toeic.example_en: The corridor outside our classroom has many colorful drawings on the walls.
toeic.example_zh: 我們教室外面的走廊牆上有許多彩色的畫作。

toeic.example_en: I keep my heavy textbooks and a coat inside my school locker.
toeic.example_zh: 我把厚重的教科書和一件外套放在學校的置物櫃裡。

toeic.example_en: When the school bell rings, please put your books away and stand up.
toeic.example_zh: 當學校的鈴聲響起時，請收好書本然後站起來。

toeic.example_en: During recess, the children run outside and play happy games together.
toeic.example_zh: 下課休息時間，孩子們跑到外面一起玩快樂的遊戲。

toeic.example_en: The new semester starts next Monday and ends in January next year.
toeic.example_zh: 新學期下週一開始，明年一月結束。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 校外教學；戶外教學
toeic.example_en: Our class will go on a field trip to the science museum tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 我們班明天要去科學博物館校外教學。

toeic.example_en: Our school holds a fun sports day in early November every single year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們學校每年十一月初都會舉辦一場有趣的運動會。

toeic.example_en: My older brother is very excited about his high school graduation next month.
toeic.example_zh: 我哥哥對下個月的高中畢業典禮非常興奮。

toeic.example_en: She will graduate from junior high school next June with her best friends.
toeic.example_zh: 她將在明年六月與最好的朋友們一起從國中畢業。

toeic.example_en: He proudly hung his school diploma on the wall above his desk.
toeic.example_zh: 他自豪地把學校的畢業證書掛在書桌上方的牆上。

toeic.example_en: She received a certificate for reading the most books in our class.
toeic.example_zh: 她因為在我們班讀了最多本書而獲得了一張證書。

toeic.example_en: He got a small award for his hard work in the math competition.
toeic.example_zh: 他在數學比賽中因為努力而獲得一個小獎。

toeic.example_en: There is a fun reading competition at our school in early December.
toeic.example_zh: 我們學校在十二月初有一場有趣的閱讀比賽。

toeic.example_en: She likes to practice the piano for thirty minutes every single evening.
toeic.example_zh: 她喜歡每晚練習鋼琴三十分鐘。

toeic.example_en: Please review chapter four tonight so you are ready for tomorrow's quiz.
toeic.example_zh: 請今晚複習第四章，這樣你就能為明天的小考做好準備。

toeic.example_en: Try to memorize these ten new words before our spelling test on Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 試著在週五的拼字測驗前背好這十個新單字。

toeic.example_en: Please remember to bring your math textbook to class on Monday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 請記得在週一早上把數學課本帶到教室。

toeic.example_en: Do not forget to write your name on the top of the paper.
toeic.example_zh: 不要忘記在紙張的最上方寫上你的名字。

toeic.example_en: Can you please explain this English sentence to me one more time?
toeic.example_zh: 你可以再向我解釋一次這個英文句子嗎？

toeic.example_en: Please describe your favorite animal using five short English sentences only.
toeic.example_zh: 請只用五個簡短的英文句子描述你最喜歡的動物。

toeic.example_en: We will discuss the short story in small groups during English class today.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今天會在英文課上分小組討論這篇短篇故事。

toeic.example_en: Try to translate this short Chinese sentence into easy English on paper.
toeic.example_zh: 試著在紙上把這個短中文句子翻譯成簡單的英文。

toeic.example_en: Please underline every new word you find inside this short story now.
toeic.example_zh: 請現在在這篇短篇故事裡找到的每個新單字下面畫線。

toeic.example_en: Please circle the correct answer for each question on the test paper.
toeic.example_zh: 請在考卷上每題圈出正確的答案。

toeic.example_en: Fill in the blank with the correct verb in the past tense form.
toeic.example_zh: 用正確的過去式動詞填入空格中。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 正確的；改正
toeic.example_en: Please write the correct answer next to each wrong word on your paper.
toeic.example_zh: 請在你紙上每個錯誤單字旁邊寫上正確的答案。

toeic.example_en: I had two wrong answers on my spelling test but I tried hard.
toeic.example_zh: 我的拼字測驗有兩題答錯了，但我很努力。

toeic.example_en: Today's English homework was very easy so I finished it in ten minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 今天的英文作業非常簡單，所以我十分鐘就完成了。

toeic.example_en: The math problems on the last test were very difficult for many students.
toeic.example_zh: 上次考試的數學題對許多學生來說都很困難。

toeic.example_en: Science is hard for me but I keep trying every single day.
toeic.example_zh: 自然科對我來說很難，但我每天都持續努力。

toeic.example_en: Please write a simple sentence using each new word in the list.
toeic.example_zh: 請用單字表中的每個新單字寫一個簡單的句子。

toeic.example_en: She is a very clever girl who solves math problems very quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 她是一個非常聰明的女孩，能很快解開數學題。

toeic.example_en: My brother is smart and he reads many books during the weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 我哥哥很聰明，他在週末讀許多書。

toeic.example_en: Two students were absent from English class because they were a little sick.
toeic.example_zh: 有兩位學生因為有點不舒服，所以英文課缺席。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 班級導師時間；班級教室
toeic.example_en: We meet our homeroom teacher every morning before our first class starts.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每天早上在第一節課開始前見班導師。

toeic.example_en: My English tutor comes to my house twice a week after dinner.
toeic.example_zh: 我的英文家教每週晚餐後來我家兩次。

toeic.example_en: The history lecture today was very interesting and lasted about one hour.
toeic.example_zh: 今天的歷史講課非常有趣，持續了大約一個小時。

toeic.example_en: I joined a short English course at the community center this summer.
toeic.example_zh: 我今年暑假在社區中心參加了一個短期英文課程。

toeic.example_en: My little sister started preschool last September and she really loves it.
toeic.example_zh: 我妹妹去年九月開始上幼兒園，她非常喜歡。

toeic.example_en: My cousin goes to kindergarten near a small park in our neighborhood.
toeic.example_zh: 我表弟去我們社區附近一個小公園旁的幼稚園。

toeic.example_en: She attended elementary school in this small town for six happy years.
toeic.example_zh: 她在這個小鎮的小學度過了快樂的六年。

toeic.example_en: His daughter just started her first year of primary school this autumn.
toeic.example_zh: 他的女兒今年秋天剛開始上小學一年級。

toeic.example_en: My brother will move from middle school to high school next year.
toeic.example_zh: 我哥哥明年就要從中學升上高中了。

toeic.example_en: He studies many different subjects at the high school in our city.
toeic.example_zh: 他在我們城市的高中學習許多不同的科目。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 較年輕的；初級的
toeic.example_en: She is a junior student and is one year younger than her cousin.
toeic.example_zh: 她是學弟妹級的學生，比她表哥小一歲。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 較年長的；高年級的
toeic.example_en: A kind senior student helped me find my new classroom on the first day.
toeic.example_zh: 開學第一天，一位親切的高年級學生幫我找到了新教室。

toeic.example_en: As a freshman, she is excited about every new class on her schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 作為新生，她對課表上每一堂新課都感到興奮。

toeic.example_en: My older sister plans to go to college after she finishes high school.
toeic.example_zh: 我姐姐打算高中畢業後去上大學。

toeic.example_en: He is studying English at a large university in a quiet small city.
toeic.example_zh: 他在一座安靜小城市的一所大型大學裡讀英文。

toeic.example_en: The university campus has many tall trees and several beautiful green gardens.
toeic.example_zh: 這所大學的校園有許多高大的樹和幾個美麗的綠色花園。

toeic.example_en: Many students live in a dormitory near the main university library together.
toeic.example_zh: 許多學生住在大學主圖書館附近的宿舍裡。

toeic.example_en: The whole school gathered in the auditorium to watch the music show.
toeic.example_zh: 全校在禮堂集合觀看音樂表演。

toeic.example_en: We did a fun water experiment in the science lab this Wednesday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 這週三早上我們在自然實驗室做了一個有趣的水實驗。

toeic.example_en: Students must wear safety glasses inside the laboratory at all times always.
toeic.example_zh: 學生在實驗室裡必須隨時戴上安全眼鏡。

toeic.example_en: Our science experiment showed how plants need water and bright sunlight.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的自然實驗顯示植物需要水和明亮的陽光。

toeic.example_en: We are working on a group project about animals in the ocean now.
toeic.example_zh: 我們正在做一個關於海洋動物的小組專題。

toeic.example_en: She wrote a short report about the moon for her science homework.
toeic.example_zh: 她為自然作業寫了一份關於月亮的短報告。

toeic.example_en: Please write a short summary of the story in five English sentences.
toeic.example_zh: 請用五個英文句子為這個故事寫一段短摘要。

toeic.example_en: The topic of today's lesson is about food from many different countries.
toeic.example_zh: 今天課程的主題是來自許多不同國家的食物。

toeic.example_en: The author of this children's book also drew all the colorful pictures.
toeic.example_zh: 這本兒童書的作者也畫了所有色彩繽紛的圖畫。

toeic.example_en: My favorite writer tells funny stories about a clever cat and a dog.
toeic.example_zh: 我最喜歡的作家會講關於一隻聰明貓和一隻狗的有趣故事。

toeic.example_en: This easy book is a good choice for any new English reader.
toeic.example_zh: 對任何英文初學者來說，這本簡單的書是個不錯的選擇。

toeic.example_en: He spends his weekend afternoons reading colorful comic books in his bedroom.
toeic.example_zh: 他週末下午都在臥室裡看色彩繽紛的漫畫書。

toeic.example_en: You can use a small calculator for the math homework on page eight.
toeic.example_zh: 你可以用小計算機做第八頁的數學作業。

toeic.example_en: We used a compass in math class to draw a perfect round circle.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在數學課上用圓規畫了一個完美的圓圈。

toeic.example_en: She keeps two pens and three pencils inside her small pink pencil case.
toeic.example_zh: 她在她的小粉紅色鉛筆盒裡放了兩支筆和三支鉛筆。

toeic.example_en: My pencil sharpener is broken so I cannot make my pencil sharp.
toeic.example_zh: 我的削鉛筆器壞了，所以我沒辦法把鉛筆削尖。

toeic.example_en: Please take a clean piece of paper and write the date on top.
toeic.example_zh: 請拿一張乾淨的紙，並在最上方寫下日期。

toeic.example_en: Our teacher gives a small sticker to every student with a perfect score.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的老師會給每個拿到滿分的學生一張小貼紙。

toeic.example_en: Young children learn the English alphabet by singing a fun simple song.
toeic.example_zh: 小孩子透過唱一首有趣簡單的歌來學習英文字母表。

toeic.example_en: The English word banana has three short and clear syllables in total.
toeic.example_zh: 英文單字 banana 共有三個短而清楚的音節。

toeic.example_en: A noun is a word that names a person, a place, or a thing.
toeic.example_zh: 名詞是用來指稱人、地點或事物的詞。

toeic.example_en: Every English sentence should have at least one clear verb inside it.
toeic.example_zh: 每個英文句子裡都應該至少有一個清楚的動詞。

toeic.example_en: An adjective like happy or small tells us more about a noun.
toeic.example_zh: 像 happy 或 small 這樣的形容詞會告訴我們更多關於名詞的訊息。

toeic.example_en: Young children learn simple addition with small blocks in their math class.
toeic.example_zh: 小孩子在數學課上用小積木學習簡單的加法。

toeic.example_en: Subtraction means taking some away, like five minus two equals three.
toeic.example_zh: 減法的意思就是拿掉一些，例如五減二等於三。

toeic.example_en: We learned a simple multiplication table for the number two this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今天早上學了二的簡單乘法表。

toeic.example_en: Division is when you share a number into many equal smaller parts.
toeic.example_zh: 除法就是把一個數字分成許多相等的較小部分。

toeic.example_en: We learned the names of every shape in our math class on Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們週一在數學課上學了每個形狀的名稱。

toeic.example_en: A triangle has three straight sides and three points on the outside.
toeic.example_zh: 三角形有三條直邊和三個外角。

toeic.example_en: A square has four equal sides and four right angles on the inside.
toeic.example_zh: 正方形有四條相等的邊和四個直角。

toeic.example_en: A rectangle has two longer sides and two shorter sides equal in pairs.
toeic.example_zh: 長方形有兩條較長的邊和兩條較短的邊，兩兩成對相等。

toeic.example_en: Put a small dot at the end of each sentence to finish it.
toeic.example_zh: 在每個句子結尾處放一個小點作為結束。

toeic.example_en: The new experiment kit comes with many small bottles and a tiny magnet.
toeic.example_zh: 這個新的實驗工具組附有許多小瓶子和一個小磁鐵。

toeic.example_en: Our class drew a big poster about saving water for the school hallway.
toeic.example_zh: 我們班為學校走廊畫了一張關於節約用水的大海報。

toeic.example_en: I will bring my favorite toy bear for show and tell next Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 下週一我會帶我最喜歡的玩具熊去做展示與分享。

toeic.example_en: Our teacher loves group work because students learn many new ideas from friends.
toeic.example_zh: 我們老師喜歡小組活動，因為學生能從朋友身上學到許多新想法。

toeic.example_en: Please choose a partner and read this short story together slowly aloud.
toeic.example_zh: 請選一個夥伴一起慢慢大聲讀這篇短篇故事。

toeic.example_en: Story time at the public library starts at four every Wednesday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 公立圖書館的故事時間每週三下午四點開始。

toeic.example_en: We have twenty minutes of quiet reading time before lunch every weekday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每個平日午餐前有二十分鐘的安靜閱讀時間。

toeic.example_en: I have to write a short book report about my favorite story next week.
toeic.example_zh: 我下週必須寫一份關於我最喜歡故事的短讀書心得報告。

toeic.example_en: The school office is next to the front entrance on the first floor.
toeic.example_zh: 學校辦公室在一樓正門旁邊。

toeic.example_en: All school staff helped students find their new classrooms on the first day.
toeic.example_zh: 開學第一天所有學校職員都幫學生找他們的新教室。

toeic.example_en: Please fill in this short form with your name, age and address.
toeic.example_zh: 請填寫這張短表格，包括你的姓名、年齡和地址。

toeic.example_en: Good behavior in class will make the teacher and your parents very happy.
toeic.example_zh: 在課堂上有良好的行為會讓老師和父母都很開心。

toeic.example_en: Children should always show good manners when they talk to other people.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們和別人交談時應該總是展現良好的禮貌。

toeic.example_en: She is a shy little girl but she sings beautifully in front of class.
toeic.example_zh: 她是個害羞的小女孩，但她在班上前面唱歌唱得很美。

toeic.example_en: It is brave to answer questions in English in front of the whole class.
toeic.example_zh: 在全班面前用英文回答問題是很勇敢的。

toeic.example_en: Do not be lazy with your homework if you want a better grade.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你想拿到更好的成績，就不要對作業偷懶。

toeic.example_en: He is a diligent student who reviews every lesson at home after school.
toeic.example_zh: 他是個用功的學生，每天放學後在家複習每一課。

toeic.example_en: Little children are very curious and they ask many small questions every day.
toeic.example_zh: 小孩子非常好奇，他們每天都問許多小問題。

toeic.example_en: She is a creative student who draws beautiful pictures during her free time.
toeic.example_zh: 她是個有創意的學生，會在空閒時間畫漂亮的圖。

toeic.example_en: A good dictionary is very useful for any new English language learner.
toeic.example_zh: 好的字典對任何英文新學習者都非常有用。

toeic.example_en: She has a strong interest in learning English and asks many good questions.
toeic.example_zh: 她對學英文有濃厚的興趣，問了很多好問題。

toeic.example_en: Reading every day will improve your ability to understand new English words.
toeic.example_zh: 每天閱讀會提升你理解新英文單字的能力。

toeic.example_en: Speaking clearly is an important skill for every young English language learner.
toeic.example_zh: 說話清楚是每個英文小學習者重要的一項技能。

toeic.example_en: Our music teacher has a special talent for finding songs we will love.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的音樂老師有特別的才能，能找到我們喜歡的歌曲。

toeic.example_en: If you put more effort into your homework, your score will improve.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你在作業上更努力一些，你的分數就會進步。

toeic.example_en: She made great progress in English after studying every day for one month.
toeic.example_zh: 她每天讀英文一個月後，進步非常大。

toeic.example_en: You can improve your English by reading at least one short story daily.
toeic.example_zh: 你可以每天至少讀一則短篇故事來改善你的英文。

toeic.example_en: My parents always encourage me to read English books before going to sleep.
toeic.example_zh: 我父母總是鼓勵我在睡前讀英文書。

toeic.example_en: My family will support me when I take the big English speaking test.
toeic.example_zh: 當我參加重要的英文口說測驗時，我的家人會支持我。

toeic.example_en: Please raise your right hand if you know the answer to my question.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你知道我問題的答案，請舉起你的右手。

toeic.example_en: After the morning greeting, please sit down and open your English textbook.
toeic.example_zh: 早晨問候之後，請坐下並打開你的英文課本。

toeic.example_en: Please line up quietly by the door before we walk to the gym.
toeic.example_zh: 請在門邊安靜地排隊，然後我們再走去體育館。

toeic.example_en: Please hand in your homework on my desk before the bell rings today.
toeic.example_zh: 請在今天鈴聲響起前把作業交到我的桌上。

toeic.example_en: Could you please help me hand out the worksheets to every classmate?
toeic.example_zh: 你可以幫我把學習單發給每位同學嗎？

toeic.example_en: It is helpful to take notes while the teacher is explaining a new lesson.
toeic.example_zh: 在老師講解新課程時做筆記是很有幫助的。

toeic.example_en: Please pay attention to the teacher and stop talking with your friend.
toeic.example_zh: 請專心聽老師講課，不要再跟你朋友說話。

toeic.example_en: If you do not know a word, you can look it up in the dictionary.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你不認識某個單字，可以在字典裡查它。

toeic.example_en: Please write down the new homework in your daily planner before class ends.
toeic.example_zh: 請在下課前把新作業寫在你的每日計畫本裡。

toeic.example_en: I take the yellow school bus to school every weekday at seven thirty.
toeic.example_zh: 我每個平日七點半搭黃色校車去上學。

toeic.example_en: Please keep every worksheet inside your homework folder for the entire month.
toeic.example_zh: 請把每張學習單放在你的作業夾裡，整個月都不要拿出來。

toeic.example_en: Please give the permission slip to your parents and bring it back tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 請把家長同意書交給父母，並在明天帶回來。

toeic.example_en: Our class did a fun outdoor activity at the park last sunny Friday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我們班上週五下午在公園做了一個有趣的戶外活動。

toeic.example_en: There will be a short parent meeting in our classroom next Friday evening.
toeic.example_zh: 下週五晚上我們教室會有一個簡短的家長會。

toeic.example_en: He gave a short speech about kindness at the morning meeting today.
toeic.example_zh: 他今天在早會上做了一個關於善良的短演講。

toeic.example_en: Our class will sing a happy English song on the stage next Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們班下週五將在舞台上唱一首歡樂的英文歌。

toeic.example_en: We need to rehearse the school song one more time before the show.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要在表演前再排練校歌一次。

toeic.example_en: I got the main role in our class play about a brave little boy.
toeic.example_zh: 我在我們班關於一個勇敢小男孩的戲裡得到了主角。

toeic.example_en: My mother made me a simple paper costume for the school drama show.
toeic.example_zh: 我媽媽為學校的戲劇表演幫我做了一件簡單的紙服裝。

toeic.example_en: There was loud applause after our small class finished the English song.
toeic.example_zh: 我們小班唱完英文歌之後響起了熱烈的掌聲。

toeic.example_en: All students must attend the morning meeting every weekday at our school.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們學校所有學生每個平日都必須參加早會。

toeic.example_en: Our school will celebrate its tenth birthday with a small party next week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們學校下週將以一個小派對慶祝建校十週年。

toeic.example_en: We will decorate the classroom with paper flowers for the spring festival.
toeic.example_zh: 我們會用紙花裝飾教室來慶祝春天的節日。

toeic.example_en: Every student learns the school song during the first week of class.
toeic.example_zh: 每位學生在開學第一週都會學校歌。

toeic.example_en: Books give us new knowledge about the world and many different cultures.
toeic.example_zh: 書本給我們關於世界和許多不同文化的新知識。

toeic.example_en: Please share your idea about the story with your partner in two minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 請在兩分鐘內和你的夥伴分享你對這個故事的想法。

toeic.example_en: I would like to hear your opinion about the new English picture book.
toeic.example_zh: 我想聽聽你對這本新英文圖畫書的意見。

toeic.example_en: Can you give me an example sentence with the new word from class?
toeic.example_zh: 你能給我一個用課堂上新單字造的例句嗎？

toeic.example_en: Please tell me one good reason why you like this short story best.
toeic.example_zh: 請告訴我一個你最喜歡這個短篇故事的好理由。

toeic.example_en: Do not worry about a small mistake because we all learn from mistakes.
toeic.example_zh: 不要為小錯誤擔心，因為我們都從錯誤中學習。

toeic.example_en: Do not be afraid to fail because every mistake helps you learn more.
toeic.example_zh: 不要害怕失敗，因為每個錯誤都能讓你學到更多。

toeic.example_en: If you keep trying every day, you will succeed at learning English well.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你每天持續努力，你一定能成功把英文學好。

toeic.example_en: The new school year begins in September and ends in June every time.
toeic.example_zh: 新學年總是在九月開始，六月結束。

toeic.example_en: She is at the same grade level as her older cousin from next door.
toeic.example_zh: 她和隔壁鄰居的表姐在同一個年級。

toeic.example_en: We have a big party at school year-end to thank every kind teacher.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在學年末有個大派對，感謝每一位親切的老師。

toeic.example_en: Please clean the blackboard eraser outside before the next class begins.
toeic.example_zh: 請在下節課開始前到外面清理板擦。

toeic.example_en: In art class today, we painted a colorful picture of a big tree.
toeic.example_zh: 今天的美術課上，我們畫了一棵色彩繽紛的大樹。

toeic.example_en: We sang a new English song during music class this Thursday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 這週四早上的音樂課上我們唱了一首新的英文歌。

toeic.example_en: In PE class today, we played a fun running game on the playground.
toeic.example_zh: 今天的體育課上，我們在操場上玩了一個有趣的賽跑遊戲。

toeic.example_en: Please read aloud the first paragraph slowly so we can hear every word.
toeic.example_zh: 請慢慢大聲朗讀第一段，讓我們聽清楚每個字。

toeic.example_en: Our school festival next month will have games, music, and many food stands.
toeic.example_zh: 下個月的校慶會有遊戲、音樂和許多美食攤位。

toeic.example_en: She hung her art piece on the classroom wall for everyone to see.
toeic.example_zh: 她把她的美術作品掛在教室牆上讓大家觀賞。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 校外旅遊；校外教學
toeic.example_en: Our school trip next week will go to a small farm in the countryside.
toeic.example_zh: 我們下週的校外旅遊要去鄉下的一個小農場。

toeic.example_en: My boss is very kind and helps new employees.
toeic.example_zh: 我的老闆人很好,會幫助新員工。

toeic.example_en: I love my new job at the small tech company.
toeic.example_zh: 我喜歡在這家小科技公司的新工作。

toeic.example_en: I usually work from nine in the morning until five.
toeic.example_zh: 我通常從早上九點工作到五點。

toeic.example_en: My first task today is to read the welcome guide.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天的第一個任務是讀歡迎指南。

toeic.example_en: The manager will show me around the office today.
toeic.example_zh: 經理今天會帶我參觀辦公室。

toeic.example_en: Every worker gets a free coffee each morning here.
toeic.example_zh: 這裡每位員工每天早上都能拿到一杯免費咖啡。

toeic.example_en: Our company makes simple games for mobile phones.
toeic.example_zh: 我們公司做手機上的簡單遊戲。

toeic.example_en: I got a new computer on my first day at work.
toeic.example_zh: 我上班的第一天就拿到了一台新電腦。

toeic.example_en: The printer is broken so please use the other one.
toeic.example_zh: 印表機壞了,請用另一台。

toeic.example_en: The copier is in the small room next to the kitchen.
toeic.example_zh: 影印機在廚房旁邊的小房間。

toeic.example_en: Use a paperclip to keep these two pages together.
toeic.example_zh: 用迴紋針把這兩頁夾在一起。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 釘書針；用釘書機釘
toeic.example_en: Please staple these three pages before you give them in.
toeic.example_zh: 交出去之前請把這三頁釘起來。

toeic.example_en: Please file these reports in the cabinet by the wall.
toeic.example_zh: 請把這些報告歸檔到靠牆的櫃子裡。

toeic.example_en: I have a small lamp on my desk for reading.
toeic.example_zh: 我桌上有一盞小檯燈方便閱讀。

toeic.example_en: There is a big clock on the wall of our office.
toeic.example_zh: 我們辦公室的牆上有一個大時鐘。

toeic.example_en: I take a short break every two hours at work.
toeic.example_zh: 我工作時每兩小時休息一下。

toeic.example_en: We always eat lunch together at noon in the kitchen.
toeic.example_zh: 我們中午總是一起在廚房吃午餐。

toeic.example_en: Please throw food trash in the green bin only.
toeic.example_zh: 請只把食物垃圾丟進綠色垃圾桶。

toeic.example_en: The paper bin is next to my desk on the floor.
toeic.example_zh: 紙類回收桶在我桌子旁邊的地上。

toeic.example_en: The lunch room has six tables and many soft chairs.
toeic.example_zh: 午餐室有六張桌子和許多軟椅子。

toeic.example_en: I take a short break around three every afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我每天下午三點左右會休息一下。

toeic.example_en: Many people meet in the kitchen during the tea break.
toeic.example_zh: 很多人在茶歇時間會在廚房碰面。

toeic.example_en: Use your badge to open the front office door.
toeic.example_zh: 用你的識別證來開辦公室前門。

toeic.example_en: Our building has eight floors and two cafe shops.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的大樓有八層樓和兩家咖啡店。

toeic.example_en: We have a small quiet room for short personal calls.
toeic.example_zh: 我們有一個安靜的小房間可以打私人電話。

toeic.example_en: The men toilet on this floor is being cleaned now.
toeic.example_zh: 這層樓的男廁現在正在清潔。

toeic.example_en: I take a quick note during every team meeting at work.
toeic.example_zh: 我每次團隊會議都會做快速筆記。

toeic.example_en: There is a simple guide for using the office printer.
toeic.example_zh: 有一份簡單的指南教你使用辦公室印表機。

toeic.example_en: Please fill out the new hire form before you start.
toeic.example_zh: 開始上班前請填寫新員工表格。

toeic.example_en: Our morning meeting takes only fifteen minutes each day.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的晨會每天只花十五分鐘。

toeic.example_en: I have my first team meeting at nine on Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 我星期一九點有第一次團隊會議。

toeic.example_en: I start my new job on the first Monday next month.
toeic.example_zh: 我下個月第一個星期一開始新工作。

toeic.example_en: Our work day begins at nine sharp every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的工作日每天早上九點準時開始。

toeic.example_en: I try to finish all my tasks before five each day.
toeic.example_zh: 我每天盡量在五點前完成所有任務。

toeic.example_en: The end of the work day is five thirty on Fridays.
toeic.example_zh: 星期五的下班時間是五點半。

toeic.example_en: My salary is paid into my bank on the last Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 我的薪水會在每月最後一個星期五入帳。

toeic.example_en: The basic wage for new staff is fair and clear.
toeic.example_zh: 新員工的基本工資公平且明確。

toeic.example_en: I got my first paycheck two weeks after I started.
toeic.example_zh: 我上班兩週後就拿到了第一張薪水支票。

toeic.example_en: Friday is payday and many people smile in the morning.
toeic.example_zh: 星期五是發薪日,很多人早上都在笑。

toeic.example_en: The simple work lunch costs only five dollars today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天簡單的工作午餐只要五元。

toeic.example_en: The small bank near the office is open until five.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公室附近的小銀行開到五點。

toeic.example_en: Please write the date on every form before you sign.
toeic.example_zh: 簽名前請在每份表格上寫日期。

toeic.example_en: Today is my first day at this small company.
toeic.example_zh: 今天是我在這家小公司上班的第一天。

toeic.example_en: I will learn the basic tasks in the first week.
toeic.example_zh: 我會在第一週學會基本任務。

toeic.example_en: I will get my first full month of pay soon.
toeic.example_zh: 我很快就會領到第一個完整月份的薪水。

toeic.example_en: Each year, we have a big company party in summer.
toeic.example_zh: 我們公司每年夏天會辦一場大派對。

toeic.example_en: Please come to work on time every weekday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 請每個工作日早上準時上班。

toeic.example_en: My new manager is very punctual at every meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 我的新主管在每場會議都很準時。

toeic.example_en: I am the new person on the office support team.
toeic.example_zh: 我是辦公室支援團隊的新人。

toeic.example_en: My old desk had a small broken drawer on the side.
toeic.example_zh: 我舊桌子側邊有一個壞掉的小抽屜。

toeic.example_en: Our team has a small office near the back stairs.
toeic.example_zh: 我們團隊在後樓梯旁有一間小辦公室。

toeic.example_en: The big room near the lobby is for new staff classes.
toeic.example_zh: 大廳旁那間大房間是給新員工上課用的。

toeic.example_en: Please do not leave dirty cups on the kitchen table.
toeic.example_zh: 請不要把髒杯子留在廚房桌上。

toeic.example_en: Our office is a safe and friendly place for new staff.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的辦公室對新員工來說是個安全又友善的地方。

toeic.example_en: My new co-workers are very nice and helpful.
toeic.example_zh: 我的新同事很友善又樂於助人。

toeic.example_en: It was nice to meet my whole team on the first day.
toeic.example_zh: 第一天就能認識整個團隊真好。

toeic.example_en: We shake hands when we meet a new co-worker for the first time.
toeic.example_zh: 我們第一次見新同事時會握手。

toeic.example_en: My first day at the company was friendly and easy.
toeic.example_zh: 我在公司的第一天很友善又輕鬆。

toeic.example_en: Most staff wear simple clean clothes to the office.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數員工都穿乾淨簡單的衣服上班。

toeic.example_en: I bought new clothes for my first day at work.
toeic.example_zh: 我為上班第一天買了新衣服。

toeic.example_en: I wore a light blue shirt on my first work day.
toeic.example_zh: 我第一天上班穿了一件淺藍色襯衫。

toeic.example_en: Please wear closed shoes in the office for safety reasons.
toeic.example_zh: 為了安全請在辦公室穿包鞋。

toeic.example_en: I hang my coat on the hook behind the office door.
toeic.example_zh: 我把外套掛在辦公室門後的掛鉤上。

toeic.example_en: My new keyboard is quiet and easy to use all day.
toeic.example_zh: 我的新鍵盤很安靜,整天用都很方便。

toeic.example_en: The mouse for my work computer is in this small box.
toeic.example_zh: 我工作電腦的滑鼠在這個小盒子裡。

toeic.example_en: The black cable on my desk is for my computer screen.
toeic.example_zh: 我桌上的黑色線是接電腦螢幕用的。

toeic.example_en: Please plug in your computer near the small desk light.
toeic.example_zh: 請把你的電腦插在小檯燈旁的插座。

toeic.example_en: Please click the blue button to start the safety class.
toeic.example_zh: 請點擊藍色按鈕開始安全課。

toeic.example_en: Please type your full name in the first box.
toeic.example_zh: 請在第一個欄位打你的全名。

toeic.example_en: Please change your password during your first week here.
toeic.example_zh: 請在第一週更改你的密碼。

toeic.example_en: Your username will be your first name and last name.
toeic.example_zh: 你的使用者名稱會是你的名加上姓。

toeic.example_en: Your new email account is ready to use this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 你的新電子郵件帳號今天早上就能使用了。

toeic.example_en: My new co-worker showed me how to use the printer.
toeic.example_zh: 我的新同事教我怎麼用印表機。

toeic.example_en: I made a new friend on my first day at this job.
toeic.example_zh: 我在這份工作第一天就交到一位新朋友。

toeic.example_en: Our team leader is a kind person who likes coffee.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的組長是個喜歡喝咖啡的好人。

toeic.example_en: I go home by bus after the long busy work day.
toeic.example_zh: 忙碌的工作日結束後我搭公車回家。

toeic.example_en: Can you show me the way to the team lunch room?
toeic.example_zh: 你可以告訴我團隊午餐室怎麼走嗎?

toeic.example_en: The lunch room is next to the elevator on this floor.
toeic.example_zh: 午餐室在這層樓電梯旁邊。

toeic.example_en: My desk is between the wall and my team leader.
toeic.example_zh: 我的桌子在牆和我的組長之間。

toeic.example_en: Please come up to the fourth floor for the meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 請上來四樓開會。

toeic.example_en: The lunch room is down one floor from my office.
toeic.example_zh: 午餐室在我辦公室的下一層樓。

toeic.example_en: Please wait at the front of the office near the door.
toeic.example_zh: 請在辦公室前面門邊等。

toeic.example_en: Most staff have eight work hours per day with breaks.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數員工每天工作八小時並有休息時間。

toeic.example_en: My friend does shift work and starts early some weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 我朋友是輪班工作,有些週要很早開始。

toeic.example_en: Please call your boss early if you take a sick day.
toeic.example_zh: 如果要請病假請早點打給老闆。

toeic.example_en: On the first day at work, my boss showed me my desk.

toeic.example_en: Please look at this short list of simple safety rules.

toeic.example_zh: 歡迎來到我們家，請放輕鬆自在。

toeic.example_en: Their new house has a big garden for outdoor summer parties.
toeic.example_zh: 他們的新房子有個大花園可以辦戶外夏日派對。

toeic.example_zh: 她邀請我們去看她在市中心的新公寓。

toeic.example_en: We sat on the porch and chatted late into the evening.
toeic.example_zh: 我們坐在門廊上聊到深夜。

toeic.example_en: Dinner will be served on the patio if the weather is nice.
toeic.example_zh: 如果天氣好的話晚餐會在露臺上享用。

toeic.example_zh: 大家為這對幸福的夫妻說乾杯並舉起酒杯。

toeic.example_zh: 週六我們要和兩個大學好朋友去健行。

toeic.example_en: Sunday is our family day, and we usually go to the park.
toeic.example_zh: 週日是我們的家庭日，通常會去公園。

toeic.example_en: Don't forget your jacket because the night will be a bit chilly.

toeic.example_zh: 當然，我可以借你我的大桌子給客人用。

toeic.example_zh: 我們在家辦了一個小聚會慶祝新生兒。

toeic.example_en: Our weekly get-together with old friends is always fun.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每週和老朋友的聚會總是很有趣。

toeic.example_zh: 我們的高中同學會是個充滿美好回憶的美好夜晚。

toeic.example_zh: 我們辦了一個小喬遷派對來展示我們的新家。

toeic.example_zh: 她的迎嬰派對是個甜蜜的下午，有禮物和遊戲。

toeic.example_zh: 我們為搬到國外的朋友辦了告別晚餐。

toeic.example_zh: 我們為要搬到日本的朋友辦了歡送會。

toeic.example_zh: 我們邀請了兩個沒有家人的朋友來吃感恩節晚餐。

toeic.example_zh: 每個聖誕節我們都在家辦一場大型家庭聚餐。

toeic.example_zh: 我們總是和好朋友辦一個小型新年派對。

toeic.example_zh: 我們在後院和兩個家庭一起吃了復活節早午餐。

toeic.example_en: He took her to a nice restaurant for valentines day dinner.
toeic.example_zh: 他帶她去一家很棒的餐廳吃情人節晚餐。

toeic.example_en: What a thoughtful gift from my best friend on my birthday.
toeic.example_zh: 我最好朋友送的生日禮物真是體貼。

toeic.example_en: Our hosts were so generous with their time and home cooking.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的主人對我們非常慷慨大方，提供時間和家常菜。

toeic.example_en: She gave a compliment about the lovely flowers on the table.
toeic.example_zh: 她讚美了桌上美麗的花朵。

toeic.example_en: We shared sweet memories of our college days late into night.
toeic.example_zh: 我們分享大學時光的甜蜜回憶到深夜。

toeic.example_en: We had such a fun time at the small beach party.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在那場小海灘派對上度過了美好的時光。

toeic.example_en: Thank you for the good time, we really enjoyed the evening.
toeic.example_zh: 謝謝你給我們愉快的時光，我們真的很享受這個晚上。

toeic.example_en: Please check your coat pocket for the missing receipt.
toeic.example_zh: 請檢查你外套口袋找一下不見的收據。

toeic.example_en: I still owe my mother fifty dollars for the groceries.
toeic.example_zh: 我還欠媽媽五十元的雜貨錢。

toeic.example_en: What is the balance of my savings at the moment?
toeic.example_zh: 我目前儲蓄的餘額是多少？

toeic.example_en: The machine is out of order, so please try another one.
toeic.example_zh: 這台機器故障了，請使用另一台。

toeic.example_en: Please enter your four-digit PIN to continue the transaction.
toeic.example_zh: 請輸入您的四位數密碼以繼續交易。

toeic.example_en: Please fill in your name and address on this form.
toeic.example_zh: 請在這張表格上填寫您的姓名和地址。

toeic.example_en: I do not have a middle name, so leave it blank.
toeic.example_zh: 我沒有中間名，所以那欄空著就好。

toeic.example_en: The package is addressed to Mr. Smith in apartment three.
toeic.example_zh: 包裹是寄給三號公寓的史密斯先生。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 太太（已婚女性稱謂）
toeic.example_en: Mrs. Lee just signed for the registered letter at home.
toeic.example_zh: 李太太剛剛在家簽收了那封掛號信。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 女士（女性通用稱謂）
toeic.example_en: Ms. Wang opened a new savings account this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 王女士今天早上開了一個新的儲蓄帳戶。

toeic.example_en: The package is going to another country, so use airmail.
toeic.example_zh: 這個包裹要寄到另一個國家，請用航空郵件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 手機；行動的
toeic.example_en: May I have your mobile number for delivery updates?
toeic.example_zh: 可以給我您的手機號碼好通知配送進度嗎？

toeic.example_en: Your birthdate must match the one on your ID card.
toeic.example_zh: 您的出生日期必須和身分證上的一致。

toeic.example_en: Please write your age in the small box on the right.
toeic.example_zh: 請在右邊的小格子裡寫下您的年齡。

toeic.example_en: Please check the box for your gender on the form.
toeic.example_zh: 請在表格上勾選您的性別。

toeic.example_en: Check the male box if you are a man.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您是男性，請勾選男的格子。

toeic.example_en: Check the female box if you are a woman.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您是女性，請勾選女的格子。

toeic.example_en: Please show a valid ID when you cash this check.
toeic.example_zh: 您兌現這張支票時請出示有效的身分證件。

toeic.example_en: Bring your ID card to open a bank account here.
toeic.example_zh: 請攜帶身分證在這裡開戶。

toeic.example_en: Your driver's license also works as photo identification here.
toeic.example_zh: 您的駕照在這裡也可以當作有照片的身分證明。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 空白的；n. 空格
toeic.example_en: Leave that line blank if it does not apply to you.
toeic.example_zh: 如果不適用，那一行就空著別填。

toeic.example_en: Tick the boxes that apply and skip the rest.
toeic.example_zh: 在符合的格子打勾，其他的跳過。

toeic.example_en: Please print your last name so we can read it.
toeic.example_zh: 請用印刷體寫下您的姓氏，我們才看得懂。

toeic.example_en: Tie the package with string so it stays closed.
toeic.example_zh: 用繩子把包裹綁起來，這樣才不會散開。

toeic.example_en: There is a postbox right outside the train station.
toeic.example_zh: 火車站外面就有一個郵筒。

toeic.example_en: The newspaper was pushed through the letterbox this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 報紙今天早上從信箱口塞進來了。

toeic.example_en: The teller counted my money and printed a receipt.
toeic.example_zh: 櫃員把我的錢數一數，印了一張收據。

toeic.example_en: Okay, your deposit has been added to your account.
toeic.example_zh: 好的，您的存款已經加到帳戶裡了。

toeic.example_en: Yes, I would like a paper receipt for this transaction.
toeic.example_zh: 是的，這筆交易我想要紙本收據。

toeic.example_en: No, I do not have any other questions right now.
toeic.example_zh: 不，我現在沒有其他問題了。

toeic.example_en: You will get your new bank card in about a week.
toeic.example_zh: 您大約一週後會拿到新的銀行卡。

toeic.example_en: Please come back tomorrow with a copy of your ID.
toeic.example_zh: 請明天帶身分證影本再過來。

toeic.example_en: I have to go to the post office before lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 我中午前要去一趟郵局。

toeic.example_en: Fill out a deposit slip before you go to the counter.
toeic.example_zh: 去櫃台前請先填好一張存款單。

toeic.example_en: Take a withdrawal slip and write the amount you want.
toeic.example_zh: 拿一張提款單，寫下您想要的金額。

toeic.example_en: Please pick up a slip from the table by the door.
toeic.example_zh: 請從門邊的桌子拿一張單子。

toeic.example_en: I would like to cash a check today, please.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天想兌現一張支票，麻煩您了。

toeic.example_en: Please bring your passbook when you visit the bank.
toeic.example_zh: 您來銀行時請帶上存摺。

toeic.example_en: Your passbook keeps a record of every transaction.
toeic.example_zh: 您的存摺會記錄每一筆交易。

toeic.example_en: The amount due on this bill is fifty dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 這張帳單應付金額是五十元。

toeic.example_en: Pay before Monday to avoid the late fee.
toeic.example_zh: 週一前付款才不會被收滯納金。

toeic.example_en: An extra stamp is needed if the letter is heavy.
toeic.example_zh: 如果信件太重，需要再多貼一張郵票。

toeic.example_en: Express mail will arrive within one day.
toeic.example_zh: 快遞郵件一天內就會送達。

toeic.example_en: Regular mail is cheaper but a little bit slower.
toeic.example_zh: 普通郵件比較便宜，但有點慢。

toeic.example_en: Send the letter by airmail to reach Europe quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 用航空郵件寄信，才會快點到歐洲。

toeic.example_en: Please send this contract by registered mail for safety.
toeic.example_zh: 為了安全，這份合約請用掛號信寄出。

toeic.example_en: Add tracking so we can see where the package is.
toeic.example_zh: 加上追蹤，我們才能看到包裹在哪裡。

toeic.example_en: Mark the box as fragile because there is glass inside.
toeic.example_zh: 請在盒子上標示易碎，因為裡面是玻璃。

toeic.example_en: When I opened the box, the cup inside was broken.
toeic.example_zh: 我打開盒子時，裡面的杯子已經破了。

toeic.example_en: Please open up the package and check the contents.
toeic.example_zh: 請打開包裹檢查裡面的東西。

toeic.example_en: This letter is from my cousin in another country.
toeic.example_zh: 這封信是我在外國的表親寄來的。

toeic.example_en: I am mailing this package to my friend in Taipei.
toeic.example_zh: 我把這個包裹寄給我台北的朋友。

toeic.example_en: Send the documents via airmail to save time.
toeic.example_zh: 為了省時間，請用航空郵件寄這些文件。

toeic.example_en: Someone must sign for the registered letter at the door.
toeic.example_zh: 掛號信必須要有人在門口簽收。

toeic.example_en: You must come in person to open a new account.
toeic.example_zh: 您必須本人親自前來才能開戶。

toeic.example_en: Please bring your appointment slip to the third floor.
toeic.example_zh: 請帶著您的預約單到三樓。

toeic.example_en: The main office is downtown next to the train station.
toeic.example_zh: 總公司在市中心火車站旁邊。

toeic.example_en: I would like to open an account for my daughter today.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天想為我女兒開一個帳戶。

toeic.example_en: I need to close an account before I move overseas.
toeic.example_zh: 我搬出國前需要關掉一個帳戶。

toeic.example_en: The rate on this account is two percent per year.
toeic.example_zh: 這個帳戶的利率是每年百分之二。

toeic.example_en: You earn two percent interest every year on your savings.
toeic.example_zh: 您的儲蓄每年可以拿到百分之二的利息。

toeic.example_en: I have a few cents left in my piggy bank.
toeic.example_zh: 我撲滿裡剩幾分錢。

toeic.example_en: I need to change some money into euros before traveling.
toeic.example_zh: 我旅行前要把一些錢換成歐元。

toeic.example_en: How many yen can I get for one hundred dollars?
toeic.example_zh: 一百元可以換多少日圓？

toeic.example_en: Each country has its own currency and bank rules.
toeic.example_zh: 每個國家都有自己的貨幣和銀行規則。

toeic.example_en: Where can I exchange money near the airport here?
toeic.example_zh: 這附近機場哪裡可以兌換貨幣？

toeic.example_en: Please convert this amount into Japanese yen for me.
toeic.example_zh: 請把這筆金額幫我換成日圓。

toeic.example_en: What is today's rate for changing dollars into yen?
toeic.example_zh: 今天美元換日圓的匯率是多少？

toeic.example_en: There is a minimum deposit to open this account.
toeic.example_zh: 開立這個帳戶有最低存款限制。

toeic.example_en: Your account balance is low this month, please be careful.
toeic.example_zh: 您這個月帳戶餘額很低，請小心。

toeic.example_en: The interest rate is not very high this year.
toeic.example_zh: 今年的利率不是很高。

toeic.example_en: I want to put more money into my savings account.
toeic.example_zh: 我想存更多錢到我的儲蓄帳戶裡。

toeic.example_en: Please send less mail because shipping has become so expensive.
toeic.example_zh: 請少寄一些信件，因為運費變得很貴。

toeic.example_en: Do I have enough money in my account to pay this?
toeic.example_zh: 我帳戶裡的錢夠付這筆嗎？

toeic.example_en: The date should go at the top of the page.
toeic.example_zh: 日期應該寫在頁面的最上方。

toeic.example_en: Add your signature at the bottom of the form.
toeic.example_zh: 請在表格下方簽名。

toeic.example_en: Write your home phone above your signature here.
toeic.example_zh: 請在這裡簽名上方寫下您的家用電話。

toeic.example_en: Please sign below to confirm your name and address.
toeic.example_zh: 請在下面簽名以確認您的姓名和地址。

toeic.example_en: There is a small gift inside the package for you.
toeic.example_zh: 包裹裡面有一個給你的小禮物。

toeic.example_en: Write the address clearly on the outside of the box.
toeic.example_zh: 請在盒子外面清楚寫下地址。

toeic.example_en: The ATM is just around the corner from here.
toeic.example_zh: 提款機就在這裡的轉角。

toeic.example_en: Go straight ahead for two blocks to find the bank.
toeic.example_zh: 直走過兩個街區就會看到銀行。

toeic.example_en: I just need a quick visit to the ATM.
toeic.example_zh: 我只是要快速去一趟提款機。

toeic.example_en: Please report a lost card to the bank immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 卡片遺失請立刻通報銀行。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 找到（find 的過去式）
toeic.example_en: I finally found my missing card under the sofa.
toeic.example_zh: 我終於在沙發底下找到我不見的卡片。

toeic.example_en: Some pages in the form are missing, can you reprint?
toeic.example_zh: 表格少了幾頁，可以再印一份嗎？

toeic.example_en: Call the bank right away if your card is stolen.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您的卡片被偷了請立刻打電話給銀行。

toeic.example_en: The police can help if your mailbox is broken.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您的信箱被弄壞了，警察可以幫忙。

toeic.example_en: Please double-check the address before sealing the envelope.
toeic.example_zh: 封信前請再次確認地址。

toeic.example_en: Please enter your PIN again to confirm the transaction.
toeic.example_zh: 請再輸入一次密碼以確認交易。

toeic.example_en: The ATM is out of order today, please use another one.
toeic.example_zh: 今天提款機故障，請使用另一台。

toeic.example_en: The bank offers free service to all student account holders.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行提供免費服務給所有學生帳戶持有人。

toeic.example_en: Please step forward when the screen shows your number.
toeic.example_zh: 螢幕顯示您的號碼時請向前走。

toeic.example_en: The ATMs are on the ground floor near the cafe.
toeic.example_zh: 提款機在一樓咖啡廳旁邊。

toeic.example_en: The restroom is at the end of the hallway.
toeic.example_zh: 洗手間在走廊的盡頭。

toeic.example_en: Please add the client meeting to your calendar app so we can all see the time slot.
toeic.example_zh: 請將客戶會議加入你的行事曆應用程式，這樣大家都能看到時段。

toeic.example_en: We have a recurring meeting every Tuesday morning to review the project status.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每週二早上有一場定期會議來檢視專案狀態。

toeic.example_en: Please pick a time slot that works for everyone on the team.
toeic.example_zh: 請挑選一個團隊所有人都方便的時段。

toeic.example_en: Could you share your availability for next week so I can book a room?
toeic.example_zh: 可以告訴我你下週的空檔嗎？這樣我才能訂會議室。

toeic.example_en: I made a booking for the large conference room from two to four.
toeic.example_zh: 我預訂了大會議室從兩點到四點。

toeic.example_en: I received a reschedule request from the client because of a conflict.
toeic.example_zh: 因為時間衝突，我收到客戶的改期請求。

toeic.example_en: Did you accept the meeting invite I sent for tomorrow afternoon?
toeic.example_zh: 你接受我為明天下午發出的會議邀請了嗎？

toeic.example_en: I had to decline the meeting because it overlaps with another call.
toeic.example_zh: 我只好婉拒這場會議，因為時間和另一通電話重疊。

toeic.example_en: She sent a tentative reply because her flight time is not confirmed.
toeic.example_zh: 她給了暫定回覆，因為班機時間還沒確定。

toeic.example_en: Only half the team showed up for the optional training session.
toeic.example_zh: 選修訓練課只有一半的同事出席。

toeic.example_en: I am running late for the call because the previous meeting overran.
toeic.example_zh: 因為前一場會議超時，我這通電話會遲到。

toeic.example_en: Our morning stand-up tends to overrun whenever we discuss blockers.
toeic.example_zh: 每次我們討論卡點時，早上的站立會議都容易超時。

toeic.example_en: I will send a wrap-up email after the workshop with all the key points.
toeic.example_zh: 工作坊結束後我會寄一封結尾總結信，附上重點。

toeic.example_en: Let me recap what we discussed before we move to the next topic.
toeic.example_zh: 在進入下一個主題前，讓我先重點回顧一下剛剛討論的內容。

toeic.example_en: I have a draft email ready for your review before I send it to the client.
toeic.example_zh: 我準備好一封電子郵件草稿，寄給客戶前請你過目。

toeic.example_en: Could you proofread my email before I send it to the entire department?
toeic.example_zh: 在我寄給整個部門之前，可以幫我校對一下信件嗎？

toeic.example_en: There is a small typo in the subject line of your last email.
toeic.example_zh: 你上一封電子郵件的主旨欄有一個小錯字。

toeic.example_en: A clear subject line helps the recipient understand the purpose right away.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚的信件主旨能讓收件者立刻明白寄信目的。

toeic.example_en: Please double-check the recipient list before clicking send.
toeic.example_zh: 按下傳送前請再次確認收件人名單。

toeic.example_en: I added the team leads to the cc list for visibility.
toeic.example_zh: 為了讓大家掌握情況，我把組長加進副本名單。

toeic.example_en: Please do not reply all unless your message is useful for the whole group.
toeic.example_zh: 除非你的訊息對整組都有用，請不要按全部回覆。

toeic.example_en: I will attach the latest version of the slides to my next email.
toeic.example_zh: 我會在下一封信附加最新版本的投影片。

toeic.example_en: The newsletter has an embedded image of last week's team event.
toeic.example_zh: 電子報內附有上週團隊活動的內嵌圖片。

toeic.example_en: Please update your signature line with the new office address.
toeic.example_zh: 請把簽名檔更新成新的辦公室地址。

toeic.example_en: Use a friendly salutation line when writing to long-term clients.
toeic.example_zh: 寫信給長期客戶時請使用親切的開頭問候語。

toeic.example_en: I sent a polite reminder about the unpaid invoice this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我今早寄了一封委婉提醒，關於未付的請款單。

toeic.example_en: I will give the vendor a gentle nudge if I do not hear back by Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 如果週五前還沒收到回覆，我會輕輕提醒廠商一下。

toeic.example_en: As discussed in our call, I am sending the revised timeline.
toeic.example_zh: 如先前通話所討論，我寄上修改後的時程表。

toeic.example_en: Per our conversation yesterday, please find the updated pricing attached.
toeic.example_zh: 依昨天的對話，請查收附件中的最新報價。

toeic.example_en: Kindly confirm receipt of the documents at your earliest convenience.
toeic.example_zh: 麻煩您方便時確認已收到文件。

toeic.example_en: Please reply at your earliest convenience so we can move forward.
toeic.example_zh: 請在您方便時盡早回覆，我們才能繼續推進。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 此致敬意（信件結尾）
toeic.example_en: Most of my external emails end with best regards and my full name.
toeic.example_zh: 我大部分對外的信件都以此致敬意和完整姓名結尾。

toeic.example_en: I usually sign formal letters with sincerely followed by my title.
toeic.example_zh: 我通常在正式信件結尾用敬上，接著寫上職稱。

toeic.example_en: Looking forward to your feedback on the proposal by Thursday.
toeic.example_zh: 期待您在週四前針對提案給予回饋。

toeic.example_en: Noted with thanks; I will update the file accordingly this afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 已收到，謝謝；我今天下午會依此更新檔案。

toeic.example_en: My office hours are nine to six, Monday through Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 我的辦公時間是週一到週五，早上九點到下午六點。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不在辦公室自動回覆
toeic.example_en: Please set an out-of-office reply before you start your vacation.
toeic.example_zh: 請在休假開始前設定不在辦公室自動回覆。

toeic.example_en: The auto-responder will let people know I am away until next Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 自動回信會告訴大家我下週一才會回來。

toeic.example_en: I try to reach inbox zero every Friday before the weekend.
