toeic.example_zh: 我會盡量在每週五週末前讓收件匣清空。

toeic.example_en: I set up a filter so newsletters skip the inbox and go to a folder.
toeic.example_zh: 我設了一個篩選器，讓電子報跳過收件匣，直接進資料夾。

toeic.example_en: Please archive old emails instead of deleting them to keep a record.
toeic.example_zh: 請封存舊信件而不要刪除，以便留下紀錄。

toeic.example_en: I will flag the email so I remember to follow up next week.
toeic.example_zh: 我會把這封信標記為重要，下週才記得跟進。

toeic.example_en: Most of the promotional offers end up in my junk mail.
toeic.example_zh: 大部分促銷訊息都進到我的垃圾信。

toeic.example_en: We added a newsletter sign-up form to the bottom of the homepage.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在首頁底部加了一個電子報訂閱表單。

toeic.example_en: Every promotional email must include an unsubscribe link by law.
toeic.example_zh: 依法律規定，每封促銷信都必須附上取消訂閱連結。

toeic.example_en: We need to order more office supplies before they run out next week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們得在下週用完前再訂一些辦公用品。

toeic.example_en: The stationery cabinet is on the left side of the copy room.
toeic.example_zh: 文具櫃在影印室的左邊。

toeic.example_en: I left the printed handouts on the table in the copy room.
toeic.example_zh: 我把印好的講義放在影印室的桌上。

toeic.example_en: I cannot print the report because of a printer jam on the third floor.
toeic.example_zh: 因為三樓印表機卡紙，我沒辦法列印報告。

toeic.example_en: The toner cartridge is running low; please order a replacement.
toeic.example_zh: 碳粉匣快用完了，請訂購替換品。

toeic.example_en: Please use the scanner in the lobby to digitize the signed contract.
toeic.example_zh: 請用大廳的掃描器把已簽署的合約掃成電子檔。

toeic.example_en: Always use the shredder for documents that contain personal data.
toeic.example_zh: 含有個資的文件一定要用碎紙機處理。

toeic.example_en: The signed agreements are kept in the locked filing cabinet by the window.
toeic.example_zh: 已簽署的協議放在窗邊上鎖的檔案櫃裡。

toeic.example_en: I left the approval forms in your in-tray this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我今早把核准表單放在你的待處理文件盒裡。

toeic.example_en: Once you sign the form, please drop it in the out-tray.
toeic.example_zh: 簽完表單後，請丟進已處理文件盒。

toeic.example_en: I left a sticky note on your monitor with the new phone number.
toeic.example_zh: 我在你的螢幕上留了一張便利貼，寫了新電話號碼。

toeic.example_en: Could you pass me a yellow highlighter from the supply drawer?
toeic.example_zh: 可以從用品抽屜遞給我一支黃色螢光筆嗎？

toeic.example_en: All the training materials are organized in the blue binder.
toeic.example_zh: 所有訓練教材都整理在那個藍色活頁夾裡。

toeic.example_en: Please follow the team folder structure when saving shared files.
toeic.example_zh: 儲存共用檔案時請依照團隊的資料夾結構。

toeic.example_en: All meeting notes are uploaded to the team shared drive every Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 所有會議紀錄每週五都會上傳到團隊共用磁碟。

toeic.example_en: We use cloud storage so that the team can access files from anywhere.
toeic.example_zh: 我們使用雲端儲存，這樣團隊隨處都能存取檔案。

toeic.example_en: Please follow the file naming convention so we can search later.
toeic.example_zh: 請依照檔案命名慣例，這樣日後才能搜尋。

toeic.example_en: Check the version history if you need to restore an earlier draft.
toeic.example_zh: 如果需要還原早期草稿，可以查看版本歷史。

toeic.example_en: Please turn on track changes when editing the contract draft.
toeic.example_zh: 編輯合約草稿時請開啟追蹤修訂功能。

toeic.example_en: I left some questions in the comments thread of the shared document.
toeic.example_zh: 我在共用文件的留言串裡留了幾個問題。

toeic.example_en: Three of us will co-edit the presentation in real time tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 我們三人明天會即時共同編輯這份簡報。

toeic.example_en: Interns are given view-only access to the budget spreadsheet.
toeic.example_zh: 實習生對預算試算表只擁有唯讀權限。

toeic.example_en: Please grant edit permission to the new team member by tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 請在明天前給新團隊成員編輯權限。

toeic.example_en: You need to log in with your company account to view the dashboard.
toeic.example_zh: 你必須用公司帳號登入才能查看儀表板。

toeic.example_en: Always log out of the shared computer before leaving the desk.
toeic.example_zh: 離開座位前，記得登出共用電腦。

toeic.example_en: I had to request a password reset because I forgot my login.
toeic.example_zh: 因為忘記登入密碼，我必須申請密碼重設。

toeic.example_en: Please lock your screen whenever you step away from your desk.
toeic.example_zh: 離開座位時請務必鎖定螢幕。

toeic.example_en: Our office building has twelve floors and two main entrances.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的辦公大樓有十二層樓和兩個主要入口。

toeic.example_en: Visitors should sign in at the front desk in the lobby.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客必須在大廳的櫃台簽到。

toeic.example_en: Please leave the package at the front desk for the courier.
toeic.example_zh: 請把包裹放在接待櫃台給快遞收。

toeic.example_en: In case of fire, use the stairwell rather than the elevator.
toeic.example_zh: 發生火災時請使用樓梯間，不要搭電梯。

toeic.example_en: Coffee and snacks are available in the pantry on each floor.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓的茶水間都備有咖啡和點心。

toeic.example_en: Let us continue this chat over coffee in the break room.
toeic.example_zh: 我們去休息室喝杯咖啡，繼續聊吧。

toeic.example_en: My cubicle is right next to the window on the south side.
toeic.example_zh: 我的隔間辦公位就在南側窗戶旁邊。

toeic.example_en: Each workstation comes with a docking station and two monitors.
toeic.example_zh: 每個工作站都配備擴充座和兩個螢幕。

toeic.example_en: If I am not at my desk phone, my calls forward to my mobile.
toeic.example_zh: 如果我不在桌上電話旁，來電會轉到我的手機。

toeic.example_en: Please wear a headset on calls so the audio stays clear.
toeic.example_zh: 通話時請戴上耳機麥克風，這樣聲音才會清楚。

toeic.example_en: Could you turn on your webcam so we can see your face?
toeic.example_zh: 可以打開你的視訊鏡頭嗎？這樣我們才看得到你的臉。

toeic.example_en: Please unmute yourself when it is your turn to speak.
toeic.example_zh: 輪到你發言時請取消靜音。

toeic.example_en: There is a lot of background noise on your end; please mute when not speaking.
toeic.example_zh: 你那邊背景雜音很大，沒講話時請靜音。

toeic.example_en: We had an audio glitch right at the start of the keynote.
toeic.example_zh: 主題演講一開始就發生了聲音卡頓。

toeic.example_en: Sorry, I dropped off due to a connection issue from my side.
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，因為我這邊有連線問題斷線了。

toeic.example_en: I keep dropping off the call because the wifi here is unstable.
toeic.example_zh: 這裡的無線網路不穩，我一直從通話中斷線。

toeic.example_en: Click the link in the invite to join the call at three sharp.
toeic.example_zh: 三點整請按邀請信中的連結加入通話。

toeic.example_en: I need to leave the call early to catch my next meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 我得提早離開通話，去趕下一場會議。

toeic.example_en: Please raise hand in the app if you have a question for the speaker.
toeic.example_zh: 如果想向講者提問，請在會議軟體中舉手。

toeic.example_en: Feel free to drop your questions in the chat box during the demo.
toeic.example_zh: 示範期間，歡迎將問題打在聊天視窗中。

toeic.example_en: She sent me a private message about the budget right before the call.
toeic.example_zh: 她在通話開始前用私訊跟我提到預算的事。

toeic.example_en: I posted the updated schedule in our project group chat.
toeic.example_zh: 我把更新後的時程貼在專案群組聊天裡。

toeic.example_en: Every Friday I send a one-page progress report to my manager.
toeic.example_zh: 每週五我都會寄一頁進度報告給主管。

toeic.example_en: I start each morning by reviewing my to-do list with coffee.
toeic.example_zh: 我每天早上會邊喝咖啡邊看待辦清單。

toeic.example_en: The shared task list shows who is responsible for each item.
toeic.example_zh: 共用的任務清單顯示每項工作的負責人。

toeic.example_en: Use the onboarding checklist so you do not miss any setup steps.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用新人報到檢查清單，這樣才不會漏掉設定步驟。

toeic.example_en: Let us reorder the priority list before next week's sprint.
toeic.example_zh: 下週衝刺開始前，我們先重新排優先順序清單。

toeic.example_en: The due date for the expense report is the fifth of every month.
toeic.example_zh: 費用報告的到期日是每個月的五號。

toeic.example_en: The typical turnaround time for IT requests is two business days.
toeic.example_zh: 資訊部請求的一般處理時間是兩個工作日。

toeic.example_en: Please allow three business days for the bank transfer to clear.
toeic.example_zh: 請預留三個工作日讓銀行轉帳完成入帳。

toeic.example_en: Try to keep client calls within standard working hours when possible.
toeic.example_zh: 盡量在標準上班時間內安排客戶通話。

toeic.example_en: I usually do not check email after hours unless something is urgent.
toeic.example_zh: 除非急事，我通常下班後不會看電子郵件。

toeic.example_en: I take my lunch break around noon, away from my desk.
toeic.example_zh: 我中午左右會離開座位去休午休時間。

toeic.example_en: Let us continue the discussion after a short coffee break.
toeic.example_zh: 我們先短暫喝咖啡的休息一下，再繼續討論。

toeic.example_en: Our daily stand-up meeting lasts fifteen minutes and never longer.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每天的站立會議只有十五分鐘，絕不超時。

toeic.example_en: We schedule a weekly sync to align on priorities and blockers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們安排每週同步會議來對齊優先事項與卡點。

toeic.example_en: The product team holds a biweekly meeting with engineering leads.
toeic.example_zh: 產品團隊每兩週一次和工程主管開會。

toeic.example_en: Our monthly review covers numbers, risks, and upcoming launches.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的月度檢討會討論數字、風險和即將推出的項目。

toeic.example_en: Each quarterly review ends with a list of goals for the next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 每次季度檢討結束時都會列出下季度的目標。

toeic.example_en: Annual planning kicks off every November for the following year.
toeic.example_zh: 年度規劃每年十一月啟動，為下一年做準備。

toeic.example_en: Use the app on your phone to make a meeting room booking quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 用手機上的應用程式可以快速完成會議室預訂。

toeic.example_en: Sorry, there is a double booking; could we move to a smaller room?
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，這裡有重複預訂，我們可以改到小一點的會議室嗎？

toeic.example_en: Please check the room capacity before inviting everyone to the meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 在邀請大家參加會議前，請先確認會議室容量。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 電話亭（辦公室小型隔間）
toeic.example_en: I will take this call in the phone booth so I do not disturb the team.
toeic.example_zh: 我會到電話亭接這通電話，以免打擾團隊。

toeic.example_en: Our open office layout makes it easy to chat with anyone quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的開放式辦公室空間讓大家方便快速交談。

toeic.example_en: Only directors and above have a private office in this building.
toeic.example_zh: 這棟大樓只有總監以上的同事才有獨立辦公室。

toeic.example_en: Please update the name plate outside the office after the move.
toeic.example_zh: 搬遷後請更新辦公室外的名牌。

toeic.example_en: All visitors must wear a visitor badge while inside the building.
toeic.example_zh: 所有訪客進入大樓時都必須配戴訪客證。

toeic.example_en: Use your swipe card to open the door to the executive floor.
toeic.example_zh: 用你的感應卡開啟通往主管樓層的門。

toeic.example_en: Bring your key fob with you when you go to the underground parking.
toeic.example_zh: 前往地下停車場時請帶著感應鑰匙。

toeic.example_en: If you forget your ID badge, the front desk can issue a temporary one.
toeic.example_zh: 如果忘記帶員工識別證，櫃台可以發臨時證。

toeic.example_en: There is a quick security check at the entrance every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上入口處都有快速的安全檢查。

toeic.example_en: Please write your name on a name tag at the registration table.
toeic.example_zh: 請在報到桌寫好你的名牌貼紙。

toeic.example_en: We will do a quick team intro before the workshop starts.
toeic.example_zh: 工作坊開始前我們先快速做一輪團隊介紹。

toeic.example_en: Let us go around the table and share one win from this week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們繞著桌子輪流發言，分享這週的一件好事。

toeic.example_en: The leadership team held a round-table discussion on customer feedback.
toeic.example_zh: 領導團隊針對客戶回饋舉行了一場圓桌討論。

toeic.example_en: Let us agree on a few ground rules to keep the workshop productive.
toeic.example_zh: 我們先約定幾條基本規則，讓工作坊保持有效率。

toeic.example_en: Can I get a show of hands from those who prefer the morning slot?
toeic.example_zh: 想選早上時段的人可以舉手表決一下嗎？

toeic.example_en: We will vote on the venue once everyone has shared their thoughts.
toeic.example_zh: 等大家都分享過想法後，我們就投票決定場地。

toeic.example_en: The team gave a strong show of support for the new working policy.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊對新的工作政策表達了強烈支持。

toeic.example_en: We will start the offsite with a short ice breaker game in pairs.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將以兩人一組的短破冰遊戲開始這次外出活動。

toeic.example_en: A simple warm-up activity helps everyone feel comfortable speaking.
toeic.example_zh: 簡單的暖身活動有助於讓大家放開心發言。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 便利貼討論工作坊
toeic.example_en: We ran a sticky session to gather ideas from every team member.
toeic.example_zh: 我們進行了便利貼討論工作坊來蒐集每位團員的想法。

toeic.example_en: Let me draw the timeline on the white board so everyone can see it.
toeic.example_zh: 我把時程畫在白板上，大家都能看到。

toeic.example_en: Please write the action items on the flip chart at the front.
toeic.example_zh: 請把行動項目寫在前面的大型翻頁紙板上。

toeic.example_en: Can someone bring a marker pen and an eraser from the supply room?
toeic.example_zh: 誰可以從用品室帶一支麥克筆和板擦過來？

toeic.example_en: The projector is connected; just plug your laptop into the cable.
toeic.example_zh: 投影機已接好，把筆電插上線就可以了。

toeic.example_en: Could you grab the remote presenter from the cabinet, please?
toeic.example_zh: 你可以從櫃子裡拿一下簡報遙控器嗎？

toeic.example_en: The HDMI cable in this room is loose; please push it in firmly.
toeic.example_zh: 這個房間的 HDMI 線有點鬆，請用力插進去。

toeic.example_en: Let us do a quick tech check ten minutes before the webinar.
toeic.example_zh: 網路研討會開始前十分鐘，我們先做一下設備測試。

toeic.example_en: We scheduled a dry run rehearsal so the speakers feel ready.
toeic.example_zh: 我們安排了一次預演，讓講者感到準備充足。

toeic.example_en: I added slide notes for each section so anyone can present it.
toeic.example_zh: 我為每一段加了投影片備註，任何人都能上台簡報。

toeic.example_en: Use the laser pointer to highlight the figures on the chart.
toeic.example_zh: 請用雷射指示棒指出圖表上的數字。

toeic.example_en: I will share screen now and walk you through the document.
toeic.example_zh: 我現在分享螢幕，帶你看一下這份文件。

toeic.example_en: Remember to stop sharing once we move to open discussion.
toeic.example_zh: 等我們進入自由討論時，記得停止分享。

toeic.example_en: You can annotate the shared slide to point out the changes.
toeic.example_zh: 你可以在共享的投影片上加註解，指出變動之處。

toeic.example_en: Please keep your video on for the introduction so we can see you.
toeic.example_zh: 自我介紹時請開鏡頭，這樣大家都能看到你。

toeic.example_en: You can have your video off if the internet is unstable today.
toeic.example_zh: 如果今天網路不穩，可以關鏡頭。

toeic.example_en: The host will spotlight speaker so everyone can focus on them.
toeic.example_zh: 主持人會把主講者顯示為焦點，讓大家專心看。

toeic.example_en: I added you as co-host so you can manage the chat during the call.
toeic.example_zh: 我把你設為共同主持人，這樣你可以管理通話中的聊天。

toeic.example_en: Guests will sit in the waiting room until the host admits them.
toeic.example_zh: 賓客會在等候室等候，直到主持人允許進入。

toeic.example_en: Please admit anyone with a company email into the call.
toeic.example_zh: 請允許所有使用公司電郵的人進入通話。

toeic.example_en: Let us kick off the meeting with a quick review of last week's action items.
toeic.example_zh: 我們先快速回顧上週的行動項目，正式開始會議。

toeic.example_en: I will go through the agenda first so we know our time today.
toeic.example_zh: 我先帶大家走過議程，這樣大家知道今天的時間分配。

toeic.example_en: If there are no more questions, let us move to the next item.
toeic.example_zh: 如果沒有其他問題了，我們進入下一項。

toeic.example_en: I will open the floor for questions after the presentation.
toeic.example_zh: 簡報結束後我會開放發言讓大家提問。

toeic.example_en: We have five minutes left, so let us wrap up the meeting now.
toeic.example_zh: 我們還剩五分鐘，就到這裡結束會議吧。

toeic.example_en: I will set up a follow-up call later this week to confirm the details.
toeic.example_zh: 我會在本週稍後安排一通後續追蹤通話確認細節。

toeic.example_en: Let us schedule a follow-up meeting after each side reviews the proposal.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方各自看過提案後，我們再安排一場後續追蹤會議。

toeic.example_en: I have one follow-up question about the timeline you shared earlier.
toeic.example_zh: 對於你剛剛分享的時程，我還有一個後續問題。

toeic.example_en: I left a follow-up task in the tracker for you to confirm tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 我在追蹤工具裡留了一項後續任務，請你明天確認。

toeic.example_en: The system sent an automatic reminder email one day before the deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 系統在截止日前一天寄了自動提醒信。

toeic.example_en: I sent a second reminder because the supplier had not responded.
toeic.example_zh: 因為供應商還沒回覆，我又寄了第二次提醒。

toeic.example_en: Put a calendar block on your morning so you can focus on writing.
toeic.example_zh: 在早上加一段行事曆封鎖時段，讓你可以專心寫作。

toeic.example_en: I keep two hours of focus time every day for deep work.
toeic.example_zh: 我每天保留兩小時的專注時間做深度工作。

toeic.example_en: I plan my week in long work blocks instead of many short ones.
toeic.example_zh: 我把一週安排成幾個長工作時段，而不是許多短時段。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 帶走清單（會後待辦）
toeic.example_en: Each attendee leaves with a clear to-go list of two or three items.
toeic.example_zh: 每位與會者離開時都會拿到一份清楚的帶走清單，列出兩到三項待辦。

toeic.example_en: We keep a shared agenda document for every recurring meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為每場定期會議保留一份共用議程文件。

toeic.example_en: Please respect each speaking turn and avoid talking over others.
toeic.example_zh: 請尊重每個發言順序，不要打斷他人說話。

toeic.example_en: Sorry to interrupt, but I have a quick comment on that point.
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉打斷一下，但我對這一點有個簡短的意見。

toeic.example_en: I will yield the floor to our finance lead for the next section.
toeic.example_zh: 下一段我將讓出發言權給財務主管。

toeic.example_en: The speaker order was changed because one guest arrived early.
toeic.example_zh: 因為一位來賓提早到，講者順序臨時調整了。

toeic.example_en: Could you be the time keeper and signal me at the five-minute mark?
toeic.example_zh: 你可以當計時員嗎？到剩五分鐘時提醒我。

toeic.example_en: I keep running notes during the meeting and tidy them up afterward.
toeic.example_zh: 會議中我會記即時筆記，事後再整理。

toeic.example_en: Her shorthand lets her capture almost every important word.
toeic.example_zh: 她的速記能力讓她幾乎能記下每個重要的字。

toeic.example_en: Let me share three summary points before we close out the meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 結束會議前，讓我分享三個摘要重點。

toeic.example_en: The key takeaways from today are listed at the top of the email.
toeic.example_zh: 今天的重點收穫都列在郵件最上方。

toeic.example_en: Slide ten is our main decision point for the leadership team.
toeic.example_zh: 第十張投影片是領導團隊的主要決策點。

toeic.example_en: We still have one open question about the launch date.
toeic.example_zh: 關於上市日期，我們還有一個未決問題。

toeic.example_en: Let me write down the open issue so we can revisit it next time.
toeic.example_zh: 我把這個未解決議題記下來，下次再回來討論。

toeic.example_en: We will table for later any topic that needs more research first.
toeic.example_zh: 任何需要先做更多研究的話題，我們都延後討論。

toeic.example_en: Let us avoid side conversations and stay focused on the agenda.
toeic.example_zh: 請避免私下對話，專心在議程上。

toeic.example_en: Please do not talk over the speaker; raise your hand instead.
toeic.example_zh: 請不要講話蓋過講者，改用舉手的方式。

toeic.example_en: We need a clean hand-off so the next team understands the context.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要乾淨的交接，下個團隊才能了解情況。

toeic.example_en: She prepared a detailed handover document before her transfer.
toeic.example_zh: 她在轉調前準備了一份詳盡的交接文件。

toeic.example_en: The night team writes a short report at every shift handoff.
toeic.example_zh: 夜班團隊在每次班次交接時都會寫一份簡短報告。

toeic.example_en: I will cover for her email replies while she is on leave.
toeic.example_zh: 她請假期間，我會代理回覆她的電子郵件。

toeic.example_en: Always list a back-up contact in your out-of-office message.
toeic.example_zh: 請在不在辦公室訊息中列上備援聯絡人。

toeic.example_en: Could you stand in for me at tomorrow morning's planning call?
toeic.example_zh: 明天早上的規劃通話，你可以代為出席嗎？

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 臨時代打（接手任務）
toeic.example_en: I had to pinch hit when the speaker called in sick that morning.
toeic.example_zh: 那天早上講者請病假，我必須臨時代打。

toeic.example_en: Our team meeting starts at ten and usually lasts thirty minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的團隊會議十點開始，通常持續三十分鐘。

toeic.example_en: Every department meeting includes a short Q-and-A at the end.
toeic.example_zh: 每次部門會議結束前都會有一段簡短的問答時間。

toeic.example_en: A monthly cross-team meeting helps us solve shared problems faster.
toeic.example_zh: 每月一次的跨團隊會議幫助我們更快解決共同問題。

toeic.example_en: Please prepare a short slide deck before every client meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 每次客戶會議前都請準備一份簡短的投影片。

toeic.example_en: We tend to keep internal meetings shorter than external ones.
toeic.example_zh: 我們會盡量把內部會議排得比對外會議短。

toeic.example_en: External meetings require business attire and full preparation.
toeic.example_zh: 對外會議需要正式服裝和充分準備。

toeic.example_en: There is a vendor meeting on Friday to review the new pricing.
toeic.example_zh: 週五有一場供應商會議，要檢視新的報價。

toeic.example_en: I have a quick supplier call at three to confirm delivery dates.
toeic.example_zh: 我三點有一通簡短的供應商通話確認交貨日期。

toeic.example_en: Every new request starts with a short intake meeting with the team lead.
toeic.example_zh: 每個新需求都會先和組長開一場簡短的需求受理會議。

toeic.example_en: The scoping call helps us understand the size and risks of the project.
toeic.example_zh: 範疇通話幫我們了解專案的大小和風險。

toeic.example_en: We will set up an alignment call once both sides have read the brief.
toeic.example_zh: 等雙方都讀過簡介後，我們會安排一場對齊通話。

toeic.example_en: Let us put a short check-in call on the calendar every two weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在行事曆上每兩週安排一次簡短的檢視通話。

toeic.example_en: Want to grab coffee on Friday for a quick catch-up about work?
toeic.example_zh: 週五要不要喝杯咖啡，簡短聊聊工作近況？

toeic.example_en: Sometimes the best ideas come from an informal chat in the pantry.
toeic.example_zh: 有時最棒的點子來自茶水間的非正式聊天。

toeic.example_en: I heard about the reorganization through water cooler talk first.
toeic.example_zh: 我最早是從飲水機旁的閒聊聽到組織重整的事。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 茶水間時刻（隨意交流）
toeic.example_en: Remote teams miss the watercooler moment where ideas spark naturally.
toeic.example_zh: 遠端團隊常缺少那種讓點子自然碰撞的茶水間時刻。

toeic.example_en: Written brainstorms are more introvert friendly than open discussion.
toeic.example_zh: 書面腦力激盪比公開討論更對內向者友善。

toeic.example_en: We measure success by active participation, not by hours spent in meetings.
toeic.example_zh: 我們以積極參與為成功指標，而不是會議時數。

toeic.example_en: Watching the chat box helps me gauge the engagement level of the audience.
toeic.example_zh: 觀察聊天視窗可以幫我判斷觀眾的投入程度。

toeic.example_en: The audience reaction to the new product was overwhelmingly positive.
toeic.example_zh: 觀眾對新產品的反應壓倒性地正面。

toeic.example_en: We held a thirty-minute Q-and-A session right after the demo.
toeic.example_zh: 示範結束後，我們進行了三十分鐘的問答時段。

toeic.example_en: Let us give a round of applause to our keynote speaker.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我們給主題講者一輪掌聲。

toeic.example_en: I will moderate the discussion so we stay within the hour.
toeic.example_zh: 我來主持這場討論，確保我們能在一小時內結束。

toeic.example_en: Could you facilitate the brainstorm so everyone gets a chance to share?
toeic.example_zh: 你可以帶領這場腦力激盪嗎？讓每個人都有機會分享。

toeic.example_en: I will host the meeting and the deputy will take the minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 我來主辦會議，副手負責做會議紀錄。

toeic.example_en: We invited a co-facilitator from HR for the diversity workshop.
toeic.example_zh: 我們邀請了人資的同事擔任多元工作坊的共同引導者。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 節目筆記（內部直播）
toeic.example_en: We publish show notes for every internal live broadcast.
toeic.example_zh: 每場內部直播我們都會發布節目筆記。

toeic.example_en: I will send the recording link to anyone who missed the session.
toeic.example_zh: 我會把錄影連結寄給沒能參加的同事。

toeic.example_en: A transcript of the call will be available within twenty-four hours.
toeic.example_zh: 通話的逐字稿會在二十四小時內提供。

toeic.example_en: The auto-transcript saves us time when writing meeting summaries.
toeic.example_zh: 自動逐字稿讓我們在寫會議摘要時省了不少時間。

toeic.example_en: My new noise cancelling headphones make remote calls much clearer.
toeic.example_zh: 我的新降噪耳機讓遠端通話清晰多了。

toeic.example_en: Turn on background blur if your room looks messy on camera.
toeic.example_zh: 如果鏡頭裡房間看起來亂，請開啟背景模糊。

toeic.example_en: Use the company virtual background during external client calls.
toeic.example_zh: 對外客戶通話時請使用公司虛擬背景。

toeic.example_en: Adjust your office chair so your feet rest flat on the floor.
toeic.example_zh: 請調整辦公椅，讓雙腳能平放在地上。

toeic.example_en: I use a standing desk for at least two hours each day.
toeic.example_zh: 我每天至少用升降辦公桌站著工作兩小時。

toeic.example_en: A warm desk lamp helps reduce eye strain in the evening.
toeic.example_zh: 暖色桌燈可以減輕晚上的眼睛疲勞。

toeic.example_en: The monitor arm lets me adjust the screen to a comfortable height.
toeic.example_zh: 螢幕支架讓我能把畫面調到舒適的高度。

toeic.example_en: Is there a free power outlet near the conference table?
toeic.example_zh: 會議桌附近有空的電源插座嗎？

toeic.example_en: Could you grab a power strip so we can plug in all the laptops?
toeic.example_zh: 可以拿一條延長線過來嗎？這樣才能插上所有筆電。

toeic.example_en: I forgot my charger; can I borrow yours for a few minutes?
toeic.example_zh: 我忘了帶充電器，可以借你的用幾分鐘嗎？

toeic.example_en: The wifi password is printed on the card at reception.
toeic.example_zh: 無線網路密碼印在接待處的卡片上。

toeic.example_en: Visitors should connect to the guest network, not the corporate one.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客應連接訪客網路，不要連公司網路。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 虛擬私人網路連線
toeic.example_en: Use a VPN connection when accessing the file server from home.
toeic.example_zh: 在家連線檔案伺服器時請使用虛擬私人網路連線。

toeic.example_en: Submit a new request through the ticket system for tracking.
toeic.example_zh: 請透過工單系統提出新的需求以便追蹤。

toeic.example_en: I opened a help ticket because my email account is locked.
toeic.example_zh: 我的電子郵件帳號被鎖了，所以開了一張求助工單。

toeic.example_en: The IT team closed the trouble ticket within an hour.
toeic.example_zh: 資訊團隊在一小時內就關閉了這張故障工單。

toeic.example_en: Please file a service request to get a new monitor.
toeic.example_zh: 請提交一份服務請求以申請新螢幕。

toeic.example_en: Call IT support if your laptop is running unusually slowly.
toeic.example_zh: 如果筆電異常變慢，請致電資訊技術支援。

toeic.example_en: Dial the internal help line for any office facility issue.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公室任何設施問題都可以撥內部服務專線。

toeic.example_en: If you do not have my direct line, you can call the main number.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你沒有我的直撥電話，可以打總機號碼。

toeic.example_en: My direct line is the fastest way to reach me during the day.
toeic.example_zh: 白天找我最快的方式是撥我的直撥電話。

toeic.example_en: Dial zero and then my extension number to reach my desk.
toeic.example_zh: 撥零再撥我的分機號碼就能直接接到我的座位。

toeic.example_en: The phone tree menu can be confusing for first-time callers.
toeic.example_zh: 電話語音選單對首次來電的人來說可能會有點亂。

toeic.example_en: I listened to ten minutes of hold music before someone picked up.
toeic.example_zh: 我聽了十分鐘等候音樂才有人接電話。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 入圍名單；列入候選名單
toeic.example_en: The hiring manager will shortlist five candidates from over two hundred applicants by Friday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 招募主管將在週五早上前從超過兩百名申請者中篩選出五位入圍候選人。

toeic.example_en: Our agency was paid to headhunt senior engineers from rival firms across the region.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的仲介公司被付費去從區域內的競爭對手公司挖角資深工程師。

toeic.example_en: The job posting clearly stated the required qualifications and the application deadline for interested candidates.
toeic.example_zh: 該職缺公告清楚地列出有興趣應徵者所需的資格與申請截止日期。

toeic.example_en: Please review the job description carefully before submitting your resume to ensure a good match.
toeic.example_zh: 請在投遞履歷前仔細審閱職務說明書，以確保適合度。

toeic.example_en: Her new job title is regional operations director, effective from the start of next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 她的新職稱是區域營運總監，從下季初開始生效。

toeic.example_en: A strong cover letter should highlight your relevant achievements and explain why you fit the role.
toeic.example_zh: 一封好的求職信應突顯你的相關成就並說明為何適合該職位。

toeic.example_en: Academic positions usually require a detailed curriculum vitae rather than a one-page resume summary.
toeic.example_zh: 學術職位通常要求詳細的履歷表，而非一頁式的履歷摘要。

toeic.example_en: Most large companies use an applicant tracking system to filter resumes before human reviewers see them.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數大型企業使用申請人追蹤系統，在人工審閱前先過濾履歷。

toeic.example_en: Our talent scout attended three universities last week looking for promising graduates in data science.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的人才招募者上週走訪三所大學，尋找具潛力的資料科學畢業生。

toeic.example_en: Our annual campus recruitment program targets top universities to hire fresh graduates each spring season.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每年的校園招募計畫鎖定頂尖大學，每年春季僱用應屆畢業生。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 現場面試（無需預約）
toeic.example_en: The restaurant chain will hold walk-in interviews on Saturday morning for kitchen and service positions.
toeic.example_zh: 這家連鎖餐廳將在週六早上舉辦現場面試，徵求廚房與服務人員。

toeic.example_en: The phone screen lasted thirty minutes and focused mainly on my technical background and salary expectations.
toeic.example_zh: 電話初試持續了三十分鐘，主要聚焦於我的技術背景與期望待遇。

toeic.example_en: Please test your camera and microphone before the video interview begins to avoid any technical problems.
toeic.example_zh: 請在視訊面試開始前測試攝影機與麥克風，以避免任何技術問題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 個案面試（常用於顧問業）
toeic.example_en: Consulting firms typically use a case interview to assess analytical thinking and structured problem solving.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問公司通常使用個案面試來評估分析思維與結構化解決問題的能力。

toeic.example_en: A group interview lets recruiters observe how candidates collaborate, lead, and communicate under time pressure.
toeic.example_zh: 團體面試讓招募人員觀察候選人在時間壓力下如何合作、領導與溝通。

toeic.example_en: A stress interview tests how a candidate handles tough questions, interruptions, and uncomfortable silence in conversation.
toeic.example_zh: 壓力面試測試候選人如何應對艱難問題、打斷與對話中令人不適的沉默。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 連續面試流程（一日多場）
toeic.example_en: The interview loop included four back-to-back sessions with engineers, the hiring manager, and a director.
toeic.example_zh: 這場連續面試流程包含四場連續會談，對象是工程師、招募主管與一位總監。

toeic.example_en: The hiring committee meets every Thursday to review feedback and decide which candidates receive offers.
toeic.example_zh: 招募委員會每週四開會檢視意見，並決定哪些候選人獲得錄取通知。

toeic.example_en: The hiring manager will send you the formal offer once the background check is fully completed.
toeic.example_zh: 用人主管會在背景調查完全完成後寄送正式錄取通知給你。

toeic.example_en: The talent acquisition specialist sources candidates, schedules interviews, and coordinates feedback between teams and applicants.
toeic.example_zh: 人才招募專員負責尋找候選人、安排面試，並協調團隊與申請者之間的回饋。

toeic.example_en: The recruiter contacted me through a professional network and described the role in great detail.
toeic.example_zh: 那位招募人員透過專業人脈聯絡我，並非常詳細地說明了該職位。

toeic.example_en: Our sourcing strategy combines social media, employee referrals, and partnerships with universities for technical roles.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的人才尋訪策略結合社群媒體、員工推薦以及與大學的合作，以招募技術職位。

toeic.example_en: Our referral bonus program pays employees three thousand dollars for each successful technical hire.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的推薦獎金方案，每成功招募一名技術人才便支付員工三千美元。

toeic.example_en: Many of our best engineers came through employee referral rather than traditional job board postings.
toeic.example_zh: 我們許多優秀的工程師是透過員工推薦進來的，而非透過傳統的求職網站。

toeic.example_en: A solid talent pipeline strategy ensures we always have qualified candidates ready when positions open up.
toeic.example_zh: 完善的人才庫策略確保我們在職缺出現時總有合格候選人可用。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 被動求職者（未積極找工作者）
toeic.example_en: Reaching a passive candidate requires personalized outreach because they are not actively browsing job boards.
toeic.example_zh: 接觸被動求職者需要個人化的聯繫，因為他們並未主動瀏覽求職網站。

toeic.example_en: An active candidate is currently searching for work and usually responds quickly to recruiter messages.
toeic.example_zh: 主動求職者目前正在找工作，通常會迅速回覆招募人員的訊息。

toeic.example_en: Improving candidate experience helps your company attract better talent and build a stronger employer reputation.
toeic.example_zh: 改善候選人體驗能幫助公司吸引更優秀人才，並建立更強的雇主聲譽。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 已讀不回；突然失聯
toeic.example_en: Recruiter ghosting after final interviews leaves candidates frustrated and damages the company employer brand.
toeic.example_zh: 招募人員在最終面試後突然失聯，會讓候選人感到沮喪並損害公司雇主品牌。

toeic.example_en: Our policy treats a no-call no-show as a voluntary resignation after two consecutive missed scheduled shifts.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的政策視連續兩次未通知缺席的排班為自動離職。

toeic.example_en: The online application includes ten screening questions about your visa status and your years of experience.
toeic.example_zh: 線上申請表包含十題篩選問題，詢問你的簽證狀態與工作年資。

toeic.example_en: All shortlisted candidates must complete a one-hour aptitude test covering logic, numerical, and verbal reasoning.
toeic.example_zh: 所有入圍候選人都必須完成一小時的性向測驗，涵蓋邏輯、數理與語文推理。

toeic.example_en: The personality test helps managers understand how new hires might fit within existing team dynamics.
toeic.example_zh: 性格測驗幫助主管了解新進員工可能如何融入現有的團隊動態。

toeic.example_en: Research suggests that a cognitive ability test predicts job performance more reliably than unstructured interviews alone.
toeic.example_zh: 研究指出，認知能力測驗比單獨的非結構化面試更能可靠地預測工作表現。

toeic.example_en: Before the second round, candidates complete a skills assessment that mirrors real tasks from the role.
toeic.example_zh: 在第二輪面試前，候選人需完成一項模擬該職位實際工作的技能評估。

toeic.example_en: Our competency-based assessment uses behavioral questions to evaluate teamwork, leadership, and conflict resolution abilities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的職能型評估使用行為題目來評估團隊合作、領導與衝突解決能力。

toeic.example_en: A situational judgment test presents realistic workplace scenarios and asks candidates to choose appropriate responses.
toeic.example_zh: 情境判斷測驗呈現真實的職場情境，並要求候選人選擇合適的回應方式。

toeic.example_en: The talent assessment center evaluates leadership potential through group exercises, role plays, and individual presentations.
toeic.example_zh: 人才評鑑中心透過團體活動、角色扮演與個人簡報來評估領導潛力。

toeic.example_en: A structured interview uses the same questions for every candidate, allowing fairer comparisons across applicants.
toeic.example_zh: 結構化面試對每位候選人使用相同題目，使申請者間的比較更為公平。

toeic.example_en: An unstructured interview feels more like a conversation but introduces more bias into hiring decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 非結構化面試感覺較像聊天，但會讓招募決策出現更多偏誤。

toeic.example_en: Each interviewer fills out the same interview rubric to ensure consistent and objective candidate evaluation.
toeic.example_zh: 每位面試官都填寫相同的面試評分表，以確保候選人評估的一致與客觀。

toeic.example_en: A behavioral question asks you to describe how you handled a specific challenge in past roles.
toeic.example_zh: 行為題會請你描述過去職務中如何處理某個特定挑戰。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) STAR 答題法（情境、任務、行動、結果）
toeic.example_en: Use the STAR method to structure your answers around situation, task, action, and measurable result.
toeic.example_zh: 使用 STAR 答題法，依情境、任務、行動與可衡量結果來組織你的回答。

toeic.example_en: Please review the talking points memo before the candidate debrief so we stay focused on key criteria.
toeic.example_zh: 請在候選人討論會前審閱談話要點備忘錄，讓我們聚焦於關鍵評估標準。

toeic.example_en: We built a candidate persona for software engineers to better target our recruitment advertising campaigns.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為軟體工程師建立了候選人輪廓，以更精準地鎖定招募廣告活動的對象。

toeic.example_en: The internal talent marketplace lets employees discover short-term projects and stretch opportunities across our company.
toeic.example_zh: 內部人才市場讓員工發現公司內部的短期專案與挑戰性機會。

toeic.example_en: More companies now hire a gig worker for short projects rather than adding full-time headcount.
toeic.example_zh: 現在更多公司為短期專案聘請零工工作者，而非增加全職員額。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 約聘轉正職
toeic.example_en: The contract-to-hire arrangement lets both sides evaluate fit before committing to permanent employment terms.
toeic.example_zh: 約聘轉正職的安排讓雙方在承諾正式聘僱條件前評估彼此是否合適。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 臨時轉正職
toeic.example_en: Many warehouse positions start as temp-to-perm, with permanent offers extended after ninety days of performance review.
toeic.example_zh: 許多倉庫職位起初以臨時轉正職方式聘任，績效檢視九十天後才發出正職錄取通知。

toeic.example_en: Your probation review takes place after three months and determines whether your employment becomes permanent.
toeic.example_zh: 你的試用期評估會在三個月後進行，並決定你的僱用是否轉為正式。

toeic.example_en: After the offer extension, the candidate has seven business days to accept or formally decline.
toeic.example_zh: 在發出錄取通知後，候選人有七個工作天可以接受或正式婉拒。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 限時失效錄取通知
toeic.example_en: An exploding offer pressures candidates to decide quickly, but it can damage your employer brand reputation.
toeic.example_zh: 限時失效的錄取通知會迫使候選人快速決定，但可能損害雇主品牌聲譽。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 對應加薪挽留條件
toeic.example_en: She turned down the counteroffer from her current employer and decided to join the new firm.
toeic.example_zh: 她婉拒了現任雇主提出的對應加薪挽留條件，決定加入新公司。

toeic.example_en: Your starting salary falls within the middle of the compensation band for this senior engineering level.
toeic.example_zh: 你的起薪落在這個資深工程職級的薪資級距中段。

toeic.example_en: Your annual total reward statement shows base pay, bonus, equity grants, and the estimated value of benefits.
toeic.example_zh: 你的年度總薪酬說明書列出底薪、獎金、股票配發以及福利的預估價值。

toeic.example_en: The joining bonus will be paid in your first paycheck but must be repaid if you leave early.
toeic.example_zh: 簽約獎金將在你的第一份薪資中支付，但若提早離職則需返還。

toeic.example_en: Our relocation package covers moving costs, temporary housing, and one round-trip flight for your family.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的搬遷補助方案包含搬家費用、臨時住宿與全家一次來回機票。

toeic.example_en: Each employee receives a monthly remote allowance to cover home internet and office equipment expenses.
toeic.example_zh: 每位員工每月收到遠距工作津貼，用以支付家用網路與辦公設備費用。

toeic.example_en: Our perk package includes gym membership, monthly meal vouchers, and access to our wellness counseling line.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的額外福利組合包括健身會員、每月餐券，以及員工健康諮詢專線使用權。

toeic.example_en: New hires attend a benefits orientation during their first week to learn about insurance, retirement, and leave.
toeic.example_zh: 新進員工在第一週參加福利說明會，了解保險、退休與休假等制度。

toeic.example_en: Please complete all tax forms through the onboarding portal before your official first day of work.
toeic.example_zh: 請在正式上班第一天前，透過新人入職平台完成所有稅務表格。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 新進人員訓練計畫
toeic.example_en: The two-week induction program introduces new hires to company values, policies, products, and key leaders.
toeic.example_zh: 為期兩週的新進人員訓練計畫向新員工介紹公司價值觀、政策、產品與主要領導者。

toeic.example_en: Your orientation packet contains the employee handbook, organizational chart, and instructions for setting up payroll.
toeic.example_zh: 你的新人介紹資料袋含員工手冊、組織圖以及薪資設定說明。

toeic.example_en: Please read the employee handbook carefully and sign the acknowledgment form by the end of the week.
toeic.example_zh: 請仔細閱讀員工手冊，並在本週末前簽署確認表單。

toeic.example_en: Mandatory company-wide training on data protection happens every January and takes about three hours to complete.
toeic.example_zh: 強制性的全公司資料保護培訓每年一月舉辦，需約三小時完成。

toeic.example_en: HR will share the annual training plan in December so managers can budget time for their teams.
toeic.example_zh: 人資將在十二月分享年度培訓計畫，讓主管為團隊安排時間預算。

toeic.example_en: Our training needs analysis identified communication and project management as the top priorities for this fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的訓練需求分析指出，溝通與專案管理是本財年的首要優先項目。

toeic.example_en: Each module begins with a clear learning objective so participants understand the expected outcome of the session.
toeic.example_zh: 每個課程模組以明確的學習目標開始，讓學員了解該課程的預期成果。

toeic.example_en: The compliance course contains six course modules that can be completed at your own preferred pace.
toeic.example_zh: 這門法遵課程含六個課程模組，可依個人偏好的進度完成。

toeic.example_en: An experienced training facilitator keeps the session engaging and ensures every participant contributes meaningfully to discussions.
toeic.example_zh: 經驗豐富的培訓引導員能讓課程保持吸引力，並確保每位學員都能有意義地參與討論。

toeic.example_en: The training coordinator handles room bookings, materials printing, and attendance tracking for all internal workshops.
toeic.example_zh: 培訓協調員負責所有內部工作坊的場地預約、教材印製與出席紀錄。

toeic.example_en: All training material is uploaded to the learning portal and remains accessible for six months afterward.
toeic.example_zh: 所有培訓教材都上傳到學習入口網站，並在課後六個月內持續可用。

toeic.example_en: Please review the course syllabus before class so we can use our time together more efficiently.
toeic.example_zh: 請在上課前先審閱課程大綱，這樣我們才能更有效率地使用上課時間。

toeic.example_en: The training agenda includes morning lectures, two interactive workshops, and a short reflection at the end.
toeic.example_zh: 培訓議程包含上午講座、兩場互動工作坊，以及結束時的簡短反思。

toeic.example_en: We always start workshops with an icebreaker activity to help participants feel relaxed and ready to engage.
toeic.example_zh: 我們總是以破冰活動開始工作坊，幫助學員放鬆並準備好投入。

toeic.example_en: A short role-play exercise lets sales staff practice handling difficult customer complaints in a safe environment.
toeic.example_zh: 簡短的角色扮演演練讓銷售人員在安全環境中練習處理困難的客訴。

toeic.example_en: Scenario-based training helps employees apply policies to realistic situations rather than memorizing abstract rules.
toeic.example_zh: 情境式培訓幫助員工將政策應用於真實情境，而不只是背誦抽象規則。

toeic.example_en: The flight crew completes a quarterly simulation exercise covering engine failure, fire response, and emergency evacuation.
toeic.example_zh: 機組人員每季完成一次涵蓋引擎故障、火警處置與緊急疏散的模擬演練。

toeic.example_en: A short knowledge assessment at the end of each module confirms that learners have absorbed key concepts.
toeic.example_zh: 每個課程模組結尾的簡短知識評量確認學習者已吸收關鍵概念。

toeic.example_en: Please complete the post-training survey so we can improve future sessions based on participant feedback.
toeic.example_zh: 請完成訓後問卷，讓我們依學員回饋改善未來課程。

toeic.example_en: Measuring training ROI requires linking learning outcomes to changes in productivity, quality, and employee retention rates.
toeic.example_zh: 衡量培訓投資報酬率需要將學習成果與生產力、品質與員工留任率的變化連結起來。

toeic.example_en: Each employee creates an annual competency development plan together with their manager during performance review season.
toeic.example_zh: 每位員工在績效評估期間與主管共同制定年度職能發展計畫。

toeic.example_en: Your individual development plan should align personal career goals with the team objectives for the year.
toeic.example_zh: 你的個人發展計畫應將個人職涯目標與年度團隊目標對齊。

toeic.example_en: Managers are expected to hold a career conversation with each direct report at least twice per year.
toeic.example_zh: 主管應每年至少與每位直屬部屬進行兩次職涯對談。

toeic.example_en: Understanding your career anchor helps you choose roles that match your deepest motivations and personal values.
toeic.example_zh: 了解你的職涯定位能幫助你選擇符合最深層動機與個人價值觀的職位。

toeic.example_en: Reaching a tenth-anniversary career milestone earns you an extra week of paid vacation each year.
toeic.example_zh: 達到十週年職涯里程碑後，你每年將獲得額外一週的有薪休假。

toeic.example_en: Her career trajectory took her from junior analyst to vice president within only eight years of work.
toeic.example_zh: 她的職涯軌跡讓她在短短八年內從初階分析師晉升為副總裁。

toeic.example_en: Making a career pivot from teaching to instructional design requires building a portfolio of relevant new projects.
toeic.example_zh: 從教學轉到教學設計的職涯轉換需要建立一份相關新專案的作品集。

toeic.example_en: A career counselor can help you clarify your goals and identify the skills you need to develop.
toeic.example_zh: 職涯諮詢顧問能幫助你釐清目標，並找出需要培養的技能。

toeic.example_en: Employees should check the internal job board weekly for open positions across different departments and locations.
toeic.example_zh: 員工應每週查看內部職缺公告板，了解不同部門與地點的開放職缺。

toeic.example_en: Our two-year job rotation program lets graduates experience three different departments before choosing a specialization.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為期兩年的工作輪調計畫讓畢業生在選擇專業領域前體驗三個不同部門。

toeic.example_en: The job shadowing program lets junior staff observe senior leaders for a full week of real meetings.
toeic.example_zh: 跟班學習計畫讓資淺員工有整整一週的時間觀察資深領導者真實的會議過程。

toeic.example_en: Our talent pool program identifies high performers and prepares them for leadership roles within two years.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的人才儲備計畫挑選出高績效員工，並在兩年內培訓他們擔任領導職位。

toeic.example_en: Every critical role must have a documented succession plan with at least two qualified internal backup candidates.
toeic.example_zh: 每個關鍵職位都必須有書面接班計畫，至少包含兩名合格的內部接班候選人。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 九宮格人才評估表
toeic.example_en: We use the 9-box grid to evaluate employees on current performance and future leadership potential simultaneously.
toeic.example_zh: 我們使用九宮格人才評估表，同時評估員工目前的績效與未來的領導潛力。

toeic.example_en: The quarterly talent review meeting discusses succession risks, promotion candidates, and employees needing additional development support.
toeic.example_zh: 每季的人才檢視會議討論接班風險、晉升候選人，以及需要額外發展支持的員工。

toeic.example_en: At the performance calibration meeting, managers discuss ratings to ensure consistency across teams and similar roles.
toeic.example_zh: 在績效校準會議上，主管們討論評等以確保跨團隊與相似職位間的一致性。

toeic.example_en: Your performance scorecard tracks five key metrics tied directly to your bonus and your annual merit increase.
toeic.example_zh: 你的績效計分卡追蹤五項關鍵指標，直接連動你的獎金與年度加薪。

toeic.example_en: January is when teams hold a goal setting session to align with the annual business strategy roadmap.
toeic.example_zh: 一月是團隊舉行目標設定會議的時候，以對齊年度業務策略路徑圖。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) SMART 目標（具體、可衡量、可達成、相關、有時限）
toeic.example_en: Each SMART goal should be specific, measurable, achievable, relevant, and tied to a clear timeline.
toeic.example_zh: 每個 SMART 目標應該具體、可衡量、可達成、相關，並與明確時程連結。

toeic.example_en: Beyond core objectives, each team sets one stretch goal target that pushes performance beyond comfortable expectations.
toeic.example_zh: 除了核心目標外，每個團隊還設定一個挑戰性目標，推動績效超越舒適預期。

toeic.example_en: The mid-year check-in is a chance to adjust goals based on changing priorities and emerging business needs.
toeic.example_zh: 年中檢視會談是依據優先順序變化與新興業務需求來調整目標的機會。

toeic.example_en: Documentation for your year-end appraisal must be submitted to HR by the fifteenth of December.
toeic.example_zh: 你的年末考核相關文件必須在十二月十五日前提交給人資。

toeic.example_en: Each manager reviews the rating distribution across their team to avoid clustering everyone in the same category.
toeic.example_zh: 每位主管檢視團隊評等分布，避免所有人都集中於同一個類別。

toeic.example_en: This year's merit pay increase budget is three percent, distributed based on performance rating outcomes.
toeic.example_zh: 今年的績效加薪預算為百分之三，將依績效評等結果分配。

toeic.example_en: She received a five percent pay raise after exceeding all of her annual sales targets this year.
toeic.example_zh: 她在超越所有年度銷售目標後獲得百分之五的加薪。

toeic.example_en: After repeated performance issues, the manager faced a demotion to a non-leadership position with reduced responsibilities.
toeic.example_zh: 在多次績效問題後，這位經理被降職至職責較少的非主管職位。

toeic.example_en: She accepted a lateral transfer to gain exposure to international markets without changing her current job level.
toeic.example_zh: 她接受平調以接觸國際市場，同時不變動目前的職級。

toeic.example_en: Internal transfer requests require approval from both your current manager and the receiving department leader.
toeic.example_zh: 內部轉調申請需同時取得現任主管與接收部門主管的核准。

toeic.example_en: A geographic transfer to our Singapore office includes housing assistance and language training for the employee.
toeic.example_zh: 調往新加坡辦公室的跨地區調動包含住宿協助與員工語言訓練。

toeic.example_en: The employee directory contains contact details, reporting lines, and office locations for all current staff members.
toeic.example_zh: 員工通訊錄包含所有現職員工的聯絡資料、彙報關係與辦公地點。

toeic.example_en: Please update the org chart to reflect last week's reorganization and the three new department head appointments.
toeic.example_zh: 請更新組織架構圖，反映上週的重組與三位新任部門主管的任命。

toeic.example_en: After the reorganization, your reporting line changes to the global head of customer success operations.
toeic.example_zh: 重組後，你的彙報關係改為全球客戶成功營運主管。

toeic.example_en: Matrix reporting can be confusing because employees serve both a functional manager and a project manager simultaneously.
toeic.example_zh: 矩陣式彙報可能令人困惑，因為員工同時隸屬於功能主管與專案主管。

toeic.example_en: Strong people management requires empathy, clear communication, and the ability to make difficult decisions with fairness.
toeic.example_zh: 優秀的人員管理需要同理心、清晰的溝通以及公平做出困難決策的能力。

toeic.example_en: The team charter outlines our mission, working norms, and how we make decisions together as a group.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊章程列出我們的使命、工作規範以及作為團體如何共同決策。

toeic.example_en: We set team norms during our offsite to clarify expectations around meetings, response times, and quality.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在外訓時設定團隊規範，以釐清對於會議、回覆時間與品質的期望。

toeic.example_en: Our team agreement specifies that no email is expected after seven in the evening on workdays.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的團隊協議規定工作日晚上七點後不期望回覆電子郵件。

toeic.example_en: Our workplace conduct policy is reviewed annually and shared with every employee through a mandatory training course.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的職場行為規範政策每年審視，並透過強制性培訓課程分享給每位員工。

toeic.example_en: All employees sign the code of business conduct annually to confirm their understanding of ethical expectations.
toeic.example_zh: 全體員工每年簽署商業行為準則，以確認對倫理期望的理解。

toeic.example_en: Disciplinary action may include a verbal warning, written warning, suspension, or in severe cases, immediate termination.
toeic.example_zh: 懲處措施可能包括口頭警告、書面警告、停職，嚴重情況下則為立即解僱。

toeic.example_en: She received a written warning after repeatedly missing deadlines without notifying her direct manager in advance.
toeic.example_zh: 她在多次未事先通知直屬主管便錯過期限後，收到了書面警告。

toeic.example_en: A verbal warning is the first step in our progressive discipline process for minor policy infractions.
toeic.example_zh: 口頭警告是我們漸進式紀律流程中針對輕微違規的第一步。

toeic.example_en: We focus on performance improvement rather than punishment, providing coaching and clear monthly goals along the way.
toeic.example_zh: 我們聚焦於績效改善而非懲罰，過程中提供輔導與明確的月度目標。

toeic.example_en: Your coaching plan outlines weekly meetings, specific skill goals, and the measurable signs of meaningful progress.
toeic.example_zh: 你的輔導計畫概述每週會議、特定技能目標以及有意義進展的可衡量指標。

toeic.example_en: A healthy mentoring relationship is built on trust, mutual respect, and consistent communication over many months.
toeic.example_zh: 健康的師徒關係建立在信任、相互尊重以及長期一致的溝通之上。

toeic.example_en: Our six-month mentor program pairs early-career employees with senior leaders from different parts of the business.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為期六個月的導師計畫將初期職涯員工與不同事業群的資深主管配對。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 贊助者關係（職場推薦人）
toeic.example_en: Beyond a mentor, a sponsor relationship can actively advocate for your promotion in important decision-making rooms.
toeic.example_zh: 除了導師外，贊助者關係能在重要決策場合主動為你的晉升發聲。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a feedback session within two days of the project so the lessons are still fresh.
toeic.example_zh: 在專案結束後兩天內安排回饋會談，趁學到的經驗還新鮮時進行。

toeic.example_en: Annual 360-degree feedback gathers input from peers, direct reports, and managers to give a balanced view.
toeic.example_zh: 年度三百六十度回饋蒐集來自同儕、部屬與主管的意見，以提供全面平衡的觀點。

toeic.example_en: Anonymous feedback channels encourage employees to share honest concerns without fearing any potential workplace retaliation.
toeic.example_zh: 匿名回饋管道鼓勵員工分享誠實的疑慮，而不必擔心職場上的潛在報復。

toeic.example_en: A common management principle is to praise in public and provide any critical feedback in private.
toeic.example_zh: 常見的管理原則是公開讚美，而批評性回饋則在私下進行。

toeic.example_en: Good constructive feedback focuses on specific behaviors rather than personality and offers concrete suggestions for improvement.
toeic.example_zh: 好的建設性回饋聚焦於具體行為而非性格，並提供具體可行的改進建議。

toeic.example_en: Developmental feedback helps employees grow by highlighting skills they should build for future career opportunities.
toeic.example_zh: 發展性回饋透過點出員工為未來職涯機會應培養的技能，幫助他們成長。

toeic.example_en: Our annual skills inventory shows which capabilities are abundant and where serious gaps require external hiring.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的年度技能盤點顯示哪些能力充足，以及哪些嚴重缺口需要外部招募。

toeic.example_en: A consistent skills taxonomy lets us search for talent precisely across the company using common standard terms.
toeic.example_zh: 一致的技能分類體系讓我們能用標準用語在全公司精確搜尋人才。

toeic.example_en: The talent dashboard tracks headcount, attrition, and time-to-hire metrics across every region and business function.
toeic.example_zh: 人才儀表板追蹤每個地區與事業職能的員額、流失率與招募完成時間等指標。

toeic.example_en: Our average time-to-hire dropped from forty-five days to thirty days after we improved screening efficiency significantly.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們大幅改善篩選效率後，平均招募完成時間從四十五天降至三十天。

toeic.example_en: Time-to-fill measures how long a position stays open from posting to the candidate signed offer letter.
toeic.example_zh: 職缺補實時間衡量職位從公告到候選人簽署錄取通知書之間的時間。

toeic.example_en: Cost per hire includes advertising, agency fees, interviewer time, and the cost of running background checks.
toeic.example_zh: 每人招募成本包含廣告、仲介費、面試官時間以及背景調查的執行費用。

toeic.example_en: Quality of hire measures performance ratings and retention rates of new employees during their first year.
toeic.example_zh: 招募品質衡量新進員工在第一年內的績效評等與留任率。

toeic.example_en: Our offer acceptance rate climbed to ninety percent this quarter after we updated the compensation benchmarking process.
toeic.example_zh: 在更新薪酬比對流程後，本季我們的錄取接受率攀升至百分之九十。

toeic.example_en: An attrition rate above fifteen percent often signals deeper engagement problems within the affected business function.
toeic.example_zh: 流失率高於百分之十五通常代表受影響的事業職能存在更深層的敬業度問題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高潛流失（不希望失去的離職）
toeic.example_en: Each regrettable loss is reviewed by senior leadership to understand the underlying reasons behind the departure.
toeic.example_zh: 每一筆高潛流失都會由高階主管檢視，以了解離職背後的根本原因。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a candid exit conversation so we can capture honest feedback about your overall experience with the company.
toeic.example_zh: 請安排一次坦誠的離職面談，讓我們蒐集你對於整體公司經歷的誠實回饋。

toeic.example_en: A thorough knowledge handoff helps the incoming employee start contributing without losing valuable context built up earlier.
toeic.example_zh: 完整的知識交接幫助新進員工開始貢獻，而不會失去先前累積的寶貴情境資訊。

toeic.example_en: Please prepare a transition document covering current projects, key contacts, and outstanding deliverables before your last day.
toeic.example_zh: 請在最後上班日前準備交接文件，涵蓋目前專案、關鍵聯絡人與未完成的交付項目。

toeic.example_en: Your last working day is the thirty-first, but final paperwork must be completed at least one week earlier.
toeic.example_zh: 你的最後工作日是三十一日，但相關離職文件必須在至少一週前完成。

toeic.example_en: Please submit a brief and professional resignation letter to HR at least four weeks before your departure.
toeic.example_zh: 請至少在離職前四週將一封簡潔且專業的辭職信提交給人資。

toeic.example_en: Standard practice in many industries is to give two weeks notice before leaving your current job role.
toeic.example_zh: 在許多行業中，離開現職前提交兩週離職預告是常見做法。

toeic.example_en: The redundancy package includes severance pay, extended health coverage, and three months of paid outplacement services.
toeic.example_zh: 資遣方案包含資遣費、延長健保以及三個月的有薪再就業輔導服務。

toeic.example_en: Older employees were offered a voluntary separation program before involuntary layoffs needed to be officially announced.
toeic.example_zh: 在不得不正式宣布非自願裁員之前，公司向資深員工提出了自願離職方案。

toeic.example_en: Involuntary separation must follow legal procedures including notice periods and any required documentation of performance issues.
toeic.example_zh: 非自願離職必須遵循法律程序，包括預告期以及任何績效問題的必要書面紀錄。

toeic.example_en: The reduction in force affected fifty positions across operations, marketing, and our customer support divisions worldwide.
toeic.example_zh: 這次裁員影響了營運、行銷與全球客戶支援部門共五十個職位。

toeic.example_en: All staff went on a four-week furlough leave while management restructured the operations during a financial downturn.
toeic.example_zh: 所有員工放了四週的無薪假，期間管理層在財務低迷中重組營運。

toeic.example_en: Our career outplacement support helps departing employees update resumes and prepare for new interviews with confidence.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的再就業輔導支援協助離職員工更新履歷，並有信心地準備新的面試。

toeic.example_en: Her rehire status is positive, meaning she could be considered if she ever applied again to the company.
toeic.example_zh: 她的再僱用資格是正面的，意味著若她再度申請，公司可以考慮錄用。

toeic.example_en: A boomerang hire often ramps up faster because they already understand the systems and the company culture.
toeic.example_zh: 回鍋員工通常上手更快，因為他們已了解系統與公司文化。

toeic.example_en: Your leave entitlement increases from fifteen days to twenty days after five years of continuous service.
toeic.example_zh: 在連續服務滿五年後，你的休假權益會從十五天增加到二十天。

toeic.example_en: Please submit annual leave requests at least two weeks in advance so we can plan appropriate work coverage.
toeic.example_zh: 請至少提前兩週提交特休假申請，讓我們能規劃適當的工作支援。

toeic.example_en: All employees receive ten paid sick leave days per calendar year regardless of their job position level.
toeic.example_zh: 所有員工每個日曆年享有十天有薪病假，無論職位級別為何。

toeic.example_en: Eligible employees receive sixteen weeks of paid maternity leave following the birth of a child.
toeic.example_zh: 符合資格的員工在子女出生後可享有十六週的有薪產假。

toeic.example_en: Fathers can take up to four weeks of paid paternity leave during the first year after birth.
toeic.example_zh: 父親在子女出生後一年內可請最多四週的有薪陪產假。

toeic.example_en: Carer leave allows employees to take time off to support a seriously ill or injured family member.
toeic.example_zh: 照顧者假讓員工能請假以支援重病或受傷的家庭成員。

toeic.example_en: Approved study leave allows employees to take exams or complete graduate program coursework without using vacation days.
toeic.example_zh: 經核准的進修假讓員工不必使用特休便能應試或完成研究所課業。

toeic.example_en: After exhausting paid time off, employees may apply for unpaid leave for any extended personal circumstances.
toeic.example_zh: 在用完有薪休假後，員工可因延長的個人狀況申請無薪假。

toeic.example_en: The country recognizes eleven paid holiday dates per year, and our company observes ten of them.
toeic.example_zh: 該國家每年認定十一個有薪假日，本公司遵守其中十個。

toeic.example_en: Submit your leave request form online and notify your manager directly at least one week before.
toeic.example_zh: 請線上提交請假申請表，並至少提前一週直接通知主管。

toeic.example_en: A shift swap requires written approval from your manager and from the colleague who is accepting it.
toeic.example_zh: 換班需取得主管以及願意接班同事的書面同意。

toeic.example_en: The shift schedule for next month gets posted every twentieth, and changes require manager approval afterward.
toeic.example_zh: 下個月的班表會在每月二十日公布，之後若有變動需經主管核准。

toeic.example_en: Please check the rota every Sunday evening so you know which days you are scheduled to work.
toeic.example_zh: 請每週日晚上查看輪班表，以確認你被排定上班的日期。

toeic.example_en: On-call duty rotates weekly among engineers and pays an extra stipend for the inconvenience after normal hours.
toeic.example_zh: 待命值班在工程師之間每週輪替，並針對下班後的不便支付額外津貼。

toeic.example_en: Overtime pay is calculated at one point five times your normal hourly rate for any extra hours.
toeic.example_zh: 加班費以正常時薪的一點五倍計算所有額外工作時數。

toeic.example_en: Instead of overtime pay, you may choose compensatory time off to take later in the calendar year.
toeic.example_zh: 你可以選擇不領加班費，而是改為日後在同一日曆年內補休。

toeic.example_en: Many salaried employees prefer time off in lieu since their contract excludes them from regular overtime pay.
toeic.example_zh: 由於合約將許多月薪員工排除於一般加班費之外，他們較偏好補假。

toeic.example_en: Our work hours policy expects forty hours per week but allows flexibility around individual start and end times.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的工作時數政策要求每週四十小時，但允許上下班時間具有彈性。

toeic.example_en: Most teams follow a hybrid schedule of three office days and two remote days each week.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數團隊採取每週三天進辦公室、兩天遠距的混合工作排程。

toeic.example_en: You may work from home up to two days per week with prior approval from your direct manager.
toeic.example_zh: 經直屬主管事先核准，你每週最多可在家工作兩天。

toeic.example_en: Engineers who telecommute receive a stipend to set up a comfortable and productive workspace at home.
toeic.example_zh: 遠距上班的工程師會獲得補貼，以建置舒適且高效的居家工作空間。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 數位遊牧工作政策
toeic.example_en: Our digital nomad policy allows employees to work abroad for up to three months per fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的數位遊牧工作政策允許員工每財年最多在海外工作三個月。

toeic.example_en: Our wellness program reimburses gym memberships, mental health apps, and annual preventive medical screening costs.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的健康促進方案報銷健身會員、心理健康應用程式以及年度預防性醫療檢查費用。

toeic.example_en: The employee assistance program offers free confidential counseling for personal, family, financial, and work-related stress issues.
toeic.example_zh: 員工協助方案為個人、家庭、財務與工作壓力議題提供免費且保密的諮詢服務。

toeic.example_en: Our health benefit covers medical, dental, vision, and mental health support for employees and their dependents.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的健康福利涵蓋員工及其眷屬的醫療、牙科、視力與心理健康支持。

toeic.example_en: Enrollment in the retirement plan begins automatically after three months of continuous full-time employment with us.
toeic.example_zh: 在連續全職就業滿三個月後，你會自動加入我們的退休計畫。

toeic.example_en: Our pension scheme matches employee contributions up to six percent of base annual salary every year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的退休金制度每年提撥相當於員工年底薪百分之六的相對提撥。

toeic.example_en: The company offers a generous 401k match of fifty cents for every dollar you personally contribute.
toeic.example_zh: 公司提供慷慨的 401k 相對提撥，你每提撥一美元，公司就配上五十美分。

toeic.example_en: Stock grants have a one-year vesting cliff before any equity becomes officially yours under the agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 依協議，股票配發有一年股票歸屬等候期，期滿後才有任何股權正式歸屬於你。

toeic.example_en: Our annual compensation review cycle takes place in March and informs raises effective the following April.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的年度薪酬檢視週期在三月進行，據此確定四月起生效的調薪。

toeic.example_en: Annual salary benchmarking against industry data ensures we remain competitive in our key talent markets.
toeic.example_zh: 依產業資料進行年度薪資對標，確保我們在主要人才市場保持競爭力。

toeic.example_en: Pay parity reviews ensure that men and women earn the same amount for the same job.
toeic.example_zh: 薪資對等檢視確保男性與女性在相同職務上獲得相同的薪酬。

toeic.example_en: Internal pay equity compares salaries across employees with similar roles, experience levels, and overall performance ratings.
toeic.example_zh: 內部薪資公平比較類似職務、年資與整體績效評等員工之間的薪資。

toeic.example_en: The performance bonus pool is funded by company profits and distributed based on individual and team results.
toeic.example_zh: 績效獎金池由公司利潤提撥，並依個人與團隊成果分配。

toeic.example_en: Your discretionary bonus depends on company performance and is not guaranteed in your offer or employment contract.
toeic.example_zh: 你的酌情獎金取決於公司績效，並未在錄取通知或聘僱合約中保證發放。

toeic.example_en: First-year hires receive a guaranteed bonus in their second quarter regardless of overall company financial results.
toeic.example_zh: 第一年新進員工在第二季可獲得保證獎金，無論公司整體財務結果如何。

toeic.example_en: Senior executives participate in a long-term incentive plan that vests over three to five performance years.
toeic.example_zh: 資深主管參與長期激勵計畫，分三至五個績效年逐步歸屬。

toeic.example_en: The short-term incentive plan pays cash bonuses based on the achievement of annual company-wide business goals.
toeic.example_zh: 短期激勵計畫依據年度全公司業務目標的達成情況支付現金獎金。

toeic.example_en: Each performance share unit converts to actual shares only if the company meets predefined three-year financial targets.
toeic.example_zh: 每個績效股票單位僅在公司達成預定三年期財務目標時才轉換為實際股票。

toeic.example_en: Eligible employees may apply for tuition reimbursement of up to five thousand dollars per academic year.
toeic.example_zh: 符合資格的員工每學年可申請最高五千美元的學費補助。

toeic.example_en: Each employee has a yearly professional development budget for books, conferences, certifications, and online learning subscriptions.
toeic.example_zh: 每位員工每年有專業發展預算，用於書籍、研討會、證照與線上學習訂閱。

toeic.example_en: Engineers receive a yearly training stipend of two thousand dollars to attend technical events and online courses.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師每年獲得兩千美元的培訓津貼，用於參加技術活動與線上課程。

toeic.example_en: Pass the cloud certification exam and submit your receipt for full certification reimbursement within thirty days afterward.
toeic.example_zh: 通過雲端證照考試後，於三十日內提交收據可獲全額證照費補助。

toeic.example_en: International staff may apply for a monthly language stipend to support local language tutoring or classes.
toeic.example_zh: 外派員工可申請每月語言津貼，用以支援當地語言家教或課程。

toeic.example_en: Every new process should be documented in a knowledge base article so that future hires can self-train.
toeic.example_zh: 每個新流程都應記錄成知識庫文章，讓未來新進員工能自我學習。

toeic.example_en: The internal wiki page for onboarding lists every system, tool, and policy a new hire must learn.
toeic.example_zh: 入職的內部維基頁面列出新進員工必須學習的每個系統、工具與政策。

toeic.example_en: Each training cohort includes about twenty learners who go through the program together for ten weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 每個培訓梯次約包含二十名學員，他們一起完成為期十週的課程。

toeic.example_en: Our two-year graduate program rotates participants through finance, operations, marketing, and a strategy team.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為期兩年的儲備幹部計畫，讓參與者輪調財務、營運、行銷與策略團隊。

toeic.example_en: Each management trainee shadows a senior leader for three months before taking on independent project responsibilities.
toeic.example_zh: 每位儲備幹部在獨立承擔專案職責前，會跟隨資深主管學習三個月。

toeic.example_en: Our leadership pipeline development invests in promising managers two levels below the executive committee each year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的領導梯隊培育每年投資於距高階主管委員會兩層的具潛力主管。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高階主管發展計畫
toeic.example_en: The executive development program at a top business school lasts six weeks and is fully sponsored.
toeic.example_zh: 在頂尖商學院的高階主管發展計畫為期六週，並由公司全額贊助。

toeic.example_en: After her promotion, she received six months of executive coaching to strengthen strategic communication and influence skills.
toeic.example_zh: 晉升後，她接受了六個月的高階主管教練，強化策略性溝通與影響力技巧。

toeic.example_en: Our leadership competency model defines seven core capabilities expected of every manager in our organization.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的領導職能模型定義了組織中每位主管應具備的七項核心能力。

toeic.example_en: The weekly leadership team meeting reviews key metrics, escalations, and priorities for the upcoming two weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 每週領導團隊會議檢視關鍵指標、升級事項以及未來兩週的優先順序。

toeic.example_en: Reduce key person dependency by documenting processes and cross-training at least one teammate for every critical task.
toeic.example_zh: 藉由將流程文件化並為每項關鍵工作至少交叉培訓一位同事，以降低關鍵人物依賴。

toeic.example_en: Our cross-training plan ensures every critical task has at least two qualified team members who can perform it.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的跨職能訓練計畫確保每項關鍵工作至少有兩位合格的團隊成員能執行。

toeic.example_en: Our employee resource group for working parents meets monthly and organizes events on family-friendly company policies.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為職場父母設立的員工資源社群每月聚會，並籌辦友善家庭公司政策的相關活動。

toeic.example_en: Our women in engineering affinity group hosts speaker events, mentoring circles, and informal monthly networking meetups.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的女性工程師共同興趣團體舉辦講者活動、導師圈以及每月非正式社交聚會。

toeic.example_en: The annual employee survey gathers honest feedback on management, culture, benefits, and overall employee work experience.
toeic.example_zh: 年度員工調查蒐集對管理、文化、福利以及整體員工工作體驗的誠實回饋。

toeic.example_en: The team appreciated the surprise pizza lunch, which was a small but welcome morale booster on a stressful afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊很感謝這場驚喜披薩午餐，在忙碌的午後是個微小但受歡迎的提振士氣方式。

toeic.example_en: Our quarterly team building event combines a fun activity with a short reflection on our shared working principles.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每季的團隊建立活動結合趣味活動與對團隊共同合作原則的簡短反思。

toeic.example_en: The annual company offsite brings the whole leadership team together for three days of strategy and planning.
toeic.example_zh: 年度公司外訓活動讓整個領導團隊齊聚三天，進行策略制定與規劃。

toeic.example_en: Five-year, ten-year, and twenty-year service award recipients are recognized at the annual end-of-year company celebration.
toeic.example_zh: 每年年終公司慶祝會上會表揚服務五年、十年與二十年的服務年資獎得主。

toeic.example_en: A milestone award celebrates major life events such as work anniversaries, retirement, or completing a flagship project.
toeic.example_zh: 里程碑獎用來慶祝重大事件，例如工作週年、退休或完成旗艦專案。

toeic.example_en: The employee of the month receives a small bonus, public recognition, and a reserved premium parking spot.
toeic.example_zh: 本月最佳員工會獲得小額獎金、公開表揚以及一個保留的優先停車位。

toeic.example_en: Our five company values guide everyday behavior from product decisions to how we treat colleagues and customers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的五項公司核心價值指引從產品決策到對待同事與客戶的日常行為。

toeic.example_en: Our culture deck is shared with every candidate during the interview process to set clear mutual expectations.
toeic.example_zh: 面試流程中我們會與每位候選人分享公司文化簡報，以建立明確的雙向期望。

toeic.example_en: Cultural onboarding goes beyond paperwork and helps new hires understand how decisions are really made here.
toeic.example_zh: 文化融入訓練不只是處理文件，更幫助新進員工了解這裡的決策實際是如何進行的。

toeic.example_en: The first-day checklist covers laptop setup, security badge pickup, tour of the office, and introductions.
toeic.example_zh: 報到首日檢核表涵蓋筆電設定、領取門禁卡、辦公室導覽與介紹同事。

toeic.example_en: All employment offers are contingent on successful background verification, including education, employment history, and criminal records.
toeic.example_zh: 所有錄取通知均以成功通過背景查核為條件，包含學歷、工作經歷與犯罪紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Reference verification calls usually focus on past performance, teamwork, and the reason for the candidate's departure.
toeic.example_zh: 推薦人查證電話通常聚焦於過去績效、團隊合作以及候選人離職的原因。

toeic.example_en: Work eligibility verification confirms that new hires can legally work in the country where they will be employed.
toeic.example_zh: 工作資格查驗確認新進員工能合法在其聘僱所在國家工作。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) I-9 表（美國僱用資格表）
toeic.example_en: All US-based new hires must complete the I-9 form within three business days of starting work.
toeic.example_zh: 所有在美國的新進員工必須在開始工作後三個工作天內完成 I-9 表。

toeic.example_en: Please complete the tax withholding form online so the correct amount is deducted from each upcoming paycheck.
toeic.example_zh: 請線上完成扣繳稅表，以便從接下來每筆薪資中正確扣除相應金額。

toeic.example_en: Complete your payroll setup, including bank details and tax forms, before the second Friday of the month.
toeic.example_zh: 請在當月第二個週五前完成薪資設定，包括銀行帳戶資料與稅務表格。

toeic.example_en: Your monthly wage slip itemizes gross pay, all tax deductions, social contributions, and any voluntary benefit contributions.
toeic.example_zh: 你的每月薪資單列出毛薪、所有稅項扣除、社會保險提撥以及任何自願福利提撥。

toeic.example_en: Your salary review meeting takes place every March, and any adjustments take effect from the first April.
toeic.example_zh: 你的薪資檢視會議每年三月進行，任何調整自四月一日起生效。

toeic.example_en: Talent benchmarking against competitors helps us understand where our capabilities are strong and where we need investment.
toeic.example_zh: 與競爭對手進行人才標竿比較，幫助我們了解能力強項與需要投資的領域。

toeic.example_en: Annual competency assessment results inform individual development plans, promotion decisions, and tailored training investments for each employee.
toeic.example_zh: 年度職能評估結果用於制定個人發展計畫、晉升決策以及為每位員工量身打造的培訓投資。

toeic.example_en: Our personal effectiveness workshop helps participants build habits in time management, prioritization, and clear daily communication.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的個人效能工作坊幫助學員培養時間管理、優先排序與清晰日常溝通的習慣。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 領導者的影子（行為影響力）
toeic.example_en: A leader's leadership shadow includes everything they say, do, and tolerate from their team members daily.
toeic.example_zh: 領導者的影子包含他們每天說的、做的，以及對團隊成員所容忍的一切。

toeic.example_en: Unconscious bias training helps interviewers notice mental shortcuts that may influence their hiring decisions unfairly.
toeic.example_zh: 無意識偏見培訓幫助面試官察覺可能不公平地影響招募決策的心理捷徑。

toeic.example_en: Annual inclusion training equips managers to create environments where every team member feels heard and respected.
toeic.example_zh: 年度包容性培訓使主管能建立一個讓每位團隊成員都感到被聆聽與尊重的環境。

toeic.example_en: Effective diversity training goes beyond awareness and provides practical actions managers can take in daily decision making.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的多元化培訓不僅止於意識，更提供主管在日常決策中可採取的實際行動。

toeic.example_en: Anti-harassment training is required annually and covers reporting channels, workplace examples, and how to support a colleague.
toeic.example_zh: 反騷擾培訓每年必修，涵蓋通報管道、職場案例以及如何支持同事。

toeic.example_en: Our respect at work policy clarifies acceptable behavior and the steps to take if you witness any violation.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的職場尊重政策釐清可接受的行為，以及若目擊任何違規時應採取的步驟。

toeic.example_en: Employees may submit a grievance form to HR if they experience or witness unfair workplace treatment of any kind.
toeic.example_zh: 員工若遭遇或目擊任何形式的職場不公對待，可向人資提交申訴表。

toeic.example_en: We invest in a speak-up culture so concerns reach leadership before they become more serious organizational problems.
toeic.example_zh: 我們投資於勇於發聲文化，讓疑慮在演變成更嚴重的組織問題前傳達給領導層。

toeic.example_en: An open-door manager makes time for impromptu conversations and listens carefully without interrupting the team member.
toeic.example_zh: 開放式溝通主管會為臨時對話騰出時間，並耐心傾聽團隊成員而不打斷。

toeic.example_en: Trust building takes time and requires consistent follow-through on commitments, transparent communication, and accepting honest feedback gracefully.
toeic.example_zh: 信任建立需要時間，並要求一致的承諾兌現、透明的溝通以及優雅地接受誠實的回饋。

toeic.example_en: Teams with high psychological safety share mistakes openly and learn from them rather than hiding the truth.
toeic.example_zh: 心理安全感高的團隊會公開分享錯誤並從中學習，而非隱藏真相。

toeic.example_en: We hold a team retrospective at the end of every project to capture lessons learned and improvements.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在每個專案結束時舉行團隊回顧會議，蒐集學到的經驗與可改善之處。

toeic.example_en: Our staff greet every customer warmly as soon as they enter the store.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的員工會在顧客一走進店裡時就熱情地迎接他們。

toeic.example_en: Please let me know if I can assist you with anything today.
toeic.example_zh: 如果今天有任何我可以協助您的地方，請告訴我。

toeic.example_en: We received a complaint about the long wait time at the checkout counter.
toeic.example_zh: 我們收到一則關於結帳櫃台等待時間過長的投訴。

toeic.example_en: Our store policy allows returns only with the original receipt and tags attached.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的商店政策只允許在保留原始收據和吊牌的情況下退貨。

toeic.example_en: Please proceed to the checkout counter when you are ready to pay.
toeic.example_zh: 當您準備好結帳時，請走到結帳櫃台。

toeic.example_en: Would you like a paper shopping bag, or do you prefer to bring your own?
toeic.example_zh: 您想要紙製購物袋，還是您比較想自己帶？

toeic.example_en: The fitting room is located at the back of the store near the children's section.
toeic.example_zh: 試衣間位於商店後方靠近兒童區的地方。

toeic.example_en: If you need a different size, any store associate would be glad to help.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您需要不同尺寸，任何店員都很樂意協助您。

toeic.example_en: Please check the price tag, since this item is currently on sale.
toeic.example_zh: 請查看價格標籤，因為這項商品目前正在特價中。

toeic.example_en: Let me ring up your items at this register, since the other line is long.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我在這台收銀機為您結帳，因為另一條隊伍很長。

toeic.example_en: You can simply tap to pay with your phone if the purchase is under fifty dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 如果消費金額在五十元以下，您可以直接用手機感應支付。

toeic.example_en: May I scan your loyalty card before I finalize today's transaction?
toeic.example_zh: 在我完成今天的交易之前，可以掃描您的會員卡嗎？

toeic.example_en: Our rewards program lets members earn one point for every dollar spent.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的獎勵計畫讓會員每消費一元就能獲得一點。

toeic.example_en: You can redeem points for a discount on any regular-priced item in the store.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以用點數兌換店內任何正價商品的折扣。

toeic.example_en: Would you like to sign up for our free membership at the customer service desk?
toeic.example_zh: 您願意在顧客服務台註冊我們的免費會員資格嗎？

toeic.example_en: Your membership gives you access to exclusive sales and early product previews.
toeic.example_zh: 您的會員資格讓您可以享受獨家特賣和產品的搶先預覽。

toeic.example_en: Free shipping is one of the most popular member benefits we offer.
toeic.example_zh: 免運費是我們提供的最受歡迎的會員福利之一。

toeic.example_en: That model is currently in stock at our downtown location.
toeic.example_zh: 該款型號目前在我們市中心的門市有庫存。

toeic.example_en: I am sorry, but the blue color is out of stock until next Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 很抱歉，藍色款式缺貨，要到下週一才會補貨。

toeic.example_en: We typically restock these shelves every Tuesday and Friday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我們通常會在每週二和週五早上補貨到這些貨架上。

toeic.example_en: Let me write you a raincheck so you can buy it at the sale price later.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我幫您開一張補購券，這樣您之後也可以用特價購買。

toeic.example_en: We can issue in-store credit if you no longer have your original receipt.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您不再擁有原始收據，我們可以開立店內購物金。

toeic.example_en: Would you like a gift receipt in case the recipient needs to exchange it?
toeic.example_zh: 您想要一張禮品收據，以防收禮人需要更換嗎？

toeic.example_en: Our team will gift wrap any purchase for free during the holiday season.
toeic.example_zh: 在假期期間，我們的團隊會免費為任何購買的商品包裝禮物。

toeic.example_en: Shopping carts are available by the main entrance and the parking lot.
toeic.example_zh: 在主要入口和停車場旁可以取用購物車。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 商店指南；樓層導覽
toeic.example_en: The store directory by the elevators shows which floor each department is on.
toeic.example_zh: 電梯旁的樓層導覽顯示了每個部門位於哪一層樓。

toeic.example_en: Please ask at the information desk if you cannot find what you are looking for.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您找不到您要的東西，請到詢問處詢問。

toeic.example_en: Our team prides itself on providing courteous service to every shopper.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的團隊以為每位顧客提供禮貌的服務為傲。

toeic.example_en: The staff at this location are always friendly and willing to answer questions.
toeic.example_zh: 這間門市的員工總是很親切，也樂於回答問題。

toeic.example_en: We expect every team member to remain polite even with difficult customers.
toeic.example_zh: 即使面對難相處的顧客，我們也希望每位團隊成員都能保持禮貌。

toeic.example_en: Please be patient while I check the inventory in our back room for you.
toeic.example_zh: 請耐心等候，我會到後方庫房幫您查詢庫存。

toeic.example_en: Good service starts with being attentive to what each customer really needs.
toeic.example_zh: 好的服務從用心留意每位顧客真正的需求開始。

toeic.example_en: We train our staff to look approachable and to smile when customers walk in.
toeic.example_zh: 我們訓練員工要看起來平易近人，並在顧客進門時面帶微笑。

toeic.example_en: A simple smile can make a tired customer feel welcome in our shop.
toeic.example_zh: 一個簡單的微笑就能讓疲累的顧客在我們店裡感到受歡迎。

toeic.example_en: Maintain eye contact and listen carefully when the customer is speaking.
toeic.example_zh: 當顧客說話時，要保持眼神接觸並仔細聆聽。

toeic.example_en: Your body language should show that you are open to helping the shopper.
toeic.example_zh: 您的肢體語言應該表現出您樂意協助顧客的態度。

toeic.example_en: Every visitor deserves a warm welcome the moment they enter the store.
toeic.example_zh: 每位來訪者在踏進店裡的那一刻都值得一個熱情的歡迎。

toeic.example_en: May I help you find a specific item in our home decor section today?
toeic.example_zh: 今天請問需要幫忙在家居裝飾區找特定的商品嗎？

toeic.example_en: When customers say they are just looking, give them space but stay available.
toeic.example_zh: 當顧客說他們只是看看時，給他們空間，但保持隨時可協助的狀態。

toeic.example_en: Strong product knowledge helps staff answer customer questions with confidence.
toeic.example_zh: 扎實的產品知識能幫助員工有自信地回答顧客的問題。

toeic.example_en: Let me walk you through the main features of this coffee machine.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我為您介紹這台咖啡機的主要功能。

toeic.example_en: One key benefit of this fabric is that it dries very quickly after washing.
toeic.example_zh: 這種布料的一個主要好處是洗後乾得非常快。

toeic.example_en: We are giving a product demonstration of the new blender at three o'clock today.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今天三點會進行新款攪拌機的產品示範。

toeic.example_en: Customers can take a thirty-day trial before deciding to keep the mattress.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客可以先試用三十天，再決定是否要留下這張床墊。

toeic.example_en: Would you like to test drive the vacuum on the rug over there before buying?
toeic.example_zh: 您想在那邊的地毯上試用一下吸塵器再決定購買嗎？

toeic.example_en: Please take a fabric swatch home so you can match it with your sofa.
toeic.example_zh: 請帶一塊樣布回家，這樣您就可以和您的沙發搭配看看。

toeic.example_en: This jacket also comes in three other color options on the back display.
toeic.example_zh: 這件夾克在後面的展示架上還有另外三種顏色選項。

toeic.example_en: Please refer to the size chart on the wall to find your best fit.
toeic.example_zh: 請參考牆上的尺寸表來找到最適合您的尺寸。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 尺寸準確；符合標準尺寸
toeic.example_en: Most customers say this brand runs true to size, so no adjustment is needed.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數顧客表示這個品牌的尺寸很準確，所以不需要調整。

toeic.example_en: This shirt has a tailored fit, so it sits closer to the body than a regular cut.
toeic.example_zh: 這件襯衫採用修身剪裁，因此會比一般版型更貼身。

toeic.example_en: We offer free alteration on the hem if you buy any pair of dress pants.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您購買任何一件西裝褲，我們提供免費的褲腳修改服務。

toeic.example_en: Our in-house tailor can finish most alterations within one business day.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的駐店裁縫師通常可以在一個工作日內完成大部分修改。

toeic.example_en: We will open another register if the checkout line gets longer than five people.
toeic.example_zh: 如果結帳隊伍超過五個人，我們會再開一台收銀機。

toeic.example_en: Please queue up behind the yellow line until the next cashier is free.
toeic.example_zh: 請在黃線後方排隊，直到下一位收銀員空出來。

toeic.example_en: Who is next in line, please come over to register number three.
toeic.example_zh: 下一位是誰，麻煩請到三號收銀機。

toeic.example_en: We are including a complimentary item with every purchase over fifty dollars today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天每筆滿五十元的消費我們都會附上一份贈品。

toeic.example_en: Members will receive a bonus gift when they spend over one hundred dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 會員消費滿一百元將會收到額外的贈禮。

toeic.example_en: Please take a free sample of our new fragrance home to try.
toeic.example_zh: 請帶一份我們新款香水的免費試用品回家試用。

toeic.example_en: Our weekend promotion offers fifteen percent off all winter coats and boots.
toeic.example_zh: 我們週末的促銷活動所有冬季外套和靴子打八五折。

toeic.example_en: The weekly flyer lists every item on sale and the exact dates of the promotion.
toeic.example_zh: 週間傳單列出了所有特價商品以及促銷活動的確切日期。

toeic.example_en: All clearance items are final sale and cannot be returned after purchase.
toeic.example_zh: 所有清倉商品為最終特賣，購買後不可退貨。

toeic.example_en: We just took another markdown on these sweaters earlier this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今天稍早又再次調降了這些毛衣的價格。

toeic.example_en: All socks are buy one get one free until the end of this month.
toeic.example_zh: 所有襪子在這個月底之前都是買一送一。

toeic.example_en: Do not miss this limited-time offer because it ends on Sunday at midnight.
toeic.example_zh: 不要錯過這個限時優惠，因為活動會在週日午夜結束。

toeic.example_en: Customers lined up early to grab the doorbuster deals on televisions.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客一早就排隊搶購電視機的開門特價。

toeic.example_en: Early bird shoppers can enjoy an extra ten percent off before nine in the morning.
toeic.example_zh: 早鳥顧客可以在早上九點前享受額外的九折優惠。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 最後通知；最後機會
toeic.example_en: This is the last call for the seasonal sale, which ends in one hour.
