toeic.example_zh: 這是季節特賣的最後通知，活動將在一小時後結束。

toeic.example_en: A happy customer is the best advertisement we could ever ask for.
toeic.example_zh: 一位滿意的顧客就是我們所能擁有的最好的廣告。

toeic.example_en: Always listen carefully before responding to an unhappy customer at the desk.
toeic.example_zh: 在櫃台回應不滿意的顧客之前，一定要先仔細傾聽。

toeic.example_en: I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by our late delivery.
toeic.example_zh: 對於我們延遲送貨所造成的不便，我誠摯地向您道歉。

toeic.example_en: Please reassure the customer that the replacement will arrive by Thursday.
toeic.example_zh: 請讓顧客安心，告訴他替換品會在週四前送到。

toeic.example_en: It helps to empathize with the shopper before suggesting a solution.
toeic.example_zh: 在提出解決方案之前，先同理顧客的感受會很有幫助。

toeic.example_en: Thank you for the clear explanation of how the return process works.
toeic.example_zh: 謝謝您清楚地解釋退貨流程是如何運作的。

toeic.example_en: There seems to be a small misunderstanding about the warranty terms.
toeic.example_zh: 關於保固條款似乎有一些小誤會。

toeic.example_en: I will need supervisor approval before I can process this large refund.
toeic.example_zh: 在我處理這筆大額退款之前，需要取得主管核准。

toeic.example_en: Let me get the manager on duty so she can speak with you directly.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我請值班經理過來，這樣她可以直接和您談。

toeic.example_en: Our store manager personally handles all serious customer complaints.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的店長會親自處理所有嚴重的顧客投訴。

toeic.example_en: Please ask the shift manager if you need to take an extra break today.
toeic.example_zh: 如果今天需要多休息一次，請詢問班別經理。

toeic.example_en: We will forward your suggestion to head office for further review.
toeic.example_zh: 我們會將您的建議轉交總部以進行進一步審查。

toeic.example_en: Our front line staff receive monthly training on handling difficult customers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的第一線員工每月會接受處理難相處顧客的訓練。

toeic.example_en: A smooth checkout experience increases the chance that customers come back.
toeic.example_zh: 順暢的結帳體驗會提高顧客再次回購的機會。

toeic.example_en: We aim to keep the average wait time under three minutes at every register.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的目標是讓每台收銀機的平均等待時間不超過三分鐘。

toeic.example_en: Our service hours are from nine in the morning until nine at night.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的服務時間是從早上九點到晚上九點。

toeic.example_en: Our holiday hours are posted on the front door and on our website.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的假期營業時間張貼在前門和我們的網站上。

toeic.example_en: Please check the store hours before driving over, as we close early on Sundays.
toeic.example_zh: 開車過來前請確認商店營業時間，因為我們週日提早打烊。

toeic.example_en: Our location stays open late on Fridays for customers who work long hours.
toeic.example_zh: 我們這間門市週五會營業到很晚，方便工時長的顧客。

toeic.example_en: Our anniversary sale runs all next week with discounts of up to forty percent.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的週年慶特賣將進行整個下週，最高可享六折優惠。

toeic.example_en: The seasonal sale begins right after the holidays and ends in mid-January.
toeic.example_zh: 季節特賣會在假期結束後立即開始，並於一月中旬結束。

toeic.example_en: Check the clearance rack at the back, since prices there change every week.
toeic.example_zh: 請看後面的清倉貨架，因為那裡的價格每週都會變動。

toeic.example_en: Please note that all items marked final sale cannot be returned or exchanged.
toeic.example_zh: 請注意，所有標示為最終特賣的商品都不可退貨或更換。

toeic.example_en: We can offer you store credit instead of a cash refund for this item.
toeic.example_zh: 我們可以提供您商店購物金，而不是現金退款。

toeic.example_en: Our exchange policy lets you swap any item for a different size within thirty days.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的換貨政策允許您在三十天內將任何商品換成不同尺寸。

toeic.example_en: The refund policy is clearly printed on the back of every sales receipt.
toeic.example_zh: 退款政策清楚地印在每張銷售收據的背面。

toeic.example_en: We offer no questions asked returns within thirty days of the original purchase.
toeic.example_zh: 我們提供購買後三十天內不問理由的退貨服務。

toeic.example_en: Every product we sell comes with our satisfaction guaranteed promise.
toeic.example_zh: 我們所銷售的每樣產品都附有滿意保證的承諾。

toeic.example_en: Let me double check the price in our system before I ring up your purchase.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我先在系統中再次確認價格，然後再為您結帳。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 比價優惠；價格匹配
toeic.example_en: We will price match any competitor that sells the exact same model.
toeic.example_zh: 如果有競爭對手銷售完全相同的型號，我們會提供比價優惠。

toeic.example_en: Could you show me the competitor price so I can request approval to match it?
toeic.example_zh: 可以給我看一下競爭對手的價格嗎？這樣我才能申請核准進行價格匹配。

toeic.example_en: I want to make sure you are getting the best price available today.
toeic.example_zh: 我想確保您今天能拿到最優惠的價格。

toeic.example_en: Unfortunately this device is now out of warranty, but we can still repair it.
toeic.example_zh: 很遺憾這台設備現在已經超過保固期，但我們仍然可以為您維修。

toeic.example_en: Would you like to add an extended warranty for an extra two years of coverage?
toeic.example_zh: 您想加購延長保固，多獲得兩年的保障嗎？

toeic.example_en: All laptops come with a one-year manufacturer warranty against defects.
toeic.example_zh: 所有筆記型電腦都附帶一年的原廠保固，涵蓋瑕疵問題。

toeic.example_en: Our service plan covers free repairs and yearly cleaning for three years.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的服務方案涵蓋三年的免費維修和年度清潔。

toeic.example_en: We offer in-house repair service for most small appliances we sell.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為大部分自家銷售的小家電提供店內維修服務。

toeic.example_en: Please pick up your repaired item within fourteen days of being notified.
toeic.example_zh: 請在收到通知後的十四天內取回您送修的商品。

toeic.example_en: Curbside pickup is free and usually ready within two hours of your order.
toeic.example_zh: 路邊取貨是免費的，通常在您下單後兩小時內就能準備好。

toeic.example_en: Your online order is ready and waiting at the customer pickup counter.
toeic.example_zh: 您的線上訂單已經準備好，正在顧客取貨櫃台等候。

toeic.example_en: Please confirm the shipping address before I finalize your order today.
toeic.example_zh: 在我完成您今天的訂單之前，請確認寄送地址。

toeic.example_en: The billing address must match the address linked to your credit card.
toeic.example_zh: 帳單地址必須與您信用卡所綁定的地址相符。

toeic.example_en: Your estimated delivery date is between Tuesday and Thursday of next week.
toeic.example_zh: 您預計的送達日期是下週二到下週四之間。

toeic.example_en: The delivery fee is waived for orders over seventy-five dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 訂單滿七十五美元即可免收送貨費。

toeic.example_en: Members enjoy free shipping on every order regardless of the size.
toeic.example_zh: 會員不論訂單大小，每筆訂單都享有免運費。

toeic.example_en: Rush delivery costs an extra fifteen dollars but arrives the very next day.
toeic.example_zh: 快速送貨需額外收取十五元，但隔天就會送到。

toeic.example_en: Standard shipping usually takes three to five business days to arrive.
toeic.example_zh: 標準運送通常需要三到五個工作天才會送達。

toeic.example_en: If your lost package does not show up by Friday, we will send a replacement.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您遺失的包裹在週五前還沒出現，我們會寄一個替換品給您。

toeic.example_en: Please email us a photo of the damaged item so we can process a refund quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 請將損壞商品的照片寄給我們，以便我們快速處理退款。

toeic.example_en: I am sorry that you received the wrong item, and I will arrange an exchange.
toeic.example_zh: 很抱歉您收到了錯誤的商品，我會幫您安排換貨。

toeic.example_en: Could you tell me which missing item is not in your delivered package?
toeic.example_zh: 您可以告訴我您送達的包裹中缺了哪一件商品嗎？

toeic.example_en: Please describe the incorrect order details so I can correct our records.
toeic.example_zh: 請描述訂單錯誤的細節，讓我可以更正我們的資料。

toeic.example_en: You should receive an order confirmation email within five minutes of checkout.
toeic.example_zh: 您應該會在結帳後的五分鐘內收到訂單確認的電子郵件。

toeic.example_en: We will send a tracking link by email once your order has shipped today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天您的訂單一旦出貨，我們會用電子郵件寄上追蹤連結。

toeic.example_en: The delivery driver will call when he is about ten minutes away from your home.
toeic.example_zh: 送貨員在距離您家大約十分鐘時會打電話通知您。

toeic.example_en: This package is signature required, so someone over eighteen must be home.
toeic.example_zh: 這個包裹需要簽名，所以家中必須有十八歲以上的人在。

toeic.example_en: Your order is currently in transit and should arrive by Thursday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 您的訂單目前正在運送中，應該會在週四下午前送達。

toeic.example_en: We are sorry about the delayed shipment caused by yesterday's bad weather.
toeic.example_zh: 我們對於昨天惡劣天氣造成的延遲出貨感到抱歉。

toeic.example_en: The estimated arrival of your order is between three and five this afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 您的訂單預計到達時間是今天下午三點到五點之間。

toeic.example_en: We work with three courier companies to make sure your package arrives on time.
toeic.example_zh: 我們和三間快遞公司合作，以確保您的包裹準時送達。

toeic.example_en: Please choose a two-hour delivery slot that works best for your schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 請選擇一個最適合您行程的兩小時配送時段。

toeic.example_en: I will send a follow-up message tomorrow with the tracking number and details.
toeic.example_zh: 我明天會寄一則後續訊息，附上追蹤號碼和詳細資訊。

toeic.example_en: We always send a thank you email to first-time buyers within twenty-four hours.
toeic.example_zh: 我們總是在二十四小時內寄送感謝電子郵件給首次購買的顧客。

toeic.example_en: Please take a moment to fill out our short satisfaction survey at checkout.
toeic.example_zh: 結帳時請花點時間填寫我們的簡短滿意度調查。

toeic.example_en: The survey link will be emailed to you a few days after your purchase.
toeic.example_zh: 問卷連結會在您購買後幾天透過電子郵件寄給您。

toeic.example_en: Please rate your experience on a scale from one to five at the end of the survey.
toeic.example_zh: 請在問卷最後以一到五的等級為您的體驗評分。

toeic.example_en: Our store has kept a four-and-a-half star rating online for three years.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的商店在網路上已經保持四星半的星級評等三年了。

toeic.example_en: Please leave us an online review if you enjoyed shopping with us today.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您今天的購物體驗很愉快，請為我們留下線上評論。

toeic.example_en: Each positive review helps new customers feel confident about choosing our store.
toeic.example_zh: 每則正面評論都能幫助新顧客有信心地選擇我們的商店。

toeic.example_en: We respond to every negative review within twenty-four hours of posting.
toeic.example_zh: 我們會在每則負面評論張貼後的二十四小時內回應。

toeic.example_en: Please fill out this complaint form so we can investigate the issue thoroughly.
toeic.example_zh: 請填寫這份投訴表，讓我們可以徹底地調查這個問題。

toeic.example_en: Please keep your case number handy when you call us back about this issue.
toeic.example_zh: 下次來電詢問這個問題時，請隨身準備好您的案件編號。

toeic.example_en: Your reference number for this return is at the top of the printed slip.
toeic.example_zh: 本次退貨的參考編號印在收據的最上方。

toeic.example_en: Please quote your ticket number whenever you contact our service team.
toeic.example_zh: 聯絡我們的服務團隊時請提供您的工單編號。

toeic.example_en: I will open a ticket so our repair team can follow up with you tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 我會開立一張工單，讓我們的維修團隊明天能夠跟進您的狀況。

toeic.example_en: We will close the case once you confirm that the replacement arrived safely.
toeic.example_zh: 一旦您確認替換品安全送達，我們就會結案。

toeic.example_en: If we cannot reach a solution, I will escalate the issue to my supervisor.
toeic.example_zh: 如果我們無法達成解決方案，我會將這個問題升級給我的主管處理。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 以解決方案為導向的
toeic.example_en: We want every team member to be solution-oriented when problems come up.
toeic.example_zh: 當問題出現時，我們希望每位團隊成員都能以解決方案為導向。

toeic.example_en: Each new employee is trained on our service standard during their first week.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新員工在第一週都會接受我們服務標準的訓練。

toeic.example_en: Our service philosophy is to treat every customer like a long-time friend.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的服務理念是把每位顧客當作老朋友來對待。

toeic.example_en: A strong service mindset can turn a complaint into a loyal customer.
toeic.example_zh: 強大的服務心態能將一次投訴轉變為一位忠實顧客。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 多做一點；加倍努力
toeic.example_en: We always go the extra mile to help customers find what they really need.
toeic.example_zh: 我們總是多做一點，幫助顧客找到他們真正需要的東西。

toeic.example_en: Adding a personal touch to your service makes every interaction more memorable.
toeic.example_zh: 在您的服務中加入個人化關懷，會讓每次互動更令人印象深刻。

toeic.example_en: Using a warm tone on the phone helps the caller feel respected and welcome.
toeic.example_zh: 在電話中使用親切的語氣，能讓來電者感覺受到尊重與歡迎。

toeic.example_en: Please keep a professional tone when writing follow-up emails to customers.
toeic.example_zh: 撰寫給顧客的後續電子郵件時，請保持專業的語氣。

toeic.example_en: Clear communication helps avoid most misunderstandings at the service desk.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚的溝通能幫助避免服務台大部分的誤會。

toeic.example_en: Our follow-up survey arrives by email three days after your purchase.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的後續調查會在您購買後三天透過電子郵件送達。

toeic.example_en: Please drop your comments into the feedback box near the front entrance.
toeic.example_zh: 請將您的意見投入前門入口附近的意見箱。

toeic.example_en: Use the suggestion form to tell us what products you would like to see next.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用建議表告訴我們您希望接下來看到哪些商品。

toeic.example_en: The customer voice shapes our product choices for every coming season.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客心聲塑造著我們每一季的產品選擇。

toeic.example_en: You can save items to your wish list and check them again the next time you visit.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以將商品儲存到願望清單，下次造訪時再次查看。

toeic.example_en: We changed the store layout last month so customers can find items more easily.
toeic.example_zh: 我們上個月調整了商店配置，讓顧客能更容易找到商品。

toeic.example_en: Our window display is updated every two weeks to match the latest collection.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的櫥窗展示每兩週更新一次，以搭配最新系列。

toeic.example_en: Clear in-store signage helps customers find sale sections without asking for help.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚的店內標示能幫助顧客不需開口詢問就找到特賣區。

toeic.example_en: The premium watches are kept inside the locked display case near the entrance.
toeic.example_zh: 高級手錶被存放在入口附近上鎖的展示櫃內。

toeic.example_en: Please update the shelf label as soon as the new price is approved.
toeic.example_zh: 新價格一經核准，請立即更新貨架標籤。

toeic.example_en: Our team is busy stocking shelves before the store opens at ten this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的團隊正忙著在商店今天早上十點開門前把商品上架。

toeic.example_en: Good facing keeps the shelves neat and makes products look easy to grab.
toeic.example_zh: 把商品整齊地正面朝外擺放，會讓貨架看起來整齊，產品也更容易拿取。

toeic.example_en: Please spot clean any spills on the floor before customers walk into the area.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客走進該區域之前，請先把地板上的任何潑灑物局部清潔乾淨。

toeic.example_en: Small kindnesses can leave a lasting impression on every shopper who visits.
toeic.example_zh: 小小的善意能在每位來訪的顧客心中留下持久的印象。

toeic.example_en: A loyal customer is far more valuable than a single big sale.
toeic.example_zh: 一位忠實顧客遠比一筆大訂單更有價值。

toeic.example_en: Repeat business now accounts for over half of our monthly revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 回頭客的生意現在佔了我們每月營收的一半以上。

toeic.example_en: We offer a small gift to every first-time buyer who joins our membership.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為每位加入會員的首次購買者提供一份小禮物。

toeic.example_en: Each VIP customer receives a personal invitation to our private sale event.
toeic.example_zh: 每位VIP顧客都會收到我們私人特賣活動的個人邀請函。

toeic.example_en: Gold member status gives you free returns and exclusive birthday offers.
toeic.example_zh: 金級會員資格讓您享有免費退貨和獨家生日優惠。

toeic.example_en: You are only fifty dollars away from a tier upgrade in our loyalty program.
toeic.example_zh: 您距離我們忠誠計畫的等級升級只差五十元。

toeic.example_en: Members receive a fifteen percent birthday discount during their birthday month.
toeic.example_zh: 會員在生日當月可享有八五折的生日折扣。

toeic.example_en: Sign up today and enjoy a welcome offer of ten dollars off your first order.
toeic.example_zh: 今天加入會員即可享有首筆訂單折抵十元的歡迎優惠。

toeic.example_en: Tell a friend about our referral program and you can both receive store credit.
toeic.example_zh: 告訴朋友我們的推薦計畫，你們兩位都能獲得商店購物金。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 告訴朋友的（推薦）
toeic.example_en: Our tell-a-friend campaign gives both people a five dollar reward this month.
toeic.example_zh: 我們本月的告訴朋友活動會給雙方各五元的獎勵。

toeic.example_en: We send a handwritten thank you card with every large furniture order.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每筆大型家具訂單都會附上一張手寫的感謝卡。

toeic.example_en: Strong after-sales service is one of the main reasons our customers come back.
toeic.example_zh: 強而有力的售後服務是我們顧客回流的主要原因之一。

toeic.example_en: Our after-sales support team is available seven days a week by phone.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的售後支援團隊每週七天都可透過電話聯絡。

toeic.example_en: Please complete the product registration online to activate your warranty.
toeic.example_zh: 請在線上完成產品註冊，以啟用您的保固。

toeic.example_en: The user manual explains how to clean the machine without damaging the parts.
toeic.example_zh: 使用手冊說明了如何在不損壞零件的情況下清潔機器。

toeic.example_en: Follow the quick start guide so you can use the device within five minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 請依照快速入門指南操作，您就能在五分鐘內使用這台裝置。

toeic.example_en: There is a small instruction sheet inside the box next to the cables.
toeic.example_zh: 盒子內電纜旁附有一張小型說明書。

toeic.example_en: Please contact us with the model number if you find any missing parts.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您發現任何缺漏零件，請告知我們型號並與我們聯絡。

toeic.example_en: We can ship a spare part for free if your item is still under warranty.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您的商品仍在保固期內，我們可以免費寄送備用零件。

toeic.example_en: The replacement part should arrive at your home within three to five days.
toeic.example_zh: 替換零件應該會在三到五天內送達您家。

toeic.example_en: Print the return label and attach it firmly to the original shipping box.
toeic.example_zh: 請列印退貨標籤並牢牢地貼在原始的運送箱上。

toeic.example_en: Please include the return slip inside the package along with your items.
toeic.example_zh: 請將退貨單和您的商品一起放入包裹中。

toeic.example_en: The return window for most items in our store is thirty calendar days.
toeic.example_zh: 我們商店大部分商品的退貨期限是三十個日曆日。

toeic.example_en: An in-store return is usually faster than mailing the package back to us.
toeic.example_zh: 店內退貨通常比把包裹寄回給我們更快。

toeic.example_en: If you cannot visit a store, please use our free mail-in return service.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您無法到店，請使用我們的免費郵寄退貨服務。

toeic.example_en: The refund amount will appear on your card within five to seven business days.
toeic.example_zh: 退款金額會在五到七個工作天內出現在您的信用卡上。

toeic.example_en: We can offer a partial refund if the item has been clearly used.
toeic.example_zh: 如果商品有明顯使用過的痕跡，我們可以提供部分退款。

toeic.example_en: You are entitled to a full refund because the product arrived damaged.
toeic.example_zh: 由於產品送達時已損壞，您有權獲得全額退款。

toeic.example_en: There is no refund on personalized items, but exchanges may be possible.
toeic.example_zh: 客製化商品不可退款，但可能可以換貨。

toeic.example_en: Instead of cash, you can choose a store voucher worth the same amount.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以選擇相同金額的商店禮券來代替現金。

toeic.example_en: I will check your gift card balance and tell you exactly how much is left.
toeic.example_zh: 我會查詢您的禮品卡餘額，並告訴您確切還剩下多少。

toeic.example_en: Would you like to reload your gift card with an additional twenty dollars?
toeic.example_zh: 您想為您的禮品卡再加值二十元嗎？

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 分開付款；分次付款
toeic.example_en: Sure, I can split payment between your gift card and a credit card today.
toeic.example_zh: 當然，今天我可以為您把付款分到禮品卡和信用卡兩種方式。

toeic.example_en: You can pay this purchase in three monthly installments without interest.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以分三期、每月支付，免利息來購買這件商品。

toeic.example_en: We offer a buy now pay later option for purchases above one hundred dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為超過一百元的消費提供先買後付的選項。

toeic.example_en: I am sorry, your card declined, would you like to try a different one?
toeic.example_zh: 很抱歉，您的卡片被拒了，您要不要試試別張卡？

toeic.example_en: I will need to enter the approval code before completing this manual sale.
toeic.example_zh: 在完成這筆手動交易之前，我需要輸入授權碼。

toeic.example_en: I will void the transaction and run it again with the correct discount.
toeic.example_zh: 我會取消這筆交易，並用正確的折扣重新刷一次。

toeic.example_en: I will process the refund right now and email a confirmation to your address.
toeic.example_zh: 我現在就為您處理退款，並寄一封確認信到您的信箱。

toeic.example_en: Please make sure the cash drawer is closed and locked at the end of the shift.
toeic.example_zh: 請確保在班次結束時收銀抽屜已經關上並上鎖。

toeic.example_en: Please count the till carefully before opening the store each morning.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上開店前請仔細清點錢櫃。

toeic.example_en: Would you like your change in small bills or one larger note?
toeic.example_zh: 您想要小面額鈔票還是一張較大面額的找零？

toeic.example_en: Would you like a printed receipt copy or just an email version today?
toeic.example_zh: 今天您想要紙本的收據副本，還是電子郵件版本就好？

toeic.example_en: We can send an e-receipt to the email address linked to your member account.
toeic.example_zh: 我們可以將電子收據寄送到您會員帳號綁定的電子信箱。

toeic.example_en: I can print a duplicate receipt if you lost the original for your records.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您弄丟了原本，我可以為您列印一份複本收據作為紀錄。

toeic.example_en: I will look up your transaction record using the date and last four digits.
toeic.example_zh: 我會用日期和卡號後四碼幫您查詢交易紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Your purchase history shows the last three orders from this account.
toeic.example_zh: 您的購買紀錄顯示這個帳號最近三筆訂單。

toeic.example_en: She has been a regular customer at this branch for nearly seven years.
toeic.example_zh: 她已經是這間分店將近七年的常客了。

toeic.example_en: We always try to make every walk-in customer feel just as valued as a member.
toeic.example_zh: 我們總是設法讓每位臨時上門的顧客都感覺和會員一樣受重視。

toeic.example_en: We can take a phone order if you cannot make it to the store before closing.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您無法在打烊前到店，我們可以接受電話訂購。

toeic.example_en: I will arrange a callback within two hours once the manager is back from lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 經理午休回來後，我會在兩小時內安排回電。

toeic.example_en: Please hold the line for one moment while I check our inventory system.
toeic.example_zh: 請稍候一下，我這就查詢我們的庫存系統。

toeic.example_en: I will transfer your call to our returns team so they can help you better.
toeic.example_zh: 我會將您的電話轉接到退貨部門，這樣他們能更妥善地協助您。

toeic.example_en: I understand you would like to speak to a manager, and I will get one now.
toeic.example_zh: 我明白您想與經理通話，我現在就請一位過來。

toeic.example_en: We make a courtesy call after every large delivery to confirm everything is fine.
toeic.example_zh: 每次大型送貨後我們都會撥一通禮貌性致電，確認一切順利。

toeic.example_en: Please accept my sincere apology for the long wait you experienced yesterday.
toeic.example_zh: 請接受我對於您昨天長時間等候所致上的誠摯道歉。

toeic.example_en: Let us make it right by offering free delivery on your next online order.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我們透過提供下次線上訂單免運費的方式來補救。

toeic.example_en: As a goodwill discount, please take ten percent off your next visit with this code.
toeic.example_zh: 作為善意折扣，請用這組代碼在下次造訪時享有九折優惠。

toeic.example_en: Please write a short note in the complaint log so the next shift can follow up.
toeic.example_zh: 請在投訴紀錄簿上寫個簡短的備註，讓下一班的人可以跟進。

toeic.example_en: Every customer issue is logged in our issue tracker for follow-up next morning.
toeic.example_zh: 每一個顧客的問題都會記錄在我們的問題追蹤系統中，隔天早上跟進。

toeic.example_en: Please update the service log with any unusual events from your shift today.
toeic.example_zh: 請在服務紀錄簿上更新您今天班次中發生的任何特殊事件。

toeic.example_en: Our morning daily briefing covers any new promotions and known issues.
toeic.example_zh: 我們早上的每日簡報會涵蓋所有新促銷活動和已知問題。

toeic.example_en: We start every shift with a short team huddle to align on today's targets.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每個班次開始時都會舉辦一場簡短的團隊會議，對齊今天的目標。

toeic.example_en: During shift change, please share any pending issues with the next team member.
toeic.example_zh: 換班時，請將任何未解決的問題交接給下一位團隊成員。

toeic.example_en: The morning shift starts at seven and ends at three in the afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 早班從早上七點開始，到下午三點結束。

toeic.example_en: The evening shift covers the busiest hours from five until store closing.
toeic.example_zh: 晚班負責從下午五點到打烊這段最忙碌的時段。

toeic.example_en: Please remind any remaining shoppers that store closing is in ten minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 請提醒店內任何剩下的顧客還有十分鐘就要打烊了。

toeic.example_en: All staff should arrive thirty minutes before store opening for setup.
toeic.example_zh: 所有員工應該在開店前三十分鐘到達，以便進行準備工作。

toeic.example_en: Let me check the stockroom to see if your size is still available in the back.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我去庫房查查看您的尺寸是否在後面還有貨。

toeic.example_en: Excess inventory is stored in the back room until shelves need restocking.
toeic.example_zh: 多餘的庫存會放在後場，直到貨架需要補貨為止。

toeic.example_en: We will do a full stock count on Sunday night after the store closes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們週日晚上閉店後會進行一次完整盤點。

toeic.example_en: The system shows low stock on this color, with only two units remaining.
toeic.example_zh: 系統顯示這個顏色的庫存很低，只剩兩件。

toeic.example_en: The chief executive shared stories from her recent business voyage across three Asian markets.
toeic.example_zh: 執行長分享了她最近橫跨三個亞洲市場的商務航程故事。

toeic.example_en: After the conference, attendees joined a half-day excursion to the historic district.
toeic.example_zh: 會議結束後，與會者參加了前往歷史街區的半日遊覽。

toeic.example_en: Our travel policy covers lodging up to two hundred dollars per night for business trips.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的差旅政策涵蓋商務旅行每晚最高兩百美元的住宿費用。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 禮貌；好意提供之物
toeic.example_en: The hotel provides a courtesy shuttle to the convention center every thirty minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 飯店每三十分鐘提供一班前往會議中心的禮賓接駁車。

toeic.example_en: Please record every taxi fare in the trip ledger so accounting can verify the expenses.
toeic.example_zh: 請將每筆計程車費登記在差旅分類帳中，以便會計能查核費用。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 折抵代碼；優惠券碼
toeic.example_en: Use the voucher code printed on your registration packet to claim a free welcome drink.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用報到包上印的折抵代碼兌換一杯免費迎賓飲料。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 入境貴賓室；抵達休息區
toeic.example_en: The driver will meet you in the arrival lounge holding a sign with your company name.
toeic.example_zh: 司機會在抵達休息區舉著寫有貴公司名稱的牌子迎接您。

toeic.example_en: Always check the departure board for last-minute gate changes before settling into a cafe.
toeic.example_zh: 在咖啡店坐下前，請務必先查看出境顯示板上的臨時登機門變動。

toeic.example_en: The gate agent kindly rerouted me onto an earlier flight after my meeting was rescheduled.
toeic.example_zh: 登機門地勤人員在我會議改期後親切地幫我改搭較早的航班。

toeic.example_en: The flight crew distributed customs forms shortly after we reached cruising altitude.
toeic.example_zh: 我們抵達巡航高度後不久，機組人員便發放了海關申報表。

toeic.example_en: The purser personally apologized for the delay and offered upgraded snacks to business travelers.
toeic.example_zh: 事務長親自為延誤道歉，並向商務旅客提供升級的點心。

toeic.example_en: Please raise your tray table whenever the cabin crew prepares for takeoff or landing.
toeic.example_zh: 每當客艙服務員準備起飛或降落時，請收起您的小桌板。

toeic.example_en: Connecting passengers boarded a tarmac transfer bus to reach the regional terminal.
toeic.example_zh: 轉機旅客搭乘停機坪接駁巴士前往區域航廈。

toeic.example_en: Frequent travelers in boarding zone one may proceed to the priority lane now.
toeic.example_zh: 登機分組區一的常客旅客現在可以前往優先通道。

toeic.example_en: Our updated policy permits premium economy on flights exceeding six hours.
toeic.example_zh: 我們更新後的政策允許超過六小時的航班搭乘豪華經濟艙。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 加長腿部空間經濟艙
toeic.example_en: Anna upgraded to economy plus so she could stretch her legs during the long flight.
toeic.example_zh: Anna 升級到加長腿部空間經濟艙，這樣長途飛行時可以伸展雙腿。

toeic.example_en: The new lay-flat seat made it possible to sleep before the morning negotiation.
toeic.example_zh: 新款全平躺座椅讓人能在晨間談判前好好睡一覺。

toeic.example_en: Many executives rely on in-flight Wi-Fi to finish reports before landing.
toeic.example_zh: 許多高階主管仰賴機上無線網路在降落前完成報告。

toeic.example_en: The in-flight magazine featured a profile of our client's newest hotel chain.
toeic.example_zh: 機上雜誌刊登了我們客戶最新連鎖飯店的專題報導。

toeic.example_en: Please confirm your seat assignment online to avoid surprises at the airport.
toeic.example_zh: 請線上確認您的座位安排，以免到機場時措手不及。

toeic.example_en: Changing my return ticket required paying a fare difference of about ninety dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 更改回程機票需要補繳大約九十美元的票價差額。

toeic.example_en: Make sure to flag any non-refundable booking when submitting your travel request.
toeic.example_zh: 提交差旅申請時，請務必註記任何不可退款的預訂。

toeic.example_en: Choose a refundable rate whenever the project timeline is still uncertain.
toeic.example_zh: 當專案時程仍不確定時，請選擇可退款的方案。

toeic.example_en: Corporate trip insurance covers cancellations caused by sudden client schedule changes.
toeic.example_zh: 公司旅遊保險涵蓋因客戶突然變更行程而導致的取消。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 旅遊警示；旅遊建議
toeic.example_en: Check the latest travel advisory for the destination before confirming your visit.
toeic.example_zh: 在確認出訪前，請查看該目的地最新的旅遊警示。

toeic.example_en: All travelers must fill out the emergency contact form before departing on company business.
toeic.example_zh: 所有差旅者在出發公務前都必須填寫緊急聯絡表單。

toeic.example_en: Submit your trip approval form at least two weeks before the planned departure.
toeic.example_zh: 請在預計出發前至少兩週提交差旅核准單。

toeic.example_en: Tag every receipt with the correct expense category to speed up reimbursement.
toeic.example_zh: 請為每張收據標記正確的費用類別，以加快報銷速度。

toeic.example_en: Drivers must keep an accurate mileage log when using personal vehicles for client visits.
toeic.example_zh: 駕駛者使用私人車輛拜訪客戶時，必須保留準確的里程紀錄表。

toeic.example_en: Our travel desk warned that the rental rate excludes a substantial fuel surcharge fee.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的差旅服務台提醒，租車費率不含一筆可觀的燃油附加費。

toeic.example_en: Read the rental agreement carefully before signing for the car at the counter.
toeic.example_zh: 在櫃台簽收車輛之前，請仔細閱讀租賃合約。

toeic.example_en: A compact car is usually sufficient when only two people are visiting the client.
toeic.example_zh: 當只有兩人拜訪客戶時，通常一輛小型車就足夠了。

toeic.example_en: Please reserve an intermediate vehicle large enough to carry our demo equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 請預訂一輛足以裝載我們示範設備的中型車輛。

toeic.example_en: Many travelers prefer ride hailing over taxis because receipts are emailed automatically.
toeic.example_zh: 許多差旅者偏好叫車服務勝過計程車，因為收據會自動寄到信箱。

toeic.example_en: Selecting a shared ride from the airport can cut transportation costs almost in half.
toeic.example_zh: 從機場選擇共乘服務可以將交通費用幾乎減半。

toeic.example_en: Our regional partner kindly arranged an airport pickup for the visiting auditors.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的區域合作夥伴貼心地為來訪審計員安排了機場接送。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 機場接機禮賓服務
toeic.example_en: The hotel offers a meet and greet service for senior executives traveling with families.
toeic.example_zh: 飯店為帶家眷出差的高階主管提供機場接機禮賓服務。

toeic.example_en: Please ask the driver to stop at the airport's short-term drop-off zone, not arrivals.
toeic.example_zh: 請司機停在機場的短期落客區，而非入境區。

toeic.example_en: Our colleague will wait in the hotel pick-up zone holding a folder with the agenda.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的同事會在飯店接客區等候，手上拿著裝有議程的資料夾。

toeic.example_en: Travelers passing through that hub for more than eight hours need a transit visa.
toeic.example_zh: 在該樞紐停留超過八小時的旅客需要申請過境簽證。

toeic.example_en: Submit your visa application well before peak conference season to avoid delays.
toeic.example_zh: 請在會議旺季前提早提交簽證申請，以免延誤。

toeic.example_en: Save your visa fee receipt because it qualifies for full company reimbursement.
toeic.example_zh: 請保留簽證費用收據，因為公司可全額報銷。

toeic.example_en: Book the embassy appointment online before paying the application processing fee.
toeic.example_zh: 請先在線上預約大使館，再支付申請處理費。

toeic.example_en: The consulate office near our hotel can issue emergency travel documents within a day.
toeic.example_zh: 我們飯店附近的領事館辦事處可以在一天內核發緊急旅行文件。

toeic.example_en: Most countries now collect biometric data such as fingerprints during the visa interview.
toeic.example_zh: 目前多數國家會在簽證面談時採集指紋等生物識別資料。

toeic.example_en: Place your right thumb on the fingerprint scanner when prompted by the officer.
toeic.example_zh: 當官員指示時，請將您的右拇指放在指紋掃描器上。

toeic.example_en: Allow extra time at border control if you are traveling during a holiday weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 若在假日週末出差，請預留更多時間通過邊境管制。

toeic.example_en: The immigration officer asked routine questions about my upcoming sales meetings.
toeic.example_zh: 入境官員針對我即將進行的銷售會議詢問了例行問題。

toeic.example_en: The customs officer politely inspected the sample products I brought for demonstrations.
toeic.example_zh: 海關官員禮貌地檢查了我帶來示範用的樣品。

toeic.example_en: We paid a small customs duty on the demo unit shipped to the trade fair.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為運往貿易展的示範機支付了一筆小額關稅。

toeic.example_en: I picked up corporate gifts at the duty-free shop during my long layover.
toeic.example_zh: 我在長時間轉機等候時，到免稅店挑選了公司禮品。

toeic.example_en: Each traveler has a tax-free allowance for personal items purchased abroad.
toeic.example_zh: 每位旅客在境外購買個人用品時都享有免稅額度。

toeic.example_en: After deplaning, follow the signs to passport control on the lower level.
toeic.example_zh: 下機後，請依照指標前往下層的護照查驗處。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 全球入境計畫；快速通關
toeic.example_en: Global entry membership lets frequent business travelers skip the regular lines.
toeic.example_zh: 全球入境計畫會員資格讓頻繁出差的商務人士免排一般隊伍。

toeic.example_en: Report a lost passport to the nearest embassy immediately to avoid travel delays.
toeic.example_zh: 若護照遺失，請立即向最近的大使館通報，以免延誤行程。

toeic.example_en: Bring spare passport photos in case you need to renew documents overseas.
toeic.example_zh: 請攜帶備用護照照片，以防需要在海外更新證件。

toeic.example_en: Pack a universal travel adapter so you can charge devices in any country.
toeic.example_zh: 請攜帶萬用旅行轉接頭，這樣在任何國家都能為設備充電。

toeic.example_en: Older appliances may also require a power converter, not just a plug adapter.
toeic.example_zh: 較舊的電器可能不只需要插頭轉接頭，還需要電源轉換器。

toeic.example_en: I keep a small luggage scale in my briefcase to avoid airline overweight fees.
toeic.example_zh: 我在公事包裡放一個小行李秤，以免被航空公司收取超重費。

toeic.example_en: Hang your suit in the garment bag to keep it pressed for tomorrow's pitch.
toeic.example_zh: 請將西裝掛進西裝袋裡，這樣明天提案時還能保持平整。

toeic.example_en: A compact rolling suitcase fits perfectly in most overhead bins on regional flights.
toeic.example_zh: 小型拉桿行李箱在多數區域航班的行李艙都能完美收納。

toeic.example_en: Forward your travel itinerary email to your manager and assistant before each trip.
toeic.example_zh: 每次出差前，請將行程電郵轉寄給主管及助理。

toeic.example_en: Attach a one-page trip summary to your expense submission to help reviewers understand context.
toeic.example_zh: 請在費用申請中附上一頁的行程摘要，協助審核者理解背景。

toeic.example_en: We added a site visit to the factory before signing the manufacturing agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在簽訂製造合約前，安排了一次工廠的實地拜訪。

toeic.example_en: Our supplier organized a factory tour to demonstrate the new assembly equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的供應商安排了工廠參觀，展示新的組裝設備。

toeic.example_en: Schedule each client visit at least a week in advance to secure their availability.
toeic.example_zh: 請至少提前一週安排每次客戶拜訪，以確保對方有空。

toeic.example_en: A foreign dignitary will deliver the opening remarks at this year's industry summit.
toeic.example_zh: 一位外國要人將在今年的產業高峰會上致開幕詞。

toeic.example_en: Top sponsors are invited to a private VIP reception the night before the conference.
toeic.example_zh: 頂級贊助商會獲邀參加會議前一晚的私人貴賓接待會。

toeic.example_en: Our CEO will join a fireside chat session with an award-winning industry analyst.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的執行長將與一位獲獎產業分析師進行爐邊對談場次。

toeic.example_en: Each panelist received five minutes for opening remarks before the moderated discussion.
toeic.example_zh: 在主持人引導討論前，每位與談人有五分鐘的開場時間。

toeic.example_en: The keynote speaker shared fresh research on remote leadership across global teams.
toeic.example_zh: 主題演講者分享了關於跨國團隊遠距領導的最新研究。

toeic.example_en: The keynote address kicked off the convention with a bold prediction about industry shifts.
toeic.example_zh: 主題演講以對產業變動的大膽預測揭開大會序幕。

toeic.example_en: The chairperson kept her opening remarks brief and warmly welcomed every delegate.
toeic.example_zh: 主席的開場致詞簡短而誠摯，歡迎每位與會代表。

toeic.example_en: Closing remarks will recap key insights and announce next year's host city.
toeic.example_zh: 閉幕致詞將總結重點觀察並宣布明年的主辦城市。

toeic.example_en: Every attendee gathers in the main hall for the plenary session before lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 午餐前，所有與會者都會聚集在大會堂參加全體大會場次。

toeic.example_en: Three concurrent sessions run in the afternoon, so plan your schedule carefully.
toeic.example_zh: 下午同時舉行三場平行場次，請仔細規劃您的行程。

toeic.example_en: The marketing workshop track offers hands-on exercises for both new and veteran managers.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷工作坊主題軸為新手與資深經理皆提供實作練習。

toeic.example_en: Take a quick agenda preview to identify which sessions match your team's priorities.
toeic.example_zh: 請快速瀏覽議程預覽，找出符合團隊重點的場次。

toeic.example_en: Each session abstract on the website lists the speakers and core takeaways.
toeic.example_zh: 網站上每篇場次摘要都列出講者及核心重點。

toeic.example_en: Registered attendees can stream the session recording for ninety days after the event.
toeic.example_zh: 已報名的與會者可在活動結束後九十天內觀看場次錄影。

toeic.example_en: Live captioning will be available in three languages for the main stage program.
toeic.example_zh: 主舞台節目將提供三種語言的即時字幕。

toeic.example_en: Headsets for simultaneous interpretation are available at the help desk near registration.
toeic.example_zh: 報到處旁的服務台可領取同步口譯耳機。

toeic.example_en: The interpreter booth sits behind the audience to keep sightlines clear for the speakers.
toeic.example_zh: 口譯員小室設於觀眾席後方，以維持講者的視線通暢。

toeic.example_en: Return your translation headset to staff before leaving the venue each day.
toeic.example_zh: 請每天離開會場前將翻譯耳機歸還給工作人員。

toeic.example_en: Use the self-service registration kiosk to print your badge in under a minute.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用報到自助機，不到一分鐘即可印出您的名牌。

toeic.example_en: A staff member will guide first-time guests through the badge printer process.
toeic.example_zh: 工作人員會引導首次來訪者操作名牌列印機。

toeic.example_en: Please wear your badge holder visibly so security can verify your access level.
toeic.example_zh: 請將名牌套配戴於明顯處，方便保全核對您的進場層級。

toeic.example_en: Each lanyard color corresponds to a different attendee category, such as speaker or sponsor.
toeic.example_zh: 每種識別繩顏色對應不同的與會者類別，例如講者或贊助商。

toeic.example_en: A VIP badge grants entry to the executive networking suite on the top floor.
toeic.example_zh: 貴賓識別證可進入頂樓的高階主管交流室。

toeic.example_en: Reporters with a media badge enjoy reserved seating in the front rows.
toeic.example_zh: 持有媒體識別證的記者可享有前排保留座位。

toeic.example_en: An exhibitor badge allows access to the show floor an hour before public opening.
toeic.example_zh: 參展商識別證可在公開開放前一小時進入展示區。

toeic.example_en: Your delegate badge also serves as the meal voucher inside the convention hall.
toeic.example_zh: 您的與會代表識別證在會場內同時可作為餐券使用。

toeic.example_en: Bring a printed registration confirmation if your mobile barcode fails to scan.
toeic.example_zh: 若您的行動條碼無法掃描，請攜帶印出的報名確認函。

toeic.example_en: Early bird registration closes next Friday at a thirty percent discount.
toeic.example_zh: 早鳥報名於下週五截止，享有七折優惠。

toeic.example_en: Late registration adds a service fee but still includes meals and materials.
toeic.example_zh: 逾期報名須加收服務費，但仍包含餐飲及資料。

toeic.example_en: Submit a group registration of five or more colleagues to unlock corporate pricing.
toeic.example_zh: 提交五人以上的團體報名即可享有企業團報價格。

toeic.example_en: I will forward the registration link to the partner team after this morning's call.
toeic.example_zh: 今早通話結束後，我會將報名連結轉發給合作夥伴團隊。

toeic.example_en: Treat your conference badge like a passport and keep it on you at all times.
toeic.example_zh: 請把會議識別證當作護照一樣隨身攜帶。

toeic.example_en: Download the conference app to favorite sessions and chat with other attendees.
toeic.example_zh: 請下載會議應用程式，把喜歡的場次加入收藏並與其他與會者交流。

toeic.example_en: Use the official event hashtag so your posts appear on the live social wall.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用官方活動主題標籤，您的貼文才會顯示在現場社群牆上。

toeic.example_en: Speakers use live polling to keep the audience engaged during long sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 講者利用即時投票讓觀眾在長場次中保持參與感。

toeic.example_en: Strong audience engagement starts with a clear call to action in the first slide.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的觀眾互動始於第一張投影片就提出明確的行動呼籲。

toeic.example_en: We saved the final ten minutes for an audience question segment.
toeic.example_zh: 我們保留最後十分鐘進行觀眾提問環節。

toeic.example_en: A moderated discussion encourages quieter participants to share their viewpoints.
toeic.example_zh: 引導式討論能鼓勵較安靜的與會者分享觀點。

toeic.example_en: The roundtable session brings senior leaders together in small, candid groups.
toeic.example_zh: 圓桌會議場次以小型且坦誠的群組聚集資深領導者。

toeic.example_en: Visit our open house on Thursday to tour the renovated regional showroom.
toeic.example_zh: 請於週四參加開放參觀日，參觀整修後的區域展示廳。

toeic.example_en: Plan staffing rotations for the trade show booth in two-hour shifts.
toeic.example_zh: 請為商展攤位排定每兩小時輪班的人力安排。

toeic.example_en: Our booth design highlights three product lines without overwhelming visitors.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的攤位設計突顯三條產品線，又不會讓觀眾感到擁擠。

toeic.example_en: Each demo station includes seating so guests can test the software comfortably.
toeic.example_zh: 每個示範區都設有座位，讓賓客可以舒適地試用軟體。

toeic.example_en: Stack the new product brochure on the counter beside the demo tablets.
toeic.example_zh: 請將新的產品宣傳冊放在示範平板旁的櫃台上。

toeic.example_en: Hand each visitor a promotional flyer with the discount code for trade show buyers.
toeic.example_zh: 請發給每位訪客一張宣傳單，上面印有商展買家的折扣代碼。

toeic.example_en: Choose a give-away item that ties back to the message of your campaign.
toeic.example_zh: 請選擇一項能呼應活動主題的贈品。

toeic.example_en: Branded tote bag pickup is at the welcome desk near the south entrance.
toeic.example_zh: 印有品牌標誌的手提袋可在南入口附近的迎賓櫃台領取。

toeic.example_en: We chose a recycled drawstring bag for this year's eco-friendly conference gift.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今年選用回收材質的束口袋作為環保的會議贈品。

toeic.example_en: Print our slogan in subtle gold foil on the cover of the branded notebook.
toeic.example_zh: 請在品牌筆記本封面以低調的燙金印上我們的標語。

toeic.example_en: Order ten thousand branded pens to distribute across regional roadshows this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 請訂購一萬支品牌原子筆，本季在各區巡迴活動發放。

toeic.example_en: Becoming the lanyard sponsor offers high visibility throughout every conference day.
toeic.example_zh: 成為識別繩贊助商可在會議期間每天獲得高度曝光。

toeic.example_en: Platinum sponsor benefits include a featured stage session and premium booth space.
toeic.example_zh: 白金贊助商福利包含一場精選舞台場次及頂級攤位空間。

toeic.example_en: Gold sponsor logos appear on every printed agenda and digital signage display.
toeic.example_zh: 金級贊助商的標誌會出現在每份印製議程及數位看板上。

toeic.example_en: Silver sponsor benefits include four complimentary passes and a half-page program ad.
toeic.example_zh: 銀級贊助商福利包含四張免費通行證及半版議程廣告。

toeic.example_en: Drop your business card in the bowl for a chance to win our raffle prize.
toeic.example_zh: 請將名片投入盆中，有機會贏得我們的抽獎獎品。

toeic.example_en: The grand lucky draw will be held immediately after the closing keynote.
toeic.example_zh: 頭獎抽獎活動將於閉幕主題演講後立刻舉行。

toeic.example_en: Restock the swag table whenever supplies fall below twenty pieces.
toeic.example_zh: 贈品桌上的物品低於二十件時，請隨時補貨。

toeic.example_en: Maps of the exhibit hall are available at every information kiosk.
toeic.example_zh: 每個服務台都備有展覽廳地圖。

toeic.example_en: Walk the show floor early to scout key partners before the lunch rush.
toeic.example_zh: 請提早巡視展場樓面，趁午餐高峰前找到重要夥伴。

toeic.example_en: Today's networking breakfast is set up at the entrance of the main trade hall.
toeic.example_zh: 今天的社交早餐設置在主商貿廳的入口處。

toeic.example_en: Your expo pass includes free access to all keynote stages and demonstration zones.
toeic.example_zh: 您的展覽通行證可免費進入所有主題舞台及示範區。

toeic.example_en: Pick up your convention badge at the satellite check-in desks in the lobby.
toeic.example_zh: 請於大廳的衛星報到台領取您的大會識別證。

toeic.example_en: The networking lounge offers quiet seating for productive one-on-one meetings.
toeic.example_zh: 交流休息區提供安靜座位，適合進行高效的一對一會談。

toeic.example_en: A networking breakfast for new members starts thirty minutes before the morning keynote.
toeic.example_zh: 新會員的社交早餐將於上午主題演講前三十分鐘開始。

toeic.example_en: The networking dinner takes place at a riverside restaurant booked for our delegates.
toeic.example_zh: 社交晚宴將於為我們代表預訂的河畔餐廳舉行。

toeic.example_en: A casual networking mixer follows the awards ceremony in the rooftop garden.
toeic.example_zh: 頒獎典禮後將於頂樓花園舉行輕鬆的交流酒會。

toeic.example_en: Cocktail hour begins at six, with light hors d oeuvres served throughout the lobby.
toeic.example_zh: 雞尾酒會時段從六點開始，大廳將提供輕食點心。

toeic.example_en: The welcome reception is a relaxed way to meet other delegates before sessions start.
toeic.example_zh: 歡迎接待會是會議開始前認識其他代表的輕鬆方式。

toeic.example_en: The farewell reception featured short toasts from each regional team leader.
toeic.example_zh: 歡送會由各區團隊主管簡短致敬。

toeic.example_en: Dress code for the gala dinner is business formal with optional cultural attire.
toeic.example_zh: 晚宴盛會的服裝要求為正式商務裝，亦可選擇傳統服飾。

toeic.example_en: Tonight's themed dinner celebrates the regional cuisine of the host city.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚的主題晚宴將慶祝主辦城市的在地料理。

toeic.example_en: Tickets for the after party are limited and require a separate registration.
toeic.example_zh: 會後派對的門票名額有限，需另行報名。

toeic.example_en: The host city offers complimentary public transit passes during conference week.
toeic.example_zh: 主辦城市在會議週期間提供免費的公共交通票證。

toeic.example_en: Book the host hotel quickly because rooms within the negotiated block sell out fast.
toeic.example_zh: 請盡快預訂大會指定飯店，因為議定保留房型很快就會售完。

toeic.example_en: Once the host hotel filled up, the team booked rooms at a nearby overflow hotel.
toeic.example_zh: 大會指定飯店客滿後，團隊改訂了附近的替代住宿飯店。

toeic.example_en: We arranged a block booking of forty rooms for the visiting sales team.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為來訪的銷售團隊安排了四十間客房的團體預訂。

toeic.example_en: Enter the group rate code at checkout to receive the corporate price.
toeic.example_zh: 結帳時輸入團體優惠代碼即可享有企業價格。

toeic.example_en: Use a preferred hotel to ensure travelers earn loyalty points and standard amenities.
toeic.example_zh: 請選擇優選合作飯店，以確保差旅者累積會員點數並享有標準設施。

toeic.example_en: Our corporate agreement gives discounted rates across the global hotel chain.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的企業協議讓我們在全球連鎖飯店享有折扣價格。

toeic.example_en: Some clients prefer a quiet boutique stay over a large international hotel chain.
toeic.example_zh: 部分客戶偏好安靜的精品住宿，而非大型國際連鎖飯店。

toeic.example_en: Long-term consultants often choose a serviced apartment instead of a regular hotel room.
toeic.example_zh: 長期顧問常選擇服務式公寓而非一般飯店客房。

toeic.example_en: Ask for the long-stay rate when reserving accommodations of seven nights or more.
toeic.example_zh: 預訂七晚以上住宿時，請詢問長住房價。

toeic.example_en: Frequent guests can use the express check-in line near the concierge desk.
toeic.example_zh: 常客可使用禮賓櫃台旁的快速辦理入住通道。

toeic.example_en: Express check-out lets you drop your key in the box and skip the front desk line.
toeic.example_zh: 快速辦理退房讓您只需投房卡入箱，便可不必排櫃台。

toeic.example_en: Most major brands offer mobile check-in through their loyalty applications.
toeic.example_zh: 多數大型品牌都提供透過會員應用程式的行動入住服務。

toeic.example_en: Activate the digital room key by accepting the notification on your smartphone.
toeic.example_zh: 請點開智慧手機上的通知，即可啟用數位房卡。

toeic.example_en: Please return your key card at the front desk during checkout.
toeic.example_zh: 請於退房時將房卡交還櫃台。

toeic.example_en: Update your guest profile to receive your preferred pillow type automatically.
toeic.example_zh: 請更新您的房客檔案，自動取得偏好的枕頭類型。

toeic.example_en: Quote your loyalty number when booking to ensure points are credited to your account.
toeic.example_zh: 預訂時請出示會員編號，以確保點數計入您的帳戶。

toeic.example_en: As a loyalty member, you can request a late checkout subject to availability.
toeic.example_zh: 身為會員，您可視房況申請延後退房。

toeic.example_en: Reaching elite tier unlocks complimentary breakfast and lounge access.
toeic.example_zh: 達到菁英會員等級可獲得免費早餐及貴賓室使用權。

toeic.example_en: Light snacks and quiet workstations are available in the concierge lounge until ten.
toeic.example_zh: 禮賓貴賓室提供輕食及安靜工作區，開放至十點。

toeic.example_en: Rooms on the club floor include access to a private evening reception.
toeic.example_zh: 行政樓層的客房可使用私人晚間接待會。

toeic.example_en: Club access is offered as a complimentary upgrade to our top-tier travelers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為頂級差旅者提供行政樓層使用權作為免費升級。

toeic.example_en: The front desk clerk kindly stored my laptop bag until the afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 前台接待員親切地幫我把筆電包寄存到下午。

toeic.example_en: The night auditor handles late check-ins and reviews the daily revenue report.
toeic.example_zh: 夜班稽核員負責晚到入住及審閱每日營收報表。

toeic.example_en: Ask for the duty manager if a guest issue cannot be resolved at the front desk.
toeic.example_zh: 若櫃台無法處理房客問題，請聯絡值班經理協助。

toeic.example_en: The housekeeping crew refreshes rooms by eleven each morning unless guests opt out.
toeic.example_zh: 客房清潔人員每天早上十一點前完成整理，除非房客選擇免打掃。

toeic.example_en: Check the room service menu for late-night options when business meetings run long.
toeic.example_zh: 若商務會議拖到深夜，請查看客房服務菜單上的宵夜選項。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a wake-up call at six so you have time to review your slides.
toeic.example_zh: 請設定六點的喚醒服務電話，這樣有時間複習投影片。

toeic.example_en: Hang the do-not-disturb sign before joining your early morning conference call.
toeic.example_zh: 請在參加清晨會議電話前先掛上請勿打擾牌。

toeic.example_en: Lock your passport and corporate card in the in-room safe before going out.
toeic.example_zh: 外出前請將護照及公司信用卡鎖入房內保險箱。

toeic.example_en: Review the bill at checkout to dispute any incorrect minibar charge promptly.
toeic.example_zh: 退房時請檢視帳單，及時對任何不正確的迷你吧費用提出異議。

toeic.example_en: The hotel will place a hold for incidental charges on your credit card at check-in.
toeic.example_zh: 飯店會在入住時對您的信用卡預扣雜項費用押金。

toeic.example_en: The deposit hold disappears from your statement within a few business days after checkout.
toeic.example_zh: 預授權扣款會在退房後幾個工作天內從帳單上消失。

toeic.example_en: Complete the credit card authorization form so colleagues can charge your room directly.
toeic.example_zh: 請填妥信用卡授權表，讓同事可以直接以您的房號結帳。

toeic.example_en: Send any billing inquiry to the dedicated email listed on your final invoice.
toeic.example_zh: 請將任何帳單查詢寄至最終發票上列出的專用信箱。

toeic.example_en: Travel administrators usually prefer a consolidated invoice covering the entire group's stay.
toeic.example_zh: 差旅管理員通常偏好涵蓋整團住宿的合併發票。

toeic.example_en: Request a VAT invoice so your finance team can reclaim eligible taxes after the trip.
toeic.example_zh: 請索取加值稅發票，讓財務團隊可在出差後申請可退稅項。

toeic.example_en: Attach the tax invoice to your expense report when claiming hotel charges abroad.
toeic.example_zh: 請在報銷海外飯店費用時附上稅務發票。

toeic.example_en: Complete your expense submission within seven days of returning to the office.
toeic.example_zh: 請在返回辦公室後七天內完成費用提交。

toeic.example_en: Our new expense workflow routes claims to managers automatically based on amount.
toeic.example_zh: 新的費用簽核流程會依金額自動將申請送交相應主管。

toeic.example_en: Stay below the approval threshold limit for cash purchases to keep things moving quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 現金採購請維持在核准上限以下，流程才能順暢進行。

toeic.example_en: Each city has a different per diem rate based on average meal and transport costs.
toeic.example_zh: 每個城市的出差日支費率不同，依平均餐費及交通費而定。

toeic.example_en: The daily meal allowance covers breakfast, lunch, and a modest dinner.
toeic.example_zh: 每日餐費補貼涵蓋早餐、午餐及一頓簡單晚餐。

toeic.example_en: Capitals usually have a higher lodging allowance than smaller regional cities.
toeic.example_zh: 首都的住宿補貼通常高於較小的區域城市。

toeic.example_en: The travel allowance covers ground transportation to and from the airport.
toeic.example_zh: 差旅補貼涵蓋往返機場的地面交通費用。

toeic.example_en: An incidental allowance helps cover small items like tips and bottled water.
toeic.example_zh: 雜項補貼可支應小費及瓶裝水等小額花費。

toeic.example_en: The travel team set a daily tip allowance for hotel and restaurant staff.
toeic.example_zh: 差旅團隊為飯店及餐廳員工訂定每日小費補貼。

toeic.example_en: Many hotels add a mandatory service charge fee for in-room dining.
toeic.example_zh: 許多飯店對客房用餐加收強制性的服務費。

toeic.example_en: Tourists pay a small nightly city tax in most major European destinations.
toeic.example_zh: 在多數歐洲主要城市，旅客每晚需繳納少額城市稅。

toeic.example_en: The hotel separates the tourist tax line item to simplify expense reimbursement.
toeic.example_zh: 飯店將旅遊稅獨立列項，便於差旅報銷處理。

toeic.example_en: The local convention bureau can recommend venues that fit our attendance forecast.
toeic.example_zh: 當地會議旅遊局可推薦符合我們預估人數的場地。

toeic.example_en: Our venue coordinator confirmed the room layout for tomorrow's executive workshop.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的場地協調人員已確認明天高階主管工作坊的會場配置。

toeic.example_en: The event coordinator created a detailed timeline for every sponsor activation.
toeic.example_zh: 活動協調人員為每項贊助商活動制定了詳盡時程。

toeic.example_en: The event planner negotiated catering and audiovisual packages within our limited budget.
toeic.example_zh: 活動策劃人員在有限預算內談妥了餐飲及視聽方案。

toeic.example_en: Confirm that AV equipment is tested at least two hours before each session.
toeic.example_zh: 請確認視聽設備於每場次至少兩小時前完成測試。

toeic.example_en: Make sure the projection screen is large enough for viewers in the rear rows.
toeic.example_zh: 請確認投影螢幕夠大，讓後排觀眾也能清楚觀看。

toeic.example_en: Practice with the clicker remote so transitions look smooth on stage.
toeic.example_zh: 請事先熟悉簡報筆的操作，這樣台上切換才能流暢。

toeic.example_en: Enable presenter view to see your notes while the audience sees only the slide.
toeic.example_zh: 請啟用簡報者檢視畫面，您能看到筆記而觀眾只會看到投影片。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a full presentation rehearsal the night before any major client meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 請在任何重大客戶會議前一晚安排完整的簡報彩排。

toeic.example_en: Production staff perform a sound check whenever microphones are swapped between speakers.
toeic.example_zh: 每當麥克風在講者之間更換時，製作人員都會進行音響測試。

toeic.example_en: Today's stage rehearsal will start two hours before doors open to attendees.
toeic.example_zh: 今天的舞台彩排將在與會者入場前兩小時開始。

toeic.example_en: Final approval of the stage backdrop is needed by Friday for printing.
toeic.example_zh: 舞台背板需於週五前完成最終確認以利印製。

toeic.example_en: Wait for the stage manager cue before stepping up to the lectern.
toeic.example_zh: 請等待舞台監督指示後再走上講台。

toeic.example_en: The showrunner coordinates the entire production team during the live broadcast.
toeic.example_zh: 節目總監在現場轉播中統籌整個製作團隊。

toeic.example_en: Submit a short speaker bio and high-resolution photo by next Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 請於下週一前提交簡短的講者簡介及高解析度照片。

toeic.example_en: We need a professional speaker headshot for the conference brochure.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要一張專業的講者大頭照刊登在會議手冊上。

toeic.example_en: Our panel moderator prepared crisp questions to keep the discussion moving.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的座談主持人準備了精煉的提問，讓討論順暢進行。

toeic.example_en: The session host introduces each speaker and watches the timer carefully.
toeic.example_zh: 場次主持人負責介紹每位講者並仔細留意計時。

toeic.example_en: Speak with the house manager if any audience accessibility issue arises.
toeic.example_zh: 如有任何觀眾無障礙需求問題，請洽場館經理。

toeic.example_en: Allow extra time at the security checkpoint, especially during peak morning hours.
toeic.example_zh: 請於安檢檢查站預留更多時間，尤其在早晨尖峰時段。

toeic.example_en: All visitors must complete a bag check before entering the conference complex.
toeic.example_zh: 所有訪客必須完成行李檢查後才能進入會議園區。

toeic.example_en: Remove your laptop and walk slowly through the metal detector at the gate.
toeic.example_zh: 請取出筆電並緩慢通過大門口的金屬探測器。

toeic.example_en: The boarding lounge offers complimentary tea and a quiet workspace for elite travelers.
toeic.example_zh: 候機室為菁英旅客提供免費茶飲及安靜的工作區。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 機場貴賓室使用權
toeic.example_en: Airport lounge access is among the most valued perks for executives flying weekly.
toeic.example_zh: 對每週搭機的高階主管而言，機場貴賓室使用權是最受重視的福利之一。

toeic.example_en: Use your complimentary upgrade voucher on the long-haul leg for better rest.
toeic.example_zh: 請在長程航段使用免費升等券，以獲得更好的休息。

toeic.example_en: Travelers should perform their own preflight check of phone chargers and documents.
toeic.example_zh: 旅客應自行對手機充電器及證件進行起飛前檢查。

toeic.example_en: Confirm whether the rebooking fee is waived under your corporate travel agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 請確認您的企業差旅合約是否免收改票手續費。

toeic.example_en: The airline announced a schedule change that pushed our flight to the next morning.
toeic.example_zh: 航空公司宣布航班變動，將我們的班機改到隔天上午。

toeic.example_en: Subscribe to delay notification alerts to receive instant updates on your phone.
toeic.example_zh: 請訂閱延誤通知警示，以便手機即時收到更新。

toeic.example_en: Significant weather disruption may delay our connecting flight by several hours.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴重的天候干擾可能使我們的轉機班次延誤數小時。

toeic.example_en: A ground delay program kept us at the gate while air traffic adjusted.
toeic.example_zh: 地面延誤計畫讓我們留在登機門等待，直到空中交通調整完成。

toeic.example_en: Our diverted flight landed in a nearby city, so we drove the last leg.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的改降航班降落在鄰近城市，最後一段我們改開車前往。

toeic.example_en: The airline gave us a rerouted flight that avoided the storm system entirely.
toeic.example_zh: 航空公司為我們安排了完全避開暴風的重新安排航班。

toeic.example_en: We chose an alternate route to the venue when the main highway closed unexpectedly.
toeic.example_zh: 主要高速公路意外封閉時，我們選擇了前往場地的替代路線。

toeic.example_en: The corporate retreat ended with a relaxing scenic drive along the coastal road.
toeic.example_zh: 企業靜修活動以沿海岸線的風景路線駕車輕鬆收尾。

toeic.example_en: Saturday's guided city tour will introduce delegates to historic landmarks.
toeic.example_zh: 週六的城市導覽行程將向代表們介紹歷史地標。

toeic.example_en: A short site tour helps suppliers understand our production environment firsthand.
toeic.example_zh: 短暫的現場參觀能讓供應商親身了解我們的生產環境。

toeic.example_en: We offer a brief facility tour to every visitor before the working sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為每位訪客在工作會議前安排簡短的設施參觀。

toeic.example_en: The branch tour gave investors a closer look at our regional support operations.
toeic.example_zh: 分公司參觀讓投資人能近距離了解我們的區域支援運作。

toeic.example_en: Planning a global corporate event requires close coordination across many time zones.
toeic.example_zh: 規劃全球企業活動需要跨多個時區的密切協調。

toeic.example_en: Our annual conference draws partners from more than thirty countries each year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的年度會議每年吸引來自三十多國的合作夥伴。

toeic.example_en: The industry summit features insights from leading economists and venture capitalists.
toeic.example_zh: 產業高峰會將呈現頂尖經濟學家及創投人士的觀點。

toeic.example_en: The user summit highlighted real-world success stories from long-time customers.
toeic.example_zh: 使用者高峰會展示了長期客戶的實際成功案例。

toeic.example_en: Our partner forum brings together resellers and integrators for two days of training.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的夥伴論壇集結經銷商及整合商進行為期兩天的培訓。

toeic.example_en: The leadership offsite event provides space to discuss strategy without daily distractions.
toeic.example_zh: 領導層外訓活動讓我們在不受日常干擾下討論策略。

toeic.example_en: Our annual company retreat balances strategic planning with team-building activities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的年度公司退修兼顧策略規劃與團隊建立活動。

toeic.example_en: Top performers earn an incentive travel reward to a tropical resort each year.
toeic.example_zh: 頂尖表現者每年可獲得前往熱帶度假村的獎勵旅遊。

toeic.example_en: The employee outing this quarter is a half-day cooking class downtown.
toeic.example_zh: 本季的員工出遊是市中心的半日烹飪課。

toeic.example_en: Premium clients are invited to our corporate hospitality suite during major sporting events.
toeic.example_zh: 高端客戶會獲邀於重要體育賽事時造訪我們的企業招待包廂。

toeic.example_en: Visit the hospitality desk in the lobby for restaurant suggestions and area maps.
toeic.example_zh: 請至大廳的接待服務台索取餐廳建議及周邊地圖。

toeic.example_en: All guests must wear a visitor pass while inside our corporate buildings.
toeic.example_zh: 所有賓客在我們公司大樓內都必須佩戴訪客通行證。

toeic.example_en: Cross-check the guest list registry with reception to avoid duplicate name tags.
toeic.example_zh: 請與接待處對比來賓名冊，以避免名牌重複。

toeic.example_en: Send the final name list to catering forty-eight hours before the dinner.
toeic.example_zh: 請於晚宴前四十八小時將最終名單送交餐飲團隊。

toeic.example_en: Note the RSVP deadline at the bottom of the invitation to confirm attendance.
toeic.example_zh: 請留意邀請函下方的回覆截止日期，並確認出席。

toeic.example_en: Provide a confirmed head count so the venue can finalize seating arrangements.
toeic.example_zh: 請提供確認的人數統計，以便場地完成座位安排。

toeic.example_en: Each place setting card includes a small printed agenda for the evening.
toeic.example_zh: 每張桌位指示卡都附有當晚的小型印刷議程。

toeic.example_en: We finalized the seating arrangement to encourage networking among regional managers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們敲定了座位安排，以促進區域經理之間的交流。

toeic.example_en: Senior executives and award recipients fill the head table arrangement during the gala.
toeic.example_zh: 晚宴期間，高階主管及得獎者會坐滿主桌安排。

toeic.example_en: Each table host welcomes guests and guides them through the discussion prompts.
toeic.example_zh: 每位桌長負責接待賓客並引導他們進行討論題目。

toeic.example_en: Please reboot your laptop after the system update finishes downloading.
toeic.example_zh: 系統更新下載完成後，請重新啟動你的筆電。

toeic.example_en: If the printer freezes, restart it before calling tech support.
toeic.example_zh: 如果印表機凍結，先重新啟動再聯絡技術支援。

toeic.example_en: A full shutdown is scheduled tonight for server maintenance.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚安排了完整關機以進行伺服器維護。

toeic.example_en: Sign in with your single sign-on credentials to access the dashboard.
toeic.example_zh: 用單一登入憑證簽入以存取儀表板。

toeic.example_en: Remember to sign out of webmail when using a public terminal.
toeic.example_zh: 使用公用電腦時，記得從網頁郵件登出。

toeic.example_en: IT will email your temporary credentials within one business day.
toeic.example_zh: 資訊部會在一個工作天內寄送你的臨時登入資料。

toeic.example_en: Enter the six-digit passcode sent to your mobile device.
toeic.example_zh: 輸入傳送到你行動裝置的六位數通行碼。

toeic.example_en: Your password will expire in five days, so please update it soon.
toeic.example_zh: 你的密碼將在五天內到期，請盡快更新。

toeic.example_en: Make sure your recovery email is current before traveling abroad.
toeic.example_zh: 出國前請確認你的救援電子郵件是最新的。

toeic.example_en: The session timeout is set to fifteen minutes for security reasons.
toeic.example_zh: 基於安全考量，工作階段逾時設為十五分鐘。

toeic.example_en: Solve the captcha to confirm you are not a bot.
toeic.example_zh: 請解開驗證碼以確認你不是機器人。

toeic.example_en: Strong authentication is required for accessing financial systems.
toeic.example_zh: 存取財務系統時需要強身分驗證。

toeic.example_en: Our laptops support biometric login using fingerprint readers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的筆電支援使用指紋辨識器的生物辨識登入。

toeic.example_en: Face recognition lets you unlock your device without typing.
toeic.example_zh: 臉部辨識讓你不必輸入就能解鎖裝置。

toeic.example_en: Type the verification code from your authenticator app within thirty seconds.
toeic.example_zh: 請在三十秒內輸入驗證 app 上的驗證碼。

toeic.example_en: Install the authenticator app on your phone before enabling two-step verification.
toeic.example_zh: 啟用兩步驟驗證前，請先在手機上安裝驗證應用程式。

toeic.example_en: Mark this laptop as a trusted device to skip future prompts.
toeic.example_zh: 將這台筆電標記為受信任裝置即可略過未來提示。

toeic.example_en: You need manager permission to access the shared payroll folder.
toeic.example_zh: 你需要主管權限才能存取共享的薪資資料夾。

toeic.example_en: Your access rights were updated after the recent role change.
toeic.example_zh: 在最近的角色變更後，你的存取權限已更新。

toeic.example_en: Every new hire gets a user account on their first day.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新進員工在報到當天都會獲得一個使用者帳號。

toeic.example_en: Only IT staff hold admin accounts for the production servers.
toeic.example_zh: 只有資訊部人員持有正式環境伺服器的管理員帳號。

toeic.example_en: Visitors can use the guest account to connect to the Wi-Fi.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客可以使用訪客帳號連線到 Wi-Fi。

toeic.example_en: A new group policy now blocks USB drives on all workstations.
toeic.example_zh: 新的群組原則現在禁止所有工作站使用 USB 隨身碟。

toeic.example_en: A software update will be pushed to your laptop overnight.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚會有一項軟體更新推送到你的筆電。

toeic.example_en: Install the latest security patch before joining the project network.
toeic.example_zh: 加入專案網路前請安裝最新的安全性修補程式。

toeic.example_en: The new service pack improves performance on older devices.
toeic.example_zh: 新的服務套件提升舊裝置上的效能。

toeic.example_en: Updating the firmware fixed the connectivity problem with the headset.
toeic.example_zh: 更新韌體解決了耳機的連線問題。

toeic.example_en: Please uninstall the old VPN client before installing the new one.
toeic.example_zh: 請先解除安裝舊的 VPN 用戶端再安裝新版。

toeic.example_en: Try to reinstall the application if it keeps crashing.
toeic.example_zh: 如果應用程式持續當機，試著重新安裝看看。

toeic.example_en: Run the installer as an administrator to avoid permission errors.
toeic.example_zh: 以系統管理員身分執行安裝程式以避免權限錯誤。

toeic.example_en: Your license key is included in the welcome email from IT.
toeic.example_zh: 你的授權金鑰已包含在資訊部寄來的歡迎信中。

toeic.example_en: Activation may take a few minutes after the first launch.
toeic.example_zh: 首次啟動後，啟用可能需要幾分鐘的時間。

toeic.example_en: Please deactivate the old software on your previous device first.
toeic.example_zh: 請先在舊裝置上停用舊的軟體。

toeic.example_en: The trial version expires in thirty days from first install.
toeic.example_zh: 試用版自首次安裝起三十天後到期。

toeic.example_en: Only approved freeware can be installed on company laptops.
toeic.example_zh: 只有經核准的免費軟體才能安裝在公司筆電上。

toeic.example_en: Our team prefers open source tools to avoid expensive licenses.
toeic.example_zh: 我們團隊偏好開放原始碼工具以避免昂貴的授權費。

toeic.example_en: Check the compatibility list before requesting a new software install.
toeic.example_zh: 申請安裝新軟體前請先檢查相容性清單。

toeic.example_en: This headset is compatible with both Windows and Mac laptops.
toeic.example_zh: 這款耳機與 Windows 和 Mac 筆電都相容。

toeic.example_en: The plugin is incompatible with the latest browser version.
toeic.example_zh: 這個外掛與最新版瀏覽器不相容。

toeic.example_en: We support the two most recent versions of each operating system.
toeic.example_zh: 我們支援每個作業系統最新的兩個版本。

toeic.example_en: Use a supported browser to log into the HR self-service portal.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用受支援的瀏覽器登入人資自助服務入口。

toeic.example_en: Clearing the browser cache often fixes strange display issues.
toeic.example_zh: 清除瀏覽器快取通常能解決奇怪的顯示問題。

toeic.example_en: Try to clear cache and cookies before reporting a bug.
toeic.example_zh: 在回報錯誤前，請先試著清除快取和 cookie。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 彈出視窗封鎖程式
toeic.example_en: Disable the pop-up blocker to view the e-learning content correctly.
toeic.example_zh: 請停用彈出視窗封鎖程式以正確檢視線上學習內容。

toeic.example_en: Open the link in incognito mode to test without cached credentials.
toeic.example_zh: 用無痕模式開啟連結來測試，不會帶入快取的登入資料。

toeic.example_en: Private browsing does not store history but is not fully anonymous.
toeic.example_zh: 隱私瀏覽不會儲存歷史紀錄，但並非完全匿名。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 書籤；動 加入書籤
toeic.example_en: Please bookmark the new intranet address before next week.
toeic.example_zh: 請在下週前把新的內部網站位址加入書籤。

toeic.example_en: The company homepage now redirects to the redesigned portal.
toeic.example_zh: 公司首頁現在會重新導向到重新設計的入口網站。

toeic.example_en: Double-check the web address before entering your login credentials.
toeic.example_zh: 輸入登入資料前，請再次確認網址。

toeic.example_en: Report any broken link on the intranet to the web admin team.
toeic.example_zh: 內部網站上任何失效連結請通報網管團隊。

toeic.example_en: The old URL will redirect to the new domain until December.
toeic.example_zh: 舊網址會重新導向到新網域，直到十二月為止。

toeic.example_en: There is noticeable lag when the call has more than ten participants.
toeic.example_zh: 通話超過十位參與者時會有明顯的延遲。

toeic.example_en: The application keeps crashing after this morning's update.
toeic.example_zh: 今天早上更新後，這個應用程式持續當機。

toeic.example_en: There is a minor glitch in the time-tracking tool that IT is investigating.
toeic.example_zh: 工時追蹤工具有個小故障，資訊部正在調查中。

toeic.example_en: Please describe the bug step by step in the ticket.
toeic.example_zh: 請在工單中逐步描述這個程式錯誤。

toeic.example_en: Attach a screenshot whenever you submit a bug report.
toeic.example_zh: 提交錯誤回報時請附上螢幕截圖。

toeic.example_en: Copy the full error message into your support ticket.
toeic.example_zh: 請把完整的錯誤訊息複製到你的支援工單中。

toeic.example_en: A blue screen appeared right after the driver was installed.
toeic.example_zh: 驅動程式安裝後立刻出現藍白當機畫面。

toeic.example_en: The spinning wheel kept spinning for several minutes during sync.
toeic.example_zh: 同步期間載入轉圈圖示持續轉了好幾分鐘。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 診斷的；名 診斷
toeic.example_en: Run the diagnostic tool before escalating the issue to vendor support.
toeic.example_zh: 把問題升級到廠商支援前，先執行診斷工具。

toeic.example_en: It took two engineers to diagnose the strange printing fault.
toeic.example_zh: 花了兩位工程師才診斷出這個奇怪的列印故障。

toeic.example_en: Let me troubleshoot the Wi-Fi issue before we order new hardware.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們訂購新硬體之前，讓我先排除 Wi-Fi 問題。

toeic.example_en: Here is a quick workaround until the official patch ships next week.
toeic.example_zh: 在官方修補程式下週推出前，這裡有個快速的暫時解決方法。

toeic.example_en: A regional outage is affecting cloud storage in our Asia office.
toeic.example_zh: 區域性中斷正影響我們亞洲辦公室的雲端儲存。

toeic.example_en: Check the service status page before opening a new ticket.
toeic.example_zh: 開立新工單前請先查看服務狀態頁面。

toeic.example_en: The status page shows that all systems are currently operational.
toeic.example_zh: 狀態頁面顯示所有系統目前都正常運作。

toeic.example_en: The maintenance window is announced one week in advance via email.
toeic.example_zh: 維護時段會透過電子郵件提前一週公告。

toeic.example_en: Scheduled maintenance will pause the file server from ten to midnight.
toeic.example_zh: 預定維護將從十點到午夜暫停檔案伺服器。

toeic.example_en: An unplanned outage delayed report generation across all departments.
toeic.example_zh: 一次非預期中斷延誤了所有部門的報表產生。

toeic.example_en: Users report intermittent connection drops on the conference room Wi-Fi.
toeic.example_zh: 使用者回報會議室 Wi-Fi 有間歇性斷線。

toeic.example_en: Slow performance after the upgrade may be due to background indexing.
toeic.example_zh: 升級後的效能緩慢可能是因為背景索引中。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高 CPU 使用率
toeic.example_en: High CPU usage indicates an app is consuming too many resources.
toeic.example_zh: 高 CPU 使用率表示有應用程式占用過多資源。

toeic.example_en: A memory leak is suspected because the app slows down over time.
toeic.example_zh: 懷疑有記憶體洩漏，因為應用程式隨時間變慢。

toeic.example_en: Open task manager to see which process is using all the memory.
toeic.example_zh: 打開工作管理員看是哪個處理程序占用所有記憶體。

toeic.example_en: Force quit the frozen app and then relaunch it from the dock.
toeic.example_zh: 強制結束當住的應用程式，然後從 Dock 重新啟動。

toeic.example_en: Some background processes start automatically when you log in.
toeic.example_zh: 有些背景程序會在你登入時自動啟動。

toeic.example_en: Disable unnecessary startup programs to speed up boot time.
toeic.example_zh: 停用不必要的開機自啟動程式以加快開機時間。

toeic.example_en: An SSD upgrade should cut your boot time roughly in half.
toeic.example_zh: 升級到 SSD 應該能讓你的開機時間大約縮短一半。

toeic.example_en: Back up the hard drive before sending the laptop in for repair.
toeic.example_zh: 把筆電送修前先備份硬碟。

toeic.example_en: All new laptops come with a solid state drive by default.
toeic.example_zh: 所有新筆電預設都配備固態硬碟。

toeic.example_en: Save the project files to an external drive as a backup.
toeic.example_zh: 把專案檔案存到外接硬碟作為備份。

toeic.example_en: Use the encrypted flash drive when transferring sensitive documents.
toeic.example_zh: 傳輸敏感文件時請使用加密隨身碟。

toeic.example_en: The camera memory card needs to be formatted before first use.
toeic.example_zh: 相機記憶卡在首次使用前需要格式化。

toeic.example_en: Your storage capacity is almost full, so please archive old files.
toeic.example_zh: 你的儲存容量幾乎滿了，請封存舊檔案。

toeic.example_en: Run the cleanup utility to free up some disk space.
toeic.example_zh: 執行清理工具以釋放一些磁碟空間。

toeic.example_en: Delete old downloads to free up space on your work laptop.
toeic.example_zh: 刪除舊的下載項目以釋放公務筆電的空間。

toeic.example_en: Always back up important files before traveling to the client site.
toeic.example_zh: 前往客戶端之前一定要備份重要檔案。

toeic.example_en: We run an automatic backup of email folders every night.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每晚自動執行電子郵件資料夾的備份。

toeic.example_en: We can restore your files from yesterday's backup.
toeic.example_zh: 我們可以從昨天的備份還原你的檔案。

toeic.example_en: Take a snapshot of the system before installing the beta software.
toeic.example_zh: 在安裝測試版軟體前，先建立系統快照。

toeic.example_en: The folder will sync automatically once you connect to the office network.
toeic.example_zh: 連上辦公室網路後，資料夾就會自動同步。

toeic.example_en: A sync error appeared when two users edited the same file.
toeic.example_zh: 兩位使用者同時編輯同一份檔案時出現同步錯誤。

toeic.example_en: Our file sharing platform supports comments and version history.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的檔案分享平台支援留言和版本紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Drop the contract into the shared folder so legal can review it.
toeic.example_zh: 把合約放進共用資料夾，讓法務檢視。

toeic.example_en: Save final versions to the network drive for everyone to access.
toeic.example_zh: 把最終版本存到網路磁碟機，讓大家都能存取。

toeic.example_en: If the mapped drive disappears, reconnect it from the network menu.
toeic.example_zh: 如果對應磁碟機消失了，請從網路選單重新連線。

toeic.example_en: Copy the file path and paste it into the support ticket.
toeic.example_zh: 複製檔案路徑並貼到支援工單中。

toeic.example_en: Please save the report in PDF file format before sending.
toeic.example_zh: 請在寄出前將報告存成 PDF 檔案格式。

toeic.example_en: Attach the signed PDF to the email before forwarding to finance.
toeic.example_zh: 把簽好的 PDF 附在郵件中再轉寄給財務。

toeic.example_en: Compress the folder into a zip file before uploading to the portal.
toeic.example_zh: 上傳到入口網站前，先把資料夾壓縮成壓縮檔。

toeic.example_en: A compressed file takes less time to upload over slow connections.
toeic.example_zh: 壓縮檔案在慢速網路上需要的上傳時間較短。

toeic.example_en: Right-click the archive to extract the contents into a new folder.
toeic.example_zh: 對著壓縮檔右鍵點擊就能解壓縮到新資料夾。

toeic.example_en: Rename the file using the standard naming convention before sharing.
toeic.example_zh: 在分享前，依照標準命名規則為檔案重新命名。

toeic.example_en: Be careful not to overwrite the latest draft when saving locally.
toeic.example_zh: 在本機存檔時，小心不要覆蓋最新版草稿。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 自動儲存；名 自動儲存
toeic.example_en: Make sure auto save is on before editing the shared document.
toeic.example_zh: 編輯共用文件前請確認自動儲存已開啟。

toeic.example_en: Use save as to keep a clean copy of the master template.
toeic.example_zh: 用另存新檔保留主範本的乾淨副本。

toeic.example_en: The audit report is read-only for everyone except the compliance team.
toeic.example_zh: 稽核報告對合規團隊以外的所有人都是唯讀。

toeic.example_en: Request edit access from the document owner if you need to revise.
toeic.example_zh: 如果需要修改，請向文件擁有者申請編輯權限。

toeic.example_en: Add the external collaborator using their work email address only.
toeic.example_zh: 新增外部共同編輯者時只能使用他們的公務電子郵件。

toeic.example_en: Real-time co-authoring lets several people edit the slide deck together.
toeic.example_zh: 即時共同編輯讓多人可以一起編輯簡報。

toeic.example_en: Resolve the comment thread once the issue has been addressed.
toeic.example_zh: 問題處理好後請結束該留言串。

toeic.example_en: Use the remote desktop client to access your office PC from home.
toeic.example_zh: 使用遠端桌面用戶端從家裡存取你辦公室的電腦。

toeic.example_en: Contractors connect through a virtual desktop for security reasons.
toeic.example_zh: 基於安全考量，承包商透過虛擬桌面連線。

toeic.example_en: Each desk has a thin client connected to the central server.
toeic.example_zh: 每個工位都有一台精簡型電腦連到中央伺服器。

toeic.example_en: Plug your laptop into the docking station to use two monitors.
toeic.example_zh: 把筆電插上擴充座就可以使用兩個螢幕。

toeic.example_en: The new monitor connects through the display port on your dock.
toeic.example_zh: 新螢幕透過擴充座上的 DisplayPort 接口連線。

toeic.example_en: The keyboard plugs into any free USB port on the dock.
toeic.example_zh: 鍵盤可以插到擴充座上任一個空的 USB 埠。

toeic.example_en: All new laptops use USB-C for both charging and data transfer.
toeic.example_zh: 所有新筆電都用 USB-C 來充電和傳輸資料。

toeic.example_en: Borrow an adapter from reception if you forgot yours at home.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你把轉接頭忘在家裡，可以向接待處借一個。

toeic.example_en: Label your power supply so it does not get mixed up.
toeic.example_zh: 把你的電源供應器貼上標籤，免得被搞混。

toeic.example_en: Battery life drops noticeably when video conferencing for long periods.
toeic.example_zh: 長時間視訊會議時電池續航力會明顯下降。

toeic.example_en: Switch to power saver mode when you cannot find an outlet.
toeic.example_zh: 找不到插座時請切換到省電模式。

toeic.example_en: The laptop enters sleep mode after fifteen minutes of inactivity.
toeic.example_zh: 筆電閒置十五分鐘後會進入睡眠模式。

toeic.example_en: Bring earbuds if you plan to join calls from the cafe area.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你打算在咖啡區參加通話，請帶入耳式耳機。

toeic.example_en: There is a strong echo whenever two people in the same room join.
toeic.example_zh: 同房間有兩個人加入時就會出現很強的回音。

toeic.example_en: Move farther from the speaker to reduce feedback noise on the call.
toeic.example_zh: 離喇叭遠一點以減少通話中的麥克風回授。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a video call with the new vendor for next Tuesday.
toeic.example_zh: 請安排下週二與新廠商的視訊通話。

toeic.example_en: Audio quality has improved since the office upgraded the routers.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公室升級路由器後，音訊品質有所改善。

toeic.example_en: The guest Wi-Fi requires a daily password from reception.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客 Wi-Fi 需要每日向接待處索取密碼。

toeic.example_en: Restarting the router solved the printer connection problem.
toeic.example_zh: 重新啟動路由器解決了印表機的連線問題。

toeic.example_en: The internet provider replaced the modem last weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 網路供應商上週末更換了數據機。

toeic.example_en: Plug in an ethernet cable for a more stable office connection.
toeic.example_zh: 插上網路線可以讓辦公室連線更穩定。

toeic.example_en: A wired connection is recommended for video editing tasks.
toeic.example_zh: 影片剪輯工作建議使用有線連線。

toeic.example_en: The wireless connection drops near the elevator shaft.
toeic.example_zh: 在電梯井附近，無線連線會中斷。

toeic.example_en: Move closer to the window to improve your signal strength.
toeic.example_zh: 靠窗一點以改善你的訊號強度。

toeic.example_en: There is a Wi-Fi dead zone in the corner meeting room.
toeic.example_zh: 那間角落會議室有 Wi-Fi 訊號死角。

toeic.example_en: A new access point will be installed on this floor next week.
toeic.example_zh: 下週這層樓會安裝一個新的無線基地台。

toeic.example_en: Tell support your IP address so they can locate the issue.
toeic.example_zh: 把你的 IP 位址告訴支援人員以協助定位問題。

toeic.example_en: A DNS issue is preventing some users from reaching the intranet.
toeic.example_zh: 一個 DNS 問題讓部分使用者無法連到內部網站。

toeic.example_en: The bandwidth limit affects large file uploads during peak hours.
toeic.example_zh: 頻寬上限在尖峰時段會影響大檔案上傳。

toeic.example_en: Run a speed test before joining the all-hands meeting from home.
toeic.example_zh: 從家裡參加全員會議前，先做一次網速測試。

toeic.example_en: High latency can disrupt voice calls and remote desktop sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 高延遲會中斷語音通話和遠端桌面工作階段。

toeic.example_en: Packet loss on the line caused choppy audio during the demo.
toeic.example_zh: 線路上的封包遺失造成示範時音訊斷斷續續。

toeic.example_en: All external traffic goes through the corporate proxy server.
toeic.example_zh: 所有對外流量都會經過公司的代理伺服器。

toeic.example_en: The intranet hosts company policies and HR forms in one place.
toeic.example_zh: 內部網路集中存放公司政策和人資表單。

toeic.example_en: Antivirus scans run quietly in the background every day.
toeic.example_zh: 防毒軟體每天都在背景靜默掃描。

toeic.example_en: Avoid clicking unknown links to reduce the risk of malware.
toeic.example_zh: 不要點擊不明連結，以降低惡意軟體風險。

toeic.example_en: Run a full virus scan if your device behaves unusually.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你的裝置出現異常，請執行完整病毒掃描。

toeic.example_en: The spam filter quarantines suspicious newsletters automatically.
toeic.example_zh: 垃圾郵件過濾器會自動隔離可疑的電子報。

toeic.example_en: Report any suspicious email to the security team immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 請立即將任何可疑郵件回報給資安團隊。

toeic.example_en: That message about a gift card is a classic email scam.
toeic.example_zh: 那則關於禮品卡的訊息是典型的電子郵件詐騙。

toeic.example_en: Social engineering attacks often target busy frontline employees.
toeic.example_zh: 社交工程攻擊常以忙碌的第一線員工為目標。

toeic.example_en: A small data leak was traced to a misconfigured shared folder.
toeic.example_zh: 一起小規模資料外洩被追溯到設定錯誤的共用資料夾。

toeic.example_en: Look for the lock icon to confirm a secure connection.
toeic.example_zh: 看到鎖頭圖示就能確認是安全連線。

toeic.example_en: All internal applications now require HTTPS for any access.
toeic.example_zh: 所有內部應用程式現在都要求使用 HTTPS 存取。

toeic.example_en: The SSL certificate will be renewed before its expiration date.
toeic.example_zh: SSL 憑證會在到期日前完成續約。

toeic.example_en: Remote access requires VPN plus multi-factor authentication.
toeic.example_zh: 遠端存取需要 VPN 加上多重驗證。

toeic.example_en: Your session was disconnected due to extended inactivity.
toeic.example_zh: 你的工作階段因為長時間閒置而中斷。

toeic.example_en: The engineer reviewed the log file to find the failed request.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師檢視紀錄檔以找出失敗的請求。

toeic.example_en: Send the system log along with your ticket for faster resolution.
toeic.example_zh: 把系統紀錄一起附在工單中可以加快處理速度。

toeic.example_en: Open a support ticket and describe each step you took.
toeic.example_zh: 請開立支援工單並描述你做過的每個步驟。

toeic.example_en: A help desk agent will follow up within four working hours.
toeic.example_zh: 服務台人員會在四個工作小時內回覆。

toeic.example_en: Tier one support handles simple password and access requests.
toeic.example_zh: 一線支援處理簡單的密碼和存取申請。

toeic.example_en: Tier two support deals with hardware and application issues.
toeic.example_zh: 二線支援處理硬體和應用程式問題。

toeic.example_en: Please escalate the issue if no reply arrives by tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 如果明天還沒收到回覆，請升級處理這個問題。

toeic.example_en: Complete the feedback form after the ticket is closed.
toeic.example_zh: 工單結案後請填寫意見回饋表。

toeic.example_en: Check the quick guide for instructions on joining a meeting room.
toeic.example_zh: 如何加入會議室請參考快速指南。

toeic.example_en: Watch the short tutorial before scheduling your first webinar.
toeic.example_zh: 在安排第一場網路研討會前先看短教學。

toeic.example_en: I can do a quick walkthrough of the expense tool tomorrow morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我明天早上可以快速演示一次費用工具。

toeic.example_en: Check the FAQ page before opening a new support ticket.
toeic.example_zh: 在開立新工單前請先查看常見問題頁面。

toeic.example_en: The release note explains the new features added this week.
toeic.example_zh: 發行說明解釋了本週新增的功能。

toeic.example_en: Clear the print queue if your document is stuck again.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你的文件再次卡住，請清除列印佇列。

toeic.example_en: Cancel the print job from the queue before retrying.
toeic.example_zh: 重試前先從佇列中取消這個列印工作。

toeic.example_en: Open the back panel carefully to clear the paper jam.
toeic.example_zh: 小心打開後蓋以清除卡紙。

toeic.example_en: We need to order more toner before the end of the month.
toeic.example_zh: 我們得在月底前再訂購一些碳粉。

toeic.example_en: Replace the empty ink cartridge with a new one from supplies.
toeic.example_zh: 從庫房拿新的墨水匣替換用完的墨水匣。
