toeic.example_en: Enable duplex printing to save paper for internal documents.
toeic.example_zh: 請開啟雙面列印以節省內部文件用紙。

toeic.example_en: Color print costs more, so use it only when necessary.
toeic.example_zh: 彩色列印成本較高，請只在必要時使用。

toeic.example_en: Print drafts in grayscale to reduce ink consumption.
toeic.example_zh: 草稿請以灰階列印以減少墨水消耗。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 掃描寄送電子郵件
toeic.example_en: Use scan to email to send the receipt to the finance team.
toeic.example_zh: 用掃描寄送電子郵件把收據寄給財務團隊。

toeic.example_en: OCR converts scanned pages into editable text quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 光學文字辨識能快速將掃描頁面轉成可編輯文字。

toeic.example_en: Each floor has a multifunction printer that prints, scans, and copies.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓都有一台可列印、掃描和影印的多功能事務機。

toeic.example_en: Please shred any document that contains personal data.
toeic.example_zh: 請把任何含有個人資料的文件碎紙處理。

toeic.example_en: Use the label printer to print address labels for the mailroom.
toeic.example_zh: 請用標籤印表機列印郵件室用的地址標籤。

toeic.example_en: Every laptop has an asset tag for inventory tracking.
toeic.example_zh: 每台筆電都有資產標籤以利庫存追蹤。

toeic.example_en: Provide the serial number when reporting a hardware issue.
toeic.example_zh: 回報硬體問題時請提供序號。

toeic.example_en: Your device ID can be found in the system information panel.
toeic.example_zh: 你的裝置 ID 可以在系統資訊面板中找到。

toeic.example_en: Share your MAC address so IT can allow the device on the network.
toeic.example_zh: 請提供你的 MAC 位址讓資訊部把裝置加入網路。

toeic.example_en: Include the hostname in the ticket so we can identify the machine.
toeic.example_zh: 請在工單中附上主機名稱以利我們識別這台機器。

toeic.example_en: Standard imaging takes about an hour for a brand-new laptop.
toeic.example_zh: 全新筆電的標準系統映像建置大約需要一個小時。

toeic.example_en: We deprovision accounts within one hour of an employee leaving.
toeic.example_zh: 員工離職後一小時內我們就會撤除其帳號權限。

toeic.example_en: We need ten pilot users from each department for the trial.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每個部門需要十位試行使用者參與試驗。

toeic.example_en: Early adopters get access to new features before general release.
toeic.example_zh: 早期採用者可以在正式發布前使用新功能。

toeic.example_en: General availability is planned for the start of next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 正式上線預計在下一季初。

toeic.example_en: Submit a feature request through the product feedback form.
toeic.example_zh: 請透過產品意見表單提出功能需求。

toeic.example_en: We collect user feedback after every major release.
toeic.example_zh: 每次重大更新後我們都會收集使用者意見。

toeic.example_en: The new dashboard is more user friendly than the old one.
toeic.example_zh: 新儀表板比舊的更容易使用。

toeic.example_en: The redesigned interface is intuitive even for new hires.
toeic.example_zh: 重新設計的介面即使對新員工也很直覺。

toeic.example_en: The mobile interface is optimized for one-handed use.
toeic.example_zh: 行動介面已針對單手操作做了最佳化。

toeic.example_en: Updated navigation makes it easier to find policy documents.
toeic.example_zh: 更新後的導覽讓政策文件更容易尋找。

toeic.example_en: The settings option is now hidden under the top menu bar.
toeic.example_zh: 設定選項現在藏在頂端選單列下方。

toeic.example_en: Pin your favorite buttons to the toolbar for quick access.
toeic.example_zh: 把你最常用的按鈕釘到工具列以便快速存取。

toeic.example_en: Open the sidebar to see your recent files and shared spaces.
toeic.example_zh: 打開側邊欄就能看到最近的檔案和共用空間。

toeic.example_en: Pick your country from the dropdown menu before submitting.
toeic.example_zh: 送出前請從下拉選單中選擇你的國家。

toeic.example_en: Tick the checkbox if you want to receive weekly summaries.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你想收到每週摘要，請勾選核取方塊。

toeic.example_en: Choose one delivery method using the radio button options.
toeic.example_zh: 請用單選按鈕選擇一種配送方式。

toeic.example_en: Click the hyperlink in the email to confirm your registration.
toeic.example_zh: 點擊郵件中的超連結以確認報名。

toeic.example_en: Learning a few keyboard shortcuts can save hours each week.
toeic.example_zh: 學幾個鍵盤快捷鍵每週能省下不少時間。

toeic.example_en: Just copy paste the URL into your browser to register.
toeic.example_zh: 只要把網址複製貼上到瀏覽器就能報名。

toeic.example_en: Drag and drop the attachment into the chat window to share it.
toeic.example_zh: 把附件拖曳放置到聊天視窗就能分享。

toeic.example_en: Right click the icon to see more options for the file.
toeic.example_zh: 對著圖示按右鍵就能看到檔案的更多選項。

toeic.example_en: Double click the icon to launch the meeting application.
toeic.example_zh: 雙擊圖示就能啟動會議應用程式。

toeic.example_en: Use the scroll bar on the right to see more rows.
toeic.example_zh: 用右邊的捲軸可以看更多列。

toeic.example_en: Zoom in on the chart to see the regional breakdown clearly.
toeic.example_zh: 放大檢視這張圖表才能看清楚區域明細。

toeic.example_en: Zoom out to see the full diagram on a small screen.
toeic.example_zh: 在小螢幕上請縮小檢視才能看到完整的示意圖。

toeic.example_en: Export the data into a spreadsheet for further analysis.
toeic.example_zh: 把資料匯出到試算表以做進一步分析。

toeic.example_en: Double-check the formula in column G before submitting the report.
toeic.example_zh: 提交報表前請再次確認 G 欄的公式。

toeic.example_en: A simple macro can automate the monthly reconciliation steps.
toeic.example_zh: 簡單的巨集就能自動化每月對帳的步驟。

toeic.example_en: Use the approved template when creating client-facing slide decks.
toeic.example_zh: 製作客戶用簡報時請使用核准的範本。

toeic.example_en: Switch to presentation mode so the notifications stop popping up.
toeic.example_zh: 切換到簡報模式才不會一直跳通知。

toeic.example_en: Highlight key terms before sending the contract for review.
toeic.example_zh: 把合約送審前先反白標記關鍵條款。

toeic.example_en: Remember to save the file before joining the next meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 在參加下一個會議前記得儲存檔案。

toeic.example_en: Follow the naming convention to keep the archive easy to search.
toeic.example_zh: 請遵守命名規則以保持封存區易於搜尋。

toeic.example_en: Files in the recycle bin can be recovered within thirty days.
toeic.example_zh: 資源回收筒裡的檔案可以在三十天內救回。

toeic.example_en: Permanent delete cannot be undone, so confirm carefully.
toeic.example_zh: 永久刪除無法復原，請仔細確認。

toeic.example_en: Lower the screen brightness in shared spaces to be polite.
toeic.example_zh: 在共用空間請降低螢幕亮度以示禮貌。

toeic.example_en: Many users prefer dark mode for late-night work sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 許多使用者深夜工作時偏好深色模式。

toeic.example_en: Turn off the notification banner during the customer demo.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶示範期間請關閉通知橫幅。

toeic.example_en: Set your status to do not disturb during focus hours.
toeic.example_zh: 在專注時間請把狀態設為勿擾模式。

toeic.example_en: Update your presence status to away when you step out.
toeic.example_zh: 離開座位時請把你的上線狀態更新為離開。

toeic.example_en: Send a quick instant message instead of scheduling a short call.
toeic.example_zh: 與其安排短時間通話，不如傳個即時訊息。

toeic.example_en: Mention the responsible owner so they get a direct notification.
toeic.example_zh: 請標記提及負責人，他才會直接收到通知。

toeic.example_en: Add an emoji reaction to acknowledge messages quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 用表情符號回應可以快速表示已讀。

toeic.example_en: Large file attachment sizes are limited to twenty-five megabytes.
toeic.example_zh: 檔案附件大小上限為二十五 MB。

toeic.example_en: Click the meeting link a few minutes before the start time.
toeic.example_zh: 請在會議開始前幾分鐘點擊會議連結。

toeic.example_en: Use the dial-in number if you lose internet during the call.
toeic.example_zh: 如果通話時失去網路，請使用電話撥入號碼。

toeic.example_en: Only the host controls can start recording or end the meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 只有主持人控制項可以開始錄影或結束會議。

toeic.example_en: Stop screen recording before opening any confidential window.
toeic.example_zh: 在打開任何機密視窗前請停止螢幕錄影。

toeic.example_en: Your voicemail box still has three new messages from this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 你的語音信箱還有今早留下的三則新訊息。

toeic.example_en: Install the softphone app to make calls from your laptop.
toeic.example_zh: 安裝軟體電話 app 就能用筆電撥打電話。

toeic.example_en: Our office now uses VoIP for both internal and external calls.
toeic.example_zh: 我們辦公室現在內外部通話都使用網路電話。

toeic.example_en: Plug in the USB headset before joining the conference call.
toeic.example_zh: 在加入電話會議前先插上 USB 耳機麥克風。

toeic.example_en: Request an ergonomic chair if you experience back pain at work.
toeic.example_zh: 如果在工作中出現背痛，可以申請一張人體工學椅。

toeic.example_en: Good cable management keeps the desk safe and tidy.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的線材整理讓桌面安全又整齊。

toeic.example_en: Plug expensive equipment into a surge protector for safety.
toeic.example_zh: 貴重設備請插入突波保護器以策安全。

toeic.example_en: The UPS keeps the server online during short power cuts.
toeic.example_zh: 不斷電系統在短暫停電期間讓伺服器保持上線。

toeic.example_en: Tap your smart card on the reader to enter the secure room.
toeic.example_zh: 把智慧卡靠在讀卡機上才能進入安全管制室。

toeic.example_en: All loaner devices must be listed in the asset register.
toeic.example_zh: 所有借出的裝置都必須列在資產登記表上。

toeic.example_en: Borrow a loaner laptop while your machine is being repaired.
toeic.example_zh: 你的機器送修期間可以借一台替代用筆電。

toeic.example_en: Complete the device return form on your last working day.
toeic.example_zh: 在你最後一個工作日請完成裝置歸還表單。

toeic.example_en: Report any lost device to IT within the same business day.
toeic.example_zh: 任何遺失裝置請在當天通報資訊部。

toeic.example_en: IT can perform a remote wipe if your phone is stolen.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你的手機被偷，資訊部可以執行遠端清除。</value>

toeic.example_en: A factory reset will erase all data on the device.
toeic.example_zh: 還原原廠設定會清除裝置上的所有資料。

toeic.example_en: The annual hardware refresh covers laptops older than three years.
toeic.example_zh: 年度硬體更新涵蓋使用超過三年的筆電。

toeic.example_en: Save the tech support hotline number on your work phone.
toeic.example_zh: 把技術支援熱線號碼存到你的公務手機。

toeic.example_en: Break the design ticket into smaller subtasks so each engineer can pick one this sprint.
toeic.example_zh: 把設計工單拆成較小的子任務，讓每位工程師本次衝刺可挑一項。

toeic.example_en: The reporter of this bug is from QA, so please reach out to her with any follow-up questions.
toeic.example_zh: 此錯誤的提報人來自品保部門，後續問題請與她聯繫。

toeic.example_en: Add the product owner as a watcher so she gets every status update without needing to ask.
toeic.example_zh: 把產品負責人加為追蹤者，她就能自動收到每次狀態更新。

toeic.example_en: Our ticket queue is growing quickly, so we should triage incoming requests every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的工單佇列快速增加，每天早上都應分類進來的需求。

toeic.example_en: Let us keep the stand-up call under fifteen minutes and save deep discussions for later.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我們把立會通話控制在十五分鐘內，深入討論留到稍後再談。

toeic.example_en: The daily check-in helps the team flag blockers early before they slow the sprint down.
toeic.example_zh: 每日確認會能幫團隊及早提出阻礙，避免拖累衝刺進度。

toeic.example_en: We hold a biweekly review to look at velocity trends and any scope changes from clients.
toeic.example_zh: 我們舉行雙週檢討會檢視速率趨勢與來自客戶的任何範圍變更。

toeic.example_en: Please prepare a short monthly readout so leadership can see how each workstream is performing.
toeic.example_zh: 請準備一份簡短的月度匯報，讓主管了解各工作流的表現。

toeic.example_en: I will send the status report after lunch so everyone has time to review before the meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 我會在午餐後寄出狀態報告，讓大家在會議前有時間檢視。

toeic.example_en: Could you post a quick progress update in the channel so stakeholders feel informed today?
toeic.example_zh: 你能在頻道中發布一則簡短的進度更新，讓利害關係人今天感到被告知嗎？

toeic.example_en: The weekly digest report summarizes key wins, risks, and decisions for senior management.
toeic.example_zh: 每週摘要報告為高階主管彙整關鍵成就、風險與決策。

toeic.example_en: Add an executive summary slide at the front to grab attention in the first thirty seconds.
toeic.example_zh: 在最前面加一張高階摘要投影片，三十秒內就抓住注意力。

toeic.example_en: Share a highlight reel of last quarter's deliveries so the new sponsors see immediate value.
toeic.example_zh: 分享上季交付的精華摘要，讓新贊助者立即感受到價值。

toeic.example_en: Please draft the weekly summary email by Thursday so it can go out before the sync call.
toeic.example_zh: 請在星期四前撰寫每週摘要郵件，以便在同步會議前寄出。

toeic.example_en: Our milestone tracker shows that two deliverables are slipping by about three working days.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的里程碑追蹤表顯示有兩項交付物將延遲約三個工作天。

toeic.example_en: Confirm the milestone date with the vendor before publishing the project timeline next week.
toeic.example_zh: 在下週公布專案時程前，與供應商確認里程碑日期。

toeic.example_en: Phase completion is officially declared once all acceptance criteria are signed off by the sponsor.
toeic.example_zh: 所有驗收條件經贊助人簽核後，才能正式宣告階段完成。

toeic.example_en: We need to document lessons learned at every phase exit so future projects benefit from them.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要在每次階段結束時記錄經驗教訓，讓未來專案受惠。

toeic.example_en: Mark the checkpoint date on the shared calendar so no one schedules conflicting meetings.
toeic.example_zh: 把檢查點日期標註在共用日曆上，避免有人安排衝突的會議。

toeic.example_en: The gating review will decide whether we proceed to development or revisit the design phase.
toeic.example_zh: 階段審核將決定我們進入開發階段，或重新檢視設計階段。

toeic.example_en: We cannot cross the approval gate until the security team finishes their compliance assessment.
toeic.example_zh: 在資安團隊完成合規評估前，我們不能通過核准關卡。

toeic.example_en: I attached the kickoff agenda so participants can prepare materials and questions in advance.
toeic.example_zh: 我附上啟動會議議程，讓與會者能事先準備資料和問題。

toeic.example_en: Please accept the kickoff invite and forward it to anyone I might have missed on the list.
toeic.example_zh: 請接受啟動會邀請，並轉寄給名單上可能遺漏的同事。

toeic.example_en: The kickoff slide should clearly outline the objectives, scope, and key dates for everyone involved.
toeic.example_zh: 啟動投影片應清楚列出目標、範圍與關鍵日期供所有相關人員參考。

toeic.example_en: We must confirm kickoff readiness with finance, legal, and operations before sending invitations.
toeic.example_zh: 在寄送邀請前，我們必須與財務、法務和營運確認啟動就緒狀態。

toeic.example_en: The project brief should fit on a single page and answer who, what, when, and why.
toeic.example_zh: 專案簡介書應控制在一頁內，回答誰、什麼、何時與為何。

toeic.example_en: Please review the scope document and add comments before we lock it in tomorrow afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 請檢視範疇文件並加上評論，我們明天下午就會把它定版。

toeic.example_en: Any scope change must be logged in the tracker and approved by the project sponsor first.
toeic.example_zh: 任何範疇變更都必須在追蹤系統登錄，並由專案贊助人先行核准。

toeic.example_en: Last-minute scope expansion is the main reason our delivery date keeps slipping every quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 最後一刻的範疇擴大是我們交付日每季都延遲的主因。

toeic.example_en: After scope lock on Monday, any new request will be parked for the next release cycle.
toeic.example_zh: 星期一範疇凍結後，任何新需求都會被擱置到下個發布週期。

toeic.example_en: The scope freeze starts next Monday, so submit final feature requests by end of this week.
toeic.example_zh: 範疇凍結期從下週一開始，請在本週末前提交最後功能需求。

toeic.example_en: Set a realistic target date that the whole team can commit to without burning everyone out.
toeic.example_zh: 設定一個全體團隊都能承諾且不會把大家累垮的合理目標日期。

toeic.example_en: The drop-dead date for the regulator filing is December first, with absolutely no extensions allowed.
toeic.example_zh: 送交監管機關的最終截止日是十二月一日，絕無延期空間。

toeic.example_en: The client granted an extended deadline so we could properly address their late requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶批准延長期限，讓我們能妥善處理他們較晚才提出的需求。

toeic.example_en: Friday is a hard deadline because the printed brochures must reach the venue by Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 星期五是硬性截止日，因為印刷手冊必須在星期一前送達會場。

toeic.example_en: Treat Tuesday as a soft deadline so we leave a buffer for last-minute feedback from stakeholders.
toeic.example_zh: 把星期二視為軟性截止日，預留緩衝時間以接收利害關係人最後的回饋。

toeic.example_en: Our delivery commitment to the client is firm, so please raise concerns now rather than later.
toeic.example_zh: 我們對客戶的交付承諾是堅定的，請現在提出疑慮，而非後續再說。

toeic.example_en: The missing API key is a blocking issue that prevents the integration test from starting today.
toeic.example_zh: 缺少的 API 金鑰是阻礙性問題，今天的整合測試因此無法開始。

toeic.example_en: We have three blocker tickets that need to be cleared before the team can move to staging.
toeic.example_zh: 在團隊進到預備環境前，必須先清掉三張阻礙工單。

toeic.example_en: List every dependency item in the plan so we can chase teams that owe us deliverables.
toeic.example_zh: 把所有依賴項目列入計畫中，這樣我們能催促欠我們交付物的團隊。

toeic.example_en: Highlight any cross-team dependency early so other managers can plan their resources accordingly.
toeic.example_zh: 及早凸顯任何跨團隊依賴，讓其他主管能據此規劃資源。

toeic.example_en: Our biggest external dependency is the vendor delivering the new payment service on schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 我們最大的外部依賴是廠商按時交付新的支付服務。

toeic.example_en: An internal dependency on the data team has shifted the integration work by a full week.
toeic.example_zh: 對資料團隊的內部依賴讓整合工作整整延後了一週。

toeic.example_en: Please update the handoff document so the support team understands how to operate the new tool.
toeic.example_zh: 請更新交接文件，讓客服團隊了解如何操作新工具。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a handoff meeting next week so engineering can brief operations on the new release.
toeic.example_zh: 下週安排一場交接會議，讓工程團隊向營運簡報新版本。

toeic.example_en: Each checklist item must be ticked before we mark the deployment as complete in the tracker.
toeic.example_zh: 在系統中標記部署完成前，每個檢查清單項目都必須勾選。

toeic.example_en: The launch checklist covers communications, monitoring, and rollback steps for the production push.
toeic.example_zh: 上線檢查清單涵蓋溝通、監控與正式環境部署的回退步驟。

toeic.example_en: Print the go-live checklist and place it on the war room wall during launch night.
toeic.example_zh: 印出正式上線清單，並在上線當晚貼在作戰室牆上。

toeic.example_en: Three open actions from last week still need owners assigned before we can close the loop.
toeic.example_zh: 上週還有三件待處理事項尚未指派負責人，才能完成閉環。

toeic.example_en: Move every closed action to the archive sheet so the current view stays clean and readable.
toeic.example_zh: 把每件已完成事項移到封存頁，讓目前的檢視保持乾淨易讀。

toeic.example_en: Every entry on the action log needs an action owner; otherwise the item will not progress.
toeic.example_zh: 行動紀錄上的每筆項目都需要負責執行人，否則事項不會有進展。

toeic.example_en: I have updated the spreadsheet to show the task owner for every workstream in the program.
toeic.example_zh: 我已更新試算表，顯示專案中每條工作流的任務負責人。

toeic.example_en: Use the ownership matrix in our wiki to identify the right person before raising new requests.
toeic.example_zh: 在提出新需求前，使用 wiki 中的權責矩陣找出正確的負責人。

toeic.example_en: A clear responsibility chart helps avoid duplicated effort across the design and engineering teams.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚的職責對照表能避免設計與工程團隊重複工作。

toeic.example_en: Add this issue to the raid log so the steering committee reviews it during Friday's session.
toeic.example_zh: 把這個議題加入 RAID 紀錄表，指導委員會將在週五會議檢視。

toeic.example_en: Update the risk log with the new vendor concerns so we can discuss mitigation on Thursday.
toeic.example_zh: 把廠商的新疑慮更新到風險紀錄中，週四再討論減輕措施。

toeic.example_en: Each risk item should include impact, likelihood, and a clear owner with a target review date.
toeic.example_zh: 每個風險項目都應包含影響、可能性、明確負責人與檢視目標日期。

toeic.example_en: After the latest update, we revised the risk rating from medium to high for this issue.
toeic.example_zh: 經最新更新後，我們把此議題的風險評等由中度上調為高度。

toeic.example_en: A risk score above twelve triggers an immediate escalation to the program management office.
toeic.example_zh: 風險分數超過十二就會立即上報至專案管理辦公室。

toeic.example_en: Group items by risk category so the team can address similar issues with a shared approach.
toeic.example_zh: 按風險類別分組，讓團隊以共用方式處理相似議題。

toeic.example_en: Document the risk response and the date you expect to confirm it has actually worked.
toeic.example_zh: 記錄風險回應與預計確認其有效的日期。

toeic.example_en: Watch the leading risk indicator on the dashboard and report any sustained upward movement quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 留意儀表板上的領先風險指標，並儘快回報任何持續上升的情況。

toeic.example_en: Keep the task tracker open during stand-up so we can move cards in real time.
toeic.example_zh: 在立會期間打開任務追蹤器，讓我們即時移動卡片。

toeic.example_en: Assign a story point estimate to each ticket so we can plan a realistic sprint capacity.
toeic.example_zh: 為每張工單指派故事點數估算，才能規劃合理的衝刺容量。

toeic.example_en: Block ninety minutes for the estimation session so the team can discuss complexity calmly.
toeic.example_zh: 為估算會議預留九十分鐘，讓團隊能從容討論複雜度。

toeic.example_en: Run a quick planning poker round to estimate the new tickets we added to the backlog today.
toeic.example_zh: 進行一輪快速規劃撲克，估算我們今天加入待辦清單的新工單。

toeic.example_en: We hold backlog grooming every Wednesday so stories are clear and ready for the next sprint.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每週三舉行待辦清單整理，讓故事清楚並為下次衝刺做好準備。

toeic.example_en: During backlog refinement, we clarify acceptance criteria and adjust priorities based on customer feedback.
toeic.example_zh: 在待辦清單精煉時，我們釐清驗收條件，並依客戶回饋調整優先順序。

toeic.example_en: Our sprint goal is to ship the basic checkout flow so beta users can complete real purchases.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的衝刺目標是上線基本結帳流程，讓 beta 用戶能完成實際購買。

toeic.example_en: Avoid adding new tickets to the sprint scope once planning is finished and the team has committed.
toeic.example_zh: 規劃結束且團隊已承諾後，避免再把新工單加入衝刺範圍。

toeic.example_en: Invite the product owner to every sprint demo so feedback can be gathered before release.
toeic.example_zh: 邀請產品負責人參加每次衝刺演示，以便在發布前收集回饋。

toeic.example_en: Keep the sprint retrospective blameless so engineers feel safe sharing what really went wrong.
toeic.example_zh: 保持衝刺回顧會不究責，讓工程師願意安心分享真正出問題的地方。

toeic.example_en: Track team velocity over several sprints to forecast a realistic delivery window for stakeholders.
toeic.example_zh: 追蹤多個衝刺的團隊速率，為利害關係人預測合理的交付時程。

toeic.example_en: A burn-up chart shows total scope and completed work, making scope changes easy to visualize.
toeic.example_zh: 燃起圖顯示總範圍與已完成工作，讓範圍變更易於視覺化。

toeic.example_en: Our burndown rate dipped midweek, suggesting we may struggle to finish all stories on time.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的燃盡速率在週中下降，意味著可能難以準時完成所有故事。

toeic.example_en: Build a realistic capacity plan that accounts for holidays, training days, and oncall rotations.
toeic.example_zh: 建立合理的產能計畫，考量假日、訓練日和值班輪班。

toeic.example_en: Keep a ten percent capacity buffer so urgent customer issues do not derail planned work.
toeic.example_zh: 保留百分之十的產能緩衝，避免緊急客戶議題打亂預定工作。

toeic.example_en: Share the resource plan with finance so they can validate the headcount needed for next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 把資源計畫分享給財務，讓他們驗證下季所需的人力。

toeic.example_en: A resource constraint on the data team is the main reason the migration is still pending.
toeic.example_zh: 資料團隊的資源限制是遷移仍然待辦的主要原因。

toeic.example_en: Submit the headcount plan to HR before the budget freeze begins at the end of the month.
toeic.example_zh: 在月底預算凍結前，把人數計畫送交人資部門。

toeic.example_en: Walk the new team members through the project plan so they understand timelines and key roles.
toeic.example_zh: 帶新加入的成員了解專案計畫，讓他們掌握時程與關鍵角色。

toeic.example_en: Print the project schedule and tape it on the team wall so everyone sees upcoming tasks.
toeic.example_zh: 印出專案時程表並貼在團隊牆上，讓大家看到即將到來的任務。

toeic.example_en: Update the project timeline whenever a deliverable slips so leadership has accurate dates.
toeic.example_zh: 每當交付物延遲時更新專案時間軸，讓主管掌握準確日期。

toeic.example_en: Celebrate each project milestone with a short team lunch to keep morale high during long projects.
toeic.example_zh: 在每個專案里程碑用簡短的團隊午餐慶祝，讓士氣在長期專案中保持高昂。

toeic.example_en: Send a brief project status note to the executive team every Friday before noon if possible.
toeic.example_zh: 如果可能，每週五中午前向高階團隊寄送簡短的專案狀態通知。

toeic.example_en: Use a simple traffic-light system to indicate project health across cost, scope, and schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 用簡單的紅黃綠燈系統呈現專案在成本、範圍與時程上的健康度。

toeic.example_en: We are at green status this week thanks to the timely delivery from our third-party vendor.
toeic.example_zh: 感謝第三方廠商準時交付，我們本週為綠燈狀態。

toeic.example_en: Amber status means we still expect to deliver, but there is a real risk we should monitor closely.
toeic.example_zh: 黃燈狀態代表我們仍預計交付，但確實有需要密切監控的風險。

toeic.example_en: Once a project hits red status, the steering committee must approve a recovery plan immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 專案一旦進入紅燈狀態，指導委員會必須立即核准復原計畫。

toeic.example_en: The supplier delay is currently an amber risk; we will revisit it in next Monday's review.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商延遲目前屬於黃燈風險，我們將在下週一檢討時再評估。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 每週 RAG 報告
toeic.example_en: The weekly RAG report shows two workstreams in amber and one in red this reporting cycle.
toeic.example_zh: 本週期的每週 RAG 報告顯示兩條工作流為黃燈、一條為紅燈。

toeic.example_en: Lead each update with a weekly highlight so readers feel rewarded for paying attention.
toeic.example_zh: 每次更新都以每週亮點開頭，讓讀者覺得花時間閱讀有收穫。

toeic.example_en: List one key accomplishment per workstream to keep status reports both crisp and memorable.
toeic.example_zh: 每條工作流列一項重要成就，讓狀態報告既精簡又令人印象深刻。

toeic.example_en: Call out the key blocker in red so leadership can step in to help unblock our team.
toeic.example_zh: 用紅字標出關鍵阻礙，方便主管出手協助團隊解除阻礙。

toeic.example_en: End every status note with a clear next steps section that includes dates and owners.
toeic.example_zh: 每篇狀態通知都以清楚的後續步驟段落作結，附上日期和負責人。

toeic.example_en: I will compile the follow-up items from today's meeting and send them out tomorrow morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我會彙整今日會議的後續事項，明天早上寄出。

toeic.example_en: Limit each agenda topic to ten minutes so the meeting does not run past its scheduled end time.
toeic.example_zh: 把每個議程主題限制在十分鐘內，會議才不會超出預定結束時間。

toeic.example_en: Can I take a five-minute agenda slot to discuss the new vendor proposal with the leadership team?
toeic.example_zh: 我能否使用五分鐘的議程時段，向主管團隊討論新廠商提案？

toeic.example_en: We keep a running agenda in the shared doc so anyone can add topics ahead of the call.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在共用文件保留滾動議程，任何人都能在通話前新增主題。

toeic.example_en: Our meeting cadence rhythm includes a daily stand-up, weekly review, and biweekly steering session.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的會議節奏包含每日立會、每週檢討與雙週指導會議。

toeic.example_en: Share a one-paragraph meeting recap by end of day so absent colleagues stay properly informed.
toeic.example_zh: 當天結束前分享一段會議回顧，讓缺席同事也能掌握資訊。

toeic.example_en: I attached the post-meeting note with action items, owners, and target dates for your reference.
toeic.example_zh: 我附上會後紀要，內含行動事項、負責人和目標日期供你參考。

toeic.example_en: The meeting tracker lists every decision and open question from our weekly governance call.
toeic.example_zh: 會議追蹤表列出每週治理會議中的每項決策與待解問題。

toeic.example_en: Add a decision record to the wiki whenever we choose between two competing technical options.
toeic.example_zh: 每當我們在兩種競爭性技術方案之間抉擇時，就在 wiki 加入決策紀錄。

toeic.example_en: The decision deadline is Thursday afternoon, so please respond to the email before then.
toeic.example_zh: 決策期限是星期四下午，請在那之前回覆郵件。

toeic.example_en: Submit the approval request through the portal so finance can route it to the correct approver.
toeic.example_zh: 透過入口網站送出核准申請，財務才能轉交給正確的核准人。

toeic.example_en: Each request goes through a short approval chain to avoid bottlenecks during budget season.
toeic.example_zh: 每筆申請都經過簡短的核准鏈，避免在預算季出現瓶頸。

toeic.example_en: We need the sponsor sign-off on the charter before kicking off any external vendor work.
toeic.example_zh: 啟動任何外部廠商工作前，必須先取得贊助人對章程的簽核。

toeic.example_en: Send a brief sponsor update every two weeks to keep executive expectations carefully aligned.
toeic.example_zh: 每兩週寄出簡短的贊助人更新，讓高層期望保持一致。

toeic.example_en: Build a stakeholder map early to identify who should approve, consult, or simply be informed.
toeic.example_zh: 及早建立利害關係人地圖，識別誰應該核准、諮詢或僅是被告知。

toeic.example_en: Tailor each stakeholder update to its audience so the message lands clearly every time.
toeic.example_zh: 依照對象量身打造每份利害關係人更新，讓訊息每次都清楚傳達。

toeic.example_en: Capture the stakeholder ask explicitly so the team knows what success looks like for this work.
toeic.example_zh: 明確記下利害關係人需求，讓團隊知道這項工作的成功樣貌。

toeic.example_en: Prepare a one-page executive update covering progress, risks, and decisions needed this month.
toeic.example_zh: 準備一頁高階更新，涵蓋本月進度、風險與所需決策。

toeic.example_en: End the deck with a clear executive ask so leaders know exactly what action you need.
toeic.example_zh: 投影片以清楚的高階需求結尾，讓主管確切知道你需要的行動。

toeic.example_en: Start with the ask of the meeting so participants know what decisions we need by the end.
toeic.example_zh: 開場就說明會議要求，讓與會者知道最終需要做出什麼決策。

toeic.example_en: We logged every agreed action with an owner and a due date for next Monday's review.
toeic.example_zh: 我們把每項共識行動連同負責人和到期日記錄下來，供下週一檢討。

toeic.example_en: Document the agreed outcome from the workshop so the team has a single source of truth.
toeic.example_zh: 記錄工作坊得出的共識結果，讓團隊有單一可信來源。

toeic.example_en: Watch for scope creep risk whenever the client requests small additions during testing each week.
toeic.example_zh: 每當客戶在每週測試期間提出小幅新增需求時，要注意範疇蔓延風險。

toeic.example_en: Use scope guardrails to prevent stakeholders from layering features on top of an approved plan.
toeic.example_zh: 用範疇護欄阻止利害關係人在已核准計畫之上層層加碼功能。

toeic.example_en: Give leadership an early warning if a milestone is at risk so they can mobilize support.
toeic.example_zh: 若有里程碑面臨風險，及早向主管發出預警，他們才能調動支援。

toeic.example_en: Take the dropping test pass rate as a warning signal and dig into the underlying causes.
toeic.example_zh: 把測試通過率下降視為警示訊號，並深入探究背後原因。

toeic.example_en: Compare actual weekly burn against the budget plan to see whether spending is still on track.
toeic.example_zh: 比較每週實際消耗與預算計畫，看看支出是否仍在軌道上。

toeic.example_en: The cost variance report shows that travel expenses ran ten percent above the approved budget.
toeic.example_zh: 成本差異報告顯示差旅費比核准預算高出百分之十。

toeic.example_en: Last week's schedule variance report flagged that database migration is now two weeks behind plan.
toeic.example_zh: 上週的進度差異報告指出，資料庫遷移目前比計畫晚兩週。

toeic.example_en: Review the deliverable list together so each owner confirms scope and target dates before kickoff.
toeic.example_zh: 一起檢視交付物清單，讓每位負責人在啟動前確認範圍與目標日期。

toeic.example_en: Ship an interim deliverable next Friday so stakeholders can see real progress, not just slides.
toeic.example_zh: 下週五交付中期交付物，讓利害關係人看到實際進展，而非只有投影片。

toeic.example_en: The final deliverable must include the user manual, training videos, and source code repository.
toeic.example_zh: 最終交付物必須包含使用手冊、訓練影片與原始碼儲存庫。

toeic.example_en: Each deliverable owner reports on quality and timeline during the biweekly steering committee meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 每位交付物負責人在雙週指導委員會上回報品質與時程。

toeic.example_en: Plan an acceptance test with the client so they can confirm the work meets agreed requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 與客戶安排驗收測試，讓他們確認工作符合既定需求。

toeic.example_en: Have the sponsor sign the acceptance form so we can officially close this phase of the project.
toeic.example_zh: 請贊助人簽署驗收表單，這樣我們才能正式結束此階段。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a go-live readiness review one week before launch to confirm every checklist item is green.
toeic.example_zh: 上線前一週安排上線就緒審查，確認每項檢查清單都呈綠燈。

toeic.example_en: We assess launch readiness across product, support, marketing, and legal before announcing the date.
toeic.example_zh: 在公布日期前，我們從產品、支援、行銷和法務四個面向評估上線準備度。

toeic.example_en: Walk new sponsors through the launch plan so they understand timing, owners, and key risks.
toeic.example_zh: 帶新贊助人了解上線計畫，讓他們掌握時程、負責人與關鍵風險。

toeic.example_en: Publish a release plan that aligns engineering output with marketing campaigns and customer training.
toeic.example_zh: 發布一份能讓工程產出與行銷活動及客戶訓練一致的發布計畫。

toeic.example_en: Avoid scheduling the release window during peak business hours to limit disruption to users.
toeic.example_zh: 避免把發布時段安排在業務尖峰時間，以減少對使用者的干擾。

toeic.example_en: Each squad must add its features to the release train before the cutoff every other Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 每組必須在每隔一週的截止點前，把功能加入發布列車。

toeic.example_en: Our release cadence is biweekly, so plan small, testable changes rather than huge feature drops.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的發布節奏為雙週，請規劃小而可測試的變更，而非大量功能一次釋出。

toeic.example_en: Avoid pushing risky changes during the freeze period right before the end-of-year sales event.
toeic.example_zh: 在年終促銷活動前的凍結期間避免推送高風險變更。

toeic.example_en: Code freeze starts at noon on Friday, so finish merges and notify QA before the deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 程式凍結於星期五中午開始，請在期限前完成合併並通知品保。

toeic.example_en: Send the release notes draft to product marketing for review before publishing to customers.
toeic.example_zh: 在向客戶公開前，把發布說明草稿送交產品行銷檢視。

toeic.example_en: QA shared a detailed test plan covering integration, performance, and regression checks before sign-off.
toeic.example_zh: 品保分享詳細測試計畫，涵蓋整合、效能與回歸檢查，供簽核前使用。

toeic.example_en: Each new feature must include at least one happy-path test case and one negative test case.
toeic.example_zh: 每項新功能至少包含一個快樂路徑測試案例與一個負面測試案例。

toeic.example_en: Attach the test result summary to the ticket so reviewers can verify coverage without rerunning.
toeic.example_zh: 把測試結果摘要附在工單上，讓審查者無須重跑就能驗證覆蓋率。

toeic.example_en: Review the defect log every morning so engineers can pick up new bugs without delay today.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上檢視缺陷紀錄，讓工程師今天就能毫不延誤地處理新錯誤。

toeic.example_en: The defect rate dropped sharply after we added automated tests for the most critical user flows.
toeic.example_zh: 在為最關鍵使用者流程加入自動化測試後，缺陷率大幅下降。

toeic.example_en: Hold bug triage every morning so the on-call engineer knows what to fix first today.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上舉行錯誤分類會，讓值班工程師知道今天該優先修哪些。

toeic.example_en: Apply a priority label to each ticket so the team can sort and pick work efficiently each day.
toeic.example_zh: 為每張工單加上優先順序標籤，讓團隊每天能高效排序並挑選工作。

toeic.example_en: Review the priority ranking with product so engineering focuses on the items with the highest value.
toeic.example_zh: 與產品團隊檢視優先排序，讓工程聚焦在最具價值的項目上。

toeic.example_en: Mark this requirement as a must-have so it survives any future trade-off discussions with finance.
toeic.example_zh: 把這項需求標為必要項目，在未來與財務的取捨討論中才能保留。

toeic.example_en: List the dashboard as a nice-to-have so we can drop it if the timeline gets too tight.
toeic.example_zh: 把儀表板列為有則更好項目，時程過緊時就能割捨。

toeic.example_en: Move the analytics feature to the deferred item list so we can focus on launch-critical work.
toeic.example_zh: 把分析功能移到延後項目清單，讓我們專注於上線關鍵工作。

toeic.example_en: Document each deferred decision with the date and the reason so it does not get forgotten.
toeic.example_zh: 記錄每項延後決策的日期與原因，避免被遺忘。

toeic.example_en: Two open items from the last review still need a decision before we can close the meeting today.
toeic.example_zh: 上次檢討仍有兩件未結項目需要決定，今天才能結束會議。

toeic.example_en: Add that topic to the parking lot list so we can give it focused time next session.
toeic.example_zh: 把那個主題加進暫存清單，下次會議再給它專注時間。

toeic.example_en: Track one weekly metric per workstream so the team sees clear progress without information overload.
toeic.example_zh: 每條工作流追蹤一項每週指標，讓團隊看到清楚進展又不被資訊淹沒。

toeic.example_en: Hit the weekly target for completed tickets before pulling any new items from the backlog.
toeic.example_zh: 達成每週已完成工單目標後，才可從待辦清單拉進新項目。

toeic.example_en: Set a weekly goal during planning so the team has a clear focus for the next five days.
toeic.example_zh: 在規劃時設定每週目標，讓團隊在接下來五天有明確焦點。

toeic.example_en: Our monthly goal is to onboard ten new customers and gather feedback on the new dashboard.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的月度目標是接洽十位新客戶，並收集對新儀表板的回饋。

toeic.example_en: Align every workstream with the quarterly goal so resources flow to the most important outcomes.
toeic.example_zh: 讓每條工作流對齊季度目標，資源就能流向最重要的成果。

toeic.example_en: The quarterly review meeting covers wins, misses, and adjustments for the next ninety days.
toeic.example_zh: 季度檢討會議涵蓋成就、未達標項目以及未來九十天的調整。

toeic.example_en: Publish the yearly roadmap so customers and partners can plan around our biggest upcoming releases.
toeic.example_zh: 公布年度藍圖，讓客戶與合作夥伴能依我們最重要的發布來安排計畫。

toeic.example_en: PI planning brings every team into one room to align on the next ten weeks of work.
toeic.example_zh: 計畫期程規劃讓每個團隊齊聚一堂，對齊接下來十週的工作。

toeic.example_en: We hold an increment review every other month to make sure delivered features meet customer needs.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每兩個月舉行增量檢討，確保交付功能符合客戶需求。

toeic.example_en: Generate the burn report on Friday so leadership can see budget consumption against project progress.
toeic.example_zh: 星期五產出燃耗報告，讓主管看到預算消耗對應的專案進度。

toeic.example_en: Update the task estimate after each design review so the schedule reflects the latest understanding.
toeic.example_zh: 每次設計檢討後更新任務估算，讓時程反映最新理解。

toeic.example_en: Share your effort estimate before lunch so we can finalize the sprint commitment together.
toeic.example_zh: 午餐前分享你的工作量估算，我們才能一起敲定衝刺承諾。

toeic.example_en: Indicate the level of effort for each option so the steering team can choose realistically.
toeic.example_zh: 為每個選項標示投入程度，讓指導團隊能務實地做選擇。

toeic.example_en: Use T-shirt sizing for initial ideas so we can quickly compare scope without detailed analysis.
toeic.example_zh: 在初步點子上採用 T 恤尺寸估算，無須詳盡分析就能快速比較範圍。

toeic.example_en: Give me a rough estimate by tomorrow so I can decide whether this proposal is worth detailed scoping.
toeic.example_zh: 明天前給我一個粗略估算，我才能決定這提案是否值得做詳細範疇規劃。

toeic.example_en: A ballpark estimate is fine for now; we will refine the numbers once requirements are clearer.
toeic.example_zh: 目前大致估算就可以，等需求更清楚時再細修數字。

toeic.example_en: Include a short confidence statement with each forecast so the audience understands the uncertainty.
toeic.example_zh: 每份預測附上簡短的信心聲明，讓對方了解不確定程度。

toeic.example_en: Add a risk percentage to each estimate so we know how much buffer to bake into the plan.
toeic.example_zh: 為每筆估算加上風險百分比，這樣就知道計畫該預留多少緩衝。

toeic.example_en: Add a few days of buffer time at the end of each phase to absorb unexpected delays.
toeic.example_zh: 在每個階段結束時加幾天緩衝時間，吸收意外延誤。

toeic.example_en: Use slack time in your schedule for documentation, learning, and code reviews rather than new tickets.
toeic.example_zh: 把時程中的寬裕時間用於文件、學習與程式檢閱，而非新工單。

toeic.example_en: Keep a contingency buffer equal to ten percent of the schedule for late-breaking design changes.
toeic.example_zh: 保留相當於時程百分之十的應變緩衝，因應臨時設計變更。

toeic.example_en: Tap the contingency reserve only after the project sponsor approves the request in writing.
toeic.example_zh: 僅在專案贊助人書面核准後，才動用應變準備金。

toeic.example_en: Even a small schedule slip can ripple through downstream teams who depend on our work to start.
toeic.example_zh: 即使輕微的進度延誤，也會波及仰賴我們才能開工的下游團隊。

toeic.example_en: Avoid another deadline slip by surfacing concerns at next Tuesday's risk review instead of later.
toeic.example_zh: 在下週二風險檢討時提出疑慮，避免再次發生期限延誤。

toeic.example_en: Draft a schedule recovery plan with extra resources, scope cuts, and a revised target date.
toeic.example_zh: 擬定進度復原計畫，包含額外資源、範圍刪減與修訂後的目標日期。

toeic.example_en: Use a fast-track approach to overlap design and development, but expect increased coordination costs.
toeic.example_zh: 採用加速推進方式讓設計與開發重疊，但預期協調成本會增加。

toeic.example_en: Crashing the schedule by adding contractors is expensive, so leadership wants to see clear payback.
toeic.example_zh: 透過增聘約聘人員來趕工壓縮時程成本高昂，主管希望看到清楚回報。

toeic.example_en: Ask procurement for the lead time estimate before promising any installation dates to the client.
toeic.example_zh: 在向客戶承諾任何安裝日期前，先向採購詢問前置時間估算。

toeic.example_en: Use a cycle time estimate of three days for typical tickets to keep the forecast realistic.
toeic.example_zh: 一般工單採用三天的週期時間估算，預測才能務實。

toeic.example_en: Our throughput estimate suggests the team can finish about twelve tickets in each two-week sprint.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的產出量估算顯示，團隊每兩週衝刺能完成約十二張工單。

toeic.example_en: Set a work in progress limit so engineers finish current tickets before pulling new ones.
toeic.example_zh: 設定在製品上限，讓工程師先完成目前工單再拉新單。

toeic.example_en: The WIP cap is three tickets per engineer so context switching does not slow our flow down.
toeic.example_zh: 在製品上限值為每位工程師三張工單，避免切換脈絡拖累流程。

toeic.example_en: A blocking event such as a vendor outage must be logged immediately and escalated to the sponsor.
toeic.example_zh: 如廠商停機等阻塞事件必須立即記錄並上報贊助人。

toeic.example_en: Document the blocker resolution clearly so future projects can learn from how it was handled.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚記錄阻礙解除過程，讓未來專案能借鏡其處理方式。

toeic.example_en: Track issue resolution time so we know whether our triage process is improving quarter by quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 追蹤問題解決時間，了解我們的分流流程是否逐季進步。

toeic.example_en: Write a brief support handover note so the on-call team can answer customer questions confidently.
toeic.example_zh: 撰寫簡短的支援交接備忘，讓值班團隊能自信回答客戶問題。

toeic.example_en: Do the on-call handoff at noon Monday so the new engineer has time to read open incidents.
toeic.example_zh: 週一中午進行值班交接，新工程師才有時間閱讀未結事件。

toeic.example_en: Add a new playbook entry whenever we resolve an incident that may happen again in the future.
toeic.example_zh: 每次解決可能再次發生的事件後，就在操作手冊中新增條目。

toeic.example_en: Push a runbook update after every postmortem so the next responder benefits from your learning.
toeic.example_zh: 每次事後檢討後更新操作手冊，讓下一位處置人員能受惠於你的學習。

toeic.example_en: Plan a two-week operational handover so the support team can shadow real production incidents.
toeic.example_zh: 規劃為期兩週的營運交接，讓支援團隊能跟著實際上線事件學習。

toeic.example_en: Use the transition checklist to make sure every system, document, and contact is properly handed over.
toeic.example_zh: 使用轉移檢查清單，確保每個系統、文件與聯絡人都妥善交接。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a wrap-up meeting next Friday to capture lessons learned before everyone moves on.
toeic.example_zh: 下週五安排收尾會議，趁大家轉換工作前彙整經驗教訓。

toeic.example_en: Send the wrap-up report to all sponsors so they can confirm the project closure officially.
toeic.example_zh: 把收尾報告寄給所有贊助人，讓他們能正式確認專案結案。

toeic.example_en: Project closure includes archiving documents, releasing resources, and celebrating the team with a small event.
toeic.example_zh: 專案結案包含封存文件、釋出資源並以小型活動慶祝團隊。

toeic.example_en: Sign the closure document only after every deliverable is accepted and finance has reconciled the budget.
toeic.example_zh: 只有在所有交付物驗收且財務對帳完畢後才簽署結案文件。

toeic.example_en: Plan a project closeout session to share what worked and what we will improve next time.
toeic.example_zh: 安排專案結尾會議，分享有效之處以及下次要改進的事項。

toeic.example_en: Each retro highlight should be brief and connected to a clear, actionable improvement for next sprint.
toeic.example_zh: 每個回顧亮點都應簡短，並連結到下次衝刺可採取的明確改進。

toeic.example_en: Pick at most three retro action items so the team can realistically deliver them next sprint.
toeic.example_zh: 最多選三個回顧行動項目，讓團隊在下個衝刺確實能交付。

toeic.example_en: Keep a learning log per project so we build a shared knowledge base for the wider department.
toeic.example_zh: 為每個專案保留學習紀錄，建立部門共用的知識庫。

toeic.example_en: Move retrospective ideas to the improvement backlog so we tackle them between major sprint goals.
toeic.example_zh: 把回顧會的點子移到改進待辦清單，在大型衝刺目標之間處理它們。

toeic.example_en: Draft a process improvement plan that addresses the top three pain points from this quarter's review.
toeic.example_zh: 擬定流程改進計畫，處理本季檢討中前三大痛點。

toeic.example_en: Share your weekly priority list every Monday morning so blockers can be discussed before Wednesday.
toeic.example_zh: 每週一早分享你的每週優先清單，讓阻礙能在週三前討論。

toeic.example_en: Keep a focused personal task list so you do not lose track of commitments made in meetings.
toeic.example_zh: 保留專注的個人任務清單，避免遺漏會議中作的承諾。

toeic.example_en: Add a to-do entry right after the call so you do not forget the small follow-up actions.
toeic.example_zh: 通話結束後馬上新增待辦條目，避免忘記小型後續行動。

toeic.example_en: Check the due-soon list every morning so nothing important falls through the cracks today.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上檢查即將到期清單，重要事項才不會被遺漏。

toeic.example_en: Every overdue task should be reviewed during stand-up so the team can offer help, not blame.
toeic.example_zh: 每件逾期任務都應在立會中檢視，讓團隊能提供協助而非追究責任。

toeic.example_en: The tool sends an overdue reminder by email so owners know which items need urgent attention.
toeic.example_zh: 工具會以郵件寄送逾期提醒，讓負責人知道哪些事項需要緊急處理。

toeic.example_en: Turn on automated reminders so owners receive an alert two days before each task is due.
toeic.example_zh: 開啟自動提醒，讓負責人在每項任務到期前兩天收到通知。

toeic.example_en: Set a calendar reminder thirty minutes before the call so you can prepare without rushing today.
toeic.example_zh: 在通話前三十分鐘設定行事曆提醒，今天就能不慌不忙地準備。

toeic.example_en: Protect at least one focus block per day so you can finish complex tasks without interruptions.
toeic.example_zh: 每天至少保留一段專注時段，讓你能不被打斷完成複雜任務。

toeic.example_en: Set a time box of one hour for the design discussion so other agenda items get attention.
toeic.example_zh: 為設計討論設定一小時時間盒，其他議程項目才能獲得關注。

toeic.example_en: Treat the spike as a time-boxed task so it does not turn into an open-ended exploration.
toeic.example_zh: 把研究任務視為時間限定任務，避免變成沒有終點的探索。

toeic.example_en: Create a spike ticket to investigate the new payment provider before committing to integration work.
toeic.example_zh: 建立研究工單調查新支付服務商，再決定是否承諾整合工作。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a research task at the start of the sprint so the team has informed answers later.
toeic.example_zh: 在衝刺一開始安排研究任務，讓團隊後續能有依據的答案。

toeic.example_en: Limit each exploration ticket to two days so we make decisions and move forward steadily.
toeic.example_zh: 每張探索工單限制兩天，讓我們能做出決定並穩定前進。

toeic.example_en: Hold a discovery session with operations so we understand current pain points before designing solutions.
toeic.example_zh: 與營運舉行探索會議，先了解目前痛點，再設計解決方案。

toeic.example_en: Set up an alignment session with marketing so messaging stays consistent across product and sales.
toeic.example_zh: 與行銷安排對齊會議，讓訊息在產品與銷售之間保持一致。

toeic.example_en: Add one executive briefing slide that summarizes the past month in three short, clear bullets.
toeic.example_zh: 加入一張高階簡報投影片，用三個簡短清楚的要點摘要過去一個月。

toeic.example_en: Build a short decision deck so leadership can choose between the two architecture options on Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 製作一份簡短的決策簡報，讓主管星期五能在兩種架構方案間做選擇。

toeic.example_en: Send the approval deck two business days before the meeting so reviewers can prepare comments.
toeic.example_zh: 會議前兩個工作天寄送核准簡報，讓審查者能準備意見。

toeic.example_en: Bring critical decisions to the monthly governance meeting rather than escalating them through email.
toeic.example_zh: 把重大決策帶到每月治理會議，而非透過郵件層層上報。

toeic.example_en: The governance board reviews program-level risks and approves major changes to scope or budget.
toeic.example_zh: 治理委員會審查專案層級風險，並核准範圍或預算的重大變更。

toeic.example_en: Use the program review to look across projects and decide where extra investment is needed.
toeic.example_zh: 利用計畫審查跨專案檢視，並決定哪裡需要額外投入。

toeic.example_en: The portfolio review balances investment across innovation, maintenance, and customer-facing improvements next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 組合審查在下季的創新、維護與面向客戶的改善之間平衡投資。

toeic.example_en: Run a prioritization session with product, design, and engineering to pick the top initiatives this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 與產品、設計與工程舉行優先排序會議，挑出本季最重要的倡議。

toeic.example_en: Communicate any priority shift clearly so the team understands why their work focus is changing.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚溝通任何優先順序變動，讓團隊了解工作重心改變的原因。

toeic.example_en: Move that ticket to the deprioritized task list and notify the requester about the timing change.
toeic.example_zh: 把那張工單移到降級任務清單，並通知需求方有關時間的變更。

toeic.example_en: Two rolled-over tasks from last sprint should be tackled first thing on Monday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 上次衝刺中有兩件順延任務，週一早上應該優先處理。

toeic.example_en: Limit carryover work so the team starts each sprint with a clear, achievable commitment again.
toeic.example_zh: 限制延續工作量，讓團隊每次衝刺都以清楚可達成的承諾重新開始。

toeic.example_en: Tag each rollover ticket so we can track why work is consistently not finishing in one sprint.
toeic.example_zh: 為每張延續工單加上標籤，追蹤工作為何持續無法在單一衝刺內完成。

toeic.example_en: Add a brief carry forward note explaining what is left and why it slipped past this week.
toeic.example_zh: 加上簡短的順延備註，說明剩餘事項以及本週為何延誤。

toeic.example_en: Pin the weekly retrospective notes in the channel so absent teammates can catch up on Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 把每週回顧筆記釘選在頻道，讓缺席同事星期一能補上進度。

toeic.example_en: Use the weekly review template so reports stay consistent and easy to compare month after month.
toeic.example_zh: 使用每週檢討範本，讓報告保持一致並便於逐月比較。

toeic.example_en: Stick to the status template, even when the week is quiet, so readers know where to look.
toeic.example_zh: 即使該週風平浪靜，也要使用狀態範本，讓讀者知道該看哪裡。

toeic.example_en: Choose a report cadence that matches stakeholder needs without overwhelming them with too much detail.
toeic.example_zh: 選擇符合利害關係人需求的報告節奏，又不讓他們被細節淹沒。

toeic.example_en: Keep a consistent weekly send time, like Friday at three, so readers expect and read your updates.
toeic.example_zh: 保持固定的每週寄送時間，例如週五三點，讓讀者預期並閱讀你的更新。

toeic.example_en: Run the dashboard refresh every Monday morning so leadership sees current data during weekly reviews.
toeic.example_zh: 每週一早執行儀表板更新，讓主管在每週檢討時看到最新資料。

toeic.example_en: Good tracker hygiene means closing finished tickets and updating statuses before each weekly review meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的追蹤系統整潔度代表在每次週檢討會前關閉完成工單並更新狀態。

toeic.example_en: Spend ten minutes on ticket hygiene each Friday so next week's planning starts from a clean state.
toeic.example_zh: 每週五花十分鐘整理工單整潔度，下週規劃就能從乾淨狀態開始。

toeic.example_en: Open the status note with one weekly summary line that captures the overall sentiment in plain language.
toeic.example_zh: 狀態通知開頭用一句每週摘要句，以淺顯語言概括整體情況。

toeic.example_en: The executive headline must answer one question: are we still on track to launch on schedule?
toeic.example_zh: 高階標題句必須回答一個問題：我們是否仍能按時上線？

toeic.example_en: Include a what changed section so busy readers spot updates without rereading the whole report.
toeic.example_zh: 加入變動段落，讓忙碌的讀者不必重讀整份報告就能掌握更新。

toeic.example_en: Limit the key risks slide to three top items so leadership can focus on what truly matters.
toeic.example_zh: 把關鍵風險投影片限制在前三項，讓主管聚焦於真正重要的事。

toeic.example_en: End the deck with a key decisions slide that lists every choice you need from leadership today.
toeic.example_zh: 簡報以關鍵決策投影片作結，列出今天需要主管做的每項決定。

toeic.example_en: Always include an ask slide stating clearly what action and approval you need from the audience.
toeic.example_zh: 務必加入要求投影片，清楚說明你需要對方採取的行動與核准。

toeic.example_en: Update the RACI sheet whenever a role changes so accountability does not become fuzzy or contested.
toeic.example_zh: 角色變動時更新 RACI 表單，避免責任歸屬模糊或產生爭議。

toeic.example_en: Clarify the RACI assignment in writing so everyone knows who is responsible and who only consults.
toeic.example_zh: 用書面釐清 RACI 指派，讓大家知道誰負責、誰僅是諮詢。

toeic.example_en: Agree on the responsibility split between regions early to prevent confusion during cross-border launches.
toeic.example_zh: 及早敲定區域間的職責分工，避免跨境上線時混亂。

toeic.example_en: Share a weekly forecast of tickets you plan to complete so the team manages expectations together.
toeic.example_zh: 分享你計畫完成的每週工單預測，讓團隊一起管理期望。

toeic.example_en: Close your status note with a weekly outlook describing what you plan to tackle next week.
toeic.example_zh: 在狀態通知結尾加上每週展望，說明下週計畫處理的事項。

toeic.example_en: Discuss the next-week plan during stand-down so we start Monday with focus and full alignment.
toeic.example_zh: 在收尾會議討論下週計畫，讓我們週一就帶著專注與共識展開。

toeic.example_en: Start the meeting with a quick last-week summary so latecomers can join the conversation easily.
toeic.example_zh: 會議以快速的上週摘要開場，遲到者也能輕鬆加入討論。

toeic.example_en: Write a one-page executive briefing note that covers progress, risks, and decisions needed this month.
toeic.example_zh: 撰寫一頁高階簡報備忘，涵蓋本月的進度、風險與所需決策。

toeic.example_en: Update the deliverable status to green only after the sponsor confirms acceptance in writing.
toeic.example_zh: 只有在贊助人書面確認驗收後，才把交付物狀態更新為綠燈。

toeic.example_en: Confirm weekly capacity with each team lead so we plan commitments we can realistically deliver.
toeic.example_zh: 與各位團隊主管確認每週產能，才能規劃真正能交付的承諾。

toeic.example_en: Keep the weekly status meeting to thirty minutes by sticking to the agenda and decisions only.
toeic.example_zh: 緊扣議程與決策，把每週狀態會議控制在三十分鐘內。

toeic.example_en: Owners must complete the weekly tracker update before noon Friday so the report is accurate.
toeic.example_zh: 負責人必須在週五中午前完成每週追蹤表更新，報告才會準確。

toeic.example_en: Post stand-up notes in the channel so colleagues in other time zones know what was discussed.
toeic.example_zh: 把立會筆記發到頻道，讓其他時區的同事知道討論了什麼。

toeic.example_en: Try a daily stand-up cadence for two weeks and review whether it improves team coordination overall.
toeic.example_zh: 試行每日立會節奏兩週，檢視是否整體改善團隊協作。

toeic.example_en: Walk the task board during stand-up so everyone sees status, blockers, and ownership at a glance.
toeic.example_zh: 立會時瀏覽任務看板，讓大家一眼掌握狀態、阻礙與負責人。

toeic.example_en: Each task card needs an owner, a due date, and acceptance criteria before it can move forward.
toeic.example_zh: 每張任務卡片要有負責人、到期日與驗收條件才能往前推進。

toeic.example_en: Apply a clear task label so reports can filter work by team, priority, or customer segment quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 加上清楚的任務標籤，讓報告能依團隊、優先順序或客戶區隔快速篩選。

toeic.example_en: Keep task status accurate so leadership can answer client questions without messaging the engineer.
toeic.example_zh: 保持任務狀態準確，讓主管不必聯絡工程師就能回答客戶問題。

toeic.example_en: Our task completion rate improved after we capped the number of items in progress at any time.
toeic.example_zh: 在限制同時進行中項目數量後，我們的任務完成率有所提升。

toeic.example_en: Share your delivery confidence honestly so leadership can act now rather than be surprised later.
toeic.example_zh: 誠實分享你的交付信心，讓主管能現在採取行動，而非日後才驚訝。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a delivery review one week before launch to confirm every workstream is properly ready.
toeic.example_zh: 上線前一週安排交付檢討，確認每條工作流都已妥善就緒。

toeic.example_en: The delivery scorecard tracks quality, speed, and customer satisfaction across all teams within the program.
toeic.example_zh: 交付計分表追蹤計畫內所有團隊的品質、速度與客戶滿意度。

toeic.example_en: Review the project scorecard with the sponsor every month so we can adjust direction quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 每月與贊助人檢視專案計分表，以便快速調整方向。

toeic.example_en: Publish a rolling forecast update each month so finance can plan budgets with the latest reality.
toeic.example_zh: 每月公布滾動預測更新，讓財務以最新實況規劃預算。

toeic.example_en: The weekly traffic light shows two workstreams in amber and one steady at green this report.
toeic.example_zh: 本期每週紅綠燈顯示兩條工作流為黃燈、一條穩定維持綠燈。

toeic.example_en: Run a brief weekly health check covering scope, schedule, budget, and team morale across initiatives.
toeic.example_zh: 進行簡短的每週健康檢查，涵蓋各倡議的範圍、時程、預算與團隊士氣。

toeic.example_en: Do a quick morale check in private one-on-ones to spot burnout signs before they become serious.
toeic.example_zh: 在私下的一對一中快速進行士氣檢查，在倦怠跡象惡化前發現它。

toeic.example_en: Run a workload check every Friday so I can rebalance tickets before the new week begins.
toeic.example_zh: 每週五進行工作量檢查，讓我能在新週開始前重新平衡工單。

toeic.example_en: Discuss the scope tradeoff openly so the team agrees on what stays in and what gets dropped.
toeic.example_zh: 公開討論範疇取捨，讓團隊對保留與刪除的項目取得共識。

toeic.example_en: Have an honest trade-off discussion with the sponsor before promising both more scope and earlier dates.
toeic.example_zh: 在承諾增加範圍且提前日期前，先與贊助人誠實地進行取捨討論。

toeic.example_en: Use a simple trade-off matrix comparing cost, time, and quality to drive cleaner project decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 使用簡單的取捨矩陣比較成本、時間與品質，做出更清晰的專案決策。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 成本時間品質平衡
toeic.example_en: Every plan ultimately reflects a cost-time-quality balance, and stakeholders should understand which lever is being pulled.
toeic.example_zh: 每份計畫最終反映成本時間品質平衡，利害關係人應了解正在拉動哪個槓桿。

toeic.example_en: We plan to advertise our new product line on three social media platforms next month.
toeic.example_zh: 我們計畫下個月在三個社群媒體平台宣傳新的產品線。

toeic.example_en: The advertisement for our summer sale will appear in the local newspaper this Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們夏季特賣的廣告本週五會出現在當地報紙上。

toeic.example_en: Major advertisers are shifting their budgets from television to online video platforms this year.
toeic.example_zh: 今年主要廣告主正將預算從電視轉移到線上影音平台。

toeic.example_en: Our advertising agency will present three creative concepts at the meeting on Tuesday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的廣告代理商將在週二的會議上提出三個創意概念。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大型戶外廣告看板
toeic.example_en: The new billboard near the highway has greatly increased awareness of our coffee chain.
toeic.example_zh: 高速公路旁的新廣告看板大大提升了我們咖啡連鎖店的知名度。

toeic.example_en: Our banner ad on the news website received over twenty thousand clicks last week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在新聞網站上的橫幅廣告上週收到超過兩萬次點擊。

toeic.example_en: Many customers complain that pop-up ads make it difficult to read articles online.
toeic.example_zh: 許多顧客抱怨彈出式廣告讓人很難在線上閱讀文章。

toeic.example_en: A short video ad usually performs better than a long one on mobile devices.
toeic.example_zh: 短的影音廣告在行動裝置上通常比長的表現更好。

toeic.example_en: Our latest ad campaign focuses on young professionals living in big cities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們最新的廣告活動聚焦在住在大城市的年輕專業人士。

toeic.example_en: Our new tagline emphasizes that our service is simple, fast, and affordable for everyone.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的新標語強調服務對每個人都簡單、快速且實惠。

toeic.example_en: The marketing team is brainstorming a catchy slogan for the back-to-school promotion.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷團隊正在為開學季促銷活動腦力激盪一個朗朗上口的標語。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 廣告短歌；廣告歌曲
toeic.example_en: Customers often remember the jingle even when they forget the name of the product.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客常常記得廣告歌曲，卻忘了產品的名稱。

toeic.example_en: The designer presented five logo options for the new restaurant chain this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 設計師今天早上為新的餐廳連鎖店提出了五個品牌標誌方案。

toeic.example_en: Our logo redesign helped the brand feel more modern to younger consumers under thirty.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的標誌重新設計讓品牌對三十歲以下的年輕消費者感覺更現代。

toeic.example_en: The new color palette uses soft blues and greens to convey calm and trust.
toeic.example_zh: 新的配色方案使用柔和的藍色和綠色，傳達平靜和信任感。

toeic.example_en: Clear typography on the packaging helps shoppers read product information at a glance.
toeic.example_zh: 包裝上清晰的字體設計幫助購物者一眼就能讀到產品資訊。

toeic.example_en: The friendly bear mascot appears in every commercial and on every package of our cereal.
toeic.example_zh: 友善的熊吉祥物出現在我們麥片的每支廣告和每包包裝上。

toeic.example_en: A celebrity endorsement can boost sales quickly but it also costs a lot of money.
toeic.example_zh: 名人代言能快速提升銷量，但也要花很多錢。

toeic.example_en: Influencer marketing works well for our brand because our customers trust honest reviews.
toeic.example_zh: 網紅行銷對我們品牌效果很好，因為我們的顧客信任真誠的評價。

toeic.example_en: Working with several micro-influencers often brings better results than hiring one big star.
toeic.example_zh: 與幾位微型網紅合作通常比聘請一位大明星帶來更好的效果。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 業配貼文；贊助貼文
toeic.example_en: The sponsored post on her travel blog drove hundreds of visitors to our booking page.
toeic.example_zh: 她旅遊部落格上的業配貼文為我們的訂房頁面帶來了數百位訪客。

toeic.example_en: Please include our official hashtag in every social media post about the summer event.
toeic.example_zh: 請在每篇關於夏季活動的社群媒體貼文中加入我們的官方主題標籤。

toeic.example_en: Our hashtag campaign asked customers to share photos of their morning coffee with our cups.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的主題標籤活動邀請顧客分享用我們杯子裝早晨咖啡的照片。

toeic.example_en: The video became viral content after a famous chef shared it with his many fans.
toeic.example_zh: 在一位知名廚師與眾多粉絲分享後，這支影片成了病毒式傳播內容。

toeic.example_en: Our funny holiday ad went viral and reached millions of people without extra ad spend.
toeic.example_zh: 我們搞笑的節慶廣告廣為流傳，沒花額外廣告費就觸及數百萬人。

toeic.example_en: The marketing team checks the trending topics each morning to find timely content ideas.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷團隊每天早上檢查熱門話題，尋找即時的內容靈感。

toeic.example_en: Social listening helps us understand how customers feel about our brand in real time.
toeic.example_zh: 社群聆聽幫助我們即時了解顧客對我們品牌的感受。

toeic.example_en: Follower count alone does not tell you whether an account has truly engaged fans.
toeic.example_zh: 只看粉絲數無法告訴你一個帳號是否有真正積極互動的粉絲。

toeic.example_en: Our daily posts appear in the social feed of all customers who follow our account.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每日的貼文會出現在所有追蹤我們帳號的顧客的社群動態消息中。

toeic.example_en: A short story post is a quick way to share behind-the-scenes photos with our followers.
toeic.example_zh: 限時動態貼文是與追蹤者快速分享幕後照片的好方法。

toeic.example_en: Each weekly reel shows one customer using our kitchen tool to make a simple meal.
toeic.example_zh: 每週的短影音展示一位顧客使用我們的廚房工具做一頓簡單的料理。

toeic.example_en: The product launch live stream attracted over ten thousand viewers from many countries.
toeic.example_zh: 產品發表會直播吸引了來自多個國家、超過一萬名觀眾。

toeic.example_en: Live shopping events allow viewers to buy products with one click while watching the host.
toeic.example_zh: 直播購物活動讓觀眾在觀看主持人時，一鍵就能買到產品。

toeic.example_en: Many shoppers watch an unboxing video before deciding whether to buy an expensive device.
toeic.example_zh: 許多購物者在決定要不要買昂貴的裝置前，會先看開箱影片。

toeic.example_en: Honest product reviews from real customers help new shoppers feel more confident about buying.
toeic.example_zh: 來自真實顧客的真誠產品評論，幫助新購物者對購買更有信心。

toeic.example_en: User-generated content like fan photos makes our brand feel more friendly and trustworthy.
toeic.example_zh: 像是粉絲照片這類使用者生成內容，讓我們的品牌感覺更友善、更值得信賴。

toeic.example_en: We filmed a short testimonial video with three long-time customers in our flagship store.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在旗艦店與三位長期顧客拍攝了一支簡短的見證影片。

toeic.example_en: A before and after photo clearly shows how well our cleaning product removes tough stains.
toeic.example_zh: 使用前後對比照清楚展示了我們的清潔產品如何有效去除頑固污漬。

toeic.example_en: Our weekly newsletter shares product tips, customer stories, and special offers with subscribers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的週報電子報與訂閱者分享產品訣竅、顧客故事與特別優惠。

toeic.example_en: Every new email subscriber receives a ten percent discount on their first online order.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新的電子郵件訂閱者首次線上訂購可享九折優惠。

toeic.example_en: We grew our email list by two thousand contacts during the holiday promotion last December.
toeic.example_zh: 去年十二月的節慶促銷期間，我們的電子郵件名單增加了兩千個聯絡人。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 訂閱表單；同意接收表單
toeic.example_en: Place the opt-in form near the top of the page to capture more new email subscribers.
toeic.example_zh: 把訂閱表單放在頁面靠近頂端的地方，可以收到更多新的電子郵件訂閱者。

toeic.example_en: Every marketing email must include a clear opt-out option at the bottom of the message.
toeic.example_zh: 每封行銷信件都必須在訊息底部包含清楚的取消訂閱選項。

toeic.example_en: Customers will unsubscribe quickly if we send too many emails in a single week.
toeic.example_zh: 如果我們一週內寄太多郵件，顧客會很快取消訂閱。

toeic.example_en: The preview text appears next to the subject line and helps customers decide whether to open.
toeic.example_zh: 預覽文字出現在主旨旁邊，幫助顧客決定要不要打開信件。

toeic.example_en: Send a welcome email within an hour of a customer signing up for our membership.
toeic.example_zh: 在顧客註冊我們會員後一小時內寄出歡迎信。

toeic.example_en: An abandoned cart email reminds customers to finish their purchase within twenty-four hours.
toeic.example_zh: 棄單提醒信提醒顧客在二十四小時內完成購買。

toeic.example_en: Our weekly promo email features three special deals for members only on the weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的每週促銷信為會員提供三個週末限定特別優惠。

toeic.example_en: The flash sale on winter coats lasted only two hours but sold out our entire stock.
toeic.example_zh: 冬季外套的限時搶購只持續兩小時，但賣光了我們全部的庫存。

toeic.example_en: Customers who register before May fifteenth will receive a twenty percent early bird discount.
toeic.example_zh: 在五月十五日前報名的顧客可享受八折早鳥折扣。

toeic.example_en: Our business customers get a bulk discount when they order more than fifty units at once.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的企業客戶一次訂購超過五十個單位時可享量販折扣。

toeic.example_en: We offer a seasonal discount on swimwear from May through July to clear summer inventory.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在五月到七月針對泳裝提供季節性折扣，以清理夏季庫存。

toeic.example_en: The buy one get one free promotion on snacks doubled our weekend sales at the store.
toeic.example_zh: 零食買一送一促銷讓我們店週末銷售額翻倍。

toeic.example_en: New users can sign up for a thirty-day free trial before paying any monthly fee.
toeic.example_zh: 新使用者可以註冊三十天免費試用，之後再支付任何月費。

toeic.example_en: Our sampling event in the supermarket attracted many curious shoppers on Saturday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 週六下午我們在超市的試吃活動吸引了許多好奇的購物者。

toeic.example_en: Each coupon code can only be used once and expires at the end of the month.
toeic.example_zh: 每個優惠券代碼只能使用一次，並在月底到期。

toeic.example_en: Customers can save digital coupons to the app and apply them at any cash register.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客可以把數位優惠券儲存到應用程式，並在任何收銀台使用。

toeic.example_en: Older customers still prefer paper coupons that they can clip from the weekend newspaper.
toeic.example_zh: 年長的顧客仍偏好可以從週末報紙上剪下的紙本優惠券。

toeic.example_en: Every customer who spends over fifty dollars receives a scratch card with a chance to win.
toeic.example_zh: 每位消費超過五十美元的顧客可獲得一張有機會中獎的刮刮卡。

toeic.example_en: Every order over one hundred dollars includes a small gift with purchase this weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 本週末每筆超過一百美元的訂單會附贈一份滿額贈品。

toeic.example_en: Our online giveaway asked followers to share the post and tag two of their friends.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的線上抽獎贈送活動請追蹤者分享貼文並標記兩位朋友。

toeic.example_en: Customers entered our sweepstakes by submitting their receipt on the company website.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客在公司網站上提交收據即可參加我們的抽獎活動。

toeic.example_en: We held a raffle at the booth, and one lucky visitor won a new tablet computer.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在攤位舉辦摸彩，一位幸運的訪客贏得了一台新平板電腦。

toeic.example_en: Each contest entry must include a short caption and a photo of our product in use.
toeic.example_zh: 每件比賽參賽作品必須包含一段簡短說明文字和一張我們產品使用中的照片。

toeic.example_en: The summer photo contest invites customers to share creative pictures using our beach gear.
toeic.example_zh: 夏季攝影比賽邀請顧客分享使用我們海灘用品的創意照片。

toeic.example_en: Share your unique referral code with friends so both of you can earn a five-dollar credit.
toeic.example_zh: 把你的專屬推薦代碼分享給朋友，這樣你們兩個都可以獲得五美元的點數。

toeic.example_en: Click the referral link in the email to invite colleagues to try our project tool.
toeic.example_zh: 點擊電子郵件中的推薦連結，邀請同事試用我們的專案工具。

toeic.example_en: Many of our new customers come to us through positive word of mouth from existing clients.
toeic.example_zh: 我們許多新客戶是透過現有客戶正面的口碑而來。

toeic.example_en: Strong word-of-mouth marketing is often more effective than expensive television ad campaigns.
toeic.example_zh: 強而有力的口碑行銷往往比昂貴的電視廣告活動更有效。

toeic.example_en: The teaser video created a lot of buzz online weeks before the official product launch.
toeic.example_zh: 在產品正式發表前數週，預告影片就在網路上掀起許多話題。

toeic.example_en: Buzz marketing tries to create excited conversations about a brand without using paid ads.
toeic.example_zh: 話題行銷嘗試在不使用付費廣告的情況下，創造關於品牌的熱烈討論。

toeic.example_en: Our guerilla marketing stunt in the city park surprised many people and reached local news.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在城市公園的游擊式行銷活動讓很多人驚喜，並登上了地方新聞。

toeic.example_en: The marketing team planned a fun stunt downtown to attract media attention to the launch.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷團隊在市中心策劃了一場有趣的噱頭活動，為產品發表吸引媒體關注。

toeic.example_en: A bright in-store display near the entrance increased sales of the new juice by forty percent.
toeic.example_zh: 靠近入口處的明亮店內陳列，讓新果汁的銷量增加了四成。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 貨架小標籤；架上促銷標牌
toeic.example_en: We added a shelf talker to each new product so shoppers notice its special features quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在每項新產品上加了一張貨架小標籤，讓購物者快速注意到其特色。

toeic.example_en: We placed candy and small toys at the point-of-sale display to encourage impulse buying.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在收銀台陳列放了糖果和小玩具，鼓勵衝動性消費。

toeic.example_en: Items near the checkout counter often become an impulse buy for customers waiting in line.
toeic.example_zh: 結帳櫃台附近的商品常常成為排隊顧客的衝動性購買。

toeic.example_en: High shipping fees are a common reason for shopping cart abandonment on our website.
toeic.example_zh: 運費過高是顧客在我們網站上放棄購物車的常見原因。

toeic.example_en: We simplified the checkout page to only three steps to reduce customer frustration online.
toeic.example_zh: 我們把結帳頁面簡化為只有三個步驟，以減少顧客在線上的挫折感。

toeic.example_en: Our online ad budget for the new app launch is much larger than last quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新應用程式發表的線上廣告預算比上一季大得多。

toeic.example_en: A well-written search ad appears at the top of the results when people look for our service.
toeic.example_zh: 撰寫良好的搜尋廣告會出現在人們搜尋我們服務時的結果頂端。

toeic.example_en: Keyword bidding has become more expensive in our industry over the past two years.
toeic.example_zh: 過去兩年來，我們行業的關鍵字競價變得更貴了。

toeic.example_en: A long-tail keyword brings fewer visitors but often results in better conversion rates.
toeic.example_zh: 長尾關鍵字帶來的訪客較少，但通常轉換率更好。

toeic.example_en: Our search ranking on travel keywords has improved steadily since we started the blog.
toeic.example_zh: 自從我們開始經營部落格以來，旅遊關鍵字的搜尋排名穩定提升。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 搜尋引擎優化內容
toeic.example_en: Good SEO content answers real questions that customers type into search engines every day.
toeic.example_zh: 好的搜尋引擎優化內容回答顧客每天在搜尋引擎中輸入的真實問題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 網頁簡介；中繼描述
toeic.example_en: Write a clear meta description so search users know what your page is really about.
toeic.example_zh: 撰寫清楚的網頁簡介，讓搜尋使用者知道你的頁面到底在講什麼。

toeic.example_en: Adding alt text to every product image helps both search engines and visually impaired visitors.
toeic.example_zh: 為每張產品圖片加上替代文字，對搜尋引擎和視障訪客都有幫助。

toeic.example_en: We publish one new blog post every week to give customers helpful tips and ideas.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每週發表一篇新的部落格文章，為顧客提供實用的訣竅和點子。

toeic.example_en: The marketing assistant maintains the blog calendar so writers know each upcoming topic and deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷助理維護部落格排程表，讓作者知道每個即將到來的主題和截止日期。

toeic.example_en: Our editorial calendar lists every article, video, and social post planned for the next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的編輯排程表列出下一季預計發佈的每篇文章、影片和社群貼文。

toeic.example_en: Please add the holiday promotions to the content calendar before our meeting on Friday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 請在週五上午會議前把節慶促銷加進內容排程表。

toeic.example_en: Our three content pillars are healthy eating, easy recipes, and budget-friendly grocery shopping.
toeic.example_zh: 我們三大內容主軸是健康飲食、簡易食譜，以及預算友善的雜貨採買。

toeic.example_en: The simple infographic explained our delivery process in five clear and colorful steps.
toeic.example_zh: 這張簡單的資訊圖表用五個清楚又色彩鮮明的步驟解釋我們的配送流程。

toeic.example_en: Visitors can download our free ebook on home decor after signing up for the newsletter.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客註冊電子報後可以下載我們的居家裝飾免費電子書。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 名單磁鐵；引流內容
toeic.example_en: The free checklist works as a great lead magnet for visitors who care about productivity.
toeic.example_zh: 這份免費檢核表對重視生產力的訪客來說是很好的引流內容。

toeic.example_en: Our gated content lives behind a short form that asks for a name and email address.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的註冊取得內容放在一個只要填姓名和電子郵件的簡短表單後面。

toeic.example_en: We improved landing page conversion by changing the headline and adding customer reviews above the form.
toeic.example_zh: 我們透過更改標題並在表單上方加入顧客評論，改善了到達頁轉換。

toeic.example_en: Our latest headline test showed that question-style headlines clearly attract more clicks than statements.
toeic.example_zh: 我們最近的標題測試顯示，問句式標題明顯比陳述句吸引更多點擊。

toeic.example_en: Run a simple split test before sending the promotion email to the full customer list.
toeic.example_zh: 在把促銷郵件寄給全部顧客名單前，先做一個簡單的分組測試。

toeic.example_en: Always compare the new design with the control version to see real improvement in performance.
toeic.example_zh: 永遠把新設計和對照版本做比較，才能看到真正的成效提升。

toeic.example_en: We tested four different variants of the ad before choosing the one with the best results.
toeic.example_zh: 我們測試了四個不同變化版本的廣告，然後選擇成效最好的那一個。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 創意簡報；創意需求書
toeic.example_en: Please write a detailed creative brief for the agency before our planning meeting next Wednesday.
toeic.example_zh: 請在下週三規劃會議前為廣告公司撰寫一份詳細的創意簡報。

toeic.example_en: The campaign brief explains the budget, target audience, key messages, and important deadlines clearly.
toeic.example_zh: 活動簡報清楚說明預算、目標受眾、關鍵訊息和重要的截止日期。

toeic.example_en: Our marketing plan for the third quarter focuses on building awareness in two new cities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們第三季的行銷計畫聚焦在兩個新城市建立知名度。

toeic.example_en: About thirty percent of our marketing budget this year will go to social media advertising.
toeic.example_zh: 今年大約三成的行銷預算會用在社群媒體廣告上。

toeic.example_en: The media plan shows how we will spend the budget across television, radio, and online channels.
toeic.example_zh: 媒體投放計畫顯示我們將如何把預算分配到電視、廣播和線上通路。

toeic.example_en: The click rate on the promotional email increased after we added a bigger button at the top.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們把按鈕加大放在最上方後，促銷郵件的點擊率提高了。

toeic.example_en: Our main conversion goal for this campaign is one thousand free trial sign-ups within a month.
toeic.example_zh: 這次活動的主要轉換目標是一個月內達成一千次免費試用註冊。

toeic.example_en: We invited regular customers to the soft launch event to test the new menu before opening.
toeic.example_zh: 我們邀請常客參加試營運活動，在正式開幕前試試新菜單。

toeic.example_en: Local officials joined our ribbon-cutting ceremony for the new community store last Saturday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 地方官員上週六上午出席了我們新社區門市的剪綵儀式。

toeic.example_en: Our open house event allowed customers to tour the factory and meet the production team.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的開放參觀活動讓顧客可以參觀工廠並見到生產團隊。

toeic.example_en: The pop-up store at the mall will only operate for three weeks during the holiday season.
toeic.example_zh: 購物中心的快閃店只在節慶期間營業三週。

toeic.example_en: Our pop-up event in the city park introduced new flavors to many curious local customers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在城市公園的快閃活動向許多好奇的當地顧客介紹了新口味。

toeic.example_en: The in-store event on Saturday will include a small concert and free coffee for all visitors.
toeic.example_zh: 週六的門市活動包括一場小型演唱會以及給所有訪客的免費咖啡。

toeic.example_en: A short product demo helps customers understand how the new blender saves time in the kitchen.
toeic.example_zh: 簡短的產品示範幫助顧客了解新果汁機如何在廚房節省時間。

toeic.example_en: We offer a free thirty-day product trial so customers can see results before they buy.
toeic.example_zh: 我們提供三十天的免費產品試用，讓顧客在購買前看到效果。

toeic.example_en: Product placement in popular television shows can introduce our brand to millions of new viewers.
toeic.example_zh: 在熱門電視節目中的產品置入可以把我們的品牌介紹給數百萬新觀眾。

toeic.example_en: Each positive brand mention in the news increases trust among customers we have not reached yet.
toeic.example_zh: 每一次新聞中的正面品牌提及都會提升我們尚未觸及顧客的信任感。

toeic.example_en: Sponsoring the local marathon gives us strong brand exposure to thousands of healthy young adults.
toeic.example_zh: 贊助當地馬拉松給我們在數千名健康年輕人面前的強大品牌曝光。

toeic.example_en: Bright outdoor banners around the stadium greatly improved our brand visibility during the championship games.
toeic.example_zh: 球場周圍鮮亮的戶外旗幟在錦標賽期間大幅提升了我們的品牌能見度。

toeic.example_en: Our share of voice in beauty news has grown since we launched the influencer collaboration program.
toeic.example_zh: 自從推出網紅合作計畫以來，我們在美妝新聞中的聲量佔比有所成長。

toeic.example_en: The press coverage of our charity event was very positive in both newspapers and television news.
toeic.example_zh: 我們慈善活動的媒體報導在報紙和電視新聞中都非常正面。

toeic.example_en: The press tour of the new factory included a lunch and a question-and-answer session with the CEO.
toeic.example_zh: 新工廠的媒體參訪包括午餐以及與執行長的問答時間。

toeic.example_en: Please update the media list with new email addresses for the lifestyle and food reporters.
toeic.example_zh: 請更新媒體名單，加上生活風格和美食記者的新電子郵件地址。

toeic.example_en: Send a short media pitch to journalists explaining why our story matters to their readers right now.
toeic.example_zh: 向記者寄出一份簡短的媒體提案，說明為什麼我們的故事對他們的讀者現在很重要。

toeic.example_en: The colorful PR stunt outside the train station brought our small startup into the evening news.
toeic.example_zh: 車站外多采多姿的公關噱頭把我們的小型新創帶上了晚間新聞。

toeic.example_en: The campaign generated over two million media impressions across newspapers, magazines, and online news sites.
toeic.example_zh: 這次活動在報紙、雜誌和線上新聞網站上產生了超過兩百萬次的媒體曝光。

toeic.example_en: Each ad impression counts every time someone sees our banner on a partner website.
toeic.example_zh: 每當有人在合作夥伴網站上看到我們的橫幅，每一次廣告曝光次數都會計入。

toeic.example_en: The view count on our cooking tutorial reached one hundred thousand in just three days.
toeic.example_zh: 我們料理教學影片的觀看次數在短短三天內達到十萬。

toeic.example_en: Average watch time on the video is over three minutes, which is great for our product.
toeic.example_zh: 影片的平均觀看時間超過三分鐘，這對我們的產品來說非常好。

toeic.example_en: Engagement on our weekend posts is usually higher than on weekday posts in this region.
toeic.example_zh: 在這個地區，我們週末貼文的互動通常比平日貼文高。

toeic.example_en: The like count on the cute pet photo passed five thousand within only one afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 可愛寵物照片的按讚數在短短一個下午就突破五千。

toeic.example_en: Please reply politely to questions in the comment section under each new product announcement.
toeic.example_zh: 請在每則新產品公告下方的留言區禮貌地回覆問題。

toeic.example_en: The share count on the inspiring customer story shows how much it touched many readers.
toeic.example_zh: 感人顧客故事的分享次數顯示它打動了多少讀者。

toeic.example_en: A high save action rate on a post means people want to refer back to it later.
toeic.example_zh: 貼文的高收藏動作比率代表人們之後想再回頭看看。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 吸睛素材；停滑素材
toeic.example_en: A bright color image is often a great scroll-stopper for mobile users on social feeds.
toeic.example_zh: 鮮明色彩的圖片對社群動態上的行動使用者來說，往往是很棒的吸睛素材。

toeic.example_en: A strong hook line in the first three seconds keeps viewers from skipping the video ad.
toeic.example_zh: 前三秒一句有力的開場句能讓觀眾不去跳過影音廣告。

toeic.example_en: The thumbnail image is often more important than the title for getting people to click play.
toeic.example_zh: 在讓人點擊播放這件事上，縮圖往往比標題更重要。

toeic.example_en: We update the cover photo on the company page each season to match new product themes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每季更新公司頁面的封面照片，以配合新產品的主題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 個人簡介；帳號簡介
toeic.example_en: Update the profile bio so it mentions the new free shipping policy for first-time customers.
toeic.example_zh: 更新帳號簡介，讓它提到針對首購顧客的新免運政策。

toeic.example_en: Tell followers to tap the link in bio to read the full article on our website.
toeic.example_zh: 告訴追蹤者點擊簡介連結，到我們網站閱讀完整文章。

toeic.example_en: Make the call-to-action button bright orange so visitors can find it on any device.
toeic.example_zh: 把行動呼籲按鈕做成亮橘色，讓訪客在任何裝置上都能找到它。

toeic.example_en: The shop now button under each story leads followers straight to the product page online.
toeic.example_zh: 每則限時動態下方的立即購買按鈕，把追蹤者直接帶到線上產品頁。

toeic.example_en: Keep the sign-up form short so customers do not feel that giving their email takes too long.
toeic.example_zh: 把註冊表單做得簡短，讓顧客不會覺得提供電子郵件要花太久時間。

toeic.example_en: Please fill out the registration form by Friday if you plan to attend our marketing workshop.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你打算參加我們的行銷工作坊，請在週五前填寫報名表。

toeic.example_en: Our short customer survey only takes two minutes and helps us improve service in every branch.
toeic.example_zh: 我們簡短的顧客問卷只需兩分鐘，能幫助我們改善每一家分店的服務。

toeic.example_en: The market survey showed that many young customers want healthier options at our breakfast counter.
toeic.example_zh: 市場問卷調查顯示，許多年輕顧客希望我們的早餐櫃台有更健康的選擇。

toeic.example_en: We sent an online survey to one thousand members and received over four hundred responses.
toeic.example_zh: 我們向一千位會員寄出線上問卷，並收到超過四百份回覆。

toeic.example_en: A short pop-up survey on the checkout page asks customers if they found everything they needed.
toeic.example_zh: 結帳頁面上的簡短彈出式問卷詢問顧客是否找到了他們需要的所有商品。

toeic.example_en: An in-app survey collects quick feedback from users right after they finish using a feature.
toeic.example_zh: 應用程式內問卷在使用者剛使用完某項功能後，立刻蒐集快速回饋。

toeic.example_en: We received over five hundred survey responses about our delivery service in the past two weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 過去兩週我們收到超過五百份關於配送服務的問卷回覆。

toeic.example_en: Our survey response rate improved after we offered a small thank-you coupon for completing it.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們為完成問卷的顧客提供小額感謝優惠券後，問卷回覆率提高了。

toeic.example_en: Closed-ended questions are easier to count, but they sometimes miss important customer details and feelings.
toeic.example_zh: 封閉式問題比較容易統計，但有時會錯過重要的顧客細節和感受。

toeic.example_en: A rating scale question from one to five works well to measure customer satisfaction quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 從一到五的量表式問題很適合快速衡量顧客滿意度。

toeic.example_en: We use a five-point Likert scale to measure how strongly customers agree with each statement.
toeic.example_zh: 我們使用五點式李克特量表來衡量顧客對每個陳述的同意程度。

toeic.example_en: We always include a few demographic questions to better understand who is using our service.
toeic.example_zh: 我們總是加入一些人口統計問題，以更了解誰在使用我們的服務。

toeic.example_en: The audience profile shows that most of our buyers are working parents between thirty and forty.
toeic.example_zh: 受眾輪廓顯示我們大多數的買家是三十到四十歲的職業父母。

toeic.example_en: Our target market for the new fitness app is busy office workers in large urban areas.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新健身應用程式的目標市場是大型都市地區忙碌的辦公室上班族。

toeic.example_en: Each customer segment receives slightly different emails that match their interests and shopping history.
toeic.example_zh: 每個顧客區隔會收到稍微不同、符合他們興趣和購物紀錄的電子郵件。

toeic.example_en: Our travel guide focuses on a niche market of remote workers looking for long-stay destinations.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的旅遊指南專注於尋找長住目的地的遠距工作者這個利基市場。

toeic.example_en: Our simple and affordable products are designed for the mass market in every region we serve.
toeic.example_zh: 我們簡單實惠的產品是為我們服務的每個地區的大眾市場設計的。

toeic.example_en: Many factors influence a customer buying decision, including price, reviews, and trust in the brand.
toeic.example_zh: 許多因素會影響顧客的購買決策，包括價格、評價和對品牌的信任。

toeic.example_en: After watching the demo video, the survey showed a clear increase in customer purchase intent.
toeic.example_zh: 看完示範影片後，問卷顯示顧客的購買意願有明顯提升。

toeic.example_en: We map every step of the customer purchase journey from the first ad to the final order.
