toeic.example_zh: 我們把顧客購買旅程的每個步驟都繪製出來，從第一個廣告到最後的訂單。

toeic.example_en: The buyer journey shows that most customers compare three brands before making a final decision online.
toeic.example_zh: 買家旅程顯示大多數顧客在線上做最終決定前會比較三個品牌。

toeic.example_en: Content for the awareness stage should educate readers about a problem rather than sell the product.
toeic.example_zh: 認知階段的內容應該教育讀者了解問題，而不是銷售產品。

toeic.example_en: At the consideration stage, customers compare different brands carefully before deciding which one to try.
toeic.example_zh: 在考慮階段，顧客會仔細比較不同品牌，然後決定要嘗試哪一個。

toeic.example_en: During the decision stage, customer reviews and clear pricing pages strongly affect the final choice.
toeic.example_zh: 在決策階段，顧客評價和清楚的價格頁面對最終選擇有很大影響。

toeic.example_en: In the retention stage, we send helpful tips so new users keep getting value from our service.
toeic.example_zh: 在留存階段，我們寄出實用的訣竅，讓新使用者持續從我們的服務中獲得價值。

toeic.example_en: Happy customers in the advocacy stage often recommend our brand to colleagues and family members.
toeic.example_zh: 處於推薦階段的滿意顧客常向同事和家人推薦我們的品牌。

toeic.example_en: Send a short outreach email to local bloggers and invite them to try our new tea collection.
toeic.example_zh: 向當地部落客寄出一封簡短的開發信，邀請他們試試我們的新茶葉系列。

toeic.example_en: Our outreach campaign to small business owners produced twenty new partnerships in just two months.
toeic.example_zh: 我們針對小企業主的開發行銷活動，在短短兩個月內促成了二十個新合作夥伴。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 開發信；陌生開發郵件
toeic.example_en: A cold email should be short, personal, and clearly show value to the busy receiver.
toeic.example_zh: 陌生開發郵件應該簡短、個人化，並清楚對忙碌的收件人展現價值。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 溫暖開發信；熟絡聯絡郵件
toeic.example_en: A warm email follows an earlier meeting at a conference and feels much friendlier than a cold one.
toeic.example_zh: 熟絡聯絡郵件接續先前在會議上見過面之後寄出，比陌生郵件感覺友善得多。

toeic.example_en: A full stamp card gives the holder one free dessert at any of our restaurant locations.
toeic.example_zh: 蓋滿的集章卡可以在我們任何一家餐廳分店兌換一份免費甜點。

toeic.example_en: After ten purchases, the punch card from our bakery earns you a free loaf of bread.
toeic.example_zh: 購買十次後，我們麵包店的打孔卡可以兌換一條免費麵包。

toeic.example_en: Every VIP member receives early access to new collections and special invitations to private events.
toeic.example_zh: 每位 VIP 會員都能優先取得新系列商品，並收到專屬活動的特別邀請。

toeic.example_en: Show your membership card at the counter to receive five percent off every purchase in our store.
toeic.example_zh: 在櫃台出示會員卡，即可在我們店裡的每筆消費享九五折優惠。

toeic.example_en: The bundle deal includes the camera, a memory card, and a travel bag at a special price.
toeic.example_zh: 這個組合優惠包括相機、記憶卡和旅行包，以特別優惠價提供。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 超值包；優惠組合包
toeic.example_en: Customers buying our snack value pack save almost twenty percent compared to buying each item alone.
toeic.example_zh: 購買我們零食超值包的顧客，比單獨購買每樣商品節省將近兩成。

toeic.example_en: The family pack of yogurt contains eight cups and is perfect for households with young children.
toeic.example_zh: 優格家庭裝有八杯，非常適合有小孩的家庭。

toeic.example_en: A trial size of our new lotion is included as a free gift with every full-size purchase.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新乳液的試用裝會在每次購買正裝商品時當成免費禮物附贈。

toeic.example_en: New subscribers receive a sample pack with five small bottles of our most popular fragrances.
toeic.example_zh: 新訂閱者會收到一個試用組，內含五瓶我們最熱門香水的小瓶裝。

toeic.example_en: Our starter kit comes with a small camera, a tripod, and a beginner photography guide.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的入門組附帶一台小型相機、一個三腳架，還有初學者攝影指南。

toeic.example_en: Our holiday gift set includes three teas in a beautiful box that is perfect for giving.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的節慶禮品組包含三款茶葉，裝在漂亮的盒子裡，非常適合送禮。

toeic.example_en: Members earn two percent cashback on every purchase made with the store credit card this month.
toeic.example_zh: 本月會員使用商店信用卡的每筆消費都可獲得百分之二的現金回饋。

toeic.example_en: The cashback offer on grocery purchases is valid only on weekends throughout the month of June.
toeic.example_zh: 雜貨採買的現金回饋活動僅在六月每週末有效。

toeic.example_en: The promotion period for our anniversary sale lasts from the fifth to the fifteenth of May.
toeic.example_zh: 我們週年慶特賣的促銷期間從五月五日持續到五月十五日。

toeic.example_en: During the campaign period, every purchase enters customers into our weekly grand prize drawing.
toeic.example_zh: 活動期間，每筆購買都會讓顧客進入我們每週的大獎抽籤。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 活動上線；活動啟動
toeic.example_en: The campaign launch is scheduled for the first day of next month at our flagship store.
toeic.example_zh: 活動啟動預計在下個月的第一天於我們的旗艦店進行。

toeic.example_en: Our main campaign goal is to gain three thousand new email subscribers in the next two months.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的主要活動目標是在接下來兩個月內增加三千位新的電子郵件訂閱者。

toeic.example_en: Each stage of the marketing funnel needs different content to gently guide buyers toward a purchase.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷漏斗的每個階段都需要不同內容，溫和地引導買家邁向購買。

toeic.example_en: Articles at the top of funnel attract many new readers who do not yet know our brand.
toeic.example_zh: 漏斗頂端的文章吸引許多還不認識我們品牌的新讀者。

toeic.example_en: At the middle of funnel, case studies show how real customers solved problems with our service.
toeic.example_zh: 在漏斗中段，案例研究展示真實顧客如何用我們的服務解決問題。

toeic.example_en: Demo videos and free trials are strong tools at the bottom of funnel to close the sale.
toeic.example_zh: 示範影片和免費試用是漏斗底部促成交易的強力工具。

toeic.example_en: Please prepare the marketing collateral, including brochures and flyers, before the trade show next week.
toeic.example_zh: 請在下週貿易展前準備好行銷物料，包括手冊和傳單。

toeic.example_en: Our new brochure highlights the three main benefits of choosing our delivery service for small businesses.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新的手冊強調小企業選擇我們配送服務的三大主要好處。

toeic.example_en: A simple leaflet about our menu is given to every guest at the new restaurant location.
toeic.example_zh: 新餐廳分店每位客人都會拿到一張關於我們菜單的簡單宣傳單張。

toeic.example_en: Our colorful postcard mailer reminds local families to visit the new playground in our shopping center.
toeic.example_zh: 我們色彩繽紛的明信片直效郵件提醒當地家庭來逛逛我們購物中心的新遊樂場。

toeic.example_en: Direct mail still works well for older customers who do not use email or social media often.
toeic.example_zh: 對不常使用電子郵件或社群媒體的年長顧客來說，直效郵件廣告仍然很有效。

toeic.example_en: Our spring catalog features over two hundred new products with photos and easy ordering instructions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的春季商品目錄收錄超過兩百項新商品，附有照片和簡單的訂購說明。

toeic.example_en: Please send the updated product catalog to all sales representatives by the end of this week.
toeic.example_zh: 請在本週結束前把更新後的產品型錄寄給所有業務代表。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 商品造型集；風格手冊
toeic.example_en: Our spring lookbook shows ten outfits that mix and match items from the new clothing collection.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的春季風格手冊展示十套混搭新服裝系列商品的造型。

toeic.example_en: Please greet every visitor to our exhibition stand and offer a brochure with our latest products.
toeic.example_zh: 請向每位來到我們展覽攤位的訪客打招呼，並提供我們最新產品的手冊。

toeic.example_en: Each vendor table at the food fair must include a sign with the business name and prices.
toeic.example_zh: 美食市集中的每個廠商攤位都必須有一個標示，寫上店名和價格。

toeic.example_en: Our trade show giveaway this year is a small reusable bottle printed with the company logo.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今年的貿易展贈品是一個印有公司標誌的小型環保水瓶。

toeic.example_en: We hand out branded merchandise like pens, notebooks, and tote bags to every visitor at events.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在活動中向每位訪客發放品牌商品，例如筆、筆記本和托特包。

toeic.example_en: Every business customer who signs a yearly contract receives a small promotional gift from our team.
toeic.example_zh: 每位簽訂年度合約的企業客戶都會收到我們團隊的小型促銷禮品。

toeic.example_en: Common promotional items include water bottles, cloth bags, and notebooks with the brand logo on them.
toeic.example_zh: 常見的促銷物品包括印有品牌標誌的水瓶、布袋和筆記本。

toeic.example_en: The thirty-second promotional video plays on screens at the entrance of every retail store location.
toeic.example_zh: 三十秒的宣傳影片會在每家零售店入口的螢幕上播放。

toeic.example_en: A short explainer video helps new customers understand our delivery process in just two minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 簡短的解說影片幫助新顧客在短短兩分鐘內了解我們的配送流程。

toeic.example_en: The mysterious teaser ad ran for one week before we revealed the new product on social media.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們於社群媒體上公開新產品前，神秘的預告廣告播了一週。

toeic.example_en: The teaser campaign asked customers to guess what the bright orange box in our ads contains.
toeic.example_zh: 這次預告活動邀請顧客猜猜我們廣告中那個亮橘色盒子裝著什麼。

toeic.example_en: A countdown timer on the homepage created strong excitement before our online sale started at noon.
toeic.example_zh: 首頁上的倒數計時器在線上特賣中午開始前，營造了強烈的期待感。

toeic.example_en: The drop date for the limited sneaker collection is the first Saturday of next month at noon.
toeic.example_zh: 這個限量運動鞋系列的發售日是下個月第一個週六中午。

toeic.example_en: Each limited edition mug has a unique number printed on the bottom to show how rare it is.
toeic.example_zh: 每個限量版馬克杯底部都印有獨特編號，顯示其稀有度。

toeic.example_en: As a thank-you, members receive an exclusive offer of free shipping on every order this weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 作為感謝，會員本週末每筆訂單都可享有免運費的獨家優惠。

toeic.example_en: The member-only sale runs for two days and includes deep discounts on best-selling kitchen products.
toeic.example_zh: 會員專屬特賣為期兩天，包括熱銷廚房產品的大幅折扣。

toeic.example_en: We invited our top one hundred customers to a private sale on the new luxury watch line.
toeic.example_zh: 我們邀請了前一百名頂尖顧客參加新奢華手錶系列的私人特賣。

toeic.example_en: Our annual clearance sale offers up to seventy percent off summer items at every store location.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每年的出清特賣在每家門市對夏季商品提供最高七折優惠。

toeic.example_en: The store had a big stock clearance to make space for the new winter collection arriving soon.
toeic.example_zh: 店家進行了大規模庫存出清，為即將到貨的新冬季系列騰出空間。

toeic.example_en: The end-of-season sale on swimwear starts in late August and lasts for about three weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 泳裝的季末特賣從八月底開始，持續約三週。

toeic.example_en: Our back-to-school sale offers big discounts on bags, notebooks, and lunch boxes every August.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的開學特賣每年八月為背包、筆記本和午餐盒提供大幅折扣。

toeic.example_en: Our holiday promotion this year will feature a free gift with any order over fifty dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今年的節慶促銷會在任何超過五十美元的訂單上附贈免費禮物。

toeic.example_en: One special loyalty perk is a free dessert on your birthday in any of our restaurants.
toeic.example_zh: 一項特別的會員福利是生日當天在我們任何一家餐廳可享免費甜點。

toeic.example_en: Customers who complete our short survey receive a small thank-you gift in their next order.
toeic.example_zh: 完成我們簡短問卷的顧客會在下次訂單中收到一份小感謝禮。

toeic.example_en: Each customer story on our blog shows real people using our products in their daily routines.
toeic.example_zh: 我們部落格上的每則顧客故事都展示真實的人在日常生活中使用我們的產品。

toeic.example_en: Please match the tone of voice in our brand guide when you write the new website pages.
toeic.example_zh: 撰寫新的網頁時，請符合我們品牌指引中的溝通語調。

toeic.example_en: Our brand promise statement tells customers that we will always deliver fresh meals within thirty minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的品牌承諾陳述告訴顧客，我們將永遠在三十分鐘內送達新鮮餐點。

toeic.example_en: The main selling point of our new chair is the soft cushion that supports long hours of work.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新椅子的主要賣點是支撐長時間工作的柔軟坐墊。

toeic.example_en: The key benefit of our service is that customers save at least two hours every week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們服務的主要好處是顧客每週至少節省兩個小時。

toeic.example_en: Each feature highlight on the product page includes a clear icon and a short helpful description.
toeic.example_zh: 產品頁面上每個特色重點都附有清楚的圖示和一段簡短實用的說明。

toeic.example_en: The product feature list on the box shows five main reasons customers love this travel suitcase.
toeic.example_zh: 盒子上的產品特色清單顯示顧客喜愛這款旅行行李箱的五個主要理由。

toeic.example_en: The product comparison table helps shoppers choose the right model based on size, price, and features.
toeic.example_zh: 產品比較表幫助購物者根據尺寸、價格和功能選擇合適的型號。

toeic.example_en: Our competitor analysis showed that our prices are lower but our shipping speed needs improvement.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的競爭對手分析顯示，我們的價格較低，但配送速度需要改進。

toeic.example_en: The marketing dashboard shows clicks, sales, and email signups for each campaign in real time.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷儀表板即時顯示每場活動的點擊、銷售和電子郵件註冊數。

toeic.example_en: Please prepare a clear campaign report with charts before our monthly marketing meeting on Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 請在週五的每月行銷會議前準備一份附圖表的清楚活動報告。

toeic.example_en: Our monthly report includes top-performing posts, total new followers, and key sales numbers from each channel.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的月報包含表現最佳的貼文、新追蹤者總數，以及每個通路的關鍵銷售數據。

toeic.example_en: The weekly report on social media performance is due every Monday morning before nine o clock.
toeic.example_zh: 社群媒體成效的週報每週一上午九點前必須交。

toeic.example_en: Our win-back campaign sends a special discount to customers who have not purchased in six months.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的顧客挽回活動會向六個月未購買的顧客寄送特別折扣。

toeic.example_en: The re-engagement campaign asks quiet subscribers if they still want to receive our weekly newsletter.
toeic.example_zh: 重新互動活動詢問沉寂的訂閱者是否還想收到我們的週報電子報。

toeic.example_en: We send a friendly note to every lapsed customer offering a small gift on their next order.
toeic.example_zh: 我們向每位流失顧客寄送友善訊息，並在他們下一筆訂單上提供小禮物。

toeic.example_en: Every first-time customer receives a thank-you card and a small surprise inside the delivery box.
toeic.example_zh: 每位首次購買的顧客都會在配送箱中收到一張感謝卡和一份小驚喜。

toeic.example_en: About sixty percent of last month sales came from happy repeat customers in our home market.
toeic.example_zh: 上個月大約六成的銷售來自我們本國市場中滿意的回購顧客。

toeic.example_en: A simple thank-you email after delivery often leads to a repeat purchase within just two weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 送達後一封簡單的感謝郵件，往往能在短短兩週內帶來回購。

toeic.example_en: Customers often save items to a wishlist and come back to buy them during a sale event.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客常會把商品儲存到願望清單，並在特賣活動時回來購買。

toeic.example_en: A wishlist reminder email notifies shoppers when a saved item finally drops to a lower price.
toeic.example_zh: 願望清單提醒郵件會在已收藏的商品終於降價時通知購物者。

toeic.example_en: Customers love the price drop alert because it tells them exactly when products go on sale.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客很喜歡降價提醒，因為它能精確告訴他們商品何時打折。

toeic.example_en: A stock alert lets customers know when a sold-out item is finally back on the shelves.
toeic.example_zh: 補貨提醒讓顧客知道售完的商品終於再次上架。

toeic.example_en: The back-in-stock email helped us sell out the limited handbag again within only a few hours.
toeic.example_zh: 補貨通知郵件幫助我們在短短幾小時內再次售完限量手提包。

toeic.example_en: Customers can place a preorder for the new phone now and receive it on the launch day.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客現在可以預購新手機，並在發售當天收到。

toeic.example_en: Every preorder bonus includes a free protective case and one year of accident insurance for free.
toeic.example_zh: 每份預購禮都包括一個免費保護殼，以及一年免費意外保險。

toeic.example_en: Waitlist signup for the new course opened this morning, and over five hundred people joined immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 新課程的候補名單註冊今天上午開放，超過五百人立即加入。

toeic.example_en: The launch teaser on social media shows only the shape of the product against a black background.
toeic.example_zh: 社群媒體上的發表預告只展示產品在黑色背景下的輪廓。

toeic.example_en: Members receive a sneak peek of the new collection one full week before the public launch.
toeic.example_zh: 會員可在公開發表整整一週前看到新系列的搶先預覽。

toeic.example_en: Our premium members enjoy early access to seasonal sales twenty-four hours before regular customers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的高級會員可比一般顧客提早二十四小時搶先體驗季節性特賣。

toeic.example_en: The VIP preview event invites our most loyal customers to see the new collection before everyone else.
toeic.example_zh: VIP 預覽活動邀請我們最忠實的顧客比其他人更早看到新系列。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 外展接觸；主動聯繫
toeic.example_en: Our outreach to small businesses this quarter has generated over two hundred new sales conversations.
toeic.example_zh: 本季我們對小型企業的外展接觸已產生超過兩百次新的銷售對話。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 節奏電訪；按計畫頻率的客戶聯繫
toeic.example_en: Each rep should complete fifty cadence calls weekly to keep prospects engaged through the buying cycle.
toeic.example_zh: 每位業務每週應完成五十通節奏電訪，以在採購週期中持續吸引潛在客戶。

toeic.example_en: The new power dialer lets our team contact three times as many leads each afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 新的高效撥號系統讓我們的團隊每個下午能聯繫三倍數量的潛在客戶。

toeic.example_en: Please review the updated talk track before your discovery calls with manufacturing prospects this week.
toeic.example_zh: 請在本週與製造業潛在客戶的探索電話前，先檢視更新後的銷售話術腳本。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 開場白；開場銷售語
toeic.example_en: A strong opener mentioning the prospect's recent funding round usually buys you another minute of attention.
toeic.example_zh: 強而有力的開場白若提及潛在客戶最近的募資輪，通常能多爭取一分鐘的關注。

toeic.example_en: Morning hours are blocked for prospecting so reps can focus before internal meetings begin.
toeic.example_zh: 早上的時段被保留給開發潛在客戶，讓業務能在內部會議開始前專注工作。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 低價誘導購買方案
toeic.example_en: The fifteen-dollar trip wire offer moves cold visitors into paying customers within their first session.
toeic.example_zh: 十五美元的誘導購買方案能在首次造訪中將冷訪客轉化為付費客戶。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 首次接觸潛在客戶
toeic.example_en: Every first-touch lead receives a personalized welcome video within twenty-four hours of signing up.
toeic.example_zh: 每位首次接觸潛在客戶在註冊後二十四小時內會收到一段個人化歡迎影片。

toeic.example_en: Our lead routing rules send enterprise inquiries directly to senior account executives based on territory.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的潛在客戶分派規則會依區域將企業詢問直接送給資深客戶經理。

toeic.example_en: A clean lead handoff between marketing and sales prevents prospects from repeating their requirements unnecessarily.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷與銷售之間順暢的潛在客戶交接，可避免讓潛在客戶不必要地重複敘述需求。

toeic.example_en: Send a warm-up email referencing their LinkedIn post before requesting any meeting with senior decision-makers.
toeic.example_zh: 在向資深決策者請求會議前，先寄一封暖場郵件，提及他們在領英上的貼文。

toeic.example_en: Set up a five-email drip sequence to educate prospects about features over their two-week trial.
toeic.example_zh: 設計一個五封郵件的滴灌序列，在兩週試用期內向潛在客戶介紹各項功能。

toeic.example_en: The nurture campaign keeps unready buyers warm until budget approvals come through next fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 培育型行銷活動讓尚未準備好的買家保持溫度，直到下個會計年度預算獲准。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) BANT 銷售資格判定框架
toeic.example_en: Use the BANT framework during discovery to verify budget, authority, need, and timeline before forecasting.
toeic.example_zh: 在探索階段使用 BANT 框架來確認預算、決策權、需求與時程，再進行預測。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) MEDDIC 企業銷售方法論
toeic.example_en: MEDDIC helps our reps qualify complex enterprise opportunities by mapping metrics, champions, and decision criteria.
toeic.example_zh: MEDDIC 幫助我們的業務透過盤點指標、內部支持者與決策標準來判定複雜企業機會。

toeic.example_en: A few well-placed qualifying questions can save you weeks chasing prospects without real purchasing authority.
toeic.example_zh: 幾個切中要害的資格判定問題，能讓你少花數週時間追逐沒有實際購買權的潛在客戶。

toeic.example_en: Watch for buyer signals such as pricing page revisits and team members joining your calls.
toeic.example_zh: 留意買家信號，例如重複造訪定價頁面以及團隊成員加入你的會議。

toeic.example_en: Our platform aggregates third-party intent signals so reps know which accounts to prioritize each morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的平台彙整第三方購買意圖信號，讓業務每天早上知道該優先處理哪些客戶。

toeic.example_en: A warm introduction from a mutual contact dramatically improves your chances of booking that first meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 由共同聯絡人提供的熱情引介，大幅提升你預約首次會議的成功機率。

toeic.example_en: Existing customers remain our most reliable referral source for new enterprise opportunities each quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 每季既有客戶仍是我們最可靠的企業新機會推薦來源。

toeic.example_en: Reps who practice social selling on LinkedIn typically build pipeline twice as fast as cold callers.
toeic.example_zh: 在領英上進行社群銷售的業務，建立業務管道的速度通常是電話陌生開發者的兩倍。

toeic.example_en: Send a short personalized note after every discovery call referencing one specific challenge they mentioned.
toeic.example_zh: 在每次探索電話後寄出簡短個人化便箋，提及他們提到的某項具體挑戰。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 預錄語音留言投放
toeic.example_en: The voice mail drop feature lets reps leave consistent messages without rerecording the same script repeatedly.
toeic.example_zh: 預錄語音留言功能讓業務能留下一致的訊息，而無須重複錄製相同腳本。

toeic.example_en: Veteran reps know several polite gatekeeper bypass techniques that still respect the assistant's authority.
toeic.example_zh: 資深業務懂得幾種有禮貌的繞過守門人技巧，同時仍尊重助理的職權。

toeic.example_en: Confirm the buyer's decision criteria in writing before submitting your final pricing proposal.
toeic.example_zh: 在提交最終定價提案前，先以書面確認買家的決策標準。

toeic.example_en: The evaluation committee includes representatives from procurement, security, finance, and the end-user department.
toeic.example_zh: 評估委員會包含採購、資安、財務以及終端使用部門的代表。

toeic.example_en: Identify the economic buyer early because middle managers rarely sign contracts above fifty thousand dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 及早辨識經濟決策買家，因為中階主管很少會簽署五萬美元以上的合約。

toeic.example_en: The technical buyer wants integration details, while the economic buyer cares primarily about return on investment.
toeic.example_zh: 技術評估買家想知道整合細節，而經濟決策買家主要關心的是投資報酬率。

toeic.example_en: Always demo to the user buyer first since their enthusiasm helps push approval through finance later.
toeic.example_zh: 務必先向使用端買家做示範，因為他們的熱情之後有助於推動財務部核准。

toeic.example_en: Submit any non-standard discount above twenty percent to the deal desk for approval before quoting.
toeic.example_zh: 在報價前，將任何高於二十%的非標準折扣提交給交易審核小組核准。

toeic.example_en: Update the deal stage in the CRM after every meaningful conversation so management forecasts stay accurate.
toeic.example_zh: 每次有實質對話後在 CRM 更新交易階段，讓管理層的預測保持準確。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly deal slippage usually points to weak champion development rather than pricing or product issues.
toeic.example_zh: 每季的交易延後流失通常反映內部支持者經營不足，而非定價或產品問題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 既有客戶擴展策略
toeic.example_en: Each account manager prepares a quarterly expansion play targeting departments not yet using our platform.
toeic.example_zh: 每位客戶經理會準備每季的既有客戶擴展策略，鎖定尚未使用我們平台的部門。

toeic.example_en: The analytics module presents a clear upsell opportunity once customers exceed three thousand monthly transactions.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶每月交易超過三千筆後，分析模組便呈現一個明顯的加購機會。

toeic.example_en: Identify cross-sell opportunities by reviewing which complementary products other similar customers commonly purchase together.
toeic.example_zh: 藉由檢視類似客戶常一起購買哪些互補產品，找出交叉銷售機會。

toeic.example_en: Submit your renewal forecast every Friday so leadership can flag accounts requiring executive intervention.
toeic.example_zh: 每週五提交你的續約預測，讓主管能標示出需要高階介入的客戶。

toeic.example_en: Start renewal cycle conversations ninety days before expiration to avoid last-minute price negotiations under pressure.
toeic.example_zh: 在到期前九十天開始續約週期對談，以避免最後一刻被迫進行定價談判。

toeic.example_en: A healthy pipeline coverage ratio of three times quota gives reps room for normal deal attrition.
toeic.example_zh: 三倍配額的健康業務管道覆蓋比，能讓業務應對正常的交易流失。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 業務管道檢視會議
toeic.example_en: Pipeline review meetings every Monday help managers spot stalled deals before they fall out completely.
toeic.example_zh: 每週一的業務管道檢視會議幫助主管在交易完全流失前發現停滯案件。

toeic.example_en: Move the deal into the commit forecast category only when the contract has reached legal review.
toeic.example_zh: 只有當合約進入法務審查時，才將該案移到承諾預測分類。

toeic.example_en: Mark the deal as best case if the customer signals interest but has not yet confirmed budget.
toeic.example_zh: 若客戶表現出興趣但尚未確認預算，將該案標為最佳預估。

toeic.example_en: Only place deals in your commit forecast that you can personally guarantee will close this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 只將你能親自保證本季會成交的案件放入你的承諾預測中。

toeic.example_en: Schedule a loss review with the prospect to learn why they ultimately selected our competitor's solution.
toeic.example_zh: 與潛在客戶安排失單檢討，了解他們最終為何選擇我們競爭對手的解決方案。

toeic.example_en: Senior managers provide deal coaching weekly to help newer reps navigate complex enterprise opportunities.
toeic.example_zh: 資深主管每週提供個別交易指導，協助新進業務處理複雜的企業機會。

toeic.example_en: Each new hire completes a full sales playthrough using realistic customer objections before joining live calls.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新進人員在加入實際電話前，需以實境客戶異議完成一次完整的銷售流程演練。

toeic.example_en: New reps complete five ride-along sessions before owning their first real customer conversation independently.
toeic.example_zh: 新業務需完成五次跟隨見習，才能獨立負責他們的第一次真實客戶對話。

toeic.example_en: Shadow calls give junior reps direct exposure to how veterans handle difficult procurement-related objections.
toeic.example_zh: 旁聽電話讓資淺業務直接見識資深同仁如何處理棘手的採購相關異議。

toeic.example_en: Customize the demo script for each industry so prospects immediately see relevance to their workflows.
toeic.example_zh: 為每個產業客製化產品示範腳本，讓潛在客戶立即看到與其工作流程的相關性。

toeic.example_en: The discovery deck includes three sample dashboards drawn from publicly available data about the prospect's industry.
toeic.example_zh: 探索簡報包含三份取自該潛在客戶產業公開資料的範例儀表板。

toeic.example_en: Strong discovery questions uncover hidden pain points the prospect did not realize were affecting revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 好的探索式問題能揭示潛在客戶未察覺正影響營收的隱藏痛點。

toeic.example_en: Send a brief discovery summary within two hours so the prospect remembers your alignment on priorities.
toeic.example_zh: 在兩小時內寄出簡短的探索總結，讓潛在客戶記得你們在優先事項上的共識。

toeic.example_en: Treat let me think about it as a stall tactic and probe for the real underlying concern.
toeic.example_zh: 把「我再想想」視為拖延戰術，並進一步探詢真正的潛在顧慮。

toeic.example_en: Use isolating objection language such as setting that aside, is there anything else holding you back?
toeic.example_zh: 使用孤立式異議釐清的說法，例如「先撇開那點，還有其他讓您猶豫的地方嗎？」

toeic.example_en: Reframe a price objection by quantifying the cost of the prospect's current process over twelve months.
toeic.example_zh: 把價格異議重新定義，方法是量化潛在客戶現行流程在十二個月內所付出的成本。

toeic.example_en: Strong value framing connects every feature to a measurable business outcome rather than a technical detail.
toeic.example_zh: 強而有力的價值框架表達會把每個功能連結到可衡量的商業成果，而非技術細節。

toeic.example_en: Build a simple ROI story showing payback within eight months before discussing any pricing details.
toeic.example_zh: 在討論任何定價細節前，先建立一個顯示八個月內回本的簡單投資報酬故事。

toeic.example_en: An assumptive close like shall we plan installation for the second week of next month works well.
toeic.example_zh: 假設性成交法例如「我們是否將安裝排在下個月第二週？」往往效果不錯。

toeic.example_en: The alternative close offers two acceptable options so the prospect feels in control of the decision.
toeic.example_zh: 二擇一成交法提供兩個可接受的選項，讓潛在客戶感覺自己能掌控決定。

toeic.example_en: Avoid using an urgency close based on fake deadlines because seasoned buyers will see straight through it.
toeic.example_zh: 避免使用基於假截止日的急迫感成交法，因為老練的買家會立刻識破。

toeic.example_en: A soft close confirms small commitments first such as agreeing on implementation timing before signature.
toeic.example_zh: 軟性成交先確認小型承諾，例如在簽署前先就導入時程達成共識。

toeic.example_en: Save a hard close for situations where the prospect has confirmed every decision criterion has been met.
toeic.example_zh: 把強勢成交留給潛在客戶已確認所有決策標準都被滿足的情境。

toeic.example_en: Use give-get negotiation so every concession on price comes with a commitment such as a longer term.
toeic.example_zh: 採用互惠讓步式談判，讓每個價格讓步都伴隨一項承諾，例如較長的合約期間。

toeic.example_en: Map out your concession plan before the call so you never give away discounts without something in return.
toeic.example_zh: 在通話前規劃好你的讓步規劃，這樣就不會在沒有相對條件下隨意給折扣。

toeic.example_en: Send the list price quote first so any discount feels like a meaningful gesture from your side.
toeic.example_zh: 先寄出標價報價單，讓任何折扣對方都能感受到你方做出的明顯善意。

toeic.example_en: New reps receive a ramp quota for their first two quarters before reaching the full annual target.
toeic.example_zh: 新進業務在前兩季享有漸進式業績目標，再達到全年完整指標。

toeic.example_en: Reps on parental leave automatically receive quota relief proportional to the weeks they were away.
toeic.example_zh: 請育嬰假的業務會自動獲得依其離開週數比例計算的配額減免。

toeic.example_en: The commission accelerator doubles earnings on every dollar booked after reps exceed annual quota.
toeic.example_zh: 佣金加速器讓業務超越年度配額後每多收一元的所得加倍。

toeic.example_en: Our standard commission rate is ten percent on new logo revenue and five percent on renewals.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的標準佣金費率為新客戶營收十%、續約五%。

toeic.example_en: Account executives' on-target earnings combine base salary with variable commission at a sixty-forty split.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶經理的達標總薪酬由本薪與變動佣金以六比四的比例組成。

toeic.example_en: Read the new comp plan carefully since accelerators now activate at one hundred ten percent of quota.
toeic.example_zh: 請仔細閱讀新的薪酬計畫，因為加速器現在從配額一百一十%起啟動。

toeic.example_en: Multiyear contracts receive quota retirement based on the total contract value, not annual billings.
toeic.example_zh: 多年期合約以合約總價值而非年度帳單金額來進行配額銷售認列。

toeic.example_en: The team exceeded their bookings target by twelve percent despite challenging market conditions this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 儘管本季市場環境艱困，團隊仍以高出十二%的成績超越簽約目標。

toeic.example_en: Compare your average deal size benchmark against industry peers each quarter to identify pricing leverage opportunities.
toeic.example_zh: 每季比較你的平均交易規模基準與同業，找出定價槓桿機會。

toeic.example_en: Our average selling price rose fifteen percent after we introduced the premium analytics tier last spring.
toeic.example_zh: 推出高階分析方案後，去年春天起我們的平均售價提高了十五%。

toeic.example_en: Discount stacking erodes margin quickly, so always check the calculated final price before sending the quote.
toeic.example_zh: 折扣疊加會迅速侵蝕利潤，因此在寄送報價前務必檢查計算後的最終價格。

toeic.example_en: Refer to the approval matrix before promising any nonstandard payment terms to a prospective customer.
toeic.example_zh: 在向潛在客戶承諾任何非標準付款條件前，請先參照核准權限矩陣。

toeic.example_en: Submit a one-page deal memo summarizing pricing, risk, and timeline before requesting executive sponsorship.
toeic.example_zh: 在請求高層支持前，先提交一頁交易摘要備忘，整理定價、風險與時程。

toeic.example_en: Strong deal qualification at the start saves the team weeks of effort on opportunities unlikely to close.
toeic.example_zh: 案件初期嚴謹的交易資格審查，能為團隊省下數週投注在不可能成交機會上的精力。

toeic.example_en: Spend Friday afternoons on pipeline hygiene by updating close dates and removing stale opportunities entirely.
toeic.example_zh: 週五下午專注於業務管道清潔度，更新成交日期並徹底移除停滯機會。

toeic.example_en: Good CRM hygiene means every contact has a verified email, phone, and recent activity timestamp.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的 CRM 資料整潔度代表每筆聯絡人都有經驗證的電子郵件、電話與近期活動時間戳。

toeic.example_en: Each contact record should include role, decision-making influence, and last conversation summary for handoff continuity.
toeic.example_zh: 每筆聯絡人紀錄都應包含職稱、決策影響力及最近對話摘要，以維持交接連續性。

toeic.example_en: Link every opportunity to the parent account record so revenue reports roll up correctly each month.
toeic.example_zh: 把每個機會連結到母客戶帳戶紀錄，讓每月營收報表能正確匯總。

toeic.example_en: Update the opportunity record after every meaningful interaction with the buying committee or champion.
toeic.example_zh: 在每次與採購委員會或內部支持者有實質互動後更新機會紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Your activity log shows three calls and two emails last week, well above team minimum requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 你的活動紀錄顯示上週有三通電話與兩封郵件，遠高於團隊最低要求。

toeic.example_en: Sync the call log automatically from the dialer so managers see real conversation duration and frequency.
toeic.example_zh: 讓通話紀錄從撥號系統自動同步，主管即可看到真實的對話時長與頻率。

toeic.example_en: Email tracking shows the prospect opened your proposal twice yesterday, suggesting strong internal review activity.
toeic.example_zh: 郵件追蹤顯示潛在客戶昨天打開你的提案兩次，暗示有積極的內部審查活動。

toeic.example_en: Disable open tracking when emailing security-sensitive contacts because their filters often strip tracking pixels automatically.
toeic.example_zh: 向資安敏感的聯絡人寄信時請關閉開信追蹤，因為他們的過濾器常會自動移除追蹤像素。

toeic.example_en: Link tracking on the pricing page reveals which prospects are seriously evaluating costs before booking demos.
toeic.example_zh: 定價頁的連結點擊追蹤可揭示哪些潛在客戶在預約示範前正認真評估成本。

toeic.example_en: The fit score combines company size, industry, and tech stack to predict probability of closing.
toeic.example_zh: 契合度分數結合公司規模、產業與技術組合，用以預測成交機率。

toeic.example_en: Tag every new lead source accurately so marketing can measure return on each campaign by channel.
toeic.example_zh: 正確標記每個新潛在客戶來源，讓行銷能依管道衡量各活動的回報。

toeic.example_en: Change the lead status to contacted only after at least one two-way conversation has occurred.
toeic.example_zh: 只有在至少進行過一次雙向對話之後，才把潛在客戶狀態改為已接觸。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 潛在客戶資料擷取表單
toeic.example_en: Keep the lead capture form to four fields because each extra question reduces submission rates noticeably.
toeic.example_zh: 將潛在客戶資料擷取表單維持在四個欄位，因為每多一題提交率都會明顯下降。

toeic.example_en: Third-party enrichment data adds company headcount and revenue automatically when a new lead enters the database.
toeic.example_zh: 新潛在客戶進入資料庫時，第三方補充資料會自動加入公司員工數與營收。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly data hygiene audits remove duplicates and standardize titles so reporting remains trustworthy for leadership.
toeic.example_zh: 每季的資料清潔度稽核會移除重複資料並統一職稱，使報表持續可信賴給領導層使用。

toeic.example_en: Merge any duplicate record immediately so two reps never accidentally pursue the same prospect simultaneously.
toeic.example_zh: 立即合併任何重複紀錄，避免兩位業務不慎同時開發相同潛在客戶。

toeic.example_en: Automated deduplication runs every Sunday to keep our contact database from accumulating redundant records.
toeic.example_zh: 自動化去除重複資料每週日執行，避免我們的聯絡資料庫累積冗餘紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Submit your daily activity report by six in the evening listing calls, emails, and meetings booked.
toeic.example_zh: 請於晚上六點前提交你的每日活動報告，列出當日電話、郵件以及預約的會議。

toeic.example_en: The weekly sales report summarizes pipeline movement, key wins, and risks heading into next Monday's review.
toeic.example_zh: 週度銷售報告總結業務管道進展、重要勝績及進入下週一檢討會的風險。

toeic.example_en: Keep a personal deal log noting champion sentiment and competitor mentions for every active enterprise opportunity.
toeic.example_zh: 為每個活躍企業機會保留一份個人案件日誌，記錄內部支持者態度與競爭對手提及狀況。

toeic.example_en: Posting closed deals to the wins board boosts morale and gives the team something visible to celebrate.
toeic.example_zh: 把成交案件貼到勝績榜能提振士氣，讓團隊有可見的事物可以慶祝。

toeic.example_en: The leaderboard updates every hour during sales sprints to keep healthy competition alive across regions.
toeic.example_zh: 業績排行榜在銷售衝刺期間每小時更新，讓跨區域維持健康的競爭氛圍。

toeic.example_en: Our two-week sales sprint targets logos in the financial services vertical with bonus payouts for closures.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為期兩週的銷售衝刺活動鎖定金融服務產業客戶，成交者另有額外獎金。

toeic.example_en: Every team holds a quarterly blitz day to clear the prospecting backlog and energize early-stage pipeline activity.
toeic.example_zh: 每個團隊每季都會舉辦集中陌生開發日，以清理開發名單並活絡早期業務管道活動。

toeic.example_en: Reserve the phone bank Thursday afternoon so reps can call seventy prospects in three uninterrupted hours.
toeic.example_zh: 週四下午預訂集中電訪室，讓業務能在三小時不間斷時間內撥打七十位潛在客戶。

toeic.example_en: Increase your daily talk time to ninety minutes if you want to consistently exceed quota next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 若想下季持續超越配額，把你每日通話總時間提高到九十分鐘。

toeic.example_en: Our connect rate jumped from eight to fifteen percent after switching to local-presence phone numbers.
toeic.example_zh: 在改用在地區號電話後，我們的接通率從八%上升到十五%。

toeic.example_en: Tuesday morning calls maintain the highest answer rate, with Wednesday afternoons showing a steep decline.
toeic.example_zh: 週二上午的電話接聽率最高，而週三下午則出現大幅下滑。

toeic.example_en: Confirmation texts the morning of demos cut our no-show rate roughly in half within one month.
toeic.example_zh: 示範當天早晨的確認簡訊大約在一個月內把我們的爽約率減半。

toeic.example_en: Meeting set is the primary metric for sales development reps before opportunities convert into qualified pipeline.
toeic.example_zh: 在機會轉為合格業務管道前，已預約會議數是銷售開發代表的主要指標。

toeic.example_en: Track both meetings set and meetings held since prospects sometimes book sessions they never actually attend.
toeic.example_zh: 同時追蹤已預約與已舉行會議數，因為潛在客戶有時會預約卻沒實際出席。

toeic.example_en: Only convert leads into a qualified opportunity once budget and timeline have been confirmed verbally.
toeic.example_zh: 只有在預算與時程已口頭確認後，才把潛在客戶轉為合格商機。

toeic.example_en: Healthy stage progression should average no more than two weeks between discovery and the first proposal.
toeic.example_zh: 健康的階段進展平均不應超過從探索到首份提案之間的兩週時間。

toeic.example_en: Any stalled deal without activity for thirty days requires manager review or removal from forecast.
toeic.example_zh: 任何停滯交易若三十天無活動，必須經主管檢視或從預測中移除。

toeic.example_en: Maintain deal momentum by scheduling the next meeting before leaving the previous one whenever possible.
toeic.example_zh: 盡可能在離開上一場會議前就排定下一場，以維持交易動能。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 採購委員會盤點圖
toeic.example_en: Build a buying committee map showing every stakeholder, their role, influence level, and known concerns.
toeic.example_zh: 建立採購委員會盤點圖，呈現每位利害關係人、職務、影響力與已知顧慮。

toeic.example_en: Champion building takes time but pays off when contracts require executive support during procurement negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 培養內部支持者需要時間，但當合約在採購談判中需高層支持時就會見效。

toeic.example_en: Identify an internal champion early who can advocate for your solution when you are not in the room.
toeic.example_zh: 及早辨識一位內部擁護者，能在你不在場時為你的解決方案發聲。

toeic.example_en: Executive alignment between both companies prevents misunderstandings about strategic priorities later in the contract term.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方公司的高層共識能避免合約後期對策略優先順序產生誤解。

toeic.example_en: Bring senior decision-makers to our executive briefing center for half-day deep dives on strategic roadmaps.
toeic.example_zh: 邀請資深決策者前往我們的高層簡報中心，進行半日策略路線圖深入交流。

toeic.example_en: Build a mutual action plan jointly with the prospect so accountability sits with both sides equally.
toeic.example_zh: 與潛在客戶共同建立雙方行動計畫，讓雙方平等承擔責任。

toeic.example_en: A detailed close plan lists every approval step required before contract signature, including legal and procurement.
toeic.example_zh: 詳盡的成交計畫列出簽約前所需的每個核准步驟，包括法務與採購。

toeic.example_en: Ask the prospect about their typical signature loop so you can predict timing for procurement and legal.
toeic.example_zh: 詢問潛在客戶他們一般的簽署流程，以便預估採購與法務所需時間。

toeic.example_en: Most enterprise contracts now move through e-signature platforms within forty-eight hours of final terms agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數企業合約現在會在最終條款達成共識的四十八小時內，透過電子簽名平台完成簽署。

toeic.example_en: Send the contract redline to your legal team before negotiating any non-standard liability clauses with the customer.
toeic.example_zh: 在與客戶談判任何非標準責任條款前，先把合約修訂標記送交給你的法務團隊。

toeic.example_en: Longer term length usually unlocks better unit pricing because the cost of acquisition is spread further.
toeic.example_zh: 較長的合約期限長度通常能換得較佳的單位定價，因為獲客成本能更加攤平。

toeic.example_en: Review the autorenewal clause carefully because some require ninety days written notice for cancellation.
toeic.example_zh: 仔細檢視自動續約條款，因為某些條款要求提前九十天以書面通知取消。

toeic.example_en: The opt-out clause grants the customer ninety days to exit if quarterly performance metrics fall short.
toeic.example_zh: 退出選擇權條款讓客戶可在每季績效指標未達標時於九十天內退出。

toeic.example_en: Structuring a ramp deal lowers initial costs for the buyer while protecting your total contract value.
toeic.example_zh: 規劃漸進付款合約能降低買方初期成本，同時保護你的合約總價值。

toeic.example_en: Step-up pricing eases the buyer into full cost while still locking in the multiyear commitment we need.
toeic.example_zh: 分段提價讓買家逐步適應全額成本，同時鎖定我們所需的多年期承諾。

toeic.example_en: Customers hesitate at rip and replace because of switching costs, so phased migrations often work better.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶因轉換成本而對全面汰換取代猶豫，因此分階段遷移通常效果較好。

toeic.example_en: Suggest a thirty-day pilot rollout with one department to demonstrate impact before company-wide deployment begins.
toeic.example_zh: 在全公司部署前，建議先以單一部門進行三十天試行推廣以證明成效。

toeic.example_en: Run a proof of value tied to three success metrics agreed by both teams before pricing discussions resume.
toeic.example_zh: 在重啟定價討論前，先進行與雙方共識的三項成功指標相連的價值驗證。

toeic.example_en: Document success criteria in writing so both teams measure pilot outcomes against the same agreed benchmarks.
toeic.example_zh: 以書面記錄成功標準，讓雙方團隊以相同共識基準衡量試行成果。

toeic.example_en: Limit the evaluation period to thirty days because longer trials rarely improve conversion to paid customers.
toeic.example_zh: 將評估期限制在三十天，因為更長的試用並不會提升轉化為付費客戶的比率。

toeic.example_en: A guided trial with weekly check-ins converts at twice the rate of unsupported self-serve trials.
toeic.example_zh: 每週有確認對談的引導式試用，其轉換率是無支援自助試用的兩倍。

toeic.example_en: Provision a sandbox account so the technical buyer can validate integrations without affecting their production environment.
toeic.example_zh: 提供沙盒測試帳戶，讓技術買家能驗證整合而不影響其正式環境。

toeic.example_en: Walk through the implementation plan during the final sales meeting so the customer feels confident signing.
toeic.example_zh: 在最後一次銷售會議中逐步介紹導入計畫，讓客戶安心簽約。

toeic.example_en: Confirm the go-live date in writing because customer-facing announcements often depend on this specific milestone.
toeic.example_zh: 以書面確認上線日期，因為對外公告通常取決於這個具體里程碑。

toeic.example_en: The onboarding plan covers training, integrations, and first-value milestones across the customer's initial sixty days.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶導入計畫涵蓋客戶最初六十天內的訓練、整合與首次價值里程碑。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 啟動會議簡報投影片
toeic.example_en: Update the kickoff deck slides with this customer's branding so the session feels properly tailored.
toeic.example_zh: 用此客戶品牌調性更新啟動會議簡報投影片，讓會議感覺已恰當客製。

toeic.example_en: Send a brief win wire to the broader team summarizing why we won and what the customer purchased.
toeic.example_zh: 向更大範圍的團隊寄出簡短勝績通知，總結我們為何獲勝及客戶購買了什麼。

toeic.example_en: Loss wires should include the reason, competitor chosen, and any lessons applicable to similar future opportunities.
toeic.example_zh: 失單通知應包含原因、被選擇的競爭對手以及任何適用於未來類似機會的教訓。

toeic.example_en: Log every competitor mention so product marketing can refine positioning against the most frequently raised alternatives.
toeic.example_zh: 記錄每次競爭對手提及，讓產品行銷能針對最常被提到的替代方案精修定位。

toeic.example_en: Our biggest differentiator remains the open API, which competitors charge extra for or do not offer at all.
toeic.example_zh: 我們最大的差異化亮點仍是開放 API，競爭對手通常需另外收費或根本未提供。

toeic.example_en: Have a proof point list ready, including customer outcomes and analyst rankings, to support every claim made.
toeic.example_zh: 備好一份佐證清單，包含客戶成果與分析師排名，以支援每項提出的主張。

toeic.example_en: Line up two customer references in the same industry before the prospect's final evaluation meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 在潛在客戶最終評估會議前，安排兩位同產業的客戶參考。

toeic.example_en: A reference customer call often removes the last doubt holding senior decision-makers back from signing.
toeic.example_zh: 一通客戶參考通話往往能消除讓資深決策者不願簽約的最後一絲疑慮。

toeic.example_en: Send the manufacturing case study deck before the second meeting since the buyer leads a similar transformation initiative.
toeic.example_zh: 在第二次會議前寄出製造業案例研究簡報，因為買家正主導類似的轉型計畫。

toeic.example_en: Include the logo slide showing peer companies early in the deck to establish credibility quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 在簡報前段加入展示同業客戶的客戶標誌頁，以迅速建立可信度。

toeic.example_en: Display key trust signals such as security certifications prominently on the pricing page and proposal cover.
toeic.example_zh: 在定價頁與提案封面顯眼處展示關鍵信任信號，例如資安認證。

toeic.example_en: Complete the security questionnaire within three business days to avoid delaying procurement on the buyer's side.
toeic.example_zh: 在三個營業日內完成資安問卷，以免延誤買方的採購流程。

toeic.example_en: Upload the signed master agreement to their procurement portal so payment processing can begin immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 把已簽署的主合約上傳至他們的採購系統入口，付款處理才能立刻開始。

toeic.example_en: Allow at least two weeks for vendor registration since some enterprises require multiple compliance approvals first.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商登錄至少留兩週時間，因為部分企業需先取得多項合規核准。

toeic.example_en: Confirm invoicing terms during negotiation so finance can issue accurate documents on the agreed billing schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 在談判中確認開立發票條件，財務才能依約定計費時程開出正確文件。

toeic.example_en: Always collect the billing contact information separately because procurement and accounts payable rarely share staff.
toeic.example_zh: 務必另外蒐集帳務聯絡人資訊，因為採購與應付帳款部門通常人員不同。

toeic.example_en: The purchasing department typically reviews any contract above twenty-five thousand dollars before final signature.
toeic.example_zh: 採購部門通常會在最終簽署前審查任何超過兩萬五千美元的合約。

toeic.example_en: Help your champion build a strong purchase justification with hard numbers and projected operational savings.
toeic.example_zh: 用具體數字與預估營運節省，協助你的內部支持者撰寫強而有力的採購理由說明。

toeic.example_en: Ask early who the actual budget holder is because procurement and the budget holder are sometimes different people.
toeic.example_zh: 及早詢問誰是真正的預算負責人，因為採購與預算負責人有時是不同的人。

toeic.example_en: Department heads often have discretionary spend authority up to ten thousand dollars without committee approval needed.
toeic.example_zh: 部門主管通常擁有最高一萬美元的可裁量支出權限，無需委員會核准。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 投資報酬試算工具
toeic.example_en: Share the ROI calculator tool with your champion so they can run their own internal numbers confidently.
toeic.example_zh: 把投資報酬試算工具分享給你的內部支持者，讓他們能自信地跑出自己的內部數字。

toeic.example_en: Build a conservative savings projection because finance teams discount overly optimistic numbers from any sales presentation.
toeic.example_zh: 建立保守的節省金額預估，因為財務團隊會折扣任何銷售簡報中過於樂觀的數字。

toeic.example_en: The TCO comparison shows annual savings of forty thousand dollars compared to maintaining the current legacy stack.
toeic.example_zh: 總擁有成本比較顯示比起維持目前的傳統系統，每年可節省四萬美元。

toeic.example_en: Complete the deal review checklist before every forecast call so managers can challenge weak assumptions directly.
toeic.example_zh: 在每次預測會議前完成交易審核清單，讓主管能直接挑戰薄弱的假設。

toeic.example_en: Understanding the sales hierarchy helps reps know when to involve their manager or regional vice president directly.
toeic.example_zh: 了解銷售組織層級能幫助業務知道何時直接邀請主管或區域副總裁加入。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly territory assignment changes can disrupt momentum, so handoffs require detailed account history documentation.
toeic.example_zh: 每季的區域分派調整可能打斷工作節奏，因此交接時需要詳細的客戶歷程文件。

toeic.example_en: Our geo split now follows time zones rather than country boundaries to improve same-day response coverage.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的區域分配方式現在依時區而非國家邊界劃分，以改善同日回應的涵蓋率。

toeic.example_en: Each vertical specialist focuses on one industry, building deep expertise that horizontal generalists cannot easily replicate.
toeic.example_zh: 每位垂直產業專員專注於單一產業，建立水平通才無法輕易複製的深厚專業。

toeic.example_en: Our inside sales team handles every account below five thousand dollars in annual recurring revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的內勤銷售團隊負責處理所有年度經常性收入低於五千美元的客戶。

toeic.example_en: Field sales reps travel two or three days weekly to meet enterprise prospects in person across the region.
toeic.example_zh: 外勤銷售每週出差兩到三天，親自會見區域內的企業潛在客戶。

toeic.example_en: Channel sales now represent forty percent of total bookings, up from twenty-five percent three years ago.
toeic.example_zh: 通路銷售目前占總簽約金額的四十%，較三年前的二十五%大幅成長。

toeic.example_en: Tag any partner-led deal at registration so commission splits are calculated correctly without manual finance intervention.
toeic.example_zh: 在登錄時標記任何夥伴主導交易，佣金分配才能正確計算而無須財務人工介入。

toeic.example_en: Partners must submit the deal registration form within five days of identifying any new qualified opportunity.
toeic.example_zh: 夥伴必須在識別新合格機會後五天內提交交易登錄表單。

toeic.example_en: Always thank the introducer publicly once a deal closes because future referrals depend on visible appreciation.
toeic.example_zh: 案件成交後務必公開感謝引介者，因為未來的推薦取決於明顯的感謝表示。

toeic.example_en: Booth duty rotates every two hours so reps stay energetic during long event days and crowded hallways.
toeic.example_zh: 攤位輪值每兩小時輪換一次，讓業務在漫長的活動日與擁擠走廊間維持活力。

toeic.example_en: Every badge scan at the booth automatically creates a follow-up task in the CRM within thirty minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 攤位上每次識別證掃描都會在三十分鐘內自動於 CRM 建立跟進任務。

toeic.example_en: Each event lead should receive a personalized follow-up email within forty-eight hours of the conference closing.
toeic.example_zh: 每位活動潛在客戶應在會議結束後四十八小時內收到一封個人化跟進郵件。

toeic.example_en: Strong post-event follow-up turns roughly one in five booth conversations into a scheduled discovery meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的會後跟進大約能把攤位上五分之一的對話轉為已預約的探索會議。

toeic.example_en: The webinar funnel generates around two hundred qualified leads per month with consistent topic and speaker selection.
toeic.example_zh: 在主題與講者選擇一致的情況下，網路研討會漏斗每月約能產出兩百筆合格潛在客戶。

toeic.example_en: Filter the attendee list by job title before exporting to prioritize outreach toward true decision-making roles.
toeic.example_zh: 匯出前依職稱篩選出席者名單，以便優先針對真正具有決策權的職務進行接觸。

toeic.example_en: A warm follow-up referencing the prospect's question during the webinar Q and A often outperforms generic outreach significantly.
toeic.example_zh: 在後續聯繫中提及潛在客戶在研討會問答時的問題，效果通常遠優於通用接觸。

toeic.example_en: Set a follow-up cadence of three touches across two weeks before pausing outreach on an unresponsive lead.
toeic.example_zh: 設定兩週內三次接觸的跟進節奏，若潛在客戶仍無回應再暫停接觸。

toeic.example_en: A polite breakup email often revives unresponsive prospects because nobody likes being silently removed from a conversation.
toeic.example_zh: 禮貌的結束聯繫郵件常能讓無回應的潛在客戶重新回覆，因為沒人喜歡被默默移出對話。

toeic.example_en: Send a quarterly reengagement message featuring new product capabilities to keep dormant prospects warm and informed.
toeic.example_zh: 每季寄送介紹新產品功能的重新接觸訊息，讓沉睡的潛在客戶持續保持溫度且知情。

toeic.example_en: Review dormant leads from twelve months ago every quarter since priorities and budgets often change unexpectedly.
toeic.example_zh: 每季檢視十二個月前的沉睡潛在客戶，因為優先事項與預算常會意外改變。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 失敗潛在客戶回收再利用
toeic.example_en: Our lost-lead recycling motion converts roughly eight percent of past closed-lost opportunities into new pipeline annually.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的失敗潛在客戶回收再利用機制，每年將過去約八%的失單機會轉為新業務管道。

toeic.example_en: Cold-lead nurture sequences run for ninety days with educational content before reps consider new outreach attempts.
toeic.example_zh: 冷潛在客戶培育序列以教育性內容運行九十天，業務再評估是否新一輪接觸。

toeic.example_en: Roll out a sales playbook update every quarter incorporating fresh competitor intelligence and recent customer success patterns.
toeic.example_zh: 每季推出一次銷售手冊更新，納入最新的競爭情報與近期客戶成功模式。

toeic.example_en: The messaging guide standardizes language across all customer touch points to maintain a consistent value narrative.
toeic.example_zh: 訊息指引讓所有客戶接觸點的語言統一，以維持一致的價值敘事。

toeic.example_en: Practice your elevator pitch script aloud until you can deliver it naturally within thirty seconds.
toeic.example_zh: 把你的電梯簡報腳本大聲練習，直到能在三十秒內自然講完。

toeic.example_en: Start every email with a clear value statement so the recipient instantly understands why the conversation matters.
toeic.example_zh: 每封郵件開頭都用清楚的價值陳述，讓收件人立刻明白為何這場對話有意義。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 潛在客戶培育郵件
toeic.example_en: Use lead nurturing email content to share helpful resources rather than pushing for an immediate sales meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 用潛在客戶培育郵件分享有用資源，而非急著推動立即銷售會議。

toeic.example_en: Subject line testing this quarter showed question-style openings double the open rate over statement-style ones.
toeic.example_zh: 本季的主旨測試顯示，問題式開頭的開信率是陳述式開頭的兩倍。

toeic.example_en: Every personalization token must point to a verified field, or the recipient sees an embarrassing placeholder name.
toeic.example_zh: 每個個人化變數都必須指向已驗證的欄位，否則收件人會看到尷尬的預設占位符名稱。

toeic.example_en: Pause sequence enrollment whenever the prospect replies so you avoid sending automated messages over a real conversation.
toeic.example_zh: 潛在客戶一回覆就暫停自動序列加入，避免在真實對話中疊加自動化訊息。

toeic.example_en: Throttle daily email volume to one hundred per inbox to maintain a healthy sender reputation over time.
toeic.example_zh: 把每個信箱的每日寄信量限制傳送速率在一百封，以長期維持健康的寄件人信譽。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 最佳寄送時間調整
toeic.example_en: Send time optimization shows that Tuesday mornings produce the highest reply rates across our enterprise prospect database.
toeic.example_zh: 最佳寄送時間調整顯示，週二上午在我們的企業潛在客戶資料庫中回覆率最高。

toeic.example_en: Strong bounce rate management keeps our deliverability above ninety-seven percent across every regional sales territory.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的退信率管理讓我們在每個區域銷售區的送達率都維持在九十七%以上。

toeic.example_en: Watch the unsubscribe rate carefully because anything above one percent signals targeting or content relevance issues.
toeic.example_zh: 仔細注意退訂率，因為超過一%即代表鎖定或內容相關性出現問題。

toeic.example_en: Even one spam complaint can damage sender reputation, so always honor unsubscribe requests within the same hour.
toeic.example_zh: 即使一封垃圾郵件投訴也可能損害寄件人信譽，因此務必在同小時內處理退訂請求。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly list hygiene removes invalid emails so campaigns reach engaged contacts and protect our delivery rates.
toeic.example_zh: 每季的名單清潔度作業會移除無效郵件，讓行銷活動觸及有互動的聯絡人並保護送達率。

toeic.example_en: List segmentation by industry allows tailored case studies to accompany every campaign for higher relevance and reply rates.
toeic.example_zh: 依產業切分名單讓每個行銷活動都能搭配量身案例，提升相關性與回覆率。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 理想客戶輪廓定義
toeic.example_en: Sharpen the ICP definition each year because product-market fit shifts as new features expand your addressable buyers.
toeic.example_zh: 每年精修理想客戶輪廓定義，因為新功能擴大可接觸買家時產品市場契合度會變動。

toeic.example_en: Each buyer persona profile lists motivations, daily pain points, preferred channels, and common decision-making criteria.
toeic.example_zh: 每份買家角色檔案列出動機、日常痛點、偏好管道與常見決策標準。

toeic.example_en: The named account list this year focuses on the top three hundred companies most likely to renew long term.
toeic.example_zh: 今年的指名客戶清單聚焦在最有可能長期續約的前三百家公司。

toeic.example_en: Account tiering helps reps allocate time so platinum accounts receive in-person quarterly business reviews and tier-three accounts receive digital touches.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶分層幫助業務分配時間，使白金客戶獲得實體季度業務檢討，第三層客戶則以數位接觸維繫。

toeic.example_en: Run a white space analysis for each top account to identify products customers have not yet adopted.
toeic.example_zh: 為每個重點客戶執行一次空白市場分析，找出客戶尚未採用的產品。

toeic.example_en: Focus next quarter on share of wallet expansion since acquiring new logos is more expensive than growing existing relationships.
toeic.example_zh: 下季聚焦在錢包占比擴展，因為獲取新客戶比擴展既有關係更昂貴。

toeic.example_en: Deal acceleration tactics include limited-time pricing or early-payer incentives offered only with executive approval each quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 加速成交手段包括限時定價或提早付款激勵，每季僅在高層核准下提供。

toeic.example_en: Avoid making month-end push your only motion because buyers eventually learn to wait for last-minute concessions.
toeic.example_zh: 避免把月底衝刺當作唯一策略，因為買家最終會學會等你給最後一刻的讓步。

toeic.example_en: During quota crunch, managers should focus on closing late-stage opportunities rather than starting fresh prospecting initiatives.
toeic.example_zh: 在配額壓力期間，主管應聚焦在結案後期機會，而非啟動新一輪陌生開發。

toeic.example_en: Avoid quoting unsustainable discounts during the end-of-quarter rush because future renewals will reset at the same baseline.
toeic.example_zh: 季末衝刺期間避免報出無法持續的折扣，因為未來續約會以同樣的基準重置。

toeic.example_en: The spiff payout for closing five new logos this month is an additional five hundred dollars per deal.
toeic.example_zh: 本月每成交一筆新客戶可額外獲得五百美元的銷售獎金支付。

toeic.example_en: MBO bonus payments depend on three personal goals set with your manager at the start of each quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 目標管理獎金支付取決於每季初與主管設定的三項個人目標。

toeic.example_en: The annual sales recognition program flies top performers and their guests to a destination resort each January.
toeic.example_zh: 年度銷售表彰計畫每年一月安排頂尖業務及其賓客前往度假勝地。

toeic.example_en: Average rep tenure increased to three years after our new comp plan launched and onboarding processes improved.
toeic.example_zh: 在新薪酬計畫推行與導入流程改進後，平均業務年資提升至三年。

toeic.example_en: Standard ramp time is six months before a new rep is expected to carry full quota responsibility.
toeic.example_zh: 標準上手期為六個月，之後才會期望新業務承擔完整配額責任。

toeic.example_en: Celebrate the first deal milestone publicly so every new hire feels supported during their critical early months.
toeic.example_zh: 公開慶祝首單里程碑，讓每位新進在關鍵初期都感到被支持。

toeic.example_en: Reps complete a sales certification covering objection handling and pricing before delivering live customer demonstrations independently.
toeic.example_zh: 業務需完成涵蓋異議處理與定價的銷售認證，才能獨立進行正式客戶示範。

toeic.example_en: The discovery framework lists eight questions every rep must answer before forecasting any opportunity above ten thousand dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 探索流程框架列出八項問題，業務在預測任何超過一萬美元的機會前必須回答。

toeic.example_en: Display the sales process map prominently so new hires understand expectations at every stage of the buyer journey.
toeic.example_zh: 把銷售流程圖明顯展示，讓新進人員了解買家旅程每個階段的期望。

toeic.example_en: Match every piece of content to a specific buyer journey stage so messaging always matches reader intent.
toeic.example_zh: 把每份內容對應到具體的買家旅程階段，讓訊息始終符合讀者意圖。

toeic.example_en: Smooth marketing handoff requires clear definitions of qualified leads agreed upon by both teams quarterly.
toeic.example_zh: 順暢的行銷交接需要雙方團隊每季就合格潛在客戶的清楚定義達成共識。

toeic.example_en: Document the service-level agreement between teams to ensure marketing-qualified leads receive sales follow-up within two business days.
toeic.example_zh: 把跨團隊服務協議書面化，確保行銷合格潛在客戶在兩個營業日內獲得銷售跟進。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 行銷與銷售協作會議
toeic.example_en: The weekly smarketing meeting bridges sales and marketing teams to align on goals, campaigns, and lead quality.
toeic.example_zh: 每週的行銷與銷售協作會議讓兩個團隊在目標、活動與潛客品質上保持一致。

toeic.example_en: Assign one deal owner per opportunity to prevent confusion when multiple stakeholders engage with the prospect simultaneously.
toeic.example_zh: 為每個機會指派一位案件負責人，避免多位利害關係人同時接觸潛在客戶造成混亂。

toeic.example_en: Account ownership disputes should escalate to sales operations for resolution within forty-eight hours of reporting.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶歸屬爭議應在通報後四十八小時內升級至銷售營運部解決。

toeic.example_en: Territory conflict drops dramatically once geographic rules are documented and exception requests follow a formal approval process.
toeic.example_zh: 在地理規則書面化並讓例外請求走正式核准流程後，區域衝突會大幅減少。

toeic.example_en: Document the deal split agreement in writing so commission disputes do not arise after the contract closes.
toeic.example_zh: 以書面記錄案件分潤協議，避免合約成交後才出現佣金爭議。

toeic.example_en: Any commission dispute must be filed within thirty days of payout, with supporting documentation attached.
toeic.example_zh: 任何佣金爭議必須在發放後三十天內提出申訴，並附上佐證文件。

toeic.example_en: New reps receive a draw against commission during ramp so income remains stable while pipeline is still building.
toeic.example_zh: 新業務在上手期領取佣金預支，讓業務管道建立期間收入仍穩定。

toeic.example_en: Activity metrics include calls, emails, and meetings booked, providing early signals before bookings results emerge.
toeic.example_zh: 活動指標包含電話、郵件與已預約會議，能在簽約結果浮現前提供早期信號。

toeic.example_en: Use the weekly one-on-one to review top three deals, blockers, and personal development goals for the rep.
toeic.example_zh: 利用每週一對一檢視前三大案件、阻礙與業務個人發展目標。

toeic.example_en: Each deal review session walks through MEDDIC checkpoints to validate forecast quality before the quarterly board update.
toeic.example_zh: 每場案件審議會議逐項檢視 MEDDIC 檢查點，以在季度董事會更新前驗證預測品質。

toeic.example_en: End every meeting with a clear next-step commitment so the prospect leaves with a defined action item.
toeic.example_zh: 每場會議都以明確的下一步承諾結束，讓潛在客戶帶著清楚的待辦事項離開。

toeic.example_en: Begin every customer meeting with agenda alignment so both sides agree on time spent and expected outcomes.
toeic.example_zh: 每次客戶會議開始時先進行議程共識，讓雙方對時間運用與預期成果達成一致。

toeic.example_en: Establish an upfront contract clarifying meeting goals, time, and possible decisions before any discovery questions begin.
toeic.example_zh: 在任何探索式提問前，先建立預先約定條件，釐清會議目標、時間與可能決策。

toeic.example_en: Every team benefits from a deal whisperer, a quiet veteran who pattern-matches against thousands of past opportunities.
toeic.example_zh: 每個團隊都受益於一位交易耳語顧問，他是位低調的資深者，能從上千個過去機會中比對模式。

toeic.example_en: Ask your deal coach to join the next call with the buyer's chief financial officer for executive support.
toeic.example_zh: 請你的案件教練加入下一通與買方財務長的電話，提供高層支援。

toeic.example_en: The executive sponsor program pairs each strategic account with one of our senior leaders for relationship continuity.
toeic.example_zh: 高層贊助計畫為每個策略客戶搭配一位我們的資深領導，以維持關係連續性。

toeic.example_en: Our customer advisory board meets twice yearly to provide direct feedback shaping the upcoming product roadmap.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的客戶顧問委員會每年聚會兩次，提供直接影響即將推出產品路線圖的意見。

toeic.example_en: A genuine user reference from a daily user can resonate more strongly than executive testimonials with technical evaluators.
toeic.example_zh: 來自日常使用者的真實使用者推薦，對技術評估者來說可能比高層推薦更有說服力。

toeic.example_en: Run a competitive teardown each quarter so reps can speak confidently about strengths and known limitations of rivals.
toeic.example_zh: 每季進行一次競品拆解分析，讓業務能自信地討論對手的優勢與已知限制。

toeic.example_en: Once feature parity has been reached, the conversation shifts to service quality, roadmap, and customer success investment.
toeic.example_zh: 一旦功能對等達成，對話便轉向服務品質、路線圖與客戶成功的投資。

toeic.example_en: The first land deal can be small as long as it opens the path for future departmental expansion.
toeic.example_zh: 首單成交可以小，只要能開啟未來部門擴展的途徑。

toeic.example_en: Expansion deals typically close twice as fast as new logo opportunities because trust is already firmly established.
toeic.example_zh: 擴展成交通常比新客戶機會快兩倍成交，因為信任已穩固建立。

toeic.example_en: Logo deals carry strategic weight even when small because they create marketing case studies for future enterprise prospects.
toeic.example_zh: 新客戶成交即使規模小也具策略意義，因為能為未來企業潛在客戶創造行銷案例。

toeic.example_en: Securing one marquee customer in healthcare can unlock dozens of similar conversations within that competitive industry.
toeic.example_zh: 在醫療業拿下一個旗艦客戶，能在那個競爭產業內帶來數十個類似對話機會。

toeic.example_en: A lighthouse account guides other prospects through visible success, making future sales conversations significantly easier to start.
toeic.example_zh: 燈塔指標客戶以可見的成功引導其他潛在客戶，讓未來銷售對話更容易展開。

toeic.example_en: An anchor customer in each vertical provides credibility plus reference power for years of subsequent regional expansion.
toeic.example_zh: 每個垂直產業有一位標竿客戶，可為後續多年的區域擴展提供信譽與推薦力量。

toeic.example_en: Treat a verbal commit as encouraging but never forecast closure until written approval reaches procurement at the prospect.
toeic.example_zh: 把口頭承諾視為正面信號，但在潛在客戶採購收到書面核准前，不要預測為成交。

toeic.example_en: Some procurement teams require a letter of authorization before they will release payment against your invoice.
toeic.example_zh: 部分採購團隊要求先有授權書，才願意依你的發票釋出付款。

toeic.example_en: The purchase commitment letter from finance secured budget while procurement worked through final contract terms in parallel.
toeic.example_zh: 財務出具的採購承諾函鎖定了預算，採購則同步處理最終合約條款。

toeic.example_en: Use the signature date rather than the effective date when calculating sales commission for the closing quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 計算結算季佣金時，使用簽署日期而非生效日期。

toeic.example_en: Confirm the contract start date matches the customer's go-live readiness so billing aligns with actual platform usage.
toeic.example_zh: 確認合約開始日期與客戶上線就緒時間一致，使帳單與實際平台使用時點對齊。

toeic.example_en: Delay the service start date by two weeks if onboarding resources are not available immediately after signature.
toeic.example_zh: 若簽約後導入資源無法立即就位，可將服務起算日延後兩週。

toeic.example_en: Send the deal closure email to the customer success team within one hour of contract execution and completion.
toeic.example_zh: 在合約簽署完成後一小時內，把成交通知郵件寄給客戶成功團隊。

toeic.example_en: Write a heartfelt celebration email to your champion after closing because relationships drive future expansion opportunities significantly.
toeic.example_zh: 成交後寫一封真誠的慶祝郵件給你的內部支持者，因為關係能大幅推動未來擴展機會。

toeic.example_en: Send a thoughtful closing gift under fifty dollars so champions remember the partnership beyond the contract itself.
toeic.example_zh: 寄送五十美元以下的貼心成交賀禮，讓內部支持者對合作的印象超越合約本身。

toeic.example_en: Every attendee received a printed program and a complimentary tote bag at the registration counter.
toeic.example_zh: 每位與會者在報到櫃台都收到一份印製議程和一個免費的手提袋。

toeic.example_en: Each registrant must present a confirmation email at the entrance to collect their conference materials.
toeic.example_zh: 每位報名者必須在入口處出示確認電子郵件才能領取會議資料。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大型展覽會；博覽會
toeic.example_en: Our company will exhibit new products at the international technology expo in Berlin next month.
toeic.example_zh: 我們公司下個月將在柏林舉行的國際科技博覽會上展示新產品。

toeic.example_en: The luxury car showroom on the main floor attracted hundreds of curious buyers throughout the weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 主樓層的豪華汽車展示廳整個週末吸引了數百位好奇的買家。

toeic.example_en: Our team will exhibit three new software products at the booth located near the main entrance.
toeic.example_zh: 我們團隊將在靠近主入口處的攤位展示三款新軟體產品。

toeic.example_en: The annual exhibition draws thousands of buyers and industry professionals from across the Asia-Pacific region.
toeic.example_zh: 年度展覽吸引了來自亞太地區數千位買家和產業專業人士。

toeic.example_en: Please review the venue layout carefully so attendees can find their assigned breakout rooms easily.
toeic.example_zh: 請仔細查看場地配置，這樣與會者才能輕鬆找到指定的分組討論室。

toeic.example_en: Booth assignment confirmations will be sent to all exhibitors no later than two weeks before opening.
toeic.example_zh: 攤位分配確認將在開展前兩週內寄送給所有參展商。

toeic.example_en: Please ensure booth staff arrive one hour early for briefing and uniform distribution on opening day.
toeic.example_zh: 請確保攤位工作人員在開展日提早一小時抵達進行簡報和制服發放。

toeic.example_en: Download the trade show floor map from the official app to locate exhibitors and amenities quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 請從官方應用程式下載展場樓層地圖，以便快速找到參展商和便利設施。

toeic.example_en: The exhibitor manual contains essential information about move-in procedures, equipment rental, and shipping deadlines.
toeic.example_zh: 參展商手冊包含進場流程、設備租賃和運送截止日期等重要資訊。

toeic.example_en: Check the online exhibitor list before arrival to plan which booths you want to visit first.
toeic.example_zh: 抵達前請查看線上參展商名單，規劃想要優先拜訪的攤位。

toeic.example_en: Journalists with a valid press badge may attend any session and access the dedicated media lounge.
toeic.example_zh: 持有有效媒體識別證的記者可參加任何場次並使用專屬媒體休息室。

toeic.example_en: The registration fee covers all sessions, lunch on both days, and the networking reception in the evening.
toeic.example_zh: 報名費包含所有場次、兩天的午餐和傍晚的交流招待會。

toeic.example_en: Sign up before the end of March to take advantage of our discounted early-bird rate.
toeic.example_zh: 請在三月底前報名以享受我們的早鳥優惠價。

toeic.example_en: On-site registration is available, but we strongly recommend signing up online to avoid lengthy queues.
toeic.example_zh: 現場報名仍可受理，但我們強烈建議線上報名以避免排隊等候。

toeic.example_en: Pre-registration closes on Friday, after which late registration fees will apply automatically to applicants.
toeic.example_zh: 預先報名於週五截止，之後將自動向申請者收取逾期報名費。

toeic.example_en: Your conference pass grants entry to all keynote presentations and workshops over the three-day event.
toeic.example_zh: 您的會議通行證可進入為期三天活動的所有主題演講和工作坊。

toeic.example_en: Visitors who only want to attend Friday sessions can purchase a discounted day pass at reception.
toeic.example_zh: 只想參加週五場次的訪客可在接待處購買優惠的一日通行證。

toeic.example_en: The full pass includes admission to every session, the gala dinner, and post-event content downloads.
toeic.example_zh: 全日程通行證包含每一場次、晚宴和會後內容下載的入場資格。

toeic.example_en: Our sponsors received ten complimentary passes to distribute among their most valuable customers and prospects.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的贊助商獲得十張免費通行證，可分發給他們最有價值的客戶和潛在客戶。

toeic.example_en: The impressive speaker lineup includes industry leaders, academic researchers, and innovative entrepreneurs from around the world.
toeic.example_zh: 強大的講者陣容包括來自世界各地的產業領袖、學術研究人員和創新企業家。

toeic.example_en: Our guest speaker will share insights from her twenty-year career leading marketing teams at multinational corporations.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的特邀講者將分享她二十年來在跨國企業領導行銷團隊的見解。

toeic.example_en: This year we are honored to welcome several featured speakers from leading universities and research institutions.
toeic.example_zh: 今年我們很榮幸歡迎來自頂尖大學和研究機構的多位特色講者。

toeic.example_en: The afternoon panel session focuses on sustainable manufacturing practices and how companies can reduce environmental impact.
toeic.example_zh: 下午的座談會場次聚焦永續製造實務以及企業如何降低環境影響。

toeic.example_en: The panel topic this morning is how remote work has permanently changed corporate culture and team dynamics.
toeic.example_zh: 今早的座談會主題是遠距工作如何永久改變企業文化和團隊動態。

toeic.example_en: The session chair will introduce each speaker briefly and ensure the schedule stays on track throughout.
toeic.example_zh: 場次主持人將簡短介紹每位講者，並確保整場議程按時進行。

toeic.example_en: Please proceed to session room B for the cybersecurity workshop starting at ten thirty this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 請前往B會議室參加今早十點三十分開始的網路安全工作坊。

toeic.example_en: The speaker fee was higher than expected, but the marketing value of his appearance justified the cost.
toeic.example_zh: 講者費用比預期高，但他出席的行銷價值足以證明這筆支出合理。

toeic.example_en: Speaker prep includes a technical rehearsal in the main hall and a briefing with the moderator.
toeic.example_zh: 講者準備包括在主廳進行技術彩排以及與主持人的簡報會議。

toeic.example_en: Strong presentation skills are essential for engaging large audiences and conveying complex ideas in clear ways.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的簡報技巧對於吸引大量觀眾並清楚傳達複雜概念至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Each presentation slide should contain minimal text and one clear visual to support the main message.
toeic.example_zh: 每張簡報投影片應包含極少文字和一個清楚的視覺元素來支持主要訊息。

toeic.example_en: Live audience polling helped the panelists understand which topics interested attendees most during the discussion.
toeic.example_zh: 現場觀眾投票幫助與談人了解與會者在討論中最感興趣的主題。

toeic.example_en: The presenter launched a live poll to gather opinions on the future direction of the industry.
toeic.example_zh: 簡報者發起即時投票以收集對產業未來方向的意見。

toeic.example_en: The interactive workshop encouraged small groups to brainstorm solutions for common customer service challenges together.
toeic.example_zh: 互動工作坊鼓勵小組共同腦力激盪以解決常見的客戶服務挑戰。

toeic.example_en: The hands-on demo allowed visitors to test the new software directly on tablets provided at the booth.
toeic.example_zh: 實際操作展示讓訪客可以直接在攤位提供的平板上測試新軟體。

toeic.example_en: During the live demo, our engineer walked the audience through every step of the installation process.
toeic.example_zh: 在現場展示中，我們的工程師帶領觀眾完成安裝過程的每一個步驟。

toeic.example_en: The exhibitor reception on Tuesday evening provides a relaxed setting for networking with potential business partners.
toeic.example_zh: 週二晚上的參展商招待會提供了一個輕鬆的環境，可與潛在商業夥伴交流。

toeic.example_en: The opening ceremony features remarks from the mayor and a brief introduction from our event chairperson.
toeic.example_zh: 開幕典禮包括市長致詞和我們活動主席的簡短介紹。

toeic.example_en: The closing ceremony will recognize outstanding exhibitors and announce the venue for next year's conference.
toeic.example_zh: 閉幕典禮將表揚傑出參展商並宣布明年會議的場地。

toeic.example_en: The networking session in the lobby gave attendees thirty minutes to exchange business cards and share ideas.
toeic.example_zh: 在大廳的交流時段讓與會者有三十分鐘交換名片和分享想法。

toeic.example_en: This conference offers excellent networking opportunities with senior executives from over forty different countries.
toeic.example_zh: 這次會議提供與來自四十多個國家高階主管交流的絕佳機會。

toeic.example_en: Speed networking lets you meet twenty potential partners in just under an hour through structured five-minute conversations.
toeic.example_zh: 快速交流活動讓您透過五分鐘的結構化對話，在一小時內認識二十位潛在夥伴。

toeic.example_en: Our matchmaking program uses an algorithm to connect attendees with the most relevant business partners on site.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的媒合計畫使用演算法為與會者在現場媒合最相關的商業夥伴。

toeic.example_en: Business matchmaking sessions are scheduled in advance based on each company's stated interests and target markets.
toeic.example_zh: 商業媒合場次依各公司陳述的興趣和目標市場事先排程。

toeic.example_en: Only registered trade visitors may enter the show floor before public hours begin at ten each morning.
toeic.example_zh: 只有已登記的商業訪客才能在每日上午十點公眾開放前進入展場。

toeic.example_en: The first two days of the show are reserved exclusively for trade buyers and industry professionals.
toeic.example_zh: 展覽的前兩天專門保留給商業買家和產業專業人士。

toeic.example_en: Many industry buyers visit our booth specifically to evaluate new product lines before placing seasonal orders.
toeic.example_zh: 許多產業買家專程造訪我們的攤位，在下季節性訂單前評估新產品線。

toeic.example_en: Our sales team focuses primarily on qualified buyers who have decision-making authority within their organizations.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的銷售團隊主要關注在其組織內擁有決策權的合格買家。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 商業媒體；產業媒體
toeic.example_en: Several trade press journalists covered our product launch and wrote enthusiastic reviews in their respective publications.
toeic.example_zh: 多位商業媒體記者報導我們的產品發表會，並在各自的刊物上撰寫熱情的評論。

toeic.example_en: Photographers asked our executives to pose in front of the branded media wall after the keynote presentation.
toeic.example_zh: 攝影師請我們的高階主管在主題演講後於品牌媒體背板前合影。

toeic.example_en: The media lounge provides journalists with wifi, charging stations, and quiet space to write their articles.
toeic.example_zh: 媒體休息室為記者提供無線網路、充電站和撰寫文章的安靜空間。

toeic.example_en: The press room is located on the second floor and remains open from eight until eight daily.
toeic.example_zh: 媒體室位於二樓，每日從早上八點到晚上八點開放。

toeic.example_en: Journalists must complete media accreditation at least two weeks before the event to receive press credentials.
toeic.example_zh: 記者必須在活動前至少兩週完成媒體認證才能獲得媒體證件。

toeic.example_en: Please pack enough promotional material to distribute to approximately three hundred visitors at our booth each day.
toeic.example_zh: 請準備足夠的宣傳資料，每天在我們攤位分發給大約三百位訪客。

toeic.example_en: Our promotional giveaway this year is a branded power bank that attendees can use for their devices.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今年的宣傳贈品是一個品牌行動電源，與會者可用於他們的裝置。

toeic.example_en: Every attendee will receive a branded tote bag containing the program, a notebook, and several promotional items.
toeic.example_zh: 每位與會者將收到一個品牌手提袋，內含議程、筆記本和數件宣傳品。

toeic.example_en: Visitors love stopping by booths offering freebies such as branded pens, stickers, and reusable water bottles.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客喜歡造訪提供贈品的攤位，例如品牌原子筆、貼紙和可重複使用的水瓶。

toeic.example_en: Choose a giveaway item that visitors will actually use, since this increases your brand recognition long term.
toeic.example_zh: 選擇訪客真正會使用的贈送物品，因為這能長期增加您的品牌知名度。

toeic.example_en: We reserve our premium giveaway, a wireless headset, for visitors who complete a full product demonstration.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將高級贈品無線耳機保留給完成完整產品展示的訪客。

toeic.example_en: The prize drawing takes place at four in the afternoon at the main stage, so please be present.
toeic.example_zh: 抽獎活動將於下午四點在主舞台舉行，請務必到場。

toeic.example_en: Take advantage of our show special pricing, which offers thirty percent off orders placed on site.
toeic.example_zh: 把握我們的展期特惠價格，現場下單可享七折優惠。

toeic.example_en: Qualified retailers receive a generous trade discount on bulk orders placed during the three-day trade show.
toeic.example_zh: 合格零售商在為期三天的展覽期間下大宗訂單可享優厚的商業折扣。

toeic.example_en: Please scan badge before entering the demonstration area so we can send you follow-up information later.
toeic.example_zh: 進入展示區前請掃描識別證，這樣我們稍後可寄送後續資訊給您。

toeic.example_en: The badge scanner captures contact information instantly, eliminating the need to collect paper forms manually.
toeic.example_zh: 識別證掃描器可即時擷取聯絡資訊，免去手動收集紙本表單的需求。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 潛在客戶資訊蒐集
toeic.example_en: Effective lead capture at trade shows requires both technology and trained staff who ask the right questions.
toeic.example_zh: 展覽中有效的潛在客戶資訊蒐集需要科技和能問對問題的訓練有素的員工。

toeic.example_en: Have each visitor complete a brief lead form so we can follow up with personalized information later.
toeic.example_zh: 請每位訪客填寫一份簡短的客戶資料表，這樣我們稍後可提供個人化資訊跟進。

toeic.example_en: All attendees will receive a post-event survey to help us improve content and logistics for next year.
toeic.example_zh: 所有與會者將收到活動後問卷調查，協助我們改善明年的內容和後勤安排。

toeic.example_en: Download the event app to view the agenda, message other attendees, and submit questions during sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 下載活動應用程式以查看議程、傳訊息給其他與會者，並在場次中提交問題。

toeic.example_en: Your mobile agenda updates automatically whenever the organizers make changes to session times or speaker lineups.
toeic.example_zh: 每當主辦單位變更場次時間或講者陣容時，您的行動議程都會自動更新。

toeic.example_en: Review the session schedule carefully and bookmark your preferred talks before the conference begins on Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 請仔細查看場次時間表並在會議於週一開始前將您偏好的演講加入書籤。

toeic.example_en: Each conference handout includes slides, references, and supplementary reading materials provided by the presenting speakers.
toeic.example_zh: 每份會議講義包含簡報、參考資料和簡報講者提供的補充閱讀材料。

toeic.example_en: Pick up your printed program booklet at the registration desk when you collect your badge and lanyard.
toeic.example_zh: 領取識別證和識別證帶時，請在報到櫃台領取您的印刷議程手冊。

toeic.example_en: Clear event signage helps attendees navigate the large venue and find session rooms without getting lost.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚的活動指示牌幫助與會者在大型場地中導航，找到場次會議室而不迷路。

toeic.example_en: Please install directional signage throughout the venue to guide visitors from registration to the main exhibit hall.
toeic.example_zh: 請在整個會場設置方向指示牌，引導訪客從報到處到主展廳。

toeic.example_en: Good wayfinding reduces attendee frustration and ensures everyone arrives at their sessions on time without confusion.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的路徑指引可減少與會者的挫折感，並確保每個人準時到達場次而不會混淆。

toeic.example_en: The session breakdown by track helps attendees see which talks align with their professional interests and goals.
toeic.example_zh: 依主題軌道區分的場次拆解說明幫助與會者了解哪些演講符合他們的專業興趣和目標。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 分組討論主題系列
toeic.example_en: Choose one breakout track each day, since sessions within a track are designed to build on each other.
toeic.example_zh: 每天選擇一個分組討論主題系列，因為一個主題系列內的場次設計為相互延伸。

toeic.example_en: Each session has limited capacity, so please reserve your seat in advance through the event app.
toeic.example_zh: 每場次容量有限，請事先透過活動應用程式預訂座位。

toeic.example_en: If a session is full, add yourself to the waitlist and you may be admitted if seats open.
toeic.example_zh: 如果場次已滿，請加入候補名單，若有座位空出您可能會獲准入場。

toeic.example_en: The stage setup includes a large LED screen, two podiums, and comfortable seating for panel discussions.
toeic.example_zh: 舞台佈置包括一個大型LED螢幕、兩個講台和供座談會使用的舒適座椅。

toeic.example_en: The audio system in the main hall must be checked thoroughly before the morning keynote begins.
toeic.example_zh: 主廳的音響系統必須在早上的主題演講開始前徹底檢查。

toeic.example_en: The tech rehearsal allows speakers to test their slides, microphones, and clickers on the actual stage equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 技術彩排讓講者可在實際舞台設備上測試他們的投影片、麥克風和簡報筆。

toeic.example_en: Live streaming of the keynote will be available for virtual attendees who could not travel to the venue.
toeic.example_zh: 無法到場的虛擬與會者可觀看主題演講的直播。

toeic.example_en: Registered virtual attendees will receive a live stream link by email one hour before each session.
toeic.example_zh: 已報名的虛擬與會者將在每場次前一小時收到直播連結電子郵件。

toeic.example_en: Virtual attendees can participate in chat discussions and submit questions just like those attending in person.
toeic.example_zh: 虛擬與會者可參與聊天討論並提交問題，就像現場與會者一樣。

toeic.example_en: This year we are hosting a hybrid event so colleagues abroad can join sessions without lengthy travel.
toeic.example_zh: 今年我們舉辦混合型活動，這樣海外同事可以參加場次而不需長途旅行。

toeic.example_en: Our budget supports four hundred in-person attendees and approximately one thousand virtual viewers from various regions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的預算支持四百位現場與會者和大約一千位來自各地區的虛擬觀眾。

toeic.example_en: The exhibitor list directory groups companies by product category to help buyers locate specific suppliers efficiently.
toeic.example_zh: 參展商名錄依產品類別將公司分組，幫助買家有效率地找到特定供應商。

toeic.example_en: Booth setup begins two days before the show opens, with full access for contractors during specified hours.
toeic.example_zh: 攤位搭設於展覽開幕前兩天開始，承包商可在指定時段全程進場。

toeic.example_en: Booth dismantling must be completed within four hours after the show closes to avoid additional venue charges.
toeic.example_zh: 攤位拆除必須在展覽結束後四小時內完成，以避免額外的場地費用。

toeic.example_en: Exhibitor move-in starts at six in the morning on Sunday, two days before the show officially opens.
toeic.example_zh: 參展商進場於週日早上六點開始，展覽正式開幕前兩天。

toeic.example_en: Please follow the move-out schedule carefully to prevent congestion at the loading dock during peak departure times.
toeic.example_zh: 請仔細遵守撤場時間表，避免在尖峰離場時段造成卸貨碼頭擁堵。

toeic.example_en: Ship exhibit material to the venue at least one week before the show to avoid late arrival fees.
toeic.example_zh: 請於展覽前至少一週將展示材料運送至會場，以避免延遲送達費用。

toeic.example_en: The booth backdrop should be visible from across the hall and clearly communicate our value proposition immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 攤位背板應從整個展廳對面可見，並能立即清楚傳達我們的價值主張。

toeic.example_en: Our new booth banner features the updated company logo and a tagline highlighting our latest product capabilities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新的攤位橫幅呈現更新的公司標誌和強調我們最新產品功能的標語。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 拉布展架；快速展示架
toeic.example_en: The portable pop-up display is easy to transport and can be assembled by one person in minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 可攜式拉布展架易於運輸，一個人在幾分鐘內就能組裝完成。

toeic.example_en: Keep the literature rack well-stocked throughout the day so visitors can take brochures without asking staff.
toeic.example_zh: 整天保持文宣品架補足，這樣訪客可以拿取宣傳冊而不需詢問工作人員。
