toeic.example_en: The tablet kiosk allows visitors to browse our product catalog and request samples without speaking to staff first.
toeic.example_zh: 平板資訊站讓訪客可以瀏覽我們的產品目錄並索取樣品，不需先與工作人員交談。

toeic.example_en: Visit the info desk in the main lobby for questions about session locations, wifi access, or local restaurants.
toeic.example_zh: 如有關於場次位置、無線網路存取或當地餐廳的問題，請至大廳的服務台。

toeic.example_en: Venue staff are stationed at every major entrance to assist with directions and answer general questions.
toeic.example_zh: 會場工作人員駐守在每個主要入口協助指引方向並回答一般問題。

toeic.example_en: The trade show coordinator confirms booth assignments, electrical requirements, and shipping arrangements with each participating exhibitor company.
toeic.example_zh: 展覽協調員與每家參展商確認攤位分配、電力需求和運送安排。

toeic.example_en: The show organizer issues exhibitor manuals six months in advance to ensure everyone meets all preparation deadlines.
toeic.example_zh: 展會主辦單位於六個月前發放參展商手冊，確保每家公司都能達成所有準備期限。

toeic.example_en: The main exhibition hall covers thirty thousand square meters and can accommodate over six hundred exhibitor booths.
toeic.example_zh: 主展覽廳佔地三萬平方公尺，可容納超過六百個參展商攤位。

toeic.example_en: The main hall hosts all keynote presentations, while smaller rooms upstairs are reserved for breakout discussions.
toeic.example_zh: 主廳舉辦所有主題演講，樓上較小的會議室則保留給分組討論。

toeic.example_en: Weather permitting, our reception will take place under the outdoor pavilion adjacent to the main conference center.
toeic.example_zh: 若天氣許可，我們的招待會將在主會議中心旁的戶外活動帳棚舉行。

toeic.example_en: Every visitor receives a complimentary exhibition catalogue listing all participating companies along with their respective product offerings.
toeic.example_zh: 每位訪客可獲得一份免費的展覽目錄，列出所有參展公司及其產品。

toeic.example_en: The marketing team will prepare a detailed trade show report summarizing leads, costs, and key competitor activities.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷團隊將準備一份詳細的展覽報告，總結潛在客戶、成本和主要競爭對手活動。

toeic.example_en: Our ROI analysis showed that the trade show generated three times the investment in qualified sales pipeline.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的投資報酬率分析顯示展覽帶來的合格銷售商機是投資金額的三倍。

toeic.example_en: Trade show lead conversion improves dramatically when sales reps follow up within forty-eight hours of initial contact.
toeic.example_zh: 當業務代表在初次接觸後四十八小時內跟進時，展覽潛在客戶轉換率會大幅提升。

toeic.example_en: Attend the mandatory exhibitor briefing on Sunday evening to review final logistics and emergency procedures together.
toeic.example_zh: 請參加週日傍晚的強制參展商說明會，共同檢視最終後勤事項和緊急程序。

toeic.example_en: All speakers must attend the speaker briefing one day before the conference to review timing and protocols.
toeic.example_zh: 所有講者必須在會議前一天參加講者簡報會，以檢視時間安排和規範。

toeic.example_en: Three stagehands will assist with microphone changes and prop adjustments during the panel discussion this afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 三位舞台工作人員將在今天下午的座談會中協助更換麥克風和調整道具。

toeic.example_en: A focused spotlight on the speaker creates a sense of importance and naturally draws audience attention forward.
toeic.example_zh: 聚焦於講者的聚光燈營造重要感，自然將觀眾的注意力吸引到前方。

toeic.example_en: A corner booth attracts more foot traffic because visitors can approach from two different aisles freely.
toeic.example_zh: 角落攤位吸引更多人流，因為訪客可從兩條不同走道自由接近。

toeic.example_en: The premium island booth has open access on all four sides and gives maximum visibility to passersby.
toeic.example_zh: 高級獨立攤位四面開放，給予路過的人最大能見度。

toeic.example_en: Our smaller inline booth on the second row still attracted plenty of qualified visitors throughout the show.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在第二排的較小連排攤位整個展覽期間仍吸引了許多合格訪客。

toeic.example_en: The venue contract specifies cancellation penalties, deposit terms, and access hours for setup and teardown periods.
toeic.example_zh: 場地租用合約規定取消違約金、訂金條款和搭設與拆除期間的進場時段。

toeic.example_en: Confirm venue capacity for each room early to avoid overbooking sessions and turning attendees away at the door.
toeic.example_zh: 請及早確認每個會議室的場地容量，避免場次超額預訂而在門口拒絕與會者。

toeic.example_en: Theater seating maximizes capacity for keynote sessions where audience interaction with each other is not required.
toeic.example_zh: 劇院式座位最大化主題演講場次的容量，這些場次不需要觀眾彼此互動。

toeic.example_en: U-shape seating encourages discussion in smaller workshops where every participant should see and hear each other.
toeic.example_zh: U字型座位鼓勵較小工作坊中的討論，每位參與者都能看到並聽到彼此。

toeic.example_en: The venue requires guaranteed attendance figures at least one week before the event for billing purposes.
toeic.example_zh: 場地要求至少一週前提供保證出席人數，以利計費。

toeic.example_en: Each panelist will have a name placard on the table indicating their title, company, and current role.
toeic.example_zh: 每位與談人桌上將放置一個名牌，標示他們的職稱、公司和目前職務。

toeic.example_en: The table tent at each setting displays the menu and sponsor logos for guests to see clearly.
toeic.example_zh: 每個座位上的桌牌顯示菜單和贊助商標誌，方便賓客清楚看見。

toeic.example_en: The centerpiece arrangement features fresh seasonal flowers but stays low enough not to block guest sightlines.
toeic.example_zh: 桌花擺設使用新鮮的季節性花卉，但高度夠低，不會阻擋賓客視線。

toeic.example_en: Venue parking is limited and fills quickly, so consider taking public transportation or arriving early for spaces.
toeic.example_zh: 會場停車位有限且很快會滿，建議搭乘大眾運輸或提早到場找停車位。

toeic.example_en: The shuttle schedule lists pickup times from each partner hotel beginning at seven thirty every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 接駁車時間表列出每家合作飯店每天早上七點三十分開始的接駁時間。

toeic.example_en: Conference attendees enjoy complimentary shuttle service between partner hotels and the convention center throughout the event.
toeic.example_zh: 會議與會者在活動期間可享受合作飯店和會議中心之間的免費接駁服務。

toeic.example_en: Several partner hotels within walking distance offer discounted rates for delegates booking before the deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 步行距離內的多家合作飯店為在截止日前預訂的代表提供優惠價格。

toeic.example_en: The block rate of one hundred eighty dollars per night includes breakfast and complimentary high-speed wifi access.
toeic.example_zh: 團體優惠價每晚一百八十美元，包含早餐和免費高速無線網路。

toeic.example_en: The delegate package includes accommodation, all meals, conference fees, and ground transportation between hotel and venue.
toeic.example_zh: 代表套裝方案包括住宿、所有餐點、會議費用和飯店與會場之間的地面交通。

toeic.example_en: Scan your QR code ticket at the entrance gate for quick automated access without staff assistance needed.
toeic.example_zh: 在入口閘門掃描您的QR碼門票，可快速自動進場，不需工作人員協助。

toeic.example_en: Save your e-ticket to your mobile wallet so you can access it quickly even when offline.
toeic.example_zh: 將您的電子門票儲存到行動錢包，這樣即使離線也能快速使用。

toeic.example_en: Your delegate kit includes a notebook, pen, program guide, lanyard, and several promotional items from sponsoring companies.
toeic.example_zh: 您的代表資料包包含筆記本、原子筆、議程指南、識別證帶和多項贊助公司的宣傳品。

toeic.example_en: Each attendee will find a welcome packet at the registration table with maps and useful local information.
toeic.example_zh: 每位與會者將在報到桌上找到歡迎資料包，內含地圖和實用的當地資訊。

toeic.example_en: We will provide a leather name card holder branded with our company logo as a thoughtful welcome gift.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將提供印有公司標誌的皮革名片夾作為貼心的歡迎禮物。

toeic.example_en: The business card exchange ceremony at the start of meetings demonstrates respect in many Asian business cultures.
toeic.example_zh: 會議開始時的名片交換儀式在許多亞洲商業文化中代表尊重。

toeic.example_en: More professionals now use a digital business card that updates automatically and reduces printing waste considerably.
toeic.example_zh: 現在更多專業人士使用可自動更新且大幅減少印刷浪費的數位名片。

toeic.example_en: This trade event brings together over a thousand suppliers and twenty thousand buyers from across the region.
toeic.example_zh: 這次商展活動匯集來自全區域超過一千家供應商和兩萬名買家。

toeic.example_en: Attending major industry events is essential for staying current on emerging trends and competitor product offerings.
toeic.example_zh: 參加重要的產業活動對於掌握新興趨勢和競爭對手產品至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Our exclusive executive forum brings together fifty senior leaders for two days of strategic discussion.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的獨家高階主管論壇為期兩天匯集五十位資深領導者進行策略討論。

toeic.example_en: The company's annual meeting will be held in Singapore this year, drawing employees from twenty-three countries.
toeic.example_zh: 公司年會今年將在新加坡舉行，吸引來自二十三個國家的員工。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 業務啟動大會活動
toeic.example_en: The sales kickoff event launches the new fiscal year by aligning all regional teams on strategic objectives.
toeic.example_zh: 業務啟動大會活動透過讓所有區域團隊對齊策略目標來開啟新會計年度。

toeic.example_en: The annual user conference event brings together our top customers to share success stories and product feedback.
toeic.example_zh: 年度用戶大會活動匯集我們的頂級客戶，分享成功案例和產品回饋。

toeic.example_en: Sponsoring the industry association event raises our profile among the most influential professionals in our market.
toeic.example_zh: 贊助產業協會活動可在我們市場中最具影響力的專業人士中提升知名度。

toeic.example_en: This professional gathering offers smaller, more intimate networking compared with the massive trade show happening downtown.
toeic.example_zh: 這個專業人士聚會提供比市區大型展覽更小型、更親密的交流。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 區域巡迴展示活動
toeic.example_en: Our regional roadshow will visit ten cities across Asia to introduce the latest product line to local customers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的區域巡迴展示活動將造訪亞洲十個城市，向當地客戶介紹最新產品線。

toeic.example_en: The product roadshow includes hands-on demos and customer presentations in twelve cities over three months.
toeic.example_zh: 產品巡迴展示包括三個月內在十二個城市的實際操作展示和客戶簡報。

toeic.example_en: Our product launch event drew significant media attention and generated immediate orders from key enterprise customers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的產品發表活動吸引了大量媒體關注，並立即從主要企業客戶獲得訂單。

toeic.example_en: The ribbon-cutting ceremony for our new regional office attracted local officials and key business partners.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新區域辦公室的剪綵儀式吸引了當地官員和主要商業夥伴。

toeic.example_en: The grand unveiling of our flagship store featured live music, celebrity appearances, and exclusive product previews.
toeic.example_zh: 我們旗艦店的盛大揭幕活動包含現場音樂、名人出席和獨家產品預覽。

toeic.example_en: The corporate dinner is a black-tie event held on the closing evening of our annual leadership summit.
toeic.example_zh: 公司晚宴是在我們年度領導高峰會閉幕晚舉行的正式黑領結活動。

toeic.example_en: Our annual awards night recognizes outstanding performance across sales, customer service, and operational excellence.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的年度頒獎之夜表彰銷售、客戶服務和營運卓越方面的傑出表現。

toeic.example_en: The recognition dinner honors employees who reached significant tenure milestones during the past fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 表揚晚宴向上一會計年度達到重要年資里程碑的員工致敬。

toeic.example_en: Senior executives formed a reception line at the entrance to greet each guest personally upon arrival.
toeic.example_zh: 資深主管在入口處排成接待隊伍，在每位賓客抵達時親自迎接。

toeic.example_en: Six buffet stations around the room offer international cuisine ranging from Italian pasta to Asian stir-fry.
toeic.example_zh: 場內六個自助餐區提供國際美食，從義大利麵食到亞洲炒物應有盡有。

toeic.example_en: For the formal dinner, we will serve a three-course plated meal with vegetarian options available upon request.
toeic.example_zh: 正式晚宴我們將供應三道菜的套餐式餐點，可依需求提供素食選項。

toeic.example_en: Submit the final catering order three days before the event so the kitchen can prepare appropriate quantities.
toeic.example_zh: 請於活動前三天提交最終餐飲訂單，讓廚房能準備適當的份量。

toeic.example_en: Refreshment breaks are scheduled between sessions to give attendees time to network and grab coffee.
toeic.example_zh: 場次之間安排茶點休息時間，讓與會者有時間交流並取用咖啡。

toeic.example_en: Multiple coffee stations throughout the venue ensure attendees never have to wait long for a refill.
toeic.example_zh: 整個會場設置多個咖啡服務區，確保與會者不需等候太久就能續杯。

toeic.example_en: Morning tea is served at ten thirty in the foyer along with pastries and fresh seasonal fruit.
toeic.example_zh: 上午茶點於十點三十分在大廳供應，並搭配酥皮點心和新鮮季節水果。

toeic.example_en: We will distribute boxed lunch options between sessions so attendees can eat quickly and return promptly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將在場次之間發放餐盒選項，讓與會者可快速用餐並準時返回。

toeic.example_en: Please indicate any dietary preference on the registration form so caterers can accommodate your specific requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 請在報名表上註明任何飲食偏好，餐飲廠商可配合您的特定需求。

toeic.example_en: A vegetarian meal option is available at every meal, but please indicate it during registration to confirm.
toeic.example_zh: 每餐都提供素食選項，但請在報名時註明以便確認。

toeic.example_en: The technology convention attracts over forty thousand attendees from across the global software development industry annually.
toeic.example_zh: 科技大型會議每年吸引來自全球軟體開發產業超過四萬名與會者。

toeic.example_en: The academic symposium gathers researchers from leading universities to present new findings in artificial intelligence applications.
toeic.example_zh: 學術研討會匯集來自頂尖大學的研究人員，發表人工智慧應用的新發現。

toeic.example_en: Our quarterly colloquium invites external experts to share research and engage in scholarly discussion with employees.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的季度學術座談會邀請外部專家分享研究並與員工進行學術討論。

toeic.example_en: The annual summit meeting brings together CEOs from our top fifty global enterprise customers for strategic discussions.
toeic.example_zh: 年度高峰會議匯集我們前五十大全球企業客戶的執行長進行策略討論。

toeic.example_en: The industry mixer attracts hundreds of professionals each year and has become a highlight of the conference calendar.
toeic.example_zh: 業界交流活動每年吸引數百位專業人士，已成為會議日程的亮點。

toeic.example_en: The alumni mixer reconnected former colleagues who now work at competing firms across the technology sector globally.
toeic.example_zh: 校友聚會讓現在於全球科技產業競爭公司工作的前同事們重新聯繫。

toeic.example_en: Social hour runs from six to seven daily, with light snacks and drinks available for all attendees.
toeic.example_zh: 社交時段每日從六點到七點，所有與會者可享用輕食和飲料。

toeic.example_en: The host committee includes industry leaders who guide event planning and help recruit prominent speakers each year.
toeic.example_zh: 主辦委員會包括產業領袖，他們指導活動規劃並協助每年招募知名講者。

toeic.example_en: The advisory committee meets quarterly to review conference content and provide feedback on emerging industry trends.
toeic.example_zh: 諮詢委員會每季開會審查會議內容並提供新興產業趨勢的回饋。

toeic.example_en: The program committee evaluates hundreds of speaker proposals and selects the strongest fifty presentations for the final agenda.
toeic.example_zh: 議程委員會評估數百份講者提案，並為最終議程選出最強的五十場簡報。

toeic.example_en: The call for papers opens in February, and researchers worldwide submit abstracts before the May fifteenth deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 徵稿啟事於二月開放，全球研究人員在五月十五日截止日期前提交摘要。

toeic.example_en: Each abstract submission goes through peer review by at least three committee members before final acceptance decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 每份摘要投稿在最終接受決定前都經由至少三位委員的同儕審查。

toeic.example_en: Submit your speaker proposal through the online portal, including a topic abstract and short biographical sketch.
toeic.example_zh: 請透過線上入口網站提交您的講者提案，包含主題摘要和簡短個人簡介。

toeic.example_en: Your presentation abstract should clearly summarize key points in two hundred words or fewer for review.
toeic.example_zh: 您的簡報摘要應在兩百字內清楚總結重點供審查。

toeic.example_en: The poster session showcases ongoing research projects from emerging professionals who interact directly with curious attendees.
toeic.example_zh: 海報展示時段呈現新興專業人士的進行中研究專案，他們與好奇的與會者直接互動。

toeic.example_en: The research showcase highlights innovative work from university partners and corporate research and development teams.
toeic.example_zh: 研究成果展示突顯大學合作夥伴和企業研發團隊的創新工作。

toeic.example_en: Ten finalists will deliver a startup pitch to a panel of investors during the closing afternoon session.
toeic.example_zh: 十家入圍者將在閉幕下午場次向投資人小組進行新創公司簡報。

toeic.example_en: The pitch competition awards seed funding to the most promising early-stage company chosen by our expert panel.
toeic.example_zh: 簡報競賽將種子資金頒發給我們專家小組選出的最有前景的早期階段公司。

toeic.example_en: The innovation showcase features prototype products and emerging technologies that haven't yet reached the commercial market.
toeic.example_zh: 創新成果展示呈現尚未進入商業市場的原型產品和新興技術。

toeic.example_en: Visit the demo zone on the second floor to try our latest applications and meet the engineering team.
toeic.example_zh: 請至二樓展示體驗區試用我們的最新應用程式並與工程團隊會面。

toeic.example_en: Our experience zone allows visitors to interact with virtual reality demos showcasing the future workplace concepts.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的體驗區讓訪客與虛擬實境展示互動，呈現未來職場概念。

toeic.example_en: The interactive display invites passersby to design their own custom product configuration on a large touchscreen.
toeic.example_zh: 互動展示邀請路過的人在大型觸控螢幕上設計自己的客製化產品配置。

toeic.example_en: The touchscreen kiosk at our booth lets visitors browse case studies, watch videos, and request follow-up information.
toeic.example_zh: 我們攤位的觸控資訊站讓訪客瀏覽案例研究、觀看影片並要求後續資訊。

toeic.example_en: The show daily newspaper recaps yesterday's highlights and previews today's must-attend sessions for busy conference attendees.
toeic.example_zh: 展覽每日刊物回顧昨日亮點，並為忙碌的會議與會者預告今日必參加的場次。

toeic.example_en: Consistent event branding across signage, materials, and digital platforms reinforces our professional image with all attendees.
toeic.example_zh: 在指示牌、資料和數位平台上一致的活動品牌識別強化我們對所有與會者的專業形象。

toeic.example_en: Our title sponsorship of the technology summit guarantees prominent logo placement and exclusive presentation opportunities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們對科技高峰會的冠名贊助保證顯著的標誌位置和獨家簡報機會。

toeic.example_en: As the presenting sponsor, we receive top billing on all promotional materials and twenty complimentary attendee passes.
toeic.example_zh: 身為呈獻贊助商，我們在所有宣傳資料上獲得頂級曝光以及二十張免費與會者通行證。

toeic.example_en: Supporting sponsor packages offer logo visibility and ten complimentary passes for smaller companies entering this event.
toeic.example_zh: 支持贊助商方案為進入此活動的小公司提供標誌曝光和十張免費通行證。

toeic.example_en: Each sponsorship package offers different levels of brand visibility, speaking opportunities, and lead-generation benefits for participants.
toeic.example_zh: 每種贊助方案為參與者提供不同程度的品牌曝光、演講機會和潛在客戶開發效益。

toeic.example_en: The sponsor showcase on Tuesday afternoon gives each major sponsor fifteen minutes to present their latest solutions.
toeic.example_zh: 週二下午的贊助商展示給予每位主要贊助商十五分鐘簡報其最新解決方案。

toeic.example_en: Our media partner promotes the event to their subscriber base of two hundred thousand industry professionals weekly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的媒體合作夥伴每週向其二十萬產業專業人士訂閱者群推廣此活動。

toeic.example_en: As the official sponsor of the coffee break, we placed branded napkins and stirrers at every station.
toeic.example_zh: 身為咖啡休息時間的官方贊助商，我們在每個服務站放置品牌餐巾紙和攪拌棒。

toeic.example_en: Higher sponsorship tier benefits include private meeting rooms, premium booth locations, and dedicated marketing campaign integration.
toeic.example_zh: 較高的贊助等級權益包括私人會議室、優質攤位位置和專屬行銷活動整合。

toeic.example_en: The VIP lounge offers premium snacks, comfortable seating, and a quiet workspace for important guests between sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 貴賓休息室提供高級點心、舒適座位和供重要賓客在場次之間使用的安靜工作空間。

toeic.example_en: The speaker lounge gives presenters a quiet place to prepare and review slides before their sessions begin.
toeic.example_zh: 講者休息室為簡報者提供安靜的地方，可在場次開始前準備並檢視投影片。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 媒體記者會會議室
toeic.example_en: The press conference room is reserved for product announcements and one-on-one interviews with executive leadership team.
toeic.example_zh: 媒體記者會會議室保留給產品發表和與高階主管團隊的一對一專訪。

toeic.example_en: Please review show hours carefully before scheduling appointments, since the floor closes promptly at six every evening.
toeic.example_zh: 安排約會前請仔細查看展覽時間，因為展場每晚六點準時關閉。

toeic.example_en: The preview day on Sunday allows VIP buyers and press to access the show before public hours begin.
toeic.example_zh: 週日的預展日讓貴賓買家和媒體可在公眾開放時間前進入展場。

toeic.example_en: Opening day always draws the largest crowds, with attendance peaking between ten and noon at most events.
toeic.example_zh: 開幕日總是吸引最多人潮，大多數活動的出席率在十點到中午之間達到高峰。

toeic.example_en: Closing day traffic is typically lighter, but serious buyers often visit then to negotiate final purchase agreements.
toeic.example_zh: 閉幕日人潮通常較少，但認真的買家經常此時造訪以協商最終採購協議。

toeic.example_en: The trade fair organizer manages everything from venue contracts to marketing campaigns and exhibitor support services daily.
toeic.example_zh: 商展主辦單位每天管理從場地合約到行銷活動和參展商支援服務的所有事務。

toeic.example_en: We hired an experienced event management company to handle logistics for our largest customer conference ever.
toeic.example_zh: 我們聘請了一家經驗豐富的活動管理公司處理我們有史以來最大型客戶會議的後勤事務。

toeic.example_en: A professional PCO handles registration, accommodation, and on-site logistics so internal teams can focus on content.
toeic.example_zh: 專業會議籌辦者處理報名、住宿和現場後勤，讓內部團隊可專注於內容。

toeic.example_en: Professional event production includes stage design, lighting, sound, video, and the technical crew running everything backstage.
toeic.example_zh: 專業活動製作包括舞台設計、燈光、音響、視訊以及在後台運作一切的技術團隊。

toeic.example_en: The run sheet specifies exact timing for music cues, video rolls, and speaker transitions during the awards ceremony.
toeic.example_zh: 活動執行流程表規定頒獎典禮期間音樂提示、影片播放和講者交接的確切時間。

toeic.example_en: Review the show flow carefully before going on stage so you know exactly when to begin speaking.
toeic.example_zh: 登台前請仔細檢視節目流程，這樣您就知道確切何時開始發言。

toeic.example_en: Speakers receive twenty minutes of rehearsal time on the main stage the morning before their actual presentation.
toeic.example_zh: 講者在實際簡報前一天早上於主舞台獲得二十分鐘的彩排時間。

toeic.example_en: We held a full dress rehearsal the evening before to catch any technical issues with cues and transitions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在前晚舉行完整彩排，以找出任何提示和轉場的技術問題。

toeic.example_en: The stage crew arrives at five in the morning to set up before the first session at nine.
toeic.example_zh: 舞台工作團隊於早上五點抵達進行佈置，趕在九點的第一場次前完成。

toeic.example_en: Our production crew of fifteen includes video technicians, sound engineers, lighting designers, and stage management professionals daily.
toeic.example_zh: 我們十五人的製作團隊包括影像技術人員、音響工程師、燈光設計師和舞台管理專業人員。

toeic.example_en: The venue rental fee for the main exhibition hall costs approximately fifty thousand dollars per day plus taxes.
toeic.example_zh: 主展覽廳的場地租金約為每天五萬美元另加稅金。

toeic.example_en: Our event budget includes venue rental, catering, audio-visual production, marketing, and a small contingency for unexpected costs.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的活動預算包括場地租金、餐飲、影音製作、行銷和應對意外費用的小額預備金。

toeic.example_en: Please provide a detailed cost estimate for the awards dinner so we can secure leadership approval before booking.
toeic.example_zh: 請為頒獎晚宴提供詳細的費用估算，這樣我們可在預訂前獲得領導階層核准。

toeic.example_en: Sponsorship revenue covers approximately sixty percent of total event costs, with the remainder funded by attendee fees.
toeic.example_zh: 贊助收入涵蓋約百分之六十的活動總成本，其餘由與會者費用支應。

toeic.example_en: Registration revenue grew thirty percent this year due to strong early-bird sales and expanded virtual attendance options.
toeic.example_zh: 由於強勁的早鳥銷售和擴大的虛擬參加選項，今年報名收入成長百分之三十。

toeic.example_en: The speaker honorarium typically ranges from five thousand to twenty thousand dollars depending on the speaker's notable profile.
toeic.example_zh: 講者酬金通常根據講者的知名度範圍從五千到兩萬美元不等。

toeic.example_en: Effective trade show participation requires planning months in advance to maximize return on your significant marketing investment.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的參展活動需要提前數月規劃，以最大化您重要行銷投資的回報。

toeic.example_en: Security performs a credential check at every entrance to ensure only registered attendees access secured event areas.
toeic.example_zh: 保全在每個入口執行證件查驗，確保只有已報名的與會者進入受保護的活動區域。

toeic.example_en: Event security personnel monitor all entrances and exits throughout the day to ensure attendee safety and access control.
toeic.example_zh: 活動保全人員整天監控所有出入口，確保與會者安全和進出管控。

toeic.example_en: Please familiarize yourself with the nearest emergency exit before each session begins, as a safety precaution measure.
toeic.example_zh: 作為安全預防措施，請在每場次開始前熟悉最近的緊急出口位置。

toeic.example_en: A staffed first aid station operates near the registration desk throughout all show hours for medical emergencies.
toeic.example_zh: 一個有人員配置的急救站在所有展覽時段於報到櫃台附近運作，以應對醫療緊急情況。

toeic.example_en: Please use the complimentary coat check near the entrance to store your outerwear and large bags safely.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用入口附近的免費衣帽寄存處安全存放您的外套和大型袋子。

toeic.example_en: The cloakroom is open from eight in the morning until eleven in the evening for attendee convenience.
toeic.example_zh: 衣帽間從早上八點開放到晚上十一點，方便與會者使用。

toeic.example_en: Luggage storage is available on the lower level for attendees who arrive directly from the airport.
toeic.example_zh: 下層樓提供行李寄存，方便直接從機場抵達的與會者使用。

toeic.example_en: The charging lounge provides outlets and comfortable seating for attendees needing to power their phones and laptops.
toeic.example_zh: 充電休息區提供插座和舒適座位，讓需要為手機和筆電充電的與會者使用。

toeic.example_en: Download the venue map from the event app to navigate easily between halls and session rooms quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 請從活動應用程式下載場地地圖，以便輕鬆在展廳和場次會議室之間快速導航。

toeic.example_en: Our telework policy allows staff to choose any quiet location with stable internet access.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的遠端工作政策允許員工選擇任何安靜且網路穩定的地點。

toeic.example_en: She converted the spare bedroom into a tidy home office with proper lighting and storage.
toeic.example_zh: 她將備用臥室改造成一間整潔、有良好照明和收納的家庭辦公室。

toeic.example_en: Buying a small ring light made my face look much clearer during early-morning video calls.
toeic.example_zh: 購買一盞小型環形補光燈讓我在清晨視訊會議中的臉部影像清晰許多。

toeic.example_en: My noise-cancelling earbuds make it possible to concentrate even when my children play loudly.
toeic.example_zh: 我的降噪耳機讓我即使在孩子大聲玩耍時仍能專心工作。

toeic.example_en: Modern videoconferencing tools include real-time captions that help non-native speakers follow discussions.
toeic.example_zh: 現代視訊會議工具具備即時字幕，有助非母語者跟上討論。

toeic.example_en: Constant buffering during the workshop forced the trainer to share slides through email instead.
toeic.example_zh: 工作坊期間不斷出現緩衝，迫使講師改透過電子郵件分享投影片。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 連線能力；網路連通性
toeic.example_en: Stable connectivity is essential for remote workers who join meetings from coffee shops or airports.
toeic.example_zh: 穩定的連線對於從咖啡店或機場參加會議的遠端工作者至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Our company reimburses up to fifty dollars monthly for broadband used in employees home offices.
toeic.example_zh: 公司每月最高補助五十美元，用於員工家庭辦公室的寬頻費用。

toeic.example_en: The wifi signal in our basement is weak, so the team built a small office upstairs.
toeic.example_zh: 我們地下室的無線訊號很弱，所以團隊在樓上設置了一間小辦公室。

toeic.example_en: A dual monitor setup helps designers compare reference images and final files side by side easily.
toeic.example_zh: 雙螢幕設置幫助設計師輕鬆並排比較參考圖片與最終檔案。

toeic.example_en: Adjustable lumbar support relieves lower back pressure for staff who work long hours at desks.
toeic.example_zh: 可調式腰部支撐能舒緩長時間在桌前工作員工的下背壓力。

toeic.example_en: A soft wrist rest in front of your keyboard reduces the risk of repetitive strain injuries.
toeic.example_zh: 鍵盤前放置柔軟的護腕墊可降低重複性使力傷害的風險。

toeic.example_en: Adding a footrest helps shorter employees keep their feet flat and their posture comfortable.
toeic.example_zh: 加裝腳踏板能幫助身材較矮的員工保持雙腳平放與舒適姿勢。

toeic.example_en: Turning on a blue light filter in the evening helps my eyes feel less tired before bedtime.
toeic.example_zh: 傍晚開啟藍光濾鏡能讓我的眼睛在睡前較不疲勞。

toeic.example_en: Taking a five-minute screen break every hour keeps your eyes fresh during long remote workdays.
toeic.example_zh: 每小時休息五分鐘離開螢幕，可在漫長遠端工作日中維持眼睛舒適。

toeic.example_en: I follow the Pomodoro technique with twenty-five-minute focus blocks and short breaks between them.
toeic.example_zh: 我使用番茄鐘工作法，以二十五分鐘的專注區塊搭配短暫休息。

toeic.example_en: Turn off notifications when you need deep focus to finish a complex report before lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 當您需要深度專注以在午餐前完成複雜報告時，請關閉通知。

toeic.example_en: The green status indicator on your profile shows colleagues that you are currently available online.
toeic.example_zh: 您個人檔案上的綠色狀態指示讓同事知道您目前線上有空。

toeic.example_en: Maintaining a steady online presence helps remote workers stay visible and trusted by their managers.
toeic.example_zh: 維持穩定的線上存在感有助於遠端員工讓主管看見並信任他們。

toeic.example_en: Sharing weekly updates increases your visibility with leadership when you rarely come into the office.
toeic.example_zh: 分享每週更新可在您鮮少進辦公室時提升您對高層的能見度。

toeic.example_en: Our small time zone overlap with Berlin allows only two productive hours for live discussions daily.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與柏林的時區重疊很少，每天僅有兩小時可進行即時討論。

toeic.example_en: Please consider the seven-hour time difference when scheduling calls with our London branch staff.
toeic.example_zh: 與我們倫敦分公司員工安排通話時，請考慮七小時的時差。

toeic.example_en: Try to choose a time zone friendly slot so neither team has to wake at dawn.
toeic.example_zh: 請盡量選擇對時區友善的時段，讓兩個團隊都不必清晨起床。

toeic.example_en: Working across global timezone gaps means writing clear documentation that anyone can read later.
toeic.example_zh: 跨越全球時區工作意味著要撰寫清晰的文件，讓任何人之後都能閱讀。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 跟著太陽走（24 小時接力工作）
toeic.example_en: Our support team uses a follow the sun model so customers always reach a live agent somewhere.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的支援團隊採用跟著太陽走模式，讓客戶隨時都能聯繫到真人客服。

toeic.example_en: We are working hard to reduce the always-on culture that exhausts remote staff and harms wellbeing.
toeic.example_zh: 我們正努力減少讓遠端員工疲憊並損害健康的隨時待命文化。

toeic.example_en: Manager Lin watches for early signs of burnout such as quiet withdrawal or missed weekly check-ins.
toeic.example_zh: 林經理會留意過勞的早期徵兆，例如安靜退縮或錯過每週進度報告。

toeic.example_en: Remote work can support better work-life balance only when employees clearly disconnect after office hours.
toeic.example_zh: 唯有員工在下班後明確切斷工作，遠端工作才能真正促進工作與生活平衡。

toeic.example_en: Some parents prefer work-life integration over strict separation because it lets them attend school events.
toeic.example_zh: 有些家長偏好工作與生活整合而非嚴格分開，因為這讓他們能參加學校活動。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 切斷工作；放下工作
toeic.example_en: It is healthy to unplug from email completely during weekends and personal vacation days.
toeic.example_zh: 在週末和個人休假日完全脫離電子郵件是健康的做法。

toeic.example_en: Try to log off by six in the evening to protect your personal time and family routine.
toeic.example_zh: 盡量在傍晚六點前登出，以保護您的個人時間與家庭作息。

toeic.example_en: I usually sign off for the day after sending a short summary message to my project lead.
toeic.example_zh: 我通常會在傳送簡短進度訊息給專案負責人後結束一天工作。

toeic.example_en: Please share an end-of-day update so colleagues in the next time zone can continue your tasks.
toeic.example_zh: 請分享下班前進度更新，讓下一個時區的同事能接續您的工作。

toeic.example_en: Our daily standup at nine sharp lasts fifteen minutes and covers blockers, progress, and next steps.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每日九點準時的站會持續十五分鐘，涵蓋阻礙、進度和後續步驟。

toeic.example_en: An async standup in our chat channel saves time and respects everyones working hours and timezones.
toeic.example_zh: 在聊天頻道進行的非同步站會節省時間，並尊重每個人的工作時間和時區。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 以議程為導向的
toeic.example_en: Our manager runs only agenda-driven meetings, and topics without a written outline are postponed automatically.
toeic.example_zh: 我們經理只主持以議程為導向的會議，沒有書面大綱的主題會自動延後。

toeic.example_en: Meeting overload was destroying productivity, so we introduced two no-meeting days every single week.
toeic.example_zh: 會議過多正在破壞生產力，因此我們每週實施兩個無會議日。

toeic.example_en: If you face calendar overload, decline meetings without agendas and propose async updates instead.
toeic.example_zh: 若您面臨行事曆過載，請拒絕沒有議程的會議，並提議改用非同步更新。

toeic.example_en: I am double-booked at eleven, so could we please move the design review to two p.m.?
toeic.example_zh: 我十一點有重複預約，能否將設計審查改到下午兩點？

toeic.example_en: Our team avoids a strict camera-on policy because it adds pressure for parents working from home.
toeic.example_zh: 我們團隊避免嚴格的開鏡頭政策，因為這對在家工作的家長造成壓力。

toeic.example_en: A camera-off option respects employees who are eating lunch or caring for a young child nearby.
toeic.example_zh: 關閉鏡頭選項尊重正在吃午餐或照顧附近幼童的員工。

toeic.example_en: Use the raised hand feature instead of interrupting when the facilitator is finishing a key point.
toeic.example_zh: 當主持人正完成重點時，請使用舉手功能而非打斷他人。

toeic.example_en: Please drop links and quick questions into the chat panel during the presentation for later review.
toeic.example_zh: 請在簡報期間將連結和簡短問題放入聊天面板，方便稍後檢視。

toeic.example_en: A simple thumbs-up reaction emoji confirms you heard the request without interrupting the speaker again.
toeic.example_zh: 簡單的讚表情符號回應能確認您收到請求，且不會再次打斷講者。

toeic.example_en: Reply in a thread message rather than the main channel to keep conversations clean and organized.
toeic.example_zh: 請在串列訊息中回覆，而非主頻道，以保持對話整潔有條理。

toeic.example_en: Our channel etiquette includes using clear titles and tagging only the colleagues who must respond.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的頻道禮儀包括使用清楚標題，並只標記必須回覆的同事。

toeic.example_en: Please tag a colleague directly if the message requires their immediate input before the deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 若訊息需要某位同事在截止前立即回應，請直接標記該同事。

toeic.example_en: Feel free to ping someone on the support channel if the technical issue affects your customer call.
toeic.example_zh: 若技術問題影響您與客戶的通話，請隨時在支援頻道訊息聯繫某人。

toeic.example_en: Drop a line in our shared channel when you finish reviewing the contract draft so I know.
toeic.example_zh: 您審閱完合約草稿後，請在共享頻道留言，讓我知道。

toeic.example_en: Looping in our legal advisor here so she can confirm the privacy clause before we proceed further.
toeic.example_zh: 在此將法務顧問納入，讓她能在我們繼續之前確認隱私條款。

toeic.example_en: Can we have a quick sync after lunch to align on the revised launch date for the campaign?
toeic.example_zh: 我們能在午餐後快速同步一下，對齊新的活動上線日期嗎？

toeic.example_en: Block ninety minutes for a working session where we actually edit the document together instead of talking.
toeic.example_zh: 預留九十分鐘的工作會議，讓我們真正一起編輯文件，而不只是討論。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 共用辦公的
toeic.example_en: On Fridays I head to a co-working space because the energy of other people boosts my focus.
toeic.example_zh: 週五我會去共用辦公空間，因為其他人帶來的活力能提升我的專注力。

toeic.example_en: Our office reduced costs by switching to hot desking, since only sixty percent of staff visit daily.
toeic.example_zh: 我們辦公室改用共用座位後降低了成本，因為每日僅六成員工會到場。

toeic.example_en: Use the desk booking app the night before to secure a quiet seat near the window for tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 請於前一晚使用座位預訂應用程式，預定明天靠窗的安靜座位。

toeic.example_en: Wednesday is our office anchor day, so most teammates come in for in-person collaboration and lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 週三是我們進辦公室固定日，多數隊友會到場進行面對面協作和共進午餐。

toeic.example_en: Difficult product discussions often benefit from in-person collaboration with sticky notes and a real whiteboard.
toeic.example_zh: 困難的產品討論常常受益於使用便利貼和實體白板的面對面協作。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly retreats provide valuable face time for distributed teams that rarely meet in person otherwise.
toeic.example_zh: 季度團隊聚會為平時鮮少面對面相處的分散團隊提供寶貴的相處時間。

toeic.example_en: Our team offsite by the lake helped strangers from different countries finally bond as close colleagues.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在湖邊的團隊外宿活動，讓來自不同國家的陌生人終於凝聚成親密同事。

toeic.example_en: Twice a month I schedule a virtual coffee with a coworker I would otherwise rarely speak with.
toeic.example_zh: 我每月兩次安排與平時鮮少交談的同事進行線上咖啡聚會。

toeic.example_en: Remote teams miss the natural watercooler chat that often sparks small but useful ideas at work.
toeic.example_zh: 遠端團隊缺少自然的茶水間閒聊，而這種閒聊常激發實用的小點子。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 遠端工作的人際關係
toeic.example_en: Building remote rapport takes longer because casual encounters in hallways simply do not happen online.
toeic.example_zh: 建立遠端工作的人際關係需要更長時間，因為走廊巧遇在線上不會發生。

toeic.example_en: Managing a distributed workforce requires written norms that explain how decisions are made and shared transparently.
toeic.example_zh: 管理分散式人力需要書面準則，說明決策如何透明地做出並共享。

toeic.example_en: A remote-first culture means meetings and documents are designed for people outside the headquarters office.
toeic.example_zh: 遠端優先文化意味著會議和文件都是為總部以外的同仁設計的。

toeic.example_en: Our hybrid model lets staff choose any three office days while keeping Tuesday mandatory for everyone.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的混合工作模式讓員工可選任三天進辦公室，但週二為所有人必到日。

toeic.example_en: The hybrid arrangement offers two remote days per week plus an optional Friday from any location.
toeic.example_zh: 此混合安排提供每週兩天遠端工作，加上週五可從任何地點選擇性參與。

toeic.example_en: My split week is three days at the office Monday through Wednesday and two days from home.
toeic.example_zh: 我的分拆工作週是週一到週三進辦公室三天，另外兩天在家工作。

toeic.example_en: Our small office uses an office rotation schedule because the building cannot hold everyone at once.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的小辦公室採用進辦公室輪流制，因為大樓無法同時容納所有人。

toeic.example_en: Our work from anywhere policy allows up to thirty days a year from a foreign country.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的從任何地方工作政策允許每年最多三十天在國外工作。

toeic.example_en: As a digital nomad, she moves between Lisbon, Bali, and Mexico City while staying productive remotely.
toeic.example_zh: 身為數位遊牧者，她在里斯本、峇里島和墨西哥城之間移動，並維持遠端高生產力。

toeic.example_en: Many software roles are now location-independent as long as employees deliver results on time consistently.
toeic.example_zh: 許多軟體職位現在不限地點，只要員工持續準時交付成果即可。

toeic.example_en: Our internet stipend reimburses up to thirty dollars monthly for upgraded broadband in your residence.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的網路津貼每月最高補助三十美元，用於住家升級寬頻。

toeic.example_en: Submit your receipt through the portal to request equipment reimbursement for the ergonomic chair you purchased.
toeic.example_zh: 請透過入口網站提交收據，申請您所購人體工學椅的設備費報銷。

toeic.example_en: Effective remote onboarding sends laptops early and pairs each new hire with a friendly culture buddy.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的遠端入職會提前寄出筆電，並為每位新員工配對一位友善的文化夥伴。

toeic.example_en: Our buddy system pairs newcomers with experienced staff who answer everyday questions during their first month.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的夥伴制度將新人與資深員工配對，由後者在第一個月回答日常問題。

toeic.example_en: A short virtual icebreaker at the start of new project meetings helps strangers feel comfortable together.
toeic.example_zh: 在新專案會議開頭進行簡短線上破冰活動，能讓陌生人彼此感到自在。

toeic.example_en: Our collaboration platform stores meeting notes, project plans, and quick decisions in one searchable workspace.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的協作平台將會議記錄、專案計畫和快速決策存放於同一個可搜尋的工作區。

toeic.example_en: Pick one productivity tool for tasks and resist switching every quarter when teammates suggest something newer.
toeic.example_zh: 選定一個任務生產力工具，並抵抗每季隊友建議更新工具時的更換衝動。

toeic.example_en: Update the project tracker before logging off so everyone can see what is finished and what remains.
toeic.example_zh: 下班前請更新專案追蹤工具，讓所有人都看得到已完成項目和剩餘工作。

toeic.example_en: Time blocking each task on my calendar prevents the entire morning from disappearing into shallow email replies.
toeic.example_zh: 在行事曆上為每個任務做時段規劃，能避免整個早上消失在膚淺的回信中。

toeic.example_en: The shared calendar shows who is on vacation so we avoid scheduling urgent reviews on those days.
toeic.example_zh: 共享行事曆顯示誰在休假，讓我們避免在那些日子安排緊急審查。

toeic.example_en: Turn on a vacation responder for both email and chat before you leave for any long break.
toeic.example_zh: 在您長假離開前，請為電子郵件和聊天工具都開啟休假自動回覆。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 戴上耳機（表示專注）
toeic.example_en: When the team sees my headphones on icon, they save non-urgent questions for later in the afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 當團隊看到我戴上耳機的圖示時，他們會將非緊急問題留到下午稍晚再問。

toeic.example_en: Our team protects quiet hours from nine to eleven so we can complete creative work without interruptions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們團隊保護九點到十一點的安靜時段，讓大家不受打擾完成創意工作。

toeic.example_en: Adopting no-meeting Wednesday gave engineers a predictable day for deep coding and design reviews.
toeic.example_zh: 採用週三無會議日為工程師提供可預期的深度寫程式和設計審查時間。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 核心重疊工作時段
toeic.example_en: Please keep ten a.m. to noon as your core overlap hours when most colleagues are usually online.
toeic.example_zh: 請將上午十點到中午保留為核心重疊工作時段，因為多數同事此時都在線上。

toeic.example_en: A flex schedule lets parents pick up their children at four and finish work later in the evening.
toeic.example_zh: 彈性工時表讓家長能在四點接送孩子，並在傍晚稍晚完成工作。

toeic.example_en: We stagger hours across the team to keep customer support coverage from morning until late evening.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在團隊內錯開上下班時間，以維持從早晨到深夜的客服覆蓋。

toeic.example_en: Job seekers actively search for remote-friendly companies that publish clear policies on flexibility and trust.
toeic.example_zh: 求職者積極尋找對遠端友善的公司，這類公司會公布明確的彈性與信任政策。

toeic.example_en: We assessed each teams remote readiness before allowing managers to switch their teams to full hybrid mode.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在允許主管將團隊切換成全混合模式前，評估每個團隊的遠端工作準備度。

toeic.example_en: Good remote etiquette includes muting yourself when not speaking and being on time for every call.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的遠端工作禮儀包括未發言時靜音，以及準時參加每場通話。

toeic.example_en: Strong meeting etiquette means starting on time, sharing the agenda early, and ending with clear action items.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的會議禮儀意味著準時開始、提前分享議程，並以明確的待辦事項結束。

toeic.example_en: Who will facilitate the meeting today so we keep on time and stay focused on the main agenda?
toeic.example_zh: 今天誰來主持會議，讓我們準時並聚焦於主要議程？

toeic.example_en: Please volunteer as note-taker today and post the summary to our wiki by end of business.
toeic.example_zh: 請今天志願擔任會議記錄者，並在下班前將摘要發布到我們的維基。

toeic.example_en: Send a short meeting summary within twenty-four hours so absent colleagues can catch up quickly themselves.
toeic.example_zh: 請在二十四小時內傳送簡短會議摘要，讓缺席同事能自行快速跟上進度。

toeic.example_en: We posted the recording of the all-hands so teammates in Asia could watch when convenient.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將全員大會的錄影發布出來，讓亞洲隊友能在方便時觀看。

toeic.example_en: Turn on captioning for accessibility so colleagues with hearing differences can follow the conversation comfortably.
toeic.example_zh: 請開啟字幕以提升無障礙性，讓聽力差異的同事能舒適地跟上對話。

toeic.example_en: Adjust the screen share permission so any participant can present without waiting for the host approval.
toeic.example_zh: 請調整螢幕分享權限，讓任何與會者都能簡報而無需等待主持人核准。

toeic.example_en: Smaller toolbars give you more screen real estate when comparing two long documents side by side.
toeic.example_zh: 較小的工具列在並排比較兩份長文件時，能給您更多螢幕空間。

toeic.example_en: Switch off video in low bandwidth situations so audio stays clear during the important client discussion.
toeic.example_zh: 在低頻寬情況下請關閉視訊，讓重要客戶討論時的聲音保持清晰。

toeic.example_en: Working from a remote village often means high latency that disrupts smooth voice calls with colleagues abroad.
toeic.example_zh: 從偏遠村莊工作經常代表高延遲，會干擾與海外同事的順暢語音通話。

toeic.example_en: Frequent dropouts during the demo embarrassed the team in front of the very important enterprise customer.
toeic.example_zh: 示範期間頻繁掉線，讓團隊在非常重要的企業客戶面前難堪。

toeic.example_en: If my video starts to freeze up, please continue the discussion and I will rejoin in seconds.
toeic.example_zh: 若我的視訊開始凍結，請繼續討論，我會在數秒內重新加入。

toeic.example_en: A frozen screen during your turn to present can be solved by quickly switching to mobile data.
toeic.example_zh: 您簡報時若畫面凍結，可快速切換到行動數據解決。

toeic.example_en: Sorry team, I had to rejoin the call after my router rebooted unexpectedly in the middle of discussion.
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉各位，討論中途路由器意外重啟，我必須重新加入通話。

toeic.example_en: Please dial back in by phone if your laptop audio still gives everyone trouble during this morning meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 若您筆電的音訊在今早會議仍困擾大家，請以電話重新撥入。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 開啟麥克風（誤開麥）
toeic.example_en: Sorry, my open mic captured my barking dog and interrupted the speakers important policy announcement just now.
toeic.example_zh: 抱歉，我誤開麥克風錄到了狗叫聲，打斷了講者剛才重要的政策宣布。

toeic.example_en: We can see you are speaking, but you are on mute, so please unmute and start again briefly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們看到您正在說話，但您在靜音狀態，請取消靜音並簡短重說一次。

toeic.example_en: Async work rewards a clear low-context message that anyone can understand without joining a follow-up call.
toeic.example_zh: 非同步工作有利於清楚的低脈絡訊息，讓任何人無需參加後續通話即可理解。

toeic.example_en: Constant context switching between four different tools wastes time and silently reduces overall daily output quality.
toeic.example_zh: 在四種不同工具間不斷切換任務浪費時間，並悄悄降低每日整體產出品質。

toeic.example_en: Designate the project wiki as the single source of truth so people stop debating outdated email versions.
toeic.example_zh: 請將專案維基指定為單一事實來源，讓大家不再爭論過時的郵件版本。

toeic.example_en: A written-first habit forces clearer thinking and gives remote colleagues equal access to important context.
toeic.example_zh: 文字優先的習慣促使思緒更清晰，並讓遠端同事擁有同等的重要脈絡。

toeic.example_en: Publish a short decision document after every major debate so newcomers understand the reasoning later on.
toeic.example_zh: 請在每場重大辯論後發布簡短決策文件，讓新人之後能理解背後理由。

toeic.example_en: Our manager sends a weekly recap every Friday afternoon summarising decisions, risks, and praise for the team.
toeic.example_zh: 我們經理每週五下午寄出週報，摘要決策、風險和對團隊的讚許。

toeic.example_en: Each project owner posts a one-page snapshot report so leadership can scan progress in under ten minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 每位專案負責人會發布一頁快照報告，讓高層能在十分鐘內快速掌握進度。

toeic.example_en: Strong ownership lets remote teams move fast because nobody waits for permission to fix obvious problems.
toeic.example_zh: 強烈的負責性讓遠端團隊能快速行動，因為沒人會等待許可才修正明顯問題。

toeic.example_en: Clear accountability for each deliverable prevents tasks from quietly falling through the cracks between team members.
toeic.example_zh: 對每項交付物的明確當責能避免任務在團隊成員間悄悄遺漏。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 以信任為基礎的
toeic.example_en: A trust-based culture replaces strict tracking with clear goals and honest conversations about realistic progress.
toeic.example_zh: 以信任為基礎的文化以明確目標和對實際進度的誠實對話取代嚴格追蹤。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 微觀管理；過度管控
toeic.example_en: Managers who micromanage remote staff cause stress and signal they do not actually trust their teams.
toeic.example_zh: 對遠端員工微觀管理的主管會造成壓力，並暗示他們並不真正信任團隊。

toeic.example_en: Many engineers join remote companies because autonomy over schedule and method matters more than free office snacks.
toeic.example_zh: 許多工程師加入遠端公司，因為對日程和方法的自主性比免費辦公室點心重要。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自由裁量；自行決定
toeic.example_en: Use your own discretion on tool choices as long as the team can still review your final output.
toeic.example_zh: 工具選擇可由您自行決定，只要團隊仍能審閱您的最終產出。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 以產出為依據的
toeic.example_en: Output-based evaluation focuses on delivered results, not on how many hours appear in the time-tracking app.
toeic.example_zh: 以產出為依據的評估著重於交付成果，而非工時追蹤應用程式中顯示的小時數。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 以成果為導向的
toeic.example_en: An outcome-driven team negotiates clear targets first and then chooses any working style that fits them.
toeic.example_zh: 以成果為導向的團隊會先協商明確目標，再選擇任何適合的工作方式。

toeic.example_en: Our deliverable-focused approach removes pointless attendance checks and rewards staff who consistently ship quality work.
toeic.example_zh: 我們著重交付物的做法移除了無謂的出勤檢查，並獎勵持續交付優質工作的員工。

toeic.example_en: Some remote workers report loneliness at work, so we now host casual virtual lunches every other Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 部分遠端工作者反映工作孤獨感，因此我們現在每隔週五舉辦輕鬆的線上午餐。

toeic.example_en: Long stretches of isolation can quietly hurt motivation, so check in regularly with colleagues you trust.
toeic.example_zh: 長時間的孤立感會悄悄削弱動力，請定期與您信任的同事保持聯繫。

toeic.example_en: Maintaining social connection beyond pure work topics keeps distributed teams feeling like real human colleagues.
toeic.example_zh: 保持工作主題以外的社交連結，能讓分散式團隊感覺彼此像真正的人類同事。

toeic.example_en: Celebrating small wins publicly during the standup keeps team morale steady even during very stressful release weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 在站會中公開慶祝小成就，即使在壓力極大的發布週，也能維持團隊士氣。

toeic.example_en: Our wellbeing program offers therapy sessions, meditation app credits, and quarterly stipends for fitness equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的健康促進方案提供心理諮商、冥想應用程式點數，以及每季健身設備津貼。

toeic.example_en: Effective mental health support starts with leaders openly sharing their own struggles and the resources that helped.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的心理健康支持始於主管公開分享自身困境，以及曾經幫助他們的資源。

toeic.example_en: A weekend digital detox without work apps installed on my phone really helped me recover after the project.
toeic.example_zh: 週末進行數位排毒，手機不安裝工作應用程式，真的幫助我在專案後恢復狀態。

toeic.example_en: Cutting evening screen time helps me sleep better and arrive ready for the early morning daily standup.
toeic.example_zh: 減少夜間螢幕使用時間幫助我睡得更好，並能精神飽滿出席清晨的每日站會。

toeic.example_en: I need to step away from my desk for ten minutes while my child finishes online math class.
toeic.example_zh: 我需要離開座位十分鐘，等我的孩子上完線上數學課。

toeic.example_en: I will be afk for fifteen minutes to walk the dog, but please leave a message in chat.
toeic.example_zh: 我會離開電腦十五分鐘去遛狗，但請在聊天裡留言給我。

toeic.example_en: I am back at desk now and ready to review the design feedback you posted earlier this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我現在回到座位了，準備檢視您今早稍早發布的設計回饋。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 已準備好遠端工作的
toeic.example_en: Each new hire receives a remote-ready kit including laptop, headset, monitor, and a comfortable office chair.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新進員工會收到一份遠端工作準備包，含筆電、耳機、螢幕和舒適辦公椅。

toeic.example_en: Test your tech setup before joining your very first client meeting from this brand-new home office.
toeic.example_zh: 從這個全新家庭辦公室首次加入客戶會議前，請先測試您的設備配置。

toeic.example_en: Do a quick audio check before the keynote so the speaker hears no echo from the new microphone.
toeic.example_zh: 請在主題演講前快速進行聲音測試，確保講者不會聽到新麥克風的回音。

toeic.example_en: A short mic test confirmed my voice was clear, so the panel discussion finally began on schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 簡短的麥克風測試確認我的聲音清晰，因此座談討論終於準時開始。

toeic.example_en: A simple lighting setup with one lamp facing your face makes any video call look much more professional.
toeic.example_zh: 簡單的燈光配置，一盞朝向您臉部的檯燈，能讓任何視訊通話看起來更專業。

toeic.example_en: Raise your laptop so the camera angle is at eye level rather than awkwardly looking up your nose.
toeic.example_zh: 請墊高筆電，讓鏡頭角度與眼睛平行，而非尷尬地由下往上拍到鼻孔。

toeic.example_en: Adjust your framing so your head and shoulders sit comfortably in the middle of the video preview.
toeic.example_zh: 請調整取景，讓您的頭部和肩膀舒適地位於視訊預覽中央。

toeic.example_en: When I appear away on chat, colleagues should still feel free to send messages I will read soon.
toeic.example_zh: 當我在聊天中顯示離開狀態時，同事仍可自由傳送訊息，我會盡快讀取。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 遠端工作人體工學
toeic.example_en: Our remote ergonomics guide explains how to align your screen, chair, and keyboard to avoid common injuries.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的遠端工作人體工學指南說明如何調整螢幕、椅子和鍵盤，以避免常見傷害。

toeic.example_en: Set a posture check reminder every hour to reset your shoulders and lengthen your spine slowly.
toeic.example_zh: 請每小時設定姿勢檢查提醒，重新放鬆肩膀並慢慢拉長脊椎。

toeic.example_en: Submit a tech support ticket if your VPN refuses to connect even after restarting the laptop completely.
toeic.example_zh: 若您完全重啟筆電後 VPN 仍無法連線，請提交技術支援單。

toeic.example_en: Our IT team can take over your screen with remote support and fix many issues in under five minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們資訊團隊能透過遠端支援接管您的螢幕，在五分鐘內修復多數問題。

toeic.example_en: Please only use the company laptop for work tasks and store personal files on your private device.
toeic.example_zh: 請僅用公司配發筆電處理工作任務，並將個人檔案存於私人裝置。

toeic.example_en: Return every company device by your last working day so the IT team can wipe data securely.
toeic.example_zh: 請在最後工作日歸還所有公司裝置，讓資訊團隊能安全清除資料。

toeic.example_en: Device management software lets IT push security updates to remote staff without disrupting their daily workflow.
toeic.example_zh: 裝置管理軟體讓資訊部門能向遠端員工推送安全更新，且不干擾日常工作流程。

toeic.example_en: Avoid logging into financial systems on public wifi at airports and cafes, even if the network seems trustworthy.
toeic.example_zh: 請避免在機場和咖啡店的公共無線網路上登入財務系統，即使網路看似可信。

toeic.example_en: When the office internet failed, I shared a phone hot spot so the entire team could finish demos.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公室網路故障時，我分享手機行動熱點，讓整個團隊能完成示範。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 網路共享（手機分享網路）
toeic.example_en: Mobile tethering saved my client demo when the home broadband mysteriously dropped during the most critical moment.
toeic.example_zh: 在家中寬頻於最關鍵時刻神秘斷線時，手機網路共享挽救了我的客戶示範。

toeic.example_en: A rolling restart of every laptop overnight pushed the urgent patch without disturbing any remote workers tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 每台筆電夜間滾動式重啟推送了緊急修補程式，且不會打擾任何遠端工作者。

toeic.example_en: Daily remote backup of your work folder protects months of important documents from sudden hard drive failure.
toeic.example_zh: 每日遠端備份您的工作資料夾，可保護數月重要文件免於硬碟突然故障。

toeic.example_en: Treat the planning page as a live document that anyone may update during their normal daily work.
toeic.example_zh: 請將規畫頁面視為即時文件，任何人都可在日常工作中更新。

toeic.example_en: Collaborative editing replaces ten reply emails with a single document where suggestions sit beside the actual text.
toeic.example_zh: 協同編輯以一份文件取代十封回覆郵件，建議就放在實際文字旁邊。

toeic.example_en: Use tagging sparingly because constant notifications quickly train people to ignore important messages from their colleagues.
toeic.example_zh: 請謹慎使用標記功能，因為不斷的通知很快會讓人們忽略同事的重要訊息。

toeic.example_en: Notification fatigue from forty daily pings leaves staff exhausted and unable to do truly meaningful deep work.
toeic.example_zh: 每日四十次提示帶來的通知疲勞讓員工筋疲力盡，無法進行真正有意義的深度工作。

toeic.example_en: Snooze notifications for ninety minutes whenever you need to draft a sensitive customer email without distractions.
toeic.example_zh: 每當您需要在不受干擾下撰寫敏感客戶郵件時，請將通知暫停九十分鐘。

toeic.example_en: Even on video calls, simple office attire from the waist up keeps interactions feeling professional and respectful.
toeic.example_zh: 即使是視訊通話，腰部以上穿著簡單的辦公室服裝也能讓互動保持專業與尊重。

toeic.example_en: Smart casual is fine for internal calls, but please choose business attire for any meeting with investors.
toeic.example_zh: 內部通話穿商務休閒即可，但與投資人會議時請選擇正式商務服裝。

toeic.example_en: During your remote interview, find a quiet room with good lighting and avoid sitting beside a sunny window.
toeic.example_zh: 進行遠端面試時，請找一間安靜且光線良好的房間，避免坐在向陽窗邊。

toeic.example_en: Successful virtual onboarding combines video introductions, written guides, and a friendly buddy for casual day-to-day questions.
toeic.example_zh: 成功的虛擬入職結合影片自我介紹、書面指南，以及友善夥伴回答日常輕鬆問題。

toeic.example_en: Our remote orientation covers benefits, security policies, and the unwritten norms that shape how teams really collaborate.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的遠端職前訓練涵蓋福利、安全政策，以及形塑團隊實際協作的不成文慣例。

toeic.example_en: Each new joiner receives a welcome package with branded mug, notebook, and a handwritten note from leadership.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新進員工會收到含公司馬克杯、筆記本和高層手寫卡片的歡迎禮包。

toeic.example_en: My remote first day included a virtual office tour and short video chats with seven helpful future teammates.
toeic.example_zh: 我的遠端首日包括一場虛擬辦公室導覽和與七位熱心未來隊友的短暫視訊聊天。

toeic.example_en: A healthy remote culture treats async communication as the default and reserves meetings only for true decision points.
toeic.example_zh: 健康的遠端文化將非同步溝通視為預設，僅在真正需要決策時才召開會議。

toeic.example_en: An asynchronous-first team writes everything down so people across many time zones can contribute fairly together.
toeic.example_zh: 非同步優先的團隊會將一切寫下，讓跨越多時區的人都能公平共同貢獻。

toeic.example_en: Synchronous-first teams prefer real-time meetings, which is harder when staff are spread across many distant continents.
toeic.example_zh: 同步優先的團隊偏好即時會議，但這在員工分散於多個遙遠大陸時較難實現。

toeic.example_en: Remote leadership demands clearer writing, more empathy, and patient listening through small details on every team call.
toeic.example_zh: 遠端領導需要更清楚的書寫、更多同理心，以及在每次團隊通話中耐心傾聽小細節。

toeic.example_en: Good remote management replaces visible hours with clear goals and trusted weekly conversations about progress and obstacles.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的遠端管理以清楚目標和每週進度與障礙的信任對話，取代可見工時。

toeic.example_en: Leaders who manage by results give their teams freedom to choose where, when, and how the work happens.
toeic.example_zh: 以結果管理的領導者賦予團隊選擇工作地點、時間與方式的自由。

toeic.example_en: Set expectations on response time during onboarding so new hires do not feel pressured to answer at midnight.
toeic.example_zh: 請在入職時設定回覆時間的期望，讓新人不必感到被迫在午夜回應。

toeic.example_en: Our response time expectation is four working hours, not four real hours including dinner and family time.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的回覆時間期望是四個工作小時，而非含晚餐和家庭時間的四個實際小時。

toeic.example_en: Several countries now protect the right to disconnect, so employees do not have to answer late-night work emails.
toeic.example_zh: 多個國家現已保障離線權，員工因此不必回覆深夜的工作電子郵件。

toeic.example_en: Try to schedule after-hours email to send during normal business hours so colleagues feel less pressure later.
toeic.example_zh: 請盡量將下班後郵件排定於正常上班時間寄出，讓同事之後感受到較少壓力。

toeic.example_en: Use delayed send to draft replies at midnight while keeping a respectful nine a.m. delivery time for everyone.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用延遲寄送，在午夜撰寫回覆，但為大家保留尊重的上午九點送達時間。

toeic.example_en: I love schedule send because I write best at night but want my notes to arrive during work hours.
toeic.example_zh: 我喜歡排程寄送，因為我夜晚寫作最佳，但希望我的筆記在上班時間送達。

toeic.example_en: Both manager and employee sign a remote-work agreement that outlines work hours, equipment, and security expectations clearly.
toeic.example_zh: 主管與員工皆簽署遠端工作協議，明確列出工時、設備與資安期望。

toeic.example_en: Read our updated WFH policy carefully because it now requires monthly office attendance for every full-time employee.
toeic.example_zh: 請仔細閱讀我們更新的在家工作政策，因為現在每位全職員工每月皆須到辦公室。

toeic.example_en: I usually schedule deep writing tasks on work-from-home days because they offer fewer hallway interruptions.
toeic.example_zh: 我通常在在家工作日安排深度寫作任務，因為走廊干擾較少。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 第三場所（非家非辦公室）
toeic.example_en: Many remote workers seek a quiet third place such as a library to balance home and full office life.
toeic.example_zh: 許多遠端工作者尋找如圖書館等安靜的第三場所，以平衡居家與全辦公室生活。

toeic.example_en: Use the remote stipend for coffee shop fees if working at home alone slows your usual creative output.
toeic.example_zh: 若獨自在家工作降低您平時的創意產出，請用遠端工作補貼支付咖啡店費用。

toeic.example_en: Our workspace stipend covers a yearly subscription to any co-working space within fifteen kilometers of your residence.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的工作空間補助涵蓋距您住家十五公里內任何共用辦公空間的年度訂閱費。

toeic.example_en: The stipend cap is one thousand dollars annually, and any spending above that must be approved by finance.
toeic.example_zh: 補貼上限為每年一千美元，超過此額度的支出必須由財務部核准。

toeic.example_en: Under our BYOD setup, staff install company software on personal devices and follow strict mobile security guidelines.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們的自帶裝置設定下，員工於個人裝置安裝公司軟體並遵守嚴格行動安全準則。

toeic.example_en: Our device policy bans installing public chat apps onto laptops that also access financial customer information regularly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的裝置政策禁止在會定期存取財務客戶資料的筆電上安裝公開聊天應用程式。

toeic.example_en: All employees must finish remote security training within two weeks of joining, including a short phishing simulation.
toeic.example_zh: 所有員工須在到職兩週內完成遠端資安訓練，包含一次短暫的釣魚演練。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 家庭辦公室扣抵稅額
toeic.example_en: Self-employed consultants in some countries can claim a home office deduction on their annual income tax filing.
toeic.example_zh: 在某些國家，自僱顧問可在年度所得稅申報中申請家庭辦公室扣抵稅額。

toeic.example_en: A monthly co-working membership gives me access to forty offices across Asia whenever I travel for business.
toeic.example_zh: 每月共用辦公會員讓我出差時可使用遍佈亞洲的四十間辦公室。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 對遠端友善的工作時間
toeic.example_en: Posting jobs with remote-friendly hours attracts top candidates raising young children or caring for aging parents.
toeic.example_zh: 刊登對遠端友善工作時間的職缺，能吸引正在育兒或照顧年邁父母的優秀人才。

toeic.example_en: Global hiring opened our talent pool dramatically, but it also added complex payroll and compliance work each month.
toeic.example_zh: 全球招聘大幅擴展我們的人才庫，但也每月增加複雜的薪資與合規工作。

toeic.example_en: An employer of record handles taxes and contracts so you can hire engineers in countries without your branch.
toeic.example_zh: 名義雇主服務處理稅務與合約，讓您能在沒有分公司的國家僱用工程師。

toeic.example_en: Sign the contractor agreement before starting any work so both parties agree on scope, payment, and ownership.
toeic.example_zh: 開始任何工作前請簽署承攬合約，讓雙方對範圍、付款與所有權達成共識。

toeic.example_en: Between full-time jobs, she took freelance gigs writing user guides for small remote software startups overseas.
toeic.example_zh: 在全職工作間，她接自由接案工作，為海外小型遠端軟體新創撰寫使用者指南。

toeic.example_en: Be careful that any side project does not compete with our products or use the same private code.
toeic.example_zh: 請小心，您的業外專案不可與我們產品競爭或使用相同私有程式碼。

toeic.example_en: Our company encourages a small passion project each quarter as long as core deliverables stay on schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 我們公司鼓勵每季進行一個小型興趣型專案，只要核心交付物如期完成即可。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly remote engagement surveys reveal whether staff feel heard, supported, and connected to the wider company mission.
toeic.example_zh: 每季遠端員工投入調查揭示員工是否感到被聆聽、被支持並與公司更大使命連結。

toeic.example_en: Strong employee experience for remote staff begins on day one with a working laptop and a warm welcome call.
toeic.example_zh: 遠端員工的良好體驗從第一天可運作的筆電和溫暖的歡迎電話開始。

toeic.example_en: Simple team rituals like Friday gratitude posts build belonging when colleagues rarely meet in person each year.
toeic.example_zh: 如週五感恩貼文等簡單團隊儀式，能在同事每年鮮少見面時建立歸屬感。

toeic.example_en: Monthly rituals of recognition during our all-hands celebrate small wins that often go unnoticed in daily work.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們每月全員大會中舉行的表揚儀式，慶祝日常工作中經常被忽略的小成就。

toeic.example_en: Drop a quick message in the praise channel whenever a colleague helps you solve a tricky customer problem.
toeic.example_zh: 當同事幫您解決棘手客戶問題時，請在讚美頻道留下一則簡短訊息。

toeic.example_en: Our shout-out channel is full of warm messages thanking teammates by name for their behind-the-scenes effort.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的公開致謝頻道滿是溫暖訊息，指名感謝隊友幕後的付出。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 遠端團隊集合活動
toeic.example_en: Our yearly remote retreat in the mountains balances workshops, hiking, and quiet free evenings for reflection together.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在山上的年度遠端團隊集合活動結合工作坊、健行和安靜的夜晚共同省思。

toeic.example_en: Our annual team summit brings remote colleagues together for three days of strategy, training, and shared restaurant meals.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的年度團隊高峰會讓遠端同事齊聚三天進行策略討論、訓練和共享餐廳餐點。

toeic.example_en: Our monthly virtual happy hour features themed trivia games and a cocktail kit shipped to each home office.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每月線上歡樂時光以主題趣味問答為特色，並寄送調酒組合到每個家庭辦公室。

toeic.example_en: Our online game night brings teammates together to relax after a stressful week of customer escalations.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的線上遊戲之夜在客戶升級爆量的緊張一週後，讓隊友相聚放鬆。

toeic.example_en: Once a quarter our company arranges snack delivery so each remote employee can enjoy treats during the all-hands meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 公司每季安排零食宅配，讓每位遠端員工在全員大會時都能享用點心。

toeic.example_en: New parents on our team receive a thoughtful remote care package with baby items and a handwritten team card.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊中初為人父母的同事會收到貼心的遠端關懷包，內含嬰兒用品和手寫團隊卡片。

toeic.example_en: We celebrate every remote birthday with a personalised video message stitched together from many colleagues short clips.
toeic.example_zh: 我們以由許多同事短片剪輯而成的個人化影片祝福，慶祝每個遠端生日。

toeic.example_en: Our team newsletter shares wins, upcoming launches, and personal milestones every other Wednesday morning across all departments.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的團隊電子報每隔週三早晨在所有部門間分享成就、即將推出的功能和個人里程碑。

toeic.example_en: Our CEO hosts a monthly ask-me-anything session, and remote staff submit questions through a simple anonymous web form.
toeic.example_zh: 我們執行長每月主持自由提問環節，遠端員工透過簡單的匿名網頁表單提交問題。

toeic.example_en: Watch the town hall recording at your own pace if your time zone made attending live impossible this week.
toeic.example_zh: 若您所在時區使本週無法即時參加，請依自己步調觀看全員大會錄影。

toeic.example_en: Remote-first hiring lets us find specialists from rural areas who never had access to large city tech jobs.
toeic.example_zh: 遠端優先招聘讓我們能尋找來自偏鄉、從未有機會接觸大城市科技工作的專才。

toeic.example_en: A global talent pool means we can hire the very best candidates regardless of their physical home address.
toeic.example_zh: 全球人才庫意味著我們能僱用最頂尖的人才，不論他們實際住在哪裡。

toeic.example_en: Our geo-flexible roles let employees relocate to almost any country without resigning, provided taxes can be properly arranged.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的地點彈性職位允許員工搬到幾乎任何國家而不需辭職，前提是稅務能妥善處理。

toeic.example_en: An internal mobility program helps remote staff move between teams without rejoining the long external recruitment process.
toeic.example_zh: 內部流動計畫幫助遠端員工在團隊間轉調，無須重走漫長的對外招聘流程。

toeic.example_en: Remote promotion criteria must reward measurable impact, not just visible office presence near the senior leadership team.
toeic.example_zh: 遠端升遷標準必須獎勵可衡量的影響力，而非僅僅在高階領導附近的可見出勤。

toeic.example_en: Managers must actively fight proximity bias so remote staff receive equal coaching, projects, and promotions as office colleagues.
toeic.example_zh: 主管須積極對抗近距偏見，讓遠端員工獲得與辦公室同事同等的指導、專案和升遷。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 對遠端友善的福利
toeic.example_en: Truly remote-friendly perks include wellness stipends and learning budgets rather than just free office lunches downtown.
toeic.example_zh: 真正對遠端友善的福利包含健康津貼和學習預算，而非僅僅市中心辦公室的免費午餐。

toeic.example_en: Each engineer receives an annual learning budget to spend on courses, conferences, or thoughtful technical books they choose.
toeic.example_zh: 每位工程師每年獲得學習預算，可用於課程、研討會或他們選擇的優質技術書籍。

toeic.example_en: Use the professional book stipend to grow skills directly related to your current role or your future career path.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用專業書籍補助來精進與您目前職位或未來職涯直接相關的技能。

toeic.example_en: Self-paced training lets every remote employee learn during quiet moments without pressure to keep up with a classroom.
toeic.example_zh: 自學節奏訓練讓每位遠端員工能在安靜時刻學習，不必有跟上課堂的壓力。

toeic.example_en: I am in the office today if you want to grab a quick coffee or have a whiteboard discussion together.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天在辦公室，您想喝杯咖啡或一起進行白板討論都歡迎。

toeic.example_en: I am working from home today, but I am happy to join any urgent video call within thirty minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天在家工作，但可在三十分鐘內加入任何緊急視訊通話。

toeic.example_en: I will be out of pocket from one until three because of a medical appointment near my apartment.
toeic.example_zh: 下午一點到三點我暫時無法聯繫，因為我公寓附近有醫療預約。

toeic.example_en: Please respect my heads-down time between two and four because I am drafting the launch announcement copy.
toeic.example_zh: 請尊重我下午兩點到四點的埋頭專注時間，因為我正撰寫上線公告文案。

toeic.example_en: Our director keeps Tuesday afternoon open office hours so anyone can drop in for fifteen minutes of coaching.
toeic.example_zh: 我們主任每週二下午設有開放時段，任何人都能臨時加入十五分鐘的指導。

toeic.example_en: Each Friday a senior engineer runs a drop-in session to answer questions from junior remote team members worldwide.
toeic.example_zh: 每週五由資深工程師主持不預約諮詢時段，回答全球初階遠端團隊成員的問題。

toeic.example_en: Please book a slot on my calendly link instead of emailing me asking for available times this week.
toeic.example_zh: 請從我的預約連結上選一個時段，而不要寄信問我本週有空時間。

toeic.example_en: A simple scheduling link saves at least four back-and-forth emails when finding meeting times across distant time zones.
toeic.example_zh: 簡單的排程連結在跨時區尋找會議時間時，至少節省四次來回信件。

toeic.example_en: Please send me a calendar invite with a clear agenda so I can prepare proper questions ahead of time.
toeic.example_zh: 請寄會議邀請給我並附上清楚議程，讓我能提前準備合適的問題。

toeic.example_en: Effective remote feedback combines short written notes with one-on-one calls during which body language can still help.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的遠端回饋結合簡短書面紀錄和一對一通話，後者中肢體語言仍有幫助。

toeic.example_en: Wrap every constructive comment with a specific example so receivers understand exactly what to change in their work.
toeic.example_zh: 每個建設性意見請搭配具體範例，讓接收者明確了解該調整工作中的哪部分。

toeic.example_en: A regular one-on-one every fortnight gives remote staff a safe space to share concerns before they grow serious.
toeic.example_zh: 每兩週一次的定期一對一為遠端員工提供安全空間，在問題擴大前提出疑慮。

toeic.example_en: A thoughtful growth conversation helps remote employees see clear next steps and feel valued by their direct manager.
toeic.example_zh: 用心的成長對談讓遠端員工看到清楚的下一步，並感受到直屬主管的重視。

toeic.example_en: A blameless post-mortem focuses on the system that allowed the bug rather than the engineer who shipped it.
toeic.example_zh: 不究責檢討會聚焦於導致該錯誤的系統，而非交付該功能的工程師。

toeic.example_en: Remote pair programming with screen sharing helps junior engineers absorb senior reasoning during real production code work.
toeic.example_zh: 透過螢幕共享進行遠端結對寫程式，幫助初階工程師在實際生產程式碼工作中吸收資深思維。

toeic.example_en: A remote whiteboard tool with sticky notes lets distributed teams brainstorm visually almost as well as in person.
toeic.example_zh: 附便利貼的遠端白板工具讓分散式團隊幾乎能像面對面一樣進行視覺化腦力激盪。

toeic.example_en: Our mural board captures customer journey maps that the whole team can extend during the strategy workshop tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的視覺協作板記錄了客戶旅程圖，明天整個團隊能在策略工作坊中延伸發想。

toeic.example_en: We ran a sticky note exercise online and quickly clustered fifty ideas into four clear strategic themes for action.
toeic.example_zh: 我們線上進行便利貼練習，迅速將五十個想法歸納為四個清楚的策略主題。

toeic.example_en: A short brainstorm session usually works better than a long meeting because energy stays high and ideas keep flowing.
toeic.example_zh: 簡短的腦力激盪會議通常比冗長會議更有效，因為活力保持高昂且想法持續湧現。

toeic.example_en: Begin with a short round of introductions so newcomers feel welcomed before we dive into technical discussion topics.
toeic.example_zh: 請以簡短的自我介紹輪流開場，讓新人感受到歡迎，再進入技術討論主題。

toeic.example_en: Our remote celebration of the launch included a delivered snack box and a fun short video from each office.
toeic.example_zh: 我們上線的遠端慶祝活動包含宅配零食盒和來自各辦公室的有趣短片。

toeic.example_en: Focus on shipping the work this week rather than polishing slides for an internal demo no customer will see.
toeic.example_zh: 本週請專注於完成並交付工作，而非為客戶不會看到的內部示範美化投影片。

toeic.example_en: Post a short wrap-up message in our channel so anyone joining later can see decisions and remaining open questions.
toeic.example_zh: 請在我們頻道發布簡短結尾訊息，讓稍後加入的人能看到決策和剩餘待答問題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 對遠端友善的會議
toeic.example_en: A remote-friendly meeting includes a clear agenda, written summary, and a guarantee that everyone joins from their own laptop.
toeic.example_zh: 對遠端友善的會議包含明確議程、書面摘要，並確保每個人從自己的筆電加入。

toeic.example_en: A hybrid meeting can fail if office attendees forget the remote colleagues who cannot hear quiet hallway side comments.
toeic.example_zh: 混合式會議若辦公室與會者忘記聽不見走廊小聲評論的遠端同事，便可能失敗。

toeic.example_en: Strong meeting equity ensures remote and office staff have equal speaking time and equal access to the shared display.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的會議公平性確保遠端與辦公室員工有同等發言時間，並能同等使用共享顯示螢幕。

toeic.example_en: Our single laptop rule asks everyone to join from their own device even when sitting beside teammates in conference rooms.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的一人一筆電原則要求每個人都從自己的裝置加入，即使與隊友同坐會議室。

toeic.example_en: Our shared workspace keeps roadmaps, decisions, and customer feedback in one searchable place for the entire global company.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的共享工作空間將藍圖、決策和客戶回饋集中於一個可搜尋之處，供全球公司使用。

toeic.example_en: Our cloud workspace lets engineers in Manila and Berlin edit the same architecture diagram during one live session.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的雲端工作空間讓馬尼拉和柏林的工程師能在同一即時連線中編輯同一架構圖。

toeic.example_en: Document the remote escalation path clearly so engineers know which manager to wake at three in the morning.
toeic.example_zh: 請清楚記錄遠端升級處理路徑，讓工程師知道凌晨三點該叫醒哪位主管。

toeic.example_en: Open a dedicated incident channel during any outage so updates stay focused and clearly separated from regular work chat.
toeic.example_zh: 任何系統中斷時請開啟專屬事件處理頻道，讓更新聚焦並與一般工作聊天清楚區隔。

toeic.example_en: Each engineer joins the on-call rotation for one week every two months to handle late-night production issues fairly.
toeic.example_zh: 每位工程師每兩個月加入一週待命輪班，公平處理深夜的生產系統問題。

toeic.example_en: A clean remote handover at the end of the shift includes open tickets, blockers, and helpful context for tomorrow.
toeic.example_zh: 輪班結束時的清楚遠端交接包含未結工單、阻礙和對明日有幫助的脈絡。

toeic.example_en: Our remote escalation matrix tells engineers exactly whom to call when the primary on-call responder fails to answer.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的遠端升級矩陣明確告知工程師當主要待命人員未回應時該聯絡誰。

toeic.example_en: Long stretches of remote work fatigue may signal that you need a real vacation rather than another long weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 長時間的遠端工作疲勞可能暗示您需要真正的假期，而非另一個長週末。

toeic.example_en: Video call burnout often improves when you allow audio-only conversations for routine updates that do not need faces.
toeic.example_zh: 當您允許不需露臉的例行更新採用純語音時，視訊會議倦怠通常會改善。

toeic.example_en: Try a walking meeting on your phone instead of another video call when you are tired of looking at screens.
toeic.example_zh: 當您厭倦盯著螢幕時，請嘗試以手機進行散步會議，而非另一場視訊通話。

toeic.example_en: Many one-on-one meetings work fine as an audio-only call, which also frees you from looking professional on camera.
toeic.example_zh: 許多一對一會議以純語音通話進行也很好，還能讓您不必對鏡頭保持專業形象。

toeic.example_en: Take a short headphones break between long calls so your ears can recover and your shoulders can finally relax.
toeic.example_zh: 在長時間通話間取下耳機休息一下，讓耳朵恢復、肩膀終於能放鬆。

toeic.example_en: A short outdoor break in sunlight resets your mood and helps you return to creative tasks with fresh energy.
toeic.example_zh: 在陽光下短暫戶外休息能重置心情，讓您以新鮮活力回到創意任務。

toeic.example_en: A reliable morning routine helps remote workers signal to themselves that the workday is officially beginning right now.
toeic.example_zh: 穩定的晨間例行作息能幫遠端工作者向自己發出工作日正式開始的訊號。

toeic.example_en: Create a small shutdown ritual like closing the laptop loudly so your brain truly accepts that work is over.
toeic.example_zh: 建立小小的收工儀式，例如大聲合上筆電，讓您的大腦真正接受工作已結束。

toeic.example_en: Some kind of physical separation between work and home space protects rest and family time from creeping deadlines.
toeic.example_zh: 工作與家庭空間之間的某種物理區隔，能保護休息與家庭時間不被悄悄逼近的截止日侵占。

toeic.example_en: Setting an office hours signal in your status helps family members understand when you should not be interrupted.
toeic.example_zh: 在狀態中設定上班時間信號，幫助家人理解何時不應打擾您。

toeic.example_en: Common household interruption like deliveries can be reduced by scheduling all parcels for evenings after the workday ends.
toeic.example_zh: 常見的家中干擾如送貨，可透過將所有包裹排在下班後的傍晚送達來減少。

toeic.example_en: Modern remote learning platforms combine short videos, practical quizzes, and group discussions hosted across many time zones daily.
toeic.example_zh: 現代遠端學習平台結合短片、實作測驗，以及跨多個時區每日舉行的小組討論。

toeic.example_en: Our virtual training mixes short lectures with breakout rooms so participants can practise the new technique together.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的虛擬訓練結合短講座和分組討論室，讓學員能一起練習新技巧。

toeic.example_en: Find detailed onboarding videos and policy documents on our company intranet under the new joiner resource section.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們公司內部網的新進人員資源區可找到詳細的入職影片和政策文件。

toeic.example_en: Post your detailed technical question on the internal forum so future colleagues can also find the answer easily.
toeic.example_zh: 請將您詳細的技術問題發布到內部論壇，讓未來同事也能輕鬆找到答案。

toeic.example_en: Writing a quick internal blog post about your project helps other teams discover useful patterns and avoid common mistakes.
toeic.example_zh: 撰寫一篇關於您專案的快速內部部落格文章，幫助其他團隊發現有用模式並避免常見錯誤。

toeic.example_en: Our annual remote work survey collects honest opinions and shapes next years policies on flexibility and stipend amounts.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的年度遠端工作調查蒐集誠實意見，並形塑明年彈性與津貼金額的政策。

toeic.example_en: An anonymous survey often surfaces concerns that staff feel uncomfortable raising directly with their immediate reporting line manager.
toeic.example_zh: 匿名調查經常浮現員工不便直接向其直屬主管反映的疑慮。

toeic.example_en: A healthy remote workplace publishes clear norms and trusts employees to deliver excellent work without constant oversight.
toeic.example_zh: 健康的遠端工作場所會發布明確準則，並信任員工在無持續監督下交付優異工作。

toeic.example_en: Every floor must have a fire extinguisher mounted near the stairwell for quick access during emergencies.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓的樓梯間附近都必須裝設滅火器，以便緊急時迅速取用。

toeic.example_en: The smoke detector in the break room beeped, prompting the safety officer to inspect the ceiling unit immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 茶水間的煙霧偵測器發出嗶聲，促使安全官員立即檢查天花板裝置。

toeic.example_en: The building manager scheduled annual testing of the sprinkler system to ensure proper coverage on every floor.
toeic.example_zh: 大樓經理安排每年測試自動灑水系統，以確保每層樓的覆蓋範圍正常。

toeic.example_en: When the fire alarm sounded, everyone calmly walked to the nearest exit and gathered outside the lobby.
toeic.example_zh: 火警警報器響起時，大家冷靜走向最近的出口並聚集在大廳外。

toeic.example_en: Our quarterly fire drill begins at ten and all staff must exit the building within five minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的季度消防演習於十點開始，全體員工必須在五分鐘內撤離大樓。

toeic.example_en: The supervisor reviewed the evacuation procedures with new hires during their first-day safety orientation session.
toeic.example_zh: 主管在新進員工第一天的安全訓練中複習了疏散程序。

toeic.example_en: Staff must evacuate the building immediately when the alarm rings and never return for personal belongings.
toeic.example_zh: 警報響起時員工必須立即撤離大樓，絕不可回去拿個人物品。

toeic.example_en: After leaving the office, please gather at the assembly point in the parking lot for a headcount.
toeic.example_zh: 離開辦公室後，請到停車場的集合點集合以便清點人數。

toeic.example_en: The glowing exit sign above the door makes it easy to locate the stairwell even during a power outage.
toeic.example_zh: 門上方發光的出口指示牌讓人即使停電也能輕鬆找到樓梯間。

toeic.example_en: The outdoor fire escape is inspected twice a year to confirm the metal steps and railings remain sturdy.
toeic.example_zh: 戶外逃生梯每年檢查兩次，以確認金屬階梯與扶手仍然穩固。

toeic.example_en: Never park near the fire hydrant on the curb because firefighters need quick water access in emergencies.
toeic.example_zh: 切勿將車停在路邊的消防栓附近，因為消防員緊急時需要快速取水。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 消防隊長；消防督察員
toeic.example_en: The fire marshal visited last week and issued a notice about blocked exits on the second floor.
toeic.example_zh: 消防督察員上週來訪，針對二樓出口被堵塞一事發出通知。

toeic.example_en: A yellow hazard sign warned employees about the wet floor near the cafeteria entrance during cleaning.
toeic.example_zh: 黃色危險標示警告員工餐廳入口處清潔時地面濕滑。

toeic.example_en: Maintenance crews wrapped caution tape around the broken light fixture until an electrician could replace it safely.
toeic.example_zh: 維修人員用警示膠帶圍住損壞的燈具，直到電工能安全更換為止。

toeic.example_en: The janitor placed a wet floor sign in the corridor after mopping to prevent any slipping accidents.
toeic.example_zh: 工友拖地後在走廊放置地面濕滑警示牌，防止任何滑倒事故。

toeic.example_en: Slip and fall accidents in the lobby decreased after the company installed anti-slip mats near the entrance.
toeic.example_zh: 公司在入口處鋪設防滑墊後，大廳的滑倒事故減少了。

toeic.example_en: Loose cables on the floor create a trip hazard and should always be taped down or rerouted.
toeic.example_zh: 地板上鬆散的線路會造成絆倒危險，應隨時黏貼固定或改變走線。

toeic.example_en: The facilities team placed an anti-slip mat in front of the revolving door to help on rainy days.
toeic.example_zh: 設施團隊在旋轉門前放置防滑墊，雨天時很有幫助。

toeic.example_en: Always hold the handrail when descending the stairs to reduce the risk of falling during busy hours.
toeic.example_zh: 下樓時務必握住扶手，以降低尖峰時段跌倒的風險。

toeic.example_en: Workers installed a steel guardrail along the loading dock to prevent forklifts from rolling off the edge.
toeic.example_zh: 工人在裝卸區沿邊裝設鋼製護欄，防止堆高機滾落邊緣。

toeic.example_en: The contractor gave a short safety briefing before allowing visitors onto the active construction site this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 承包商在允許訪客進入施工現場前先做了簡短的安全簡報。

toeic.example_en: Each crew leader runs a five-minute toolbox talk every morning to highlight safety risks for the day.
toeic.example_zh: 每位班長每天早上進行五分鐘的工地安全短會，提示當日的安全風險。

toeic.example_en: A new safety sign was posted near the chemical cabinet reminding everyone to wear gloves and goggles.
toeic.example_zh: 化學品櫃旁張貼了新的安全標誌，提醒大家戴上手套和護目鏡。

toeic.example_en: Each container in the storage room carries a warning label describing the contents and required handling precautions.
toeic.example_zh: 儲藏室每個容器都貼有警告標籤，說明內容物與必要的搬運注意事項。

toeic.example_en: The new pictogram on the door clearly shows that hard hats are required beyond this point.
toeic.example_zh: 門上新的象形圖清楚顯示越過此處必須戴安全帽。

toeic.example_en: Every visitor entering the warehouse must wear a hard hat and a reflective vest at all times.
toeic.example_zh: 每位進入倉庫的訪客必須隨時戴安全帽並穿反光背心。

toeic.example_en: Lab technicians must wear safety goggles whenever they pour or transfer corrosive cleaning solutions into beakers.
toeic.example_zh: 實驗室技術員倒入或轉移腐蝕性清潔液到燒杯時必須戴護目鏡。

toeic.example_en: Forklift drivers wear a bright orange safety vest so coworkers can spot them from across the warehouse.
toeic.example_zh: 堆高機駕駛員穿亮橘色反光安全背心，讓同事從倉庫另一端也能看見他們。

toeic.example_en: Workers near the generator put on ear plugs to protect their hearing from constant mechanical noise exposure.
toeic.example_zh: 發電機旁的工人戴上耳塞，以保護聽力免受持續機械噪音的傷害。

toeic.example_en: The warehouse team replaced their old safety boots with steel-toe models recommended by the new vendor.
toeic.example_zh: 倉庫團隊將舊安全鞋更換為新廠商推薦的鋼頭款式。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 高能見度的；醒目的
toeic.example_en: Maintenance workers must wear high-visibility clothing when servicing equipment near the busy loading bay.
toeic.example_zh: 維修人員在繁忙的裝卸區附近檢修設備時必須穿高能見度服裝。

toeic.example_en: The cleaner wore a respiratory mask while spraying solvents in the small windowless storage closet.
toeic.example_zh: 清潔人員在無窗的小儲藏間噴灑溶劑時戴上呼吸口罩。

toeic.example_en: Renovation crews handed out a dust mask to each office worker affected by the drilling on Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 裝修人員週一在受鑽孔影響的每位辦公室員工身上發放一個防塵口罩。
