toeic.example_en: Window cleaners use a fall arrest system that locks instantly if they slip off the platform.
toeic.example_zh: 擦窗工使用防墜落系統，若從平台滑落會立即鎖定。

toeic.example_en: The scaffolding around the lobby allows workers to repaint the high ceiling without using tall ladders.
toeic.example_zh: 大廳周圍的鷹架讓工人不必使用高梯就能重新粉刷高聳的天花板。

toeic.example_en: Please return the stepladder to the supply closet after replacing the light bulb in the corridor.
toeic.example_zh: 更換完走廊的燈泡後，請將摺梯歸還至用品櫃。

toeic.example_en: All technicians completed a brief ladder safety course before climbing to inspect the rooftop air units.
toeic.example_zh: 所有技術員在登上屋頂檢查空調機組前，都完成了簡短的梯具安全課程。

toeic.example_en: Technicians follow the lockout procedure before servicing the conveyor belt to prevent accidental power startup.
toeic.example_zh: 技術員在維修輸送帶前依照上鎖程序作業，防止意外通電。

toeic.example_en: Always tag out the breaker before working on the wiring to alert other staff about ongoing repairs.
toeic.example_zh: 在處理線路前務必先在斷路器上掛牌標示，提醒其他人員正在維修。

toeic.example_en: Visitors must scan their temporary security badge at the turnstile before entering the executive office floor.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客必須先在閘門掃描臨時門禁識別證才能進入主管樓層。

toeic.example_en: Each employee receives a keycard programmed to unlock only the floors they regularly need to access.
toeic.example_zh: 每位員工會收到一張感應卡，僅能解鎖他們經常需要進入的樓層。

toeic.example_en: The lobby turnstile only opens when an authorized badge is presented to the optical scanner.
toeic.example_zh: 大廳的旋轉閘門只有在光學掃描器讀到授權的識別證時才會開啟。

toeic.example_en: Our new access control system logs every entry and limits weekend visits to approved personnel only.
toeic.example_zh: 新的門禁管制系統記錄每次進出，並將週末進入限制為僅核可人員。

toeic.example_en: The data center now uses a biometric scanner that reads fingerprints before granting entry to staff.
toeic.example_zh: 資料中心現在使用生物特徵掃描器讀取指紋，才允許員工進入。

toeic.example_en: Sales staff must use the fingerprint reader to access the secure cabinet holding signed client contracts.
toeic.example_zh: 業務人員必須使用指紋辨識器才能開啟存放已簽署客戶合約的保險櫃。

toeic.example_en: The lobby installed facial recognition cameras that match employees against their personnel photo on file.
toeic.example_zh: 大廳安裝了臉部辨識攝影機，將員工與檔案中的人事照片進行比對。

toeic.example_en: A security camera in the corner records the corridor twenty-four hours a day for incident review.
toeic.example_zh: 角落的監視攝影機每日二十四小時錄製走廊畫面，供事件檢視之用。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 閉路電視；監視器系統
toeic.example_en: The building manager reviewed the CCTV footage to identify when the back gate was left open.
toeic.example_zh: 大樓經理檢視監視器系統的畫面，以查明後門是何時被打開的。

toeic.example_en: Continuous surveillance of the parking garage helps deter break-ins and supports any later police investigations.
toeic.example_zh: 停車場的持續監控有助於嚇阻闖入事件，並支援後續任何警方調查。

toeic.example_en: All delivery trucks stop at the guardhouse to register before driving onto the office park grounds.
toeic.example_zh: 所有送貨卡車在駛入辦公園區前都必須先在警衛室登記。

toeic.example_en: A security guard patrols the lobby every hour throughout the night and checks each fire door personally.
toeic.example_zh: 保全員整晚每小時巡邏大廳，並親自檢查每扇防火門。

toeic.example_en: The night guard follows a fixed patrol route that includes the rooftop, basement, and emergency staircase.
toeic.example_zh: 夜班警衛依照固定的巡邏路線進行，包括屋頂、地下室和緊急樓梯。

toeic.example_en: The perimeter fence around the storage yard was reinforced after several attempted thefts last quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 上一季發生數起竊盜未遂事件後，儲存場周圍的外圍圍籬已加強鞏固。

toeic.example_en: An intrusion alarm activated overnight, but security found no signs of entry on any monitored doors.
toeic.example_zh: 入侵警報系統夜間啟動，但保全在任何受監控的門上都未發現入侵痕跡。

toeic.example_en: Reception staff can press the panic button under the desk if an unwelcome visitor refuses to leave.
toeic.example_zh: 若不受歡迎的訪客拒絕離開，接待人員可按下櫃台下方的緊急求救按鈕。

toeic.example_en: An emergency phone is located in every elevator and connects directly to the building security desk.
toeic.example_zh: 每部電梯內都設有緊急電話，可直接通話至大樓保全櫃台。

toeic.example_en: Press the intercom at the front gate, and the receptionist will buzz you into the lobby.
toeic.example_zh: 請按下大門口的對講機，接待人員會為您開門進入大廳。

toeic.example_en: An announcement on the PA system reminded everyone to leave the building during the unexpected power outage.
toeic.example_zh: 廣播系統的公告提醒所有人在意外停電期間離開大樓。

toeic.example_en: The receptionist used the public address to page the visitor to the front desk after lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 接待人員使用公共廣播在午餐後呼叫該訪客到前台。

toeic.example_en: A loud warning siren signals a real emergency rather than the softer tone used for monthly tests.
toeic.example_zh: 大聲的警報鳴笛代表真正的緊急狀況，而非每月測試所使用的較柔和音調。

toeic.example_en: A bright strobe light flashes in the corridor whenever the alarm activates to assist hearing-impaired colleagues.
toeic.example_zh: 警報啟動時走廊上會有明亮的閃光警示燈閃爍，以協助聽障同事。

toeic.example_en: The pantry has a fire blanket mounted on the wall to smother small grease flames quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 茶水間牆上掛有防火毯，可迅速悶熄小型油類火焰。

toeic.example_en: The fire door between the stairwell and lobby should never be propped open with a doorstop.
toeic.example_zh: 樓梯間與大廳之間的防火門絕不可用門擋撐開。

toeic.example_en: Heavy doors form a smoke barrier that prevents fumes from spreading quickly between floors during fires.
toeic.example_zh: 厚重的門形成防煙阻隔，可在火災時防止煙霧迅速在樓層之間擴散。

toeic.example_en: Modern offices compartmentalize their floors so smoke and flames cannot easily spread from room to room.
toeic.example_zh: 現代辦公室會將樓層分區隔離，使煙霧與火焰不易在房間之間蔓延。

toeic.example_en: The rooftop smoke vent opens automatically when sensors detect a sudden rise in temperature inside the warehouse.
toeic.example_zh: 當感應器偵測到倉庫內溫度突然升高時，屋頂的排煙閘會自動開啟。

toeic.example_en: We installed sensors near the boiler room to detect any carbon monoxide leaks before they harm workers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在鍋爐房附近安裝感應器，以便在一氧化碳外洩傷害工人之前偵測到。

toeic.example_en: If you smell a gas leak in the kitchen, evacuate the area and call the utility company.
toeic.example_zh: 若在廚房聞到瓦斯外洩，請撤離該區並通知公用事業公司。

toeic.example_en: Building engineers labeled every shutoff valve clearly so staff can stop water flow during a pipe burst.
toeic.example_zh: 大樓工程師將每個關閉閥都清楚標示，使員工能在水管爆裂時切斷水流。

toeic.example_en: Crews repaired the broken water main beneath the parking lot before tenants noticed any pressure drop.
toeic.example_zh: 工人在租戶察覺水壓下降前，修復了停車場下方破裂的供水主管線。

toeic.example_en: The backup generator powers critical servers within seconds if the building loses its main electrical supply.
toeic.example_zh: 若大樓主電源中斷，備用發電機會在數秒內為關鍵伺服器供電。

toeic.example_en: Emergency lighting along the corridor turns on automatically whenever the main power supply unexpectedly fails.
toeic.example_zh: 走廊沿線的緊急照明會在主電源意外故障時自動開啟。

toeic.example_en: A short power outage interrupted printing in the office, but the backup battery kept network systems running.
toeic.example_zh: 短暫停電中斷了辦公室的列印作業，但備用電池仍讓網路系統持續運作。

toeic.example_en: During the citywide blackout, our building relied on the diesel generator for over six straight hours.
toeic.example_zh: 在全市大停電期間，我們大樓連續六小時以上依靠柴油發電機運作。

toeic.example_en: Only licensed electricians may open the electrical panel because the exposed wiring carries lethal voltage levels.
toeic.example_zh: 只有持照電工才可開啟電箱，因為裸露線路帶有致命電壓。

toeic.example_en: Engineers measure the voltage at the main feed before connecting any new equipment to the office network.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師會在連接任何新設備至辦公室網路前，先測量主電源的電壓。

toeic.example_en: Do not overload the power strip with heaters and microwaves because it may overheat and cause damage.
toeic.example_zh: 不要在排插上同時使用電暖器和微波爐，避免過載過熱造成損壞。

toeic.example_en: Proper grounding of office equipment prevents electric shocks and protects sensitive electronics during summer thunderstorms.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公設備正確接地可防止觸電，並在夏季雷雨時保護敏感電子產品。

toeic.example_en: Good ventilation in the print room keeps the air clear of fine toner dust and chemical odors.
toeic.example_zh: 影印室良好的通風能讓空氣中沒有細微碳粉與化學氣味。

toeic.example_en: Facilities replaces the air filter on every floor each quarter to maintain healthy indoor air quality.
toeic.example_zh: 設施部門每季更換每層樓的空氣濾網，以維持健康的室內空氣品質。

toeic.example_en: We monitor indoor air quality and adjust the ventilation when carbon dioxide readings rise above acceptable levels.
toeic.example_zh: 我們監測室內空氣品質，並在二氧化碳讀數超過可接受值時調整通風。

toeic.example_en: Please ask reception before adjusting the thermostat since it controls temperature for the entire shared open space.
toeic.example_zh: 調整恆溫器前請先詢問接待人員，因為它控制整個共用開放空間的溫度。

toeic.example_en: Only authorized engineers may enter the boiler room since the equipment operates at very high temperatures.
toeic.example_zh: 只有授權工程師可進入鍋爐房，因為設備運作溫度非常高。

toeic.example_en: The rooftop chiller cools water that circulates through pipes to keep every floor comfortable during summer.
toeic.example_zh: 屋頂的冷卻機冷卻流經管路的水，使夏季每層樓都保持舒適。

toeic.example_en: Technicians cleaned the ductwork above the ceiling tiles after employees complained about dust circulating through the vents.
toeic.example_zh: 員工抱怨灰塵透過通風口流動後，技術員清潔了天花板上方的風管系統。

toeic.example_en: Switch on the exhaust fan in the restroom and pantry to remove humidity and lingering cooking odors.
toeic.example_zh: 請開啟洗手間和茶水間的排氣扇，以排除濕氣和殘留的烹飪氣味。

toeic.example_en: Facilities placed a small dehumidifier in the archive room to protect older documents from any mildew damage.
toeic.example_zh: 設施部門在檔案室放置一台小型除濕機，以保護舊文件免受發霉損害。

toeic.example_en: Colleagues chatted near the water cooler about the upcoming renovation of the seventh floor lounge area.
toeic.example_zh: 同事們在飲水機旁聊起即將進行的七樓休息區整修工程。

toeic.example_en: The drinking fountain in the hallway was replaced with a bottle-filling station to reduce single-use plastic.
toeic.example_zh: 走廊的飲水台已改為瓶子加水站，以減少一次性塑膠的使用。

toeic.example_en: The vending machine in the corridor accepts contactless payments and is restocked every Tuesday and Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 走廊的自動販賣機接受感應式付款，並於每週二和週五補貨。

toeic.example_en: New restroom signage uses universal symbols so visitors from other countries can navigate the building easily.
toeic.example_zh: 新的洗手間標示使用通用符號，讓來自其他國家的訪客也能輕鬆在大樓內找路。

toeic.example_en: An accessible restroom on each floor offers grab bars and a wider door to support all visitors.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓的無障礙洗手間設有扶手和較寬的門，以服務所有訪客。

toeic.example_en: A stainless steel grab bar near the toilet provides support for visitors with limited mobility or strength.
toeic.example_zh: 馬桶旁的不鏽鋼扶手桿可為行動或力量有限的訪客提供支撐。

toeic.example_en: The wheelchair ramp at the side entrance lets delivery staff bring carts directly into the receiving area.
toeic.example_zh: 側門的輪椅坡道讓送貨人員能將推車直接推入收貨區。

toeic.example_en: The automatic door at the main lobby opens slowly so visitors with luggage can pass through comfortably.
toeic.example_zh: 大廳的自動門開啟緩慢，讓帶行李的訪客能輕鬆通過。

toeic.example_en: Please use the revolving door in winter to keep cold air from rushing into the heated lobby.
toeic.example_zh: 冬天請使用旋轉門，避免冷空氣灌入暖氣大廳。

toeic.example_en: Our lobby attendant greets every visitor and directs them to the correct elevator bank based on the floor.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的大廳服務員會迎接每位訪客，並依樓層引導他們到正確的電梯區。

toeic.example_en: Visitors must complete the sign-in sheet with their name, company, and the colleague they plan to meet.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客必須在簽到表上填寫姓名、公司以及預定會面的同事。

toeic.example_en: The visitor log is reviewed weekly to confirm that every guest had a proper appointment and host.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客登記簿每週檢查，以確認每位訪客都有適當的預約和接待人。

toeic.example_en: Trucks unload at the delivery dock behind the building between seven and eleven each weekday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 卡車於每個平日早上七點到十一點之間在大樓後方的送貨平台卸貨。

toeic.example_en: Large furniture deliveries use the freight elevator at the back so the main lobby stays clear and quiet.
toeic.example_zh: 大型家具送貨使用後方的貨梯，讓大廳保持暢通安靜。

toeic.example_en: The annual elevator inspection certificate is posted inside each car next to the floor button panel.
toeic.example_zh: 每年的電梯檢驗合格證貼於每部電梯內樓層按鈕面板旁。

toeic.example_en: The west elevator is out of service today, so please take the stairs or use the east bank.
toeic.example_zh: 今天西側電梯停止使用，請走樓梯或使用東側電梯。

toeic.example_en: Engineers update the maintenance log after every repair so future technicians can review what was done.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師每次修繕後更新維護紀錄，以便未來技術員能回顧已完成的工作。

toeic.example_en: Please submit a work order ticket online whenever you notice broken lighting or a damaged ceiling tile.
toeic.example_zh: 若發現燈具損壞或天花板破損，請在線上提交工單。

toeic.example_en: The facility manager coordinates with vendors to plan repairs, inspections, and upgrades across the entire office building.
toeic.example_zh: 設施經理與廠商協調，規劃整棟辦公大樓的維修、檢查與升級。

toeic.example_en: Janitorial staff clean the offices every evening and refill soap dispensers in the restrooms before morning.
toeic.example_zh: 清潔人員每晚打掃辦公室，並在清晨前補滿洗手間的洗手乳給皂機。

toeic.example_en: The cleaning crew waxes the lobby floor every quarter to preserve its shine and reduce visible scratches.
toeic.example_zh: 清潔團隊每季為大廳地板打蠟，以保持光澤並減少可見刮痕。

toeic.example_en: Staff sanitize the shared keyboards and phones every evening using approved wipes from the supply room.
toeic.example_zh: 員工每晚使用用品室核可的擦拭巾消毒共用的鍵盤和電話。

toeic.example_en: Please disinfect the conference table before the next group arrives for their afternoon strategy meeting today.
toeic.example_zh: 請在下一組人員到達進行下午策略會議前，將會議桌消毒。

toeic.example_en: Hand sanitizer dispensers were installed at the entrance, the cafeteria, and outside every shared meeting room.
toeic.example_zh: 乾洗手液機設置在入口、員工餐廳以及每間共用會議室外。

toeic.example_en: The soap dispenser above the sink needs new batteries because the sensor failed to release any liquid.
toeic.example_zh: 水槽上方的給皂機需要更換電池，因為感應器無法擠出任何液體。

toeic.example_en: Please place food wrappers in the trash bin labeled for general waste rather than recycling, please.
toeic.example_zh: 請將食物包裝紙丟入標示一般垃圾的垃圾桶，而不要丟入回收桶。

toeic.example_en: Each pantry has a recycling bin for paper, another for plastic, and a third bin for aluminum.
toeic.example_zh: 每個茶水間都有紙類回收桶、塑膠回收桶以及第三個鋁罐回收桶。

toeic.example_en: Office tenants can drop food scraps into the new compost bin near the cafeteria coffee counter.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公租戶可將廚餘丟入員工餐廳咖啡櫃台旁的新廚餘桶。

toeic.example_en: Our waste disposal contractor collects sealed hazardous bins from the labs every Wednesday and Friday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的廢棄物處置承包商於每週三和週五下午收取實驗室封好的有害廢棄物桶。

toeic.example_en: A pest control technician visits the basement quarterly to inspect bait stations and check for rodent activity.
toeic.example_zh: 害蟲防治技術員每季造訪地下室，檢查誘餌站並查看鼠類活動。

toeic.example_en: The exterminator treated the cafeteria for ants and recommended sealing tiny cracks along the baseboard tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 害蟲防治員對員工餐廳進行了除螞蟻處理，並建議今晚將踢腳板沿線的細小裂縫封住。

toeic.example_en: Facilities placed traps after a small rodent was spotted near the storage room on the basement level.
toeic.example_zh: 在地下室儲藏室附近發現小型鼠類後，設施部門放置了捕捉器。

toeic.example_en: Sensors continuously monitor indoor air to ensure carbon dioxide stays within healthy office building ranges throughout the day.
toeic.example_zh: 感應器持續監測室內空氣，確保二氧化碳整天保持在健康的辦公大樓範圍內。

toeic.example_en: After the leak was fixed, the cleaning team removed visible mold from the corner of the ceiling.
toeic.example_zh: 漏水修好後，清潔團隊清除了天花板角落可見的黴菌。

toeic.example_en: Mildew on the shower wall in the gym disappeared after the cleaners scrubbed it with a special solution.
toeic.example_zh: 健身房淋浴牆面的霉斑在清潔工用特殊溶液刷洗後消失了。

toeic.example_en: A small leak from the ceiling pipe formed a damp stain that staff reported to the building office.
toeic.example_zh: 天花板水管的小漏水形成潮濕污漬，員工已通報大樓辦公室。

toeic.example_en: Our plumbing was upgraded last spring to prevent the constant clogs that delayed restroom use for staff.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的水管系統去年春季已升級，避免持續阻塞而延誤員工使用洗手間。

toeic.example_en: A clogged drain in the pantry sink caused water to back up onto the floor by lunchtime.
toeic.example_zh: 茶水間水槽的阻塞排水孔導致水到午餐時間時積到地板上。

toeic.example_en: The groundskeeper trims the hedges around the courtyard and keeps the company sign clearly visible from the street.
toeic.example_zh: 場地維護員修剪庭院周圍的樹籬，並讓公司招牌從街上清楚可見。

toeic.example_en: Spring landscaping refreshed the planters near the lobby with seasonal flowers that brighten the front entrance.
toeic.example_zh: 春季景觀美化以時令花卉更新大廳附近的花槽，使前門入口更明亮。

toeic.example_en: Snow removal services begin at five each morning so employees can safely walk into the office.
toeic.example_zh: 除雪服務每天清晨五點開始，讓員工能安全走進辦公室。

toeic.example_en: Salting the sidewalks before sunrise reduces ice buildup and helps keep visitors safe during cold winter mornings.
toeic.example_zh: 在日出前對人行道撒鹽防滑可減少結冰，並在寒冷冬日早晨讓訪客更安全。

toeic.example_en: Engineers access the rooftop monthly to inspect HVAC equipment and verify that drainage paths remain clear.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師每月登上屋頂檢查空調設備，並確認排水路徑保持暢通。

toeic.example_en: Our basement houses the mechanical room and a small storage area for shared seasonal office decorations.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的地下室設有機械室和一小塊放置共用季節性辦公裝飾的儲藏區。

toeic.example_en: The mechanical room remains locked because it contains pumps, valves, and the building heating control panel.
toeic.example_zh: 機械室保持上鎖，因為裡面有泵浦、閥門和大樓暖氣控制面板。

toeic.example_en: The utility closet on each floor holds cleaning supplies, light bulbs, and a small toolkit for emergencies.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓的公用品儲藏室存放清潔用品、燈泡和緊急用的小工具箱。

toeic.example_en: Please email facilities if the supply closet runs out of toner cartridges or printer paper this week.
toeic.example_zh: 若本週用品櫃的碳粉匣或印表機紙用完，請寄電子郵件給設施部門。

toeic.example_en: Each team has a locked storage cabinet for sensitive documents and electronics that should not stay overnight.
toeic.example_zh: 每個團隊都有一個上鎖的儲物櫃，用於存放不應留置過夜的敏感文件和電子設備。

toeic.example_en: Confidential papers go directly into the locked shred bin near reception for monthly secure offsite disposal.
toeic.example_zh: 機密文件應直接放入接待處附近的上鎖機密碎紙桶，每月送至外部安全銷毀。

toeic.example_en: The lost and found at reception holds items for thirty days before donating unclaimed pieces to charity.
toeic.example_zh: 接待處的失物招領處保留物品三十天，未領回者會捐贈給慈善機構。

toeic.example_en: Check the lobby directory near the elevators to find which floor each company tenant currently occupies.
toeic.example_zh: 請查看電梯旁的大廳樓層導覽板，了解目前每家公司租戶位於哪一層樓。

toeic.example_en: A new directional sign at the elevator points visitors to the cafeteria, meeting rooms, and quiet zones.
toeic.example_zh: 電梯旁的新方向指示牌指引訪客前往員工餐廳、會議室和安靜區。

toeic.example_en: The entire campus is a no-smoking zone, so designated areas are located beyond the main parking entrance.
toeic.example_zh: 整個園區都是禁菸區，因此指定吸菸區位於主停車場入口之外。

toeic.example_en: Lab staff must perform chemical mixing inside the fume hood to prevent inhalation of harmful airborne vapors.
toeic.example_zh: 實驗室人員必須在通風櫃內進行化學混合，防止吸入有害的空氣中蒸氣。

toeic.example_en: Every lab has an eyewash station within fast reach in case a chemical splashes into someone's eyes.
toeic.example_zh: 每間實驗室都設有可快速取用的洗眼站，以防有人被化學品濺到眼睛。

toeic.example_en: The safety shower near the lab door is tested weekly to verify that water pressure remains adequate.
toeic.example_zh: 實驗室門旁的緊急沖淋設備每週測試，以確認水壓充足。

toeic.example_en: A spill kit is stored under every lab sink so staff can absorb minor chemical leaks immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 每個實驗室水槽下方都備有漏液應變包，讓員工能立即吸附少量化學洩漏。

toeic.example_en: Used medical supplies are sealed in a biohazard bag and stored separately for licensed pickup and disposal.
toeic.example_zh: 用過的醫療用品會封入生物危害袋，並另行儲存以供持照人員回收處理。

toeic.example_en: Discard used needles only into the labeled sharps container next to the first aid cabinet.
toeic.example_zh: 用過的針頭僅可丟入急救櫃旁標示清楚的利器收集容器內。

toeic.example_en: The meeting room curtains are made from fire-resistant fabric that meets the latest national safety standards.
toeic.example_zh: 會議室窗簾採用符合最新國家安全標準的防火布料製成。

toeic.example_en: Sensitive contracts are kept in a fireproof safe behind reception to protect them from any sudden disaster.
toeic.example_zh: 敏感合約存放在接待處後方的防火保險箱中，以防任何突發災害。

toeic.example_en: A fire watch was assigned tonight because the sprinkler system is briefly offline for scheduled maintenance work.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚已安排防火巡視值班，因為灑水系統因排定維護而暫時停用。

toeic.example_en: Take a moment to find your nearest exit on the evacuation map posted by every office doorway.
toeic.example_zh: 請花點時間在每個辦公室門口張貼的疏散路線圖上找到最近的出口。

toeic.example_en: Every floor has an emergency kit containing flashlights, blankets, water bottles, and a hand-cranked radio.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓備有緊急應變包，內含手電筒、毛毯、瓶裝水和手搖式收音機。

toeic.example_en: Keep a small flashlight in your desk drawer so you can move safely during any unexpected power outage.
toeic.example_zh: 在辦公桌抽屜放一支小手電筒，這樣意外停電時也能安全行動。

toeic.example_en: Maintenance staff wear a headlamp when servicing equipment in dim utility closets without nearby overhead lighting.
toeic.example_zh: 維修人員在昏暗且無頂燈的公用品儲藏室維修設備時會戴頭燈。

toeic.example_en: Each emergency exit light contains a battery backup that powers the bulb for ninety continuous minutes minimum.
toeic.example_zh: 每個緊急出口燈內含電池備援，至少能持續供電燈泡九十分鐘。

toeic.example_en: An uninterruptible power supply protects server racks from brief outages until the backup generator fully takes over.
toeic.example_zh: 不斷電系統保護伺服器機架免受短暫斷電，直到備用發電機完全接手。

toeic.example_en: A severe weather alert prompted facilities to close the rooftop terrace early until winds returned to normal.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴重的天氣警報促使設施部門提早關閉屋頂露台，直到風勢恢復正常。

toeic.example_en: Our annual tornado drill teaches employees to crouch in interior hallways away from windows and exterior walls.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每年的龍捲風演習教導員工蹲在遠離窗戶與外牆的內部走廊上。

toeic.example_en: During the earthquake drill, staff practice the drop, cover, and hold method beneath their sturdy desks safely.
toeic.example_zh: 在地震演習中，員工在堅固桌下練習臥倒、掩護和穩住的動作。

toeic.example_en: The interior hallway is designated as the shelter area during storms because it has no exterior windows.
toeic.example_zh: 風暴時內部走廊被指定為避難區，因為它沒有對外窗戶。

toeic.example_en: Each floor warden wears a bright vest and confirms that no one stays behind during the evacuation drill.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓的安全管理員穿著鮮亮背心，並在疏散演習中確認沒有人留下。

toeic.example_en: Floor wardens check the muster list at the assembly point and report missing colleagues to incident command.
toeic.example_zh: 樓層管理員在集合點核對集合名單，並向事故指揮中心回報失蹤的同事。

toeic.example_en: After every drill we perform a headcount check to confirm that every team member reached the assembly point.
toeic.example_zh: 每次演習後我們會進行人數清點，以確認每位團隊成員都到達集合點。

toeic.example_en: Wait for the all-clear signal from the safety officer before returning to your desk after the alarm.
toeic.example_zh: 警報後請等待安全官員的解除警報訊號，再回到您的座位。

toeic.example_en: The security desk maintains an incident log that records minor injuries, equipment failures, and unauthorized access attempts.
toeic.example_zh: 保全櫃台維護事件紀錄表，記錄輕微受傷、設備故障和未授權的進入企圖。

toeic.example_en: Please report a hazard immediately by scanning the QR code posted near every elevator door and stairwell.
toeic.example_zh: 請立即透過每部電梯門和樓梯間張貼的 QR 碼通報危險。

toeic.example_en: A monthly safety inspection covers fire equipment, exits, lighting, and any potential trip hazards throughout the office.
toeic.example_zh: 每月的安全檢查涵蓋消防設備、出口、照明以及辦公室各處可能的絆倒危險。

toeic.example_en: The supervisor completes a safety checklist before opening the warehouse to incoming delivery trucks each morning.
toeic.example_zh: 主管在每天早上開放倉庫迎接送貨卡車前都會完成一份安全檢查表。

toeic.example_en: Trained first responder volunteers help injured colleagues until professional emergency medical personnel arrive at the building.
toeic.example_zh: 受過訓練的第一線應變員志工會協助受傷同事，直到專業緊急醫療人員抵達大樓。

toeic.example_en: A paramedic checked the worker's pulse and breathing before transporting him by stretcher to the nearby hospital.
toeic.example_zh: 急救醫護人員檢查了該工人的脈搏與呼吸，才用擔架送往附近的醫院。

toeic.example_en: The building keeps a folding stretcher near the loading dock for transporting injured workers safely to ambulances.
toeic.example_zh: 大樓在裝卸區附近備有摺疊擔架，可將受傷工人安全送上救護車。

toeic.example_en: A small burn injury from the coffee machine was treated with cool water and a clean bandage.
toeic.example_zh: 咖啡機造成的小燒燙傷已用冷水沖洗並貼上乾淨繃帶處理。

toeic.example_en: Always report a cut injury, even a minor one, so it can be cleaned and properly bandaged.
toeic.example_zh: 請務必通報任何割傷，即使是輕微的，以便清潔並妥善包紮。

toeic.example_en: The injured employee wore a sling for two weeks after slipping on the wet stairwell last Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 該名受傷員工上週五在濕滑樓梯間滑倒後，配戴手臂吊帶兩週。

toeic.example_en: The first responder applied a splint to stabilize the worker's wrist before the ambulance arrived on site.
toeic.example_zh: 第一線應變員為該工人手腕上夾板固定，等待救護車到場。

toeic.example_en: Use the ice pack from the freezer to reduce swelling if you bump your knee on a desk.
toeic.example_zh: 若膝蓋撞到桌子，請使用冰箱裡的冰敷袋消腫。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自動體外心臟去顫器
toeic.example_en: Each floor lobby features a defibrillator that can be used by anyone following the recorded voice instructions.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓大廳都設有自動體外心臟去顫器，任何人都可依錄音語音指示使用。

toeic.example_en: The trainer demonstrated the Heimlich maneuver on a practice doll during the basic emergency response refresher session.
toeic.example_zh: 教練在基本緊急應變複訓課程中以練習假人示範哈姆立克急救法。

toeic.example_en: Be aware of choking hazard symbols on snack packaging in case visitors include very young children today.
toeic.example_zh: 請注意零食包裝上的噎食危險標誌，以防今天的訪客中有非常年幼的孩童。

toeic.example_en: Catering staff label every dish so guests with an allergic reaction risk can identify safe meal options.
toeic.example_zh: 外燴人員為每道菜貼標籤，讓有過敏反應風險的賓客能識別安全的餐點選項。

toeic.example_en: Several first aid kits include an epi-pen for visitors who experience severe allergic reactions during catered office events.
toeic.example_zh: 多個急救包中備有腎上腺素注射筆，供出席公司外燴活動時發生嚴重過敏的訪客使用。

toeic.example_en: Last month's lockdown drill taught everyone how to silently secure doors and windows in less than one minute.
toeic.example_zh: 上個月的封鎖演習教大家如何在不到一分鐘內安靜地關閉並鎖好門窗。

toeic.example_en: The new secure entry near the parking ramp records license plates and badges for every vehicle entering.
toeic.example_zh: 停車場入口附近新的安全進出管制口會記錄每輛進入車輛的車牌與識別證。

toeic.example_en: Mail is screened through an x-ray scanner in the basement before being delivered to office floors.
toeic.example_zh: 郵件在送達辦公樓層前需經地下室的 X 光掃描儀檢查。

toeic.example_en: Please pick up your package from the mailroom on the ground floor between nine and five today.
toeic.example_zh: 請於今天九點到五點之間到一樓收發室領取包裹。

toeic.example_en: Couriers drop personal deliveries into a secure package locker so employees can pick them up after work.
toeic.example_zh: 快遞員將個人包裹放入安全的包裹寄物櫃，員工可在下班後領取。

toeic.example_en: Steel bollards in front of the lobby protect pedestrians from any vehicles that might accidentally jump the curb.
toeic.example_zh: 大廳前的鋼製防撞護柱保護行人，防止車輛意外衝上人行道。

toeic.example_en: The parking gate raises automatically when your access tag is detected by the underground reader near the ramp.
toeic.example_zh: 您的感應卡被地下停車道附近的讀卡機偵測到時，停車場閘門會自動升起。

toeic.example_en: Drivers should slow down at every speed bump in the garage so coworkers walking nearby remain safe.
toeic.example_zh: 駕駛在停車場每個減速丘前都應減速，讓附近行走的同事保持安全。

toeic.example_en: Keep the drive aisle clear so emergency vehicles can reach the loading dock without delay during incidents.
toeic.example_zh: 請保持車道淨空，讓緊急車輛能在事件發生時迅速抵達裝卸區。

toeic.example_en: Designated parking near the main door is reserved for visitors, expectant parents, and pickup or delivery vehicles.
toeic.example_zh: 主門附近的指定停車位保留給訪客、孕婦以及接送或送貨車輛使用。

toeic.example_en: The yellow curb marks a no parking zone needed for fire trucks and ambulances during any emergency.
toeic.example_zh: 黃色路緣標示為禁止停車區，緊急時供消防車與救護車使用。

toeic.example_en: Vehicles parked in the tow zone after hours may be removed at the owner's full expense without warning.
toeic.example_zh: 下班後停在拖吊區的車輛可能會被拖走，費用全由車主負擔且不另通知。

toeic.example_en: Security called a tow truck after a delivery vehicle remained blocking the loading dock for over an hour.
toeic.example_zh: 在一輛送貨車堵住裝卸區超過一小時後，保全叫了拖吊車。

toeic.example_en: Strong cleanliness standards across the office reduce illness and leave a positive impression on every visiting client.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公室嚴格的整潔度標準可減少疾病，並給每位來訪客戶留下良好印象。

toeic.example_en: Workspace tidiness helps colleagues find shared materials quickly and prevents accidents from misplaced equipment or cables.
toeic.example_zh: 工作區的整齊有助於同事迅速找到共用物品，並避免因物品或線材亂放而發生意外。

toeic.example_en: Remove clutter from your desk before leaving each Friday so the cleaning crew can wipe every surface.
toeic.example_zh: 每週五離開前請清理桌面雜物堆放，讓清潔團隊能擦拭每個表面。

toeic.example_en: Good housekeeping in the warehouse keeps walking paths clear and reduces forklift accidents during very busy shifts.
toeic.example_zh: 倉庫良好的內務整潔讓走道暢通，並能在繁忙班次中減少堆高機事故。

toeic.example_en: Managers do a quick spot check of restrooms during the day to make sure supplies remain fully stocked.
toeic.example_zh: 經理白天會對洗手間進行快速抽查，確保用品全部備齊。

toeic.example_en: The office gets a deep clean every six months, including carpet shampoo and detailed window washing services.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公室每六個月進行一次深度清潔，包括地毯洗滌與細部擦窗服務。

toeic.example_en: Tenants drop bagged trash into the trash chute on each floor for collection in the basement compactor.
toeic.example_zh: 租戶將袋裝垃圾投入每層樓的垃圾滑道，由地下室的壓縮機收集。

toeic.example_en: The compactor in the basement reduces waste volume so the building only needs pickup twice a week.
toeic.example_zh: 地下室的垃圾壓縮機減少廢棄物體積，使大樓每週只需收兩次。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大型垃圾桶；垃圾車容器
toeic.example_en: Construction crews fill the rented dumpster behind the building with debris from this week's renovation project.
toeic.example_zh: 施工團隊用本週裝修工程的廢料填滿大樓後方租用的大型垃圾桶。

toeic.example_en: Every floor has a recycling station sorted by material so staff can separate paper, plastic, and glass.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓都有依材質分類的回收站，讓員工能分類紙類、塑膠與玻璃。

toeic.example_en: We replaced the lobby bulbs with energy efficient LEDs that last longer and lower the monthly electricity bill.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將大廳燈泡換成節能的 LED 燈，使用壽命更長並降低每月電費。

toeic.example_en: Upgraded LED lighting throughout the office reduces energy use and provides brighter illumination for detailed paperwork tasks.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公室全面升級的 LED 照明能減少能源消耗，並為細節文書工作提供更明亮的光線。

toeic.example_en: Lights with a motion sensor switch off automatically when no one has used the meeting room for fifteen minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 配有動作感應器的燈會在無人使用會議室十五分鐘後自動關閉。

toeic.example_en: An occupancy sensor in each office controls lights and air based on whether anyone is currently present.
toeic.example_zh: 每間辦公室的人員感應器會根據是否有人在場控制燈光與空氣調節。

toeic.example_en: The automatic flush in the restroom saves water while keeping the toilets sanitary throughout the busy workday.
toeic.example_zh: 洗手間的自動沖水可節省用水，同時在繁忙工作日保持馬桶衛生。

toeic.example_en: Every restroom sink has a touchless faucet that activates when hands move beneath the lower spout.
toeic.example_zh: 每個洗手間水槽都有感應水龍頭，雙手移到下方出水口時即啟動。

toeic.example_en: Switching to a low-flow toilet on every floor cuts the building's annual water consumption significantly.
toeic.example_zh: 每層樓改用省水馬桶大幅降低了大樓每年的耗水量。

toeic.example_en: The water heater in the basement supplies hot water to the cafeteria and to every restroom upstairs.
toeic.example_zh: 地下室的熱水器供應熱水給員工餐廳和樓上每間洗手間。

toeic.example_en: Good drainage around the building prevents standing water and protects the basement from minor seasonal flooding incidents.
toeic.example_zh: 大樓周圍良好的排水可避免積水，並保護地下室免受輕微的季節性淹水事件影響。

toeic.example_en: City crews inspect the sewer line beneath the parking lot once a year to identify any cracks early.
toeic.example_zh: 市府人員每年檢查停車場下方的下水道管線一次，以儘早發現任何裂縫。

toeic.example_en: Replace the drain cover firmly after cleaning so no one trips on the open hole in the corridor.
toeic.example_zh: 清潔後請將排水溝蓋牢牢蓋回，以免有人在走廊上絆到開口。

toeic.example_en: Never hang anything from the sprinkler head because even small weight may trigger water release across the office.
toeic.example_zh: 切勿在灑水頭上掛任何物品，即使很輕的重量也可能觸發辦公室全面灑水。

toeic.example_en: Tomorrow's smoke alarm test will produce a brief loud tone in every office between nine and ten.
toeic.example_zh: 明天的煙霧警報測試將在九點到十點之間於每間辦公室發出短暫的響亮音調。

toeic.example_en: An evacuation chair stored near every stairwell helps move colleagues with mobility limitations safely between floors during emergencies.
toeic.example_zh: 每個樓梯間旁存放的緊急疏散椅可在緊急時協助行動不便的同事在樓層間安全移動。

toeic.example_en: Each emergency kit on the executive floor contains a smoke hood for safer breathing during dense corridor smoke.
toeic.example_zh: 主管樓層每個緊急應變包都包含一個防煙頭罩，以便在走廊濃煙中能更安全呼吸。

toeic.example_en: Roof technicians attach to a steel lifeline anchored to the building structure before walking near the unguarded edge.
toeic.example_zh: 屋頂技術員在靠近未設護欄的邊緣前，會繫上固定於建築結構上的鋼製安全繩索。

toeic.example_en: Every harness clip must connect to a certified anchor point that can support the weight of a worker.
toeic.example_zh: 每個安全吊帶扣具都必須連接到能承受工人重量的認證固定點。

toeic.example_en: A daily scaffold inspection ensures all bolts remain tight and the planks have not shifted during overnight winds.
toeic.example_zh: 每日的鷹架檢查可確保所有螺栓緊固，並確認板材在夜間風中未移位。

toeic.example_en: A bright orange barricade surrounds the open elevator shaft so passersby cannot accidentally step into the dangerous opening.
toeic.example_zh: 亮橘色的路障圍住敞開的電梯井，讓路過的人不會誤踏入危險開口。

toeic.example_en: Workers placed a traffic cone in the parking lot to mark the area where the pothole will be repaired.
toeic.example_zh: 工人在停車場放置三角錐，標示坑洞即將被修補的區域。

toeic.example_en: A wide safety net beneath the scaffolding catches any tools that workers might drop while installing the cladding.
toeic.example_zh: 鷹架下方的寬大安全網可承接工人在安裝外牆覆層時可能掉落的工具。

toeic.example_en: Any fall onto a hard surface from above can cause serious injury, so always wear approved fall protection equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 從高處摔落硬質表面可能造成嚴重傷害，請務必佩戴核可的防墜落裝備。

toeic.example_en: Engineers measured the noise level near the new compressor and added foam panels to reduce sound across the floor.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師量測新空氣壓縮機附近的噪音值，並加裝泡棉板以降低樓層各處的聲音。

toeic.example_en: Soundproofing in the new phone booths allows employees to take confidential calls without disturbing nearby coworkers at all.
toeic.example_zh: 新電話亭的隔音處理讓員工可以打機密電話而完全不打擾附近同事。

toeic.example_en: Designers added acoustic panels along the open-plan ceiling to reduce echoing voices and background printer noise.
toeic.example_zh: 設計師沿著開放式辦公區天花板加裝吸音板，以減少聲音回音和印表機背景噪音。

toeic.example_en: Constant vibration from the rooftop fan was reduced by adding rubber pads beneath the unit's metal mounting frame.
toeic.example_zh: 屋頂風扇的持續震動在金屬安裝框下方加裝橡膠墊後已減輕。

toeic.example_en: Indoor pollution rises whenever cleaning chemicals are sprayed, so always run the exhaust fan when scrubbing nearby surfaces.
toeic.example_zh: 噴灑清潔化學品時室內污染會上升，因此清潔附近表面時請務必開啟排氣扇。

toeic.example_en: Off-gassing from new office furniture may produce a faint chemical smell for several weeks after installation.
toeic.example_zh: 新辦公家具的揮發氣味散逸可能在安裝後數週仍散發淡淡的化學味道。

toeic.example_en: A foam wrist support along the keyboard edge can ease pressure for staff who type many hours daily.
toeic.example_zh: 鍵盤邊緣的泡棉護腕墊可減輕每天打字數小時員工的手腕壓力。

toeic.example_en: We reduced lighting glare on monitors by adding diffuser panels above the desks near the bright south windows.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在明亮南面窗戶旁桌子的上方加裝散光板，減少螢幕上的燈光眩光。

toeic.example_en: A glare screen attached to your monitor prevents headaches caused by harsh overhead office light in the afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 螢幕上裝設的防眩光螢幕罩可避免下午刺眼的辦公室頂燈造成的頭痛。

toeic.example_en: A simple monitor stand raises the screen to eye level and reduces neck strain throughout long meetings every day.
toeic.example_zh: 簡單的螢幕架可將螢幕抬高到眼睛高度，並在每天長時間會議中減少頸部緊繃。

toeic.example_en: Our wellness room offers a quiet space for nursing parents and for anyone needing a brief afternoon rest.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的健康休息室為哺乳家長和任何需要短暫午後休息的人提供安靜空間。

toeic.example_en: The nursing room on the fifth floor includes a small fridge for storing milk during the full workday.
toeic.example_zh: 五樓的哺乳室設有小型冰箱，可在整個工作日存放母乳。

toeic.example_en: Our prayer room provides a peaceful space where employees of any faith can pause briefly during the workday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的祈禱室提供任何信仰的員工在工作日中短暫停頓的寧靜空間。

toeic.example_en: The outdoor smoking area is located more than ten meters from any building entrance per local ordinance.
toeic.example_zh: 戶外吸菸區依當地法令規定設在距離任何大樓入口十公尺以外。

toeic.example_en: The company provides a free rideshare credit so each team always has a designated driver during work events.
toeic.example_zh: 公司提供免費的共乘車資補助，讓每個團隊在公司活動中總是有指定駕駛。

toeic.example_en: Secure bike storage in the basement encourages employees to cycle to work and reduces congestion on rainy mornings.
toeic.example_zh: 地下室安全的自行車停放區鼓勵員工騎自行車上班，並減少雨天早晨的擁擠。

toeic.example_en: Every contractor passes through an ID checkpoint near the loading dock before reaching the secure mechanical area.
toeic.example_zh: 每位承包商必須通過裝卸區附近的身份檢查站，才能進入安全的機械區。

toeic.example_en: Tailgating through secure doors is strictly prohibited, so always wait for the door to close behind you completely.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴禁尾隨進入安全門，請務必等候門在您身後完全關閉。

toeic.example_en: Security treats piggybacking as a serious violation since it lets unauthorized people enter without ever scanning a badge.
toeic.example_zh: 保全將跟隨進入視為嚴重違規，因為它讓未經授權的人在未刷識別證的情況下進入。

toeic.example_en: The data center is a secure zone where access requires both a badge and a fingerprint scan together.
toeic.example_zh: 資料中心是安全區，進入時必須同時使用識別證和指紋掃描。

toeic.example_en: The server room is a restricted area, and only authorized IT staff may enter without prior written approval.
toeic.example_zh: 伺服器機房為限制進入區，未經書面核可僅授權的資訊人員才可進入。

toeic.example_en: Signs near the rooftop door clearly state that only authorized personnel may enter beyond this point at all.
toeic.example_zh: 屋頂門旁的標示明確說明，只有授權人員才可越過此點。

toeic.example_en: Employees needing after-hours access submit a request so security can confirm the building remains safely staffed overnight.
toeic.example_zh: 需要下班後進出權限的員工須提出申請，保全方能確認大樓夜間仍有充足人員。

toeic.example_en: Each lone worker carries a small device that sends an alert if they fail to check in regularly.
toeic.example_zh: 每位單人作業員攜帶小型裝置，若未按時回報便會發出警報。

toeic.example_en: Our digital check-in system records each visitor's arrival time and automatically prints a personalized badge instantly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的數位簽到系統記錄每位訪客的到達時間，並自動立即列印個人化識別證。

toeic.example_en: Contractors need a signed hot work permit before any welding occurs inside the building or on its roof.
toeic.example_zh: 承包商在大樓內或屋頂進行任何焊接前，必須先取得已簽署的動火作業許可證。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 局限空間作業許可證
toeic.example_en: A confined space permit is required before workers enter the tank to perform any cleaning or interior inspection.
toeic.example_zh: 工人在進入儲槽進行清潔或內部檢查前，必須取得局限空間作業許可證。

toeic.example_en: Workers complete an atmospheric test for oxygen and toxic gases before entering any tank or sealed compartment safely.
toeic.example_zh: 工人在進入任何儲槽或密閉空間前，會先進行氧氣與有毒氣體的空氣檢測。

toeic.example_en: Each maintenance technician carries a portable gas detector when entering any underground space inside the campus property.
toeic.example_zh: 每位維修技術員進入園區內任何地下空間時都會攜帶可攜式氣體偵測器。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自動體外去顫器櫃
toeic.example_en: The AED cabinet near the elevator beeps softly if the device's battery falls below the recommended operating level.
toeic.example_zh: 電梯旁的自動體外去顫器櫃在裝置電池低於建議運作量時會輕聲嗶嗶作響。

toeic.example_en: Yesterday's evacuation chair drill prepared volunteers to assist wheelchair users safely down many flights of stairs.
toeic.example_zh: 昨天的疏散椅演習讓志工準備好協助輪椅使用者安全下樓多層樓梯。

toeic.example_en: Please review your emergency contact list each January and update it after any change in family phone numbers.
toeic.example_zh: 請於每年一月檢視您的緊急聯絡名單，並在家庭電話有任何變更後更新。

toeic.example_en: Hang the out-of-office sign on your door if you are away for more than two hours today.
toeic.example_zh: 如果您今天離開超過兩小時，請在門上掛上離開辦公室標示。

toeic.example_en: Place the do not disturb sign on your door when you are deep in focus on important client work.
toeic.example_zh: 當您專注於重要客戶工作時，請在門上放上請勿打擾標示。

toeic.example_en: A tenant notice in the lobby informs everyone that the elevator will undergo modernization work next Saturday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 大廳的租戶公告通知大家電梯將於下週六上午進行現代化更新工程。

toeic.example_en: Bulk orders give us greater bargaining power when negotiating with key component suppliers.
toeic.example_zh: 大量訂單讓我們在與主要零件供應商談判時擁有更大的議價能力。

toeic.example_en: The pricing schedule attached to the contract outlines fees for each service tier.
toeic.example_zh: 合約所附的價格表列出了各服務級別的費用。

toeic.example_en: We negotiated a volume discount of fifteen percent for orders exceeding ten thousand units.
toeic.example_zh: 我們爭取到訂單超過一萬件時享有百分之十五的量大折扣。

toeic.example_en: The escalation clause permits annual price adjustments tied to the consumer price index.
toeic.example_zh: 價格調漲條款允許每年依消費者物價指數進行價格調整。

toeic.example_en: Long-standing partners typically receive preferred terms on payment timing and warranty length.
toeic.example_zh: 長期合作夥伴通常在付款時間與保固期長度上獲得優惠條件。

toeic.example_en: Once signed, the binding offer commits both parties to the agreed price and timeline.
toeic.example_zh: 一旦簽署，具約束力的報價即使雙方承諾遵守議定價格與時程。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不具約束力的提案
toeic.example_en: The vendor submitted a non-binding proposal so both sides could continue refining the scope.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商提交了不具約束力的提案，以便雙方繼續修訂範圍。

toeic.example_en: The scope baseline document clarifies which deliverables are included before contract execution.
toeic.example_zh: 範圍基準文件在合約執行前釐清哪些交付項目被涵蓋。

toeic.example_en: Payment is released only after the consultant achieves each deliverable milestone on schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 只有在顧問如期達成每個交付里程碑後才會支付款項。

toeic.example_en: The contract divides the total fee into four payment milestones tied to acceptance testing.
toeic.example_zh: 合約將總費用分為四個付款里程碑，與驗收測試掛鉤。

toeic.example_en: Our acceptance testing protocol requires written sign-off from three department heads.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的驗收測試規程要求三位部門主管以書面方式簽核。

toeic.example_en: The service description lists response times, coverage hours, and exclusions in clear terms.
toeic.example_zh: 服務說明書以清楚的條件列出回應時間、服務時段與排除項目。

toeic.example_en: Each performance metric included in the contract is reviewed during quarterly business meetings.
toeic.example_zh: 合約中每項績效指標都會在季度業務會議上檢視。

toeic.example_en: Our vendor scorecard system tracks quality, delivery accuracy, and responsiveness on a monthly basis.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的供應商評分系統每月追蹤品質、交付準確度與回應性。

toeic.example_en: The procurement team conducts a key supplier review every six months to assess performance.
toeic.example_zh: 採購團隊每六個月進行一次關鍵供應商審查以評估表現。

toeic.example_en: Relying on a single source provider exposes the business to supply continuity risks.
toeic.example_zh: 依賴單一來源供應商會讓企業承受供應持續性風險。

toeic.example_en: Adding a second source supplier reduces our exposure to regional manufacturing disruptions.
toeic.example_zh: 增加第二來源供應商可以降低我們對區域製造中斷的風險。

toeic.example_en: Only qualified bidders meeting financial and technical thresholds may submit a final proposal.
toeic.example_zh: 只有達到財務與技術門檻的合格投標者才能提交最終提案。

toeic.example_en: The bid invitation specifies the submission deadline, format, and evaluation criteria.
toeic.example_zh: 投標邀請函說明提交期限、格式以及評選標準。

toeic.example_en: Sealed envelopes will be unsealed during the formal bid opening next Tuesday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 密封信封將於下週二上午的正式開標時拆封。

toeic.example_en: Awarding the contract to the lowest responsible bidder remains standard public procurement practice.
toeic.example_zh: 將合約授予最低合格投標者仍是公共採購的標準作法。

toeic.example_en: Proposal evaluation weighs price, capability, references, and risk before a vendor is chosen.
toeic.example_zh: 提案評估在選擇供應商前會權衡價格、能力、推薦人與風險。

toeic.example_en: Weighted scoring assigns greater importance to technical capability than to lowest overall price.
toeic.example_zh: 加權評分將技術能力的重要性置於最低總價之上。

toeic.example_en: Shortlisting narrows the pool to three vendors who will present demonstrations next week.
toeic.example_zh: 入圍篩選將候選範圍縮減為三家將於下週進行示範的供應商。

toeic.example_en: The non-disclosure clause prohibits sharing pricing details with any unauthorized third parties.
toeic.example_zh: 保密條款禁止將定價細節分享給任何未經授權的第三方。

toeic.example_en: Mutual confidentiality protects both parties when sensitive trade information is exchanged.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方保密在交換敏感商業資訊時保護雙方利益。

toeic.example_en: The data handling clause requires encryption of customer records during processing and storage.
toeic.example_zh: 資料處理條款要求對客戶記錄在處理與儲存期間加密。

toeic.example_en: Our audit rights allow inspection of vendor facilities with thirty days written notice.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的稽核權允許在三十天書面通知後檢查供應商廠房。

toeic.example_en: The right to inspect lets us verify whether output meets contractually agreed quality levels.
toeic.example_zh: 檢查權讓我們能驗證產出是否達到合約議定的品質水準。

toeic.example_en: The remedy clause spells out the steps available if either party fails to perform.
toeic.example_zh: 救濟條款明訂任一方未履約時可採取的步驟。

toeic.example_en: The vendor was given a thirty-day cure period to address the documented service failures.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商獲得三十天的補正期以處理已記錄的服務缺失。

toeic.example_en: Failure to deliver core functionality on time constitutes a material breach under section eight.
toeic.example_zh: 未能及時交付核心功能依第八條構成重大違約。

toeic.example_en: A minor breach may be excused if the vendor remedies the issue within ten business days.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商若在十個工作日內補正問題，輕微違約可獲免責。

toeic.example_en: Termination for convenience allows either party to exit with sixty days written notice.
toeic.example_zh: 任意終止權允許任一方在六十天書面通知後結束合約。

toeic.example_en: Termination for cause requires documented evidence of repeated contractual failures.
toeic.example_zh: 過失終止需要有證據證明重複的合約失誤。

toeic.example_en: An exit clause should always specify data return and transition assistance responsibilities.
toeic.example_zh: 退出條款應始終明訂資料返還與轉移協助的責任。

toeic.example_en: The transition services agreement governs how the outgoing vendor supports the new provider.
toeic.example_zh: 過渡服務協議規範退場供應商如何協助新供應商。

toeic.example_en: The extension clause grants an additional twelve months upon written mutual consent.
toeic.example_zh: 延長條款在雙方書面同意下可額外延長十二個月。

toeic.example_en: Renewal terms must be revisited if either party proposes pricing or scope changes.
toeic.example_zh: 若任一方提出價格或範圍變更，續約條件必須重新檢視。

toeic.example_en: The automatic renewal clause extends the agreement unless one party opts out in writing.
toeic.example_zh: 自動續約條款會延長協議，除非一方以書面提出終止。

toeic.example_en: Evergreen renewal benefits stable partnerships but should still be reviewed every two years.
toeic.example_zh: 常青續約適合穩定合作關係，但仍應每兩年檢視一次。

toeic.example_en: The annual rate review confirms whether vendor pricing remains aligned with market benchmarks.
toeic.example_zh: 年度費率審查確認供應商價格是否仍符合市場基準。

toeic.example_en: We secured a three-year price freeze in exchange for committing to higher annual volumes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們以承諾較高的年度數量換取為期三年的價格凍結。

toeic.example_en: The vendor agreed to a six-month price hold while final approval moved through committee.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商同意在最終批准通過委員會期間保留價格六個月。

toeic.example_en: An indexation clause keeps service fees aligned with regional inflation indicators every year.
toeic.example_zh: 指數連動條款讓服務費每年與區域通膨指標連動。

toeic.example_en: Tiered pricing offers lower unit costs as the customer reaches higher purchase thresholds.
toeic.example_zh: 階梯式定價在客戶達到較高採購門檻時提供更低單價。

toeic.example_en: A retroactive rebate structure rewards customers who meet annual volume commitments.
toeic.example_zh: 回溯式回扣結構獎勵達成年度數量承諾的客戶。

toeic.example_en: The performance bonus clause pays the vendor extra if delivery targets exceed agreed levels.
toeic.example_zh: 績效獎金條款在交付目標超過議定水準時額外支付供應商。

toeic.example_en: The penalty clause deducts two percent of monthly fees for each missed service target.
toeic.example_zh: 罰則條款每未達服務目標一次便扣減百分之二的月費。

toeic.example_en: Credit memo issuance follows formal acknowledgment of vendor underperformance during the period.
toeic.example_zh: 折讓單發行在正式確認供應商當期表現不佳之後進行。

toeic.example_en: The deal sheet summarizes pricing, scope, and key risks for executive sign-off.
toeic.example_zh: 交易摘要彙整定價、範圍與主要風險，供高階主管簽核。

toeic.example_en: Our negotiation playbook lists target outcomes, walk-away points, and acceptable concessions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的談判手冊列出目標結果、底線以及可接受的讓步。

toeic.example_en: Knowing your walk-away point prevents you from agreeing to unprofitable contract terms.
toeic.example_zh: 知道你的退場底線可避免接受無利可圖的合約條件。

toeic.example_en: Identify your BATNA before negotiating so weak alternatives never push you into bad deals.
toeic.example_zh: 在談判前先確認你的最佳替代方案，以免被弱勢選項逼入糟糕的交易。

toeic.example_en: The zone of possible agreement narrowed once both sides revealed their budget constraints.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方公開預算限制後，可能達成共識區隨之縮小。

toeic.example_en: Your reservation price is the absolute maximum you will pay during this negotiation cycle.
toeic.example_zh: 保留價是你在這輪談判中願意支付的絕對上限。

toeic.example_en: Setting an aggressive anchor price often shifts the entire negotiation in your favor.
toeic.example_zh: 設定強勢錨定價通常能將整場談判導向對你有利的方向。

toeic.example_en: Value-based negotiation focuses on outcomes rather than fighting line by line over pricing.
toeic.example_zh: 價值導向談判聚焦於成果，而非逐項在價格上爭執。

toeic.example_en: Interest-based bargaining explores the underlying needs behind each party stated position.
toeic.example_zh: 利益導向協商探討雙方表面立場背後的真正需求。

toeic.example_en: Positional bargaining can harden disagreements and leave little room for creative solutions.
toeic.example_zh: 立場式議價會固化分歧，並讓創意解決方案沒有空間。

toeic.example_en: Offering a package deal combining software, support, and training closed the negotiation quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 提出將軟體、支援與訓練合併的整批交易迅速結束了談判。

toeic.example_en: Logrolling allowed each side to trade lower-priority items for higher-priority gains.
toeic.example_zh: 滾木式交換讓雙方以較低優先順序的項目換取較高優先順序的利益。

toeic.example_en: Healthy give-and-take during contract talks builds trust for future business interactions.
toeic.example_zh: 合約談判中的健康互讓互取為未來業務往來建立信任。

toeic.example_en: Both negotiators worked toward a win-win outcome that preserved the long-term partnership.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方談判者努力達成保住長期合作關係的雙贏結果。

toeic.example_en: A zero-sum mindset assumes any gain by one side must come at the other side cost.
toeic.example_zh: 零和心態假設一方的收益必須來自另一方的損失。

toeic.example_en: Diversifying our supplier base significantly strengthened our negotiation leverage this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 多元化供應商基礎大幅強化了我們本季的談判籌碼。

toeic.example_en: Strategic concession trading helped both parties feel satisfied with the final agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 策略性讓步交換讓雙方對最終協議都感到滿意。

toeic.example_en: Our negotiation team includes a lawyer, an engineer, and the procurement category manager.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的談判團隊包括一位律師、一位工程師以及採購類別經理。

toeic.example_en: The lead negotiator sets the agenda and signals the team final position to the vendor.
toeic.example_zh: 首席談判代表負責設定議程並向供應商表明團隊的最終立場。

toeic.example_en: Term sheet drafting captures every essential deal element before lawyers begin formal documentation.
toeic.example_zh: 條款摘要草擬在律師開始正式文件之前，記錄交易的每個關鍵要素。

toeic.example_en: The deal structure determines how risk, cost, and rewards are shared by the parties.
toeic.example_zh: 交易架構決定雙方如何分擔風險、成本與報酬。

toeic.example_en: A clear contract architecture separates commercial terms from legal boilerplate language effectively.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚的合約架構能有效將商業條件與法律樣板用語區分開來。

toeic.example_en: A framework contract sets common terms while individual orders define quantity and timing.
toeic.example_zh: 框架合約設定共通條件，個別訂單則定義數量與時程。

toeic.example_en: Our umbrella agreement covers all subsidiaries and reduces redundant contract administration overhead.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的總括協議涵蓋所有子公司並減少重複的合約管理負擔。

toeic.example_en: A supplemental agreement covered the additional analytics module added after the original contract.
toeic.example_zh: 補充協議涵蓋原合約之後增加的分析模組。

toeic.example_en: A confidential side letter clarified specific obligations not described in the main contract.
toeic.example_zh: 機密的補充函釐清了主合約未描述的特定義務。

toeic.example_en: The contract amendment expanded the scope to include two additional country markets next year.
toeic.example_zh: 合約修訂將範圍擴及明年的兩個額外國家市場。

toeic.example_en: A scope amendment must be signed before the engineering team begins any new feature work.
toeic.example_zh: 工程團隊在開始任何新功能工作前，必須簽署範圍修訂。

toeic.example_en: Scope reduction may lower the price but also limit the strategic value of the engagement.
toeic.example_zh: 範圍縮減可能降低價格，但也會限制合作案的策略價值。

toeic.example_en: Any out-of-scope item must be quoted separately and approved through a written change order.
toeic.example_zh: 任何範圍外項目都必須另行報價，並透過書面變更單核准。

toeic.example_en: Every in-scope deliverable is listed in section two and reviewed before each phase ends.
toeic.example_zh: 每項範圍內交付項目都列於第二節並在各階段結束前審查。

toeic.example_en: Clear deliverable acceptance criteria prevent disagreements once the vendor submits the final report.
toeic.example_zh: 明確的交付驗收標準可避免供應商提交最終報告後產生爭議。

toeic.example_en: All cost or schedule shifts require a signed change request form before work continues.
toeic.example_zh: 所有費用或時程的變動在繼續工作前都需要簽署的變更請求單。

toeic.example_en: The change control board meets every Friday to approve or defer pending modification requests.
toeic.example_zh: 變更控制委員會每週五開會核准或延緩待處理的修改請求。

toeic.example_en: Vendor risk assessment includes financial health checks and information security maturity reviews.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商風險評估包括財務健康度檢查與資訊安全成熟度審查。

toeic.example_en: Supplier qualification confirms that candidates meet our technical and compliance requirements early on.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商資格認證在早期確認候選者符合我們的技術與合規要求。

toeic.example_en: Our supplier onboarding process covers banking setup, tax forms, and security questionnaires.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的供應商上線流程涵蓋銀行資料設定、稅務表單與安全問卷。

toeic.example_en: Supplier offboarding involves returning company assets and revoking system access immediately upon termination.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商退場包括歸還公司資產，並在終止時立即撤銷系統存取權限。

toeic.example_en: A vendor consolidation strategy reduces administrative overhead and strengthens our position in negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商整併策略可減少行政負擔並強化我們在談判中的地位。

toeic.example_en: Rationalization of our supplier base released significant savings without harming operational continuity.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商基礎的合理化精簡釋放出顯著的節省，且未損及營運延續性。

toeic.example_en: Vendor segmentation classifies partners as strategic, preferred, transactional, or tactical based on impact.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商分級依據影響將夥伴分類為策略、優選、交易或戰術型。

toeic.example_en: Our strategic partnership with the cloud provider includes joint roadmap planning every six months.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與雲端供應商的策略合作關係包括每六個月的共同路線圖規劃。

toeic.example_en: A transactional vendor handles standard commodity purchases without ongoing relationship management requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 交易型供應商處理標準商品採購，不需持續的關係管理。

toeic.example_en: Supplier relationship management aims to maximize value and innovation from our most important partners.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商關係管理旨在從我們最重要的夥伴中最大化價值與創新。

toeic.example_en: Our joint business plan with the supplier sets shared revenue targets and innovation initiatives.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與供應商的共同業務計畫設定共享營收目標與創新計畫。

toeic.example_en: The executive steering committee resolves disputes that the operational teams cannot settle alone.
toeic.example_zh: 高階指導委員會解決營運團隊無法獨自解決的爭議。

toeic.example_en: The escalation matrix defines who to contact at each severity level and within what timeframe.
toeic.example_zh: 升級矩陣定義在每個嚴重等級內應在多長時間內聯絡誰。

toeic.example_en: Dispute escalation proceeds in three stages before parties consider formal mediation or arbitration.
toeic.example_zh: 爭議升級分三階段進行，雙方再考慮正式調解或仲裁。

toeic.example_en: Both parties pledged good faith negotiation before resorting to any legal proceedings.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方承諾在採取任何法律程序前先進行善意協商。

toeic.example_en: Negotiation in good faith requires honest disclosure of information that affects key decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 誠信協商要求對影響關鍵決策的資訊誠實揭露。

toeic.example_en: The letter of award officially notified the supplier of their successful proposal selection.
toeic.example_zh: 得標通知書正式通知供應商其提案獲選成功。

toeic.example_en: The notice of intent committed the parties to negotiate exclusively for the next sixty days.
toeic.example_zh: 意向通知書承諾雙方在接下來六十天內專屬談判。

toeic.example_en: A preliminary agreement captured the major commercial points pending full legal review.
toeic.example_zh: 初步協議在等待完整法律審查前先記錄主要商業要點。

toeic.example_en: Heads of terms outline the principal elements of the deal before drafting the binding contract.
toeic.example_zh: 主要條款大綱在草擬具約束力的合約前列出交易的主要要素。

toeic.example_en: The court ruling created binding precedent affecting how future vendor disputes will be handled.
toeic.example_zh: 法院判決建立了有約束力的先例，影響未來供應商爭議的處理方式。

toeic.example_en: During the exclusivity period the buyer cannot engage with competing vendors on similar projects.
toeic.example_zh: 在排他期內，買方不得與競爭供應商洽談類似專案。

toeic.example_en: Granting an exclusive negotiation right signals serious intent during early-stage deal discussions.
toeic.example_zh: 授予排他談判權在交易初期討論中釋出認真的意圖。

toeic.example_en: The right of first refusal lets us match any third-party offer before the asset is sold.
toeic.example_zh: 優先承購權讓我們在資產出售前可比照任何第三方報價。

toeic.example_en: A most favored nation clause guarantees we receive the best pricing offered to any competitor.
toeic.example_zh: 最惠國條款保證我們獲得提供給任何競爭者的最優價格。

toeic.example_en: Achieving preferred customer status unlocks expedited support and access to new product previews.
toeic.example_zh: 取得優先客戶身分可解鎖加急支援以及新產品搶先預覽存取權。

toeic.example_en: The service catalog lists every offering available under the master services agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 服務型錄列出主服務協議下可提供的每項服務。

toeic.example_en: Rate card publication brings transparency and reduces the time spent on individual price negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 費率表公布帶來透明度並減少個別價格談判所花的時間。

toeic.example_en: The labor rate for senior consultants increased due to specialized industry expertise added.
toeic.example_zh: 資深顧問的人工費率因新增的專業產業專長而提高。

toeic.example_en: A blended rate averages the cost across junior and senior staff working on the engagement.
toeic.example_zh: 混合費率將參與案件的資淺與資深人員成本平均計算。

toeic.example_en: A cost-plus contract reimburses actual expenses plus a fixed markup for vendor profit.
toeic.example_zh: 成本加成合約報銷實際費用，並加上固定加成作為供應商利潤。

toeic.example_en: A fixed-fee engagement caps client exposure but pushes overrun risk onto the consulting vendor.
toeic.example_zh: 固定費用案件限制客戶的支出，但將超支風險轉嫁給顧問供應商。

toeic.example_en: A time-and-materials contract suits projects whose scope cannot be precisely defined upfront.
toeic.example_zh: 時間與材料合約適合無法在事前精確定義範圍的專案。

toeic.example_en: The not-to-exceed amount caps total fees regardless of how many hours the team logs.
toeic.example_zh: 上限金額限制總費用，不論團隊登記多少工時。

toeic.example_en: Setting a ceiling price provides cost certainty even when the project scope shifts somewhat.
toeic.example_zh: 設定價格上限即使在專案範圍稍有變動時也能確保成本明確。

toeic.example_en: Sharing the target cost openly encourages vendors to find creative ways to deliver value.
toeic.example_zh: 公開分享目標成本可鼓勵供應商找出創造價值的方法。

toeic.example_en: Open-book costing requires the supplier to disclose detailed cost components for the buyer.
toeic.example_zh: 公開帳目成本要求供應商向買方揭露詳細的成本組成。

toeic.example_en: A gainshare agreement rewards both parties when efficiency improvements reduce overall total costs.
toeic.example_zh: 利益分享協議在效率提升降低總成本時獎勵雙方。

toeic.example_en: Risk and reward sharing aligns vendor incentives with the customer business outcomes.
toeic.example_zh: 風險與報酬共享將供應商誘因與客戶業務成果相結合。

toeic.example_en: A performance-based contract ties vendor compensation directly to measurable business results delivered.
toeic.example_zh: 績效導向合約將供應商報酬直接連結到可衡量的業務成果。

toeic.example_en: An outcome-based agreement focuses payment on whether the desired business result is achieved.
toeic.example_zh: 成果導向協議將付款重點放在是否達成期望的業務成果。

toeic.example_en: A key man clause requires vendor approval before reassigning the named senior project leader.
toeic.example_zh: 關鍵人員條款要求在重新指派指定的資深專案負責人前先取得供應商同意。

toeic.example_en: The staffing plan attached to the contract names every specialist supporting the engagement.
toeic.example_zh: 附於合約的人員配置計畫列出支援案件的每位專業人員。

toeic.example_en: The vendor confirmed a resource commitment of five senior engineers for the next six months.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商確認在接下來六個月內承諾五位資深工程師的資源。

toeic.example_en: A dedicated team works exclusively on our account and learns our processes in depth.
toeic.example_zh: 專屬團隊僅為我們的帳戶工作，並深入了解我們的流程。

toeic.example_en: Drawing from a shared resource pool reduces cost but slows response to urgent client requests.
toeic.example_zh: 從共享資源池取用可降低成本，但會減慢對緊急客戶請求的回應。

toeic.example_en: The subcontracting clause requires written approval before any third party performs critical tasks.
toeic.example_zh: 轉包條款要求任何第三方執行關鍵任務前須獲得書面核准。

toeic.example_en: The flow-down provision applies the same obligations to all subcontractors throughout the supply chain.
toeic.example_zh: 連帶適用條款讓供應鏈中所有分包商承擔相同的義務。

toeic.example_en: Third-party risk reviews evaluate whether subcontractors meet our security and ethics standards.
toeic.example_zh: 第三方風險審查評估分包商是否符合我們的安全與道德標準。

toeic.example_en: Supply chain mapping reveals dependencies that could otherwise disrupt our critical product lines.
toeic.example_zh: 供應鏈圖譜揭露可能擾亂我們關鍵產品線的依賴關係。

toeic.example_en: Visibility into our tier 3 supplier base has improved significantly after recent audits.
toeic.example_zh: 近期稽核後，我們對第三階供應商的可見度已大幅提升。

toeic.example_en: Each vendor receives a supplier risk score based on financial, operational, and reputational factors.
toeic.example_zh: 每家供應商依財務、營運與聲譽因素獲得一個供應商風險分數。

toeic.example_en: Total contract value includes optional renewal years and assumed annual escalation amounts.
toeic.example_zh: 總合約價值包括可選的續約年份與假設的年度調漲金額。

toeic.example_en: Annualized contract value helps compare multi-year deals against shorter-term subscription commitments.
toeic.example_zh: 年度化合約價值有助於比較多年合約與較短期訂閱承諾。

toeic.example_en: A longer contract term length usually justifies more aggressive discounting from the supplier.
toeic.example_zh: 較長的合約期間通常足以讓供應商提供更激進的折扣。

toeic.example_en: A rolling contract automatically extends month to month until either party provides termination notice.
toeic.example_zh: 滾動式合約逐月自動延長，直到任一方提出終止通知。

toeic.example_en: An evergreen contract continues indefinitely without requiring fresh signatures each renewal period.
toeic.example_zh: 常青合約無限期延續，每個續約期間不需重新簽署。

toeic.example_en: Written termination notice must be delivered at least ninety days before the renewal date.
toeic.example_zh: 書面終止通知必須在續約日期前至少九十天送達。

toeic.example_en: Post-termination obligations include returning data, destroying copies, and certifying full compliance.
toeic.example_zh: 終止後義務包括歸還資料、銷毀副本以及證明完全合規。

toeic.example_en: A survival clause keeps confidentiality and indemnity obligations in force after the contract ends.
toeic.example_zh: 存續條款讓保密與賠償義務在合約結束後仍持續有效。

toeic.example_en: A force majeure event excuses delays caused by natural disasters, war, or government action.
toeic.example_zh: 不可抗力事件可免除因天災、戰爭或政府行動造成的延誤責任。

toeic.example_en: An act of God such as an earthquake may temporarily suspend our delivery commitments here.
toeic.example_zh: 如地震等天災可暫時中止我們在此地的交付承諾。

toeic.example_en: The supply disruption clause defines remedies if upstream raw materials become unavailable suddenly.
toeic.example_zh: 供應中斷條款定義在上游原料突然無法取得時的救濟措施。

toeic.example_en: Delay damages accumulate at the agreed rate for each calendar day past the completion date.
toeic.example_zh: 遲延損害賠償按議定費率對完工日期之後的每個日曆日累計。

toeic.example_en: Service level credits compensate customers when monthly uptime falls below contractually guaranteed thresholds.
toeic.example_zh: 當月服務妥善率低於合約保證門檻時，服務水準減免會補償客戶。

toeic.example_en: The uptime commitment guarantees ninety-nine point nine percent service availability over the year.
toeic.example_zh: 妥善率承諾保證全年百分之九十九點九的服務可用性。

toeic.example_en: Monthly reports document service availability and explain the cause of any unplanned downtime.
toeic.example_zh: 月報記錄服務可用性並說明任何非預期停機的原因。

toeic.example_en: Severe issues require an incident response time of fifteen minutes around the clock daily.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴重問題要求全天候十五分鐘內的事件回應時間。

toeic.example_en: Our mean time to repair has dropped to two hours after the new monitoring rollout.
toeic.example_zh: 在新監控系統推出後，我們的平均修復時間已降至兩小時。

toeic.example_en: Defects discovered during the warranty period will be repaired at no additional cost.
toeic.example_zh: 保固期間內發現的瑕疵將免費修復。

toeic.example_en: An extended warranty option adds another two years of coverage for a one-time fee.
toeic.example_zh: 延長保固選項以一次性費用提供另外兩年的保障。

toeic.example_en: Our service warranty covers refunds whenever the vendor misses two consecutive monthly targets.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的服務保證在供應商連續兩個月未達目標時提供退款。

toeic.example_en: Fitness for purpose obligates the supplier to deliver solutions that meet stated business needs.
toeic.example_zh: 適用性要求供應商交付符合既定業務需求的解決方案。

toeic.example_en: Merchantable quality means goods must be fit for the ordinary purposes buyers expect.
toeic.example_zh: 適銷品質意指商品必須符合買方期待的一般用途。

toeic.example_en: Title transfer occurs only after final payment clears the vendor designated bank account.
toeic.example_zh: 所有權移轉僅在最終付款清算進入供應商指定銀行帳戶後發生。

toeic.example_en: The passing of risk clause determines who bears responsibility for goods during overseas transit.
toeic.example_zh: 風險移轉條款決定誰在海外運輸期間承擔商品的責任。

toeic.example_en: The agreed delivery schedule splits the order into four phased shipments over six months.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方議定的交貨時程將訂單分為六個月內的四次分階段裝運。

toeic.example_en: A phased rollout plan limits exposure if early issues require quick adjustment to scope.
toeic.example_zh: 分階段推行計畫在早期問題需要快速調整範圍時限制風險暴露。

toeic.example_en: The pilot agreement covers ninety days of usage with success criteria triggering full deployment.
toeic.example_zh: 試行協議涵蓋九十天的使用期，達到成功標準後啟動完整部署。

toeic.example_en: A short trial agreement helps both parties assess fit before committing to a multi-year deal.
toeic.example_zh: 短期試用協議有助雙方在承諾多年合約前評估契合度。

toeic.example_en: An evaluation license lets prospects test premium features for thirty days at no cost.
toeic.example_zh: 評估授權讓潛在客戶免費試用進階功能三十天。

toeic.example_en: A perpetual license grants indefinite usage rights but typically excludes ongoing software updates.
toeic.example_zh: 永久授權授予無期限的使用權，但通常不包括持續的軟體更新。

toeic.example_en: A subscription license bundles software access with ongoing updates and standard technical support.
toeic.example_zh: 訂閱授權將軟體存取權與持續更新及標準技術支援綁在一起。

toeic.example_en: A named user license restricts usage to specific individuals listed in the licensing schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 指名使用者授權將使用限制於授權附表中列名的特定人員。

toeic.example_en: Concurrent user licenses limit how many simultaneous sessions are permitted at any given moment.
toeic.example_zh: 同時使用者授權限制任何時刻可允許多少並行會話。

toeic.example_en: A site license covers unlimited installation throughout a single physical office location.
toeic.example_zh: 場地授權涵蓋單一實體辦公地點內的無限制安裝。

toeic.example_en: An enterprise license agreement covers all employees globally under a single negotiated price.
toeic.example_zh: 企業授權協議在單一議定價格下涵蓋全球所有員工。

toeic.example_en: A term license provides access for a defined period and must be renewed before expiration.
toeic.example_zh: 期間授權在限定期間內提供存取權，且必須在到期前續約。

toeic.example_en: The annual true-up clause reconciles actual usage against the initial license quantity purchased.
toeic.example_zh: 年度用量結算條款將實際使用量與最初購買的授權數量對帳。

toeic.example_en: The audit clause permits the vendor to verify license compliance with prior written notice.
toeic.example_zh: 稽核條款允許供應商在事前書面通知下確認授權合規情形。

toeic.example_en: Our compliance review confirmed all software deployments matched the licensed quantities purchased.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的合規審查確認所有軟體部署都與已購授權數量相符。

toeic.example_en: A true-up payment is owed whenever actual usage exceeds the initially licensed user count.
toeic.example_zh: 當實際使用量超過最初授權人數時即需支付用量補繳款項。

toeic.example_en: A co-development agreement defines ownership of any intellectual property created jointly by the parties.
toeic.example_zh: 共同開發協議定義雙方共同創造的任何智慧財產的所有權。

toeic.example_en: The joint venture agreement allocates fifty-five percent equity to the operating local partner.
toeic.example_zh: 合資協議將百分之五十五的股權配給負責營運的當地夥伴。

toeic.example_en: Two firms signed a teaming agreement to pursue the federal contract jointly as partners.
toeic.example_zh: 兩家公司簽署聯合投標協議，以夥伴身分共同爭取聯邦合約。

toeic.example_en: A consortium agreement defines each member contribution and rights to project deliverables.
toeic.example_zh: 聯盟協議定義每位成員的貢獻以及對專案交付物的權利。

toeic.example_en: The reseller agreement grants margin discounts in exchange for meeting annual sales quotas.
toeic.example_zh: 經銷商協議以達成年度銷售配額為條件給予毛利折扣。

toeic.example_en: A referral fee of ten percent rewards partners who introduce qualified opportunities to our team.
toeic.example_zh: 百分之十的介紹費獎勵向我們團隊引介合格商機的夥伴。

toeic.example_en: Our channel agreement defines exclusive territories, support obligations, and joint marketing commitments.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的通路協議定義專屬區域、支援義務以及聯合行銷承諾。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 原廠委託製造合約
toeic.example_en: The OEM contract allows the vendor to embed our component into its own branded product.
toeic.example_zh: 原廠委託製造合約允許供應商將我們的零件嵌入其自有品牌產品中。

toeic.example_en: A white label agreement lets resellers offer our service under their own brand identity.
toeic.example_zh: 白牌協議讓經銷商以自有品牌名義提供我們的服務。

toeic.example_en: Our private label deal with the retailer doubled annual unit shipments to North America.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與該零售商的自有品牌交易將北美年度出貨量加倍。

toeic.example_en: The licensor retains all underlying intellectual property rights to the original trademark.
toeic.example_zh: 授權人保留原始商標的所有底層智慧財產權。

toeic.example_en: The licensee may distribute the product only within the territories listed in the schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 被授權人僅能在附表列出的區域內銷售產品。

toeic.example_en: The royalty rate of seven percent applies to net sales after agreed deductions are taken.
toeic.example_zh: 百分之七的權利金費率適用於扣除議定減項後的淨銷售額。

toeic.example_en: A minimum guarantee ensures the licensor receives baseline royalties regardless of actual sales volume.
toeic.example_zh: 最低保證金額確保授權人不論實際銷售量都能獲得基本權利金。

toeic.example_en: The advance payment of twenty percent secures production slots in the manufacturing schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 百分之二十的預付款可保留生產排程中的製造時段。

toeic.example_en: Progress payments are released as each construction milestone passes formal inspection successfully.
toeic.example_zh: 階段付款在每個建造里程碑成功通過正式檢驗時發放。

toeic.example_en: Final acceptance triggers release of the holdback retention payment within fifteen business days.
toeic.example_zh: 最終驗收將在十五個工作日內觸發保留款的支付。

toeic.example_en: Holdback retention of ten percent is released only after warranty obligations are confirmed.
toeic.example_zh: 百分之十的保留款僅在保固義務獲確認後才會釋出。

toeic.example_en: Net terms of sixty days improved our cash position while preserving the supplier relationship.
toeic.example_zh: 六十天的淨額付款條件改善了我們的現金狀況同時維持供應商關係。

toeic.example_en: Extended payment terms gave us breathing room during the seasonal slowdown earlier this year.
toeic.example_zh: 延長付款條件在今年稍早的季節性淡季為我們爭取喘息空間。

toeic.example_en: An early payment incentive of two percent encourages buyers to settle invoices within ten days.
toeic.example_zh: 百分之二的提早付款獎勵鼓勵買方在十天內結清發票。

toeic.example_en: A late payment penalty of one and a half percent monthly applies to overdue invoices automatically.
toeic.example_zh: 每月百分之一點五的逾期付款罰金將自動適用於逾期發票。

toeic.example_en: Negotiating better credit terms reduced our working capital requirements considerably this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 爭取更好的信用條件大幅降低了我們本季的營運資金需求。

toeic.example_en: Milestone-based payment links cash outflows to verifiable progress on the vendor work plan.
toeic.example_zh: 里程碑式付款將現金流出與供應商工作計畫上可驗證的進度連結。

toeic.example_en: Our invoice approval workflow routes large vendor bills through legal, finance, and category management.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的發票核准流程將大額供應商帳單路由經法務、財務與品類管理。

toeic.example_en: A three-way match compares the purchase order, receiving report, and vendor invoice before payment.
toeic.example_zh: 三方核對在付款前比對採購單、收貨報告與供應商發票。

toeic.example_en: Invoice reconciliation flagged several billing errors that resulted in significant supplier credits this month.
toeic.example_zh: 發票對帳發現多項計費錯誤，本月為我們爭取到顯著的供應商抵免。

toeic.example_en: The purchase agreement formalizes the buyer commitment to acquire specified equipment from the supplier.
toeic.example_zh: 採購協議使買方承諾向供應商購買指定設備正式化。

toeic.example_en: Our supply agreement guarantees fixed unit pricing for an annual minimum order quantity.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的供應協議在每年最低訂單量下保證固定的單價。

toeic.example_en: The service agreement defines response times, escalation paths, and ongoing maintenance responsibilities clearly.
toeic.example_zh: 服務協議明確定義回應時間、升級路徑與持續維護責任。

toeic.example_en: The master purchase agreement governs all future orders for components from this strategic supplier.
toeic.example_zh: 採購主協議規範未來向這位策略供應商所有的零件訂單。

toeic.example_en: The indemnification provision protects the buyer from third-party claims arising from supplier negligence.
toeic.example_zh: 賠償條款保護買方免於因供應商過失而產生的第三方索賠。

toeic.example_en: A hold harmless agreement shifts certain liability risks from one contracting party to another.
toeic.example_zh: 免責協議將某些責任風險從一個締約方轉移到另一方。

toeic.example_en: Limitation of damages caps vendor financial exposure at twelve months of fees paid.
toeic.example_zh: 損害賠償上限將供應商的財務風險限制為已付十二個月的費用。

toeic.example_en: A consequential damages waiver excludes lost profits and indirect business losses from recoverable damages.
toeic.example_zh: 間接損害豁免將喪失利潤與間接商業損失排除在可求償損害之外。

toeic.example_en: Only direct damages caused by proven breach can be claimed under section twelve of the agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 依協議第十二條，只有由可證明違約造成的直接損害可被求償。

toeic.example_en: An intellectual property warranty confirms the deliverables do not infringe upon any third party rights.
toeic.example_zh: 智慧財產保證確認交付物未侵犯任何第三方權利。

toeic.example_en: An infringement claim by a third party triggers the supplier defense obligations under this section.
toeic.example_zh: 第三方提出的侵權索賠依本節觸發供應商的抗辯義務。

toeic.example_en: Background IP brought into the engagement remains owned by the party that originally developed it.
toeic.example_zh: 帶入案件的背景智慧財產仍屬於原始開發方所有。

toeic.example_en: Foreground IP created during the project belongs jointly to both parties under our agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 案件期間創造的前景智慧財產依我們的協議歸雙方共同所有。

toeic.example_en: All deliverables qualify as work made for hire and belong exclusively to the client company.
toeic.example_zh: 所有交付物均屬於受託作品，並專屬於委託公司。

toeic.example_en: Source code escrow protects the buyer if the software vendor goes bankrupt or stops supporting.
toeic.example_zh: 原始碼託管在軟體供應商破產或停止支援時保護買方。

toeic.example_en: An escrow trigger event releases the deposited code to the licensee under defined circumstances.
toeic.example_zh: 託管啟動事件在指定情況下將託管的程式碼釋出給被授權人。

toeic.example_en: The data ownership clause confirms customer data remains the property of the buying organization.
toeic.example_zh: 資料所有權條款確認客戶資料仍屬於採購組織的財產。

toeic.example_en: The data processing addendum aligns vendor obligations with privacy regulations applicable in our jurisdictions.
toeic.example_zh: 資料處理附錄將供應商義務與我們司法管轄區適用的隱私法規相符。

toeic.example_en: The supplier maintains a public subprocessor list and notifies customers before adding any party.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商維護公開的次處理者清單，並在新增任何單位前通知客戶。

toeic.example_en: Cross-border data transfer requires standard contractual clauses approved by the relevant regulators.
toeic.example_zh: 跨境資料傳輸需要相關監管機關核准的標準合約條款。

toeic.example_en: A data localization requirement obligates the supplier to store records only within specified countries.
toeic.example_zh: 資料在地化要求供應商僅在指定國家內儲存資料。

toeic.example_en: Every service-level commitment is measured monthly and reported on the customer success dashboard.
toeic.example_zh: 每項服務水準承諾每月衡量並回報至客戶成功儀表板。

toeic.example_en: An operational level agreement defines internal team obligations needed to deliver the external SLA.
toeic.example_zh: 內部營運協議定義為達成對外服務水準協議所需的內部團隊義務。

toeic.example_en: Each underpinning contract with a sub-supplier supports the customer-facing service-level agreement objectives.
toeic.example_zh: 與次級供應商的每項底層合約都支撐面向客戶的服務水準協議目標。

toeic.example_en: Our supplier code of ethics prohibits child labor and mandates safe working conditions worldwide.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的供應商道德準則禁止童工並要求全球各地有安全的工作環境。

toeic.example_en: Our responsible sourcing policy ensures raw materials come from environmentally certified mines or farms.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的負責任採購政策確保原物料來自具環境認證的礦場或農場。

toeic.example_en: A supplier diversity program prioritizes contracts with women-owned and minority-owned business enterprises.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商多元計畫優先與女性及少數族裔擁有的企業簽約。

toeic.example_en: A small business set-aside reserves certain procurement opportunities exclusively for qualified small enterprises.
toeic.example_zh: 中小企業專案保留特定採購機會專屬於合格的中小企業。

toeic.example_en: Our spending with each minority-owned vendor has tripled since the new diversity initiative launched.
toeic.example_zh: 自從新多元計畫啟動以來，我們對每家少數族裔供應商的支出已增加兩倍。

toeic.example_en: Spend under management increased from sixty percent to eighty-five percent after the sourcing transformation.
toeic.example_zh: 在採購轉型後，受管理支出從百分之六十提高到百分之八十五。

toeic.example_en: Indirect spend includes office supplies, professional services, and travel expenses across all departments.
toeic.example_zh: 間接支出包括所有部門的辦公用品、專業服務以及差旅費用。

toeic.example_en: Direct spend covers raw materials and components that become part of finished customer products.
toeic.example_zh: 直接支出涵蓋成為最終客戶產品一部分的原物料與零件。

toeic.example_en: Maverick spending occurs when employees bypass approved purchasing channels and contractually negotiated rates.
toeic.example_zh: 員工繞過核准的採購管道與議定費率時即產生脫序採購。

toeic.example_en: Centralized procurement leverages company-wide demand to negotiate stronger pricing with major suppliers.
toeic.example_zh: 集中採購運用全公司需求與主要供應商談判更優價格。

toeic.example_en: Decentralized buying offers business unit flexibility but often misses available enterprise volume discounts.
toeic.example_zh: 分散採購提供業務單位彈性，但通常會錯失企業層級的數量折扣。

toeic.example_en: A procurement card handles low-value transactions faster than the traditional purchase order process.
toeic.example_zh: 採購卡處理低額交易的速度比傳統採購單流程更快。

toeic.example_en: Each purchase requisition must be approved by the department head before becoming a purchase order.
toeic.example_zh: 每張採購申請在轉為採購單前必須由部門主管核准。

toeic.example_en: The preferred vendor list speeds approvals because pricing has been pre-negotiated by the team.
toeic.example_zh: 優選供應商清單加快核准速度，因為價格已由團隊事先談妥。

toeic.example_en: Only firms on the approved supplier list may submit bids for these regulated product categories.
toeic.example_zh: 只有列於核可供應商清單的廠商可對這些受規範產品類別投標。

toeic.example_en: A competitive sourcing event invites multiple suppliers to bid on identical product specifications openly.
toeic.example_zh: 競爭性採購活動公開邀請多家供應商針對相同產品規格投標。

toeic.example_en: A reverse auction event drives prices down as suppliers compete to submit the lowest bid.
toeic.example_zh: 反向拍賣活動隨著供應商競相提出最低出價而壓低價格。

toeic.example_en: A request for information helps us understand the supplier market before launching formal sourcing.
toeic.example_zh: 資訊邀請函讓我們在啟動正式採購前先了解供應商市場。

toeic.example_en: The expression of interest document gathers initial supplier interest before formal evaluation begins.
toeic.example_zh: 意向書文件在正式評估開始前蒐集供應商初步興趣。

toeic.example_en: We invited the two finalists to submit their best and final offer by Friday noon.
toeic.example_zh: 我們邀請兩家入圍廠商於週五中午前提交最終報價。

toeic.example_en: Each negotiation round narrowed gaps on commercial terms and accelerated alignment on key deliverables.
toeic.example_zh: 每一個談判回合都縮小了商業條件的差距並加速關鍵交付物的共識。

toeic.example_en: The negotiation plan outlines opening offers, fallback positions, and the desired closing milestones.
toeic.example_zh: 談判計畫列出開盤報價、備用立場以及期望的結案里程碑。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞片語) 合併財務報表
toeic.example_en: The parent company must consolidate financials from all subsidiaries before quarterly reporting.
toeic.example_zh: 母公司必須在季度報告前合併所有子公司的財務報表。

toeic.example_en: Strong operating cash flow signals that the core business generates sufficient liquidity.
toeic.example_zh: 強勁的營運現金流顯示核心業務產生了足夠的流動性。

toeic.example_en: The treasury team updates the cash flow forecast every Monday using rolling thirteen-week data.
toeic.example_zh: 財務部門每週一使用滾動十三週數據更新現金流預測。
