toeic.example_en: A cash conversion ratio above ninety percent suggests highly efficient earnings translation.
toeic.example_zh: 現金轉換比率超過九成顯示獲利轉換十分高效。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自由現金流殖利率
toeic.example_en: Value investors compare free cash flow yield across peers to identify undervalued stocks.
toeic.example_zh: 價值投資者會比較同業的自由現金流殖利率以找出被低估的股票。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 可自由支配的支出
toeic.example_en: Management froze discretionary spending until margins recovered to target levels.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層凍結了可自由支配的支出，直到利潤率回升到目標水準。

toeic.example_en: Analysts strip out non-recurring expenses to assess the underlying earnings power.
toeic.example_zh: 分析師會剔除非經常性費用以評估核心獲利能力。

toeic.example_en: Depreciation is a non-cash charge that reduces reported income but not the bank balance.
toeic.example_zh: 折舊是一項非現金費用，會減少帳列收益但不影響銀行餘額。

toeic.example_en: The firm chose to capitalize the software development costs over a five-year period.
toeic.example_zh: 公司選擇將軟體開發成本在五年期間內資本化。

toeic.example_en: Routine repairs were expensed immediately rather than added to the asset base.
toeic.example_zh: 例行修繕被立即列為費用，而非加入資產基礎。

toeic.example_en: Our capitalization policy sets a five-thousand-dollar threshold for fixed asset recognition.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的資本化政策設定五千美元為固定資產認列門檻。

toeic.example_en: Under accrual accounting, revenue is recognized when earned regardless of cash receipt.
toeic.example_zh: 在權責發生制下，收入於賺得時認列，與現金收取無關。

toeic.example_en: The matching principle requires expenses to be reported in the same period as related revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 配合原則要求費用與相關收入在同一期間認列。

toeic.example_en: The revenue recognition policy was revised after the new accounting standard took effect.
toeic.example_zh: 新會計準則生效後，公司修訂了收入認列政策。

toeic.example_en: Annual subscriptions trigger deferred revenue recognition over the twelve-month service period.
toeic.example_zh: 年度訂閱會觸發為期十二個月的遞延收入認列。

toeic.example_en: Customer prepayments are recorded as unearned revenue until services are delivered.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶預付款在服務交付前記為預收收入。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly billings exceeded recognized revenue by twelve million dollars this period.
toeic.example_zh: 本期的季度開單金額比認列收入多出一千兩百萬美元。

toeic.example_en: Bookings grew thirty percent year over year, signaling robust future revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 已簽訂單金額年增三成，預示未來收入強勁。

toeic.example_en: Deferred income tax arises when book and tax depreciation schedules differ.
toeic.example_zh: 當帳列折舊與稅務折舊期程不同時，便會產生遞延所得稅。

toeic.example_en: The effective tax rate fell to nineteen percent after the foreign tax credit was applied.
toeic.example_zh: 在套用境外稅額抵減後，有效稅率降至百分之十九。

toeic.example_en: The quarterly tax provision reflects management's best estimate of annual liabilities.
toeic.example_zh: 季度所得稅費用提列反映管理層對年度稅負的最佳估計。

toeic.example_en: The auditor flagged several uncertain tax positions related to cross-border transactions.
toeic.example_zh: 審計師標示了數項與跨境交易相關的不確定稅務立場。

toeic.example_en: Income tax expense rose sharply as taxable income exceeded prior-year levels.
toeic.example_zh: 由於課稅所得超過去年水準，所得稅費用大幅上升。

toeic.example_en: Pre-tax profit climbed to forty million despite higher operating costs this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 儘管本季營運成本上升，稅前利潤仍攀升至四千萬美元。

toeic.example_en: After-tax profit forms the basis for dividend distribution recommendations to shareholders.
toeic.example_zh: 稅後利潤是向股東建議股利分配的基礎。

toeic.example_en: Profit before tax improved by fifteen percent thanks to operational efficiency gains.
toeic.example_zh: 由於營運效率提升，稅前利潤改善了百分之十五。

toeic.example_en: The contribution margin ratio guides decisions on which product lines to expand.
toeic.example_zh: 邊際貢獻率有助於決定該擴張哪些產品線。

toeic.example_en: Segment reporting clarifies which business units drive consolidated profitability.
toeic.example_zh: 分部報告釐清了哪些業務單位帶動了合併獲利能力。

toeic.example_en: Each operating segment must disclose revenue and assets under the new standard.
toeic.example_zh: 依新準則，每個營運分部都必須揭露收入與資產。

toeic.example_en: A reportable segment is one that meets the ten percent quantitative threshold.
toeic.example_zh: 達到百分之十量化門檻者為應報導分部。

toeic.example_en: Fully diluted shares include all convertible securities and outstanding stock options.
toeic.example_zh: 完全稀釋股數包含所有可轉換證券和流通在外的認股權。

toeic.example_en: Basic earnings per share rose to three dollars and seven cents this year.
toeic.example_zh: 基本每股盈餘今年升至三點零七美元。

toeic.example_en: Diluted earnings per share fell short of analyst expectations by four cents.
toeic.example_zh: 稀釋每股盈餘較分析師預期少四美分。

toeic.example_en: Shareholders equity rose due to retained earnings and a follow-on equity issuance.
toeic.example_zh: 由於保留盈餘和增資發行，股東權益有所上升。

toeic.example_en: Paid-in capital reflects amounts contributed by shareholders above the share par value.
toeic.example_zh: 實收資本反映股東出資超過股票面值的金額。

toeic.example_en: Additional paid-in capital increased after the secondary offering closed last quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 上季二次發行完成後，資本公積有所增加。

toeic.example_en: Noncontrolling interest is presented as a separate component of consolidated equity.
toeic.example_zh: 非控制權益在合併權益中以獨立項目列示。

toeic.example_en: Minority interest represents outside ownership stakes in our consolidated subsidiaries.
toeic.example_zh: 少數股東權益代表我們合併子公司中的外部持股。

toeic.example_en: Comprehensive income captures gains and losses excluded from net income, such as currency translation.
toeic.example_zh: 綜合損益涵蓋被排除於淨利之外的損益，例如匯率換算差額。

toeic.example_en: Unrealized gains on available-for-sale securities flow through other comprehensive income.
toeic.example_zh: 備供出售證券的未實現利益流經其他綜合損益。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 累計其他綜合損益
toeic.example_en: Accumulated other comprehensive income shows cumulative currency and pension effects on equity.
toeic.example_zh: 累計其他綜合損益顯示匯率及退休金對權益的累積影響。

toeic.example_en: A weaker dollar produced a positive currency translation adjustment for the European unit.
toeic.example_zh: 美元走弱使歐洲事業單位產生有利的外幣換算調整。

toeic.example_en: The Singapore subsidiary uses the US dollar as its functional currency for reporting.
toeic.example_zh: 新加坡子公司以美元作為其報導用功能性貨幣。

toeic.example_en: All consolidated statements are presented in the reporting currency of US dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 所有合併報表均以美元作為報導用貨幣呈現。

toeic.example_en: Remeasurement of foreign monetary assets created a sizable gain this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 外幣貨幣性資產重新衡量本季產生可觀利益。

toeic.example_en: Cash, receivables, and bonds are classified as monetary assets on the balance sheet.
toeic.example_zh: 現金、應收帳款和債券在資產負債表上歸類為貨幣性資產。

toeic.example_en: Inventory and property are non-monetary assets carried at historical cost.
toeic.example_zh: 存貨和不動產屬於以歷史成本入帳的非貨幣性資產。

toeic.example_en: The carrying amount of the warehouse fell below its recoverable amount, triggering impairment.
toeic.example_zh: 倉庫的帳面金額低於可回收金額，因而觸發減損。

toeic.example_en: Recoverable amount is the higher of fair value less costs and value in use.
toeic.example_zh: 可回收金額是公允價值減處分成本與使用價值兩者的較高者。

toeic.example_en: Calculating value in use requires projecting future cash flows from the asset.
toeic.example_zh: 計算使用價值需預估該資產未來的現金流量。

toeic.example_en: The company booked a thirty-million impairment loss on its outdated equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 公司就過時設備認列三千萬元的減損損失。

toeic.example_en: Goodwill must undergo an annual impairment test under current accounting rules.
toeic.example_zh: 依現行會計規範，商譽必須每年進行減損測試。

toeic.example_en: Each retail store is treated as a separate cash-generating unit for impairment testing.
toeic.example_zh: 每間零售店在減損測試上被視為獨立的現金產生單位。

toeic.example_en: Right-of-use assets and lease liability are now recognized on the balance sheet.
toeic.example_zh: 使用權資產與租賃負債如今都認列於資產負債表上。

toeic.example_en: The right-of-use asset is amortized over the shorter of lease term or useful life.
toeic.example_zh: 使用權資產依租賃期間與耐用年限孰短進行攤銷。

toeic.example_en: Most office space is held under an operating lease with renewal options every five years.
toeic.example_zh: 大部分辦公空間以營業租賃持有，每五年有續約選擇權。

toeic.example_en: The trucks were acquired through a finance lease and capitalized at present value.
toeic.example_zh: 卡車透過融資租賃取得，並以現值資本化入帳。

toeic.example_en: The lessor retains ownership but transfers the right to use the asset to the lessee.
toeic.example_zh: 出租人保留所有權，但將資產使用權轉移給承租人。

toeic.example_en: As lessee, our firm reports a right-of-use asset and a corresponding lease obligation.
toeic.example_zh: 作為承租人，本公司認列使用權資產與相對應的租賃義務。

toeic.example_en: The landlord offered a sixty-thousand-dollar lease incentive to refurbish the office.
toeic.example_zh: 房東提供六萬美元的租賃誘因供裝修辦公室。

toeic.example_en: A higher discount rate assumption lowers the present value of projected cash flows.
toeic.example_zh: 較高的折現率假設會降低未來現金流的現值。

toeic.example_en: The incremental borrowing rate reflects the rate the lessee would pay on similar terms.
toeic.example_zh: 增額借款利率反映承租人在類似條件下所需支付的利率。

toeic.example_en: Slow-moving stock triggered a significant inventory write-down in the year-end audit.
toeic.example_zh: 滯銷存貨在年底審計中觸發了大額存貨評價損失。

toeic.example_en: Inventory is reported at the lower of cost or net realizable value each period.
toeic.example_zh: 存貨每期以成本與淨變現價值中較低者列示。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 成本與市價孰低法
toeic.example_en: Under lower of cost or market, declining prices trigger immediate balance sheet adjustments.
toeic.example_zh: 在成本與市價孰低法下，價格下跌會立即觸發資產負債表調整。

toeic.example_en: Raw materials inventory rose ahead of the anticipated production surge next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 為因應下季預期生產激增，原物料存貨有所增加。

toeic.example_en: Work-in-progress inventory swelled when production line bottlenecks slowed throughput.
toeic.example_zh: 當生產線瓶頸拖慢產出時，在製品存貨大幅增加。

toeic.example_en: Finished goods inventory declined as holiday season demand exceeded production capacity.
toeic.example_zh: 由於假期需求超過產能，製成品存貨有所下降。

toeic.example_en: Days inventory outstanding increased by twelve days due to softer end-market demand.
toeic.example_zh: 由於終端市場需求疲軟，存貨週轉天數增加了十二天。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 應付帳款週轉天數
toeic.example_en: Stretching days payable outstanding boosted working capital but strained supplier relations.
toeic.example_zh: 延長應付帳款週轉天數雖增加營運資金，卻使供應商關係緊張。

toeic.example_en: A significant trade receivable from a key client was overdue by sixty days.
toeic.example_zh: 一筆來自主要客戶的大額應收帳款已逾期六十天。

toeic.example_en: The aging schedule shows that twenty percent of receivables are over ninety days past due.
toeic.example_zh: 帳齡分析表顯示有兩成應收帳款逾期超過九十天。

toeic.example_en: Management set aside a larger doubtful debt provision in response to industry headwinds.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層因應產業逆風而提列了較大額的呆帳準備。

toeic.example_en: We wrote off uncollectible accounts totaling two hundred thousand dollars this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 本季沖銷了總計二十萬美元的無法收回帳款。

toeic.example_en: Expected credit loss models forecast write-offs based on macroeconomic indicators.
toeic.example_zh: 預期信用損失模型根據總體經濟指標預估沖銷金額。

toeic.example_en: Loss given default reflects the percentage not recovered after a borrower defaults.
toeic.example_zh: 違約損失率反映借款人違約後未能回收的比例。

toeic.example_en: Probability of default rises sharply as credit ratings move below investment grade.
toeic.example_zh: 當信用評等跌至投資級以下，違約機率會急遽上升。

toeic.example_en: Exposure at default estimates the amount outstanding when a borrower fails to pay.
toeic.example_zh: 違約暴險額估計借款人未能付款時的未償金額。

toeic.example_en: The audit engagement letter sets the scope, timing, and fees for the year-end audit.
toeic.example_zh: 查核委任書明訂年度查核的範圍、時程與費用。

toeic.example_en: Audit planning identifies risk areas requiring detailed substantive procedures.
toeic.example_zh: 審計規劃會找出需要詳細實質性程序的風險領域。

toeic.example_en: Sufficient appropriate audit evidence is required to support every material assertion.
toeic.example_zh: 每項重要主張都需要充分適切的審計證據加以支持。

toeic.example_en: Audit workpapers document procedures performed and conclusions reached by the team.
toeic.example_zh: 工作底稿記錄團隊執行的程序與所得結論。

toeic.example_en: The management representation letter confirms responsibility for financial statement accuracy.
toeic.example_zh: 管理階層聲明書確認其對財報正確性之責任。

toeic.example_en: An audit adjustment of three million dollars reduced inventory at year-end.
toeic.example_zh: 三百萬美元的審計調整使年底存貨向下修正。

toeic.example_en: A subsequent event must be disclosed if it provides material new information.
toeic.example_zh: 若期後事項提供重要新資訊，便須予以揭露。

toeic.example_en: The going-concern assumption underlies the valuation of most long-lived assets.
toeic.example_zh: 繼續經營假設是大多數長期資產評價的基礎。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 財務報導內部控制
toeic.example_en: Management must annually assess internal control over financial reporting under SOX rules.
toeic.example_zh: 依據沙賓法案，管理層每年須評估財務報導內部控制。

toeic.example_en: A material weakness in revenue controls prompted a restatement of prior-year results.
toeic.example_zh: 收入控制存在重大缺失，導致前年度業績重編。

toeic.example_en: The auditor identified a significant deficiency in the inventory cycle count process.
toeic.example_zh: 審計師指出存貨盤點循環中存在一項重要缺失。

toeic.example_en: A control deficiency exists when designed procedures fail to prevent errors timely.
toeic.example_zh: 當設計的程序無法及時防止錯誤時，即存在控制缺失。

toeic.example_en: The restatement reduced previously reported earnings by eighteen million dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 財報重編使先前公布盈餘減少一千八百萬美元。

toeic.example_en: A prior-period adjustment was recorded to correct the misallocation of overhead.
toeic.example_zh: 為更正製造費用分攤錯誤，已記入前期調整。

toeic.example_en: Level three inputs are used for fair value measurement when market data is unavailable.
toeic.example_zh: 當無市場資料時，公允價值衡量會採用第三層輸入值。

toeic.example_en: The fair value hierarchy categorizes inputs as level one, two, or three.
toeic.example_zh: 公允價值層級將輸入值分為第一層、第二層或第三層。

toeic.example_en: Trading securities are marked to market through earnings every reporting period.
toeic.example_zh: 交易性證券每期透過損益按市價計值。

toeic.word: fair value through profit or loss
toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 透過損益按公允價值衡量
toeic.example_en: Derivatives are classified as fair value through profit or loss under IFRS 9.
toeic.example_zh: 依IFRS第九號公報，衍生工具歸類為透過損益按公允價值衡量。

toeic.example_en: Unrealized gains on an available-for-sale security flow through equity, not earnings.
toeic.example_zh: 備供出售證券的未實現利益會流經權益，而非損益。

toeic.example_en: A held-to-maturity security is reported at amortized cost on the balance sheet.
toeic.example_zh: 持有至到期證券在資產負債表以攤銷後成本列示。

toeic.example_en: Bonds held to maturity are carried at amortized cost using the effective interest method.
toeic.example_zh: 持有至到期的債券採有效利率法以攤銷後成本入帳。

toeic.example_en: Interest income is allocated using the effective interest method over the bond's life.
toeic.example_zh: 利息收入採有效利率法在債券存續期間內分攤。

toeic.example_en: Premium bond amortization gradually reduces the bond's carrying amount toward par.
toeic.example_zh: 溢價債券攤銷會逐步將債券帳面金額調整至面值。

toeic.example_en: A bond premium arises when the bond's coupon rate exceeds the market interest rate.
toeic.example_zh: 當債券票面利率高於市場利率時即產生債券溢價。

toeic.example_en: A bond discount develops when the issuance yield is higher than the coupon rate.
toeic.example_zh: 當發行殖利率高於票面利率時，就會產生債券折價。

toeic.example_en: The treasurer adopted a yield enhancement strategy by laddering short-duration bonds.
toeic.example_zh: 財務長採用階梯式短期債券作為收益增強策略。

toeic.example_en: Yield curve analysis can signal upcoming recessions when the curve inverts.
toeic.example_zh: 殖利率曲線分析在曲線倒掛時可預示即將到來的衰退。

toeic.example_en: The valuation team used discount cash flow analysis to support the acquisition price.
toeic.example_zh: 評價團隊運用折現現金流分析來支持併購價格。

toeic.example_en: Terminal value typically represents over half of a DCF model's total enterprise value.
toeic.example_zh: 終值通常佔折現現金流模型企業總值的一半以上。

toeic.example_en: We applied a two percent growth in perpetuity rate to derive the terminal value.
toeic.example_zh: 我們套用百分之二的永續成長率以推導終值。

toeic.example_en: Enterprise value adjusts equity value for net debt and minority interests.
toeic.example_zh: 企業價值是以權益價值調整淨債務及少數股東權益後的金額。

toeic.example_en: Equity value equals enterprise value minus net debt plus surplus cash holdings.
toeic.example_zh: 股權價值等於企業價值減淨債務加超額現金。

toeic.example_en: Net debt rose sharply after the firm financed its expansion with bond issuance.
toeic.example_zh: 公司以發行債券資助擴張後，淨債務急遽上升。

toeic.example_en: Lenders typically cap the debt-to-EBITDA ratio at four times for new credit facilities.
toeic.example_zh: 貸款方通常將新授信的負債對EBITDA比率上限訂為四倍。

toeic.example_en: Interest expense rose with each successive rate hike from the central bank.
toeic.example_zh: 每當央行升息一次，利息費用就會隨之上升。

toeic.example_en: Capitalized interest on the new plant was added to the fixed asset cost basis.
toeic.example_zh: 新廠房的資本化利息被加入固定資產成本基礎。

toeic.example_en: Borrowing cost includes interest, fees, and any foreign exchange differences on debt.
toeic.example_zh: 借款成本包括利息、手續費及任何債務匯兌差額。

toeic.example_en: Funded debt comprises long-term obligations maturing beyond the next twelve months.
toeic.example_zh: 長期負債由到期日超過十二個月的長期義務組成。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 一年內到期長期負債
toeic.example_en: Current portion of long-term debt jumps when major notes approach their maturity dates.
toeic.example_zh: 當主要本票接近到期日時，一年內到期長期負債會大幅上升。

toeic.example_en: Principal amortization on the term loan begins after a one-year grace period.
toeic.example_zh: 定期貸款的本金攤還將在一年寬限期後開始。

toeic.example_en: Amortization expense on customer relationships totals four million annually.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶關係的攤銷費用每年共計四百萬美元。

toeic.example_en: Intangible amortization reduced reported earnings while leaving cash flow intact.
toeic.example_zh: 無形資產攤銷降低了帳列盈餘，但不影響現金流。

toeic.example_en: The depreciation schedule projects annual charges for each fixed asset category.
toeic.example_zh: 折舊明細表預估每個固定資產類別的年度折舊。

toeic.example_en: Accumulated depreciation is netted against gross assets to derive book value.
toeic.example_zh: 累計折舊與總資產相抵後即得帳面價值。

toeic.example_en: The mining firm uses the units-of-production method to depreciate extraction equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 礦業公司採用生產量單位法為開採設備計提折舊。

toeic.example_en: Double-declining balance accelerates expense recognition during an asset's early years.
toeic.example_zh: 雙倍餘額遞減法在資產初期加速認列費用。

toeic.example_en: Sum-of-the-years-digits depreciation front-loads expenses similarly to declining balance methods.
toeic.example_zh: 年數合計折舊法與餘額遞減法相似，會先期承擔較多費用。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 加速成本回收制度
toeic.example_en: US tax law allows MACRS depreciation to recover asset costs over prescribed periods.
toeic.example_zh: 美國稅法允許以加速成本回收制度在規定期間內回收資產成本。

toeic.example_en: The section 179 deduction lets small businesses fully expense qualifying equipment immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 第179條費用化扣除允許小企業就符合條件設備立即全額費用化。

toeic.example_en: Bonus depreciation accelerated tax deductions for new manufacturing equipment investments.
toeic.example_zh: 額外折舊加速了新製造設備投資的稅務扣除。

toeic.example_en: The tax basis of the asset differs from its book value after accelerated deductions.
toeic.example_zh: 在加速折舊扣抵後，該資產稅務基礎與帳面價值並不相同。

toeic.example_en: A temporary difference reverses in future periods, creating deferred tax accounts today.
toeic.example_zh: 暫時性差異將在未來期間迴轉，因此當期產生遞延所得稅。

toeic.example_en: Permanent difference items never reverse and so do not create deferred taxes.
toeic.example_zh: 永久性差異項目永不迴轉，因此不產生遞延所得稅。

toeic.example_en: A valuation allowance reduces deferred tax assets if realization is not more likely than not.
toeic.example_zh: 若實現可能性未過半，須以評價備抵減少遞延所得稅資產。

toeic.example_en: A reserve account was set up to fund the upcoming bond redemption next March.
toeic.example_zh: 公司設立準備帳戶以支應明年三月即將到來的債券贖回。

toeic.example_en: Earnings were transferred to a general reserve to strengthen the equity buffer.
toeic.example_zh: 盈餘已轉入一般準備以強化權益緩衝。

toeic.example_en: A statutory reserve must be maintained at ten percent of paid-in capital under local law.
toeic.example_zh: 依當地法律須保留實收資本百分之十作為法定準備。

toeic.example_en: Surplus from asset revaluation was credited directly to the capital reserve account.
toeic.example_zh: 資產重估的盈餘已直接貸記至資本準備帳戶。

toeic.example_en: Revaluation surplus on land remained in equity until the property was finally sold.
toeic.example_zh: 土地的重估增值在不動產出售前一直留存於權益項下。

toeic.example_en: Hedge accounting reduces earnings volatility when derivatives offset underlying exposures.
toeic.example_zh: 當衍生工具抵消標的暴險時，避險會計可降低盈餘波動。

toeic.example_en: A cash flow hedge mitigates variability of forecasted foreign currency receipts.
toeic.example_zh: 現金流量避險可緩和預估外幣收款的變動性。

toeic.example_en: A fair value hedge offsets changes in the price of a fixed-rate liability.
toeic.example_zh: 公允價值避險可抵消固定利率負債價格的變動。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 國外營運機構淨投資避險
toeic.example_en: A net investment hedge protects equity from currency swings in foreign operations.
toeic.example_zh: 國外營運機構淨投資避險可保護權益不受外幣波動影響。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly testing confirmed hedge effectiveness within the prescribed range.
toeic.example_zh: 季度測試確認避險有效性落在規定範圍內。

toeic.example_en: The interest rate swap's notional amount was set at one hundred million dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 利率交換的名目本金訂為一億美元。

toeic.example_en: Each derivative instrument is recorded on the balance sheet at fair value.
toeic.example_zh: 每項衍生性金融工具均以公允價值列入資產負債表。

toeic.example_en: An embedded derivative must be separated from its host contract for fair value treatment.
toeic.example_zh: 嵌入式衍生工具須與主契約分離以採公允價值處理。

toeic.example_en: The host contract was accounted for separately from the embedded conversion option.
toeic.example_zh: 主契約與嵌入式轉換選擇權分別會計處理。

toeic.example_en: Purchase price allocation assigned half the value to customer-related intangibles.
toeic.example_zh: 收購價格分攤將一半價值分配給客戶相關無形資產。

toeic.example_en: A bargain purchase occurs when fair value of net assets exceeds the consideration paid.
toeic.example_zh: 當所取得淨資產公允價值超過支付對價時，便構成廉價購買。

toeic.example_en: Contingent consideration pays the seller more if revenue targets are achieved.
toeic.example_zh: 若達成收入目標，或有對價將額外支付給賣方。

toeic.example_en: Goodwill impairment is recognized when a reporting unit's fair value falls below carrying amount.
toeic.example_zh: 當報導單位公允價值低於帳面金額時，須認列商譽減損。

toeic.example_en: Each reporting unit is tested for goodwill impairment at least annually.
toeic.example_zh: 每個報導單位至少每年進行一次商譽減損測試。

toeic.example_en: A step acquisition triggers remeasurement of previously held equity at fair value.
toeic.example_zh: 分階段取得會觸發先前持有權益按公允價值重新衡量。

toeic.example_en: The buyer issued shares as noncash consideration for the target's assets.
toeic.example_zh: 買方發行股份作為標的資產的非現金對價。

toeic.example_en: Share-based payment expense is measured on the grant date and amortized over service.
toeic.example_zh: 股份基礎給付費用在授予日衡量並於服務期間攤銷。

toeic.example_en: Grant date fair value is calculated using the Black-Scholes option pricing model.
toeic.example_zh: 授予日公允價值採用Black-Scholes選擇權定價模型計算。

toeic.example_en: A service condition requires employees to remain with the company for a specific period.
toeic.example_zh: 服務條件要求員工在公司任職一段特定期間。

toeic.example_en: Awards vest only when the performance condition tied to revenue growth is satisfied.
toeic.example_zh: 唯有達成與營收成長連結的績效條件，獎酬才會歸屬。

toeic.example_en: A market condition links vesting to relative total shareholder return performance.
toeic.example_zh: 市場條件將股票歸屬與相對股東總報酬績效掛鉤。

toeic.example_en: The estimated forfeiture rate adjusts compensation expense for likely employee departures.
toeic.example_zh: 預估沒收率會就可能離職員工調整薪酬費用。

toeic.example_en: Stock compensation expense climbed twenty percent after the latest equity refresh grant.
toeic.example_zh: 在最近的股權更新授予後，股票薪酬費用上升了百分之二十。

toeic.example_en: The unfunded pension obligation grew when discount rates declined sharply this year.
toeic.example_zh: 由於折現率今年大幅下滑，未提撥的退休金義務有所增加。

toeic.example_en: Projected benefit obligation includes future salary increases beyond current accrued benefits.
toeic.example_zh: 預計給付義務涵蓋未來薪資調升，超出目前累計權益的部分。

toeic.example_en: Accumulated benefit obligation reflects pension promises earned through the measurement date.
toeic.example_zh: 累積給付義務反映至衡量日為止已賺得的退休金承諾。

toeic.example_en: Our defined benefit plan promises retirees a percentage of their final-year salary.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的確定給付計畫承諾退休員工最終年度薪資的某一百分比。

toeic.example_en: Under a defined contribution plan, the employee bears the investment risk in retirement.
toeic.example_zh: 在確定提撥計畫下，員工承擔退休投資風險。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 計畫資產預期報酬
toeic.example_en: The expected return on plan assets reduces net periodic pension expense.
toeic.example_zh: 計畫資產預期報酬可減少每期淨退休金費用。

toeic.example_en: Service cost represents new benefits earned by employees during the current period.
toeic.example_zh: 服務成本代表員工於當期賺得的新給付權益。

toeic.example_en: Interest cost is calculated on the beginning benefit obligation each accounting period.
toeic.example_zh: 利息成本以每期期初給付義務計算。

toeic.example_en: An actuarial gain emerged from higher-than-expected returns on plan assets.
toeic.example_zh: 計畫資產報酬高於預期，產生精算利益。

toeic.example_en: A lower discount rate created a sizable actuarial loss on the pension obligation.
toeic.example_zh: 折現率走低使退休金義務產生可觀的精算損失。

toeic.example_en: Plan asset performance fell short of the expected return assumption this year.
toeic.example_zh: 今年計畫資產表現低於預期報酬假設。

toeic.example_en: Funded status is plan assets minus the projected benefit obligation.
toeic.example_zh: 提撥狀態為計畫資產減預計給付義務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 前期服務成本攤銷
toeic.example_en: Amortization of prior service cost is spread over the remaining service period.
toeic.example_zh: 前期服務成本攤銷於剩餘服務期間內分攤。

toeic.example_en: A settlement gain was recognized when lump-sum payments closed a portion of the plan.
toeic.example_zh: 當一次性支付結束計畫部分義務時，認列了清算利益。

toeic.example_en: A curtailment occurs when the plan freezes future accruals for active employees.
toeic.example_zh: 當計畫凍結在職員工未來權益累積時，即構成縮減。

toeic.example_en: Treasury management oversees cash forecasting, banking relationships, and short-term investments.
toeic.example_zh: 財務管理負責現金預測、銀行往來及短期投資。

toeic.example_en: Cash pooling consolidates subsidiary balances to optimize group-wide interest income.
toeic.example_zh: 現金歸集將子公司餘額集中以最大化集團整體利息收入。

toeic.example_en: Notional pooling offsets balances across accounts without physically moving the funds.
toeic.example_zh: 名義歸集在帳戶間互抵餘額，無需實際轉移資金。

toeic.example_en: A zero balance account sweeps excess funds nightly to the master concentration account.
toeic.example_zh: 零餘額帳戶每晚將多餘資金歸集至主集中帳戶。

toeic.example_en: All operating units sweep daily cash into a central concentration account in New York.
toeic.example_zh: 所有營運單位每日將現金歸集到紐約的中央集中帳戶。

toeic.example_en: An intercompany loan funded the European subsidiary's working capital needs.
toeic.example_zh: 公司間貸款支應歐洲子公司的營運資金需求。

toeic.example_en: Every intercompany transaction is eliminated in consolidation to avoid double counting.
toeic.example_zh: 每筆公司間交易在合併時都會予以沖銷以避免重複計算。

toeic.example_en: An elimination entry removes the parent's investment against subsidiary equity at consolidation.
toeic.example_zh: 合併時以沖銷分錄將母公司投資與子公司權益相抵。

toeic.example_en: The transfer price between affiliates must reflect arm's length market values.
toeic.example_zh: 關係企業間的移轉訂價須反映符合常規的市場價格。

toeic.example_en: The arm's length principle governs cross-border pricing among related entities.
toeic.example_zh: 常規交易原則規範關係企業間的跨境訂價。

toeic.example_en: A transfer pricing study supports the markup applied to intercompany service charges.
toeic.example_zh: 移轉訂價研究支持公司間服務收費所適用的加成。

toeic.example_en: An advance pricing agreement with tax authorities locks in acceptable intercompany margins.
toeic.example_zh: 與稅務機關的預先訂價協議鎖定可接受的公司間利潤率。

toeic.example_en: The seller provided a tax indemnity to cover pre-closing tax exposures.
toeic.example_zh: 賣方提供稅務補償以涵蓋成交前的稅務暴險。

toeic.example_en: Tax treaties help relieve double taxation on cross-border dividend payments.
toeic.example_zh: 租稅協定有助於減輕跨境股利支付的雙重課稅。

toeic.example_en: A bilateral tax treaty lowered the withholding rate on royalty payments to ten percent.
toeic.example_zh: 雙邊租稅協定將權利金支付的扣繳率降至百分之十。

toeic.example_en: Creating a permanent establishment abroad triggers local corporate tax obligations.
toeic.example_zh: 於海外設立常設機構將觸發當地公司稅義務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 稅基侵蝕與利潤移轉
toeic.example_en: BEPS rules target multinational arrangements that artificially shift profits to low-tax jurisdictions.
toeic.example_zh: BEPS規則針對跨國企業將利潤人為移轉至低稅負區的安排。

toeic.example_en: Pillar two introduces a global minimum corporate tax rate of fifteen percent.
toeic.example_zh: 第二支柱導入百分之十五的全球最低公司稅率。

toeic.example_en: The global minimum tax will raise effective tax rates for many multinationals starting next year.
toeic.example_zh: 全球最低稅負將自明年起提高多家跨國企業的有效稅率。

toeic.example_en: Country-by-country reporting discloses revenue and tax paid in each jurisdiction.
toeic.example_zh: 國別報告揭露各管轄地的收入及已繳稅款。

toeic.example_en: A uniform chart of accounts standardizes financial reporting across all subsidiaries.
toeic.example_zh: 統一會計科目表使各子公司的財務報導標準化。

toeic.example_en: The accounts receivable subledger ties to the general ledger control account each month.
toeic.example_zh: 應收帳款明細分類帳每月與總帳控制帳戶勾稽。

toeic.example_en: The control account total must equal the sum of related subledger balances.
toeic.example_zh: 控制帳戶總額必須等於相關明細分類帳餘額的總和。

toeic.example_en: Recurring entries are first recorded in the general journal before posting to the ledger.
toeic.example_zh: 經常性分錄先在普通日記簿登錄，再過帳至總帳。

toeic.example_en: Daily posting from the journal updates each affected general ledger account.
toeic.example_zh: 每日從日記簿過帳會更新每個受影響的總帳科目。

toeic.example_en: The monthly close process has been compressed from ten to five business days.
toeic.example_zh: 月結帳流程已由十個工作日壓縮為五個工作日。

toeic.example_en: A consolidation entry eliminates intercompany sales recorded by both affiliates.
toeic.example_zh: 合併分錄會沖銷兩家關係企業所登錄的公司間銷售。

toeic.example_en: A topside adjustment was booked at the corporate level to reflect a late accrual.
toeic.example_zh: 為反映晚到的應計事項，於集團層級做了上層調整分錄。

toeic.example_en: Automated blackline reconciliation reduced manual effort across two hundred accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 自動化帳戶對帳工具減少了兩百個科目的人工作業。

toeic.example_en: Flux analysis explains why operating expenses rose unexpectedly versus the prior quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 變動分析說明為何營業費用較上季意外上升。

toeic.example_en: The annual budget cycle kicks off in September and ends with board approval in December.
toeic.example_zh: 年度預算循環自九月啟動，於十二月經董事會核准結束。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 由上而下編列預算
toeic.example_en: Top-down budgeting begins with corporate targets that cascade to individual departments.
toeic.example_zh: 由上而下編列預算先設定集團目標，再層層分配至各部門。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 由下而上編列預算
toeic.example_en: Bottom-up budgeting aggregates departmental plans to derive the consolidated forecast.
toeic.example_zh: 由下而上編列預算將各部門計畫彙總以推導合併預估。

toeic.example_en: A rolling budget extends twelve months out, refreshed each quarter with new data.
toeic.example_zh: 滾動預算往未來延伸十二個月，並於每季以新資料更新。

toeic.example_en: A flexible budget adjusts expense lines automatically based on actual sales volume.
toeic.example_zh: 彈性預算依實際銷售量自動調整費用項目。

toeic.example_en: A static budget remains fixed despite changes in operating volume during the year.
toeic.example_zh: 靜態預算即使年度內營運量變動仍維持不變。

toeic.example_en: Each cost center manager is accountable for monthly variance explanations.
toeic.example_zh: 每位成本中心主管都需負責每月差異的說明。

toeic.example_en: Each regional profit center reports both revenue and direct expense performance.
toeic.example_zh: 每個區域利潤中心都需報告其收入與直接費用績效。

toeic.example_en: An investment center is evaluated on return on invested capital, not just profit.
toeic.example_zh: 投資中心以投資資本報酬率而非僅以利潤進行評估。

toeic.example_en: Responsibility accounting assigns financial outcomes to specific managers and units.
toeic.example_zh: 責任會計將財務結果歸屬給特定主管與單位。

toeic.example_en: A transfer charge allocates shared service costs to consuming business units.
toeic.example_zh: 內部轉撥計價將共享服務成本分攤至使用業務單位。

toeic.example_en: Headcount is the allocation key for distributing corporate overhead across segments.
toeic.example_zh: 以員工人數作為分攤基礎，將集團共同費用分配至各分部。

toeic.example_en: The overhead absorption rate is recalculated annually based on budgeted activity levels.
toeic.example_zh: 製造費用吸收率每年依預算作業水準重新計算。

toeic.example_en: Applied overhead is added to each job based on direct labor hours used.
toeic.example_zh: 已分攤製造費用依使用之直接人工小時加計至每項工作。

toeic.example_en: Overapplied overhead is closed to cost of goods sold at period end.
toeic.example_zh: 多分攤製造費用於期末結轉至銷貨成本。

toeic.example_en: Underapplied overhead increases reported cost of goods sold for the period.
toeic.example_zh: 少分攤製造費用會增加當期帳列銷貨成本。

toeic.example_en: Burden cost includes payroll taxes, benefits, and indirect labor beyond base wages.
toeic.example_zh: 負擔成本包含薪資稅、福利及基本薪資之外的間接人工。

toeic.example_en: Project pricing applies a fully burdened rate to every billable consultant hour.
toeic.example_zh: 專案訂價對每一可計費顧問小時套用完全負擔費率。

toeic.example_en: Direct labor variance was unfavorable due to higher than expected hourly wages.
toeic.example_zh: 由於時薪高於預期，直接人工差異呈不利結果。

toeic.example_en: Direct material variance improved when the procurement team renegotiated supplier prices.
toeic.example_zh: 採購團隊重新談判供應商價格後，直接材料差異有所改善。

toeic.example_en: Price variance measures the difference between actual and standard unit input costs.
toeic.example_zh: 價格差異衡量實際單位投入成本與標準成本間的差距。

toeic.example_en: Quantity variance reveals how efficiently production used materials versus the standard.
toeic.example_zh: 數量差異揭示生產使用材料相較於標準的效率。

toeic.example_en: Spending variance measures actual overhead expense against the flexible budget allowance.
toeic.example_zh: 支出差異衡量實際製造費用與彈性預算容許數的差距。

toeic.example_en: Favorable efficiency variance arose from improved cycle times on the assembly line.
toeic.example_zh: 裝配線週期時間改善帶來有利的效率差異。

toeic.example_en: Volume variance captures the impact of producing more or fewer units than budgeted.
toeic.example_zh: 數量差異反映生產量高於或低於預算所造成的影響。

toeic.example_en: Standard costing simplifies inventory valuation by using predetermined cost per unit.
toeic.example_zh: 標準成本制以預定單位成本簡化存貨評價。

toeic.example_en: Actual costing assigns historical material and labor costs directly to each product.
toeic.example_zh: 實際成本制將歷史材料與人工成本直接歸屬於每項產品。

toeic.example_en: Normal costing applies a predetermined overhead rate while using actual direct costs.
toeic.example_zh: 正常成本制使用預定製造費用率，同時採用實際直接成本。

toeic.example_en: The predetermined overhead rate is set before the start of each fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 預定製造費用率於每會計年度開始前設定。

toeic.example_en: Capital budgeting helps the firm evaluate which long-term projects to fund first.
toeic.example_zh: 資本預算協助公司評估應優先資助哪些長期投資專案。

toeic.example_en: Capital rationing forces managers to rank projects when funding is constrained.
toeic.example_zh: 當資金受限時，資本配額迫使主管將專案排序。

toeic.example_en: Modified internal rate of return resolves issues with non-conventional cash flow patterns.
toeic.example_zh: 修正內部報酬率可解決非常規現金流型態的問題。

toeic.example_en: A profitability index above one indicates that the project creates positive net value.
toeic.example_zh: 獲利指數大於一表示專案創造正向淨值。

toeic.example_en: Discounted payback period factors in the time value of money before recovery.
toeic.example_zh: 折現回收期間在收回前納入貨幣時間價值的考量。

toeic.example_en: Sensitivity analysis tested how a fluctuating discount rate impacts project net value.
toeic.example_zh: 敏感性分析測試折現率變動對專案淨值的影響。

toeic.example_en: Scenario modeling shows how earnings shift under base, downside, and upside cases.
toeic.example_zh: 情境建模顯示在基準、下檔及上行情境下盈餘的變化。

toeic.example_en: Under the downside case, free cash flow falls thirty percent below the budget.
toeic.example_zh: 在下檔情境下，自由現金流較預算低三成。

toeic.example_en: The upside case assumes rapid adoption boosts revenue by twenty-five percent.
toeic.example_zh: 上行情境假設快速被採用使收入提升百分之二十五。

toeic.example_en: The base case reflects management's most likely outlook for the upcoming year.
toeic.example_zh: 基準情境反映管理層對來年最可能的展望。

toeic.example_en: What-if analysis lets finance leaders see immediate impacts of changing assumptions.
toeic.example_zh: 假設情境分析讓財務主管即時看到假設變動的影響。

toeic.example_en: A higher operating leverage ratio magnifies profits when revenue grows quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 較高的營運槓桿比率在收入快速成長時可放大利潤。

toeic.example_en: The financial leverage ratio rose as the firm financed growth with cheaper debt.
toeic.example_zh: 公司以較便宜的負債資助成長，使財務槓桿比率上升。

toeic.example_en: Degree of operating leverage tells how earnings respond to a percentage sales change.
toeic.example_zh: 營運槓桿度顯示盈餘如何隨銷售變動百分比反應。

toeic.example_en: Degree of financial leverage measures how interest costs amplify earnings volatility.
toeic.example_zh: 財務槓桿度衡量利息費用如何放大盈餘波動性。

toeic.example_en: Interest coverage of five times reassured creditors about the firm's repayment ability.
toeic.example_zh: 五倍的利息保障倍數讓債權人對公司的償還能力放心。

toeic.example_en: The leadership team unveiled a three-year strategic roadmap to guide product investment and market expansion.
toeic.example_zh: 領導團隊公佈了三年策略路線圖，以指引產品投資與市場擴張。

toeic.example_en: Our competitive positioning emphasizes premium quality and superior after-sales service in the enterprise segment.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的競爭定位強調企業客層的優質品質與卓越售後服務。

toeic.example_en: The market entry strategy combines local partnerships with phased rollouts across three regional hubs.
toeic.example_zh: 市場進入策略結合在地合作夥伴關係與三個區域中心的分階段推進。

toeic.example_en: A clear partnership strategy helps the firm prioritize alliances that strengthen distribution and product capabilities.
toeic.example_zh: 明確的合作夥伴策略有助公司優先推動強化通路與產品能力的聯盟。

toeic.example_en: Their ecosystem strategy invites complementary developers to extend the platform and lock in long-term customers.
toeic.example_zh: 他們的生態系策略邀請互補性開發者擴展平台，並鎖定長期客戶。

toeic.example_en: Executives joined a scenario planning workshop to stress-test the plan against three plausible market outcomes.
toeic.example_zh: 高階主管參加情境規劃工作坊，針對三種合理市場結果壓力測試該計畫。

toeic.example_en: The CEO clearly articulated the strategic intent to become the market leader within five years.
toeic.example_zh: 執行長清楚表達在五年內成為市場領導者的策略意圖。

toeic.example_en: Identifying the key value drivers helped the team focus resources on initiatives that move revenue meaningfully.
toeic.example_zh: 辨識關鍵價值驅動因素協助團隊將資源集中在能顯著推動營收的方案。

toeic.example_en: Cross-selling into existing accounts remains our most reliable growth lever for the coming fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 向現有客戶交叉銷售仍是我們未來會計年度最可靠的成長槓桿。

toeic.example_en: Geographic expansion almost doubled the addressable market for our cloud-based logistics platform last year.
toeic.example_zh: 去年的地理擴張幾乎將我們雲端物流平台的可觸及市場擴大一倍。

toeic.example_en: Mid-market manufacturers represent a white space opportunity where competitors offer few tailored solutions today.
toeic.example_zh: 中型製造商代表一個空白市場機會，目前少有競爭者提供量身打造的方案。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 鄰接市場；相鄰領域
toeic.example_en: The board approved a careful move into a logical adjacency that builds on existing engineering capabilities.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會核准謹慎進入一個邏輯上相鄰的領域，以延伸既有的工程能力。

toeic.example_en: Horizon planning balances near-term execution with longer-term bets that may take five years to mature.
toeic.example_zh: 時間視野規劃在短期執行與可能需五年成熟的長期賭注之間取得平衡。

toeic.example_en: Stabilizing customer retention is the near-term priority before pursuing more ambitious expansion plays.
toeic.example_zh: 穩定客戶留存是追求更大膽擴張策略前的短期優先事項。

toeic.example_en: The long-range plan outlines capital allocation, talent investment, and geographic footprint through 2030.
toeic.example_zh: 長程計畫概述至 2030 年的資本配置、人才投資與地理布局。

toeic.example_en: The board commissioned a strategy refresh after rapid changes in technology and customer expectations.
toeic.example_zh: 在技術與客戶期望快速變化後，董事會委託進行策略更新。

toeic.example_en: An independent strategic review challenged several long-held assumptions about competitive dynamics in the region.
toeic.example_zh: 獨立的策略檢視挑戰了該地區競爭動態長期以來的若干假設。

toeic.example_en: The strategy map links each operational objective to a clear customer outcome and financial result.
toeic.example_zh: 策略地圖將每個營運目標連結到明確的客戶結果與財務成果。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly OKR planning ensures objective alignment between functional teams and the broader corporate strategy.
toeic.example_zh: 季度 OKR 規劃確保各職能團隊與整體公司策略的目標對齊。

toeic.example_en: Each objective is paired with three measurable key results that the team will review weekly.
toeic.example_zh: 每個目標都搭配三項可衡量的關鍵結果，團隊將每週檢視。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 領先型關鍵績效指標
toeic.example_en: Pipeline coverage is a leading KPI that signals likely revenue several quarters into the future.
toeic.example_zh: 業務管線覆蓋率是領先型關鍵績效指標，可預示未來數季可能的營收。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 落後型關鍵績效指標
toeic.example_en: Net income is a lagging KPI that reflects decisions and investments made many months earlier.
toeic.example_zh: 淨收入是落後型關鍵績效指標，反映數月前所做的決策與投資。

toeic.example_en: Customer health is a meaningful outcome metric that captures both engagement and renewal probability.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶健康度是有意義的成果指標，涵蓋互動程度與續約可能性。

toeic.example_en: Demos delivered per rep is an input metric the sales team can influence directly every day.
toeic.example_zh: 每位業務代表完成的示範次數是業務團隊每天可直接影響的投入指標。

toeic.example_en: The annual operating plan translates strategy into budgets, hiring targets, and quarterly milestones.
toeic.example_zh: 年度營運計畫將策略轉化為預算、招募目標與季度里程碑。

toeic.example_en: The five-year capital plan funds new facilities, equipment upgrades, and selective acquisitions across regions.
toeic.example_zh: 五年資本計畫為各地區的新設施、設備升級與精選收購提供資金。

toeic.example_en: Each strategic bet must be supported by a clear investment thesis with quantified expected returns.
toeic.example_zh: 每項策略賭注都必須有明確的投資論點並量化預期回報。

toeic.example_en: The committee approved the project only after the expected return clearly exceeded the company's hurdle rate.
toeic.example_zh: 唯有預期報酬明顯超過公司的最低必要報酬率，委員會才核准該專案。

toeic.example_en: On a risk-adjusted basis, the smaller market entry option actually looks more attractive than the headline play.
toeic.example_zh: 在風險調整後基礎上，較小的市場進入選項實際上比大手筆策略更具吸引力。

toeic.example_en: Treasury runs value-at-risk analysis monthly to monitor potential losses across the currency hedging book.
toeic.example_zh: 財務部每月執行風險值分析，以監控外匯避險部位的潛在損失。

toeic.example_en: Finance modeled a what-if scenario in which key suppliers raise prices by ten percent next year.
toeic.example_zh: 財務部建立一個假設情境，模擬主要供應商明年漲價百分之十的情況。

toeic.example_en: Even in the downside scenario, the company maintains positive free cash flow and healthy liquidity buffers.
toeic.example_zh: 即使在不利情境下，公司仍能維持正向自由現金流與健康的流動性緩衝。

toeic.example_en: In the upside scenario, faster product adoption could lift revenue twenty percent above plan.
toeic.example_zh: 在樂觀情境下，產品採用速度加快可使營收較計畫高出百分之二十。

toeic.example_en: The team mapped sequential investment choices on a decision tree to clarify how options unfold over time.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊在決策樹上描繪一連串投資選擇，以釐清各方案隨時間如何展開。

toeic.example_en: Building modular capabilities now preserves option value for several possible strategic directions later.
toeic.example_zh: 現在打造模組化能力可為未來多種可能策略方向保留選擇權價值。

toeic.example_en: Leadership narrowed a long list down to four strategic options that warrant deeper financial modeling.
toeic.example_zh: 領導層將長名單縮減為四項值得進一步財務建模的策略選項。

toeic.example_en: Investing heavily in artificial intelligence is the company's biggest strategic bet for the next decade.
toeic.example_zh: 重金投入人工智慧是公司未來十年最大的策略性押注。

toeic.example_en: A competitive moat strategy built on switching costs and proprietary data protects margins from new entrants.
toeic.example_zh: 建立於轉換成本與專有資料之上的競爭護城河策略可保護獲利率免受新進者侵蝕。

toeic.example_en: High switching costs make it expensive for enterprise clients to move from our platform to alternatives.
toeic.example_zh: 高昂的轉換成本讓企業客戶從我們平台轉移到替代方案的代價非常高。

toeic.example_en: The marketplace exhibits a strong network effect because more sellers attract more buyers and vice versa.
toeic.example_zh: 該交易市場展現強大的網路效應，因為更多賣家吸引更多買家，反之亦然。

toeic.example_en: Growing volume unlocked meaningful economies of scale that lowered unit costs and improved profitability.
toeic.example_zh: 規模成長解鎖了顯著的規模經濟，降低單位成本並提升獲利能力。

toeic.example_en: Selling several related products through one sales force creates economies of scope and richer customer relationships.
toeic.example_zh: 透過單一業務團隊銷售多項相關產品可創造範疇經濟與更深的客戶關係。

toeic.example_en: Our differentiation strategy combines superior design, dedicated support, and a curated partner ecosystem.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的差異化策略結合卓越設計、專屬支援與精選的合作夥伴生態系。

toeic.example_en: The discount chain's cost leadership rests on lean operations, scale buying, and disciplined store formats.
toeic.example_zh: 該折扣連鎖店的成本領導建立在精實營運、規模採購與嚴謹的店型之上。

toeic.example_en: A focus strategy targeting independent clinics has helped the firm dominate a specialized but loyal niche.
toeic.example_zh: 鎖定獨立診所的集中策略幫助該公司主導一個專業但忠誠的利基市場。

toeic.example_en: Rather than chase the mass market, the founders pursued a profitable niche play in scientific instruments.
toeic.example_zh: 創辦人沒有追逐大眾市場，而是在科學儀器領域推行有利可圖的利基策略。

toeic.example_en: Their premium tier strategy targets demanding clients who value reliability and white-glove implementation services.
toeic.example_zh: 他們的高階層級策略鎖定重視可靠性與專屬導入服務的高要求客戶。

toeic.example_en: The mass market play depends on simple packaging, accessible pricing, and broad retail distribution coverage.
toeic.example_zh: 大眾市場策略仰賴簡單包裝、親民定價與廣泛的零售通路覆蓋。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly reviews assess whether the product portfolio still aligns with customer needs and strategic priorities.
toeic.example_zh: 季度檢視評估產品組合是否仍符合客戶需求與策略優先事項。

toeic.example_en: Portfolio rationalization eliminated underperforming SKUs and freed resources for higher-growth product lines.
toeic.example_zh: 產品組合精簡淘汰表現不佳的料號，並釋出資源給高成長產品線。

toeic.example_en: A richer product mix toward subscription offerings lifted overall margins despite slower hardware sales.
toeic.example_zh: 更偏向訂閱型方案的產品組合配比，在硬體銷售放緩下仍推升整體獲利率。

toeic.example_en: The new channel strategy blends direct sales, online self-service, and a curated network of resellers.
toeic.example_zh: 新的通路策略結合直銷、線上自助服務與精選的經銷商網絡。

toeic.example_en: Choosing the right route to market is as important as choosing the right product for each segment.
toeic.example_zh: 為每個區隔選擇正確的上市路徑與選對產品同樣重要。

toeic.example_en: Their alliance strategy focuses on technology partners that fill gaps faster than internal development could.
toeic.example_zh: 他們的聯盟策略聚焦於能比內部開發更快補足缺口的技術夥伴。

toeic.example_en: The two firms formed a strategic alliance to jointly develop and market a connected vehicle platform.
toeic.example_zh: 兩家公司成立策略聯盟，共同開發並行銷一個聯網車輛平台。

toeic.example_en: The joint go-to-market plan aligns sales targets, lead routing rules, and shared marketing investments.
toeic.example_zh: 聯合上市計畫對齊銷售目標、商機分派規則與共同行銷投資。

toeic.example_en: Both firms signed a co-marketing agreement to fund webinars, case studies, and joint industry events.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方公司簽訂共同行銷協議，為網路研討會、案例研究與聯合產業活動提供資金。

toeic.example_en: A structured co-selling motion ensures partner reps and our account team work the same opportunities.
toeic.example_zh: 結構化的共同銷售模式確保夥伴業務代表與我們的客戶團隊共同推進相同機會。

toeic.example_en: An expanded channel partner program now offers regional partners better margins and dedicated technical resources.
toeic.example_zh: 擴大的通路夥伴計畫現在為區域夥伴提供更佳獲利率與專屬技術資源。

toeic.example_en: A diversified supplier strategy reduces concentration risk and improves negotiating leverage during downturns.
toeic.example_zh: 多元化的供應商策略可降低集中風險並在景氣下滑時提升談判籌碼。

toeic.example_en: Geographic diversification cushioned earnings when one major market slowed sharply for several quarters.
toeic.example_zh: 地理多角化在某主要市場急速放緩數季時緩衝了盈餘。

toeic.example_en: Each regional playbook adapts pricing, packaging, and messaging to local competitive and regulatory conditions.
toeic.example_zh: 每本區域作戰手冊都根據在地競爭與監管條件調整定價、包裝與訊息。

toeic.example_en: The country strategy for Vietnam targets manufacturing partners while maintaining a small but skilled local team.
toeic.example_zh: 越南的國別策略鎖定製造業夥伴，同時維持一支精簡但具技術力的在地團隊。

toeic.example_en: A detailed localization plan covers language, payment methods, packaging, and regulatory documentation requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 詳細的在地化計畫涵蓋語言、付款方式、包裝與法規文件要求。

toeic.example_en: Successful internationalization requires more than translation; it demands a deep understanding of local customer behavior.
toeic.example_zh: 成功的國際化不只需要翻譯，更需要深入了解在地客戶行為。

toeic.example_en: Cross-border expansion requires careful sequencing of regulatory approvals, hiring, and supply chain commitments.
toeic.example_zh: 跨境擴張需要謹慎排序法規核准、招募與供應鏈承諾的順序。

toeic.example_en: Emerging market entry often combines a local joint venture with phased capital investment over several years.
toeic.example_zh: 新興市場進入通常結合在地合資企業與數年期的分階段資本投資。

toeic.example_en: First-mover advantage rarely lasts unless the firm continues to invest in brand, scale, and product innovation.
toeic.example_zh: 除非公司持續投資品牌、規模與產品創新，否則先行者優勢很少能持續。

toeic.example_en: As a fast follower, the firm watches pioneers closely and then enters with a refined, lower-cost product.
toeic.example_zh: 作為快速跟隨者，該公司密切觀察先行者，然後以更精緻、成本更低的產品進場。

toeic.example_en: A coherent category strategy guides assortment, pricing, promotion, and shelf placement across major retail accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 一致的類別策略指引主要零售客戶的商品組合、定價、促銷與貨架陳列。

toeic.example_en: The new brand architecture clarifies how sub-brands relate to the master brand and to one another.
toeic.example_zh: 新的品牌架構釐清各子品牌與主品牌及彼此之間的關係。

toeic.example_en: A successful brand extension uses existing equity to enter an adjacent category with lower marketing cost.
toeic.example_zh: 成功的品牌延伸利用既有品牌資產以更低的行銷成本進入鄰近類別。

toeic.example_en: The firm makes one large portfolio bet each year while continuing smaller exploratory investments.
toeic.example_zh: 該公司每年進行一次重大的投資組合押注，同時持續進行較小規模的探索性投資。

toeic.example_en: Every major capability decision starts with a buy versus build analysis grounded in cost and time-to-market.
toeic.example_zh: 每項重大能力決策都從以成本與上市時間為基礎的買進與自建分析開始。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自建、購買、合作框架
toeic.example_en: A build-buy-partner framework guides which capabilities the company develops, acquires, or sources from allies.
toeic.example_zh: 自建、購買、合作框架指引公司自行發展、收購或與盟友合作取得哪些能力。

toeic.example_en: A small tuck-in acquisition added engineering talent and a complementary product to the core platform quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 小型的補強型收購快速為核心平台加入工程人才與互補性產品。

toeic.example_en: The bolt-on deal extends geographic coverage while leaving the existing operating model essentially untouched.
toeic.example_zh: 附加式併購擴大地理覆蓋範圍，同時讓現有營運模式幾乎不受影響。

toeic.example_en: The transformational deal repositions the firm from a hardware vendor to an integrated services provider.
toeic.example_zh: 這項轉型性交易將公司從硬體供應商重新定位為整合服務提供者。

toeic.example_en: The post-merger integration plan covers culture, systems, brand, and customer communication across the first hundred days.
toeic.example_zh: 併購後的整併計畫涵蓋前一百天內的文化、系統、品牌與客戶溝通。

toeic.example_en: Disciplined synergy capture tracking ensures that promised cost and revenue benefits actually reach the bottom line.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴謹的綜效實現追蹤可確保承諾的成本與營收效益真正體現在淨利上。

toeic.example_en: Synergy realization typically takes longer than executives plan, especially for cultural and technology integration.
toeic.example_zh: 綜效落實通常比高階主管預期的更耗時，文化與科技整合尤其如此。

toeic.example_en: The deal thesis assumed accelerated cross-selling, but new product cycles caused unexpected sales force distractions.
toeic.example_zh: 這項交易論點假設交叉銷售會加速，但新產品週期造成業務團隊意料之外的分心。

toeic.example_en: Private equity owners build a detailed value creation plan that prioritizes pricing, procurement, and growth initiatives.
toeic.example_zh: 私募股權所有者建立詳細的價值創造計畫，優先處理定價、採購與成長計畫。

toeic.example_en: The operating playbook codifies how high-performing units run weekly business reviews and customer escalations.
toeic.example_zh: 營運作戰手冊將高績效單位如何進行每週業務檢視與客戶升級流程制度化。

toeic.example_en: A structured performance dialogue replaces vague status updates with focused discussion of metrics and decisions needed.
toeic.example_zh: 結構化的績效對話以聚焦的指標與所需決策討論取代模糊的進度更新。

toeic.example_en: The monthly business review examines pipeline, hiring, expense trends, and progress against the annual operating plan.
toeic.example_zh: 月度業務檢視審視業務管線、招募、費用趨勢以及年度營運計畫的進度。

toeic.example_en: A concise strategic dashboard shows the board ten metrics tied directly to the long-term plan.
toeic.example_zh: 簡潔的策略儀表板向董事會呈現直接連結到長期計畫的十項指標。

toeic.example_en: The north star objective unites every team around delivering measurable, ongoing value to active customers.
toeic.example_zh: 北極星目標讓每個團隊圍繞著為活躍客戶持續創造可衡量價值而團結。

toeic.example_en: A short list of guiding principles helps leaders make consistent trade-offs when priorities inevitably collide.
toeic.example_zh: 一份簡短的指導原則清單幫助領導者在優先事項不可避免地衝突時做出一致的取捨。

toeic.example_en: The team adopted an operating principle of bias toward decision speed when information is reasonably complete.
toeic.example_zh: 在資訊相對完整時偏向決策速度，是團隊採用的營運原則。

toeic.example_en: A clear prioritization framework prevents the team from constantly reshuffling commitments when new ideas appear.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚的優先排序框架可避免團隊在新想法出現時不斷重新調整承諾。

toeic.example_en: Three must-win battles dominate this year's plan: enterprise expansion, product reliability, and customer retention.
toeic.example_zh: 今年計畫由三場必勝戰役主導：企業擴張、產品可靠性與客戶留存。

toeic.example_en: Each strategic initiative has an executive sponsor, dedicated budget, and a clearly defined success metric.
toeic.example_zh: 每項策略性方案都有高階主管贊助者、專屬預算與明確定義的成功指標。

toeic.example_en: The transformation program runs for three years and touches operations, technology, talent, and customer experience.
toeic.example_zh: 這項轉型計畫為期三年，涉及營運、科技、人才與客戶體驗。

toeic.example_en: A dedicated program management office tracks dependencies, milestones, and risks across all transformation workstreams.
toeic.example_zh: 專屬的計畫管理辦公室追蹤所有轉型工作流程的相依性、里程碑與風險。

toeic.example_en: Each workstream lead reports weekly progress, escalates blockers, and presents at the monthly steering meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 每位工作流負責人每週呈報進度、升級障礙，並在月度指導會議上報告。

toeic.example_en: A predictable operating cadence rhythm gives teams confidence about when decisions and reviews will happen.
toeic.example_zh: 可預測的營運節奏讓團隊對於決策與檢視會在何時發生具有信心。

toeic.example_en: The quarterly planning cycle aligns priorities, refreshes forecasts, and updates resourcing across all product teams.
toeic.example_zh: 季度規劃週期對齊優先事項、更新預測，並更新所有產品團隊的資源配置。

toeic.example_en: The annual planning process begins with strategy refresh and ends with detailed budgets and individual goal-setting.
toeic.example_zh: 年度規劃流程從策略更新開始，以詳細預算與個人目標設定結束。

toeic.example_en: The three-year plan outlines revenue ambitions, margin targets, and the capabilities required to achieve them.
toeic.example_zh: 三年計畫概述營收目標、獲利率目標與達成這些目標所需的能力。

toeic.example_en: Looking out to the five-year horizon, leaders see major changes in technology, regulation, and customer behavior.
toeic.example_zh: 展望五年視野，領導者預見科技、法規與客戶行為的重大變化。

toeic.example_en: A compelling vision statement captures where the firm aspires to be and why that destination matters.
toeic.example_zh: 引人入勝的願景聲明捕捉公司渴望達到的地方以及這個目的地的重要性。

toeic.example_en: Strong mission alignment across teams shortens decision time and reduces internal friction during execution.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊間強烈的使命對齊縮短決策時間並減少執行期間的內部摩擦。

toeic.example_en: A clearly articulated corporate purpose helps attract talent, customers, and partners who share similar values.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚闡述的企業使命宗旨有助吸引價值觀相近的人才、客戶與夥伴。

toeic.example_en: Leadership rehearsed a unified strategic narrative before the investor day and the all-hands meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 領導層在投資者日與全員大會之前演練了統一的策略敘事。

toeic.example_en: A consistent investor narrative builds credibility and helps the market value long-term strategic moves correctly.
toeic.example_zh: 一致的投資者敘事建立可信度，並協助市場正確評價長期策略行動。

toeic.example_en: The equity story emphasizes durable competitive advantages and a long runway for profitable revenue growth.
toeic.example_zh: 這個股權故事強調持久的競爭優勢與長期可獲利營收成長的空間。

toeic.example_en: Investors are reassessing the firm's true earnings power after several quarters of cost discipline.
toeic.example_zh: 投資人在數季的成本紀律之後正在重新評估該公司真正的盈餘能力。

toeic.example_en: A margin expansion strategy combines pricing discipline, automation, and a steady shift toward higher-value offerings.
toeic.example_zh: 獲利率擴張策略結合定價紀律、自動化與穩步轉向更高價值的產品。

toeic.example_en: Our growth strategy concentrates on three priorities: new geographies, deeper accounts, and adjacent product categories.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的成長策略集中在三項優先事項：新地理區、深耕客戶與相鄰產品類別。

toeic.example_en: Organic growth came primarily from larger deal sizes and improved retention of strategic enterprise accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 內生成長主要來自更大的交易規模與策略性企業客戶留存的改善。

toeic.example_en: Inorganic growth from selective acquisitions added new capabilities that would have taken years to build internally.
toeic.example_zh: 來自精選收購的外延式成長加入了內部需要多年才能建立的新能力。

toeic.example_en: The board expects double-digit growth in priority segments even as overall industry expansion slows.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會預期即使整體產業擴張放緩，優先區隔仍應有雙位數成長。

toeic.example_en: The market is projected to deliver a compound annual growth rate of nine percent over the next decade.
toeic.example_zh: 市場預計在未來十年內提供百分之九的年複合成長率。

toeic.example_en: Beyond the committed plan, each team also commits to a stretch target that requires creative execution.
toeic.example_zh: 除了承諾的計畫之外，每個團隊也承諾一個需要創意執行的挑戰目標。

toeic.example_en: The sales team shares a best case forecast that assumes faster decision-making in two key accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 業務團隊分享假設兩個關鍵客戶決策更快的最佳情況預測。

toeic.example_en: The CFO modeled a worst case projection in which orders decline sharply during the second half.
toeic.example_zh: 財務長建立一個下半年訂單大幅下滑的最壞情況預測。

toeic.example_en: The demand outlook softens slightly in consumer segments but remains resilient in industrial applications.
toeic.example_zh: 需求展望在消費類區隔略為走弱，但在工業應用領域仍具韌性。

toeic.example_en: The supply outlook improves as semiconductor capacity expands and lead times normalize across key components.
toeic.example_zh: 隨著半導體產能擴大與關鍵零件交期正常化，供應展望持續改善。

toeic.example_en: Despite a cautious macro outlook, our key end markets continue to invest in productivity-enhancing technology.
toeic.example_zh: 儘管總體經濟展望偏謹慎，我們主要終端市場仍持續投資於提升生產力的科技。

toeic.example_en: An industry tailwind from regulatory change supports continued double-digit demand for our compliance solutions.
toeic.example_zh: 來自監管變革的產業順風因素支持我們合規方案需求持續雙位數成長。

toeic.example_en: Higher input costs remain an industry headwind that requires disciplined pricing and continuous cost work.
toeic.example_zh: 投入成本上升仍是產業逆風因素，需要嚴謹定價與持續的成本作業。

toeic.example_en: A structural shift toward subscription consumption is reshaping pricing, sales motion, and finance metrics together.
toeic.example_zh: 朝向訂閱式消費的結構性轉變正同步重塑定價、銷售模式與財務指標。

toeic.example_en: Aging demographics in developed markets is a secular trend that supports demand for our healthcare offerings.
toeic.example_zh: 已開發市場人口老化是支持我們醫療保健產品需求的長期趨勢。

toeic.example_en: A cyclical headwind in construction softened orders this year but does not change our long-term thesis.
toeic.example_zh: 建築業的景氣循環逆風使今年訂單疲軟，但不改變我們的長期論點。

toeic.example_en: Generative artificial intelligence introduces real disruption risk that competitors and customers are also racing to navigate.
toeic.example_zh: 生成式人工智慧帶來實質的顛覆風險，競爭者與客戶也在競相應對。

toeic.example_en: The firm's incumbency advantage includes deep customer relationships, regulatory expertise, and a trusted brand reputation.
toeic.example_zh: 該公司的現任者優勢包括深厚的客戶關係、法規專業與受信任的品牌聲譽。

toeic.example_en: The innovator's dilemma warns established firms that defending current revenue can crowd out essential future investments.
toeic.example_zh: 創新者的兩難警告既有公司，捍衛現有營收可能排擠必要的未來投資。

toeic.example_en: An operating leverage strategy lets revenue grow faster than fixed costs once scale thresholds are passed.
toeic.example_zh: 一旦跨越規模門檻，營運槓桿策略可讓營收成長速度快於固定成本。

toeic.example_en: The firm's scale advantage in procurement allows it to negotiate prices well below smaller competitors.
toeic.example_zh: 該公司在採購上的規模優勢使其能夠談得遠低於小型競爭者的價格。

toeic.example_en: An asset-light model frees capital for marketing, technology, and talent while outsourcing manufacturing to specialists.
toeic.example_zh: 輕資產模式將製造外包給專業廠商，釋出資本用於行銷、科技與人才。

toeic.example_en: Running a capital-intensive business requires patient investors and disciplined long-term planning of major projects.
toeic.example_zh: 經營資本密集型事業需要有耐心的投資人與嚴謹的長期重大專案規劃。

toeic.example_en: Disciplined capital deployment balances reinvestment in the core business with selective acquisitions and shareholder returns.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴謹的資本配置在核心事業再投資、精選收購與股東回報之間取得平衡。

toeic.example_en: Capital recycling means selling mature assets at attractive prices and redeploying funds into higher-growth opportunities.
toeic.example_zh: 資本循環再運用意指以具吸引力的價格出售成熟資產，並將資金重新部署到高成長機會。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 核心與非核心區分
toeic.example_en: Clear core versus non-core definitions guide decisions about where to invest and what to divest.
toeic.example_zh: 清晰的核心與非核心區分指引投資與出售決策。

toeic.example_en: The divestiture plan covers two non-core units that no longer fit the company's long-term strategy.
toeic.example_zh: 資產處分計畫涵蓋兩個不再符合公司長期策略的非核心單位。

toeic.example_en: The board approved a spinout to give the fast-growing software business its own independent equity story.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會核准將快速成長的軟體業務分拆為獨立企業，讓其擁有自己的股權故事。

toeic.example_en: Analysts speculated about a possible carve-up plan separating the consumer and industrial parts of the conglomerate.
toeic.example_zh: 分析師推測可能將該集團之消費與工業部門分開的拆解計畫。

toeic.example_en: A cleaner holding structure simplifies financial reporting, tax planning, and future strategic transactions across regions.
toeic.example_zh: 更清晰的控股架構簡化財務報導、稅務規劃以及跨區域未來的策略性交易。

toeic.example_en: Operating model design clarifies decision rights, reporting lines, and the role of shared services across regions.
toeic.example_zh: 營運模式設計釐清決策權、彙報關係以及共享服務在各區域的角色。

toeic.example_en: A robust governance framework defines authority levels, committees, and how strategic decisions get reviewed.
toeic.example_zh: 健全的治理框架定義授權層級、各委員會以及策略決策如何被審核。

toeic.example_en: A shared decision framework helps leaders separate reversible bets from decisions that deserve much deeper analysis.
toeic.example_zh: 共同的決策框架幫助領導者區分可逆轉的押注與值得更深入分析的決策。

toeic.example_en: Treat the brand renaming as a one-way door and invest the extra time to get it right.
toeic.example_zh: 將品牌重新命名視為不可逆決策，並投入額外時間把它做對。

toeic.example_en: Most pricing experiments are a two-way door, so we can move quickly and learn from real customer responses.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數定價實驗屬於可逆決策，因此我們可以快速行動並從真實客戶反應中學習。

toeic.example_en: A disciplined experimentation strategy generates evidence about what truly drives customer behavior at meaningful scale.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴謹的實驗策略可在有意義的規模上產生關於客戶行為真正驅動因素的證據。

toeic.example_en: Each quarter the team commits to a focused learning agenda about its largest commercial uncertainties.
toeic.example_zh: 每季團隊都針對最大的商業不確定性承諾一份聚焦的學習議程。

toeic.example_en: Deep customer insight, rather than internal opinion, increasingly shapes how the product roadmap is prioritized.
toeic.example_zh: 形塑產品路線圖優先順序的，是深入的客戶洞察而非內部意見。

toeic.example_en: Ethnographic research in customer offices revealed workflow problems that surveys had completely failed to surface.
toeic.example_zh: 在客戶辦公室進行的民族誌研究揭露了問卷完全未能呈現的工作流程問題。

toeic.example_en: A structured voice of customer program informs every major product, pricing, and service investment decision.
toeic.example_zh: 結構化的客戶之聲計畫為每項重大產品、定價與服務投資決策提供依據。

toeic.example_en: Improved demand sensing capabilities let the firm respond more quickly to short-term shifts in customer ordering patterns.
toeic.example_zh: 提升的需求感測能力讓公司能更快速回應客戶下單型態的短期變化。

toeic.example_en: Targeted promotions and bundle offers are simple demand shaping tactics that smooth volatility across the quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 精準的促銷與組合方案是平緩整季波動的簡單需求塑造手法。

toeic.example_en: A modern pricing strategy uses analytics to set differentiated prices for distinct customer segments and use cases.
toeic.example_zh: 現代定價策略運用分析技術，為不同客戶區隔與使用情境設定差異化價格。

toeic.example_en: Outcome-based pricing ties part of the fee to specific results, increasing trust with strategic enterprise buyers.
toeic.example_zh: 成果導向定價將部分費用與特定結果掛鉤，提升與策略性企業買家的信任。

toeic.example_en: Strong subscription economics depend on healthy retention, manageable acquisition costs, and meaningful expansion within accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 穩健的訂閱經濟仰賴健康的留存、可控的取得成本以及客戶內可觀的擴張。

toeic.example_en: A successful land and expand approach starts with a small entry point and grows usage steadily over time.
toeic.example_zh: 成功的著陸與擴張策略從小型切入點開始，並隨時間穩定擴大使用範圍。

toeic.example_en: A simple wedge product opens conversations with technical buyers who later champion broader platform adoption.
toeic.example_zh: 簡單的楔形產品開啟與技術買家的對話，這些人後來會推動更廣泛的平台採用。

toeic.example_en: Shifting from a product company to a platform play required new partnerships, new pricing, and new culture.
toeic.example_zh: 從產品公司轉變為平台策略需要新的合作夥伴、新的定價模式與新的文化。

toeic.example_en: Running a two-sided market means balancing supply and demand growth so neither side becomes frustrated by mismatch.
toeic.example_zh: 經營雙邊市場意指平衡供需成長，以免任何一方因供需失衡而失望。

toeic.example_en: Understanding marketplace dynamics like liquidity, take rate, and trust is essential for sustainable long-term growth.
toeic.example_zh: 了解流動性、抽成率與信任等市集動態，對於可持續的長期成長至關重要。

toeic.example_en: A modest take rate combined with rapid volume growth still produces strong revenue and healthy contribution margins.
toeic.example_zh: 適度的抽成率搭配快速的交易量成長，仍可創造強勁營收與健康的貢獻獲利率。

toeic.example_en: The monetization strategy starts with free user growth and then layers premium features and enterprise pricing.
toeic.example_zh: 變現策略從免費使用者成長開始，然後疊加進階功能與企業定價。

toeic.example_en: A successful freemium strategy demands a free tier valuable enough to attract users without cannibalizing paid plans.
toeic.example_zh: 成功的免費增值策略需要免費層級有足夠價值來吸引用戶，又不會侵蝕付費方案。

toeic.example_en: Our go-to-market strategy specifies the target buyers, the messaging, the channels, and the supporting sales infrastructure.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的市場進入策略明訂目標買家、訊息、通路與支援的銷售基礎架構。

toeic.example_en: We are testing a product-led sales motion that lets users experience real value before any conversation with a representative.
toeic.example_zh: 我們正在測試一種產品導向的銷售模式，讓用戶在與業務代表交談前先體驗真實價值。

toeic.example_en: A clearer segmentation strategy lets each business unit focus on customers it can serve most profitably.
toeic.example_zh: 更清晰的區隔化策略讓每個事業單位專注於它能最具獲利能力服務的客戶。

toeic.example_en: Mid-sized hospital systems are our priority target segment because their needs match our solution very closely.
toeic.example_zh: 中型醫院系統是我們的優先目標區隔，因為他們的需求與我們的方案高度契合。

toeic.example_en: Our vertical strategy concentrates engineering and marketing resources behind four industries where we can win.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的垂直策略將工程與行銷資源集中在四個我們能勝出的產業背後。

toeic.example_en: Deep industry specialization helps the firm command premium pricing and shorten time-to-value for clients.
toeic.example_zh: 深度的產業專業化幫助公司收取溢價並縮短客戶的價值實現時間。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 使用情境優先排序
toeic.example_en: Disciplined use case prioritization prevents the product team from spreading itself too thin across customer requests.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴謹的使用情境優先排序可避免產品團隊在客戶請求上過度分散。

toeic.example_en: A clear product strategy explains what we will build, for whom, and what we will deliberately not build.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚的產品策略說明我們將建構什麼、為誰建構，以及我們刻意不建構什麼。

toeic.example_en: A compelling product vision attracts engineers, partners, and customers willing to invest before all features exist.
toeic.example_zh: 引人入勝的產品願景吸引工程師、夥伴與客戶在所有功能尚未完成前就投入投資。

toeic.example_en: A modular platform architecture lets the company assemble new offerings quickly from proven internal components.
toeic.example_zh: 模組化的平台架構讓公司能用經過驗證的內部元件快速組合出新的產品。

toeic.example_en: Modular design simplifies customization, reduces engineering cost, and shortens time-to-market for variant products.
toeic.example_zh: 模組化設計簡化客製、降低工程成本，並縮短變體產品上市時間。

toeic.example_en: A configurable solution covers the bulk of customer needs without expensive professional services or custom code.
toeic.example_zh: 可組態方案無需昂貴的專業服務或客製程式碼即可涵蓋大多數客戶需求。

toeic.example_en: The professional services strategy targets break-even economics while accelerating product adoption inside complex enterprise accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 專業服務策略以損益平衡為目標，同時加快複雜企業客戶內部的產品採用。

toeic.example_en: A new managed service offering bundles software, monitoring, and expert support into a single predictable monthly fee.
toeic.example_zh: 新的託管服務方案將軟體、監控與專家支援整合為單一可預測的月費。

toeic.example_en: An expanded service portfolio offers customers a clearer path from quick wins to enterprise-wide transformation.
toeic.example_zh: 擴大的服務組合為客戶提供從快速成果到全公司轉型更清晰的路徑。

toeic.example_en: A tiered offering helps prospects start small and upgrade as their needs and budgets grow.
toeic.example_zh: 分層方案幫助潛在客戶從小規模開始，並隨需求與預算成長而升級。

toeic.example_en: A new value tier captures budget-conscious buyers who would otherwise turn to lower-cost open source alternatives.
toeic.example_zh: 新的平價層級吸引預算敏感的買家，否則他們會轉向成本更低的開源替代方案。

toeic.example_en: The premium offering adds enhanced support, advanced analytics, and dedicated customer success management for larger accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 高階方案為較大客戶加入強化支援、進階分析與專屬客戶成功管理。

toeic.example_en: Tracking each customer cohort by acquisition month reveals how product changes affect long-term retention and value.
toeic.example_zh: 依取得月份追蹤每個客戶世代，可揭示產品變更對長期留存與價值的影響。

toeic.example_en: Our retention strategy invests heavily in onboarding success, proactive outreach, and continuous product education.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的留存策略大力投資於導入成功、主動聯繫與持續的產品教育。

toeic.example_en: A formal customer advocacy program produces references, case studies, and speaking opportunities at industry events.
toeic.example_zh: 正式的客戶倡議計畫產出參考案例、案例研究以及產業活動的演講機會。

toeic.example_en: A diverse reference program shortens the sales cycle by giving prospects credible peers to consult during evaluation.
toeic.example_zh: 多元的推薦客戶計畫提供潛在客戶評估期間可信的同儕諮詢，藉此縮短銷售週期。

toeic.example_en: A clear view of the competitive landscape informs which markets to enter and which battles to avoid.
toeic.example_zh: 清楚的競爭格局視角可指引應進入哪些市場以及應避開哪些戰役。

toeic.example_en: Competitive benchmarking pinpointed gaps in onboarding speed and integration breadth versus our two main rivals.
toeic.example_zh: 競爭標竿比較指出我們在導入速度與整合廣度上相較兩大主要對手的差距。

toeic.example_en: Each competitor profile summarizes strategy, product lineup, pricing tactics, and recent organizational changes.
toeic.example_zh: 每份競爭對手檔案概述其策略、產品陣容、定價手法與近期的組織變動。

toeic.example_en: A two-day war game exercise simulated competitor counter-moves and stress-tested our planned launch sequence.
toeic.example_zh: 為期兩天的戰爭演練模擬競爭對手的反制動作，並對我們計畫的發布順序進行壓力測試。

toeic.example_en: A competitive response plan defines pricing, messaging, and product moves prepared in advance for likely rival actions.
toeic.example_zh: 競爭回應計畫預先定義針對對手可能行動的定價、訊息與產品動作。

toeic.example_en: Cutting prices early was a preemptive move designed to discourage the new entrant before it gained traction.
toeic.example_zh: 提前降價是一項先發制人之舉，旨在於新進者站穩腳跟前先行勸退。

toeic.example_en: Their barrier strategy combines patents, long-term contracts, and exclusive supply agreements to deter new competitors.
toeic.example_zh: 他們的障壁策略結合專利、長期合約與獨家供應協議以嚇阻新競爭者。

toeic.example_en: A focused patent strategy protects core innovations while licensing peripheral technology to friendly industry players.
toeic.example_zh: 聚焦的專利策略保護核心創新，同時將周邊技術授權給友好的產業夥伴。

toeic.example_en: An effective intellectual property strategy aligns patent, trademark, and trade secret choices with commercial objectives.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的智慧財產策略將專利、商標與營業秘密的選擇與商業目標相對應。

toeic.example_en: A proactive regulatory strategy engages policymakers early and shapes guidelines that the industry will eventually adopt.
toeic.example_zh: 主動的監管策略提早與政策制定者接觸，並形塑產業最終將採行的指引。

toeic.example_en: A coordinated public affairs strategy aligns government relations, communications, and community investment around shared priorities.
toeic.example_zh: 協調的公共事務策略將政府關係、溝通與社區投資圍繞共同優先事項對齊。

toeic.example_en: The sustainability strategy sets emission targets, supplier standards, and product circularity goals through 2035.
toeic.example_zh: 永續策略訂定至 2035 年的排放目標、供應商標準與產品循環性目標。

toeic.example_en: A credible decarbonization plan covers operations, the supply chain, and end-of-life treatment of products together.
toeic.example_zh: 可信的去碳化計畫涵蓋營運、供應鏈以及產品壽終時的處理。

toeic.example_en: A clear climate strategy reduces risk, opens new markets, and increasingly influences investor and customer decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 明確的氣候策略可降低風險、開啟新市場，並日益影響投資者與客戶決策。

toeic.example_en: A pragmatic ESG strategy connects material environmental and social topics to long-term business performance.
toeic.example_zh: 務實的 ESG 策略將重大的環境與社會議題與長期事業績效相連結。

toeic.example_en: A purpose-led brand tends to attract loyal customers and committed employees who share the same values.
toeic.example_zh: 使命導向品牌往往吸引價值觀相同的忠誠客戶與投入度高的員工。

toeic.example_en: Talent strategy planning anticipates which skills the company will need three to five years before they become critical.
toeic.example_zh: 人才策略規劃在所需技能成為關鍵之前三到五年就先預判公司需求。

toeic.example_en: A capability roadmap lays out which competencies the firm must build, hire, or partner to acquire each year.
toeic.example_zh: 能力路線圖列出公司每年必須自建、招募或合作取得的能力。

toeic.example_en: Modern organization design focuses on cross-functional teams empowered to make decisions close to the customer.
toeic.example_zh: 現代組織設計聚焦於授權能在貼近客戶處做出決策的跨職能團隊。

toeic.example_en: A careful structural reorganization aligns reporting lines with the new customer segments defined by the strategy.
toeic.example_zh: 謹慎的組織結構重組將彙報關係與策略所定義的新客戶區隔相對應。

toeic.example_en: Selective delayering reduced managerial overhead and brought senior leaders closer to operational decisions and customers.
toeic.example_zh: 選擇性的組織扁平化減少管理層級的開銷，並讓資深領導者更貼近營運決策與客戶。

toeic.example_en: Span of control optimization standardized team sizes and improved coaching quality across most departments.
toeic.example_zh: 管理幅度優化使團隊規模標準化，並提升大多數部門的指導品質。

toeic.example_en: An agile operating model relies on stable cross-functional squads, clear missions, and iterative quarterly planning.
toeic.example_zh: 敏捷營運模式仰賴穩定的跨職能小組、清晰的任務以及迭代的季度規劃。

toeic.example_en: Under the squad model, each team owns a specific customer outcome from idea through ongoing operations.
toeic.example_zh: 在小隊模式下，每個團隊從構想到持續營運都負責特定的客戶成果。

toeic.example_en: A tribe structure groups several related squads under shared mission, technology platform, and leadership coordination.
toeic.example_zh: 部落結構將數個相關小隊歸於共同的任務、技術平台與領導協調之下。

toeic.example_en: A clear decision rights matrix prevents repeated escalations and accelerates execution across multiple business units.
toeic.example_zh: 清晰的決策權矩陣可避免重複升級，並加速跨多個事業單位的執行。

toeic.example_en: A simple accountability framework names a single owner for every initiative on the strategic plan.
toeic.example_zh: 簡單的當責框架為策略計畫上的每項方案指派單一負責人。

toeic.example_en: Building an ownership culture takes years and requires consistent reinforcement from senior leaders every quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 建立當責文化需要數年時間，並需要資深領導者每季的一致性強化。

toeic.example_en: A high-performance culture demands clear goals, candid feedback, and consistent recognition of strong execution.
toeic.example_zh: 高績效文化要求明確目標、直接回饋以及對優異執行的一致認可。

toeic.example_en: Strong execution discipline turns a credible strategy into measurable results across the organization every quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 強大的執行紀律將可信的策略每季轉化為全組織可衡量的成果。

toeic.example_en: Closing the execution gap requires honest reviews, simpler priorities, and dedicated resources for each major initiative.
toeic.example_zh: 縮小執行落差需要誠實的檢視、更簡單的優先事項以及為每項重大方案配置專屬資源。

toeic.example_en: Strong strategic alignment among the senior team accelerated decisions during the most volatile periods of last year.
toeic.example_zh: 資深團隊間強烈的策略對齊在去年最動盪期間加速了決策。

toeic.example_en: Consistent playbook execution across regions ensures customers experience the same quality regardless of location.
toeic.example_zh: 各區域一致的作戰手冊執行確保客戶無論在哪都體驗到相同品質。

toeic.example_en: The weekly operating review focuses on a small set of key metrics and immediate action items.
toeic.example_zh: 每週的營運檢視聚焦於少數關鍵指標與立即的行動項目。

toeic.example_en: A small strategy execution office tracks initiatives, surfaces dependencies, and supports cross-functional problem solving.
toeic.example_zh: 小型的策略執行辦公室追蹤方案、揭示相依性，並支援跨職能問題解決。

toeic.example_en: The chief of staff function helps the executive team focus on the few decisions that truly move the strategy.
toeic.example_zh: 幕僚長職能幫助高階團隊聚焦於真正推動策略的少數決策。

toeic.example_en: The talent review process identifies high-potential leaders and the development needed to prepare them for bigger roles.
toeic.example_zh: 人才檢視流程辨識高潛力領導者並規劃將其準備好擔任更大職務所需的發展。

toeic.example_en: A strong leadership bench reduces succession risk and allows the company to pursue more ambitious growth bets.
toeic.example_zh: 強大的領導後備陣容可降低接班風險，並讓公司能追求更具野心的成長押注。

toeic.example_en: A leadership pipeline strategy invests early in mid-level managers who will become the company's future leaders.
toeic.example_zh: 領導梯隊策略提早投資於將成為公司未來領導者的中階管理者。

toeic.example_en: An up-to-date succession map shows ready-now and ready-in-two-years candidates for every critical role.
toeic.example_zh: 最新的接班地圖呈現每個關鍵職務目前可上任與兩年內可上任的人選。

toeic.example_en: Improving key role coverage is a board-level priority that the CEO reports on every quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 提升關鍵職務覆蓋是執行長每季向董事會報告的重點優先事項。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高階主管後備實力
toeic.example_en: Executive bench strength influences how quickly the company can pursue ambitious expansion or major transformations.
toeic.example_zh: 高階主管後備實力影響公司能多快推動雄心擴張或重大轉型。

toeic.example_en: A bold mission and visible learning opportunities help the firm operate as a genuine talent magnet.
toeic.example_zh: 宏大的使命與明顯的學習機會幫助公司成為真正的人才磁鐵。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自育與外聘人才決策
toeic.example_en: Build versus buy talent decisions shape culture and capability, not just immediate hiring cost and speed.
toeic.example_zh: 自育與外聘人才的決策不僅影響當下的招募成本與速度，也形塑文化與能力。

toeic.example_en: A comprehensive workforce strategy aligns hiring, learning, location, and contingent labor with long-range business plans.
toeic.example_zh: 全面的人力策略將招募、學習、地點與彈性勞動力與長期事業計畫對齊。

toeic.example_en: A balanced location strategy combines a few global hubs with smaller specialized sites near important customers.
toeic.example_zh: 平衡的據點策略結合少數全球樞紐與貼近重要客戶的較小型專業據點。

toeic.example_en: Footprint optimization reduced real estate costs while improving collaboration in the most strategically important sites.
toeic.example_zh: 據點布局優化降低不動產成本，同時改善最具策略重要性據點的協作。

toeic.example_en: A refreshed real estate strategy supports hybrid work while keeping flagship offices designed for collaboration.
toeic.example_zh: 更新後的不動產策略支援混合辦公，同時保留為協作設計的旗艦辦公室。

toeic.example_en: A coherent digital strategy ties technology investment directly to customer experience and operational productivity goals.
toeic.example_zh: 一致的數位策略將科技投資直接與客戶體驗及營運生產力目標相連結。

toeic.example_en: Our technology strategy prioritizes cloud-native architecture, secure data foundations, and selective adoption of artificial intelligence.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的技術策略優先採用雲端原生架構、安全的資料基礎以及人工智慧的選擇性採用。

toeic.example_en: A clear data strategy turns raw information into decisions, products, and durable competitive advantages over time.
toeic.example_zh: 明確的資料策略將原始資訊隨時間轉化為決策、產品與持久的競爭優勢。

toeic.example_en: Our AI strategy concentrates investment behind a few high-value use cases with measurable business impact.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的人工智慧策略將投資集中在幾個具有可衡量事業影響的高價值使用情境上。

toeic.example_en: The automation roadmap sequences process improvements that combine clear payback with manageable change management requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 自動化路線圖依序排定兼具清楚回收與可控變革管理需求的流程改進。

toeic.example_en: Process excellence work standardized core operations and freed leaders to focus on strategic decisions and customers.
toeic.example_zh: 流程卓越的推動使核心營運標準化，讓領導者得以聚焦在策略決策與客戶上。

toeic.example_en: A shared services strategy consolidates routine work, reduces cost, and lets business units focus on growth.
toeic.example_zh: 共享服務策略整合例行性工作、降低成本，並讓事業單位專注於成長。

toeic.example_en: A global business services platform provides finance, HR, and IT support across all geographies and units.
toeic.example_zh: 全球商業服務平台為所有地區與單位提供財務、人資與資訊技術支援。

toeic.example_en: Back office consolidation eliminated duplicated functions and improved consistency of reporting across the global enterprise.
toeic.example_zh: 後勤整併消除重複職能，並改善整個全球企業彙報的一致性。
