toeic.example_en: Our e-sourcing platform automates supplier invitations, response collection, and bid analysis for each event.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的電子採購平台自動化處理每次招標的供應商邀請、回覆收集與報價分析。

toeic.example_en: Our procure-to-pay process now closes invoices fifty percent faster after the automation rollout.
toeic.example_zh: 在自動化導入後，我們的採購到付款流程結算發票的速度加快了百分之五十。

toeic.example_en: The goods receipt is posted in the system once the warehouse counts and inspects the delivery.
toeic.example_zh: 倉庫完成清點與檢查後，系統便會過帳生成收貨單據。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 收料即結算（免發票結算）
toeic.example_en: Evaluated receipt settlement lets us pay suppliers based on receipts alone, eliminating traditional invoice processing.
toeic.example_zh: 收料即結算讓我們僅憑收料紀錄付款給供應商，省去傳統發票處理程序。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自開帳單（買方自開發票結算）
toeic.example_en: Self-billing arrangements remove the supplier invoice step and accelerate payment cycle times considerably.
toeic.example_zh: 自開帳單安排省去供應商開立發票的步驟，大幅縮短付款週期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 採購卡（公司用 P-Card）
toeic.example_en: Office managers use a purchasing card for low-value items below the standard requisition threshold limit.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公室經理使用採購卡購買低於標準申請門檻的低額品項。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 虛擬商務卡（部門共用採購卡）
toeic.example_en: A ghost card is stored within a system and used for recurring vendor payments without physical cards.
toeic.example_zh: 虛擬商務卡儲存於系統中，用於對特定供應商的固定付款，無需實體卡。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 進貨即上架（免檢直入庫）
toeic.example_en: Trusted suppliers earn dock-to-stock status, allowing parts to bypass quality inspection at receiving.
toeic.example_zh: 信任的供應商可獲得進貨即上架資格，零件可在收料時免除品檢直接入庫。

toeic.example_en: Skip-lot inspection reduces incoming testing on high-performing suppliers without compromising overall quality assurance.
toeic.example_zh: 跳批檢驗減少對表現良好供應商的進料檢驗，同時不影響整體品質保證。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 駐廠檢驗（在供應商處檢驗）
toeic.example_en: Source inspection at the supplier plant catches defects before shipment leaves their loading dock.
toeic.example_zh: 在供應商廠房進行的駐廠檢驗能在貨物離開其卸貨碼頭前發現瑕疵。

toeic.example_en: A pre-shipment audit verifies workmanship, packaging, and labeling before authorizing the international air freight booking.
toeic.example_zh: 出貨前稽核驗證做工、包裝與標示，才能授權國際空運訂艙。

toeic.example_en: Tighter engineering tolerance on the bracket requires more precise tooling and slower machining cycle times.
toeic.example_zh: 支架更嚴格的工程公差需要更精準的模具與較慢的加工週期。

toeic.example_en: First article approval must be completed before any production lots may ship to the customer.
toeic.example_zh: 首件樣品核准必須先完成，產線量產批次才能出貨給客戶。

toeic.example_en: An engineering change order updates drawings, the bill of materials, and supplier specifications simultaneously.
toeic.example_zh: 工程變更指令同時更新圖面、物料清單與供應商規格。

toeic.example_en: The phase-in plan introduces the new component over four weeks while old stock is consumed.
toeic.example_zh: 分階段導入計畫在四週內導入新元件，同時消化舊版庫存。

toeic.example_en: The phase-out schedule stops new orders of the old version while supporting existing customer commitments.
toeic.example_zh: 退場排程停止對舊版本的新訂單，同時繼續支援既有客戶的承諾。

toeic.example_en: Engineers searched the market for alternatives after the supplier announced the part was obsolete.
toeic.example_zh: 在供應商宣布該零件已停產後，工程師到市場上尋找替代品。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 直接替代品（無需設計變更）
toeic.example_en: The new sensor is a drop-in replacement, so no design changes or requalification work is needed.
toeic.example_zh: 新感測器是直接替代品，無需任何設計變更或重新驗證作業。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 形狀配合功能（FFF 相同性原則）
toeic.example_en: Suppliers may substitute components if form fit function remains identical to the original specification.
toeic.example_zh: 若形狀配合功能與原規格完全一致，供應商可替換元件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 現場控制（生產現場管控）
toeic.example_en: Shop floor control captures real-time labor and machine data to monitor work order progress.
toeic.example_zh: 現場控制即時收集人員與機台資料以監控工單進度。

toeic.example_en: Each production order lists the bill of materials, routings, and target completion date for assembly.
toeic.example_zh: 每張生產工單列明組裝所需的物料清單、製程路線與預計完工日。

toeic.example_en: The routing sheet specifies which workstation performs each operation and the standard time required.
toeic.example_zh: 製程路線單指明各工站應執行的作業及所需的標準時間。

toeic.example_en: Re-evaluating the operation sequence eliminated two unnecessary moves and shortened the cycle time considerably.
toeic.example_zh: 重新評估作業順序消除了兩個不必要的搬運，並大幅縮短週期時間。

toeic.example_en: A rough cut capacity check confirms the master schedule is feasible before detailed planning starts.
toeic.example_zh: 粗略產能檢視在詳細規劃開始前確認主排程是否可行。

toeic.example_en: Available to promise logic checks unallocated inventory in real time before confirming a customer order.
toeic.example_zh: 可承諾數量邏輯在確認客戶訂單前即時檢查未配置的庫存。

toeic.example_en: Capable to promise also considers available capacity and material to commit a realistic delivery date.
toeic.example_zh: 可生產承諾還會考量可用產能與物料，才承諾合理的交期。

toeic.example_en: Allocation logic distributes scarce inventory across orders based on customer priority and contractual obligations.
toeic.example_zh: 配貨邏輯依客戶優先順序與合約義務將稀缺庫存分配至各訂單。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 公平分配（依比例配貨）
toeic.example_en: During shortages, fair share allocation distributes scarce supply proportionally across all open customer orders.
toeic.example_zh: 在缺貨期間，公平分配依比例將稀缺供應分配給所有未結客戶訂單。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 需求優先順序排定
toeic.example_en: Demand prioritization rules decide which orders ship first when supply does not meet total demand.
toeic.example_zh: 需求優先順序規則決定當供應不足時應先出貨哪些訂單。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 訂單承諾（交期承諾）
toeic.example_en: Real-time order promising in the ERP gives sales reps confidence when quoting customer delivery dates.
toeic.example_zh: ERP 中的即時訂單承諾讓業務代表在報出交期時更具信心。

toeic.example_en: The monthly supply review checks production capacity, supplier health, and inventory status across each plant.
toeic.example_zh: 每月的供應檢討會議檢視各廠的產能、供應商健康度與庫存狀況。

toeic.example_en: The demand review aligns marketing, sales, and finance on the consensus forecast for the next cycle.
toeic.example_zh: 需求檢討會議讓行銷、業務與財務就下一週期的共識預測達成一致。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高階銷售與營運計畫會議
toeic.example_en: The executive S and OP meeting resolves cross-functional trade-offs before the new monthly plan is locked.
toeic.example_zh: 高階銷售與營運計畫會議在每月新計畫定案前協調跨部門間的取捨。

toeic.example_en: Integrated business planning extends classic S and OP to include financial scenarios and longer planning horizons.
toeic.example_zh: 整合性商業規劃將傳統的銷售與營運計畫延伸至納入財務情境與更長規劃期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 控制塔（供應鏈集中監控中心）
toeic.example_en: The new supply chain control tower provides end-to-end visibility across every region in real time.
toeic.example_zh: 新的供應鏈控制塔在全球各地區提供端對端即時可視性。

toeic.example_en: Exception management dashboards surface only the orders that need human attention to stay on schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 異常管理儀表板僅顯示需要人為介入以維持進度的訂單。

toeic.example_en: Setting a reasonable alert threshold prevents the planning system from drowning users in low-value notifications.
toeic.example_zh: 設定合理的警示門檻可防止規劃系統以低價值通知淹沒使用者。

toeic.example_en: The customer agreed to pay an expediting fee to receive parts two business days earlier.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶同意支付加急費用以提早兩個工作天收到零件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高額運費（特急運輸）
toeic.example_en: Premium freight by air rescued the production schedule when ocean containers were delayed at customs.
toeic.example_zh: 海運貨櫃在海關被延誤時，以空運加急的高額運費挽救了生產排程。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 留滯費（貨櫃在客戶處超時）
toeic.example_en: Detention charge accrues when our team holds the carrier trailer longer than the allotted time.
toeic.example_zh: 若我們團隊扣留承運商拖車超過允許時間，便會累積留滯費。

toeic.example_en: Severe port congestion delayed unloading by ten days and pushed inventory shortages downstream into stores.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴重的港口壅塞讓卸貨延誤十天，並將庫存短缺的影響推至下游門市。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 空船航次（取消航次）
toeic.example_en: Blank sailing by ocean carriers reduces capacity to keep freight rates from collapsing during slow seasons.
toeic.example_zh: 海運業者藉空船航次減少運能，以避免淡季運價崩跌。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 滯延貨物（被延後上船的貨）
toeic.example_en: Carriers warned us that overbooked vessels would result in rolled cargo for several of our containers.
toeic.example_zh: 承運商警告我們船艙超賣將導致我們的數個貨櫃成為滯延貨物。

toeic.example_en: A regional transshipment hub allows feeder vessels to deliver to a major port for onward shipping.
toeic.example_zh: 區域轉運樞紐讓支線船舶可送貨至主要港口進行後續轉運。

toeic.example_en: Vessel rotation determines the sequence of ports the ship will call at during each voyage.
toeic.example_zh: 船舶輪靠順序決定船舶在每次航次中將停靠的港口先後順序。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 貨櫃重新配置（空櫃調運）
toeic.example_en: Container repositioning across imbalanced trade lanes adds significant operating cost for global ocean carriers.
toeic.example_zh: 在貿易不平衡航線間進行貨櫃重新配置為全球海運業者帶來可觀的營運成本。

toeic.example_en: Reefer container monitoring keeps temperature logs throughout the journey for sensitive pharmaceutical and food cargo.
toeic.example_zh: 冷藏貨櫃監控在整段航程記錄溫度，保護敏感的藥品與食品貨物。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 溫度逾限（冷鏈失溫事件）
toeic.example_en: Any temperature excursion during transit triggers a quality investigation before the product may be released.
toeic.example_zh: 運輸途中任何溫度逾限事件都會觸發品質調查，產品才可被放行。

toeic.example_en: A data logger inside the pallet records vibration and temperature for the entire international journey.
toeic.example_zh: 棧板內的數據記錄器記錄整段國際運送過程中的震動與溫度。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 追溯追蹤（流向追蹤）
toeic.example_en: Track and trace technology lets us locate every shipment using a single reference number online.
toeic.example_zh: 追溯追蹤技術讓我們可透過單一參考編號在線上定位每筆貨物。

toeic.example_en: Customer service updated the estimated time of arrival after the carrier reported a weather-related delay.
toeic.example_zh: 在承運商通報天氣相關延誤後，客服更新了預計到達時間。

toeic.example_en: The estimated time of departure for the vessel was pushed back by twenty-four hours yesterday.
toeic.example_zh: 該船舶的預計出發時間昨日延後了二十四小時。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 準時足量（OTIF 績效）
toeic.example_en: Retail customers use the on-time in-full metric to assess supplier delivery performance every single quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 零售客戶每季利用準時足量指標評估供應商的配送績效。

toeic.example_en: Delivery in full on time numbers improved sharply after the company restructured its outbound logistics team.
toeic.example_zh: 在公司重組外向物流團隊後，準時足量交付的數字大幅改善。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不補件直接結單（缺料即取消）
toeic.example_en: Under fill kill rules, any missing items in the order are cancelled rather than backordered.
toeic.example_zh: 在不補件直接結單規則下，訂單中任何缺項都會被取消而非欠交。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 欠交履行（補貨後出貨）
toeic.example_en: Backorder fulfillment kicks in automatically once safety stock replenishes and the queued orders can ship.
toeic.example_zh: 一旦安全庫存補足，已排隊的欠交履行訂單便會自動出貨。

toeic.example_en: The customer accepted a split shipment so the available items could leave the warehouse today.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶同意分批出貨，讓有現貨的品項今日就能離開倉庫。

toeic.example_en: Carriers must arrive within the appointment window to avoid being turned away and rescheduled later.
toeic.example_zh: 承運商必須在預約時段內到場，以免被拒收並另行改期。

toeic.example_en: Each carrier must book a dock appointment online at least eight hours before arrival.
toeic.example_zh: 每家承運商必須在到場前至少八小時於線上預約月台。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 停留時間（在港或在廠停留）
toeic.example_en: Reducing trailer dwell time improves asset turns for carriers and lowers detention costs for shippers.
toeic.example_zh: 縮短拖車停留時間能提升承運商的資產周轉，也降低托運人的留滯成本。

toeic.example_en: Higher asset turn means trailers and containers spend more time loaded and less time idle.
toeic.example_zh: 資產周轉越高，代表拖車與貨櫃裝載的時間越多、閒置的時間越少。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 波次規劃（揀貨批次規劃）
toeic.example_en: Wave planning groups orders into release batches so labor and equipment work efficiently in parallel.
toeic.example_zh: 波次規劃將訂單分組為發放批次，使人力與設備能並行高效作業。

toeic.example_en: The next release wave should focus on parcel orders to meet the carrier's afternoon cutoff time.
toeic.example_zh: 下一個發放波次應聚焦在小包訂單，以趕上承運商的下午截單時間。

toeic.example_en: Missing the parcel carrier cutoff pushes the shipment to next-day pickup and delays customer delivery.
toeic.example_zh: 錯過小包承運商的截單時間會讓出貨延至次日取件，並耽誤客戶收件。

toeic.example_en: Pick to light technology guides workers to the correct bin with bright LED indicators above shelves.
toeic.example_zh: 燈號揀貨技術以貨架上方明亮的 LED 指示器引導作業員至正確的料箱。

toeic.example_en: Voice picking lets warehouse workers keep their hands free while receiving spoken instructions through headsets.
toeic.example_zh: 語音揀貨讓倉庫作業員透過耳機接收口語指令，雙手得以保持自由。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 貨到人系統（取代人員走動取貨）
toeic.example_en: Goods to person systems use robots to bring shelves to stationary pickers, dramatically improving picking productivity.
toeic.example_zh: 貨到人系統利用機器人將貨架帶到固定揀貨員處，大幅提升揀貨生產力。

toeic.example_en: Automated guided vehicles move pallets between staging zones without any driver supervision during the night shift.
toeic.example_zh: 自動導引車在夜班無需司機監控即可在暫存區之間搬運棧板。

toeic.example_en: Autonomous mobile robots navigate dynamically and adjust their routes when human workers cross their paths.
toeic.example_zh: 自主移動機器人能動態導航，當人員穿越其路徑時自動調整行進路線。

toeic.example_en: The warehouse control system coordinates conveyors, sorters, and automated equipment with real-time order priority.
toeic.example_zh: 倉庫控制系統依即時訂單優先順序協調輸送帶、分揀機與自動化設備。

toeic.example_en: A labor management system measures pick rates and identifies workers who need additional coaching support.
toeic.example_zh: 人力管理系統衡量揀貨速率並找出需要額外輔導的作業員。

toeic.example_en: Engineered labor standards calculate the expected time for every task based on observed motion data.
toeic.example_zh: 工程化作業標準依觀察到的動作資料計算每項工作的預期時間。

toeic.example_en: Daily throughput metrics help the operations manager allocate workers to the busiest functional areas.
toeic.example_zh: 每日的產出指標幫助營運經理將人力分配到最忙的功能區。

toeic.example_en: Automating the packing line lowered cost per unit by nearly twenty cents over the first year.
toeic.example_zh: 將包裝線自動化在第一年將單位成本降低了將近二十美分。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 服務成本（客戶服務成本）
toeic.example_en: Calculating cost to serve by customer reveals which accounts may be unprofitable despite high revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 依客戶計算服務成本可揭示哪些帳戶儘管營收高卻可能無利可圖。

toeic.example_en: Landed cost includes product price, freight, duties, insurance, and any other handling charges incurred.
toeic.example_zh: 到岸總成本涵蓋商品價格、運費、關稅、保險與其他相關處理費用。

toeic.example_en: Suppliers compete on total delivered cost rather than headline unit prices alone during major sourcing decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 在重大採購決策中，供應商以總配送成本而非僅以表面單價競爭。

toeic.example_en: Annual freight spend tops fifty million dollars across all modes for our North American business.
toeic.example_zh: 我們北美業務每年所有運輸方式的運費支出超過五千萬美元。

toeic.example_en: Carriers adjust the fuel surcharge index weekly based on government-published diesel price benchmarks.
toeic.example_zh: 承運商依政府公告的柴油價格基準每週調整燃油附加費指數。

toeic.example_en: The carrier announced a general rate increase taking effect from the first of next month.
toeic.example_zh: 承運商宣布一般費率調漲自下月一日起生效。

toeic.example_en: Parcel carriers add a peak season surcharge during the busy weeks leading up to the holidays.
toeic.example_zh: 在年節前的繁忙週次，小包承運商會加收旺季附加費。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 填充材（包裝填充物）
toeic.example_en: Using less void fill reduces material cost and lowers dimensional weight for parcel shipments significantly.
toeic.example_zh: 減少使用填充材可降低材料成本並顯著降低小包運送的體積重量。

toeic.example_en: Right-size packaging cuts both shipping costs and the environmental footprint of every parcel we ship.
toeic.example_zh: 合適尺寸包裝同時降低運費，也減少我們每件出貨包裹的環境足跡。

toeic.example_en: The factory tests every corrugated box design under simulated stack pressure before approving production rollout.
toeic.example_zh: 工廠在核准量產前以模擬堆疊壓力測試每款瓦楞紙箱設計。

toeic.example_en: Properly applied stretch wrap secures pallet contents and prevents cartons from shifting during long highway transit.
toeic.example_zh: 妥善纏繞的棧板膜可固定棧板上的貨物，避免紙箱在長途公路運輸中位移。

toeic.example_en: Shrink wrap forms a tight transparent skin around the bundle, protecting products from moisture and dust.
toeic.example_zh: 收縮膜在貨物束外形成緊貼的透明膜，保護產品免受潮氣與灰塵侵害。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 棧板交換（互換制度）
toeic.example_en: Pallet exchange programs allow shippers and receivers to swap empty pallets at the time of delivery.
toeic.example_zh: 棧板交換制度允許托運人與收貨人在交貨時交換空棧板。

toeic.example_en: Switching to reusable containers eliminated thousands of cardboard boxes from our packaging waste stream annually.
toeic.example_zh: 改用可重複使用容器每年從我們的包裝廢棄物中減少了數千個紙箱。

toeic.example_en: Returnable packaging requires tight asset tracking so containers do not disappear into the supply chain.
toeic.example_zh: 可回收循環包裝需要嚴格的資產追蹤，以免容器在供應鏈中遺失。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 緩衝墊料（運輸固定填材）
toeic.example_en: Dunnage placed between cartons prevents movement and protects fragile components during ocean transit voyages.
toeic.example_zh: 置於紙箱之間的緩衝墊料能防止移動，保護易碎元件在海運過程中不受損。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) ISTA 運輸包裝測試
toeic.example_en: ISTA testing simulates drops, vibration, and temperature swings to validate packaging design before commercial release.
toeic.example_zh: ISTA 運輸包裝測試模擬掉落、震動與溫度變化，於商業上市前驗證包裝設計。

toeic.example_en: A six-sided drop test confirms the carton protects the product when handlers mishandle it during transit.
toeic.example_zh: 六面掉落測試確認紙箱在運輸中遭粗暴處理時仍能保護產品。

toeic.example_en: Adequate stack strength is essential when pallets are double-stacked in a warehouse or in a trailer.
toeic.example_zh: 當棧板在倉庫或拖車內雙層堆疊時，足夠的堆疊強度至關重要。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 承重的；承重力
toeic.example_en: Each rack beam has a published load bearing limit that must never be exceeded by users.
toeic.example_zh: 每根貨架橫樑都有公告的承重力上限，使用者絕不可超過。

toeic.example_en: Reach trucks operate in narrow aisles and stack pallets at heights traditional forklifts cannot reach.
toeic.example_zh: 前移式堆高機可在狹窄走道作業，並將棧板堆到傳統堆高機無法達到的高度。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 揀貨機（高位揀貨車）
toeic.example_en: An order picker truck lifts the operator to high storage levels for picking individual cartons safely.
toeic.example_zh: 揀貨機將作業員升至高層儲位，以安全方式揀取單箱商品。

toeic.example_en: A very narrow aisle layout doubles storage density but requires guided trucks for safe operation.
toeic.example_zh: 超窄走道配置可使儲存密度倍增，但需使用導引堆高機才能安全運行。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 夾層（倉庫挑高樓層）
toeic.example_en: Adding a mezzanine doubled the storage footprint within the existing warehouse building without any expansion.
toeic.example_zh: 在既有倉庫內加設夾層使儲存面積倍增，不需任何外部擴建。

toeic.example_en: A buffer warehouse near the assembly plant smooths supplier lead time variability and reduces line stoppages.
toeic.example_zh: 靠近組裝廠的緩衝倉能平滑供應商前置時間變異並減少產線停頓。

toeic.example_en: Our regional distribution center serves stores within a five-hundred-mile radius using daily truck routes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的區域配送中心以每日卡車路線服務五百英里半徑內的門市。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 履行節點（出貨節點）
toeic.example_en: Adding fulfillment nodes closer to major cities cuts last-mile delivery time and parcel transportation costs.
toeic.example_zh: 在主要城市附近增設履行節點可縮短最後一哩配送時間並降低小包運輸成本。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 暗倉門市（純揀貨倉）
toeic.example_en: A dark store looks like a regular shop but exclusively fulfills online grocery delivery orders.
toeic.example_zh: 暗倉門市外觀似一般商店，但僅用於履行線上雜貨配送訂單。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 微型履行（小型自動倉）
toeic.example_en: Micro-fulfillment centers tucked behind grocery stores enable one-hour delivery within dense urban neighborhoods.
toeic.example_zh: 藏身於雜貨店後方的微型履行中心可在密集都會社區實現一小時配送。

toeic.example_en: Ship from store programs convert retail locations into mini fulfillment hubs for nearby online orders.
toeic.example_zh: 門市出貨計畫將零售據點轉變為附近線上訂單的迷你履行樞紐。

toeic.word: buy online pick up in store
toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 線上下單門市取貨（BOPIS）
toeic.example_en: Buy online pick up in store options reduce parcel costs and drive incremental in-store traffic.
toeic.example_zh: 線上下單門市取貨選項可降低小包成本並帶動門市的額外人流。

toeic.example_en: Selecting the right last mile carrier in each metro area dramatically affects on-time delivery performance.
toeic.example_zh: 在各都會區選擇合適的最後一哩承運商會大幅影響準時送達績效。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 白手套配送（高規格送貨服務）
toeic.example_en: White-glove delivery includes unpacking, assembly, and removal of packaging materials from the customer's home.
toeic.example_zh: 白手套配送包含拆封、組裝與將包裝材料從客戶家中移除。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 兩人配送（大型物品送貨）
toeic.example_en: Heavy furniture requires two-man delivery to safely carry items up stairs and around tight corners.
toeic.example_zh: 重型家具需要兩人配送，才能安全將物品搬上樓梯並繞過狹小轉角。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 門口配送（送至門檻）
toeic.example_en: Threshold delivery brings the package just inside the front door but does not include unpacking.
toeic.example_zh: 門口配送只將包裹送至大門內側，不包含拆封服務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 出貨後抵減（代理通路返利機制）
toeic.example_en: Ship-and-debit programs let distributors discount the customer and later claim reimbursement from the manufacturer.
toeic.example_zh: 出貨後抵減計畫讓經銷商先給客戶折扣，事後再向製造商申請補貼。

toeic.example_en: Trade promotion management software helps consumer brands plan, execute, and measure retailer-funded promotional events.
toeic.example_zh: 通路促銷管理軟體協助消費品牌規劃、執行並衡量由零售商出資的促銷活動。

toeic.example_en: The perfect order index combines several KPIs into one figure summarizing overall customer service performance.
toeic.example_zh: 完美訂單指數將多項 KPI 合併為單一數字，總結整體客戶服務績效。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 近岸外包（就近設廠）
toeic.example_en: Nearshoring production to Mexico has helped many U.S. companies reduce lead times and transportation expenses.
toeic.example_zh: 將生產近岸外包至墨西哥幫助許多美國公司縮短前置時間並降低運輸費用。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 友岸外包（友好國家設廠）
toeic.example_en: Friend-shoring shifts production to politically aligned countries to reduce geopolitical risk in supplier networks.
toeic.example_zh: 友岸外包將生產轉移到政治立場一致的國家，以降低供應商網絡的地緣政治風險。

toeic.example_en: Dual sourcing critical electronic components protects production schedules if one supplier experiences capacity issues.
toeic.example_zh: 為關鍵電子元件採用雙重供應來源，可在其中一家供應商產能出問題時保護生產排程。

toeic.example_en: Multi-sourcing spreads volume across three or more suppliers and reduces dependence on any single one.
toeic.example_zh: 多元供應來源將採購量分散到三家以上供應商，降低對任何單一來源的依賴。

toeic.example_en: Single sourcing can unlock volume pricing but exposes the business to concentrated risk if disruptions occur.
toeic.example_zh: 單一供應來源可取得集量價格，但若發生中斷將使業務面臨集中風險。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 供應商基礎（合作供應商群）
toeic.example_en: Consolidating the supply base from one hundred to thirty vendors improved leverage and reduced administrative overhead.
toeic.example_zh: 將供應商基礎從一百家整併為三十家提升了議價力並降低行政負擔。

toeic.example_en: Mapping the tiered supply chain revealed several sub-tier suppliers located in high-risk geographic areas worldwide.
toeic.example_zh: 繪製多階層供應鏈地圖揭露多家位於全球高風險地理區域的次階層供應商。

toeic.example_en: Supplier on-boarding takes about eight weeks and includes paperwork, system access, and initial training sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商上線導入約需八週，包含文件、系統存取與初步教育訓練。

toeic.example_en: Supplier scorecarding uses transparent metrics so vendors understand exactly how the buyer evaluates their performance.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商計分管理採用透明指標，讓供應商清楚買方如何評估其表現。

toeic.example_en: The buyer reviewed the open order report every morning to flag any items at risk.
toeic.example_zh: 採購人員每天早上檢視未結訂單報表，標記任何有風險的品項。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 釋出排程（採購分批釋出）
toeic.example_en: Each blanket order has a release schedule specifying quantities and dates over the coming year.
toeic.example_zh: 每張總括訂單都有釋出排程，列明未來一年各批次的數量與日期。

toeic.example_en: A rolling release pattern keeps deliveries flowing weekly and avoids inventory swings at the customer plant.
toeic.example_zh: 滾動式釋單讓配送每週持續進行，避免客戶工廠的庫存波動。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 凍結期（短期不可變更區間）
toeic.example_en: Inside the frozen horizon, planners may not change the production schedule without senior management approval.
toeic.example_zh: 在凍結期內，規劃員不得在未獲高階主管核准下變更生產排程。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 規劃週期（規劃時間範圍）
toeic.example_en: Strategic planning horizon extends three years out, while tactical planning focuses on the next twelve weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 策略規劃週期延伸至未來三年，而戰術規劃則聚焦未來十二週。

toeic.example_en: A rolling forecast horizon of eighteen months refreshes each quarter and replaces the traditional annual budget.
toeic.example_zh: 十八個月的滾動預測期每季更新一次，取代傳統的年度預算。

toeic.example_en: Exception-based planning focuses scarce analyst time on the items that need adjustment, not routine cases.
toeic.example_zh: 異常導向規劃將寶貴的分析師時間集中在需要調整的項目，而非例行案件。

toeic.example_en: A min-max policy reorders automatically when inventory drops below the minimum and refills to the maximum.
toeic.example_zh: 上下限庫存政策在庫存低於下限時自動補單，將庫存補滿至上限。

toeic.example_en: The system calculates the reorder quantity using forecast demand, lead time, and target service level.
toeic.example_zh: 系統依預測需求、前置時間與目標服務水準計算再訂購量。

toeic.example_en: A two-bin system signals replenishment when the first bin is empty and the second activates.
toeic.example_zh: 雙箱補貨系統在第一個料箱用完、第二個啟用時即發出補貨訊號。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 由電商平台代為履行
toeic.example_en: Sellers using fulfillment by marketplace transfer inventory to the platform's warehouses for picking and shipping.
toeic.example_zh: 使用由電商平台代為履行的賣家會將庫存轉移至平台倉庫進行揀貨與出貨。

toeic.example_en: Supply chain finance lets suppliers receive early payment from a bank against approved buyer invoices.
toeic.example_zh: 供應鏈金融讓供應商可憑買方已核可的發票，向銀行取得提前付款。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 動態折扣（提前付款換折扣）
toeic.example_en: Dynamic discounting lets buyers offer suppliers a sliding-scale discount in exchange for earlier payment dates.
toeic.example_zh: 動態折扣讓買方以滑動折扣換取較早的付款日期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 管制界線（統計品管）
toeic.example_en: Process measurements outside the upper control limit prompt the team to investigate possible assignable causes.
toeic.example_zh: 製程量測值超出管制上限時，團隊應調查可能的可歸因原因。

toeic.example_en: An internal process audit confirmed that operators were following the latest version of the standard work.
toeic.example_zh: 內部製程稽核確認作業員均遵循最新版本的標準作業。

toeic.example_en: Layered process audits engage supervisors and managers in daily checks that reinforce quality discipline on the floor.
toeic.example_zh: 分層製程稽核讓組長與經理參與每日檢查，於現場強化品質紀律。

toeic.example_en: Lean warehousing principles reduce waste motion, redundant handling, and excess inventory inside distribution facilities.
toeic.example_zh: 精實倉儲原則減少配送設施中無謂的動作、重複搬運與過量庫存。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 價值流（端對端流程）
toeic.example_en: The value stream from raw material to customer delivery now takes seven days instead of twelve.
toeic.example_zh: 從原物料到客戶交貨的價值流現已從十二天縮短至七天。

toeic.example_en: Continuous waste reduction projects collectively saved the operation over two million dollars during the past year.
toeic.example_zh: 持續的減廢專案合計為去年的營運節省了超過兩百萬美元。

toeic.example_en: Weekly five-S audits keep workstations organized, clean, and standardized across the entire production area.
toeic.example_zh: 每週的 5S 稽核讓整個生產區域的工作站保持整潔、有序與標準化。

toeic.example_en: A four-day kaizen event redesigned the receiving area and cut dwell time by thirty percent.
toeic.example_zh: 為期四天的改善活動週重新設計了收料區，將停留時間縮短百分之三十。

toeic.example_en: Effective root cause corrective action prevents the same defect from reappearing in future production runs.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的根因矯正措施可防止相同缺陷在後續生產批次中再次出現。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 圍堵措施（防止問題擴散）
toeic.example_en: Immediate containment action stops suspect product from reaching customers while the investigation team works.
toeic.example_zh: 立即的圍堵措施可在調查團隊處理期間，防止可疑產品送達客戶。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 供應商矯正措施要求（SCAR）
toeic.example_en: A supplier corrective action request demands documented root cause analysis and verification of long-term effectiveness.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商矯正措施要求需要書面化的根因分析及長期成效驗證。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 偏離申請（規格偏離核可申請）
toeic.example_en: A deviation request must be approved before producing parts that fall outside normal engineering specifications.
toeic.example_zh: 在生產超出正常工程規格的零件前，必須先核准偏離申請。

toeic.example_en: Eliminating the rework loop on the soldering line freed up significant capacity for new product introduction.
toeic.example_zh: 消除焊接線的重工循環為新產品導入釋放了大量產能。

toeic.example_en: Scrap rate reduction initiatives this year delivered savings of over five hundred thousand dollars annually.
toeic.example_zh: 今年的報廢率降低專案每年帶來超過五十萬美元的節省。

toeic.example_en: Improving process yield by two percentage points significantly boosts profitability without requiring additional equipment investment.
toeic.example_zh: 將製程良率提升兩個百分點可大幅提升獲利，且無需額外設備投資。

toeic.example_en: First pass yield measures how many units pass inspection on the first attempt without any rework.
toeic.example_zh: 一次通過良率衡量首次檢驗即合格、未經重工的單位比例。

toeic.example_en: Rolled throughput yield multiplies each stage's yield to expose hidden cumulative losses across the full process.
toeic.example_zh: 整體連續良率將各階段良率相乘，揭露整個流程中累積的隱性損失。

toeic.example_en: Tracking defects per million provides a normalized metric to compare quality across different products and lines.
toeic.example_zh: 追蹤百萬機會缺陷數提供一致化指標，可跨產品與產線比較品質。

toeic.example_en: A capability index above one point three is typically required for safety-critical features in automotive parts.
toeic.example_zh: 在汽車零件中，安全關鍵特性通常要求能力指數在 1.3 以上。

toeic.example_en: Process stability must be demonstrated for at least thirty days before customers will approve initial production.
toeic.example_zh: 在客戶核准初步量產前，必須證明製程穩定性已達至少三十天。

toeic.example_en: Higher operational availability means equipment is ready for production a greater percentage of scheduled time.
toeic.example_zh: 較高的作業可用率代表設備在排定時段中可投入生產的比例更高。

toeic.example_en: Sticking to the preventive maintenance schedule reduces unplanned downtime and extends the useful life of equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴格遵守預防保養排程可減少非計畫停機，並延長設備使用壽命。

toeic.example_en: Condition-based maintenance uses sensor data to schedule repairs only when equipment shows signs of wear.
toeic.example_zh: 狀態監測維護根據感測器資料，僅在設備出現磨損徵兆時安排維修。

toeic.example_en: Higher asset utilization spreads fixed cost over more units and lowers the cost per finished product.
toeic.example_zh: 更高的資產利用率將固定成本分攤至更多單位，降低每件成品的成本。

toeic.example_en: Reducing machine downtime by ten percent would unlock significant capacity without buying any new equipment.
toeic.example_zh: 將機台停機時間減少百分之十即可釋放可觀產能，無需採購任何新設備。

toeic.example_en: Reducing changeover time enables smaller batch sizes and faster response to customer order shifts.
toeic.example_zh: 縮短換模時間可實現較小的批量並更快回應客戶訂單的變化。

toeic.example_en: A balanced line distributes workload evenly across stations so no single station becomes a bottleneck.
toeic.example_zh: 平衡產線將工作量平均分配到各工站，使任一工站都不會成為瓶頸。

toeic.example_en: Line balancing reassigns tasks across stations to even out cycle times and maximize daily output.
toeic.example_zh: 產線平衡作業重新分配各工站任務，使週期時間平均並最大化每日產出。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 混線生產（混合機型組裝）
toeic.example_en: Mixed model assembly produces multiple product variants on the same line without lengthy changeover delays.
toeic.example_zh: 混線生產在同一條產線上生產多種產品型號，無需冗長的換線延誤。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 負荷平滑（產能負載均衡）
toeic.example_en: Load smoothing across the week prevents overtime on busy days and idle time on slow ones.
toeic.example_zh: 整週的負荷平滑可避免忙碌日加班、清淡日閒置的情況。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 外向物流（出貨物流）
toeic.example_en: Our outbound logistics team manages every shipment that leaves the warehouse heading toward end customers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的外向物流團隊管理每筆離開倉庫運往終端客戶的出貨。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 內向物流（進貨物流）
toeic.example_en: Inbound logistics covers the movement of raw materials and components from suppliers into the plant.
toeic.example_zh: 內向物流涵蓋原物料與零件從供應商運至工廠的過程。

toeic.example_en: A third-party freight payment service audits invoices, settles carriers, and provides reporting to the finance team.
toeic.example_zh: 第三方運費代付服務稽核發票、結算承運商並向財務團隊提供報表。

toeic.example_en: A robust trade compliance program protects the company from costly penalties for export control violations.
toeic.example_zh: 健全的貿易合規計畫可保護公司免於出口管制違規所造成的高額罰款。

toeic.example_en: Engineers must obtain an export classification number for every new product before international shipments may begin.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師必須在國際出貨前為每項新產品取得出口分類號。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 關稅升級（加工程度越高關稅越重）
toeic.example_en: Tariff escalation discourages developing nations from exporting finished goods to wealthier markets.
toeic.example_zh: 關稅升級制度使開發中國家難以將成品出口至富裕市場。

toeic.example_en: The updated tariff schedule lists thousands of product categories with their applicable duty rates.
toeic.example_zh: 更新後的關稅稅率表列出數千種商品類別及其適用稅率。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 從價稅（按貨物價值徵收）
toeic.example_en: An ad valorem duty of twelve percent applies to imported leather handbags this quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 本季進口皮製手提包適用百分之十二的從價稅。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 從量稅（按貨物數量徵收）
toeic.example_en: A specific duty is levied per kilogram regardless of the product market value.
toeic.example_zh: 從量稅按每公斤徵收，不考慮商品的市場價值。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 複合稅（從價加從量）
toeic.example_en: The compound duty combines a fixed amount and a percentage of declared value.
toeic.example_zh: 複合稅結合固定金額及申報價值的百分比徵收。

toeic.example_en: Proposed border adjustment measures could significantly raise costs for import-reliant manufacturers.
toeic.example_zh: 擬議的邊境稅調整措施可能大幅提高仰賴進口廠商的成本。

toeic.example_en: Domestic producers filed for trade remedy protection against subsidized foreign imports.
toeic.example_zh: 本地生產商申請貿易救濟措施以抗衡受補貼的外國進口品。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 防衛措施（暫時提高關稅）
toeic.example_en: The government imposed a safeguard measure to protect the steel sector from import surges.
toeic.example_zh: 政府實施防衛措施以保護鋼鐵業免受進口激增衝擊。

toeic.example_en: The recent import surge of cheap textiles has alarmed local industry associations.
toeic.example_zh: 近期廉價紡織品的進口激增令本地產業協會深感憂慮。

toeic.example_en: Several trading partners have challenged the export subsidy programs at the WTO.
toeic.example_zh: 多個貿易夥伴已就該出口補貼計畫向世貿組織提出申訴。

toeic.example_en: Members must submit annual subsidy disclosure reports to comply with trade rules.
toeic.example_zh: 成員國必須提交年度補貼揭露報告以符合貿易規定。

toeic.example_en: Our trade defense team monitors foreign pricing practices and prepares timely petitions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的貿易防禦團隊監控外國定價行為並及時準備申訴文件。

toeic.example_en: Senior officials resumed trade negotiation talks aimed at lowering reciprocal tariffs.
toeic.example_zh: 高階官員重啟貿易談判，旨在降低相互關稅。

toeic.example_en: The prime minister appointed a trade envoy to lead bilateral discussions in Asia.
toeic.example_zh: 總理任命一位貿易特使主導亞洲的雙邊磋商。

toeic.example_en: The trade representative will host counterparts from five Pacific Rim economies next month.
toeic.example_zh: 貿易代表將於下月接待五個太平洋沿岸經濟體的同僚。

toeic.example_en: The embassy trade attache helps domestic exporters navigate local regulatory requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 大使館商務參事協助本國出口商了解當地法規要求。

toeic.example_en: Our commercial counselor in Berlin assists firms entering the German market for the first time.
toeic.example_zh: 我們駐柏林的商務專員協助首次進入德國市場的企業。

toeic.example_en: A trade mission of forty executives will visit Brazil to explore agricultural partnerships.
toeic.example_zh: 一個由四十位高階主管組成的貿易訪問團將前往巴西探索農業合作。

toeic.example_en: The two countries signed a bilateral agreement reducing duties on processed foods.
toeic.example_zh: 兩國簽署雙邊協定，調降加工食品的關稅。

toeic.example_en: Exporters benefit from a multilateral framework that ensures predictable customs treatment.
toeic.example_zh: 出口商受益於確保通關待遇可預期的多邊架構。

toeic.example_en: Membership in the regional bloc grants tariff-free access to nearly thirty markets.
toeic.example_zh: 成為該區域集團的成員可獲得近三十個市場的免稅進入權。

toeic.example_en: A customs union sets a common external tariff against goods from non-member countries.
toeic.example_zh: 關稅同盟對非成員國商品設定共同對外關稅。

toeic.example_en: The economic partnership agreement liberalizes services trade between the two regions.
toeic.example_zh: 該經濟夥伴協定促進兩地區之間的服務貿易自由化。

toeic.example_en: Negotiators hope to finalize the comprehensive trade pact before year end.
toeic.example_zh: 談判人員希望在年底前敲定全面貿易協議。

toeic.example_en: Goods qualifying under the agreement receive preferential treatment at customs entry.
toeic.example_zh: 符合協定資格的商品在通關時可享優惠待遇。

toeic.example_en: Small shipments below the threshold qualify for a duty exemption under current rules.
toeic.example_zh: 依現行規定，低於門檻的小額貨件可獲關稅豁免。

toeic.example_en: Manufacturers lobbied for duty suspension on specialty inputs unavailable domestically.
toeic.example_zh: 製造商遊說對國內無法取得的特殊原料暫停課徵關稅。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 關稅項目（稅則細目）
toeic.example_en: The new schedule introduces over one hundred additional tariff line subdivisions.
toeic.example_zh: 新的稅則表新增超過一百個關稅項目細分。

toeic.example_en: Members made binding commitments not to raise duties above the agreed ceilings.
toeic.example_zh: 成員國作出約束性承諾，不得將關稅提高至協議上限以上。

toeic.example_en: The applied rate remained well below the bound rate set in the trade schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 實施稅率仍遠低於貿易稅則表中設定的約束稅率。

toeic.example_en: Exporters should check the applied rate at the time of shipment, not the published rate.
toeic.example_zh: 出口商應查詢出貨當下的實施稅率，而非公告稅率。

toeic.example_en: Members extend most favored treatment to all participating economies equally.
toeic.example_zh: 成員國對所有參與經濟體一視同仁給予最惠國待遇。

toeic.example_en: Once cleared, imported goods are entitled to national treatment under domestic regulations.
toeic.example_zh: 貨物通關後依國內法規享有國民待遇。

toeic.example_en: Complex labeling rules can function as a non-tariff barrier for small exporters.
toeic.example_zh: 複雜的標示規則對小型出口商而言可能形成非關稅障礙。

toeic.example_en: Differing safety standards create a technical barrier for cross-border electronics shipments.
toeic.example_zh: 不同的安全標準對跨境電子產品出貨形成技術性障礙。

toeic.example_en: Each shipment must pass conformity assessment before entering the destination market.
toeic.example_zh: 每批貨物進入目的地市場前必須通過符合性評估。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 相互承認（檢測結果）
toeic.example_en: A mutual recognition arrangement reduces duplicate testing for medical devices.
toeic.example_zh: 相互承認安排可減少醫療器材的重複檢測。

toeic.example_en: Fresh produce shipments require a phytosanitary certificate issued by the origin country.
toeic.example_zh: 生鮮農產品出貨需附原產國核發的植物檢疫證明。

toeic.example_en: All meat imports undergo sanitary inspection at the port of entry.
toeic.example_zh: 所有肉品進口在入境港口都需接受衛生檢驗。

toeic.example_en: Restricted chemicals require an import permit issued at least thirty days in advance.
toeic.example_zh: 受管制化學品需至少提前三十天取得進口許可證。

toeic.example_en: The export license fee was waived for shipments under a humanitarian aid program.
toeic.example_zh: 在人道援助計畫下的出貨豁免出口許可費。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 關稅完稅價格估算
toeic.example_en: Disputed customs valuation can delay clearance and trigger additional duties.
toeic.example_zh: 對關稅完稅價格估算有爭議會延誤通關並引發額外關稅。

toeic.example_en: The transaction value method remains the primary basis for customs valuation worldwide.
toeic.example_zh: 交易價格法仍為全球海關估價的主要依據。

toeic.example_en: When prices are not available, officials may rely on deductive value calculations.
toeic.example_zh: 若無法取得價格，官員可採用推算價格計算法。

toeic.example_en: The computed value adds material, labor, and overhead to determine duty assessment.
toeic.example_zh: 計算價格將材料、人工及間接費用加總以核定關稅。

toeic.example_en: Pricing was quoted on a freight on board basis from the supplier port in Vietnam.
toeic.example_zh: 報價採越南供應商港口的船上交貨價基礎。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 成本加保險加運費
toeic.example_en: Under cost insurance freight terms, the seller covers carriage and basic marine insurance.
toeic.example_zh: 依成本加保險加運費條件，賣方負擔運費及基本海上保險。

toeic.example_en: Carriage insurance paid terms require the seller to obtain minimum cargo insurance.
toeic.example_zh: 運費保費付訖條件要求賣方投保最低限度的貨物保險。

toeic.example_en: Always indicate the named place of delivery to avoid confusion on transport responsibilities.
toeic.example_zh: 務必註明指定交貨地點以避免運輸責任的混淆。

toeic.example_en: All shipping documents must arrive at the bank before the negotiation deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 所有出貨文件必須在押匯截止日期前送達銀行。

toeic.example_en: Buyers often use a proforma invoice to apply for import permits or financing.
toeic.example_zh: 買方常使用預估發票申請進口許可或融資。

toeic.example_en: An inspection certificate from an accredited surveyor protects both parties from disputes.
toeic.example_zh: 由認可檢驗機構出具的檢驗證明可保護雙方避免爭議。

toeic.example_en: Wooden pallets require a fumigation certificate to satisfy biosecurity requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 木製棧板須附燻蒸證明以符合生物安全規定。

toeic.example_en: Please reconcile the freight invoice against the original quotation before payment.
toeic.example_zh: 付款前請將運費發票與原始報價對帳。

toeic.example_en: The air waybill number lets you track the shipment in real time online.
toeic.example_zh: 空運提單號碼可讓您即時線上追蹤貨件。

toeic.example_en: The original ocean bill of lading must be surrendered to release the cargo.
toeic.example_zh: 正本海運提單須交還方能放貨。

toeic.example_en: Freight forwarders issue a house bill to consolidate smaller shipments under one master bill.
toeic.example_zh: 貨運承攬業者開立分提單，將多筆小貨整合於同一總提單下。

toeic.example_en: The carrier issues a master bill of lading covering the consolidated container.
toeic.example_zh: 運輸業者開立涵蓋整併貨櫃的總提單。

toeic.example_en: An order bill of lading is a negotiable instrument that can be endorsed to third parties.
toeic.example_zh: 指示提單為可流通票據，可背書轉讓予第三方。

toeic.example_en: Payment under a sight draft is due upon presentation of compliant documents.
toeic.example_zh: 即期匯票於提示相符單據時即須付款。

toeic.example_en: A time draft allows the importer to pay sixty days after acceptance.
toeic.example_zh: 遠期匯票允許進口商在承兌後六十天付款。

toeic.example_en: Under documents against payment terms, banks release shipping documents only after the buyer pays.
toeic.example_zh: 付款交單條件下，銀行僅在買方付款後才釋出出貨文件。

toeic.example_en: Sellers face higher risk with documents against acceptance because payment occurs later.
toeic.example_zh: 承兌交單因付款時點較晚，賣方承擔較高風險。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 記帳貿易（信用付款）
toeic.example_en: Established buyers often request open account terms with net ninety payment.
toeic.example_zh: 老客戶常要求採用九十天記帳貿易付款條件。

toeic.example_en: Cash against documents requires the buyer to pay before receiving title to the goods.
toeic.example_zh: 憑單付款要求買方在取得貨物所有權前先付款。

toeic.example_en: An irrevocable credit cannot be amended without consent from all involved parties.
toeic.example_zh: 不可撤銷信用狀未經所有相關方同意不得修改。

toeic.example_en: A confirmed credit adds a second bank guarantee, ideal for high-risk markets.
toeic.example_zh: 保兌信用狀增加第二家銀行擔保，適合高風險市場。

toeic.example_en: Trading houses often request a transferable credit so they can pay original suppliers.
toeic.example_zh: 貿易商常要求可轉讓信用狀，以便支付原始供應商。

toeic.example_en: Intermediaries use a back-to-back credit when the original credit is non-transferable.
toeic.example_zh: 中間商在原始信用狀不可轉讓時改採背對背信用狀。

toeic.example_en: The advising bank verifies the authenticity of the letter of credit before notifying the beneficiary.
toeic.example_zh: 通知銀行在告知受益人前會驗證信用狀的真實性。

toeic.example_en: The issuing bank guarantees payment provided the documents strictly comply with terms.
toeic.example_zh: 只要單據嚴格符合條件，開狀銀行即保證付款。

toeic.example_en: Documents may be presented to the nominated bank within the validity period.
toeic.example_zh: 單據可於有效期內提示給指定銀行。

toeic.example_en: The negotiating bank advances funds to the exporter against compliant documents.
toeic.example_zh: 押匯銀行憑符合的單據先行墊付款項給出口商。

toeic.example_en: Funds flow from the issuing bank to the nominated bank through the reimbursing bank.
toeic.example_zh: 資金透過償付銀行從開狀銀行流向指定銀行。

toeic.example_en: Discrepant documents may delay payment until the importer agrees to waive the issues.
toeic.example_zh: 瑕疵單據可能延誤付款，直到進口商同意放棄主張瑕疵。

toeic.example_en: Strict documentary compliance ensures the bank releases payment without delay.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴格的單據合規可確保銀行如期付款。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 付款銀行（被付款人銀行）
toeic.example_en: The drawee bank examines the draft and supporting documents before honoring it.
toeic.example_zh: 付款銀行在承付前會審核匯票及相關佐證單據。

toeic.example_en: Exporters reduce exchange rate exposure by invoicing in their home currency where possible.
toeic.example_zh: 出口商盡可能以本國貨幣計價以降低匯率風險暴露。

toeic.example_en: Multinationals manage translation exposure when consolidating foreign subsidiary results.
toeic.example_zh: 跨國公司在合併海外子公司財報時須管理換算風險。

toeic.example_en: Sustained currency moves create economic exposure that impacts competitive positioning.
toeic.example_zh: 持續性的匯率變動會造成影響競爭地位的經濟風險暴露。

toeic.example_en: Transaction exposure arises between invoicing and the actual settlement of payment.
toeic.example_zh: 交易風險發生於開立發票至實際結算付款的期間。

toeic.example_en: A currency mismatch between revenues and debt can destabilize a foreign subsidiary.
toeic.example_zh: 收入與負債之間的幣別錯配可能危及海外子公司財務穩定。

toeic.example_en: Sourcing locally enables natural hedging against currency volatility in the host market.
toeic.example_zh: 在地採購可達成自然避險以因應當地市場的匯率波動。

toeic.example_en: The treasury team locks in forward cover for ninety percent of next quarter exports.
toeic.example_zh: 財務部對下季百分之九十的出口鎖定遠期避險。

toeic.example_en: An option hedge offers protection while preserving upside if rates move favorably.
toeic.example_zh: 選擇權避險可提供保護，同時保留匯率有利變動的獲利空間。

toeic.example_en: Central banks reopened a currency swap line to ease dollar funding pressures abroad.
toeic.example_zh: 央行重啟換匯額度以紓解海外美元融資壓力。

toeic.example_en: The quarter reflected a sizable FX gain from the strengthening of regional currencies.
toeic.example_zh: 本季因區域貨幣走強而錄得可觀的匯兌利益。

toeic.example_en: Unhedged exposure resulted in a significant FX loss for the import division.
toeic.example_zh: 未避險的暴險導致進口部門出現重大匯兌損失。

toeic.example_en: Headquarters instructed the branch to remit funds to the parent before fiscal close.
toeic.example_zh: 總部指示分公司在會計年度結算前匯款給母公司。

toeic.example_en: Companies often repatriate earnings when tax holidays make the timing favorable.
toeic.example_zh: 公司常在租稅優惠期內將盈餘匯回母國。

toeic.example_en: A documented transfer pricing policy is essential for cross-border related-party transactions.
toeic.example_zh: 完善的移轉訂價政策對於跨境關係人交易至關重要。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 避免雙重課稅協定
toeic.example_en: A double taxation treaty prevents the same income from being taxed in two jurisdictions.
toeic.example_zh: 避免雙重課稅協定可防止同一筆所得在兩地被重複課稅。

toeic.example_en: The local payer acts as a withholding agent for royalties and service fees.
toeic.example_zh: 當地付款方擔任權利金及服務費的扣繳義務人。

toeic.example_en: Investors must submit a residence certificate to claim a treaty benefit on dividends.
toeic.example_zh: 投資人須提交居住者證明，才能就股利主張條約優惠。

toeic.example_en: Tax authorities target base erosion through cross-border interest and royalty payments.
toeic.example_zh: 稅務機關針對跨境利息與權利金所造成的稅基侵蝕加強查核。

toeic.example_en: New rules deter aggressive profit shifting to low-tax jurisdictions abroad.
toeic.example_zh: 新規範旨在遏止將利潤積極移轉至低稅率國家的行為。

toeic.example_en: Income from a controlled foreign company may be attributed to the parent for tax purposes.
toeic.example_zh: 受控外國公司的所得可能依稅務規定歸屬於母公司。

toeic.example_en: A foreign tax credit prevents double taxation on income already taxed overseas.
toeic.example_zh: 國外稅額抵減可避免已在海外納稅的所得被重複課稅。

toeic.example_en: Large groups must submit a country-by-country report disclosing revenue and tax paid per jurisdiction.
toeic.example_zh: 大型集團須提交揭露各地區營收與納稅情況的國別報告。

toeic.example_en: Our bank extended a trade finance facility covering import letters of credit for the year.
toeic.example_zh: 本行核給涵蓋年度進口信用狀的貿易融資額度。

toeic.example_en: Export credit insurance protects against buyer default in politically unstable markets.
toeic.example_zh: 出口信用保險可在政局不穩的市場中防範買方違約。

toeic.example_en: An export credit agency backed financing for the high-speed rail project abroad.
toeic.example_zh: 出口信用機構為海外高速鐵路專案提供融資擔保。

toeic.example_en: Long-term buyer credit enabled the African utility to finance imported turbines.
toeic.example_zh: 長期買方信貸協助該非洲公用事業融資進口渦輪機。

toeic.example_en: Generous supplier credit terms helped the exporter beat competitors on price and payment.
toeic.example_zh: 優渥的賣方信貸條件協助出口商在價格與付款上勝過對手。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 福費廷融資（買斷貿易應收）
toeic.example_en: Forfaiting allows exporters to sell medium-term receivables to a bank without recourse.
toeic.example_zh: 福費廷融資讓出口商可將中期應收款不附追索地賣給銀行。

toeic.example_en: Comprehensive trade insurance covers political risk in addition to commercial default.
toeic.example_zh: 全面性的貿易保險除商業違約外亦涵蓋政治風險。

toeic.example_en: Political risk assessments are essential before committing capital to frontier markets.
toeic.example_zh: 在投入資本至前緣市場前，政治風險評估不可或缺。

toeic.example_en: Expropriation risk may cause investors to demand higher returns from foreign ventures.
toeic.example_zh: 徵收風險可能促使投資人要求更高的海外投資報酬。

toeic.example_en: Limited currency convertibility can trap profits inside the host country for extended periods.
toeic.example_zh: 貨幣可兌換性受限可能使利潤長期滯留於投資地國。

toeic.example_en: A sovereign guarantee improved financing terms for the cross-border pipeline project.
toeic.example_zh: 主權擔保改善了跨境輸油管線專案的融資條件。

toeic.example_en: The host country offered land subsidies to attract the foreign manufacturing investment.
toeic.example_zh: 地主國提供土地補貼以吸引外國製造業投資。

toeic.example_en: Repatriation taxes in the home country can influence subsidiary dividend policy.
toeic.example_zh: 母國的匯回稅可能影響子公司的股利政策。

toeic.example_en: Setting up a wholly owned subsidiary offers maximum control but requires higher capital.
toeic.example_zh: 設立全資子公司可獲最大控制權但需投入較高資本。

toeic.example_en: Selecting the right joint venture partner is critical to navigating local regulations.
toeic.example_zh: 選對合資夥伴對於因應當地法規至關重要。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 綠地投資（新建投資）
toeic.example_en: The greenfield investment includes building a new factory and training local talent.
toeic.example_zh: 此綠地投資計畫涵蓋興建新廠及培訓在地人才。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 棕地投資（既有資產投資）
toeic.example_en: A brownfield investment lets the buyer acquire existing facilities and customer relationships.
toeic.example_zh: 棕地投資讓買方可承接既有廠房與客戶關係。

toeic.example_en: The deal underwent investment screening to assess national security implications.
toeic.example_zh: 此交易接受投資審查以評估國家安全影響。

toeic.example_en: Dual-use goods require additional licensing because of potential military applications.
toeic.example_zh: 軍民兩用物資因可能用於軍事用途，須額外取得許可。

toeic.example_en: Exporting to an embargoed country without authorization triggers severe penalties.
toeic.example_zh: 未經許可向受禁運國家出口將招致嚴厲處罰。

toeic.example_en: Compliance teams screen counterparties to avoid dealing with any sanctioned entity.
toeic.example_zh: 法遵團隊會篩查交易對手以免與任何受制裁實體往來。

toeic.example_en: The shipping platform automatically blocks orders involving any restricted party.
toeic.example_zh: 該出貨平台會自動封鎖涉及任何受限制當事人的訂單。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 特別指定國民名單
toeic.example_en: Banks block payments to specially designated nationals to comply with sanctions law.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行依制裁法令封鎖支付給特別指定國民名單對象的款項。

toeic.example_en: The law has significant extraterritorial reach for foreign exporters using U.S. components.
toeic.example_zh: 該法律對使用美國零組件的外國出口商具顯著域外管轄效力。

toeic.example_en: Effective compliance program management protects firms from costly trade violations.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的法遵計畫管理可使企業免於高額的貿易違規處罰。

toeic.example_en: All sales staff completed annual trade compliance training before renewing their access.
toeic.example_zh: 所有業務人員在更新權限前皆完成年度貿易法遵訓練。

toeic.example_en: A surprise customs audit revealed misclassified products from the previous fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 突擊海關稽核發現上一會計年度的商品分類錯誤。

toeic.example_en: A post-clearance audit can result in retroactive duty assessments and penalties.
toeic.example_zh: 通關後稽核可能導致追溯性的關稅補徵及罰款。

toeic.example_en: Filing a voluntary disclosure often reduces penalties for inadvertent classification errors.
toeic.example_zh: 提交自願揭露通常可減輕無心分類錯誤的處罰。

toeic.example_en: Importers request a binding ruling to confirm tariff classification before shipment.
toeic.example_zh: 進口商會在出貨前申請預先稅則核定以確認關稅分類。

toeic.example_en: Each product is assigned an HS heading before duty rates can be applied.
toeic.example_zh: 每項商品須先指派 HS 稅則章節才能適用稅率。

toeic.example_en: The HS subheading determines whether the product qualifies for a preferential rate.
toeic.example_zh: HS 稅則子目決定該商品是否適用優惠稅率。

toeic.example_en: Customs brokers apply the general rules of interpretation to classify novel products.
toeic.example_zh: 報關行運用解釋總則替新產品進行歸類。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 主要特性（決定分類）
toeic.example_en: Classification depends on the essential character of the composite article.
toeic.example_zh: 分類取決於該複合物品的主要特性。

toeic.example_en: Products must meet a regional value content threshold to claim preferential origin.
toeic.example_zh: 商品須達區域價值含量門檻才能主張優惠原產地。

toeic.example_en: Substantial transformation in the second country can confer new origin status.
toeic.example_zh: 在第二國發生的實質轉型可賦予新的原產地身分。

toeic.example_en: The tariff shift rule requires inputs to change classification through processing.
toeic.example_zh: 稅則跳號規則要求原料經加工後須變更稅則分類。

toeic.example_en: Cumulation rules let materials from partner countries count toward origin requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 累積規則允許夥伴國的原料計入原產地要求。

toeic.example_en: Only originating goods receive the preferential duty rate under the trade agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 依貿易協定僅原產貨物才能享有優惠稅率。

toeic.example_en: The value of non-originating materials must remain below the agreed limit.
toeic.example_zh: 非原產材料的價值須維持在約定上限以下。

toeic.example_en: Medical device exports often require a certificate of free sale from the home authority.
toeic.example_zh: 醫療器材出口常須出具母國主管機關核發的自由銷售證明。

toeic.example_en: A valid customs broker license is required to file entries on behalf of importers.
toeic.example_zh: 代理進口商辦理報關須持有有效的報關業執照。

toeic.example_en: Electronic submission of the import declaration speeds processing at major ports.
toeic.example_zh: 以電子方式提交進口報關單可加快主要港口的處理速度。

toeic.example_en: Inaccurate export declarations may trigger investigations and shipment holds.
toeic.example_zh: 出口報關單不實可能引發調查及貨物滯留。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 單一窗口（通關平台）
toeic.example_en: A national single window lets traders submit all border documents through one portal.
toeic.example_zh: 全國性單一窗口讓貿易商可透過單一入口提交所有邊境文件。

toeic.example_en: Once duties are paid, customs grants release for free circulation in the market.
toeic.example_zh: 繳納關稅後，海關即准予貨物在市場上自由流通。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 進料加工（保稅加工）
toeic.example_en: Inward processing allows duty relief on materials that will be re-exported as finished goods.
toeic.example_zh: 進料加工制度可對將以成品再出口的原料給予稅捐減免。

toeic.example_en: Outward processing supports companies that send components abroad for assembly.
toeic.example_zh: 委外加工有助於將零件送往海外組裝的公司。

toeic.example_en: Trade show exhibits enter the country under temporary admission without duty payment.
toeic.example_zh: 展覽展品依暫准通關制度入境，無須繳納關稅。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) ATA單證冊（暫准通關證）
toeic.example_en: An ATA carnet simplifies temporary export of professional equipment across multiple borders.
toeic.example_zh: ATA單證冊簡化專業設備跨多國暫時出口的程序。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 經認證之合格業者
toeic.example_en: Authorized economic operator status grants priority customs treatment and fewer inspections.
toeic.example_zh: 取得經認證之合格業者身分可享優先通關及減少查驗。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 受信賴貿易商計畫
toeic.example_en: Joining the trusted trader program reduces clearance times for repeat importers.
toeic.example_zh: 加入受信賴貿易商計畫可縮短常態進口商的通關時間。

toeic.example_en: Robust supply chain security practices are now mandatory for high-volume exporters.
toeic.example_zh: 高出貨量的出口商現須具備完善的供應鏈安全作業。

toeic.example_en: Random container scanning identifies undeclared goods before they enter the market.
toeic.example_zh: 隨機貨櫃掃描查驗能在貨物進入市場前識別未申報品項。

toeic.example_en: Customs uses risk-based inspection to focus resources on suspicious shipments.
toeic.example_zh: 海關採取風險基礎查驗，將資源集中於可疑出貨。

toeic.example_en: Carriers must submit an advance manifest before cargo can be loaded for the United States.
toeic.example_zh: 運輸業者須在貨物裝運前往美國前先提交預先艙單。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 二十四小時規則（事先申報）
toeic.example_en: The twenty-four hour rule requires manifest data well before vessel departure.
toeic.example_zh: 二十四小時規則要求在船舶開航前提早提供艙單資料。

toeic.example_en: Containerization drastically lowered shipping costs and revolutionized global trade.
toeic.example_zh: 貨櫃化大幅降低運費並徹底改變全球貿易型態。

toeic.example_en: A feeder vessel transfers containers from regional ports to the main hub for transshipment.
toeic.example_zh: 支線船將區域港口的貨櫃接駁至主要轉運樞紐。

toeic.example_en: Goods crossing third countries require a transit declaration to avoid duty payment.
toeic.example_zh: 穿越第三國的貨物須提交過境報關單以免課稅。

toeic.example_en: Importers post a transit bond to cover potential duties if goods divert into the market.
toeic.example_zh: 進口商繳交過境保證金以涵蓋貨物若轉入市場可能須繳的關稅。

toeic.example_en: Consolidated cargo lowers freight costs by sharing container space with other shippers.
toeic.example_zh: 併櫃貨物與其他出貨人共用櫃位空間以降低運費。

toeic.example_en: Small exporters often ship by less-than-container load to manage cash flow.
toeic.example_zh: 小型出口商常以散櫃貨方式出貨以管理現金流。

toeic.example_en: A full container load offers faster clearance and lower per-unit handling charges.
toeic.example_zh: 整櫃貨可較快通關，且每件貨物的搬運費用較低。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 二十呎標準櫃當量
toeic.example_en: Port capacity is commonly measured in twenty-foot equivalent unit throughput.
toeic.example_zh: 港埠容量通常以二十呎標準櫃當量處理量衡量。

toeic.example_en: Most general merchandise ships in a standard dry container without special handling.
toeic.example_zh: 多數一般商品以標準一般貨櫃出貨，不需特殊處理。

toeic.example_en: Heavy machinery often moves through break bulk shipping rather than containers.
toeic.example_zh: 重型機械常以散裝雜貨運輸而非貨櫃方式運送。

toeic.example_en: Vehicles are loaded directly onto a ro-ro vessel by driving them up the ramp.
toeic.example_zh: 車輛可直接駛上斜坡裝載至滾裝船。

toeic.example_en: Efficient berth allocation reduces vessel waiting time and lowers shipping costs.
toeic.example_zh: 有效率的泊位分配可縮短船舶等候時間並降低運費。

toeic.example_en: Skilled stevedore crews load and unload cargo within tight operational windows.
toeic.example_zh: 熟練的碼頭裝卸工人在緊湊作業時間內完成裝卸貨作業。

toeic.example_en: The quotation excludes the terminal handling charge billed separately by the port.
toeic.example_zh: 此報價不含港口另行收取的碼頭操作費。

toeic.example_en: Rising fuel prices triggered an unexpected bunker surcharge on Asia trade routes.
toeic.example_zh: 燃料價格上揚導致亞洲航線增收意外的燃油附加費。

toeic.example_en: A currency adjustment factor protects carriers against unfavorable exchange rate swings.
toeic.example_zh: 幣值調整因子可保護運輸業者免受不利匯率波動影響。

toeic.example_en: A general average declaration distributes losses among all cargo owners on the vessel.
toeic.example_zh: 共同海損聲明將損失分攤於船上所有貨主。

toeic.example_en: Particular average covers losses affecting only one specific shipment on board.
toeic.example_zh: 單獨海損僅涵蓋影響船上特定一批貨物的損失。

toeic.example_en: Cargo owners purchase marine insurance to mitigate transit and weather-related risks.
toeic.example_zh: 貨主投保海上保險以降低運送及氣候相關風險。

toeic.example_en: Banks may require a cargo insurance certificate as part of the documentary credit package.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行可能要求將貨物保險證明列入信用狀文件之中。

toeic.example_en: All-risk coverage protects high-value electronics shipments against most physical perils.
toeic.example_zh: 全險承保可為高價電子產品出貨涵蓋大多數實體風險。

toeic.example_en: Named perils coverage only reimburses losses explicitly listed in the policy schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 列名風險承保僅理賠保單明列風險所造成的損失。

toeic.example_en: The supply chain disruption forced manufacturers to source critical chips from new vendors.
toeic.example_zh: 該供應鏈中斷迫使製造商向新供應商採購關鍵晶片。

toeic.example_en: Supplier diversification reduces dependency on any single country or factory.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商多元化可降低對單一國家或工廠的依賴。

toeic.example_en: Near-shoring to Mexico cut lead times for our North American distribution centers.
toeic.example_zh: 將生產移至墨西哥的近岸外包縮短了北美配送中心的前置時間。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 中國加一（分散風險策略）
toeic.example_en: A China plus one strategy adds an alternative manufacturing site in Southeast Asia.
toeic.example_zh: 中國加一策略在東南亞增設替代製造據點。

toeic.example_en: Decoupling in advanced technology sectors is reshaping global trade flows.
toeic.example_zh: 先進科技領域的脫鉤正在重塑全球貿易流向。

toeic.example_en: Boards now scrutinize geoeconomic risk alongside traditional financial metrics.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會如今將地緣經濟風險與傳統財務指標並重檢視。

toeic.example_en: A prolonged trade war eroded margins across export-dependent industries.
toeic.example_zh: 長期貿易戰侵蝕了出口導向產業的利潤率。

toeic.example_en: The country imposed retaliatory tariffs targeting agricultural exports from its partner.
toeic.example_zh: 該國對夥伴國的農產品出口課徵報復性關稅。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 對等措施（針鋒相對）
toeic.example_en: Trade negotiators warned that tit-for-tat measures would hurt both economies.
toeic.example_zh: 貿易談判代表警告，對等措施將同時傷害兩國經濟。

toeic.example_en: Rising trade tension between major economies pressured global commodity prices.
toeic.example_zh: 主要經濟體間升高的貿易緊張對全球商品價格形成壓力。

toeic.example_en: Trade liberalization in services has lagged behind progress in goods trade.
toeic.example_zh: 服務業的貿易自由化進展落後於商品貿易。

toeic.example_en: Improved market access for processed foods will benefit small and medium exporters.
toeic.example_zh: 加工食品市場進入機會的提升將嘉惠中小型出口商。

toeic.example_en: Trade facilitation reforms shortened average border processing time by forty percent.
toeic.example_zh: 貿易便捷化改革使邊境平均處理時間縮短百分之四十。

toeic.example_en: Adopting paperless customs procedures cut clearance costs by nearly thirty percent.
toeic.example_zh: 採行無紙化通關程序使通關成本降低近百分之三十。

toeic.example_en: Regulatory harmonization across markets simplifies compliance for multinational firms.
toeic.example_zh: 跨市場的法規調和可簡化跨國企業的法遵作業。

toeic.example_en: A predictable rules-based system encourages long-term cross-border investment.
toeic.example_zh: 可預期的規則為本體制鼓勵長期的跨境投資。

toeic.example_en: The dispute settlement body ruled in favor of the complainant on duty calculations.
toeic.example_zh: 爭端解決機構在關稅計算爭議中判決申訴方勝訴。

toeic.example_en: The panel ruling required the government to bring its measures into compliance.
toeic.example_zh: 專家小組裁定要求該國政府使措施符合協定規定。

toeic.example_en: A formal consultation request is the first step in resolving a trade complaint.
toeic.example_zh: 正式提出諮商請求是解決貿易申訴的第一步。

toeic.example_en: Each member undergoes a trade policy review every few years for transparency.
toeic.example_zh: 為求透明，各成員國每隔數年進行一次貿易政策檢討。

toeic.example_en: Members fulfill their notification obligation by submitting subsidy data on schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 成員國依時程提交補貼資料以履行通報義務。

toeic.example_en: Transparency requirements force governments to publish new regulations in advance.
toeic.example_zh: 透明性要求迫使政府事先公布新法規。

toeic.example_en: The non-discrimination principle underpins both national and most favored treatment rules.
toeic.example_zh: 非歧視原則同時為國民待遇與最惠國待遇規則的基礎。

toeic.example_en: Subsidy disciplines aim to ensure a level playing field for competing exporters.
toeic.example_zh: 補貼規範旨在確保競爭出口商間擁有公平競爭環境。

toeic.example_en: Policymakers invoked the infant industry argument to justify temporary import barriers.
toeic.example_zh: 決策者引用幼稚產業論為暫時性進口障礙辯護。

toeic.example_en: The country leverages comparative advantage in software services to grow its exports.
toeic.example_zh: 該國運用軟體服務的比較利益擴大出口。

toeic.example_en: Few economies still hold absolute advantage across multiple manufactured product categories.
toeic.example_zh: 在多項製造業類別中仍具絕對利益的經濟體已寥寥可數。

toeic.example_en: Deep value chain integration with regional partners boosted overall export competitiveness.
toeic.example_zh: 與區域夥伴深度的價值鏈整合提升整體出口競爭力。

toeic.example_en: Intermediate goods now account for a majority of cross-border merchandise trade.
toeic.example_zh: 中間財如今佔跨境商品貿易的多數比重。

toeic.example_en: Disruptions to the global value chain highlighted single-sourcing vulnerabilities.
toeic.example_zh: 全球價值鏈中斷凸顯了單一來源採購的脆弱性。

toeic.example_en: The cross-border merger required regulatory clearance in seven separate jurisdictions.
toeic.example_zh: 此跨境合併須在七個不同司法管轄區取得監理核准。

toeic.example_en: Faster cross-border payment networks reduce settlement times for international suppliers.
toeic.example_zh: 更快的跨境支付網路可縮短國際供應商的結算時間。

toeic.example_en: Restrictions on cross-border data flow complicate operations for digital service providers.
toeic.example_zh: 跨境資料傳輸的限制使數位服務提供者的營運更為複雜。

toeic.example_en: E-commerce export channels now reach customers in over one hundred countries.
toeic.example_zh: 電商出口通路如今可觸及逾百個國家的客戶。

toeic.example_en: Parcels below the de minimis threshold typically enter duty-free and clear quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 低於微量免稅門檻的包裹通常可免稅快速通關。

toeic.example_en: Cross-border logistics partners simplify documentation for first-time exporters.
toeic.example_zh: 跨境物流夥伴可為首次出口商簡化文件作業。

toeic.example_en: An international payment gateway supports multi-currency checkout in dozens of markets.
toeic.example_zh: 國際支付閘道支援數十個市場的多幣別結帳。

toeic.example_en: The contract designates U.S. dollars as the settlement currency for all invoices.
toeic.example_zh: 合約指定美元為所有發票的結算貨幣。

toeic.example_en: Choosing the right invoicing currency can shift exchange risk between parties.
toeic.example_zh: 選擇適當的計價貨幣可在交易雙方之間轉移匯率風險。

toeic.example_en: Trade credit insurance lets exporters extend longer payment terms with confidence.
toeic.example_zh: 商業信用保險讓出口商能放心提供更長的付款條件。

toeic.example_en: Buyer default in emerging markets remains a top concern for export finance teams.
toeic.example_zh: 新興市場的買方違約仍是出口融資團隊的首要顧慮。

toeic.example_en: Credit committees set a country limit to cap aggregate exposure to any single market.
toeic.example_zh: 授信委員會設定國家額度上限，以管控對單一市場的整體曝險。

toeic.example_en: Corporate ratings rarely exceed the sovereign ceiling assigned to the host country.
toeic.example_zh: 企業評等鮮少能高於地主國的主權上限。

toeic.example_en: The economy posted a balance of trade surplus driven by record semiconductor exports.
toeic.example_zh: 在半導體出口創新高帶動下，該經濟體錄得貿易順差。

toeic.example_en: A widening balance of trade deficit prompted calls for new export incentives.
toeic.example_zh: 貿易逆差擴大引發推出新出口獎勵措施的呼聲。

toeic.example_en: Improving terms of trade allow the country to import more for the same export volume.
toeic.example_zh: 貿易條件改善讓該國能以同樣出口量換取更多進口。

toeic.example_en: Exchange control regulations restrict how much currency exporters can hold overseas.
toeic.example_zh: 外匯管制法規限制出口商可在海外持有的外匯金額。

toeic.example_en: Mandatory currency repatriation rules require exporters to convert foreign earnings quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 強制外匯匯回規定要求出口商儘速結匯國外收入。

toeic.example_en: Healthy foreign exchange reserves help governments stabilize their currency during shocks.
toeic.example_zh: 充足的外匯存底有助政府在衝擊期間穩定本國貨幣。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 原物料出口國（出口商）
toeic.example_en: A commodity exporter benefits when global demand pushes raw material prices higher.
toeic.example_zh: 全球需求推升原物料價格時，原物料出口國從中受益。

toeic.example_en: A major commodity importer is vulnerable when supply shortages drive prices upward.
toeic.example_zh: 主要原物料進口國在供應短缺推升價格時相當脆弱。

toeic.example_en: A diversified export base shields the economy from sector-specific downturns.
toeic.example_zh: 多元化出口基礎可保護經濟免受特定產業衰退衝擊。

toeic.example_en: Investments in logistics infrastructure strengthen overall trade competitiveness.
toeic.example_zh: 投資物流基礎建設可強化整體貿易競爭力。

toeic.example_en: The export promotion agency organized pavilions at international trade fairs.
toeic.example_zh: 出口推廣機構在國際展覽中籌設國家館。

toeic.example_en: Our localization strategy adapts product features, language, and pricing for each region.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的在地化策略針對各區域調整產品功能、語言及定價。

toeic.example_en: Country-of-origin labeling rules require accurate disclosure on all retail packaging.
toeic.example_zh: 產地標示規定要求所有零售包裝上需正確揭露原產地。

toeic.example_en: A geographical indication protects products whose qualities derive from a specific region.
toeic.example_zh: 地理標示保護那些品質源自特定地區的產品。

toeic.example_en: Halal certification opens substantial export opportunities in Muslim-majority markets.
toeic.example_zh: 清真認證為穆斯林為主市場帶來龐大出口商機。

toeic.example_en: Kosher certification can be a deciding factor for buyers in select retail channels.
toeic.example_zh: 猶太潔食認證可能是特定零售通路買家的決定因素。

toeic.example_en: Country branding campaigns build trust in exports through coordinated quality narratives.
toeic.example_zh: 國家品牌行銷透過一致的品質敘事建立出口的信任感。

toeic.example_en: An export readiness assessment helps small businesses identify operational gaps early.
toeic.example_zh: 出口準備度評估可協助小型企業及早找出營運缺口。

toeic.example_en: Arbitration is preferred for resolving commercial disputes across borders.
toeic.example_zh: 跨境商務爭議通常優先採仲裁方式解決。

toeic.example_en: Parties chose international arbitration to ensure a neutral and enforceable outcome.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方選擇國際仲裁以確保中立且可執行的結果。

toeic.example_en: Singapore is a popular seat of arbitration for cross-border commercial disputes.
toeic.example_zh: 新加坡是跨境商務爭議廣受歡迎的仲裁地。

toeic.example_en: The New York Convention makes arbitral awards enforceable in most major economies.
toeic.example_zh: 紐約公約使仲裁判斷在多數主要經濟體中具可執行性。

toeic.example_en: A clear choice of law clause prevents conflicting interpretations in cross-border contracts.
toeic.example_zh: 明確的準據法條款可避免跨境契約中出現衝突的解釋。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 招標邀請；徵求提案
toeic.example_en: The procurement team issued a formal solicitation to twelve qualified vendors last Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 採購團隊於上週五向十二家合格供應商發出正式招標邀請。

toeic.example_en: Suppliers must pass prequalification before submitting bids for our infrastructure projects.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商必須通過資格預審才能投標我們的基礎建設專案。

toeic.example_en: Each bidder received a detailed specification document outlining the technical requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 每位投標者都收到一份詳列技術要求的規格文件。

toeic.example_en: The bid bond requirement protects the buyer if a winning supplier withdraws its offer.
toeic.example_zh: 投標保證金要求可保護買方免於得標供應商撤回報價的損失。

toeic.example_en: Only a responsive bid that meets every mandatory criterion will advance to evaluation.
toeic.example_zh: 只有符合所有強制標準的投標才會進入評選階段。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不符合要求的投標
toeic.example_en: We disqualified the nonresponsive bid because it omitted three mandatory pricing tables.
toeic.example_zh: 我們因該投標漏列三張必填的報價表而判定為不合格。

toeic.example_en: All sealed bids will be opened publicly at the procurement office on March 15.
toeic.example_zh: 所有密封投標將於三月十五日在採購辦公室公開開標。

toeic.example_en: Government contracts above one million dollars must go through an open tender process.
toeic.example_zh: 金額超過一百萬美元的政府合約必須經過公開招標程序。

toeic.example_en: A restricted tender invites only vendors who have passed our prequalification step.
toeic.example_zh: 限制性招標僅邀請通過資格預審步驟的供應商參與。

toeic.example_en: Complex IT projects often use a two-stage tender to refine technical scope first.
toeic.example_zh: 複雜的資訊科技專案常採用兩階段招標以先釐清技術範圍。

toeic.example_en: The evaluators sent bid clarification questions about the proposed delivery timeline.
toeic.example_zh: 評選委員針對建議交付時程寄出投標澄清問題。

toeic.example_en: Please complete the vendor questionnaire so we can verify your financial stability.
toeic.example_zh: 請填寫供應商問卷，以便我們核實貴公司的財務穩定性。

toeic.example_en: Update your vendor profile annually to keep certifications and insurance records current.
toeic.example_zh: 請每年更新供應商檔案以保持認證與保險紀錄即時正確。

toeic.example_en: Vendor due diligence uncovered an unresolved lawsuit that disqualified the leading bidder.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商盡職調查發現一宗未解決的訴訟，使領先投標者遭取消資格。

toeic.example_en: A quarterly financial health check protects us from sudden supplier insolvency.
toeic.example_zh: 每季的財務健康檢查可保護我們免受供應商突然破產的衝擊。

toeic.example_en: Our creditworthiness review uses both external ratings and internal payment history data.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的信用度審核同時參考外部評等與內部付款紀錄資料。

toeic.example_en: Complete supplier registration in our portal before invoices can be processed.
toeic.example_zh: 請先於我們的入口網站完成供應商註冊，發票才能受理。

toeic.example_en: Buyers may only issue purchase orders to an approved supplier on the master list.
toeic.example_zh: 採購人員只能向主清單上的核可供應商開立採購訂單。

toeic.example_en: The disqualified bidder may appeal the decision within ten business days.
toeic.example_zh: 失格投標者可於十個工作日內對該決定提出申訴。

toeic.example_en: Each evaluation criterion carries a weighted score detailed in the appendix.
toeic.example_zh: 每項評選標準皆附有附錄中詳列的加權分數。

toeic.example_en: Reviewers calibrated their judgments using the shared scoring rubric before independent ratings.
toeic.example_zh: 評審在獨立評分前先依共用的評分標準表校準各自的判斷。

toeic.example_en: The selection committee includes representatives from procurement, legal, and end-user departments.
toeic.example_zh: 評選委員會由採購、法務及使用單位的代表組成。

toeic.example_en: Each finalist will receive an award notification or regret letter by Friday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 每位入圍者將於週五下午前收到得標通知或婉拒信。

toeic.example_en: The standstill period gives unsuccessful bidders ten days to challenge the award.
toeic.example_zh: 等待期讓未得標者有十天時間對得標結果提出異議。

toeic.example_en: Buyers offer a debrief session so losing bidders can understand evaluation feedback.
toeic.example_zh: 買方提供結果說明會以協助落選者了解評選回饋。

toeic.example_en: Strong scope definition reduces disputes and prevents costly change orders later.
toeic.example_zh: 明確的範圍定義可減少爭議並避免日後昂貴的變更指令。

toeic.example_en: Scope ambiguity in the draft caused suppliers to submit widely different pricing estimates.
toeic.example_zh: 草案中的範圍模糊使供應商提出差異甚大的報價估算。

toeic.example_en: Translation services are out of scope under this statement of work and require an amendment.
toeic.example_zh: 翻譯服務不在本工作說明書範圍內，需要另行簽訂修訂。

toeic.example_en: User training is in scope and included in the agreed lump-sum price.
toeic.example_zh: 使用者訓練在範圍內，且已包含於約定的總包價中。

toeic.example_en: Please confirm the deliverable schedule before we countersign the master agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 請於我們會簽主合約前確認交付物時程。

toeic.example_en: Acceptance testing must demonstrate that each deliverable meets documented business requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 驗收測試必須證明每項交付物均符合記錄在案的業務需求。

toeic.example_en: The acceptance certificate triggers the next milestone payment to the vendor.
toeic.example_zh: 驗收證明會觸發向供應商支付的下一筆里程碑款項。

toeic.example_en: Provisional acceptance was granted pending resolution of three minor punch list items.
toeic.example_zh: 在解決三項小型缺失清單事項前，暫時驗收已先行核准。

toeic.example_en: Please review the kickoff workshop agenda and propose any topics you want added.
toeic.example_zh: 請檢視啟動工作坊議程並提出您希望加入的任何主題。

toeic.example_en: Attendance at the vendor briefing is mandatory for any firm planning to bid.
toeic.example_zh: 凡計畫投標的廠商皆須出席供應商說明會。

toeic.example_en: The pre-bid conference will cover technical clarifications and procedural reminders.
toeic.example_zh: 投標前說明會將涵蓋技術澄清與程序提醒事項。

toeic.example_en: A site visit walkthrough lets bidders observe constraints that drawings alone cannot show.
toeic.example_zh: 現場勘查讓投標者觀察單憑圖面無法呈現的限制條件。

toeic.example_en: Vendors must file an intent to bid notice at least fourteen days before submission.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商至遲須於遞件前十四天提出投標意向書。

toeic.example_en: The bid submission deadline is strictly enforced regardless of courier delays.
toeic.example_zh: 投標截止時間嚴格執行，不接受任何快遞延誤的理由。

toeic.example_en: An addendum issuance notified bidders of revised insurance coverage thresholds.
toeic.example_zh: 附錄發布通知投標者保險覆蓋門檻已修訂。

toeic.example_en: All questions and answers appear in the clarification log shared with every bidder.
toeic.example_zh: 所有問與答都記錄在分享給每位投標者的澄清紀錄表中。

toeic.example_en: Indicative pricing helps shortlist suppliers before requesting binding proposals.
toeic.example_zh: 參考報價有助於在要求具約束力提案前篩選供應商。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不具約束力的報價
toeic.example_en: Treat the nonbinding quote as a planning estimate rather than a firm price.
toeic.example_zh: 請將不具約束力的報價視為規劃估算而非確定價格。

toeic.example_en: The bid validity period is one hundred twenty days from the opening date.
toeic.example_zh: 投標有效期自開標日起算為一百二十天。

toeic.example_en: Bid withdrawal after the deadline may result in forfeiture of the bid bond.
toeic.example_zh: 截止後撤回投標可能導致投標保證金被沒收。

toeic.example_en: An abnormally low bid triggers additional review to assess delivery feasibility.
toeic.example_zh: 異常低價投標將觸發進一步審查以評估交付可行性。

toeic.example_en: Negotiated procurement is suitable when only one qualified vendor exists in the market.
toeic.example_zh: 當市場上僅有一家合格供應商時，適合採用議價採購。

toeic.example_en: Competitive dialogue allows buyers to refine requirements through structured supplier discussions.
toeic.example_zh: 競爭性對話讓買方透過結構化的供應商討論來精修需求。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 單一來源採購理由書
toeic.example_en: Finance demands a written single-source justification for any noncompetitive contract.
toeic.example_zh: 財務部門要求任何非競爭性合約皆須附書面單一來源採購理由書。

toeic.example_en: A sole-source contract is permitted when the technology has no commercial substitute.
toeic.example_zh: 當該技術沒有商業替代品時，可採用獨家來源合約。

toeic.example_en: Our multi-sourcing strategy ensures alternate capacity during regional production disruptions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的多源採購策略可在區域生產中斷時確保備援產能。

toeic.example_en: The supplier consolidation initiative cut administrative overhead by twenty percent last year.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商整併計畫去年減少了百分之二十的行政開銷。

toeic.example_en: The category sourcing plan aligns demand, market trends, and supplier capabilities for two years.
toeic.example_zh: 品類採購規劃將兩年內的需求、市場趨勢與供應商能力相互對齊。

toeic.example_en: Spend cube analysis breaks expenditure by category, supplier, and business unit simultaneously.
toeic.example_zh: 支出立方體分析同時依品類、供應商與業務單位分解支出。

toeic.example_en: Procurement focuses its negotiation effort on the addressable spend rather than fixed charges.
toeic.example_zh: 採購將談判心力放在可影響支出上，而非固定費用上。

toeic.example_en: Contract leakage means we paid invoice rates higher than the negotiated catalog price.
toeic.example_zh: 合約漏洞流失代表我們支付的發票價格高於議定的目錄價。

toeic.example_en: The consultancy offered guaranteed savings tied to actual procurement performance results.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問公司提供與實際採購績效成果連動的保證節省。

toeic.example_en: Cost avoidance counts price increases that procurement successfully negotiated away.
toeic.example_zh: 成本規避計算的是採購成功議價而避免的漲價金額。

toeic.example_en: Hard savings appear directly in the budget as a reduction of operating expenses.
toeic.example_zh: 直接節省會以營運費用減少的形式直接反映於預算中。

toeic.example_en: Soft savings such as faster cycle time are harder to capture in financial reports.
toeic.example_zh: 如縮短週期時間之類的間接節省較難於財務報表中呈現。

toeic.example_en: Rate card alignment with three preferred staffing firms simplifies budgeting and reporting.
toeic.example_zh: 與三家優先人力公司進行費率表對齊可簡化編列預算與報告流程。

toeic.example_en: A preferred provider agreement secures discounted rates in exchange for higher purchase volume.
toeic.example_zh: 優先供應商協議以更高的採購量換取折扣價格。

toeic.example_en: Each call-off order references the parent framework contract for pricing and delivery terms.
toeic.example_zh: 每張叫單訂單均引用母框架合約的價格與交付條款。

toeic.example_en: A rate review clause allows annual benchmarking against current market levels.
toeic.example_zh: 費率檢討條款允許每年針對當前市場水準進行對標。

toeic.example_en: The benchmark price draws from three industry sources to determine fair market value.
toeic.example_zh: 對標價格取自三個業界來源以決定公平市場價值。

toeic.example_en: The price escalation clause links annual increases to a published commodity index.
toeic.example_zh: 價格調漲條款將年度漲幅連結至已公開的商品指數。

toeic.example_en: Symmetrical price de-escalation protects buyers when input costs fall in the market.
toeic.example_zh: 對稱式的價格調降可在投入成本下跌時保護買方。

toeic.example_en: A cost-plus arrangement reimburses verified costs plus a fixed management fee.
toeic.example_zh: 成本加成安排會在實際成本之外加付固定的管理費用。

toeic.example_en: A firm fixed price transfers cost overrun risk from the buyer to the supplier.
toeic.example_zh: 固定總價將成本超支風險自買方轉嫁給供應商。

toeic.example_en: Time and materials contracts suit projects whose scope cannot be precisely estimated upfront.
toeic.example_zh: 工時與材料合約適用於前期無法精確估算範圍的專案。

toeic.example_en: A not-to-exceed cap prevents the time and materials bill from rising indefinitely.
toeic.example_zh: 上限金額可避免工時與材料的帳單無止境上升。

toeic.example_en: Deliverables-based payment ensures vendors are compensated only when defined outputs are accepted.
toeic.example_zh: 依交付物付款確保供應商僅在約定產出獲驗收時才取得款項。

toeic.example_en: Progress billing aligns cash outflows with completed percentages of the project schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 進度開票使現金流出與專案時程的完成百分比相對齊。

toeic.example_en: Submit a milestone invoice within five days of signed deliverable acceptance.
toeic.example_zh: 請於交付物獲簽署驗收後五日內提交里程碑發票。

toeic.example_en: The buyer keeps a ten percent withholding amount until final acceptance is granted.
toeic.example_zh: 在最終驗收核准前，買方保留百分之十的保留款金額。

toeic.example_en: Retention release occurs once the warranty period closes without unresolved defects.
toeic.example_zh: 保留款釋出於保固期結束且無未解決缺陷時進行。

toeic.example_en: An advance payment guarantee protects buyers if the vendor fails to commence work.
toeic.example_zh: 預付款保證可在供應商未能開工時保護買方。

toeic.example_en: Performance security equal to ten percent of the contract value is required at signing.
toeic.example_zh: 簽約時須提供相當於合約金額百分之十的履約保證。

toeic.example_en: Each performance milestone unlocks a payment tranche according to the agreed schedule.
toeic.example_zh: 每個履約里程碑會依約定時程解鎖一筆款項。

toeic.example_en: A statement of objectives tells suppliers what to achieve without prescribing every method.
toeic.example_zh: 目標說明書告訴供應商要達成什麼，而不限定每個方法。

toeic.example_en: Requirements traceability links each contract clause to a specific business outcome.
toeic.example_zh: 需求可追溯性將每項合約條款連結至特定的業務成果。

toeic.example_en: Suppliers must complete the compliance matrix indicating where in their proposal each requirement appears.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商必須填寫合規對照矩陣，標示每項需求在提案中的對應位置。
