toeic.example_en: The technical envelope is opened first and scored before any commercial envelope is unsealed.
toeic.example_zh: 技術標封先行開啟並評分，之後才開啟任何商業標封。

toeic.example_en: Only technically qualified bidders advance to the commercial envelope opening stage.
toeic.example_zh: 只有技術合格的投標者才能進入商業標封開啟階段。

toeic.example_en: The two-envelope system separates technical merit from pricing during evaluation.
toeic.example_zh: 雙標封制在評選過程中將技術優劣與價格分開處理。

toeic.example_en: The evaluation panel signs a confidentiality undertaking before reviewing any submission.
toeic.example_zh: 評選小組在審閱任何投標前須簽署保密承諾書。

toeic.example_en: An independent observer attends bid opening to confirm procedural fairness.
toeic.example_zh: 獨立觀察員出席開標以確認程序公平。

toeic.example_en: Procurement integrity training is mandatory for staff involved in vendor selection.
toeic.example_zh: 參與供應商評選的員工必須完成採購誠信訓練。

toeic.example_en: Each bidder signs an anti-collusion declaration confirming independent pricing decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 每位投標者簽署反勾結聲明，確認價格決定獨立做出。

toeic.example_en: Our gift and hospitality policy caps annual vendor entertainment per employee.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的餽贈與招待政策對每位員工每年的供應商招待金額設有上限。

toeic.example_en: We reserve the right to audit any vendor handling regulated customer data.
toeic.example_zh: 我們保留對任何處理受監管客戶資料供應商的稽核權。

toeic.example_en: The contract spells out audit trail requirements for every financial transaction record.
toeic.example_zh: 合約明訂每筆財務交易紀錄的稽核軌跡要求。

toeic.example_en: The supplier audit report flagged two findings requiring remediation within ninety days.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商稽核報告標出兩項需於九十天內改善的發現。

toeic.example_en: A nonconformance report triggers a formal corrective action workflow with the vendor.
toeic.example_zh: 不符合報告會啟動與供應商之間的正式矯正措施流程。

toeic.example_en: Submit a corrective action plan within ten days of receiving the audit findings.
toeic.example_zh: 請於收到稽核發現後十日內提交矯正措施計畫。

toeic.example_en: The remediation timeline commits both parties to clearly defined recovery checkpoints.
toeic.example_zh: 補救時程使雙方承諾遵守明確界定的改善檢核點。

toeic.example_en: We hold a quarterly performance review meeting with every strategic vendor.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與每位策略供應商每季舉行績效檢討會議。

toeic.example_en: The vendor scorecard combines quality, delivery, cost, and responsiveness ratings.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商計分卡綜合品質、交期、成本與回應度等評分。

toeic.example_en: Our scorecard cadence is monthly for production suppliers and quarterly for indirect ones.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的計分卡週期為生產供應商每月一次，間接供應商每季一次。

toeic.example_en: Each service performance metric maps to a clear contractual obligation and remedy.
toeic.example_zh: 每項服務績效指標對應到明確的合約義務與救濟方式。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 營運服務水準協議
toeic.example_en: The operational SLA defines response times for each priority of support tickets.
toeic.example_zh: 營運服務水準協議定義各優先等級支援單的回應時間。

toeic.example_en: The service credit clause refunds part of the fee when SLA targets are missed.
toeic.example_zh: 服務扣抵條款在未達服務水準目標時退還部分費用。

toeic.example_en: The penalty regime escalates with repeat failures within a rolling twelve-month period.
toeic.example_zh: 罰則制度會隨十二個月滾動期內的重複未達標而加重。

toeic.example_en: An earnback mechanism lets suppliers recover penalties through subsequent superior performance.
toeic.example_zh: 補回機制讓供應商可透過後續優異表現賺回罰款。

toeic.example_en: Service governance committees meet monthly to review escalations and improvement actions.
toeic.example_zh: 服務治理委員會每月召開以檢視升級事項與改善行動。

toeic.example_en: Supplier segmentation distinguishes strategic partners from transactional commodity vendors.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商分級將策略合作夥伴與交易型一般供應商加以區隔。

toeic.example_en: A strategic supplier shares roadmaps and joint innovation plans with our engineering team.
toeic.example_zh: 策略供應商會與我們的工程團隊分享技術藍圖與共同創新計畫。

toeic.example_en: A critical supplier outage could halt our production line within forty-eight hours.
toeic.example_zh: 關鍵供應商發生停工可能在四十八小時內使我們的生產線停擺。

toeic.example_en: A low-risk supplier requires only annual self-assessment rather than onsite verification.
toeic.example_zh: 低風險供應商僅需每年自我評估，無需現場查核。

toeic.example_en: A high-risk supplier undergoes physical inspection at least twice every twelve months.
toeic.example_zh: 高風險供應商每十二個月至少接受兩次實地查驗。

toeic.example_en: Geographic concentration risk arose when seventy percent of vendors operated in one province.
toeic.example_zh: 當百分之七十的供應商集中於同一省份時即出現地理集中風險。

toeic.example_en: Policy sets a concentration limit so no single supplier exceeds twenty percent of spend.
toeic.example_zh: 政策設定集中度上限，使任一供應商占比不得超過支出的百分之二十。

toeic.example_en: Wind-down support covers documentation handover and staff training during the transition.
toeic.example_zh: 結案支援涵蓋過渡期間的文件移交與人員訓練。

toeic.example_en: A detailed knowledge handover plan reduces operational disruption when changing suppliers.
toeic.example_zh: 詳細的知識移交計畫可降低更換供應商時的營運中斷。

toeic.example_en: Reverse transition returns operational ownership to the buyer at the end of an outsourcing contract.
toeic.example_zh: 反向過渡在外包合約結束時將營運所有權交還買方。

toeic.example_en: The incumbent supplier sometimes has an information advantage during a recompete.
toeic.example_zh: 現任供應商在重新招標時有時握有資訊優勢。

toeic.example_en: The recompete process invites both the incumbent and challengers to bid on equal terms.
toeic.example_zh: 重新競標流程在同等條件下邀請現任與挑戰者投標。

toeic.example_en: Each challenger vendor must demonstrate that it can match incumbent service levels.
toeic.example_zh: 每位挑戰者供應商必須證明能達到現任供應商的服務水準。

toeic.example_en: Proprietary data formats can create vendor lock-in that limits future bargaining power.
toeic.example_zh: 專有資料格式可能造成供應商鎖定，限制日後的議價空間。

toeic.example_en: An open standard requirement helps prevent dependency on a single supplier ecosystem.
toeic.example_zh: 開放標準要求有助於避免對單一供應商生態系產生依賴。

toeic.example_en: Interoperability requirements ensure new solutions integrate with our existing platforms.
toeic.example_zh: 互通性要求確保新方案能與我們既有平台整合。

toeic.example_en: Our third-party risk assessment covers cybersecurity, financial stability, and operational maturity.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的第三方風險評估涵蓋資安、財務穩定與營運成熟度。

toeic.example_en: Responsible sourcing balances cost, quality, and broader social and environmental considerations.
toeic.example_zh: 負責任採購在成本、品質與廣泛的社會及環境考量間取得平衡。

toeic.example_en: Sustainable procurement integrates lifecycle environmental impact into the awarding decision.
toeic.example_zh: 永續採購將生命週期環境衝擊納入得標決策中。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 少數族裔所有企業
toeic.example_en: A minority-owned business can register through our portal to be considered for tier-two contracts.
toeic.example_zh: 少數族裔所有企業可透過我們的入口網站登記，以爭取二級合約。

toeic.example_en: Government programs often impose a small enterprise quota on prime contractors.
toeic.example_zh: 政府計畫常對主要承包商設定中小企業配額。

toeic.example_en: The subcontracting plan describes how the prime contractor will engage smaller suppliers.
toeic.example_zh: 分包計畫說明主要承包商將如何聘用較小型的供應商。

toeic.example_en: A flow-down clause ensures critical obligations apply to every subcontractor in the chain.
toeic.example_zh: 條款下傳條款確保關鍵義務適用於鏈中的每一位分包商。

toeic.example_en: A back-to-back agreement mirrors prime contract obligations onto subcontractors precisely.
toeic.example_zh: 背靠背協議將主合約義務精確地映射至分包商。

toeic.example_en: A consortium bid combines complementary capabilities from several independent companies.
toeic.example_zh: 聯合體投標結合數家獨立公司互補的能力。

toeic.example_en: The prime contractor remains accountable even when most work is delegated to subcontractors.
toeic.example_zh: 即使大部分工作委由分包商執行，主要承包商仍須負責。

toeic.example_en: The lead bidder coordinates submissions and serves as the single point of contact.
toeic.example_zh: 主導投標者協調投標文件並擔任單一聯絡窗口。

toeic.example_en: Naming a single point of contact accelerates issue resolution during contract execution.
toeic.example_zh: 指派單一聯絡窗口可加快合約執行期間的問題處理。

toeic.example_en: The engagement manager owns scope, schedule, and stakeholder communication throughout the project.
toeic.example_zh: 案件經理在整個專案期間主責範圍、時程與利害關係人溝通。

toeic.example_en: The escalation procedure defines who is contacted when an issue exceeds local authority.
toeic.example_zh: 升級程序界定當議題超出地方權限時應聯絡的對象。

toeic.example_en: Each risk register update reflects the most recent mitigation actions and likelihood scores.
toeic.example_zh: 每次風險登錄更新反映最新的緩解行動與發生機率分數。

toeic.example_en: An impact assessment quantifies effort, cost, and risk of the proposed change.
toeic.example_zh: 影響評估量化所提變更的工時、成本與風險。

toeic.example_en: Any scope variation must be priced and approved before implementation begins.
toeic.example_zh: 任何範圍變動皆須先報價並核准後方可實施。

toeic.example_en: Failure to meet a contractual obligation may result in penalty interest or service credits.
toeic.example_zh: 未履行合約義務可能導致罰息或服務扣抵。

toeic.example_en: Monthly performance dashboard reviews highlight trends across cost, quality, and delivery.
toeic.example_zh: 每月績效儀表板檢討會凸顯成本、品質與交期的趨勢。

toeic.example_en: Strategic suppliers share their innovation pipeline to align future capability investments.
toeic.example_zh: 策略供應商分享其創新管線以對齊未來的能力投資。

toeic.example_en: A value engineering proposal redesigns components to lower total cost without sacrificing quality.
toeic.example_zh: 價值工程提案重新設計零件以降低總成本而不犧牲品質。

toeic.example_en: We invite key suppliers to the design review meeting earlier in the development cycle.
toeic.example_zh: 我們會在開發週期較早階段邀請關鍵供應商參加設計檢討會議。

toeic.example_en: Early supplier involvement shortens lead time and reduces costly late-stage rework.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商早期參與可縮短前置時間並減少昂貴的後期重工。

toeic.example_en: The joint development agreement clarifies intellectual property ownership for new modules.
toeic.example_zh: 共同開發協議釐清新模組的智慧財產權歸屬。

toeic.example_en: A shared roadmap aligns supplier capacity investments with our future demand forecast.
toeic.example_zh: 共享藍圖使供應商的產能投資與我們未來的需求預測一致。

toeic.example_en: Increased demand visibility helps suppliers reserve raw materials at favorable prices.
toeic.example_zh: 提高的需求能見度幫助供應商以較有利的價格保留原料。

toeic.example_en: Rolling forecast sharing keeps both parties aligned on volume expectations.
toeic.example_zh: 滾動式預測分享使雙方對數量預期保持一致。

toeic.example_en: The minimum commitment guarantees revenue in exchange for prioritized capacity allocation.
toeic.example_zh: 最低承諾量以保證營收換取優先的產能分配。

toeic.example_en: A take-or-pay clause obliges the buyer to pay even if it does not draw the volume.
toeic.example_zh: 照付不議條款要求買方即使未提取數量仍須付款。

toeic.example_en: Each volume discount tier kicks in once cumulative annual purchases cross a threshold.
toeic.example_zh: 每個數量折扣級距於年度累積採購跨越門檻時生效。

toeic.example_en: The rebate tracker reconciles quarterly volumes against the formula stated in the contract.
toeic.example_zh: 回饋追蹤表將季度數量與合約所載公式進行對帳。

toeic.example_en: A growth rebate rewards year-over-year volume increases with retroactive price reductions.
toeic.example_zh: 成長回饋以追溯性降價獎勵年對年的數量成長。

toeic.example_en: Regulators scrutinize loyalty rebates that could exclude smaller competitors from the market.
toeic.example_zh: 監管機關對可能將較小競爭者排除於市場外的忠誠回饋進行嚴格審查。

toeic.example_en: Spot purchase decisions handle urgent gaps that contracted suppliers cannot cover quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 現貨採購決策處理約定供應商無法迅速補足的緊急缺口。

toeic.example_en: Open-market purchase allows the buyer to capture short-lived price drops on standard goods.
toeic.example_zh: 公開市場採購讓買方能搶到標準商品上短暫的價格下跌機會。

toeic.example_en: A lot strategy splits the requirement into bundles to attract more targeted bidders.
toeic.example_zh: 分標策略將需求拆分為多個包件以吸引更具針對性的投標者。

toeic.example_en: A package bid covers multiple lots with a single discounted aggregate price.
toeic.example_zh: 整包投標以單一折扣後的整體價格涵蓋多個分標包件。

toeic.example_en: Cherry-picking risk arises when bidders price only the most profitable lots aggressively.
toeic.example_zh: 當投標者僅對最有利可圖的分標激進報價時，便產生挑選風險。

toeic.example_en: Bundle pricing rewards buyers who commit to a wider portfolio of products and services.
toeic.example_zh: 套裝定價獎勵承諾採購更廣泛產品與服務組合的買方。

toeic.example_en: The tendering authority publishes all award notices on its dedicated procurement portal.
toeic.example_zh: 招標機關於其專屬採購入口網站公布所有得標公告。

toeic.example_en: Each procurement notice summarizes scope, schedule, and qualification expectations for bidders.
toeic.example_zh: 每則採購公告概述投標者應符合的範圍、時程與資格要件。

toeic.example_en: A prior information notice signals market interest before formal tender documents are released.
toeic.example_zh: 預先資訊公告在正式招標文件發布前先傳遞市場興趣。

toeic.example_en: The shortlist memorandum records why each finalist advanced beyond the initial screening.
toeic.example_zh: 入圍備忘錄記錄每位入圍者通過初步篩選的原因。

toeic.example_en: The evaluation report documents scoring, rationale, and any conflict-of-interest declarations.
toeic.example_zh: 評選報告記錄評分、理由及任何利益衝突聲明。

toeic.example_en: A regret letter thanks the bidder and explains the broad reason for not advancing.
toeic.example_zh: 婉拒信向投標者致謝並概括說明未獲推進的原因。

toeic.example_en: The award memorandum is filed internally to justify the procurement decision.
toeic.example_zh: 得標備忘錄內部存檔以說明採購決策的合理性。

toeic.example_en: Contract execution should occur within ten business days of the award decision.
toeic.example_zh: 合約簽署應於得標決定後十個工作日內完成。

toeic.example_en: Confirm the signing authority limit before circulating the contract for execution.
toeic.example_zh: 在將合約傳遞簽署前，請確認簽署權限上限。

toeic.example_en: Our delegation of procurement authority matrix matches spend thresholds to approval roles.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的採購權限授權矩陣將支出門檻對應至核准角色。

toeic.example_en: Every employee involved in purchasing must complete annual procurement policy training.
toeic.example_zh: 每位參與採購的員工每年皆須完成採購政策訓練。

toeic.example_en: The purchase requisition workflow routes high-value requests through legal and risk approvers.
toeic.example_zh: 採購申請流程將高金額請求路由至法務與風險審核者。

toeic.example_en: The goods received note confirms quantity and condition at the moment of delivery.
toeic.example_zh: 收貨單於交貨當下確認數量與貨況。

toeic.example_en: Automated invoice approval reduces processing time for compliant vendor submissions.
toeic.example_zh: 自動化發票核准可縮短合規供應商發票的處理時間。

toeic.example_en: Send the purchase order acknowledgment within forty-eight hours of receipt to confirm terms.
toeic.example_zh: 請於收件後四十八小時內寄出採購訂單確認，以確認條款。

toeic.example_en: Identify the buyer of record on every export document for customs purposes.
toeic.example_zh: 請於每份出口文件上註明登錄買方以利海關作業。

toeic.example_en: Clean vendor master data reduces duplicate payments and improves spend analytics accuracy.
toeic.example_zh: 潔淨的供應商主檔資料可減少重複付款並提升支出分析準確度。

toeic.example_en: A duplicate vendor record often hides invoices that bypass negotiated contract pricing.
toeic.example_zh: 重複供應商紀錄常隱藏繞過議定合約價格的發票。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly data cleansing removes stale records and standardizes supplier address formats.
toeic.example_zh: 每季資料清理可移除過舊紀錄並統一供應商地址格式。

toeic.example_en: A consistent category taxonomy lets executives compare spend across regions and business units.
toeic.example_zh: 一致的品類分類體系讓高階主管能跨區域與業務單位比較支出。

toeic.example_en: Each line item carries a commodity code used for tariff and spend reporting.
toeic.example_zh: 每個項目都附有用於關稅與支出報告的商品分類碼。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 聯合國標準產品與服務代碼
toeic.example_en: We tag all suppliers with UNSPSC codes to support global category analysis.
toeic.example_zh: 我們以聯合國標準產品與服務代碼標註所有供應商以支援全球品類分析。

toeic.example_en: Procurement maturity assessments highlight gaps between current and target operating models.
toeic.example_zh: 採購成熟度評估凸顯目前與目標營運模式之間的差距。

toeic.example_en: A healthy savings pipeline reflects deals in negotiation as well as ratified results.
toeic.example_zh: 健康的節省管線反映談判中與已確認的成果。

toeic.example_en: Suppliers compete on value-added services like onsite engineering and training credits.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商以現場工程與訓練點數等加值服務相互競爭。

toeic.example_en: The e-procurement platform integrates requisitions, sourcing, and invoicing within one workflow.
toeic.example_zh: 電子採購平台將申請、尋源與發票整合於單一流程中。

toeic.example_en: Our contract management system tracks renewal dates and key obligations automatically.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的合約管理系統自動追蹤續約日期與關鍵義務。

toeic.example_en: Quick contract repository search helps lawyers find precedent clauses across past agreements.
toeic.example_zh: 快速的合約資料庫搜尋讓律師能在過去協議中找到先例條款。

toeic.example_en: Negotiators reference the playbook clause when proposing fallback positions to suppliers.
toeic.example_zh: 談判人員在向供應商提出讓步立場時參考範本條款。

toeic.example_en: Define a fallback position for each major term before entering the negotiation room.
toeic.example_zh: 在進入談判室前，請為每項主要條款界定退讓立場。

toeic.example_en: Knowing the walkaway point prevents negotiators from agreeing to unfavorable concessions.
toeic.example_zh: 了解離桌點可避免談判人員同意不利的讓步。

toeic.example_en: Plan a concession ladder that gives away smaller items before larger commercial points.
toeic.example_zh: 請規劃一個先讓步較小事項再讓步較大商業重點的讓步階梯。

toeic.example_en: Term sheet alignment ensures both parties understand commercial intent before drafting begins.
toeic.example_zh: 條款書一致性確保雙方在開始草擬前皆了解商業意圖。

toeic.example_en: The parent company issued a letter of comfort to reassure the buyer about subsidiary obligations.
toeic.example_zh: 母公司出具安慰函以使買方安心於子公司之義務履行。

toeic.example_en: A parent guarantee backs the smaller subsidiary's financial obligations under the contract.
toeic.example_zh: 母公司保證為較小子公司在合約下的財務義務提供後盾。

toeic.example_en: Submit an insurance certificate showing coverage limits before site work commences.
toeic.example_zh: 請於現場工作開始前提交載明承保上限的保險證明書。

toeic.example_en: List the buyer as additional insured on the contractor's liability policy.
toeic.example_zh: 請將買方列為承包商責任保單上的附加被保險人。

toeic.example_en: Consultants must carry professional indemnity insurance covering at least project value.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問必須投保至少涵蓋專案金額的專業責任保險。

toeic.example_en: Cyber liability coverage protects against losses tied to a vendor data breach.
toeic.example_zh: 網路責任保險可保障因供應商資料外洩而生的損失。

toeic.example_en: The vendor performance index drives renewal decisions and incentive payment calculations.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商績效指數驅動續約決策與獎金支付計算。

toeic.example_en: Each contract sets a continuous improvement target of two percent annual cost reduction.
toeic.example_zh: 每份合約設定每年成本降低百分之二的持續改善目標。

toeic.example_en: A shared savings model splits realized cost reductions equally between buyer and supplier.
toeic.example_zh: 共享節省模型將實現的成本降低於買方與供應商之間平均分配。

toeic.example_en: A gainshare arrangement aligns supplier incentives with the buyer's productivity goals.
toeic.example_zh: 共享收益安排將供應商的誘因與買方生產力目標對齊。

toeic.example_en: An outcome-based contract pays for measurable business results rather than activity hours.
toeic.example_zh: 成果導向合約按可衡量的業務成果而非工時付費。

toeic.example_en: A managed service engagement transfers full operational responsibility to the chosen vendor.
toeic.example_zh: 託管服務合作將完整營運責任移轉給選定的供應商。

toeic.example_en: Staff augmentation fills temporary capability gaps without long-term headcount commitments.
toeic.example_zh: 人力擴增可彌補暫時性的能力缺口而不需長期人力承諾。

toeic.example_en: Managed capacity bundles staff augmentation with delivery accountability under a single price.
toeic.example_zh: 託管產能將人力擴增與交付責任以單一價格組合提供。

toeic.example_en: The ramp-down clause lets the buyer reduce committed volumes with sixty days notice.
toeic.example_zh: 縮減條款讓買方可於六十天通知後減少承諾數量。

toeic.example_en: A ramp-up commitment obligates the supplier to scale resources within fixed time windows.
toeic.example_zh: 擴張承諾要求供應商於固定時程內擴大資源規模。

toeic.example_en: Capacity reservation fees secure priority access during industry-wide supply shortages.
toeic.example_zh: 產能預留費可在業界普遍缺料時取得優先供應權。

toeic.example_en: When supply is tight, the allocation policy decides which customers are prioritized first.
toeic.example_zh: 當供應緊張時，分配政策決定哪些客戶可優先獲得。

toeic.example_en: Each strategic supplier provides its latest business continuity plan during onboarding.
toeic.example_zh: 每位策略供應商於導入時提供最新的業務持續計畫。

toeic.example_en: The supplier operates a secondary site able to take over within twenty-four hours.
toeic.example_zh: 該供應商營運一個可於二十四小時內接手的備援場地。

toeic.example_en: Joint disaster recovery drills validate that contingency plans actually work end to end.
toeic.example_zh: 聯合的災難復原演練驗證應變計畫能完整端對端運作。

toeic.example_en: A tabletop simulation walks stakeholders through hypothetical supply disruption scenarios.
toeic.example_zh: 桌上模擬演練帶領利害關係人推演假設的供應中斷情境。

toeic.example_en: Continuous vendor health monitoring uses external data feeds to catch early warning signals.
toeic.example_zh: 持續的供應商健康監控利用外部資料來源捕捉早期警訊。

toeic.example_en: A watchlist alert flagged the vendor after rating agencies cut its credit grade.
toeic.example_zh: 在評等機構下調該供應商信用等級後，觀察名單警示已標示該家。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 制裁名單篩查工具
toeic.example_en: Our sanctions screening tool checks each new supplier against multiple international lists.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的制裁名單篩查工具會將每家新供應商比對多份國際名單。

toeic.example_en: Beneficial ownership disclosure helps detect shell companies hiding behind multiple legal layers.
toeic.example_zh: 實質受益人揭露有助於辨識藏身於多層法律結構之後的空殼公司。

toeic.example_en: Identify the ultimate beneficial owner before signing any high-value supplier agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 請於簽署任何高額供應商協議前辨識最終受益人。

toeic.example_en: Engaging a controversial vendor exposes the company to material reputational risk.
toeic.example_zh: 與具爭議的供應商合作會使公司面臨重大聲譽風險。

toeic.example_en: Annual ethical sourcing audits verify working conditions across the entire supply tier.
toeic.example_zh: 每年的道德採購稽核驗證整個供應鏈各層級的勞動條件。

toeic.example_en: The labor practice review confirmed compliant working hours and lawful overtime payments.
toeic.example_zh: 勞動實踐審查確認合規的工時與合法的加班費支付。

toeic.example_en: A human rights clause obligates suppliers to prohibit forced labor across their operations.
toeic.example_zh: 人權條款要求供應商在其營運中全面禁止強迫勞動。

toeic.example_en: Our supplier development program funds training and tooling for promising small vendors.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的供應商培育計畫為有潛力的小型供應商提供訓練與工具經費。

toeic.example_en: Capability assessment determines whether a vendor can scale to support our growth plans.
toeic.example_zh: 能力評估判斷供應商是否能擴大規模以支援我們的成長計畫。

toeic.example_en: A quality clause defines acceptance criteria, sampling rules, and rejection rights.
toeic.example_zh: 品質條款界定驗收標準、抽樣規則與退貨權利。

toeic.example_en: A service-level breach triggers automatic credits in the next monthly invoice.
toeic.example_zh: 服務水準違約會於下個月的發票自動觸發扣抵。

toeic.example_en: During the change freeze period only emergency fixes may be deployed to production.
toeic.example_zh: 在變更凍結期內僅允許將緊急修正部署至生產環境。

toeic.example_en: The production readiness review confirms operations teams are prepared to support the new system.
toeic.example_zh: 上線就緒檢視確認營運團隊已準備好支援新系統。

toeic.example_en: The lessons learned register informs future RFP templates and standard contract terms.
toeic.example_zh: 經驗教訓登錄為日後的招標範本與標準合約條款提供依據。

toeic.example_en: The investment bank identified three potential acquisition targets in the renewable energy sector for the client.
toeic.example_zh: 投資銀行為客戶找出再生能源領域三家潛在的收購標的公司。

toeic.example_en: The buyer insisted on a fifteen percent holdback to cover any post-closing indemnification claims.
toeic.example_zh: 買方堅持保留百分之十五的款項以支應交割後的賠償請求。

toeic.example_en: Successful post-merger integration depends on aligning corporate cultures and retaining key talent during transition.
toeic.example_zh: 成功的併購後整合取決於整合企業文化並在過渡期留住核心人才。

toeic.example_en: The two software companies announced a stock-for-stock deal valued at nearly four billion dollars yesterday.
toeic.example_zh: 兩家軟體公司昨日宣布一項價值近四十億美元的換股交易。

toeic.example_en: Shareholders will receive cash consideration of forty-five dollars per share upon closing of the transaction.
toeic.example_zh: 股東於交易交割時將獲得每股四十五美元的現金對價。

toeic.example_en: The deal mixes cash and stock consideration, with target shareholders receiving roughly two acquirer shares each.
toeic.example_zh: 本交易混合現金與股票對價，標的股東每人約獲得兩股收購方股份。

toeic.example_en: Mixed consideration structures allow buyers to manage leverage while giving sellers participation in future upside.
toeic.example_zh: 混合對價結構讓買方控管槓桿，同時讓賣方分享未來上漲利益。

toeic.example_en: Under the fixed exchange ratio, each target share converts into exactly 0.85 acquirer shares at closing.
toeic.example_zh: 依固定換股比例，每股標的股份於交割時確切換得0.85股收購方股份。

toeic.example_en: A floating exchange ratio protects sellers from price drops in the acquirer's stock before closing.
toeic.example_zh: 浮動換股比例可保護賣方免受交割前收購方股價下跌的影響。

toeic.example_en: The collar mechanism caps the deal value if the acquirer's share price moves outside a defined range.
toeic.example_zh: 區間調整機制會在收購方股價偏離設定區間時限制交易價值。

toeic.example_en: A rival private equity firm submitted a topping bid that exceeded the original offer by twelve percent.
toeic.example_zh: 競爭的私募股權公司提出比原始報價高出百分之十二的加價競標。

toeic.example_en: The merger agreement grants the original bidder a matching right to counter any superior third-party proposal.
toeic.example_zh: 併購協議授予原競標方配對權，可比照任何第三方更優提案進行還價。

toeic.example_en: The board may accept a superior proposal only after notifying the existing bidder and observing the waiting period.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會須先通知現有競標方並遵守等待期後，方可接受更優方案。

toeic.example_en: The transaction remains subject to antitrust clearance from competition authorities in the United States and Europe.
toeic.example_zh: 本交易仍須取得美國與歐洲競爭主管機關的反壟斷核准。

toeic.example_en: Both parties completed their HSR filing last week, starting the mandatory thirty-day review period.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方上週完成HSR反壟斷申報，啟動為期三十天的強制審查期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 第二次資料補件要求
toeic.example_en: Regulators issued a second request for additional information, extending the review timeline by several months.
toeic.example_zh: 監管機關發出第二次資料補件要求，使審查時程延長數月。

toeic.example_en: The merging parties proposed a remedy package including the divestiture of overlapping retail operations in three regions.
toeic.example_zh: 合併雙方提出補救方案，包括出售三個地區重疊的零售業務。

toeic.example_en: A hell-or-high-water clause forces the buyer to accept any divestiture required to obtain regulatory approval.
toeic.example_zh: 無條件履約條款迫使買方接受取得監管核准所需的任何資產出售。

toeic.example_en: The seller has a best-efforts obligation to assist in obtaining all required third-party consents before closing.
toeic.example_zh: 賣方負有盡力義務，須協助於交割前取得所有必要的第三方同意。

toeic.example_en: The drag-along right enables majority shareholders to force minority holders to join the sale on identical terms.
toeic.example_zh: 強制隨售權使多數股東得以相同條件強迫少數股東一同參與出售。

toeic.example_en: Minority investors exercised their tag-along right and sold their shares alongside the controlling shareholder.
toeic.example_zh: 少數投資人行使共售權，與控股股東一同出售持股。

toeic.example_en: Before approaching outside buyers, the selling shareholder must give the partner a right of first offer.
toeic.example_zh: 出售股東在接觸外部買方前，須先給予合作夥伴優先報價權。

toeic.example_en: Existing investors used their preemptive right to maintain their ownership percentage in the new financing round.
toeic.example_zh: 現有投資人運用優先認購權，在新一輪融資中維持其持股比例。

toeic.example_en: Series B investors received anti-dilution protection that adjusts their conversion ratio if future rounds price lower.
toeic.example_zh: B輪投資人獲得反稀釋保護，若後續融資定價較低，其轉換比例將調整。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 加權平均反稀釋條款
toeic.example_en: Most modern term sheets use a weighted-average ratchet rather than a punitive full ratchet provision.
toeic.example_zh: 現代條款書多採加權平均反稀釋條款，而非懲罰性的完全反稀釋條款。

toeic.example_en: A full ratchet adjusts prior investors' conversion price to match any lower price in subsequent financings.
toeic.example_zh: 完全反稀釋條款會將先前投資人的轉換價格調整為後續融資的較低價格。

toeic.example_en: Series C holders enjoy a one-times liquidation preference that pays out before any common stock distribution.
toeic.example_zh: C輪持有人享有一倍清算優先權，於普通股分配前優先獲得清算款。

toeic.example_en: Participating preferred shares receive their preference and then share in remaining proceeds as if converted to common.
toeic.example_zh: 參與式優先股先取得優先金額，再如同轉換為普通股般分享剩餘款項。

toeic.example_en: Non-participating preferred holders must choose between their liquidation preference and converting to common stock.
toeic.example_zh: 非參與式優先股持有人必須在清算優先權與轉換為普通股之間擇一。

toeic.example_en: The fund offers limited partners an eight percent preferred return before the manager earns carried interest.
toeic.example_zh: 基金提供有限合夥人百分之八的優先報酬，之後管理人才能賺取附帶權益。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 附帶權益；績效分紅
toeic.example_en: The general partner receives carried interest equal to twenty percent of profits above the hurdle rate.
toeic.example_zh: 普通合夥人獲得超過門檻報酬部分百分之二十利潤的附帶權益。

toeic.example_en: The fund's waterfall distribution allocates returns sequentially among different classes of investors based on priority.
toeic.example_zh: 基金的瀑布式分配依優先順序在不同投資人級別間順次分配報酬。

toeic.example_en: After investors receive their preferred return, a catch-up provision allows the manager to receive accelerated profit share.
toeic.example_zh: 投資人取得優先報酬後，追補條款允許管理人獲得加速利潤分成。

toeic.example_en: The clawback provision requires managers to return excess carried interest if later investments underperform.
toeic.example_zh: 追回條款要求管理人於後期投資表現不佳時退回多領的附帶權益。

toeic.example_en: The hedge fund charges performance fees only when returns exceed the previous high water mark.
toeic.example_zh: 避險基金僅在報酬超過前次高水位線時才收取績效費。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 待投資金；可動用資金
toeic.example_en: Private equity firms are sitting on record dry powder, eager to deploy capital into attractive deals.
toeic.example_zh: 私募股權公司握有創紀錄的待投資金，急於將資本投入具吸引力的交易。

toeic.example_en: The general partner issued a capital call requiring investors to fund their commitments within fifteen business days.
toeic.example_zh: 普通合夥人發出出資通知，要求投資人在十五個營業日內履行其出資承諾。

toeic.example_en: The new fund closed with two billion dollars of committed capital from institutional investors worldwide.
toeic.example_zh: 新基金募集完成，獲得全球機構投資人二十億美元的已承諾資本。

toeic.example_en: The fund still has substantial uncalled capital available for follow-on investments in portfolio companies.
toeic.example_zh: 基金仍有大量未動用資本可用於投資組合公司的後續投資。

toeic.example_en: Investors compare returns across funds of the same fund vintage to assess relative manager performance.
toeic.example_zh: 投資人比較相同基金年份的報酬，以評估管理人的相對績效。

toeic.example_en: Funds with a 2009 vintage year delivered exceptional returns thanks to attractive entry valuations.
toeic.example_zh: 設立年份為2009年的基金因進場估值具吸引力而創造了優異報酬。

toeic.example_en: The general partner launched the fundraising cycle for its fifth fund with a five-billion-dollar target.
toeic.example_zh: 普通合夥人啟動第五號基金的募資週期，目標為五十億美元。

toeic.example_en: Securing a sovereign wealth fund as anchor investor gave momentum to the entire fundraising effort.
toeic.example_zh: 成功取得主權財富基金作為基石投資人，為整體募資工作注入動能。

toeic.example_en: Large limited partners often request co-investment opportunities alongside the fund to reduce blended fees.
toeic.example_zh: 大型有限合夥人經常要求與基金一同進行共同投資以降低混合費率。

toeic.example_en: A reputable venture firm agreed to act as lead investor in the company's twenty-million-dollar Series A.
toeic.example_zh: 一家知名創投公司同意擔任該公司兩千萬美元A輪融資的領投人。

toeic.example_en: Existing backers participated heavily in the follow-on round to maintain their pro-rata ownership stake.
toeic.example_zh: 現有投資人大舉參與後續融資輪以維持其按比例的持股。

toeic.example_en: The startup raised bridge financing to extend its runway until the planned Series C closing next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 該新創公司取得過橋融資，以延長現金跑道直至下季預定的C輪交割。

toeic.example_en: Early investors funded the company through a convertible note that converts at the next priced round.
toeic.example_zh: 早期投資人透過可轉換票據投資該公司，將於下一輪定價融資時轉換。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 未來股權簡單協議
toeic.example_en: A SAFE agreement lets founders raise capital quickly without negotiating a formal valuation upfront.
toeic.example_zh: 未來股權簡單協議讓創辦人能快速募資，無須事先協商正式估值。

toeic.example_en: Investors negotiated a valuation cap of fifty million dollars to protect their conversion economics.
toeic.example_zh: 投資人協商設定五千萬美元的估值上限以保障其轉換時的經濟條件。

toeic.example_en: The convertible includes a twenty-percent discount rate provision relative to the next equity round's price.
toeic.example_zh: 該可轉債包含相對下一輪股權融資價格百分之二十的折扣率條款。

toeic.example_en: Facing weak demand, the company closed a down round at half of its previous unicorn valuation.
toeic.example_zh: 因需求疲弱，該公司以前次獨角獸估值的一半完成了下行融資輪。

toeic.example_en: Strong revenue growth allowed the company to raise an up round at triple its prior valuation.
toeic.example_zh: 強勁的營收成長使該公司能以前次估值三倍的價格完成上行融資輪。

toeic.example_en: Early employees gained liquidity through a secondary sale of their vested shares to incoming investors.
toeic.example_zh: 早期員工透過將已歸屬股份的老股出售給新進投資人而取得流動性。

toeic.example_en: The company organized a tender offer process allowing employees to sell up to twenty percent of their holdings.
toeic.example_zh: 公司舉辦公開收購程序，允許員工出售其持股最多百分之二十。

toeic.example_en: The growth equity firm made a minority investment of thirty percent without seeking board control.
toeic.example_zh: 該成長型股權公司進行百分之三十的少數股權投資，未尋求董事會控制權。

toeic.example_en: The acquirer purchased a controlling stake of fifty-one percent while leaving founders with operational autonomy.
toeic.example_zh: 收購方購入百分之五十一的控股股權，同時保留創辦人的營運自主權。

toeic.example_en: The buyout transaction valued the consumer goods company at twelve times its trailing EBITDA.
toeic.example_zh: 該槓桿收購交易將這家消費品公司估值為其過去十二倍EBITDA。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 俱樂部交易；聯合收購
toeic.example_en: Three private equity firms formed a club deal to pool resources for the eight-billion-dollar acquisition.
toeic.example_zh: 三家私募股權公司組成俱樂部交易，集結資源進行八十億美元的收購。

toeic.example_en: The senior team led a management buyout supported by a leading private equity fund.
toeic.example_zh: 資深管理團隊在頂尖私募股權基金支持下主導了管理層收購。

toeic.example_en: In a management buy-in, external executives acquire and operate the target company after closing.
toeic.example_zh: 在管理層購入交易中，外部高管於交割後收購並經營標的公司。

toeic.example_en: The investment exited via a secondary buyout to another private equity sponsor for one billion dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 該投資以十億美元透過次級收購方式出售予另一家私募股權業者。

toeic.example_en: Management ran a dual-track process exploring both a public listing and a sale to strategic buyers.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層執行雙軌處置程序，同時評估公開上市與出售給策略買家。

toeic.example_en: Sponsors ultimately chose a trade sale to a strategic acquirer over a more uncertain public offering.
toeic.example_zh: 投資方最終選擇出售給策略買家的同業交易，而非較不確定的公開發行。

toeic.example_en: A strategic buyer is willing to pay a higher price because of expected operational synergies.
toeic.example_zh: 策略買家因預期可獲得營運綜效，願意支付較高的價格。

toeic.example_en: A financial buyer such as a private equity firm targets returns rather than long-term operational fit.
toeic.example_zh: 私募股權公司等財務買家追求投資回報，而非長期營運契合度。

toeic.example_en: Bankers ran a competitive auction process with twelve potential bidders to maximize value for shareholders.
toeic.example_zh: 投資銀行家以十二家潛在競標者進行競標出售程序，以為股東創造最大價值。

toeic.example_en: The seller opted for a limited auction with just five preferred bidders to preserve confidentiality.
toeic.example_zh: 賣方選擇僅限五家優選競標者的限制性競標以保護機密性。

toeic.example_en: A broad auction invites dozens of strategic and financial buyers to maximize price tension.
toeic.example_zh: 廣泛競標邀請數十家策略與財務買家參與，以最大化價格競爭張力。

toeic.example_en: The board pursued a negotiated transaction with a single preferred partner instead of an open process.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會選擇與單一優先合作夥伴進行協商交易，而非公開程序。

toeic.example_en: The go-shop provision lets the target solicit competing offers for thirty days after signing.
toeic.example_zh: 主動詢價條款允許標的方在簽約後三十天內招攬競爭報價。

toeic.example_en: A standard no-shop covenant prohibits the target from soliciting alternative buyers during the deal period.
toeic.example_zh: 標準的禁止招攬約定禁止標的方在交易期間招攬替代買家。

toeic.example_en: Both sides signed a standstill agreement preventing hostile share purchases during friendly negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方簽署中止行動協議，禁止在友善協商期間進行敵意收購。

toeic.example_en: The advisor distributed a process letter explaining bid deadlines, formats, and required diligence information to participants.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問發送流程函，向參與者說明競標期限、格式及所需的盡職調查資訊。

toeic.example_en: The teaser document provided a one-page anonymous summary to gauge initial interest from prospective buyers.
toeic.example_zh: 預備介紹文件以一頁匿名摘要評估潛在買家的初步興趣。

toeic.example_en: Selected bidders received a confidential information memorandum after signing a non-disclosure agreement with the seller.
toeic.example_zh: 獲選的競標者在與賣方簽署保密協議後收到機密資訊備忘錄。

toeic.example_en: Bidders submitted a non-binding indication of interest with their preliminary valuation range and proposed deal structure.
toeic.example_zh: 競標者遞交無拘束力的意向書，附上初步估值範圍與擬議的交易結構。

toeic.example_en: The non-binding offer provided a price range subject to satisfactory completion of confirmatory due diligence.
toeic.example_zh: 該無拘束力報價提供一個價格範圍，須以確認性盡職調查滿意完成為條件。

toeic.example_en: Final binding bids were due last Friday along with markups of the draft purchase agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 最終具拘束力報價於上週五截止，並須附上股權收購協議草案的修訂版。

toeic.example_en: The sell-side bank offered stapled financing to encourage bidders to submit aggressive offers quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 賣方銀行提供附帶融資以鼓勵競標者快速提出積極報價。

toeic.example_en: The buyer secured a debt financing commitment of three billion dollars from a syndicate of banks.
toeic.example_zh: 買方自銀行團取得三十億美元的債務融資承諾。

toeic.example_en: The sponsor delivered an equity commitment letter pledging up to one billion dollars of cash equity.
toeic.example_zh: 投資方提交股權出資承諾函，承諾最高出資十億美元現金股權。

toeic.example_en: The fund provided a limited guarantee covering specific obligations of its acquisition subsidiary at closing.
toeic.example_zh: 基金提供有限保證，涵蓋其收購子公司於交割時的特定義務。

toeic.example_en: Public company deals typically exclude a financing condition so sellers face minimal completion risk.
toeic.example_zh: 上市公司交易通常不含融資條件，使賣方面臨最小的交割風險。

toeic.example_en: The merger agreement provides a twenty business day marketing period for the buyer to syndicate debt.
toeic.example_zh: 併購協議提供二十個營業日的行銷期供買方進行債務聯貸。

toeic.example_en: The signing-to-closing period spans roughly six months while regulatory approvals are obtained.
toeic.example_zh: 簽約至交割期間約為六個月，期間將取得監管核准。

toeic.example_en: Each closing condition must be satisfied or waived before either party is obligated to complete the deal.
toeic.example_zh: 每項交割條件均須滿足或被豁免，雙方才有義務完成交易。

toeic.example_en: At closing, each party delivers a bring-down certificate confirming representations remain accurate as of that date.
toeic.example_zh: 交割時各方須提交重申確認書，確認聲明於交割日仍屬正確。

toeic.example_en: The buyer may terminate the agreement if a material adverse effect occurs before closing.
toeic.example_zh: 若交割前發生重大不利影響，買方得終止協議。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 維持常規營運約定
toeic.example_en: The target must run the business under an ordinary course covenant between signing and closing.
toeic.example_zh: 標的方須依維持常規營運約定於簽約至交割期間經營業務。

toeic.example_en: Interim operating covenants restrict the target from major capital expenditures without the buyer's prior consent.
toeic.example_zh: 過渡期營運約定限制標的方未經買方事先同意不得進行重大資本支出。

toeic.example_en: The regulatory covenant obligates the buyer to use reasonable efforts to obtain antitrust approval promptly.
toeic.example_zh: 監管合規約定要求買方須盡合理努力儘速取得反壟斷核准。

toeic.example_en: Claims must exceed the indemnification basket of one million dollars before the seller is required to pay.
toeic.example_zh: 求償金額須超過一百萬美元的賠償門檻，賣方才須支付。

toeic.example_en: Fundamental representations covering ownership and authority typically survive indefinitely or for an extended period.
toeic.example_zh: 涉及所有權與授權的基本性聲明，通常無限期或長期存續。

toeic.example_en: The agreement included a specific indemnity for the pending tax audit that emerged during due diligence.
toeic.example_zh: 協議納入針對盡職調查中發現之未決稅務查核的特別賠償。

toeic.example_en: The retention amount under the policy is one percent of enterprise value before insurance coverage attaches.
toeic.example_zh: 保單下的自留額為企業價值的百分之一，超過後保險始予承保。

toeic.example_en: The purchase price adjustment reconciles estimated working capital against actual figures determined after closing.
toeic.example_zh: 收購價格調整以交割後實際數字對沖估計營運資金的差異。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 淨營運資金目標值
toeic.example_en: Buyer and seller negotiated a net working capital target equal to the trailing twelve-month average.
toeic.example_zh: 買賣雙方協商以過去十二個月平均值作為淨營運資金目標值。

toeic.example_en: European deals often use a locked-box mechanism that fixes the price as of a historical reference date.
toeic.example_zh: 歐洲交易常使用鎖箱機制，將價格鎖定於歷史參考日。

toeic.example_en: Completion accounts prepared after closing determine the final purchase price adjustment between buyer and seller.
toeic.example_zh: 交割後編製的交割帳目決定買賣雙方間最終的收購價格調整。

toeic.example_en: The leakage clause prohibits any value transfer to sellers between the locked-box date and closing.
toeic.example_zh: 資金外流條款禁止鎖箱日至交割日間任何向賣方的價值移轉。

toeic.example_en: Permitted leakage includes ordinary course payroll, declared dividends, and routine intercompany transactions specifically listed.
toeic.example_zh: 允許資金外流包括正常薪資、已宣告股利及明確列出的常規關係企業交易。

toeic.example_en: The earnout structure pays sellers additional consideration based on revenue growth over the next three years.
toeic.example_zh: 業績對賭結構依未來三年營收成長支付賣方額外對價。

toeic.example_en: A milestone-based earnout rewards the sellers when specific product or regulatory targets are met after closing.
toeic.example_zh: 里程碑式對賭於交割後達成特定產品或監管目標時獎勵賣方。

toeic.example_en: Performance-based consideration aligns seller incentives with buyer interests during the post-closing transition.
toeic.example_zh: 績效對價使賣方誘因與買方利益在交割後過渡期間保持一致。

toeic.example_en: Management retained twenty percent rollover equity to remain aligned with the new private equity owner.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層保留百分之二十的滾存股權，以與新私募股權股東利益一致。

toeic.example_en: Founders agreed to reinvestment of half of their proceeds into the acquirer's continuing equity structure.
toeic.example_zh: 創辦人同意將其收益的一半再投資進入收購方持續存在的股權結構中。

toeic.example_en: A new management equity plan reserves ten percent of post-closing shares for key executives.
toeic.example_zh: 新的管理層持股計畫為主要高管保留交割後百分之十的股份。

toeic.example_en: Phantom equity awards mirror stock value without actual share ownership, simplifying tax and governance.
toeic.example_zh: 虛擬股權獎勵反映股票價值但不實際持股，簡化稅務與治理。

toeic.example_en: Some buyers use synthetic equity to compensate retained managers in jurisdictions with complex share-grant rules.
toeic.example_zh: 在股份授予規則複雜的司法管轄區，部分買方以合成股權獎勵留任的管理人員。

toeic.example_en: Bankers presented a synergy estimate of two hundred million dollars in annual run-rate cost savings.
toeic.example_zh: 投資銀行家提出每年達兩億美元成本節省的綜效估計。

toeic.example_en: Cost synergy projections focused on overlapping back-office functions, real estate, and procurement efficiencies after the merger.
toeic.example_zh: 成本綜效預估著重於合併後重複的後勤功能、不動產及採購效率。

toeic.example_en: Revenue synergy from cross-selling will take several years to materialize and is harder to quantify.
toeic.example_zh: 交叉銷售帶來的營收綜效需要數年才能實現，且較難量化。

toeic.example_en: Dis-synergy from customer overlap reduced the gross synergy estimate by roughly fifteen percent.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶重疊產生的反綜效將總綜效估計約降低百分之十五。

toeic.example_en: Effective integration management is essential to prevent value leakage in the months following deal close.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的整合管理對於防止交易完成後數月內的價值流失至關重要。

toeic.example_en: The deal rationale focused on geographic expansion into Asia and broadening the combined product portfolio.
toeic.example_zh: 本交易理由著重於拓展至亞洲市場並擴大合併後的產品組合。

toeic.example_en: Analysts highlighted the strong strategic fit between the two companies' complementary technology stacks and customer bases.
toeic.example_zh: 分析師強調兩家公司互補技術堆疊與客戶基礎間強烈的策略契合度。

toeic.example_en: The fund made a platform investment in the healthcare services company to pursue further bolt-on acquisitions.
toeic.example_zh: 基金對該醫療服務公司進行平台型投資，以追求後續的補強型收購。

toeic.example_en: Three bolt-on acquisitions doubled the platform's revenue and expanded its presence into three new states.
toeic.example_zh: 三項補強型收購使該平台公司營收倍增，並將業務拓展至三個新州。

toeic.example_en: A roll-up strategy consolidates fragmented industries by acquiring numerous small competitors under one management team.
toeic.example_zh: 整合併購策略透過收購眾多小型競爭者於同一管理團隊下整合分散的產業。

toeic.example_en: This consolidation play targets the fragmented commercial pest control market across the Midwest region.
toeic.example_zh: 此整合性投資鎖定中西部地區分散的商業害蟲防治市場。

toeic.example_en: Private equity firms favor a buy-and-build strategy to expand platforms through multiple smaller add-on deals.
toeic.example_zh: 私募股權公司偏好以多項較小的附加交易擴張平台的收購擴張策略。

toeic.example_en: The vertical integration deal gives the manufacturer direct control over its critical upstream component supply.
toeic.example_zh: 該垂直整合交易讓製造商直接掌控其關鍵的上游零組件供應。

toeic.example_en: Horizontal integration with the closest competitor created industry-leading scale but attracted intense regulatory scrutiny.
toeic.example_zh: 與最接近的競爭對手進行水平整合創造了業界領先的規模，但引來嚴格的監管審查。

toeic.example_en: A conglomerate merger combines companies in unrelated industries to diversify revenue streams and operational risks.
toeic.example_zh: 混合併購結合不相關產業的公司以分散營收來源與營運風險。

toeic.example_en: Cross-border deals require careful navigation of foreign investment review and currency repatriation considerations.
toeic.example_zh: 跨境交易需謹慎處理外國投資審查與貨幣匯回的相關考量。

toeic.example_en: Inbound investment from Asian acquirers has accelerated despite tighter national security screening requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 儘管國家安全審查要求趨嚴，來自亞洲收購方的外資進入投資仍加速進行。

toeic.example_en: European multinationals are pursuing outbound acquisition targets in North America to strengthen technology capabilities.
toeic.example_zh: 歐洲跨國公司正在北美尋找對外收購標的以強化技術能力。

toeic.example_en: Foreign acquirers of US technology assets often submit a voluntary CFIUS filing to manage regulatory risk.
toeic.example_zh: 美國技術資產的外國收購方常主動進行CFIUS申報以管理監管風險。

toeic.example_en: Many countries have introduced foreign investment screening regimes to protect strategically important domestic industries.
toeic.example_zh: 許多國家已建立外國投資審查制度以保護具策略重要性的本國產業。

toeic.example_en: Merger control filings in fifteen jurisdictions extended the regulatory timeline for the global transaction.
toeic.example_zh: 於十五個司法管轄區的併購管制申報，延長了該全球交易的監管時程。

toeic.example_en: The European Commission cleared the deal during phase one review without requiring any divestitures.
toeic.example_zh: 歐盟委員會在第一階段審查中核准了該交易，未要求任何資產出售。

toeic.example_en: Regulators opened a phase two investigation due to overlapping operations in three product markets.
toeic.example_zh: 因三項產品市場存在重疊業務，監管機關啟動第二階段調查。

toeic.example_en: Sellers prepare carve-out financial statements to present the divested business on a standalone basis.
toeic.example_zh: 賣方編製分拆財務報表，以獨立基礎呈現被分割出售的業務。

toeic.example_en: The carve-out business must demonstrate viability on a stand-alone basis without shared corporate services.
toeic.example_zh: 分拆業務必須在無共享企業服務下的獨立經營基礎上展現可行性。

toeic.example_en: Reverse transition services are provided by the buyer to the seller for retained but separated functions.
toeic.example_zh: 反向過渡服務由買方提供給賣方，用於保留但分離的功能。

toeic.example_en: Shared services separation is one of the most complex workstreams in any large corporate carve-out transaction.
toeic.example_zh: 共享服務分離是任何大型企業分拆交易中最複雜的工作流之一。

toeic.example_en: The integration team confirmed day-one readiness across critical systems, payroll, and customer-facing operations.
toeic.example_zh: 整合團隊確認關鍵系統、薪資作業與面客戶業務皆達到首日就緒度。

toeic.example_en: Operational separation requires duplicating infrastructure, contracts, and licenses prior to legal day one of independence.
toeic.example_zh: 營運分離須於法定獨立日前複製基礎設施、合約與授權。

toeic.example_en: Legal day one marks the formal transfer of ownership and accountability from seller to buyer.
toeic.example_zh: 法定獨立首日標誌著所有權與責任由賣方正式移轉給買方。

toeic.example_en: An integration playbook codifies lessons learned from prior deals to accelerate the next acquisition's value capture.
toeic.example_zh: 整合手冊將過往交易的經驗教訓系統化，以加速下一次收購的價值實現。

toeic.example_en: An integration management office coordinates dozens of workstreams and tracks synergy capture against the original plan.
toeic.example_zh: 整合管理辦公室協調數十個工作流，並追蹤綜效實現與原始計畫的對比。

toeic.example_en: The synergy tracker reports actual versus targeted savings monthly to the joint steering committee.
toeic.example_zh: 綜效追蹤表每月向聯合指導委員會回報實際與目標節省金額的對比。

toeic.example_en: The value capture plan details specific initiatives, owners, and milestones for delivering synergies after closing.
toeic.example_zh: 價值實現計畫詳列交割後實現綜效的具體方案、負責人與里程碑。

toeic.example_en: Cultural due diligence identifies organizational differences likely to disrupt integration and proposes mitigation actions.
toeic.example_zh: 文化盡職調查找出可能干擾整合的組織差異，並提出緩解措施。

toeic.example_en: Commercial due diligence validates the target's market position, growth trajectory, and competitive dynamics.
toeic.example_zh: 商業盡職調查驗證標的的市場地位、成長軌跡與競爭動態。

toeic.example_en: Financial due diligence quantifies normalized earnings and identifies any quality of earnings issues for the buyer.
toeic.example_zh: 財務盡職調查量化常態化盈餘，並為買方找出任何盈餘品質問題。

toeic.example_en: Operational due diligence assesses manufacturing efficiency, supply chain resilience, and IT systems supporting the business.
toeic.example_zh: 營運盡職調查評估支援該業務的製造效率、供應鏈韌性與IT系統。

toeic.example_en: Tax due diligence surfaced an unresolved transfer pricing exposure that influenced the final indemnification negotiation.
toeic.example_zh: 稅務盡職調查發現一項未解決的移轉訂價風險，影響了最終的賠償協商。

toeic.example_en: Legal due diligence reviews material contracts, litigation, intellectual property, and regulatory permits held by the target.
toeic.example_zh: 法律盡職調查審查標的所持有的重要合約、訴訟、智慧財產權與監管許可。

toeic.example_en: Environmental due diligence identified soil contamination at one facility, prompting a specific seller indemnification.
toeic.example_zh: 環境盡職調查發現一處廠房土壤污染，因而促成特別的賣方賠償約定。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 人力資源盡職調查
toeic.example_en: Human resources due diligence reviews compensation structures, benefit plans, labor agreements, and key talent retention risks.
toeic.example_zh: 人力資源盡職調查審查薪酬結構、福利計畫、勞動協議及關鍵人才留任風險。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 資訊技術盡職調查
toeic.example_en: IT due diligence evaluates legacy system complexity, cybersecurity posture, and the cost of post-acquisition integration.
toeic.example_zh: 資訊技術盡職調查評估傳統系統複雜度、資安狀況與收購後整合成本。

toeic.example_en: ESG due diligence has become standard practice, especially in deals involving European or institutional investors.
toeic.example_zh: ESG盡職調查已成為標準做法，特別是在涉及歐洲或機構投資人的交易中。

toeic.example_en: The quality of earnings analysis adjusts EBITDA for one-time items, owner perks, and accounting normalization.
toeic.example_zh: 盈餘品質分析就一次性項目、業主額外福利及會計常態化等調整EBITDA。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 成文法；制定法；法規
toeic.example_en: The new statute imposes stricter penalties on companies that fail to disclose material information.
toeic.example_zh: 新成文法對未揭露重大資訊的公司施加更嚴格的罰則。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 法定的；依法律規定的
toeic.example_en: The board has a statutory obligation to disclose any conflicts of interest before voting on the merger.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會在對合併案進行表決前負有法定義務揭露任何利益衝突。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 頒布；公布（法律或規章）
toeic.example_en: Regulators promulgated new rules requiring large banks to maintain higher capital buffers next year.
toeic.example_zh: 監管機關頒布了要求大型銀行明年維持更高資本緩衝的新規定。

toeic.example_en: Parliament enacted sweeping reforms to enhance corporate transparency and curb tax evasion schemes.
toeic.example_zh: 國會制定了全面改革以提升企業透明度並遏止避稅手段。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 將（法律）編成法典；系統化
toeic.example_en: The committee voted to codify existing privacy guidelines into a single comprehensive data protection statute.
toeic.example_zh: 委員會表決將現行隱私指引編成單一綜合的資料保護法典。

toeic.example_en: Recent jurisprudence on cross-border data transfers has created uncertainty for multinational technology firms.
toeic.example_zh: 近期關於跨境資料傳輸的判例法為跨國科技公司帶來不確定性。

toeic.example_en: Under common law principles, the duty of care extends to all reasonably foreseeable third parties.
toeic.example_zh: 依普通法原則，注意義務延伸至所有合理可預見的第三方。

toeic.example_en: Civil law jurisdictions rely primarily on codified statutes rather than on judicial precedent for guidance.
toeic.example_zh: 大陸法系管轄區主要依賴成文法典而非司法先例作為依據。

toeic.example_en: The appellate ruling sets a binding precedent for how regulators must handle whistleblower retaliation claims.
toeic.example_zh: 上訴法院的裁決為監管機關處理舉報人報復申訴設立了具拘束力的判例。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 遵循先例原則（拉丁法律術語）
toeic.example_en: Invoking stare decisis, the judge declined to revisit settled questions of contract interpretation.
toeic.example_zh: 援引遵循先例原則，法官拒絕重新審理已確立的合約解釋問題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 單方的；單方面進行的（程序）
toeic.example_en: The plaintiff secured an ex parte injunction freezing the defendant assets pending a full hearing.
toeic.example_zh: 原告取得單方面禁令，凍結被告資產直至完整聽證會。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 表面上的；初步看來成立的
toeic.example_en: Regulators concluded there was a prima facie case of insider dealing warranting a formal investigation.
toeic.example_zh: 監管機關認定有表面上成立的內線交易案件，足以展開正式調查。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 法院令狀；書面命令
toeic.example_en: The lawyers filed a writ of mandamus compelling the agency to release the requested compliance records.
toeic.example_zh: 律師提交了一項強制履行令狀，迫使該機構公開申請的合規紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Defense counsel petitioned for habeas corpus, arguing that the executive detention lacked statutory authorization entirely.
toeic.example_zh: 辯護律師聲請人身保護令，主張該行政拘留完全欠缺法律授權。

toeic.meaning_zh: (副詞) 不公開審理地；秘密地
toeic.example_en: Sensitive trade secrets were examined in camera to protect the company competitive intellectual property.
toeic.example_zh: 敏感商業機密以不公開審理方式檢視，以保護公司具競爭力的智慧財產。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 預先審查（陪審員資格調查）
toeic.example_en: During voir dire, both sides probed potential jurors for biases related to the defendant industry.
toeic.example_zh: 在預先審查中，雙方查問可能陪審員對被告所屬產業的偏見。

toeic.example_en: Several industry associations filed an amicus brief supporting the appellant interpretation of the regulatory framework.
toeic.example_zh: 數個業界協會提交法庭之友意見書，支持上訴人對監管框架的解釋。

toeic.example_en: Each joint tortfeasor remains potentially liable for the full amount of damages awarded to the claimant.
toeic.example_zh: 每名共同侵權行為人對判給請求人的全部損害賠償都可能負完全責任。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 過失；疏忽（法律責任）
toeic.example_en: The board faces shareholder claims alleging gross negligence in its oversight of cybersecurity protocols.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會面臨股東訴求，指控其在網路安全規程督導上存在重大過失。

toeic.example_en: Indemnification under the contract is unavailable where losses result from gross negligence or willful misconduct.
toeic.example_zh: 若損失源於重大過失或故意不當行為，合約中的補償條款不適用。

toeic.example_en: The exclusion carves out losses caused by fraud, willful misconduct, or deliberate breach of fiduciary duty.
toeic.example_zh: 該排除條款排除因詐欺、故意不當行為或蓄意違反受託義務所致之損失。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 代位責任；轉承責任
toeic.example_en: The firm faces vicarious liability for unauthorized acts committed by its agents within the scope of employment.
toeic.example_zh: 公司對其代理人在受僱範圍內所為的未授權行為負代位責任。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 嚴格責任；無過失責任
toeic.example_en: Manufacturers of inherently dangerous products face strict liability regardless of the care exercised in production.
toeic.example_zh: 本質上具危險性產品的製造商，不論其生產時所盡注意義務為何，均負嚴格責任。

toeic.example_en: The partners agreed to joint and several liability for any environmental remediation costs assessed by regulators.
toeic.example_zh: 合夥人同意對監管機關評估的任何環境整治成本承擔連帶且個別責任。

toeic.example_en: Under respondeat superior, the corporation may be liable for torts committed by employees during work hours.
toeic.example_zh: 依僱用人責任原則，公司可能對員工在工作時間內所為之侵權行為負責。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 揭穿公司面紗（追究股東個人責任）
toeic.example_en: Creditors sought piercing the corporate veil to hold the sole shareholder personally liable for outstanding debts.
toeic.example_zh: 債權人尋求揭穿公司面紗，以使唯一股東就未償債務承擔個人責任。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 另一個自我；公司分身（用於揭穿面紗）
toeic.example_en: The court found that the subsidiary functioned as the alter ego of its dominant parent corporation.
toeic.example_zh: 法院認定該子公司實際上是其主導母公司的另一個自我。

toeic.example_en: A shareholder derivative suit was filed against directors for alleged breaches of their fiduciary obligations.
toeic.example_zh: 一項股東代表訴訟針對董事提出，指控其涉嫌違反受託義務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 忠實義務（董事對公司的義務）
toeic.example_en: Directors must observe the duty of loyalty by placing corporate interests above personal financial gain consistently.
toeic.example_zh: 董事必須遵守忠實義務，始終將公司利益置於個人財務利益之上。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 注意義務（董事行為標準）
toeic.example_en: The duty of care requires directors to make informed decisions after reasonable investigation of material facts.
toeic.example_zh: 注意義務要求董事在對重大事實作合理調查後再作明智決策。

toeic.example_en: Courts applying the business judgment rule generally defer to good-faith decisions made by informed directors.
toeic.example_zh: 法院適用商業判斷法則時，通常尊重知情董事所作的善意決定。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自我交易；自利交易
toeic.example_en: Allegations of self-dealing triggered an internal investigation into related-party transactions approved by the executive.
toeic.example_zh: 自我交易的指控引發對該主管所批准之關係人交易的內部調查。

toeic.example_en: Material related-party transactions must be disclosed in the notes to the audited consolidated financial statements.
toeic.example_zh: 重大關係人交易必須在已查核合併財務報表的附註中揭露。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 公平交易；獨立交易（無關係影響）
toeic.example_en: Transfer prices between affiliated entities should reflect arm-length transaction terms to satisfy tax authorities globally.
toeic.example_zh: 關係企業間的移轉價格應反映公平交易條件，以滿足全球稅務機關要求。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 越權的；超越法定權限的
toeic.example_en: The agency action was struck down as ultra vires because the enabling statute granted no such power.
toeic.example_zh: 該機構行為因其授權法規未賦予該等權力，被判定為越權而遭撤銷。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 在權限內的；合法授權的
toeic.example_en: Counsel confirmed the proposed bylaw amendment was intra vires the powers granted to the board.
toeic.example_zh: 律師確認所提議的章程修訂在董事會獲授權限的範圍內。

toeic.example_en: The buyer sought rescission of the share purchase agreement after discovering material misrepresentations during due diligence.
toeic.example_zh: 買方在盡職調查中發現重大不實陳述後，尋求解除股份買賣協議。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 強制履行；實際履行（衡平救濟）
toeic.example_en: Because damages would be inadequate, the court ordered specific performance of the unique land sale contract.
toeic.example_zh: 因損害賠償不足以彌補，法院命令強制履行該獨特土地買賣合約。

toeic.example_en: The complaint sought equitable relief in the form of an injunction restraining further unauthorized use of trademarks.
toeic.example_zh: 訴狀請求以禁止令形式之衡平法救濟，以阻止進一步未授權使用商標。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 按值計酬（合理勞務報酬）
toeic.example_en: Lacking an enforceable contract, the consultant recovered fees on a quantum meruit basis for delivered services.
toeic.example_zh: 由於缺乏可執行合約，該顧問依按值計酬基礎收回已提供服務的費用。

toeic.example_en: Plaintiffs alleged unjust enrichment, claiming the defendant retained benefits arising from misappropriated proprietary technical specifications.
toeic.example_zh: 原告主張不當得利，聲稱被告保留了源自盜用專有技術規格的利益。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 允諾禁反言；允諾不容否認
toeic.example_en: The court applied promissory estoppel to enforce the oral assurance on which the supplier reasonably relied.
toeic.example_zh: 法院適用允諾禁反言原則，以強制履行供應商合理信賴的口頭保證。

toeic.example_en: Every enforceable contract must contain a valid consideration clause reflecting a legally sufficient bargained-for exchange.
toeic.example_zh: 每份可執行合約必須含有反映法律上充分對價交換的有效對價條款。

toeic.example_en: Without a meeting of the minds on essential terms, no enforceable contract was ever actually formed.
toeic.example_zh: 若就重要條款無意思一致，從未實際形成可執行合約。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 口頭證據法則（書面合約優先）
toeic.example_en: The parol evidence rule barred admission of prior negotiations that contradicted the fully integrated written agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 口頭證據法則禁止採納與完全整合書面協議相牴觸的先前協商內容。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 四角原則（合約解釋僅看文件內容）
toeic.example_en: Under the four corners doctrine, interpretation begins with the plain language within the contract itself.
toeic.example_zh: 依四角原則，解釋始於合約本身內部的明確文字。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 樣板條款；標準合約條款
toeic.example_en: Although boilerplate clauses appear routine, careful review can reveal materially adverse risk allocation provisions.
toeic.example_zh: 雖然樣板條款看似例行，但仔細審閱可能揭示重大不利的風險分配規定。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 整合條款（合約包含全部約定）
toeic.example_en: The merger clause confirms the writing constitutes the complete and exclusive statement of agreed terms.
toeic.example_zh: 整合條款確認該書面文件構成所合意條款之完整且唯一聲明。

toeic.example_en: A severability clause preserves the validity of remaining provisions if any one term is later invalidated.
toeic.example_zh: 可分割性條款在任一條款日後被宣告無效時，仍保留其餘規定的效力。

toeic.example_en: The choice of law clause designated New York substantive law to govern interpretation of the indemnification provisions.
toeic.example_zh: 法律選擇條款指定紐約實體法管轄補償條款的解釋。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 法院管轄選擇條款
toeic.example_en: The forum selection clause requires that all disputes be litigated exclusively in the courts of Delaware.
toeic.example_zh: 法院管轄選擇條款要求所有爭議必須專屬在德拉瓦州法院進行訴訟。

toeic.example_en: Courts must establish personal jurisdiction over a foreign defendant before issuing any binding judgment on merits.
toeic.example_zh: 法院在對實體爭點作出任何具拘束力判決前，必須先確立對外國被告的對人管轄權。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 事物管轄權；案件類型管轄權
toeic.example_en: Federal courts lacked subject matter jurisdiction because the parties failed to satisfy diversity requirements adequately.
toeic.example_zh: 聯邦法院對該案缺乏事物管轄權，因當事人未能充分滿足多元管轄要件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 長臂管轄法（對外州被告之管轄）
toeic.example_en: The state long-arm statute permits jurisdiction over nonresidents who transact substantial business within the forum.
toeic.example_zh: 該州長臂管轄法允許對在法院地從事重大商業活動的非居民行使管轄。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 治外法權的；境外適用的
toeic.example_en: Recent rulings have curtailed the extraterritorial application of securities laws to purely foreign transactions abroad.
toeic.example_zh: 近期裁定限縮了證券法對純粹境外交易的域外適用範圍。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 國際禮讓（互相尊重外國法律）
toeic.example_en: Out of comity, the court abstained from enjoining parallel proceedings already pending in a foreign tribunal.
toeic.example_zh: 基於國際禮讓，法院克制不去禁制已在外國法院進行的平行訴訟程序。

toeic.example_en: The court dismissed the suit on forum non conveniens grounds, recognizing the alternative forum more appropriate.
toeic.example_zh: 法院以不便利法院為由駁回訴訟，認定替代法院更為適合。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 訴訟參加；確權之訴
toeic.example_en: The stakeholder initiated an interpleader action to allow competing claimants to resolve entitlement to escrowed funds.
toeic.example_zh: 該保管人提起確權之訴，讓相互競爭的請求人解決對託管資金的權利。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 集體訴訟認證（裁定可行集體訴訟）
toeic.example_en: Plaintiffs face an uphill battle securing class certification absent proof of common questions predominating over individual ones.
toeic.example_zh: 原告若無法證明共同問題凌駕個別問題，要取得集體訴訟認證將面臨艱困戰局。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 首席原告（代表集體訴訟）
toeic.example_en: The pension fund was appointed lead plaintiff because it suffered the largest financial loss among investors.
toeic.example_zh: 該退休基金被指定為首席原告，因其在投資人中遭受最大財務損失。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 退出制集體訴訟（成員需主動退出）
toeic.example_en: In an opt-out class, all eligible members are bound by judgment unless they affirmatively exclude themselves.
toeic.example_zh: 在退出制集體訴訟中，所有合格成員除非積極聲明排除，否則均受判決拘束。

toeic.example_en: The parties executed a tolling agreement that suspended the statute of limitations during ongoing settlement negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方簽署時效中止協議，在和解協商期間暫停時效進行。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 訴訟時效；追訴時效
toeic.example_en: The fraud claims were dismissed because they fell outside the applicable statute of limitations period entirely.
toeic.example_zh: 詐欺請求因完全超出適用的訴訟時效期間而被駁回。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 怠於行使權利（衡平法上之時效抗辯）
toeic.example_en: The defense of laches barred the trademark claim due to plaintiff prolonged and prejudicial delay in suing.
toeic.example_zh: 怠於行使權利抗辯使該商標請求遭排除，因原告長期且具損害性的延遲起訴。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 既判力；一事不再理
toeic.example_en: Res judicata precluded relitigation of issues already conclusively determined between identical parties in the prior judgment.
toeic.example_zh: 既判力排除已在前案判決中經相同當事人作終局認定之爭點的重新訴訟。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 附帶禁反言；爭點效
toeic.example_en: Collateral estoppel prevented the company from contesting facts already adjudicated against it in earlier related litigation.
toeic.example_zh: 附帶禁反言阻止該公司就先前相關訴訟中對其不利已確定之事實再加爭執。

toeic.example_en: Failure to comply with discovery production obligations may result in severe sanctions, including adverse inference instructions.
toeic.example_zh: 未遵守證據開示提交義務可能導致嚴厲制裁，包括不利推定指示。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 書面詢問問題（訴訟前發現程序）
toeic.example_en: Counsel served interrogatories seeking detailed information regarding the corporation internal compliance review procedures and findings.
toeic.example_zh: 律師送達書面詢問，要求關於公司內部合規審查程序與結果的詳細資訊。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 文件提出請求（發現程序）
toeic.example_en: The request for production sought all electronic communications between executives concerning the contemplated regulatory disclosure.
toeic.example_zh: 文件提出請求要求所有主管之間關於擬議監管揭露的電子通訊內容。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 受特權保護的通訊
toeic.example_en: Counsel withheld the memorandum as privileged communication protected by the attorney-client doctrine and work-product immunity.
toeic.example_zh: 律師依據律師當事人特權及工作成果保護原則，將該備忘錄列為受特權保護的通訊。

toeic.example_en: The attorney-client privilege protects confidential communications made for the purpose of obtaining or providing legal advice.
toeic.example_zh: 律師當事人特權保護為取得或提供法律建議目的所進行的保密通訊。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 律師工作成果原則（免於開示）
toeic.example_en: The work product doctrine shields materials prepared by counsel in anticipation of litigation from compelled disclosure.
toeic.example_zh: 律師工作成果原則保護律師為預期訴訟所準備之資料，使其免於被強制揭露。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 公司內部法律顧問
toeic.example_en: The in-house counsel team partnered with external advisors to navigate the cross-border merger control filings rigorously.
toeic.example_zh: 公司內部法律顧問團隊與外部顧問合作，嚴謹處理跨境合併管制申報事宜。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 外部律師；外聘法律顧問
toeic.example_en: Outside counsel was retained to conduct an independent investigation into alleged accounting irregularities at the subsidiary.
toeic.example_zh: 外部律師受聘對該子公司涉嫌會計不當行為展開獨立調查。

toeic.example_en: Every new matter requires a formal conflict check before counsel can formally accept the prospective client engagement.
toeic.example_zh: 每件新案件在律師正式接受潛在客戶委任前，都需進行正式的利益衝突檢查。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 防火牆程序（隔離資訊以避免衝突）
toeic.example_en: The firm implemented a Chinese wall procedure to isolate the deal team from advisors representing the counterparty.
toeic.example_zh: 事務所實施防火牆程序，將交易團隊與代表交易對手的顧問加以隔離。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 倫理隔離牆（防止資訊流通）
toeic.example_en: Compliance erected an ethical wall to prevent material nonpublic information from reaching the trading desk personnel.
toeic.example_zh: 合規部門設立倫理隔離牆，防止重大非公開資訊流向交易部門人員。

toeic.example_en: Trading on material nonpublic information obtained in breach of duty constitutes prohibited insider dealing under securities laws.
toeic.example_zh: 基於違反義務所取得之重大非公開資訊進行交易，依證券法構成禁止之內線交易。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 內線消息提供者（內線交易）
toeic.example_en: Liability extends to the tipper who passes confidential information for personal benefit in breach of fiduciary duty.
toeic.example_zh: 責任延伸至為個人利益違反受託義務而傳遞機密資訊的消息提供者。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 內線消息接收者（內線交易）
toeic.example_en: A tippee who knowingly trades on improperly disclosed inside information bears equivalent liability as the original disclosure.
toeic.example_zh: 明知基於不當揭露之內線資訊而交易的接收者，承擔與原始揭露者同等之責任。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 美國證券交易法10b-5條（反詐欺規則）
toeic.example_en: The plaintiffs alleged misrepresentations actionable under Rule 10b-5 of the federal securities exchange enforcement framework.
toeic.example_zh: 原告主張存在依聯邦證券交易執行框架10b-5條可訴的不實陳述。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 公平揭露規則（美國證券）
toeic.example_en: Regulation FD requires that issuers disclose material information broadly rather than selectively to favored analysts only.
toeic.example_zh: 公平揭露規則要求發行人廣泛揭露重大資訊，而非僅選擇性提供給受青睞的分析師。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 安全港條款（免責保護）
toeic.example_en: The safe harbor provision shields forward-looking statements accompanied by meaningful cautionary language identifying important risk factors.
toeic.example_zh: 安全港條款保護附有實質警示性語句並指明重要風險因素的前瞻性陳述。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不採取行動函（監管機關確認）
toeic.example_en: The issuer obtained a no-action letter confirming the staff would not recommend enforcement against the proposed structure.
toeic.example_zh: 發行人取得一份不採取行動函，確認工作人員不會建議對所提議結構採取執法行動。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 同意命令（與監管機關達成的法院命令）
toeic.example_en: The company entered into a consent decree requiring enhanced compliance monitoring and periodic reporting to federal regulators.
toeic.example_zh: 公司簽訂同意命令，要求強化合規監督並定期向聯邦監管機關報告。

toeic.example_en: Under the deferred prosecution agreement, the firm avoided indictment by paying substantial penalties and implementing remediation measures.
toeic.example_zh: 依暫緩起訴協議，公司藉由支付大額罰金及實施補救措施而避免被起訴。

toeic.example_en: The non-prosecution agreement credited the company for self-reporting, robust cooperation, and timely remediation of compliance gaps.
toeic.example_zh: 該不起訴協議肯定公司之自行通報、積極配合及及時補救合規漏洞之表現。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 監督人制度（合規監督）
toeic.example_en: The settlement imposed a three-year independent monitorship to verify ongoing compliance with the anti-corruption obligations.
toeic.example_zh: 和解協議施加三年獨立監督人制度，以驗證持續遵守反貪腐義務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 企業誠信協議（與監管機關簽訂）
toeic.example_en: Healthcare providers under a corporate integrity agreement face heightened reporting obligations and routine third-party compliance audits.
toeic.example_zh: 處於企業誠信協議之醫療提供者面臨加強之申報義務及例行第三方合規稽核。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 補救計畫；改正計畫
toeic.example_en: The board approved a comprehensive remediation plan addressing each material weakness identified in the recent independent audit.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會批准了一項全面性補救計畫，處理最近獨立稽核所發現的每項重大缺失。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自願通報；自我揭露（合規違規）
toeic.example_en: Voluntary self-reporting of potential misconduct typically yields significant credit during prosecutorial assessment of any resulting penalties.
toeic.example_zh: 自願通報潛在不當行為通常在檢察官評估最終罰則時可獲得相當大的減免。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 配合調查減免（執法機關減罰）
toeic.example_en: Substantial cooperation credit was awarded for the company comprehensive disclosure of underlying facts identifying individual culpable employees.
toeic.example_zh: 公司全面揭露涉及個別有責員工之相關事實，因而獲得大幅配合調查減免。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 葉茨備忘錄（美國司法部追究個人責任政策）
toeic.example_en: The Yates Memo emphasizes individual accountability, requiring corporations to identify culpable individuals to obtain meaningful cooperation credit.
toeic.example_zh: 葉茨備忘錄強調個人責任，要求企業指明有責個人才能取得有意義之配合調查減免。

toeic.example_en: The UK Bribery Act imposes strict corporate liability for failure to prevent bribery by associated persons globally.
toeic.example_zh: 英國反賄賂法對未能防止關聯人員在全球範圍行賄之公司施加嚴格責任。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 便利付款（為加快行政程序的小額付款）
toeic.example_en: Although narrowly permitted under the FCPA, facilitation payments remain illegal under many comparable international anti-bribery statutes.
toeic.example_zh: 雖然在FCPA下有限度允許，便利付款在許多相當之國際反賄賂法規下仍屬違法。

toeic.example_en: Procurement controls aim to prevent kickback schemes by separating vendor selection responsibilities from invoice approval authority effectively.
toeic.example_zh: 採購控制旨在透過將供應商選擇職責與發票核准權限分離，有效防止回扣計謀。

toeic.example_en: Investigators uncovered widespread graft involving inflated invoices submitted in collusion with corrupt government procurement officials abroad.
toeic.example_zh: 調查人員揭露涉及虛報發票之大規模貪污，與境外腐敗政府採購官員串通進行。

toeic.example_en: Forensic accountants traced the embezzlement scheme to fictitious vendor accounts controlled solely by the former finance director.
toeic.example_zh: 鑑識會計師追查到該侵占計謀涉及由前財務總監單獨控制的虛構供應商帳戶。

toeic.example_en: Banks must maintain robust controls to detect and disrupt money laundering schemes that exploit layered transactions between jurisdictions.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行必須維持強健控制以偵測及瓦解利用跨管轄區分層交易的洗錢計謀。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 存入分層整合（洗錢三階段）
toeic.example_en: Anti-money laundering training covers placement layering integration as the classic three-stage typology used by illicit financial actors.
toeic.example_zh: 反洗錢訓練涵蓋存入分層整合作為非法金融行為人所使用之經典三階段類型。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 受益所有人；最終實質所有人
toeic.example_en: Identifying the ultimate beneficial owner is essential for verifying customer identity and assessing residual money laundering risks.
toeic.example_zh: 辨識最終受益所有人對於驗證客戶身分及評估剩餘洗錢風險至關重要。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 最終受益所有權（透視多層結構）
toeic.example_en: Regulators increasingly require disclosure of ultimate beneficial ownership to pierce opaque multilayered corporate and trust ownership structures.
toeic.example_zh: 監管機關日益要求揭露最終受益所有權，以穿透不透明的多層公司與信託所有權結構。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 政治性曝險人士（高風險客戶類別）
toeic.example_en: Enhanced due diligence is mandatory for any politically exposed person and their close family members or associates.
toeic.example_zh: 對任何政治性曝險人士及其近親或關係人，必須進行加強盡職調查。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 加強盡職調查（高風險客戶）
toeic.example_en: Enhanced due diligence procedures include independent source-of-wealth verification and ongoing transaction monitoring tailored to the elevated risk.
toeic.example_zh: 加強盡職調查程序包括獨立財富來源驗證及針對提高風險量身訂作之持續交易監控。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 客戶盡職調查（標準）
toeic.example_en: Standard customer due diligence requires verifying identity, understanding business purpose, and assessing expected transaction patterns at onboarding.
toeic.example_zh: 標準客戶盡職調查要求在開戶時驗證身分、了解業務目的並評估預期交易型態。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) OFAC制裁（美國財政部外國資產管制辦公室）
toeic.example_en: Violations of OFAC sanctions can result in substantial civil penalties and reputational damage even for inadvertent compliance failures.
toeic.example_zh: 違反OFAC制裁即使是無意之合規疏失，亦可能導致鉅額民事罰款及商譽損害。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 次級制裁（對非美國人的延伸制裁）
toeic.example_en: Secondary sanctions extend extraterritorial reach by penalizing non-US persons who engage in prohibited activity with designated targets.
toeic.example_zh: 次級制裁延伸域外效力，懲罰與被指定目標從事禁止活動之非美國人。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 阻斷法（抵消外國法律之國內法）
toeic.example_en: The European blocking statute prohibits EU operators from complying with certain extraterritorial sanctions absent prior Commission authorization.
toeic.example_zh: 歐洲阻斷法禁止歐盟業者在未取得執委會事先授權下遵守某些域外制裁。

toeic.example_en: The dual-use software product required export control classification and licensing before delivery to overseas customers could proceed.
toeic.example_zh: 該軍民兩用軟體產品在交付海外客戶前需要取得出口管制分類及許可證。

toeic.example_en: Encryption modules qualify as dual-use technology and are typically subject to detailed export licensing review across most jurisdictions.
toeic.example_zh: 加密模組屬於軍民兩用技術，在大多數管轄區通常須經詳盡之出口許可審查。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 視同出口（將技術轉移給外國人視為出口）
toeic.example_en: Sharing controlled technical data with foreign national employees within the United States constitutes a deemed export under regulations.
toeic.example_zh: 在美國境內與外國籍員工分享受管制技術資料，依規定構成視同出口。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 最終使用者證明書
toeic.example_en: Exporters must obtain an end-user certificate confirming the buyer commits not to divert controlled goods to prohibited destinations.
toeic.example_zh: 出口商須取得最終使用者證明書，確認買方承諾不將受管制貨物轉移至禁止目的地。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 被拒絕往來人員名單（美國商務部）
toeic.example_en: Transactions with any party appearing on the denied persons list are categorically prohibited without specific authorization from authorities.
toeic.example_zh: 與被拒絕往來人員名單上任何方之交易，在未取得當局特定授權前一律禁止。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 實體清單（受出口管制的對象）
toeic.example_en: Companies added to the entity list face stringent licensing requirements and a strong presumption of denial for transactions.
toeic.example_zh: 被列入實體清單的公司面臨嚴格之許可要求，且交易申請有強烈被拒絕之推定。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) CFIUS審查（美國外國投資審查委員會）
toeic.example_en: The proposed acquisition triggered mandatory CFIUS review due to the target sensitive personal data and critical technology holdings.
toeic.example_zh: 因目標公司持有敏感個人資料及關鍵技術，所提併購觸發了強制性CFIUS審查。

toeic.example_en: Foreign investment in critical infrastructure increasingly faces formal national security review under expanded screening frameworks adopted globally.
toeic.example_zh: 關鍵基礎設施之外國投資在全球採行之擴大審查框架下，日益面臨正式之國家安全審查。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 反托拉斯（反壟斷）法
toeic.example_en: Antitrust enforcers raised serious competition concerns regarding the proposed horizontal merger between the two dominant industry incumbents.
toeic.example_zh: 反托拉斯執法機關對兩家業界主導廠商之提議水平合併提出嚴重之競爭疑慮。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 哈特－史考特－羅迪諾法案（美國併購申報法）
toeic.example_en: The Hart-Scott-Rodino Act requires premerger notification and observance of a waiting period before consummation of qualifying transactions.
toeic.example_zh: 哈特－史考特－羅迪諾法案要求合併前通報並於完成適用交易前遵守等待期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 合併通報（送交競爭主管機關）
toeic.example_en: Counsel coordinated parallel merger notification filings across seven jurisdictions to align timelines for global transaction closing requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 律師協調在七個管轄區同時進行合併通報申報，以配合全球交易交割要求之時程。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 提前整合（合併完成前不當協調行為）
toeic.example_en: Antitrust regulators investigated gun-jumping allegations after the parties allegedly coordinated competitive decisions before formal regulatory clearance.
toeic.example_zh: 反托拉斯監管機關在當事人涉嫌於正式監管核准前協調競爭決策後，對提前整合指控展開調查。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 水平合併（同業競爭者合併）
toeic.example_en: A horizontal merger between leading competitors triggers heightened antitrust scrutiny focused on potential unilateral and coordinated effects.
toeic.example_zh: 領先競爭者間之水平合併會引發加強之反托拉斯審查，著重於潛在單方效果與協同效果。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 垂直合併（上下游合併）
toeic.example_en: Although typically less problematic, a vertical merger may raise foreclosure concerns when it forecloses rivals from key inputs.
toeic.example_zh: 垂直合併雖通常較少問題，但在它使競爭者無法取得關鍵投入時可能引發排斥疑慮。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 卡特爾；同業聯盟（壟斷組織）
toeic.example_en: Authorities dismantled an international cartel that had fixed prices and allocated customers across the global chemicals industry.
toeic.example_zh: 當局摧毀了一個在全球化學品產業聯合定價並分配客戶之國際卡特爾。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 聯合定價（反托拉斯違法行為）
toeic.example_en: Price fixing constitutes a per se violation of competition law regardless of any claimed procompetitive justifications offered by participants.
toeic.example_zh: 聯合定價無論參與者主張任何有利競爭之理由，均構成競爭法上之當然違法。

toeic.example_en: Procurement officials uncovered bid rigging when several supposedly competing contractors submitted suspiciously coordinated proposals at unusually similar pricing.
toeic.example_zh: 當數家本應競爭之承包商以可疑協調方式提交價格異常相近之提案時，採購官員揭露了圍標行為。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 市場瓜分（反托拉斯違法）
toeic.example_en: Agreements involving market allocation between competitors are treated as hardcore violations punishable by criminal sanctions in many jurisdictions.
toeic.example_zh: 涉及競爭者間市場瓜分之協議被視為核心違法行為，在許多管轄區受刑事制裁。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 濫用市場支配地位
toeic.example_en: The investigation focused on alleged abuse of dominance through exclusionary rebates designed to foreclose smaller emerging rivals from markets.
toeic.example_zh: 調查聚焦於涉嫌透過排他性回扣濫用市場支配地位，旨在將較小新興競爭者排除於市場外。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 掠奪性定價（驅逐競爭者）
toeic.example_en: Plaintiffs alleged predatory pricing whereby the dominant firm priced below cost intending to recoup losses after rivals exited.
toeic.example_zh: 原告主張掠奪性定價，主導廠商以低於成本定價意圖在競爭者退出後彌補損失。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 搭售安排（強迫購買其他產品）
toeic.example_en: The tying arrangement obligated buyers of the patented machine to purchase consumable supplies exclusively from the same manufacturer.
toeic.example_zh: 搭售安排迫使該專利機器之買方僅得向同一製造商購買消耗品。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 獨家交易安排（限制與競爭者往來）
toeic.example_en: Regulators evaluate exclusive dealing arrangements for foreclosure effects considering market coverage, duration, and availability of alternative supply.
toeic.example_zh: 監管機關評估獨家交易安排之排斥效果，考量市場涵蓋率、期間及替代供應之可得性。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 維持轉售價格（限制下游售價）
toeic.example_en: Resale price maintenance is now evaluated under the rule of reason in many jurisdictions rather than per se illegality.
toeic.example_zh: 維持轉售價格在許多管轄區現以合理原則評估，而非當然違法。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 寬恕方案（反托拉斯自首減免）
toeic.example_en: The leniency program incentivizes cartel participants to self-report by offering full immunity to the first qualifying applicant.
toeic.example_zh: 寬恕方案藉由給予首位符合條件之申請人完全豁免，激勵卡特爾參與者自首通報。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 加碼寬恕（揭露其他違法行為的額外減免）
toeic.example_en: Amnesty plus encourages cooperating companies to disclose additional unrelated cartels in exchange for further sentencing reductions across investigations.
toeic.example_zh: 加碼寬恕鼓勵配合企業揭露其他不相關之卡特爾，以換取跨案調查之進一步減刑。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 突襲搜查（競爭主管機關不預警調查）
toeic.example_en: Antitrust officials conducted a coordinated dawn raid at the offices of multiple industry participants suspected of collusive arrangements.
toeic.example_zh: 反托拉斯官員對多家涉嫌共謀安排之業界參與者辦公室進行協調突襲搜查。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 合併救濟措施（如資產剝離）
toeic.example_en: To address competition concerns, the parties offered a merger remedy involving structural divestiture of overlapping business units.
toeic.example_zh: 為解決競爭疑慮，當事人提出涉及重疊業務單位結構性剝離之合併救濟措施。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 剝離命令（強制出售資產）
toeic.example_en: The agency issued a divestiture order requiring sale of overlapping assets to a viable independent purchaser approved by regulators.
