toeic.example_zh: 她戴著一頂別緻的黑帽子和配套手套去參加下午茶派對。

toeic.example_en: He prefers a sporty look with track pants and a comfortable cotton T-shirt.
toeic.example_zh: 他喜歡運動風的造型，穿著運動褲和舒適的棉質T恤。

toeic.example_en: She bought a beautiful vintage dress at the small shop on the corner.
toeic.example_zh: 她在街角的小店買了一件美麗的復古洋裝。

toeic.example_en: His preppy style with polo shirts and khaki pants suits the new school.
toeic.example_zh: 他穿著POLO衫和卡其褲的學院風格很適合新學校。

toeic.example_en: Please hang your wet coat on the wooden hanger by the front door.
toeic.example_zh: 請把你的濕外套掛在前門旁邊的木衣架上。

toeic.example_en: I do my laundry every Sunday morning to start the week with clean clothes.
toeic.example_zh: 我每個週日早上洗衣服，這樣可以穿著乾淨的衣服開始一週。

toeic.example_en: Please help me fold these warm towels and place them in the small basket.
toeic.example_zh: 請幫我把這些溫暖的毛巾摺好，放進小籃子裡。

toeic.example_en: There is a small coffee stain on the front of his new white shirt.
toeic.example_zh: 他新買的白襯衫前面有一個小咖啡漬。

toeic.example_en: Grandma knitted me a warm wool sweater with a small heart on the front.
toeic.example_zh: 奶奶為我織了一件溫暖的羊毛衣，前面有一個小愛心。

toeic.example_en: She put on a soft pink cardigan because the evening air felt a little cold.
toeic.example_zh: 因為晚上的空氣有點涼，她穿上了一件柔軟的粉色開襟毛衣。

toeic.example_en: He pulled his black hoodie over his head as it started raining lightly.
toeic.example_zh: 下起小雨時，他把黑色連帽衫的帽子拉到頭上。

toeic.example_en: I love wearing my soft gray sweatshirt on lazy weekend mornings at home.
toeic.example_zh: 我喜歡在家裡悠閒的週末早晨穿著柔軟的灰色運動衫。

toeic.example_en: She wore a black turtleneck under her brown jacket on the chilly winter day.
toeic.example_zh: 在寒冷的冬日，她在棕色外套裡穿了一件黑色高領毛衣。

toeic.example_en: She wore a silk blouse with small flower patterns to the office today.
toeic.example_zh: 她今天穿了一件有小花圖案的絲質上衣去辦公室。

toeic.example_en: He wore a plain white tank under his open button-up summer shirt.
toeic.example_zh: 他在敞開的夏季扣襯衫裡穿了一件素白色背心。

toeic.example_en: The school uniform includes a navy polo with the small school logo on it.
toeic.example_zh: 學校制服包括一件深藍色POLO衫，上面有小小的校徽。

toeic.example_en: She wore a smart blue blazer over her white shirt for the job interview.
toeic.example_zh: 面試時她在白襯衫外面穿了一件俐落的藍色西裝外套。

toeic.example_en: He wore a warm puffy vest to keep his chest warm on the cold morning.
toeic.example_zh: 在寒冷的早晨，他穿了一件溫暖的蓬鬆背心來保持胸部溫暖。

toeic.example_en: He bought a new pair of black trousers for his cousin's autumn wedding.
toeic.example_zh: 他為表哥的秋季婚禮買了一條新的黑色長褲。

toeic.example_en: These blue jeans fit me perfectly and feel very soft after washing them.
toeic.example_zh: 這條藍色牛仔褲非常合身，洗過以後感覺很柔軟。

toeic.example_en: Children wore colorful shorts and T-shirts to the summer school picnic.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們穿著彩色的短褲和T恤去參加暑期學校的野餐。

toeic.example_en: She always wears black leggings to her yoga class on Tuesday evenings.
toeic.example_zh: 她週二晚上去上瑜伽課時總是穿黑色緊身褲。

toeic.example_en: She wore warm wool tights under her gray skirt on the cold winter morning.
toeic.example_zh: 在寒冷的冬季早晨，她在灰色短裙裡穿了溫暖的羊毛褲襪。

toeic.example_en: My sister wore a long flower-patterned skirt to the spring garden party.
toeic.example_zh: 我姊姊穿著一件有花朵圖案的長裙去參加春日花園派對。

toeic.example_en: She wore a long silver gown to the school dance last weekend evening.
toeic.example_zh: 上週末晚上她穿著一件長長的銀色禮服去參加學校舞會。

toeic.example_en: He put on his cozy bathrobe and slippers after his hot evening shower.
toeic.example_zh: 晚上洗完熱水澡後，他穿上舒適的浴袍和拖鞋。

toeic.example_en: She packed her new swimsuit and a beach towel for the seaside trip.
toeic.example_zh: 她為海邊之旅打包了新泳衣和沙灘巾。

toeic.example_en: She bought a pretty pink bikini for her summer vacation at the beach.
toeic.example_zh: 她為暑假在海灘度假買了一件漂亮的粉色比基尼。

toeic.example_en: She wore a sleek black jumpsuit and red heels to the evening dinner party.
toeic.example_zh: 她穿著一件俐落的黑色連身褲和紅色高跟鞋去參加晚宴派對。

toeic.example_en: The little toddler looked very cute in her tiny yellow romper at the park.
toeic.example_zh: 在公園裡，小小孩穿著她小小的黃色連身短褲裝看起來很可愛。

toeic.example_en: He grabbed his light windbreaker before going for a walk along the beach.
toeic.example_zh: 他在沿海灘散步前抓起了輕便的風衣。

toeic.example_en: She wore a thick warm parka with a fur hood during the snowy mountain trip.
toeic.example_zh: 在多雪的山區旅行中，她穿著一件厚厚的溫暖派克大衣，帶著毛皮帽兜。

toeic.example_en: He chose a dark blue necktie to match his clean white office shirt.
toeic.example_zh: 他選了一條深藍色的領帶來搭配他乾淨的白色辦公襯衫。

toeic.example_en: The little boy wore a small red bowtie to his uncle's summer wedding.
toeic.example_zh: 小男孩戴著一個小紅蝴蝶結領帶去參加叔叔的夏日婚禮。

toeic.example_en: Grandpa wore old brown suspenders to keep his loose dress pants up.
toeic.example_zh: 爺爺戴著舊舊的棕色吊帶來固定他寬鬆的西裝褲。

toeic.example_en: She wore a thin pink headband to keep her bangs away from her eyes.
toeic.example_zh: 她戴著一條細細的粉色頭帶，把瀏海撥離眼睛。

toeic.example_en: He pulled a warm gray beanie over his ears before stepping into the cold.
toeic.example_zh: 踏入寒冷前，他把溫暖的灰色毛線帽拉到耳朵上。

toeic.example_en: She wore a small black beret while painting in the quiet city park.
toeic.example_zh: 她戴著一頂小小的黑色貝雷帽，在安靜的城市公園裡作畫。

toeic.example_en: He wore a brown leather fedora that matched his vintage office briefcase.
toeic.example_zh: 他戴著一頂棕色皮革軟呢帽，搭配他復古的辦公公事包。

toeic.example_en: She wore a wide straw sunhat to protect her pale face at the summer beach.
toeic.example_zh: 夏天在海灘上，她戴著一頂寬邊的草編遮陽帽來保護她蒼白的臉。

toeic.example_en: The tennis player wore a white visor to keep the sun out of her eyes.
toeic.example_zh: 網球選手戴著白色遮陽帽簷來擋住眼睛上方的陽光。

toeic.example_en: The little girl wore red mittens that her grandmother had knitted for her.
toeic.example_zh: 小女孩戴著奶奶為她織的紅色連指手套。

toeic.example_en: Her pink fluffy earmuffs kept her ears warm during the freezing snowstorm.
toeic.example_zh: 她毛茸茸的粉色耳罩在冰冷的暴風雪中為她保暖耳朵。

toeic.example_en: He always carried a clean white handkerchief in his back trouser pocket.
toeic.example_zh: 他總是在西裝褲後口袋裡放一條乾淨的白色手帕。

toeic.example_en: He tied a red bandana around his head while working in the hot kitchen.
toeic.example_zh: 在炎熱的廚房工作時，他在頭上綁了一條紅色頭巾。

toeic.example_en: Grandma wrapped a soft wool shawl around her shoulders by the warm fire.
toeic.example_zh: 奶奶在溫暖的爐火旁，把柔軟的羊毛披肩裹在肩膀上。

toeic.example_en: The little boy wore a red superhero cape and ran around the back garden.
toeic.example_zh: 小男孩穿著紅色超級英雄斗篷在後花園裡跑來跑去。

toeic.example_en: She wore a colorful poncho to stay dry during the sudden afternoon rain.
toeic.example_zh: 她穿著一件彩色雨披，在突然的午後陣雨中保持乾燥。

toeic.example_en: She carried her library books in a canvas tote with a flower print on it.
toeic.example_zh: 她用一個有花朵印花的帆布手提袋裝著圖書館的書。

toeic.example_en: She held a small silver clutch in her hand at the elegant evening party.
toeic.example_zh: 在優雅的晚宴派對上，她手裡拿著一個小銀色手拿包。

toeic.example_en: The young student carried a brown leather satchel filled with school books.
toeic.example_zh: 那位年輕學生背著一個裝滿課本的棕色皮書包。

toeic.example_en: He carries his black leather briefcase to the downtown office every weekday.
toeic.example_zh: 他每個工作日都帶著黑色皮革公事包去市中心的辦公室。

toeic.example_en: She packed her large blue suitcase the night before her early morning flight.
toeic.example_zh: 在清晨班機前一晚，她打包好了她大大的藍色行李箱。

toeic.example_en: Please put your luggage in the back of the small white airport taxi.
toeic.example_zh: 請把您的行李放在小白色機場計程車的後車廂。

toeic.example_en: She bought a beautiful brown leather handbag for her mother's special birthday.
toeic.example_zh: 她為媽媽特別的生日買了一個漂亮的棕色皮革手提包。

toeic.example_en: He gave her a thin gold necklace with a small heart for their anniversary.
toeic.example_zh: 他在結婚紀念日送給她一條細細的金項鍊，上面有個小愛心。

toeic.example_en: She wore a thin silver bracelet on her wrist with three tiny round charms.
toeic.example_zh: 她手腕上戴著一條細細的銀手鐲，上面有三個小小的圓形吊飾。

toeic.example_en: She lost one of her favorite gold earrings while dancing at the lively party.
toeic.example_zh: 在熱鬧的派對上跳舞時，她弄丟了一個她最喜歡的金耳環。

toeic.example_en: She wore a tiny silver pendant in the shape of a heart around her neck.
toeic.example_zh: 她脖子上戴著一個小小的、心形的銀色吊飾。

toeic.example_en: She opened the small gold locket to show me her baby brother's tiny photo.
toeic.example_zh: 她打開那個小小的金色盒式項鍊，給我看她小弟弟的小照片。

toeic.example_en: She pinned a small flower brooch onto the collar of her gray wool coat.
toeic.example_zh: 她在灰色羊毛大衣的領子上別了一個小花朵胸針。

toeic.example_en: He fastened his silver cufflinks before leaving for the formal evening event.
toeic.example_zh: 在出發去正式晚會前，他扣上了銀色袖扣。

toeic.example_en: She wore a single string of small white pearls to her wedding anniversary.
toeic.example_zh: 她戴了一串小小的白色珍珠去參加她的結婚紀念日。

toeic.example_en: He gave her a tiny diamond ring when he asked her to marry him.
toeic.example_zh: 他向她求婚時，送了她一枚小小的鑽戒。

toeic.example_en: Grandma gave me a small green jade bracelet for my sixteenth birthday.
toeic.example_zh: 奶奶在我十六歲生日時給了我一個小小的綠色玉鐲。

toeic.example_en: The little ring had a small blue gem that sparkled in the bright sunlight.
toeic.example_zh: 那枚小戒指上有一顆小小的藍色寶石，在明亮陽光下閃閃發光。

toeic.example_en: He rolled up his sleeves before starting to wash the big stack of dishes.
toeic.example_zh: 他在開始洗那一大疊碗盤前，把袖子捲了起來。

toeic.example_en: He straightened the collar of his white shirt before walking into the office.
toeic.example_zh: 走進辦公室前，他把白襯衫的領子整理好。

toeic.example_en: She folded back the cuff of her sweater so it would not get wet at the sink.
toeic.example_zh: 她把毛衣的袖口翻起來，這樣在水槽邊就不會弄濕。

toeic.example_en: The hem of her long blue skirt brushed lightly against the wooden floor.
toeic.example_zh: 她藍色長裙的下襬輕輕拂過木地板。

toeic.example_en: The zipper on his old winter jacket finally broke after three years of use.
toeic.example_zh: 他舊冬季外套上的拉鏈在使用三年後終於壞掉了。

toeic.example_en: He pinned a small red flower on the lapel of his dark gray dinner jacket.
toeic.example_zh: 他在深灰色晚宴外套的翻領上別了一朵小紅花。

toeic.example_en: She used a small stitch to fix the tiny hole on the side of her sock.
toeic.example_zh: 她用小針腳修補了襪子側面的小洞。

toeic.example_en: The seam of his old pants started to come apart along the inside leg.
toeic.example_zh: 他舊褲子的接縫在內側褲管處開始裂開。

toeic.example_en: Her school skirt had neat pleats that her mother ironed every Sunday night.
toeic.example_zh: 她的校裙上有整齊的褶子，是媽媽每週日晚上熨好的。

toeic.example_en: Her white summer blouse had a pretty ruffle along the front and the sleeves.
toeic.example_zh: 她白色的夏季上衣前襟和袖子上都有漂亮的荷葉邊。

toeic.example_en: The little girl's pink party dress had a soft frill around the bottom hem.
toeic.example_zh: 小女孩粉色派對洋裝的下襬周圍有柔軟的縐邊裝飾。

toeic.example_en: Her brown leather bag had a small tassel hanging from the side zipper.
toeic.example_zh: 她的棕色皮包側邊拉鏈上掛著一個小流蘇。

toeic.example_en: Her vintage jacket had a long brown fringe along the bottom of the back.
toeic.example_zh: 她的復古夾克後襬有長長的棕色流蘇邊。

toeic.example_en: The baby's tiny shirt had soft snaps instead of small hard plastic buttons.
toeic.example_zh: 嬰兒小襯衫上用的是柔軟的按扣，而不是堅硬的小塑膠鈕扣。

toeic.example_en: Her little sneakers have velcro straps because she can not tie shoelaces yet.
toeic.example_zh: 她的小運動鞋是魔鬼氈帶，因為她還不會綁鞋帶。

toeic.example_en: He pulled the drawstring of his hoodie tight to keep the cold wind out.
toeic.example_zh: 他把連帽衫上的抽繩拉緊，以擋住冷風。

toeic.example_en: The elastic on her old shorts is too loose, so she needs a new pair soon.
toeic.example_zh: 她舊短褲上的鬆緊帶太鬆了，所以她很快就需要一條新的。

toeic.example_en: Her warm winter coat has a thick soft lining that feels like a cozy blanket.
toeic.example_zh: 她溫暖的冬大衣有厚厚柔軟的襯裡，摸起來像舒適的毯子。

toeic.example_en: His winter jacket has thick padding to keep him warm on freezing cold days.
toeic.example_zh: 他的冬季外套有厚厚的襯墊，能在冰冷的日子裡讓他保持溫暖。

toeic.example_en: This T-shirt is made from soft cotton that feels very nice against the skin.
toeic.example_zh: 這件T恤是用柔軟的棉做的，貼在皮膚上感覺很舒服。

toeic.example_en: Grandma made me a thick wool scarf to keep my neck warm in the cold winter.
toeic.example_zh: 奶奶為我做了一條厚厚的羊毛圍巾，在寒冷的冬天為我保暖脖子。

toeic.example_en: She bought a beautiful silk scarf with pink and yellow flower patterns on it.
toeic.example_zh: 她買了一條漂亮的絲綢圍巾，上面有粉色和黃色的花朵圖案。

toeic.example_en: He bought a new black leather jacket for the cool early autumn weather.
toeic.example_zh: 他為涼爽的初秋天氣買了一件新的黑色皮夾克。

toeic.example_en: He prefers thick denim jeans because they last a very long time with use.
toeic.example_zh: 他喜歡厚厚的牛仔布牛仔褲，因為它們可以穿很久。

toeic.example_en: She chose a soft floral fabric to make a new summer dress for her daughter.
toeic.example_zh: 她選了一塊柔軟的花卉布料，為女兒做一件新的夏日洋裝。

toeic.example_en: Grandma loves to knit warm sweaters and tiny socks for all her grandchildren.
toeic.example_zh: 奶奶很喜歡為所有孫子編織溫暖的毛衣和小襪子。

toeic.example_en: Mom helped me sew a small button back onto my favorite school uniform shirt.
toeic.example_zh: 媽媽幫我把一顆小鈕扣縫回我最喜歡的校服襯衫上。

toeic.example_en: There is a small tear in the back of his old jeans near the right pocket.
toeic.example_zh: 他舊牛仔褲後面靠近右口袋的地方有一個小裂口。

toeic.example_en: She used a needle and thread to mend the small hole in her wool sock.
toeic.example_zh: 她用針和線修補了她羊毛襪上的小洞。

toeic.example_en: His shirt looked wrinkly because he forgot to hang it up after washing it.
toeic.example_zh: 他的襯衫看起來皺巴巴的，因為他洗完後忘了把它掛起來。

toeic.example_en: She loved the smooth feel of the new silk pillowcase on her soft cheek.
toeic.example_zh: 她喜歡新的絲綢枕頭套貼在柔軟臉頰上那種光滑的感覺。

toeic.example_en: The fabric of the old shirt felt very rough against his sensitive young skin.
toeic.example_zh: 那件舊襯衫的布料貼在他敏感的年輕皮膚上感覺很粗糙。

toeic.example_en: These shoes feel too tight on my feet after walking all day in the city.
toeic.example_zh: 在城市裡走了一整天後，這雙鞋穿在腳上感覺太緊了。

toeic.example_en: He likes to wear loose clothes at home to feel relaxed after a busy day.
toeic.example_zh: 忙碌一天後，他喜歡在家裡穿寬鬆的衣服讓自己放鬆。

toeic.example_en: Teenagers nowadays love wearing baggy pants in a bright bold modern style.
toeic.example_zh: 現在的青少年喜歡穿著鮮豔大膽現代風格的寬大褲子。

toeic.example_en: She wore a fitted dress that showed off her slim waist at the dinner party.
toeic.example_zh: 晚宴上她穿著一件合身的洋裝，展現出苗條的腰身。

toeic.example_en: She wore an oversized sweater with skinny jeans for the relaxed weekend look.
toeic.example_zh: 她搭配窄管牛仔褲穿了一件特大號毛衣，呈現悠閒的週末造型。

toeic.example_en: Her new winter boots feel very snug and warm even on the coldest mornings.
toeic.example_zh: 她的新冬靴即使在最冷的早晨穿起來也合腳又溫暖。

toeic.example_en: He wore a red plaid shirt with blue jeans on the family farm weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 週末在家庭農場上，他穿著一件紅色格子襯衫配藍色牛仔褲。

toeic.example_en: She bought a black and white striped shirt that goes well with everything.
toeic.example_zh: 她買了一件黑白條紋的襯衫，配什麼衣服都很好看。

toeic.example_en: The little girl wore a cute spotted dress to her best friend's tea party.
toeic.example_zh: 小女孩穿著一件可愛的圓點洋裝去參加好朋友的茶會。

toeic.example_en: The chef wore a black and white checkered apron in the busy hotel kitchen.
toeic.example_zh: 在繁忙的飯店廚房裡，廚師穿著一條黑白方格圍裙。

toeic.example_en: She wore a pretty floral dress to her cousin's outdoor garden wedding.
toeic.example_zh: 她穿著一件漂亮的花卉洋裝參加表姊的戶外花園婚禮。

toeic.example_en: Her red polka dot skirt twirled beautifully as she danced around the room.
toeic.example_zh: 當她在房間裡跳舞時，她的紅色圓點裙轉動得很漂亮。

toeic.example_en: She chose a brightly patterned scarf to brighten up her plain black coat.
toeic.example_zh: 她選了一條色彩鮮豔有圖案的圍巾來點亮她樸素的黑大衣。

toeic.example_en: He prefers solid color shirts over busy patterns for his office work clothes.
toeic.example_zh: 他工作服偏愛純色襯衫，而不是花俏的圖案。

toeic.example_en: She prefers matte lipstick that does not shine under the bright office lights.
toeic.example_zh: 她偏愛霧面口紅，在明亮的辦公室燈光下不會發亮。

toeic.example_en: Her long glossy black hair caught the bright sunlight at the spring picnic.
toeic.example_zh: 她長長的、有光澤的黑髮在春日野餐時反射著明亮的陽光。

toeic.example_en: The sheer curtains let soft afternoon sunlight flow into the quiet bedroom.
toeic.example_zh: 透明的窗簾讓柔和的午後陽光流進安靜的臥室。

toeic.example_en: He wore a navy suit with a white shirt and a thin black necktie.
toeic.example_zh: 他穿著一套海軍藍西裝，配白襯衫和一條細黑領帶。

toeic.example_en: She painted her front door a calm teal color that everyone in the neighborhood liked.
toeic.example_zh: 她把前門漆成沉穩的藍綠色，鄰居們都很喜歡。

toeic.example_en: The sea looked like a beautiful turquoise color from the high beach cliff.
toeic.example_zh: 從高高的海灘懸崖上看，大海看起來像美麗的綠松石色。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 淡紫色的；薰衣草
toeic.example_en: She painted her small bedroom walls a soft lavender color last spring break.
toeic.example_zh: 上次春假，她把小臥室的牆壁漆成了柔和的淡紫色。

toeic.example_en: She wore a pretty lilac dress to the spring garden party last Sunday afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 上週日下午，她穿著一件漂亮的淡紫色洋裝去參加春日花園派對。

toeic.example_en: She picked a small bunch of violet flowers from the corner of her garden.
toeic.example_zh: 她從花園角落採了一小束紫羅蘭色的花。

toeic.example_en: Her magenta scarf added a bright pop of color to her plain gray winter coat.
toeic.example_zh: 她的洋紅色圍巾為樸素的灰色冬大衣增添了亮眼的色彩。

toeic.example_en: She wore a coral colored lipstick that matched her bright summer dress nicely.
toeic.example_zh: 她塗了珊瑚色的口紅，跟她明亮的夏日洋裝搭配得很好。

toeic.example_en: The autumn leaves turned a deep crimson red in the cool October mornings.
toeic.example_zh: 在涼爽的十月清晨，秋葉變成了深紅色。

toeic.example_en: She wore a bright scarlet dress to her best friend's birthday dinner party.
toeic.example_zh: 她穿著一件鮮紅色的洋裝去參加好朋友的生日晚宴。

toeic.example_en: He chose a deep maroon tie to wear with his light gray office suit today.
toeic.example_zh: 他今天選了一條深栗色領帶配他淺灰色的辦公西裝。

toeic.example_en: She wore a burgundy sweater with her dark blue jeans on the cold autumn day.
toeic.example_zh: 在寒冷的秋日，她穿著一件酒紅色毛衣配深藍色牛仔褲。

toeic.example_en: She bought a rust colored sweater that looks great with her brown leather boots.
toeic.example_zh: 她買了一件鐵鏽色的毛衣，搭配她棕色皮靴看起來很棒。

toeic.example_en: Her shiny copper hair caught the warm sunlight during the late afternoon walk.
toeic.example_zh: 在傍晚散步時，她閃亮的銅色頭髮反射著溫暖的陽光。

toeic.example_en: She had a beautiful bronze tan after her long summer beach vacation last month.
toeic.example_zh: 她上個月結束漫長的夏日海灘度假後，曬出了美麗的古銅色皮膚。

toeic.example_en: The bride wore a beautiful ivory dress with tiny pearls along the long sleeves.
toeic.example_zh: 新娘穿著美麗的象牙白禮服，長袖上點綴著小小的珍珠。

toeic.example_en: She bought a beige coat that goes nicely with almost everything in her closet.
toeic.example_zh: 她買了一件米色大衣，幾乎可以搭配她衣櫃裡所有的衣服。

toeic.example_en: He wore khaki pants and a white polo shirt to his casual office party.
toeic.example_zh: 他穿著卡其褲和白色POLO衫參加他輕鬆的辦公室派對。

toeic.example_en: He bought an olive green jacket for the autumn hiking trip in the mountains.
toeic.example_zh: 他為秋天的山區健行買了一件橄欖綠的夾克。

toeic.example_en: She painted her kitchen walls a soft mint green color last summer vacation.
toeic.example_zh: 去年暑假，她把廚房的牆壁漆成了柔和的薄荷綠色。

toeic.example_en: She chose a sage green color for the walls of her cozy reading room.
toeic.example_zh: 她為舒適的閱讀室牆壁選了鼠尾草綠的顏色。

toeic.example_en: He wore a tan jacket and brown boots for the family weekend country trip.
toeic.example_zh: 他穿著棕褐色夾克和棕色靴子，參加家庭週末鄉村之旅。

toeic.example_en: She bought a small silver necklace with a tiny heart for her daughter's birthday.
toeic.example_zh: 她為女兒的生日買了一條有小愛心的小銀項鍊。

toeic.example_en: She wore a shiny metallic skirt to the lively dance party last Friday night.
toeic.example_zh: 上週五晚上她穿著一條亮閃閃的金屬色短裙去參加熱鬧的舞會。

toeic.example_en: She wore neon yellow shorts so drivers could easily see her on her morning run.
toeic.example_zh: 她穿著螢光黃色短褲，這樣晨跑時駕駛可以輕易看見她。

toeic.example_en: She loves wearing soft pastel colors during the warm cheerful spring season.
toeic.example_zh: 她喜歡在溫暖愉快的春季穿柔和的粉彩色衣服。

toeic.example_en: The road workers wore fluorescent orange vests to stay safe near busy traffic.
toeic.example_zh: 道路工人穿著螢光橙色背心，在繁忙交通附近保持安全。

toeic.example_en: He has a huge collection of T-shirts in many different colors and styles.
toeic.example_zh: 他收藏了許多不同顏色和款式的T恤，數量龐大。

toeic.example_en: The baby has tiny fingers and toes that everyone in the family loves to count.
toeic.example_zh: 嬰兒有著小小的手指和腳趾，家裡每個人都喜歡數它們。

toeic.example_en: She wore a thick coat and warm boots for the snowy walk to the bus stop.
toeic.example_zh: 她穿著厚大衣和溫暖靴子，在雪地裡走到公車站。

toeic.example_en: She wore a thin cotton dress because the weather was very warm and sunny.
toeic.example_zh: 她穿著一件薄薄的棉質洋裝，因為天氣非常溫暖晴朗。

toeic.example_en: She wore a wide black belt around her waist to highlight her summer dress.
toeic.example_zh: 她在腰間繫了一條寬寬的黑色腰帶來突顯她的夏日洋裝。

toeic.example_en: His narrow shoes hurt his feet after walking around the city all afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 在城裡走了一整個下午後，他窄窄的鞋子讓他的腳很痛。

toeic.example_en: She touched the painted wall with her fingertip to check if it was still wet.
toeic.example_zh: 她用指尖輕觸塗了油漆的牆壁，看看是不是還沒乾。

toeic.example_en: She got a small piercing on her earlobe so she could wear pretty earrings.
toeic.example_zh: 她在耳垂上穿了一個小洞，這樣就可以戴漂亮的耳環了。

toeic.example_en: She felt warm air flow gently through her nostril on the cool autumn morning.
toeic.example_zh: 在涼爽的秋日早晨，她感覺溫暖的空氣輕輕地從鼻孔流過。

toeic.example_en: She felt a small chill run down her spine when she heard the strange noise.
toeic.example_zh: 當她聽到奇怪的聲音時，感覺一陣寒意從脊椎流過。

toeic.example_en: He broke a rib when he fell off his bicycle during the long mountain ride.
toeic.example_zh: 他在山地長途騎乘時從腳踏車上摔下來，斷了一根肋骨。

toeic.example_en: The little boy wore a Halloween costume with a small white skull on the front.
toeic.example_zh: 小男孩穿著一件萬聖節服裝，前面有一個小小的白色頭骨。

toeic.example_en: The pupil of his eye looked very small under the bright office light.
toeic.example_zh: 在明亮的辦公室燈光下，他的瞳孔看起來很小。

toeic.example_en: She wore a bright red lipstick to her cousin's birthday dinner last weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 上週末，她塗著鮮紅口紅去參加表姊的生日晚宴。

toeic.example_en: She put a little pink blush on her cheeks before going to the family photo session.
toeic.example_zh: 在去家庭攝影前，她在臉頰上塗了一點粉色腮紅。

toeic.example_en: She put on black mascara to make her long eyelashes look fuller and darker.
toeic.example_zh: 她塗了黑色睫毛膏讓她的長睫毛看起來更濃密更深。

toeic.example_en: She drew a thin line of eyeliner above her lashes for the special dinner party.
toeic.example_zh: 她在睫毛上方畫了一條細細的眼線，準備參加特別的晚宴。

toeic.example_en: She used a soft pink eye shadow to match her pretty pastel evening dress.
toeic.example_zh: 她使用柔和的粉色眼影來搭配她漂亮的粉彩晚禮服。

toeic.example_en: He sprayed a little cologne on his neck before leaving for the morning meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 在出發參加早晨會議前，他在脖子上噴了一點古龍水。

toeic.example_en: He likes to groom himself carefully before going to any important social event.
toeic.example_zh: 在參加任何重要社交活動前，他喜歡仔細地整理自己的儀容。

toeic.example_en: He went to the barber to trim his beard before the family holiday photo.
toeic.example_zh: 在拍家庭節日照片前，他去理髮店修剪了鬍鬚。

toeic.example_en: She decided to dye her hair a soft brown color for the new season.
toeic.example_zh: 她決定為新的季節把頭髮染成柔和的棕色。

toeic.example_en: The children ran barefoot across the warm yellow sand at the family beach.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們赤腳跑過家庭海灘溫暖的黃色沙子。

toeic.example_en: He put on his soft brown slipper as soon as he came home from work today.
toeic.example_zh: 他今天一下班回家就穿上柔軟的棕色拖鞋。

toeic.example_en: He bought a pair of brown leather loafers for his new office job downtown.
toeic.example_zh: 他為市中心的新辦公室工作買了一雙棕色皮革樂福鞋。

toeic.example_en: She wore black flats to walk comfortably around the city all morning today.
toeic.example_zh: 她今天穿著黑色平底鞋舒服地在城裡走了一整個早上。

toeic.example_en: She wore black pumps with her gray skirt to the very important office meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 她穿著黑色高跟鞋配灰色短裙去參加非常重要的辦公室會議。

toeic.example_en: She wore brown leather sandals to the beach during her warm summer vacation.
toeic.example_zh: 在溫暖的暑假，她穿著棕色皮涼鞋去海灘。

toeic.example_en: The little boy learned to tie his own shoelace at school last Thursday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 小男孩上週四早上在學校學會了自己綁鞋帶。

toeic.example_en: The sole of his old running shoe started to peel off after the long race.
toeic.example_zh: 他舊跑鞋的鞋底在長距離比賽後開始脫落。

toeic.example_en: He added a soft insole to his shoes to make them more comfortable for work.
toeic.example_zh: 他在鞋子裡加了一塊柔軟的鞋墊，讓上班時更舒適。

toeic.example_en: She fastened the small silver buckle on her belt before going to the meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 在去開會前，她扣上腰帶上的小銀帶扣。

toeic.example_en: The strap of her bag broke as she was walking quickly to the morning bus.
toeic.example_zh: 當她快步走向早班公車時，包包的帶子斷了。

toeic.example_en: She used a small black clip to keep her bangs away from her tired eyes.
toeic.example_zh: 她用一個小小的黑色髮夾，把瀏海從疲倦的眼睛上撥開。

toeic.example_en: She used a small hairpin to keep her long brown hair neatly out of her face.
toeic.example_zh: 她用一個小髮夾，把長長的棕髮整齊地別離臉龐。

toeic.example_en: The little girl wore a pink flower barrette to school on her sixth birthday.
toeic.example_zh: 小女孩在六歲生日那天戴著一個粉色花朵髮夾去上學。

toeic.example_en: She tied her hair up with a soft pink scrunchie before her morning workout class.
toeic.example_zh: 在早晨的健身課之前，她用一個柔軟的粉色髮圈把頭髮綁起來。

toeic.example_en: She used a small tweezer to carefully remove a tiny splinter from her thumb.
toeic.example_zh: 她用一把小鑷子小心地把拇指上的小木刺夾出來。

toeic.example_en: She has a clear bright complexion thanks to drinking plenty of water daily.
toeic.example_zh: 她每天喝大量的水，所以擁有清透明亮的膚色。

toeic.example_en: The young swimmer has a strong physique from years of daily morning training.
toeic.example_zh: 這位年輕游泳選手因多年的每日晨訓而擁有強健的體格。

toeic.example_en: Her dance teacher always tells her to maintain a tall straight standing posture.
toeic.example_zh: 她的舞蹈老師總是叫她保持高挺直立的站姿。

toeic.example_en: The young basketball player has a tall stature that helps him reach high shots.
toeic.example_zh: 這位年輕籃球員身材高挑，有助於他完成高位投籃。

toeic.example_en: His friend has a strong athletic build from years of regular sports training.
toeic.example_zh: 他的朋友因多年規律的運動訓練而擁有強健運動員的體型。

toeic.example_en: The little kitty plays with a ball of yarn near the window every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 那隻小貓咪每天早上都在窗邊玩毛線球。

toeic.example_en: My new doggy loves to chase his tail and run around the living room.
toeic.example_zh: 我的新小狗狗喜歡追自己的尾巴並在客廳裡跑來跑去。

toeic.example_en: My hamster sleeps all day and runs on his wheel late at night.
toeic.example_zh: 我的倉鼠白天睡覺，晚上很晚才在他的滾輪上跑。

toeic.example_en: The white rabbit eats fresh carrots and hops around the small backyard garden.
toeic.example_zh: 白兔子吃新鮮的紅蘿蔔，在小後院花園裡跳來跳去。

toeic.example_en: I won a small goldfish at the fair and now keep it in a glass bowl.
toeic.example_zh: 我在園遊會贏了一隻小金魚，現在把牠養在玻璃缸裡。

toeic.example_en: Her colorful parrot can say hello and whistle a short song every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 她那隻色彩鮮豔的鸚鵡每天早上都會說哈囉並吹一段短歌。

toeic.example_en: The yellow canary sings sweet songs from its cage by the kitchen window.
toeic.example_zh: 黃色金絲雀在廚房窗邊的籠子裡唱著甜美的歌。

toeic.example_en: The kids feed their guinea pig fresh lettuce and clean its cage every weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們每個週末餵天竺鼠新鮮的萵苣並清理牠的籠子。

toeic.example_en: Our pet turtle moves slowly across the warm rocks under the morning sunshine.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的寵物烏龜在早晨的陽光下慢慢爬過溫暖的石頭。

toeic.example_en: A small green frog jumped from the lily pad into the quiet pond water.
toeic.example_zh: 一隻小綠青蛙從荷葉跳進安靜的池塘水裡。

toeic.example_en: Children love to feed bread to the ducks swimming in the village pond.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡餵麵包給在村裡池塘游泳的鴨子。

toeic.example_en: Please put your dog on a leash before entering the public park area.
toeic.example_zh: 進入公園公共區域之前請給你的狗繫上牽繩。

toeic.example_en: The puppy gave me his paw when I held out a small treat.
toeic.example_zh: 當我拿出一個小零食時，小狗把腳掌伸給我。

toeic.example_en: My dog wags his tail happily whenever I come home from work.
toeic.example_zh: 每當我下班回家，我的狗都會開心地搖尾巴。

toeic.example_en: The cat has soft gray fur that feels warm under my fingers.
toeic.example_zh: 這隻貓有柔軟的灰色毛皮，摸起來在我手指下感覺很溫暖。

toeic.example_en: Long white whiskers help a cat sense things in the dark hallway.
toeic.example_zh: 長長的白鬍鬚幫助貓在黑暗的走廊中感知物體。

toeic.example_en: Friendly dogs usually wag their tails when they meet a kind stranger.
toeic.example_zh: 友善的狗遇到善良的陌生人時通常會搖尾巴。

toeic.example_en: My dog loves to fetch the small red ball at the park every afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我的狗每天下午都喜歡在公園裡撿回小紅球。

toeic.example_en: Please give the puppy a safe toy to chew so he stops biting shoes.
toeic.example_zh: 請給小狗一個安全的玩具來咀嚼，這樣他就不會再咬鞋子。

toeic.example_en: Dogs love to sniff every tree and flower along the morning walking trail.
toeic.example_zh: 狗喜歡聞早晨散步小徑上每棵樹和每朵花。

toeic.example_en: The little kitten will lick its paws after finishing a small bowl of food.
toeic.example_zh: 小貓吃完一小碗食物後會舔自己的腳掌。

toeic.example_en: My cat begins to purr softly whenever I gently pet her back.
toeic.example_zh: 每當我輕輕摸她的背，我的貓就會輕輕發出咕嚕聲。

toeic.example_en: The hungry cat will meow loudly until I fill her food bowl.
toeic.example_zh: 肚子餓的貓會大聲喵喵叫，直到我把她的食物碗裝滿。

toeic.example_en: I always give my dog a small pet snack after our evening walk.
toeic.example_zh: 我每次傍晚散步後都會給我的狗一個小寵物零食。

toeic.example_en: We buy a big bag of dry kibble for our two dogs every month.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每個月為兩隻狗買一大包乾飼料。

toeic.example_en: Our trainer rewards the puppy with a small biscuit after each successful trick.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的訓練師在小狗每次成功表演後給他一塊小餅乾。

toeic.example_en: We take our cat to the vet for a checkup once every six months.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每六個月帶貓去獸醫那裡做一次健康檢查。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 健康檢查，健康評估
toeic.example_en: A yearly wellness exam helps the doctor find small problems in your pet early.
toeic.example_zh: 年度健康評估幫助醫生及早發現寵物的小問題。

toeic.example_en: There is a new animal hospital on the corner near our local supermarket.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們當地超市附近的轉角有一家新的動物醫院。

toeic.example_en: We adopted our friendly dog from the city animal shelter last spring.
toeic.example_zh: 去年春天我們從市立動物收容所領養了我們友善的狗。

toeic.example_en: Many families adopt cats and dogs from local shelters every weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 許多家庭每週末從當地收容所領養貓狗。

toeic.example_en: Volunteers rescue lost dogs and bring them to a warm and safe place.
toeic.example_zh: 志工救援走失的狗，並把牠們帶到溫暖安全的地方。

toeic.example_en: A small stray cat sleeps under our porch every cold winter night.
toeic.example_zh: 每個寒冷的冬夜，一隻小流浪貓都睡在我們的門廊下。

toeic.example_en: Please use a pet brush on your dog every week to keep his coat soft.
toeic.example_zh: 請每週用寵物刷幫你的狗刷毛，讓牠的毛皮柔軟。

toeic.example_en: We usually bathe our small dog in the bathtub once a month.
toeic.example_zh: 我們通常每個月在浴缸裡幫我們的小狗洗一次澡。

toeic.example_en: Remember to nourish the fish every morning before you leave for school.
toeic.example_zh: 記得每天早上去上學前餵食魚。

toeic.example_en: Please wash the pet dish after every meal to keep it clean.
toeic.example_zh: 請每餐後清洗寵物碗以保持乾淨。

toeic.example_en: We change the cat litter in the box twice every week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每週更換貓砂盆裡的貓砂兩次。

toeic.example_en: The little hamster runs around inside its bright orange plastic cage.
toeic.example_zh: 小倉鼠在牠明亮的橘色塑膠籠子裡跑來跑去。

toeic.example_en: We built a wooden hutch in the garden for our two pet rabbits.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在花園裡為我們的兩隻寵物兔蓋了一個木製兔籠。

toeic.example_en: The little bird rests on the wooden perch inside its cage at night.
toeic.example_zh: 小鳥晚上停在牠籠子裡的木棲木上休息。

toeic.example_en: A small bird built a nest in the tree behind our garden gate.
toeic.example_zh: 一隻小鳥在我們花園門後的樹上築了一個巢。

toeic.example_en: The young bird flapped its wing and tried to fly for the first time.
toeic.example_zh: 小鳥拍動牠的翅膀，第一次嘗試飛行。

toeic.example_en: I found a small blue feather on the path during our morning walk.
toeic.example_zh: 我在早晨散步時在小徑上發現了一根小藍羽毛。

toeic.example_en: The parrot uses its strong beak to break open small sunflower seeds.
toeic.example_zh: 鸚鵡用牠強壯的鳥喙咬開小葵花籽。

toeic.example_en: Small birds chirp loudly in the trees every spring morning at sunrise.
toeic.example_zh: 每年春天日出時，小鳥們在樹上大聲啁啾。

toeic.example_en: The young birds tweet softly when they wait for their mother to return.
toeic.example_zh: 小鳥們等待媽媽回來時輕輕地吱喳叫。

toeic.example_en: A brown squirrel ran up the tall oak tree with a nut in its mouth.
toeic.example_zh: 一隻棕色松鼠嘴裡叼著堅果跑上高大的橡樹。

toeic.example_en: We saw a quiet deer drinking from the small stream in the forest.
toeic.example_zh: 我們看見一隻安靜的鹿在森林裡的小溪邊喝水。

toeic.example_en: A red fox ran across the country road just before the morning sunrise.
toeic.example_zh: 就在早晨日出前，一隻紅狐狸跑過鄉村道路。

toeic.example_en: An owl hoots softly outside my window every quiet evening in autumn.
toeic.example_zh: 每個秋天安靜的傍晚，一隻貓頭鷹在我的窗外輕輕鳴叫。

toeic.example_en: A small sparrow lands on our windowsill to eat crumbs every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上一隻小麻雀停在我們的窗台上吃麵包屑。

toeic.example_en: Many swallow birds fly low over the pond before the warm spring rain.
toeic.example_zh: 許多燕子在溫暖春雨來臨前低飛掠過池塘。

toeic.example_en: Gray pigeons gather on the square and look for crumbs near the benches.
toeic.example_zh: 灰鴿子聚集在廣場上，在長椅旁尋找麵包屑。

toeic.example_en: A white dove flew gently across the clear blue sky this afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 今天下午一隻白鴿輕輕飛過晴朗的藍天。

toeic.example_en: Many seagulls circle the small fishing boat near the harbor at noon.
toeic.example_zh: 中午時許多海鷗在港口附近的小漁船周圍盤旋。

toeic.example_en: A pair of white swans swim slowly across the calm lake in the park.
toeic.example_zh: 一對白天鵝在公園的平靜湖面上慢慢游著。

toeic.example_en: The peacock at the zoo spread its colorful tail and walked slowly past us.
toeic.example_zh: 動物園的孔雀展開牠多彩的尾巴，慢慢從我們身邊走過。

toeic.example_en: Each morning the brown hen lays a single small egg in the wooden box.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上棕色母雞會在木箱裡下一顆小蛋。

toeic.example_en: The rooster crows loudly every morning before the sun rises over the farm.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上太陽從農場升起之前，公雞會大聲啼叫。

toeic.example_en: Five yellow chicks followed their mother around the small farmyard.
toeic.example_zh: 五隻黃色小雞跟著媽媽在小農場院子裡走。

toeic.example_en: A large white goose hissed at me when I walked too close to its nest.
toeic.example_zh: 當我走得太靠近牠的巢時，一隻大白鵝對我嘶嘶叫。

toeic.example_en: Two pink pigs roll happily in the soft mud behind the wooden barn.
toeic.example_zh: 兩隻粉紅色的豬在木倉後面的軟泥裡開心地打滾。

toeic.example_en: The brown cow eats green grass quietly in the wide open field.
toeic.example_zh: 棕色母牛在寬闊的田野裡安靜地吃綠草。

toeic.example_en: My uncle keeps two strong horses on his small farm in the country.
toeic.example_zh: 我叔叔在鄉下的小農場養了兩匹強壯的馬。

toeic.example_en: Many white sheep eat grass slowly on the green hillside every afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 每天下午許多白綿羊在綠色山坡上慢慢吃草。

toeic.example_en: A small brown goat climbed the rock and looked down at the visitors.
toeic.example_zh: 一隻小棕山羊爬上岩石，往下看著遊客。

toeic.example_en: The gray donkey carried two small bags of apples down the country road.
toeic.example_zh: 灰色驢子沿著鄉村道路馱著兩小袋蘋果。

toeic.example_en: The farmer wakes up very early to feed his cows and water his plants.
toeic.example_zh: 農夫很早起來餵牛和澆灌他的植物。

toeic.example_en: The old red barn behind the house keeps hay and tools for the animals.
toeic.example_zh: 屋後的舊紅穀倉裡放著乾草和動物用的工具。

toeic.example_en: We built a small chicken coop next to the vegetable garden last summer.
toeic.example_zh: 去年夏天我們在菜園旁邊蓋了一個小雞舍。

toeic.example_en: Horses eat dry hay in winter when the green grass stops growing outside.
toeic.example_zh: 冬天綠草停止生長時，馬會吃乾草。

toeic.example_en: The cows walk to the green pasture every morning after the gate opens.
toeic.example_zh: 每天早上門打開後，牛群會走到綠色牧場。

toeic.example_en: Yellow flowers bloom across the wide meadowland behind my grandparents country house.
toeic.example_zh: 黃色的花朵盛開在我祖父母鄉間屋後的寬闊草地上。

toeic.example_en: We had a small picnic on the soft green meadow near the forest edge.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在森林邊緣附近的柔軟綠色草地上吃了一頓小野餐。

toeic.example_en: A small orange grove grows near my aunt's house on the quiet hillside.
toeic.example_zh: 我阿姨家附近安靜的山坡上有一片小柳橙林。

toeic.example_en: We pick red apples in the orchard during the cool autumn weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在涼爽的秋天週末到果園裡摘紅蘋果。

toeic.example_en: My mother grows tomatoes and herbs inside the small backyard greenhouse all year.
toeic.example_zh: 我媽媽全年在後院的小溫室裡種番茄和香草。

toeic.example_en: We bought two young trees from a local plant nursery this weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 這個週末我們從當地的植物苗圃買了兩棵小樹。

toeic.example_en: Please plant the small seed in the soft soil and water it gently.
toeic.example_zh: 請把小種子種在鬆軟的土裡，然後輕輕澆水。

toeic.example_en: Good rich soil helps young plants grow tall and strong in the sun.
toeic.example_zh: 好的肥沃土壤能幫助小植物在陽光下長得又高又壯。

toeic.example_en: Tiny green sprouts begin to appear from the soil after only one week.
toeic.example_zh: 短短一週後，泥土中開始冒出一些小綠芽。

toeic.example_en: Please move each young seedling into a larger pot when it grows taller.
toeic.example_zh: 當每株幼苗長高時，請把它移到較大的盆子裡。

toeic.example_en: We planted a small sapling near the fence on Earth Day last spring.
toeic.example_zh: 去年春天的地球日，我們在圍籬旁種了一棵小樹苗。

toeic.example_en: Pink buds appear on the cherry tree just before the warm spring days.
toeic.example_zh: 在溫暖的春日來臨前，櫻花樹上會出現粉紅色的花苞。

toeic.example_en: The apple trees blossom with soft pink flowers every April in our garden.
toeic.example_zh: 每年四月我們花園裡的蘋果樹會盛開柔軟的粉紅花朵。

toeic.example_en: The yellow sunflowers bloom beautifully in the field every summer morning.
toeic.example_zh: 每個夏天早晨，黃色向日葵在田野裡美麗地盛開。

toeic.example_en: Pink petals fell gently from the cherry tree onto the path below.
toeic.example_zh: 粉紅色花瓣從櫻花樹上輕輕落到下面的小路上。

toeic.example_en: Please cut the flower stem at an angle before placing it in water.
toeic.example_zh: 請把花莖斜剪後再放入水中。

toeic.example_en: Tree roots grow deep underground to find water and stay strong in storms.
toeic.example_zh: 樹根深深扎入地下尋找水分，並在暴風雨中保持堅固。

toeic.example_en: Red and yellow leaves cover the quiet path through the park in autumn.
toeic.example_zh: 秋天紅黃色的樹葉覆蓋著穿過公園的安靜小路。

toeic.example_en: The thick brown bark of the old oak feels rough under my fingers.
toeic.example_zh: 老橡樹厚厚的棕色樹皮在我手指下感覺粗糙。

toeic.example_en: My father uses old wood from the garden to build a small bench.
toeic.example_zh: 我父親用花園裡的舊木頭做一張小長凳。

toeic.example_en: We sat on a big log near the campfire and told funny stories.
toeic.example_zh: 我們坐在營火旁的大原木上，講有趣的故事。

toeic.example_en: Soft green moss covers the stones along the cool forest stream.
toeic.example_zh: 柔軟的綠色苔蘚覆蓋著涼爽森林溪流旁的石頭。

toeic.example_en: A large green fern grows in the cool shade near our backyard fence.
toeic.example_zh: 一株大綠蕨在我們後院圍籬旁的陰涼處生長。

toeic.example_en: The small cactus on my desk needs water only once every two weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 我桌上的小仙人掌每兩週只需要澆一次水。

toeic.example_en: These cute succulent plants look nice on the window shelf in the kitchen.
toeic.example_zh: 這些可愛的多肉植物擺在廚房窗台上看起來很好看。

toeic.example_en: A leafy green houseplant by the window makes the room feel fresh.
toeic.example_zh: 窗邊一盆葉子茂盛的綠色室內植物讓房間感覺清新。

toeic.example_en: I grow small herbs like basil and mint on my sunny kitchen window.
toeic.example_zh: 我在陽光充足的廚房窗邊種一些像羅勒和薄荷的小香草。

toeic.example_en: Fresh basil leaves smell wonderful and taste great on a hot tomato pizza.
toeic.example_zh: 新鮮的羅勒葉聞起來很香，配熱番茄披薩很美味。

toeic.example_en: A small pot of rosemary grows nicely next to the kitchen door.
toeic.example_zh: 一小盆迷迭香在廚房門旁長得很好。

toeic.example_en: My grandmother grows beautiful red roses along the wooden fence each year.
toeic.example_zh: 我祖母每年沿著木圍籬種植美麗的紅玫瑰。

toeic.example_en: Pink and yellow tulips bloom in our front yard every April morning.
toeic.example_zh: 每年四月早晨，粉紅和黃色鬱金香在我們前院盛開。

toeic.example_en: Small white daisies grow in the open field next to our school yard.
toeic.example_zh: 小白雛菊長在我們學校操場旁的空地上。

toeic.example_en: A tall sunflower turns its big yellow head toward the warm afternoon light.
toeic.example_zh: 一株高大的向日葵把它大大的黃色花頭轉向溫暖的午後陽光。

toeic.example_en: White lilies smell sweet and look elegant on the small dining table.
toeic.example_zh: 白百合花聞起來香甜，擺在小餐桌上顯得優雅。

toeic.example_en: My aunt keeps a pink orchid on her quiet office windowsill year-round.
toeic.example_zh: 我阿姨整年都在她安靜的辦公室窗台上養一株粉紅蘭花。

toeic.example_en: Yellow daffodils bloom in our front garden every early March morning.
toeic.example_zh: 每年三月初的早晨，黃色水仙花在我們的前花園盛開。

toeic.example_en: Purple iris flowers grow next to the small pond in the park.
toeic.example_zh: 紫色鳶尾花長在公園小池塘旁邊。

toeic.example_en: White jasmine flowers smell wonderful on warm evenings near my back door.
toeic.example_zh: 白茉莉花在溫暖的夜晚於我家後門附近散發著迷人香氣。

toeic.example_en: A neat green privet separates our yard from the neighbor quiet driveway.
toeic.example_zh: 整齊的綠色女貞把我們的院子和鄰居安靜的車道隔開。

toeic.example_en: We trim the small green shrubs in the front yard every two weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每兩週修剪一次前院的小綠灌木。

toeic.example_en: A small rabbit hides under the rose bush near our garden gate.
toeic.example_zh: 一隻小兔子躲在我們花園門附近的玫瑰叢下。

toeic.example_en: Green vines climb the wooden fence around the small backyard garden.
toeic.example_zh: 綠色藤蔓爬上後院小花園周圍的木圍籬。

toeic.example_en: Old green ivy covers the brick walls of the small library building.
toeic.example_zh: 舊的綠色常春藤覆蓋著小圖書館建築的磚牆。

toeic.example_en: Tall green bamboo grows quickly along the small path beside our house.
toeic.example_zh: 高大的綠色竹子在我們家旁的小路邊快速生長。

toeic.example_en: An old oak tree gives wide shade over the picnic table every summer.
toeic.example_zh: 一棵老橡樹每年夏天為野餐桌提供大片陰涼。

toeic.example_en: Tall green pine trees grow along the cool walking trail behind the school.
toeic.example_zh: 高大的綠色松樹沿著學校後面涼爽的步道生長。

toeic.example_en: Red maple leaves fall slowly in our front yard every cool October afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 每個涼爽的十月下午，紅色楓葉慢慢落在我們的前院。

toeic.example_en: A soft willow tree stands beside the small lake in the public park.
toeic.example_zh: 一棵柔軟的柳樹立在公園裡的小湖邊。

toeic.example_en: White birch trees grow along the cool path through the quiet forest.
toeic.example_zh: 白樺樹沿著穿過安靜森林的涼爽小路生長。

toeic.example_en: The wide wood trunk has a small carved heart from many years ago.
toeic.example_zh: 寬大的樹幹上有一顆許多年前刻的小愛心。

toeic.example_en: A small bird sat on a low tree limb and sang a quiet morning song.
toeic.example_zh: 一隻小鳥停在低樹枝上，唱了一首安靜的晨歌。

toeic.example_en: The little bird used a small twig to build her nest in the tree.
toeic.example_zh: 小鳥用一根小細枝在樹上築巢。

toeic.example_en: I use a green watering can to water my flowers every quiet evening.
toeic.example_zh: 每個安靜的傍晚我都用綠色灑水壺幫我的花澆水。

toeic.example_en: We use a long garden hose to wash the car on sunny weekends.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在晴朗的週末用一條長花園水管洗車。

toeic.example_en: The garden sprinkler turns on automatically every morning at six o'clock sharp.
toeic.example_zh: 花園灑水器每天早上六點整自動打開。

toeic.example_en: I use a wooden rake to gather fall leaves in the front yard.
toeic.example_zh: 我用木耙子把前院的秋葉聚攏起來。

toeic.example_en: Please bring the small shovel so we can dig a hole for the tree.
toeic.example_zh: 請帶小鏟子來，這樣我們就能挖一個洞種樹。

toeic.example_en: A garden spade helps us dig small holes for new flower seeds.
toeic.example_zh: 園藝鏟幫助我們挖小洞種新的花籽。

toeic.example_en: Grandpa uses an old hoe to break the hard soil in the spring.
toeic.example_zh: 爺爺用舊鋤頭在春天弄碎硬土壤。

toeic.example_en: Use a small trowel to plant the new seedlings in the soft soil.
toeic.example_zh: 用小鏟子把新幼苗種到鬆軟的土裡。

toeic.example_en: Dad pushed the heavy wheelbarrow full of soil across the back garden.
toeic.example_zh: 爸爸推著裝滿土的沉重獨輪手推車穿過後花園。

toeic.example_en: A red tractor moved slowly through the wide green field at sunset.
toeic.example_zh: 一台紅色拖拉機在日落時慢慢駛過寬廣的綠色田野。

toeic.example_en: Farmers plow the dry soil before they plant new corn each spring.
toeic.example_zh: 農夫每年春天種新玉米前會先犁乾燥的土壤。

toeic.example_en: Green beans climb the small wooden trellis behind our kitchen window.
toeic.example_zh: 綠色豆子爬上我們廚房窗後的小木棚架。

toeic.example_en: I put fresh herbs in a small wooden planter near the front porch.
toeic.example_zh: 我把新鮮香草種在前門廊旁的小木花盆裡。

toeic.example_en: Add a little fertilizer to the soil to help your tomatoes grow strong.
toeic.example_zh: 在土裡加一點肥料，幫助你的番茄長得健壯。

toeic.example_en: We put food scraps in the compost bin behind the garden every week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每週把食物殘渣放進花園後面的堆肥桶裡。

toeic.example_en: We spread brown mulch around the young plants to keep the soil moist.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在小植物周圍鋪上棕色護根層以保持土壤濕潤。

toeic.example_en: Please pull every small weed from the vegetable bed this Saturday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 請在這個週六早上把菜畦裡的每一根小雜草拔掉。

toeic.example_en: We prune the rose bush each winter so it blooms well in spring.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每年冬天修剪玫瑰叢，這樣春天它才能開得好。

toeic.example_en: We need to transplant the young tomato plants into the larger garden bed.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要把番茄幼苗移植到較大的花圃裡。

toeic.example_en: Please repot the small cactus into a larger ceramic pot this weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 請在這個週末把小仙人掌換到一個較大的陶瓷盆裡。

toeic.example_en: Remember to sprinkle water on the houseplants twice a week during the dry summer.
toeic.example_zh: 記得在乾燥的夏天每週給室內植物灑水兩次。

toeic.example_en: We plant new flowers in the front yard at the start of every spring.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每年春天初在前院種新的花。

toeic.example_en: My little brother loves to grow tomatoes in our small kitchen window box.
toeic.example_zh: 我弟弟喜歡在我們廚房小窗台花箱裡種番茄。

toeic.example_en: These flowers will wilt quickly if you forget to water them today.
toeic.example_zh: 如果你今天忘記澆水，這些花會很快凋謝。

toeic.example_en: Leaves wither and turn brown on the small plant without enough sunlight.
toeic.example_zh: 陽光不足時，小植物上的葉子會枯萎變棕。

toeic.example_en: The kids play on the soft green lawn behind our family house every weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們每個週末都在我們家後面柔軟的綠色草坪上玩。

toeic.example_en: My father will mow the lawn this Saturday morning before lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 我父親會在這個週六早上午餐前割草坪。

toeic.example_en: Our new electric mower is quieter than the old red gas one.
toeic.example_zh: 我們新的電動割草機比舊的紅色汽油割草機安靜。

toeic.example_en: The kids ran around the small front yard with the friendly brown puppy.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們和那隻友善的棕色小狗在小前院裡跑來跑去。

toeic.example_en: We had a family dinner on the small sun deck last warm evening.
toeic.example_zh: 上個溫暖的傍晚我們在小日光甲板上吃了一頓愉快的家庭晚餐。

toeic.example_en: We sit on the side porch and watch the quiet rain every afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每天下午坐在側門廊上看安靜的雨。

toeic.example_en: Our wood plank platform has two soft chairs and a small plant nearby.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的木板平台上有兩張軟椅，附近還有一盆小植物。

toeic.example_en: We keep all the garden tools inside the small wooden shed near the gate.
toeic.example_zh: 我們把所有園藝工具都放在門邊的小木工具棚裡。

toeic.example_en: A quiet stone garden walk leads from the front gate to our garden door.
toeic.example_zh: 一條安靜的石子花園小徑從前門通往我們的花園門。

toeic.example_en: We followed a quiet nature trail and saw many beautiful wild flowers.
toeic.example_zh: 我們沿著一條安靜的自然步道走，看到許多美麗的野花。

toeic.example_en: Let us start the mountain hike before the warm afternoon sun gets too hot.
toeic.example_zh: 讓我們在溫暖的午後陽光變太熱之前開始登山健行。

toeic.example_en: Two friendly hikers waved at us from the top of the mountain trail.
toeic.example_zh: 兩位友善的健行者從山頂步道向我們揮手。

toeic.example_en: We sat around the warm fire pit and told funny stories late at night.
toeic.example_zh: 我們圍著溫暖的火坑坐著，深夜講有趣的故事。

toeic.example_en: We set up our small blue camp tent near the river before it got dark.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在天黑之前在河邊搭好了我們的小藍露營帳篷。

toeic.example_en: I packed water bottles and small snacks in my green hiking rucksack.
toeic.example_zh: 我在我的綠色健行背包裡裝了水瓶和小零食。

toeic.example_en: A small hiking compass helps you find your way back to the main trail.
toeic.example_zh: 一個小健行指南針能幫助你找到回到主步道的路。

toeic.example_en: Take a park brochure before you start the long forest trail.
toeic.example_zh: 在你開始走長的森林步道前，拿一份公園手冊。

toeic.example_en: Bring small binoculars so we can watch wild birds from far away.
toeic.example_zh: 帶上小雙筒望遠鏡，這樣我們就能從遠處觀察野鳥。

toeic.example_en: A cool clear rivulet flows quietly past our small mountain campsite.
toeic.example_zh: 一條清涼乾淨的小河安靜地從我們的小山中營地旁流過。

toeic.example_en: The kids love to play near the small creek behind the family farmhouse.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在家族農舍後面的小河邊玩。

toeic.example_en: A narrow brook runs quietly through the wide green field every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 一條窄小的溪流每天早晨安靜地流過寬闊的綠色田野。

toeic.example_en: We took many photos of the small waterfall during our weekend hiking trip.
toeic.example_zh: 週末健行旅程中我們拍了許多小瀑布的照片。

toeic.example_en: I picked up a smooth gray stone from the shore of the quiet lake.
toeic.example_zh: 我從安靜湖邊的岸上撿了一塊光滑的灰色石頭。

toeic.example_en: Climb carefully over the big rock and follow the trail to the top.
toeic.example_zh: 小心爬過這塊大岩石，然後沿著步道走到山頂。

toeic.example_en: I threw a small pebble into the calm lake to make tiny circles.
toeic.example_zh: 我把一顆小卵石扔進平靜的湖裡，激起一圈圈小漣漪。

toeic.example_en: A huge boulder sits beside the trail near the top of the mountain.
toeic.example_zh: 一塊巨大的圓石坐落在靠近山頂的步道旁。

toeic.example_en: We walked up the small grassy hillside to watch the beautiful sunset together.
toeic.example_zh: 我們一起走上長滿草的小山坡看美麗的日落。

toeic.example_en: Wild flowers cover the gentle grassy slope behind the old country church.
toeic.example_zh: 野花覆蓋著舊鄉村教堂後面平緩的草地斜坡。

toeic.example_en: A small clear river flows quietly through the wide green dale below.
toeic.example_zh: 一條清澈的小河安靜地流過下方寬闊的綠色山谷。

toeic.example_en: Please stay far away from the tall cliff edge near the ocean view.
toeic.example_zh: 請遠離靠近海景的高懸崖邊緣。

toeic.example_en: We found a small cave behind the waterfall during our family camping trip.
toeic.example_zh: 家庭露營旅行時我們在瀑布後面發現了一個小洞穴。

toeic.example_en: We walked along the rocky shore and looked for small colorful shells.
toeic.example_zh: 我們沿著石頭海岸行走，尋找小巧的彩色貝殼。

toeic.example_en: She found a pink shell on the sandy beach near the quiet lighthouse.
toeic.example_zh: 她在安靜燈塔附近的沙灘上發現了一個粉紅色貝殼。

toeic.example_en: The kids built a tall sand castle near the gentle ocean waves.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們在溫和的海浪附近堆了一座高高的沙堡。

toeic.example_en: The morning tide brings small shells and seaweed onto the sandy beach.
toeic.example_zh: 早晨的潮水把小貝殼和海草帶到沙灘上。

toeic.example_en: A gentle ripple came in slowly while we walked along the quiet ocean shore.
toeic.example_zh: 我們沿著安靜的海岸行走時，溫和的漣漪慢慢湧上來。

toeic.example_en: The little puppy jumped happily into a big puddle after the heavy rain.
toeic.example_zh: 下大雨後，小狗開心地跳進一個大水坑裡。

toeic.example_en: Our dog came home covered in soft brown mud from the wet garden.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的狗從濕花園回家時身上沾滿了軟軟的棕色泥巴。

toeic.example_en: A thin layer of dust covered the old garden chair on the back patio.
toeic.example_zh: 薄薄的一層灰塵覆蓋著後露台上的舊花園椅。

toeic.example_en: Small dew drops sparkled on the green grass early in the cool morning.
toeic.example_zh: 涼爽的清晨小露珠在綠草上閃閃發光。

toeic.example_en: Thick gray haze covered the small valley early on this cool autumn morning.
toeic.example_zh: 這個涼爽的秋天早晨，濃灰色的薄霧覆蓋著小山谷。

toeic.example_en: A soft mist hung over the quiet lake just after the morning sunrise.
toeic.example_zh: 早晨日出後不久，一層柔軟的薄霧籠罩著安靜的湖面。

toeic.example_en: Thin white frost covered the small garden plants this cold winter morning.
toeic.example_zh: 這個寒冷的冬天早晨，薄薄的白霜覆蓋著小花園植物。

toeic.example_en: A light drizzle started when we began our short hike along the trail.
toeic.example_zh: 我們開始沿著步道短途健行時，下起了小毛毛雨。

toeic.example_en: The sudden downpour soaked our picnic blanket on the open grassy field.
toeic.example_zh: 突如其來的傾盆大雨把我們野餐毯弄濕了，那時我們正在綠草地上。

toeic.example_en: She bought yellow puddle jumper boots for her son before the rainy season.
toeic.example_zh: 她在雨季前為兒子買了黃色雨鞋。

toeic.example_en: We woke up early to watch a beautiful sunrise from the small hilltop.
toeic.example_zh: 我們很早起來在小山頂上看美麗的日出。

toeic.example_en: Birds begin to sing softly at dawn before the rest of the village wakes.
toeic.example_zh: 黎明時鳥兒開始輕輕歌唱，村裡的其他人還沒醒。

toeic.example_en: We sat on the porch and watched the sky turn pink at dusk.
toeic.example_zh: 我們坐在門廊上看著黃昏時天空變成粉紅色。

toeic.example_en: Fireflies appear in the garden during the soft twilight on warm summer evenings.
toeic.example_zh: 溫暖的夏夜，螢火蟲在柔和的暮光中出現在花園裡。

toeic.example_en: A soft breeze cooled our faces during the long afternoon walk by the ocean.
toeic.example_zh: 下午在海邊長時間散步時，柔風吹涼了我們的臉。

toeic.example_en: We rested in the cool shade of a large old tree at noon.
toeic.example_zh: 我們中午在一棵大老樹的涼爽陰影下休息。

toeic.example_en: Houseplants need plenty of soft sunlight to grow strong and healthy indoors.
toeic.example_zh: 室內植物需要充足柔和的陽光才能長得健壯。

toeic.example_en: We walked through the quiet garden under the soft white moonbeam last night.
toeic.example_zh: 昨晚我們在柔和的白色月光下穿過安靜的花園。

toeic.example_en: She dug a small hole in the soft brown earth and planted three seeds.
toeic.example_zh: 她在柔軟的棕色泥土裡挖了一個小洞，種下了三顆種子。

toeic.example_en: Many small leaves lay on the cool ground after the heavy autumn rain.
toeic.example_zh: 秋雨大下後，許多小樹葉散落在涼爽的地面上。

toeic.example_en: Many kinds of wildlife live in the small forest behind the public school.
toeic.example_zh: 許多種野生動物住在公立學校後面的小森林裡。

toeic.example_en: Every animal needs a safe habitat with clean water and enough food.
toeic.example_zh: 每種動物都需要一個有乾淨水和足夠食物的安全棲息地。

toeic.example_en: Many wild flowers grow along the quiet path through the country fields.
toeic.example_zh: 許多野花沿著穿過鄉村田野的安靜小徑生長。

toeic.example_en: The small bird was very tame and ate seeds from my open hand.
toeic.example_zh: 那隻小鳥很馴服，從我攤開的手裡吃種子。

toeic.example_en: Our big dog is very gentle with small children at the local park.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的大狗對在當地公園裡的小孩非常溫和。

toeic.example_en: Our playful kitten jumps on a small toy ball every quiet afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我們愛玩的小貓每個安靜的下午都會撲跳一個小玩具球。

toeic.example_en: A loyal dog will follow his owner everywhere around the neighborhood park.
toeic.example_zh: 忠誠的狗會跟著主人在社區公園各處走。

toeic.example_en: Our fluffy white rabbit hides under the small wooden bench every afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 我們毛茸茸的白兔每天下午都躲在小木長凳下。

toeic.example_en: The little furry hamster sleeps inside a tiny wooden house all afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 毛茸茸的小倉鼠整個下午都睡在小木屋裡。

toeic.example_en: The small lizard has dry scaly skin and a long quiet brown tail.
toeic.example_zh: 小蜥蜴有乾燥多鱗的皮膚和一條長長安靜的棕色尾巴。

toeic.example_en: The wet dog became very smelly after running in the heavy rain today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天在大雨中跑步後，那隻濕狗變得非常臭。

toeic.example_en: The fragrant white flowers near the door smell sweet on warm summer nights.
toeic.example_zh: 門邊芳香的白花在溫暖的夏夜聞起來很香甜。

toeic.example_en: Not every wild berry is edible, so check carefully before you taste any.
toeic.example_zh: 並不是每種野生漿果都可食用，所以嘗任何之前請仔細檢查。

toeic.example_en: Some poisonous plants can hurt small dogs, so keep your puppy safe outdoors.
toeic.example_zh: 有些有毒植物會傷害小狗，所以在戶外要保護你的小狗。

toeic.example_en: Be careful of the sharp thorn on every red rose stem in the garden.
toeic.example_zh: 小心花園裡每根紅玫瑰莖上的尖刺。

toeic.example_en: We started a small vegetable garden in the backyard last warm spring weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 上個溫暖的春天週末我們在後院開始了一個小菜園。

toeic.example_en: Mother planted yellow tulips in the small flower bed by the front porch.
toeic.example_zh: 媽媽在前門廊旁的小花圃裡種了黃色鬱金香。

toeic.example_en: I bought a small flower bouquet of yellow roses for my mother on her birthday.
toeic.example_zh: 我在媽媽生日時為她買了一束小黃玫瑰花束。

toeic.example_en: A pretty glass vase of pink flowers sits on our small kitchen table.
toeic.example_zh: 一個漂亮的玻璃花瓶裝著粉紅花，放在我們的小廚房桌上。

toeic.example_en: We visited a small pet shop downtown and saw many friendly small kittens.
toeic.example_zh: 我們逛了市區的小寵物店，看到許多友善的小貓。

toeic.example_en: We hired a friendly pet sitter to feed our cat during the long weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 我們請了一位友善的寵物保姆在長週末期間餵我們的貓。

toeic.example_en: Our dog walker takes the puppy out twice a day around the block.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的遛狗者每天帶小狗出去兩次繞街區散步。

toeic.example_en: Many friendly dogs run and play together in the local neighborhood dog park.
toeic.example_zh: 許多友善的狗一起在當地社區狗公園裡跑步玩耍。

toeic.example_en: Please put the cat in the soft pet carrier before our trip to the vet.
toeic.example_zh: 去獸醫前請把貓放進軟的寵物提籠裡。

toeic.example_en: A soft harness fits the small dog better than a tight neck collar.
toeic.example_zh: 柔軟的牽繩背帶比緊的項圈更適合小狗。

toeic.example_en: I bought a new plush toy for my puppy at the pet shop today.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天在寵物店為我的小狗買了一個新的絨毛玩具。

toeic.example_en: My dog chases the small red soft ball across the grass every Saturday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我的狗每個星期六早上追著小紅軟球穿過草地。

toeic.example_en: The puppy loves to tug on the soft rope toy with his small teeth.
toeic.example_zh: 小狗喜歡用他的小牙齒拉那條軟繩玩具。

toeic.example_en: My cat will leap onto the kitchen shelf to find her favorite warm spot.
toeic.example_zh: 我的貓會跳上廚房架子，找她最喜歡的溫暖位置。

toeic.example_en: Two little birds perch on the wooden fence outside my bedroom window every morning.
toeic.example_zh: 兩隻小鳥每天早晨棲息在我臥室窗外的木圍籬上。

toeic.example_en: A good pet owner takes the dog out for a walk every quiet evening.
toeic.example_zh: 一個好的寵物主人每個安靜的傍晚都會帶狗出去散步。

toeic.example_en: Please put a small id tag on the cat collar with our phone number.
toeic.example_zh: 請在貓的項圈上加一個小身分牌，寫上我們的電話號碼。

toeic.example_en: The little blue collar tag on my dog has my home address printed.
toeic.example_zh: 我家狗項圈上的小藍項圈標籤印著我家的地址。

toeic.example_en: Our two friendly cats are good playmates and often nap close together.
toeic.example_zh: 我們兩隻友善的貓是好玩伴，常常靠在一起睡覺。

toeic.example_en: Please clean the litter box every evening to keep the kitchen smelling fresh.
toeic.example_zh: 請每天晚上清理貓砂盆，讓廚房保持清新的味道。

toeic.example_en: Our cat uses the tall scratch post every morning before her first meal.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的貓每天早上第一餐前都會用那根高貓抓柱。

toeic.example_en: She always greets us with a cheerful smile in the morning.
toeic.example_zh: 她早上總是用開朗的笑容迎接我們。

toeic.example_en: I felt exhausted after walking ten kilometers in the sun.
toeic.example_zh: 在太陽下走了十公里後，我感到筋疲力盡。

toeic.example_en: He was anxious about the meeting on Monday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 他對星期一早上的會議感到焦慮。

toeic.example_en: Please stay calm and wait for further instructions.
toeic.example_zh: 請保持冷靜並等待進一步指示。

toeic.example_en: I get nervous when I have to speak in front of a crowd.
toeic.example_zh: 當我必須在人群面前說話時，我會感到緊張。

toeic.example_en: She was thrilled to hear about her job offer today.
toeic.example_zh: 她聽到今天的工作邀約後非常興奮。

toeic.example_en: We are delighted to welcome you to our new office.
toeic.example_zh: 我們很高興歡迎您來到我們的新辦公室。

toeic.example_en: The manager seemed pleased with our team's progress.
toeic.example_zh: 經理似乎對我們團隊的進展感到滿意。

toeic.example_en: Most customers were satisfied with the service yesterday.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數顧客對昨天的服務感到滿意。

toeic.example_en: The whole family had a joyful weekend at the park.
toeic.example_zh: 全家在公園度過了一個歡樂的週末。

toeic.example_en: I am very grateful for all your help last week.
toeic.example_zh: 我非常感激你上週給我的所有幫助。

toeic.example_en: We are thankful that the rain stopped before the event.
toeic.example_zh: 我們感謝在活動前雨停了。

toeic.example_en: His parents are proud of his hard work this year.
toeic.example_zh: 他的父母為他今年的努力感到驕傲。

toeic.example_en: She felt confident before the presentation on Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 她在星期五的簡報前感到很有信心。

toeic.example_en: We are hopeful that the project will finish on time.
toeic.example_zh: 我們希望這個專案能準時完成。

toeic.example_en: The garden looks peaceful in the early morning light.
toeic.example_zh: 花園在清晨的光線下看起來很寧靜。

toeic.example_en: He felt content after a nice dinner with friends.
toeic.example_zh: 和朋友吃完美好的晚餐後，他感到滿足。

toeic.example_en: We were amazed by the beautiful view from the hill.
toeic.example_zh: 我們對從山上看到的美景感到驚奇。

toeic.example_en: She was astonished to find her keys on the desk.
toeic.example_zh: 她在桌上找到鑰匙時大為驚訝。

toeic.example_en: I was surprised when my best friend called me today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天我最好的朋友打電話給我時，我很驚訝。

toeic.example_en: Everyone looked shocked when the lights went out.
toeic.example_zh: 燈熄滅時，每個人看起來都很震驚。

toeic.example_en: The little boy was scared of the loud thunder last night.
toeic.example_zh: 昨晚那個小男孩害怕巨大的雷聲。

toeic.example_en: She is afraid of the dark and always uses a night light.
toeic.example_zh: 她怕黑，所以總是用夜燈。

toeic.example_en: My mother gets worried if I come home very late.
toeic.example_zh: 如果我很晚回家，媽媽會擔心。

toeic.example_en: He looks stressed because of all the deadlines this week.
toeic.example_zh: 他看起來壓力很大，因為這週有很多截止日期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 沮喪的；不開心的
toeic.example_en: She was upset when her plans got cancelled on Sunday.
toeic.example_zh: 當她的計畫在星期日被取消時，她很沮喪。

toeic.example_en: The driver got angry when another car cut in front.
toeic.example_zh: 當另一輛車插隊時，駕駛生氣了。

toeic.example_en: I felt annoyed by the noise from the neighbor's apartment.
toeic.example_zh: 鄰居公寓的噪音讓我感到厭煩。

toeic.example_en: He was frustrated because the printer kept jamming today.
toeic.example_zh: 他很沮喪，因為印表機今天一直卡紙。

toeic.example_en: We were disappointed that the concert was postponed again.
toeic.example_zh: 音樂會再次延期，我們很失望。

toeic.example_en: She felt sad when her good friend moved to another city.
toeic.example_zh: 當她的好朋友搬到另一個城市時，她感到難過。

toeic.example_en: He feels lonely on weekends without his family nearby.
toeic.example_zh: 週末沒有家人在身邊時，他感到孤獨。

toeic.example_en: The new student felt homesick during the first week.
toeic.example_zh: 這位新生在第一週感到想家。

toeic.example_en: The kids got bored during the long afternoon drive.
toeic.example_zh: 孩子們在漫長的下午車程中感到無聊。

toeic.example_en: I was confused by the new schedule for next month.
toeic.example_zh: 我對下個月的新時間表感到困惑。

toeic.example_en: She looked puzzled when she opened the empty box.
toeic.example_zh: 當她打開那個空盒子時，看起來很困惑。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 尷尬的；難為情的
toeic.example_en: He felt embarrassed after forgetting her name twice.
toeic.example_zh: 他兩次忘記她的名字後感到尷尬。

toeic.example_en: She felt ashamed for being late to the morning meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 她對早上開會遲到感到慚愧。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 內疚的；有罪惡感的
toeic.example_en: I felt guilty about eating the last piece of cake.
toeic.example_zh: 我吃掉最後一塊蛋糕後感到內疚。

toeic.example_en: He was jealous when his brother got a new bike.
toeic.example_zh: 當他哥哥得到新腳踏車時，他感到嫉妒。

toeic.example_en: I am envious of her ability to wake up early every day.
toeic.example_zh: 我羨慕她每天都能早起的能力。

toeic.example_en: She was eager to start her first day at school.
toeic.example_zh: 她迫不及待要開始上學的第一天。

toeic.example_en: He is enthusiastic about cooking new recipes on Saturdays.
toeic.example_zh: 他熱衷於在星期六烹飪新食譜。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 熱情的；充滿熱情的
toeic.example_en: She is passionate about music and plays piano daily.
toeic.example_zh: 她對音樂充滿熱情，每天都彈鋼琴。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 覺得好笑的；開心的
toeic.example_en: We were amused by the funny stories he told tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 我們對他今晚講的有趣故事感到開心。

toeic.example_en: I am glad that you can join us this Sunday.
toeic.example_zh: 我很高興這個星期日你可以加入我們。

toeic.example_en: Everyone was merry during the holiday dinner last night.
toeic.example_zh: 昨晚假日晚餐時，每個人都很歡樂。

toeic.example_en: She had a blissful smile after the relaxing morning walk.
toeic.example_zh: 輕鬆的晨間散步後，她露出幸福的微笑。

toeic.example_en: He felt miserable with a cold during the cold January week.
toeic.example_zh: 在寒冷的一月那週，他因感冒感到很痛苦。

toeic.example_en: The weather has been gloomy all week without any sun.
toeic.example_zh: 這週天氣一直陰沉，完全沒有陽光。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 喜怒無常的；情緒化的
toeic.example_en: She gets moody when she does not sleep enough.
toeic.example_zh: 她睡眠不足時會變得情緒化。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 脾氣壞的；易怒的
toeic.example_en: Dad becomes grumpy if he misses his morning coffee.
toeic.example_zh: 如果爸爸沒喝到早晨的咖啡，他會變得脾氣很差。

toeic.example_en: The baby gets cranky around nap time every afternoon.
toeic.example_zh: 嬰兒每天下午午睡時間前後都會變得煩躁。

toeic.example_en: I was irritated by the slow service this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 今早緩慢的服務讓我感到惱怒。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 狂怒的；非常生氣的
toeic.example_en: She was furious when the package arrived broken.
toeic.example_zh: 當包裹送來時破損了，她非常生氣。

toeic.example_en: Do not get mad at me for telling the truth.
toeic.example_zh: 不要因為我說實話而生我的氣。

toeic.example_en: The math question was puzzling for the whole class.
toeic.example_zh: 這道數學題讓全班都感到困惑。

toeic.example_en: She gave a touching speech at her father's birthday party.
toeic.example_zh: 她在父親的生日派對上發表了一篇感人的演說。

toeic.example_en: I was deeply moved by the kindness of strangers today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天陌生人的善意深深感動了我。

toeic.example_en: The teacher was impressed by his clear answer in class.
toeic.example_zh: 老師對他在課堂上清楚的回答印象深刻。

toeic.example_en: He is fascinated by old maps from many centuries ago.
toeic.example_zh: 他對許多世紀以前的舊地圖深深著迷。

toeic.example_en: She was fearful of speaking in front of new people.
toeic.example_zh: 她害怕在陌生人面前發言。

toeic.example_en: I felt uneasy walking home alone late at night.
toeic.example_zh: 深夜獨自走回家讓我感到不安。

toeic.example_en: The room felt tense before the final scores were read.
toeic.example_zh: 在宣讀最後成績之前，房間裡氣氛很緊張。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 鬆了一口氣的；如釋重負的
toeic.example_en: He was relieved when the meeting finally ended on Tuesday.
toeic.example_zh: 當會議終於在星期二結束時，他鬆了一口氣。

toeic.example_en: She felt comforted by her grandmother's warm hug.
toeic.example_zh: 祖母溫暖的擁抱讓她感到安慰。

toeic.example_en: I felt encouraged by my coach after the long practice.
toeic.example_zh: 漫長的練習後，我的教練讓我感到備受鼓勵。

toeic.example_en: Do not feel discouraged by one bad day at work.
toeic.example_zh: 不要因為工作上一個糟糕的日子就感到氣餒。

toeic.example_en: He felt hopeless after losing his job last March.
toeic.example_zh: 去年三月失業後，他感到絕望。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 無助的；無能為力的
toeic.example_en: She felt helpless when the train left without her.
toeic.example_zh: 當火車沒等她就開走時，她感到無助。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 焦躁不安的；坐立難安的
toeic.example_en: The children were restless on the last day of school.
toeic.example_zh: 在學校的最後一天，孩子們坐立難安。

toeic.example_en: She feels energetic after her short morning jog.
toeic.example_zh: 短暫的晨間慢跑後，她感覺精力充沛。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 行動緩慢的；無精打采的
toeic.example_en: I feel sluggish on rainy Monday mornings before coffee.
toeic.example_zh: 下雨的星期一早上喝咖啡前，我感覺無精打采。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 想睡的；昏昏欲睡的
toeic.example_en: He felt drowsy after a heavy lunch around noon.
toeic.example_zh: 中午吃了豐盛的午餐後，他感到昏昏欲睡。

toeic.example_en: Drivers must stay alert during long evening trips.
toeic.example_zh: 在長時間的夜間行程中，駕駛必須保持警覺。

toeic.example_en: She stayed focused during the entire afternoon workshop.
toeic.example_zh: 整個下午的工作坊期間，她都保持專注。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 分心的；心不在焉的
toeic.example_en: He looked distracted during the morning briefing today.
toeic.example_zh: 他在今天早上的簡報中看起來心不在焉。

toeic.example_en: The driver became impatient during rush hour traffic.
toeic.example_zh: 尖峰時段交通讓駕駛變得不耐煩。

toeic.example_en: She stays optimistic even on the worst days.
toeic.example_zh: 即使在最糟的日子裡，她也保持樂觀。

toeic.example_en: He sounded pessimistic about finishing before Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 他對在星期五前完成的事情聽起來很悲觀。

toeic.example_en: Please accept my sincere thanks for your kind help.
toeic.example_zh: 請接受我對您善意幫助的誠摯感謝。

toeic.example_en: Be honest about your feelings during this conversation.
toeic.example_zh: 在這次談話中誠實地表達你的感受。

toeic.example_en: Our warmhearted neighbor always brings cookies on holidays.
toeic.example_zh: 我們熱心的鄰居在假日總會帶餅乾來。

toeic.example_en: He felt the boss was cold-hearted during the brief meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 他覺得老闆在短會中態度冷酷。

toeic.example_en: The students are always respectful to their elders.
toeic.example_zh: 學生們對長輩總是恭敬。

toeic.example_en: She remained humble after winning the big prize.
toeic.example_zh: 她在贏得大獎後仍然保持謙虛。

toeic.example_en: He gave a modest answer when asked about his work.
toeic.example_zh: 當被問及他的工作時，他給了一個謙遜的回答。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 充滿愛的；慈愛的
toeic.example_en: Their loving family always eats dinner together on Sundays.
toeic.example_zh: 他們充滿愛的家庭總在星期日一起吃晚餐。

toeic.example_en: She is a caring person who helps her elderly neighbor.
toeic.example_zh: 她是個關懷的人，會幫助年長的鄰居。

toeic.example_en: We had a lovely afternoon in the small flower garden.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在小花園度過了一個美好的下午。

toeic.example_en: We had a pleasant chat over coffee this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 今天早上我們邊喝咖啡邊愉快地聊天。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 不愉快的；討厭的
toeic.example_en: It was an unpleasant experience waiting two hours.
toeic.example_zh: 等了兩小時是一次不愉快的經歷。

toeic.example_en: His excuse for being late sounded ridiculous to us.
toeic.example_zh: 他遲到的藉口在我們聽來很荒謬。

toeic.example_en: It was silly of me to forget my umbrella again.
toeic.example_zh: 我又忘了帶傘真是太傻了。

toeic.example_en: He told a funny joke during lunch yesterday.
toeic.example_zh: 他昨天在午餐時講了一個好笑的笑話。

toeic.example_en: She wrote a humorous story for the school newspaper.
toeic.example_zh: 她為校刊寫了一篇幽默的故事。

toeic.example_en: The dripping tap was annoying all night long.
toeic.example_zh: 滴水的水龍頭整晚都很煩人。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 令人害怕的；可怕的
toeic.example_en: The storm last night was truly frightening to the kids.
toeic.example_zh: 昨晚的暴風雨真的把孩子們嚇到了。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 緊張刺激的；令人激動的
toeic.example_en: The roller coaster ride was thrilling for the teenagers.
toeic.example_zh: 雲霄飛車對青少年來說很刺激。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 令人驚奇的；了不起的
toeic.example_en: The sunset over the lake was truly amazing tonight.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚湖上的日落真是太美了。

toeic.example_en: We had a wonderful time at the family reunion.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在家庭聚會上度過了美好的時光。

toeic.example_en: The weather was awful during our short trip last weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 上週末我們短途旅行時天氣很糟糕。

toeic.example_en: I had a terrible headache all morning today.
toeic.example_zh: 今天整個早上我頭痛得很厲害。

toeic.example_en: The horrible noise woke up the whole apartment.
toeic.example_zh: 那可怕的噪音吵醒了整棟公寓。

toeic.example_en: We had a marvelous dinner at her new restaurant.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在她的新餐廳享用了一頓極好的晚餐。

toeic.example_en: The weather will be fantastic for the picnic on Saturday.
toeic.example_zh: 星期六野餐的天氣會很棒。

toeic.example_en: Talk to your friend about your feelings this evening.
toeic.example_zh: 今晚和你的朋友談談你的感受。

toeic.example_en: She has trouble showing her emotion in public.
toeic.example_zh: 她很難在公開場合表達自己的情感。

toeic.example_en: He has been in a good mood since Monday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 從星期一早上開始他的心情就一直很好。

toeic.example_en: Her face was full of joy on her birthday.
toeic.example_zh: 她生日那天臉上充滿了喜悅。

toeic.example_en: Simple things like family bring true happiness.
toeic.example_zh: 像家人這樣簡單的事物帶來真正的快樂。

toeic.example_en: There was sadness in her voice after the bad news.
toeic.example_zh: 聽到壞消息後她的聲音中帶著悲傷。
